如何利用预训练视频扩散 Transformer（视频 DiT）的时空先验，将其从逐帧生成范式转换为参考帧锚定的密集 3D 跟踪任务。

🔎现象分析

视频 DiT 的逐帧生成范式与参考帧锚定的密集 3D 跟踪存在根本性不匹配：前者生成每帧内容，后者需跨帧跟踪同一物理点。

🛠️主要方法

提出 TrackCraft3R，通过双潜变量表示（每帧几何潜变量 + 参考帧锚定跟踪潜变量）和时间 RoPE 对齐，将视频 DiT 改造为前馈式密集 3D 跟踪器，仅需 LoRA 微调。

📊实验结果

在标准稀疏和密集 3D 跟踪基准上评估，达到 SOTA 性能，并展示了对大运动和长视频的鲁棒性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个将视频扩散 Transformer 改造为前馈式密集 3D 跟踪器的方法
  • 提出双潜变量表示和时间 RoPE 对齐，实现从逐帧生成到参考帧锚定跟踪的范式转换
  • 在标准稀疏和密集 3D 跟踪基准上达到 SOTA，速度提升 1.3 倍，峰值内存减少 4.6 倍
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖预训练视频 DiT，可能受限于其训练数据分布
  • 仅处理单目视频，未扩展到多视角输入
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Dense 3D tracking from monocular video is fundamental to dynamic scene understanding. While recent 3D foundation models provide reliable per-frame geometry, recovering object motion in this geometry remains challenging and benefits from strong motion priors learned from real-world videos. Existing 3D trackers either follow iterative paradigms trained from scratch on synthetic data or fine-tune 3D reconstruction models learned from static multi-view images, both lacking real-world motion priors. Pre-trained video diffusion transformers (video DiTs) offer rich spatio-temporal priors from internet-scale videos, making them a promising foundation for 3D tracking. However, their frame-anchored formulation, which generates each frame's content, is fundamentally mismatched with reference-anchored dense 3D tracking, which must follow the same physical points from a reference frame across time. We present TrackCraft3R, the first method to repurpose a video DiT as a feed-forward dense 3D tracker. Given a monocular video and its frame-anchored reconstruction pointmap, TrackCraft3R predicts a reference-anchored tracking pointmap that follows every pixel of the first frame across time in a single forward pass, along with its visibility. We achieve this through two designs: (i) a dual-latent representation that uses per-frame geometry latents and reference-anchored track latents as dense queries, and (ii) temporal RoPE alignment, which specifies the target timestamp of each track latent. Together, these designs convert the per-frame generative paradigm of video DiTs into a reference-anchored tracking formulation with LoRA fine-tuning. TrackCraft3R achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard sparse and dense 3D tracking benchmarks, while running 1.3x faster and using 4.6x less peak memory than the strongest prior method. We further demonstrate robustness to large motions and long videos.

A Data Efficiency Study of Synthetic Fog for Object Detection Using the Clear2Fog Pipeline

High 2605.12608
Mohamed Ahmed Mohamed, Xiaowei Huang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：Clear2Fog 管道通过物理模拟雾天数据，以更少数据实现更优的自动驾驶目标检测性能。
🎯研究动机

自动驾驶在恶劣天气下的目标检测至关重要，但真实雾天标注数据稀缺，现有合成方法存在结构伪影和色偏，限制了模型鲁棒性。

❓解决问题

如何高效生成物理真实的雾天合成数据，并利用有限数据提升目标检测模型在雾天下的性能。

🔎现象分析

混合密度雾数据集在 75% 规模下训练优于固定密度雾数据集在 100% 规模下训练；十倍默认微调学习率可克服负迁移，提升 1.67 mAP。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Clear2Fog 管道，结合单目深度估计和新型大气光估计方法，在相机和激光雷达传感器层面物理模拟雾天，并生成混合密度雾数据集。

📊实验结果

使用 Waymo Open Dataset 的 270,000 张图像进行数据效率研究，并在真实雾天数据上验证 sim-to-real 迁移。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Clear2Fog 管道，实现物理真实且传感器一致的雾天数据合成，人类感知偏好达 92.95%。
  • 通过大规模数据效率研究，发现混合密度雾数据集在 75% 规模下优于固定密度雾数据集在 100% 规模下。
  • 发现十倍默认微调学习率可克服合成偏见的负迁移，在真实雾天数据上提升 1.67 mAP。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖单目深度估计精度，可能影响雾模拟质量。
  • 仅针对雾天，未涵盖雨雪等其他恶劣天气。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Object detection in adverse weather is critical for the safety of autonomous vehicles; however, the scarcity of labelled, real-world foggy data remains a significant bottleneck. In this paper, we propose Clear2Fog (C2F), an end-to-end, physics-based pipeline that simulates fog on clear-weather datasets while ensuring sensor-level consistency across camera and LiDAR. By using monocular depth estimation and a novel atmospheric light estimation method, C2F overcomes structural artifacts and chromatic biases common in existing techniques. A human perceptual study confirms C2F's physical realism, with the generated images being preferred 92.95% of the time over an established method. Utilising a training set of 270,000 images from the Waymo Open Dataset, we conduct an extensive data efficiency study to investigate how environmental diversity influences model robustness. Our findings reveal that models trained on mixed-density fog datasets at 75% scale outperform those trained on fixed-density datasets at 100% scale. Furthermore, we investigate the sim-to-real transfer by fine-tuning pre-trained models on real-world foggy data. We demonstrate that a tenfold increase over the default fine-tuning learning rate successfully overcomes negative transfer from synthetic biases, resulting in a 1.67 mAP improvement over real-only baselines. The C2F pipeline provides a scalable framework for enhancing the reliability of autonomous systems in adverse weather and demonstrates the potential of diverse synthetic datasets for efficient model training.

MambaPanoptic: A Vision Mamba-based Structured State Space Framework for Panoptic Segmentation

High 2605.12640
Qing Cheng, Damiano Bertolini, Wei Zhang, Dong Wang, Niclas Zeller, Daniel Cremers
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出全 Mamba 架构的 MambaPanoptic，通过 MambaFPN 和 QuadMamba 模块实现高效全景分割。
🎯研究动机

全景分割需要同时处理长程依赖、多尺度特征和密集预测，现有 CNN 和 Transformer 方法分别受限于感受野和二次计算复杂度。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个同时满足长程建模、多尺度表示和线性复杂度的全景分割框架。

🔎现象分析

CNN 难以建模长程依赖，Transformer 在高分辨率下计算成本过高。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MambaPanoptic，包含 MambaFPN（基于 Mamba 块的自顶向下特征金字塔，线性复杂度）和 QuadMamba 特征细化模块，结合 PanopticFCN 风格核生成器进行无提议预测。

📊实验结果

在 Cityscapes 和 COCO 全景分割基准上，MambaPanoptic 在相似模型大小下优于 PanopticDeepLab 和 PanopticFCN，在 Cityscapes 上 PQ 和 AP 匹配或超越 Mask2Former 且参数更少。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个全 Mamba 全景分割框架 MambaPanoptic。
  • 设计 MambaFPN 实现线性复杂度的全局多尺度特征表示。
  • 引入 QuadMamba 模块增强特征细化，在 Cityscapes 和 COCO 上达到 SOTA 或可比性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极端小目标分割效果有限。
  • Mamba 模块的序列特性可能影响并行效率。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Panoptic segmentation requires the simultaneous recognition of countable thing instances and amorphous stuff regions, placing joint demands on long-range context modelling, multi-scale feature representation, and efficient dense prediction. Existing convolutional and transformer-based methods struggle to satisfy all three requirements concurrently: convolutional architectures are limited in their capacity to model long-range dependencies, while transformer-based methods incur quadratic computational cost that is prohibitive at high resolutions. In this paper, we propose MambaPanoptic, a fully Mamba-based panoptic segmentation framework that addresses these limitations through two principal contributions. First, we introduce MambaFPN, a top-down feature pyramid that leverages Mamba blocks to generate globally coherent, multi-scale feature representations with linear computational complexity. Second, we adopt a PanopticFCN-style kernel generator that produces unified thing and stuff kernels for proposal-free panoptic prediction, enhanced by a QuadMamba-based feature refinement module applied at multiple network stages. Experiments on the Cityscapes and COCO panoptic segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that MambaPanoptic consistently outperforms PanopticDeepLab and PanopticFCN under comparable model sizes, and matches or surpasses Mask2Former on Cityscapes in PQ and AP while requiring fewer parameters.

Still Camouflage, Moving Illusion: View-Induced Trajectory Manipulation in Autonomous Driving

High 2605.12743
Shuo Ju, Qingzhao Zhang, Huashan Chen, Xuheng Wang, Haotang Li, Wanqian Zhang, Feng Liu, Kebin Peng et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：利用视角变化本身作为攻击工具，通过静态对抗迷彩诱导自动驾驶系统产生虚假轨迹并触发急刹车。
🎯研究动机

现有物理对抗攻击需要复杂的多视角优化或动态变化补丁，部署成本高；而视角变化通常被视为挑战，本文将其转化为攻击工具，提出一种更易部署的静态攻击范式。

❓解决问题

如何利用车辆相对运动引起的视角变化，通过静态对抗迷彩诱导自动驾驶系统产生错误的轨迹预测（如虚假切入），从而触发不必要的急刹车。

🔎现象分析

静态迷彩在不同视角下呈现不同外观，随着车辆相对运动，这种视角依赖的外观变化自然产生跨帧一致的特征漂移，导致系统推断出物理上合理但错误的轨迹。

🛠️主要方法

设计一种静态、被动的对抗迷彩，安装在目标车辆上，利用视角变化随相对运动自然演化的特性，诱导感知系统产生持续的特征漂移，进而导致下游轨迹预测和决策错误。

📊实验结果

在 nuScenes 数据集上评估，以急刹车事件为指标，端到端成功率高达 87.5%，并测试了不同场景背景、目标车辆速度和感知模型下的鲁棒性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种新型攻击范式，将视角变化本身作为攻击工具，而非视为挑战。
  • 攻击仅需静态迷彩，无需多视角鲁棒性或主动干预，易于部署。
  • 在 nuScenes 数据集上实现高达 87.5% 的端到端急刹车成功率，并验证了跨场景、速度和感知模型的鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 攻击效果可能依赖于特定的视角变化范围和相对运动模式。
  • 未讨论对抗迷彩的物理可实现性和隐蔽性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing physical adversarial attacks on vision-based autonomous driving induce time-evolving perception errors, including biased object tracking or trajectory prediction, through (i) sophisticated physical patch inducing detection box drift when entering the view distance, or (ii) dynamically changing patches that cause different perception errors at different time. In both cases, viewing-angle variation is treated as a challenge, requiring adversarial patches to remain effective across frames under varying views, leading to complex multi-view optimization. In contrast, we show that viewing-angle variation itself can be turned into an attack tool. We design a new attack paradigm where a static, passive adversarial camouflage is mounted on a vehicle whose view-dependent appearance naturally evolves with relative motion, inducing consistent feature drift across frames. This causes the system to infer a physically plausible but incorrect trajectory, such as a false cut-in, which propagates to downstream decision-making and triggers unnecessary braking. Unlike prior approaches that require multi-view robustness or active intervention, our attack emerges from normal driving dynamics and is easy to deploy: a parked vehicle with a natural camouflage can induce hard braking in passing autonomous vehicles. We demonstrate the novel attack on nuScenes dataset, showing the effectiveness with an end-to-end success rate of up to 87.5%, measured by hard-braking events, and robustness across different scene backgrounds, victim vehicle speeds, and perception models.

M2Retinexformer: Multi-Modal Retinexformer for Low-Light Image Enhancement

High 2605.12556
Youssef Aboelwafa, Hicham G. Elmongui, Marwan Torki
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出多模态 Retinexformer，融合深度、亮度和语义先验提升低光图像增强效果。
🎯研究动机

低光图像增强面临噪声、伪影和颜色失真等复杂退化，现有 Retinex 深度学习方法主要依赖单模态 RGB 信息，缺乏对光照不变几何结构和场景语义的利用。

❓解决问题

如何有效融合深度、亮度和语义等多模态信息以提升低光图像增强性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 M2Retinexformer 框架，在渐进式精炼流程中引入深度线索、亮度先验和语义特征，通过多尺度提取和交叉注意力融合，并采用自适应门控动态平衡光照引导的自注意力和交叉注意力。

📊实验结果

在 LOL、SID、SMID 和 SDSD 基准上评估，整体优于 Retinexformer 和近期最先进方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将深度、亮度和语义多模态信息融入 Retinexformer 框架用于低光图像增强。
  • 提出自适应门控机制动态平衡不同模态的贡献。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖深度估计的准确性，在深度信息不可靠时性能可能下降。
  • 多模态特征提取和融合增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Low-light image enhancement is challenging due to complex degradations, including amplified noise, artifacts, and color distortion. While Retinex-based deep learning methods have achieved promising results, they primarily rely on single-modality RGB information. We propose M2Retinexformer (Multi-Modal Retinexformer), a novel framework that extends Retinexformer by incorporating depth cues, luminance priors, and semantic features within a progressive refinement pipeline. Depth provides geometric context that is invariant to lighting variations, while luminance and semantic features offer explicit guidance on brightness distribution and scene understanding. Modalities are extracted at multiple scales and fused through cross-attention, with adaptive gating dynamically balancing illumination-guided self-attention and cross-attention based on the reliability of auxiliary cues. Evaluations on the LOL, SID, SMID, and SDSD benchmarks demonstrate overall improvements over Retinexformer and recent state-of-the-art methods. Code and pretrained weights are available at this https URL

Reducing Bias and Variance: Generative Semantic Guidance and Bi-Layer Ensemble for Image Clustering

Medium 2605.12961
Feijiang Li, Zhenxiong Li, Jieting Wang, Zizheng Jiu, Saixiong Liu, Liang Du
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 GSEC 框架，通过生成式语义引导和双层集成同时降低图像聚类的偏差和方差，在六个基准上超越 18 种 SOTA 方法。
🎯研究动机

现有图像聚类方法依赖基于预定义词汇表的匹配技术，匹配空间有限导致适应性差，且主要关注降低偏差而忽视方差，限制了聚类性能。

❓解决问题

如何同时降低图像聚类中的偏差和方差，提升聚类性能。

🔎现象分析

现有方法仅关注偏差减少，忽略了方差对聚类稳定性和性能的影响。

🛠️主要方法

GSEC 框架：使用多模态大语言模型生成语义描述并通过加权平均得到图像嵌入；双层集成策略：内层通过 BatchEnsemble 集成跨模态信息，外层通过对齐机制整合输出。

📊实验结果

在六个基准数据集上与 18 种 SOTA 方法比较，GSEC 表现最优；进一步分析证实了同时降低偏差和方差的有效性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出生成式语义引导方法，利用 MLLM 生成语义描述并加权平均得到嵌入，减少偏差。
  • 设计双层集成策略，同时降低偏差和方差，提升聚类性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 MLLM 生成质量，可能受限于模型能力。
  • 双层集成可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Image clustering aims to partition unlabeled image datasets into distinct groups. A core aspect of this task is constructing and leveraging prior knowledge to guide the clustering process. Recent approaches introduce semantic descriptions as prior information, most of which typically relying on matching-based techniques with predefined vocabularies. However, the limited matching space restricts their adaptability to downstream clustering tasks. Moreover, these methods primarily focus on reducing bias to improve performance, frequently overlooking the importance of variance reduction. To address these limitations, we propose GSEC (Image Clustering based on Generative Semantic Guidance and Bi-Layer Ensemble), a framework designed to reduce bias through generative semantic guidance and mitigate variance via ensemble learning. Our method employs Multimodal Large Language Models to generate semantic descriptions and derive image embeddings via weighted averaging. Additionally, a bi-layer ensemble strategy integrates cross-modal information through BatchEnsemble in the inner layer and aligns outputs via an alignment mechanism in the outer layer. Comparative experiments demonstrate that GSEC outperforms 18 state-of-the-art methods across six benchmark datasets, while further analysis confirms its effectiveness in simultaneously reducing both bias and variance. The code is available at this https URL .

EgoForce: Robust Online Egocentric Motion Reconstruction via Diffusion Forcing

Medium 2605.13041
Inwoo Hwang, Donggeun Lim, Hojun Jang, Young Min Kim
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 EgoForce，一种基于扩散强制（Diffusion Forcing）的在线框架，用于从嘈杂的自我中心输入中鲁棒地重建长期全身运动。
🎯研究动机

自我中心视角在在线应用中广泛可用，但只能零星观察到手部，且现有生成框架假设固定长度观测窗口，不适合实时应用；快速推理常依赖自回归预测，牺牲了鲁棒性。

❓解决问题

如何从嘈杂、稀疏的自我中心观测（如头部轨迹和零星手部观测）中，在线、因果地重建长期全身运动。

🔎现象分析

自我中心视角只能零星观察到手部，且观测噪声大；现有离线方法假设固定窗口，自回归方法鲁棒性差。

🛠️主要方法

采用基于扩散强制（Diffusion Forcing）的时变噪声调度，建模随时间演化的不确定性，并在新流式观测到达时逐步去噪状态；结合噪声鲁棒的插补策略，在严格因果约束下生成稳定连贯的全身运动。

📊实验结果

实验表明，该在线框架在挑战性自我中心场景中优于现有在线和离线方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 EgoForce，首个基于扩散强制的在线全身运动重建框架，支持流式输入。
  • 设计时变噪声调度和噪声鲁棒插补策略，在因果约束下实现鲁棒、稳定的长期运动生成。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定传感器配置（如头戴设备），泛化性待验证。
  • 实时性能可能受扩散模型推理速度限制。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

With recent advances in embodied agents and AR devices, egocentric observations are readily available as input for real-world interactive online applications. However, egocentric viewpoints can only sporadically observe hands, in addition to the estimated head trajectory. We propose EgoForce, an online framework for reconstructing long-term full-body motion from noisy egocentric input. While existing generative frameworks can robustly handle noisy and sparse measurements, they assume a fixed-length observation window is available and are thus not suitable for real-time applications. Faster inference often relies on autoregressive prediction, sacrificing robustness. In contrast, we adopt a diffusion-based method with a temporally asymmetric noise schedule inspired by Diffusion Forcing. Specifically, our approach models temporally evolving uncertainty and incrementally denoises states as new streaming observations arrive. Combined with a noise-robust imputation strategy, EgoForce progressively generates stable and coherent full-body motion under strict causal constraints. Experiments demonstrate that our online framework outperforms existing online and offline methods, enabling long-horizon, full-body motion reconstruction in challenging egocentric scenarios.

Uncertainty-aware Spatial-Frequency Registration and Fusion for Infrared and Visible Images

Medium 2605.13049
Xingyuan Li, Haoyuan Xu, Xingyue Zhu, Jun Ma, Yang Zou, Zhiying Jiang, Jinyuan Liu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 SFRF 框架，通过不确定性估计和频域热辐射一致性解决红外与可见光图像融合中的配准误差累积问题。
🎯研究动机

红外与可见光图像融合在复杂环境下有重要应用，但未配准条件下的融合面临固有的错位问题，现有方法通过粗到细或多尺度变形场估计进行配准，却忽略了配准误差累积会污染融合阶段，导致图像质量严重下降。

❓解决问题

解决红外与可见光图像融合中配准误差累积导致融合图像退化的问题。

🔎现象分析

现有配准方法（粗到细预测变形参数或多尺度估计变形场）虽然直接，但忽略了累积误差，这些误差会污染融合阶段，严重恶化融合图像质量。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SFRF 框架，包含多尺度迭代配准（MIR）模块，利用不确定性估计动态减轻误差累积；采用热辐射分布一致性作为频域监督信号，确保红外热分布对齐；最后通过双分支空间 - 频率融合（DSFF）模块重建视觉上吸引人的图像。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SFRF 框架，将不确定性估计和红外热辐射分布一致性融入统一流水线，处理空间和频率域中的误差累积。
  • 设计多尺度迭代配准（MIR）框架，通过不确定性估计动态增强对齐精度。
  • 引入热辐射分布一致性作为频域监督信号，促进全局一致性。
  • 提出双分支空间 - 频率融合（DSFF）模块，结合空间几何特征和频率分布信息重建图像。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的红外热辐射分布先验。
  • 多尺度迭代配准可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Infrared and Visible Image Fusion (IVIF) has shown promise in visual tasks under challenging environments, but fusion under unregistered conditions faces inherent misalignments. Current studies to solve them either predict the deformation parameters coarse-to-fine (i.e., coarse registration and fine registration) or estimate the deformation fields in multi-scales for registration. Though straightforward, they overlook the cumulative errors in registration, which contaminate the fusion stage and severely deteriorate the resulting images. We introduce the Spatial-Frequency Registration and Fusion (SFRF) framework, which incorporates uncertainty estimation and infrared thermal radiation distribution consistency into a unified pipeline to handle the error accumulation for robust registration and fusion across both spatial and frequency domains. Specifically, SFRF constructs a Multi-scale Iterative Registration (MIR) framework that iteratively refines the deformation field across scales, leveraging uncertainty estimation at each stage to mitigate error accumulation and enhance alignment accuracy dynamically. To ensure the accurate alignment of infrared thermal distributions during registration, thermal radiation distribution consistency is employed as a frequency-domain supervisory signal, promoting global consistency in the frequency domain. Based on the spatial-frequency alignment, SFRF further adopts a Dual-branch Spatial-Frequency Fusion (DSFF) module, which incorporates spatial geometric features and frequency distribution information to reconstruct visually appealing images. SFRF achieves impressive performance across diverse datasets.

Flow Augmentation and Knowledge Distillation for Lightweight Face Presentation Attack Detection

Medium 2605.13108
Muhammad Shahid Jabbar, Muhammad Sohail Ibrahim, Taha Hasan Masood Siddique, Kejie Huang, Shujaat Khan
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：通过光流增强训练和知识蒸馏，实现轻量级人脸呈现攻击检测，无需推理时计算光流。
🎯研究动机

人脸呈现攻击检测（FacePAD）在多种攻击类型和采集条件下仍具挑战性；运动线索具有高判别力，但显式光流估计计算开销大，限制实时部署。

❓解决问题

如何在保留运动线索判别能力的同时，消除推理阶段的光流计算开销，实现轻量级实时 FacePAD。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出双分支教师模型，融合 RGB 外观和彩色编码光流运动线索；通过知识蒸馏将运动感知知识从教师转移到轻量级 RGB-only 学生模型，学生隐式学习运动敏感表示。

📊实验结果

在 Replay-Attack、Replay-Mobile、ROSE-Youtu、SiW-Mv2、OULU-NPU 等基准上评估，学生模型在 NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano 上达到 52 FPS。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出光流增强训练框架，无需推理时计算光流即可利用运动线索。
  • 设计双分支教师模型和知识蒸馏方法，实现轻量级学生模型性能接近或优于教师。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对未见过的攻击类型泛化能力有限。
  • 教师模型依赖光流计算，训练复杂度较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Face presentation attack detection (FacePAD) remains challenging under diverse spoofing representation, including 2D print and replay, 3D mask-based spoofing, makeup-induced appearance manipulation, and physical occlusions, as well as under varying capture conditions. Motion cues are highly discriminative for FacePAD but typically require explicit optical flow estimation, which introduces substantial computational overhead and limits real-time deployment. In this work, we leverage optical flow to enhance motion representation during training while eliminating the need for flow computation at inference. We propose a dual-branch teacher model that fuses appearance cues from RGB frames with motion cues derived from colorwheel-encoded optical flow, enabling effective modeling of micro-motions and temporal consistency. To enable efficient deployment, we introduce a knowledge distillation framework that transfers motion-aware knowledge from the flow-augmented teacher to a lightweight RGB-only student via logit distillation. As a result, the student implicitly learns motion-sensitive representations without requiring explicit flow estimation or additional feature extraction blocks at inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong performance across multiple benchmarks, achieving 0.0% HTER on Replay-Attack and Replay-Mobile, 0.94% HTER on ROSE-Youtu, 5.65% HTER on SiW-Mv2, and 0.42% ACER on OULU-NPU. The distilled student achieves performance comparable to or better than the teacher while significantly reducing parameters and FLOPs, achieving 52 FPS on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, indicating its suitability for real-time and resource-constrained FacePAD deployment.

Multi-Modal Guided Multi-Source Domain Adaptation for Object Detection

Medium 2605.13140
Sangin Lee, Seokjun Kwon, Jeongmin Shin, Namil Kim, Yukyung Choi
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 MS-DePro，利用深度图和文本多模态引导实现多源域适应目标检测，达到 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

通用目标检测在目标域与训练分布不同时性能下降，多源域适应（MSDA）优于混合数据的无监督域适应（UDA），但现有 MSDA 方法难以从域特定 RGB 图像中学习域无关特征并保留域特定信息。

❓解决问题

如何利用多模态域无关输入（深度图和文本）来改进多源域适应目标检测中的定位和分类。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MS-DePro，包含深度引导定位和多模态引导提示学习两部分：利用深度图生成域无关区域提议，融合多模态特征对齐可学习文本嵌入进行分类。

📊实验结果

在 MSDA 基准上达到 SOTA，并通过全面消融实验验证贡献有效性。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MS-DePro，首个利用深度图和文本多模态引导的多源域适应目标检测方法。
  • 在 MSDA 基准上达到 SOTA 性能，消融实验验证了各模块的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖深度图和文本模态的可用性，可能限制应用场景。
  • 未讨论在极端域差异或少量源域下的表现。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

General object detection (OD) struggles to detect objects in the target domain that differ from the training distribution. To address this, recent studies demonstrate that training from multiple source domains and explicitly processing them separately for multi-source domain adaptation (MSDA) outperforms blending them for unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). However, existing MSDA methods learn domain-agnostic features from domain-specific RGB images while preserving domain-specific information from the domain-agnostic feature map. To address this, we propose MS-DePro: Multi-Source Detector with Depth and Prompt, composed of (1) depth-guided localization and (2) multi-modal guided prompt learning. We leverage domain-agnostic input modalities, namely depth maps and text, to encode domain-agnostic characteristics. Specifically, we utilize depth maps to generate domain-agnostic region proposals for localization and integrate multi-modal features to align learnable text embeddings for classification. MS-DePro achieves state-of-the-art performance on MSDA benchmarks, and comprehensive ablations demonstrate the effectiveness of our contributions. Our code is available on this https URL .

GenCape: Structure-Inductive Generative Modeling for Category-Agnostic Pose Estimation

Medium 2605.13151
Jiyong Rao, Yu Wang, Shengjie Zhao
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出生成式框架 GenCape，通过变分推断自动学习关键点关系，无需预定义骨架，实现类别无关姿态估计。
🎯研究动机

现有类别无关姿态估计方法要么将关键点视为孤立实体，要么依赖人工定义的骨架先验，后者标注成本高且跨类别不灵活，限制了模型捕获实例级结构线索的能力。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖预定义骨架或文本描述的情况下，从少量支持样本中自动推断关键点间关系，实现准确的类别无关姿态估计。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GenCape 框架，包含迭代结构感知变分自编码器（i-SVAE）和组合图迁移（CGT）模块。i-SVAE 通过变分推断从支持特征中推断软实例特定邻接矩阵，并逐层嵌入图 Transformer 解码器以渐进细化结构先验；CGT 通过贝叶斯融合和注意力重加权自适应聚合多个潜在图为查询感知结构，增强对视觉不确定性和支持偏差的鲁棒性。

📊实验结果

在 MP-100 数据集上，1-shot 和 5-shot 设置下，方法相比基于图的基线取得显著提升，与基于文本的方法性能相当。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GenCape，首个基于生成式建模的类别无关姿态估计框架，无需预定义骨架或文本描述。
  • 设计 i-SVAE 模块，通过变分推断学习实例特定的软邻接矩阵，实现结构先验的渐进细化。
  • 设计 CGT 模块，通过贝叶斯融合和注意力重加权自适应聚合多图，提升对视觉不确定性和支持偏差的鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖支持样本的质量和数量，极端少样本下性能可能受限。
  • 生成式框架的计算开销可能较大，实时性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Category-agnostic pose estimation (CAPE) aims to localize keypoints on query images from arbitrary categories, using only a few annotated support examples for guidance. Recent approaches either treat keypoints as isolated entities or rely on manually defined skeleton priors, which are costly to annotate and inherently inflexible across diverse categories. Such oversimplification limits the model's capacity to capture instance-wise structural cues critical for accurate pixel-level localization. To overcome these limitations, we propose GenCape, a Generative-based framework for CAPE that infers keypoint relationships solely from image-based support inputs, without additional textual descriptions or predefined skeletons. Our framework consists of two principal components: an iterative Structure-aware Variational Autoencoder (i-SVAE) and a Compositional Graph Transfer (CGT) module. The former infers soft, instance-specific adjacency matrices from support features through variational inference, embedded layer-wise into the Graph Transformer Decoder for progressive structural priors refinement. The latter adaptively aggregates multiple latent graphs into a query-aware structure via Bayesian fusion and attention-based reweighting, enhancing resilience to visual uncertainty and support-induced bias. This structure-aware design facilitates effective message propagation among keypoints and promotes semantic alignment across object categories with diverse keypoint topologies. Experimental results on the MP-100 dataset show that our method achieves substantial gains over graph-support baselines under both 1- and 5-shot settings, while maintaining competitive performance against text-support counterparts.

Unifying Physically-Informed Weather Priors in A Single Model for Image Restoration Across Multiple Adverse Weather Conditions

Medium 2605.13158
Jiaqi Xu, Xiaowei Hu, Lei Zhu, Pheng-Ann Heng
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出统一物理先验模型，利用天气先验信息增强特征，实现多恶劣天气下的图像恢复。
🎯研究动机

现有图像恢复方法未考虑天气特有的物理视觉过程（如近处雨滴、远处雾霾），导致恢复性能受限。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个统一的模型，利用天气物理先验信息，在多种恶劣天气条件下恢复清晰场景。

🔎现象分析

天气伪影随粒子与相机距离变化：近处受雨滴影响，远处受雾霾影响。

🛠️主要方法

提出统一成像模型，结合可见粒子与雾状散射效应；设计天气先验网络，利用估计的遮挡和透射率增强特征。

📊实验结果

在多种恶劣天气场景下进行实验，结果表明方法优于现有技术。

⭐主要贡献
  • 分析了恶劣天气下的共同视觉因素，提出了统一的成像模型。
  • 设计了基于天气先验的网络，利用遮挡和透射率先验增强特征恢复。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极端天气或混合天气场景的泛化性有限。
  • 先验估计的准确性可能影响最终恢复效果。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Image restoration under multiple adverse weather conditions aims to develop a single model to recover the underlying scene with high visibility. Weather-related artifacts vary with the particle's distance to the camera according to the established scene visibility analysis, where close and faraway regions are more affected by falling drops and fog effects, respectively. Existing methods fail to consider this weather-specific physical visual process; thus, the restoration performance is limited. In this work, we analyze the common visual factors in adverse weather conditions and present a unified imaging model that considers the individually visible particles and fog-like aggregate scattering effects. Further, we design a novel weather-prior-based network, which leverages the weather-related prior information to help recover the scene by enhancing the features using the estimated occlusion and transmission. Experimental results in multiple adverse scenarios show the superiority of our method against state-of-the-art methods.

McCast: Memory-Guided Latent Drift Correction for Long-Horizon Precipitation Nowcasting

Medium 2605.13197
Penghui Wen, Yu Luo, Lintao Wang, Mengwei He, Patrick Filippi, Thomas Francis Bishop, Zhiyong Wang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出记忆引导的潜在漂移校正方法，通过显式校正自回归累积误差实现长时程降水临近预报。
🎯研究动机

现有降水临近预报方法采用自回归方式，在长时程预测中累积误差导致预测偏离物理演化轨迹，而现有改进主要关注单步精度，缺乏全局时间演化和主动漂移校正机制。

❓解决问题

长时程降水临近预报中自回归累积误差导致的预测漂移问题。

🔎现象分析

自回归预测在长时程中误差累积，使预测偏离物理合理的演化轨迹。

🛠️主要方法

提出 McCast，包含漂移校正记忆库（DCBank），通过校正潜在提取器和校正感知记忆检索两个阶段，利用时间组织的历史记忆主动校正自回归潜在演化中的漂移。

📊实验结果

在 SEVIR 和 MeteoNet 两个广泛使用的基准上评估，McCast 在长时程预测中达到最先进性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出记忆引导的潜在漂移校正方法，显式校正自回归累积误差。
  • 设计漂移校正记忆库（DCBank），利用时间组织记忆进行两阶段漂移校正。
  • 在 SEVIR 和 MeteoNet 基准上达到最先进性能，尤其在长时程预测场景中表现突出。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的历史记忆数据。
  • 两阶段校正可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing precipitation nowcasting methods typically adopt an autoregressive formulation, where future states are predicted from previous outputs. However, such an approach accumulates errors over long rollouts, causing forecasts to drift away from physically plausible evolution trajectories. Although various studies have attempted to alleviate this problem by improving step-wise prediction accuracy, they largely neglect the global temporal evolution of meteorological systems and lack mechanisms to actively correct drift during rollouts. To address this issue, we propose McCast, a memory-guided latent drift correction method for precipitation nowcasting. Rather than treating memory as an unordered dictionary of latent states for passive conditioning, McCast leverages temporally organized memory to actively correct autoregressive latent evolution. Specifically, McCast introduces a Drift-Corrective Memory Bank (DCBank) that explicitly estimates the temporally consistent drift corrections to calibrate the divergent trajectory. DCBank performs drift correction in two stages: a Corrective Latent Extractor first predicts an initial correction from the current prediction and a reference latent state, and a Correction-Aware Memory Retrieval module then refines the initial correction using temporally organized historical memory. By explicitly correcting latent evolution, instead of improving step-wise prediction accuracy only, McCast produces more temporally coherent and reliable long-horizon forecasts. Experiments on two widely used benchmarks, SEVIR and MeteoNet, show that McCast achieves state-of-the-art performance, particularly in challenging long-horizon forecasting scenarios.

X-Restormer++: 1st Place Solution for the UG2+ CVPR 2026 All-Weather Restoration Challenge

Medium 2605.13258
Youwei Pan, Leilei Cao, Yingfang Zhu, Fengjie Zhu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：基于 X-Restormer 框架，通过空间自适应缩放、梯度引导边缘感知损失和扩展数据集，赢得 CVPR 2026 全天气图像恢复挑战赛第一名。
🎯研究动机

全天气条件下的图像恢复是计算机视觉中的难点，现有方法在空间适应性和边缘细节保持上仍有不足，且缺乏大规模多样化训练数据。

❓解决问题

解决全天气条件下图像恢复的性能瓶颈，提升模型对空间结构和边缘细节的恢复能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于 X-Restormer 双注意力框架，集成 Restormer-Plus 的空间自适应输入缩放机制，引入梯度引导边缘感知损失，并扩展训练数据集。

📊实验结果

在 UG2+ 挑战赛 Track 1 中取得第一名，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出空间自适应输入缩放机制以增强空间适应性
  • 引入梯度引导边缘感知损失以改善结构细节和边缘保持
  • 扩展训练数据集，提升模型泛化能力
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法在特定挑战赛场景下验证，泛化性需进一步测试
  • 扩展数据集可能引入噪声或分布偏移
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In this work, we present our winning solution for the 8th UG2+ Challenge (CVPR 2026) Track 1: Image Restoration under All-weather Conditions. Our method is built upon the strong baseline framework X-Restormer, which effectively captures both channel-wise global dependencies and spatially-local structural information through its dual-attention design (Multi-DConv Head Transposed Attention and Overlapping Cross-Attention). To further boost the restoration performance, we propose several key improvements. First, we integrate the spatially-adaptive input scaling mechanism from Restormer-Plus to dynamically adjust the spatial weights of the input image, enhancing spatial adaptability. Second, to better preserve structural details and edge information, we introduce a novel Gradient-Guided Edge-Aware (GGEA) loss, which is combined with L1 and Multi-Scale SSIM losses in a unified training objective. Third, we significantly expand the training data by incorporating an extra 24,500 degraded-clean image pairs from FoundIR and WeatherBench alongside the original WeatherStream dataset. With these strategies, our proposed method successfully ranks the 1st place in the challenge.

Color Constancy in Hyperspectral Imaging via Reduced Spectral Spaces

Medium 2605.13306
G. Dofri Vidarsson, Liying Lu, Sabine Süsstrunk
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：通过降维光谱空间，系统研究高光谱成像中光照估计的性能与光谱维度关系。
🎯研究动机

传统光照估计方法基于 RGB 图像，受限于有限光谱信息；高光谱成像虽能缓解歧义，但高维度带来计算和统计挑战。

❓解决问题

如何有效利用高光谱信息进行光照估计，并分析光谱维度与表示选择对性能的影响。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

采用 Color-by-Correlation (CbC)框架作为估计骨干，系统研究不同光谱降维策略下的光照估计性能。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统研究了光谱维度和表示选择对光照估计性能的影响
  • 识别出紧凑光谱表示优于传统 RGB 方法的条件
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于 CbC 框架，可能不适用于其他光照估计方法
  • 实验细节未在摘要中提供
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Illuminant estimation aims to infer scene illumination from image measurements despite intrinsic ambiguities between surface reflectance and lighting. Most existing methods operate on trichromatic RGB images and are therefore fundamentally limited by the restricted spectral information available. Hyperspectral imaging provides a much richer representation of scene radiance and has the potential to alleviate these ambiguities. However, its high dimensionality poses computational and statistical challenges. In this work, we systematically study the effect of spectral dimensionality and representation choice on illuminant estimation performance using hyperspectral data. We adopt the practical and effective Color-by-Correlation (CbC) framework as the estimation backbone and analyze its behavior under different spectral dimensionality reduction strategies. Our results offer practical insights into how hyperspectral information can be efficiently exploited for illuminant estimation and identify conditions under which compact spectral representations outperform conventional RGB-based approaches. The code is available at this https URL .

PreFIQs: Face Image Quality Is What Survives Pruning

Medium 2605.13396
Jan Niklas Kolf, Guray Ozgur, Andrea Atzori, Žiga Babnik, Vitomir Štruc, Naser Damer, Fadi Boutros
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：PreFIQs 通过剪枝前后嵌入的几何位移无监督评估人脸图像质量，无需训练即达 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

现有 FIQA 方法通常需要监督训练或复杂设计，缺乏无监督且高效的方案。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖训练或标签的情况下，准确评估人脸图像对识别系统的效用。

🔎现象分析

低质量人脸图像的嵌入在模型剪枝后发生更大几何位移，表明其依赖脆弱参数。

🛠️主要方法

计算预训练 FR 模型与其剪枝版本提取的 L2 归一化嵌入之间的欧氏距离作为质量分数。

📊实验结果

在八个基准和四个 FR 模型上评估，与 SOTA 方法比较，取得多项新 SOTA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出无监督、免训练的 FIQA 框架 PreFIQs，基于 PIE 假设。
  • 通过 Jacobian- 向量积分析提供一阶理论证明。
  • 在八个基准和四个 FR 模型上达到 SOTA 或竞争性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论分析仅为一阶近似，可能忽略高阶效应。
  • 依赖预训练 FR 模型，模型选择可能影响结果。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Face Image Quality Assessment (FIQA) evaluates the utility of a face image for automated face recognition (FR) systems. In this work, we propose PreFIQs, an unsupervised and training-free FIQA framework grounded in the Pruning Identified Exemplar (PIE) hypothesis. We hypothesize that low-utility face images rely disproportionately on fragile network parameters, resulting in larger geometric displacement of their embeddings under model sparsification. Accordingly, PreFIQs quantifies image utility as the Euclidean distance between L2-normalized embeddings extracted from a pre-trained FR model and its pruned counterpart. We provide a first-order theoretical justification via a Jacobian-vector product analysis, demonstrating that this empirical drift serves as a computationally efficient approximation of the exact geometric sensitivity of the latent embedding manifold. Extensive experiments across eight benchmarks and four FR models demonstrate that PreFIQs achieves competitive or superior performance compared to state-of-the-art FIQA methods, including establishing new state-of-the-art results on several benchmarks, without any training or supervision. These results validate parameter sparsification as a principled and practically efficient signal for face image utility, and demonstrate that quality is, in essence, what survives pruning.

Neural Video Compression with Domain Transfer

Medium 2605.13476
Tiange Zhang, Rongqun Lin, Xiandong Meng, Haofeng Wang, Xing Tian, Qi Zhang, Siwei Ma
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 DCVC-DT，通过在线域迁移和动态 RD 调整提升神经视频压缩的泛化能力。
🎯研究动机

神经视频编码中训练与测试数据之间存在域差异，导致性能下降，现有方法难以有效应对。

❓解决问题

如何在不修改编解码器参数的前提下，自适应地缩小训练与测试数据之间的域差异，提升压缩效率和泛化能力。

🔎现象分析

训练与测试数据分布不一致会导致性能显著下降，且误差传播会加剧退化。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DCVC-DT 框架，包含轻量级在线域迁移机制（动态调整编码潜在表示）和帧级动态 RD 调整方案（根据质量波动调节率失真损失权重）。

📊实验结果

在多个测试集上实验，相比基线 DCVC-DC 节省高达 6.21% 的比特率，显著增强泛化能力并缓解误差传播。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出在线域迁移机制，无需修改编解码器参数即可自适应缩小域差异
  • 设计帧级动态 RD 调整方案，提升率失真性能
⚠️方法局限
  • 域迁移机制可能增加推理计算开销
  • 动态 RD 调整依赖质量波动估计，可能引入额外复杂度
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Content-adaptive compression has always been a key direction in neural video coding (NVC), aiming to mitigate the domain gap between training and testing data. Such gaps often arise from distributional discrepancies between training and inference data, which may cause noticeable performance degradation when the testing content differs from the training distribution. To tackle this challenge, we propose DCVC-DT, a domain transfer enhanced neural video compression framework. Specifically, we design a lightweight online domain transfer (DT) mechanism that dynamically adapts the encoded latent representation during inference, effectively bridging the domain gap without modifying the encoder or decoder parameters. In addition, we develop a frame-level dynamic RD (Rate and Distortion) adjustment scheme that actively regulates the ratio of R and D in the loss function based on quality fluctuation, thereby improving rate-distortion performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DCVC-DT achieves up to 6.21% bitrate savings over the baseline DCVC-DC, while significantly enhancing generalization to unseen testing data and alleviating error propagation. Our code is available at this https URL .

Phy-CoSF: Physics-Guided Continuous Spectral Fields Reconstruction and Super-Resolution for Snapshot Compressive Imaging

Medium 2605.13583
Wudi Chen, Zhiyuan Zha, Xin Yuan, Shigang Wang, Bihan Wen, Jiantao Zhou, Gang Yan, Zipei Fan et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出物理引导的连续光谱场重建方法，实现快照压缩成像中的任意波长高保真超分辨率重建。
🎯研究动机

现有 CASSI 重建方法局限于固定离散光谱输出，无法实现连续光谱重建或光谱超分辨率，限制了光谱信息的完整利用。

❓解决问题

如何从单次 2D 测量中重建出任意目标波长的连续高保真 3D 高光谱图像。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Phy-CoSF，融合深度展开网络与隐式神经表示，采用两阶段架构连接离散波长训练与连续光谱渲染，核心是连续光谱场模块，包含三分支跨域特征混合器和光谱合成头。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集上实验，结果表明 Phy-CoSF 在重建保真度和光谱细节保持上优于多种现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出物理引导的连续光谱场重建框架，实现 CASSI 中任意光谱分辨率的连续建模。
  • 设计连续光谱场模块，通过动态先验和跨域特征融合提升重建保真度和光谱细节。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对计算资源要求较高。
  • 未提及对噪声或压缩比的鲁棒性分析。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent advances have demonstrated that coded aperture snapshot spectral imaging (CASSI) systems show great potential for capturing 3D hyperspectral images (HSIs) from a single 2D measurement. Despite the inherent spectral continuity of scenes captured by CASSI, most existing reconstruction methods are restricted to fixed, discrete spectral outputs, thereby precluding continuous spectral reconstruction or spectral super-resolution. To address this challenge, we propose Phy-CoSF, which synergizes deep unfolding networks with implicit neural representations, establishing a new paradigm for continuous spectral reconstruction and super-resolution in CASSI. Specifically, we propose a two-phase architecture that bridges discrete-wavelength training with continuous spectral rendering, enabling the synthesis of high-fidelity HSIs at arbitrary target wavelengths. At the core of our framework lies the continuous spectral fields (CoSF) module, embedded within each unfolding stage as a dynamic prior, which comprises a triple-branch cross-domain feature mixer for comprehensive spatial-frequency-channel feature fusion, alongside a spectral synthesis head that generates spectral intensities by querying continuous wavelength coordinates. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that Phy-CoSF not only achieves continuous modeling at arbitrary spectral resolutions but also outperforms many state-of-the-art methods in both reconstruction fidelity and spectral detail preservation. Our code and more results are available at: this https URL .

WD-FQDet: Multispectral Detection Transformer via Wavelet Decomposition and Frequency-aware Query Learning

Medium 2605.13621
Chunjin Yang, Xiwei Zhang, Yiming Xiao, Fanman Meng
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 WD-FQDet，通过小波分解和频率感知查询学习解耦多光谱图像中的模态共享与特有特征，提升红外 - 可见光目标检测性能。
🎯研究动机

红外 - 可见光目标检测通过融合多光谱图像的互补特征提升性能，但现有方法存在模态共享特征偏差严重和模态特有特征不足的问题。

❓解决问题

如何有效解耦并融合红外和可见光模态中的共享与特有特征，以提升多光谱目标检测的准确性。

🔎现象分析

现有方法中模态共享特征存在严重偏差，模态特有特征不充分，限制了融合效果。

🛠️主要方法

提出 WD-FQDet 框架，通过小波分解将图像分为低频和高频域，分别设计低频同质性对齐模块（跨模态注意力对齐共享特征）和高频特异性保留模块（多尺度梯度一致性损失保留特有特征），并引入混合特征增强模块和频率感知查询选择模块动态调节贡献。

📊实验结果

在 FLIR、LLVIP 和 M3FD 数据集上，WD-FQDet 在多个评估指标上达到最先进性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于小波分解的频率域解耦方法，显式分离模态共享和特有特征。
  • 设计低频同质性对齐和高频特异性保留模块，分别增强共享和特有特征。
  • 提出频率感知查询选择模块，动态调节不同频率特征的贡献。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对复杂场景下的频率分解鲁棒性有限。
  • 计算开销可能因多模块设计而增加。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Infrared-visible object detection improves detection performance by combining complementary features from multispectral images. Existing backbone-specific and backbone-shared approaches still suffer from the problems of severe bias of modality-shared features and the insufficiency of modality-specific features. To address these issues, we propose a novel detection framework WD-FQDet that explicitly decouples modality-shared and modality-specific information from infrared and visible modalities in the new view of low- and high-frequency domains, allowing fusion strategies tailored to their frequency characteristics. Specifically, a low-frequency homogeneity alignment module is proposed to align modality-shared features across modalities via a cross-modal attention mechanism, and a high-frequency specificity retention module is proposed to preserve modality-specific features through the multi-scale gradient consistency loss. To reinforce the feature representation in the frequency domain, we propose a hybrid feature enhancement module that incorporates spatial cues. Furthermore, considering that the contributions of homogeneous and modality-specific features to object detection vary across scenarios, we propose a frequency-aware query selection module to dynamically regulate their contributions. Experimental results on the FLIR, LLVIP, and M3FD datasets demonstrate that WD-FQDet achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple evaluation metrics.

Pattern-Enhanced RT-DETR for Multi-Class Battery Detection

Medium 2605.13670
Xu Zhong, Enyuan Hu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 PaQ-RT-DETR，通过模式增强的动态查询生成提升多类电池检测精度。
🎯研究动机

电池检测在电子垃圾回收、工业质量控制和自动分拣中日益重要，现有方法缺乏系统比较和针对电池类别的优化。

❓解决问题

多类电池检测中，RT-DETR 存在查询激活不平衡问题，导致检测精度受限。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PaQ-RT-DETR，在 RT-DETR 中引入基于模式的动态查询生成，以缓解查询激活不平衡，计算开销可忽略。

📊实验结果

在约 8,591 张标注图像的数据集上实验，PaQ-RT-DETR-X 达到最高 mAP@50 0.782，比 RT-DETR-X 提升 2.8%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了多类电池检测的全面基准，系统比较了五种检测器。
  • 提出了 PaQ-RT-DETR 方法，在六个电池类别上均获得一致提升。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法仅在电池检测数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
  • 未提供与其他先进检测器的比较，如 DINO 或 DETR 变体。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurate and efficient battery detection is increasingly important for applications in electronic waste recycling, industrial quality control, and automated sorting systems. In this paper, we present both a comprehensive benchmark and a novel method for multi-class battery detection. We systematically compare three CNN-based detectors (YOLOv8n, YOLOv8s, YOLO11n) and two transformer-based detectors (RT-DETR-L, RT-DETR-X) on a publicly available dataset of approximately 8,591 annotated images under identical experimental conditions, and further propose PaQ-RT-DETR, which introduces pattern-based dynamic query generation into RT-DETR to alleviate query activation imbalance with negligible computational overhead. Among baselines, YOLO11n achieves the best CNN-based accuracy (mAP@50: 0.779) at only 2.6M parameters, while YOLOv8n delivers the fastest inference at ~1,667 FPS. PaQ-RT-DETR-X achieves the highest overall mAP@50 of 0.782, surpassing RT-DETR-X by +2.8% with consistent per-class gains across all six battery categories including the data-scarce Bike Battery class. Our findings provide practical guidance for selecting object detection models in battery-related industrial applications.

Is Video Anomaly Detection Misframed? Evidence from LLM-Based and Multi-Scene Models

Medium 2605.12725
Furkan Mumcu, Michael J. Jones, Anoop Cherian, Yasin Yilmaz
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：论文质疑当前视频异常检测过度依赖多场景通用模型和 MLLM，导致语义偏差和空间定位缺失，主张回归单场景、空间感知的可解释方法。
🎯研究动机

当前视频异常检测研究偏向多场景通用模型，但真实应用通常针对单一场景，现有方法依赖 MLLM 和弱监督，忽略了场景特定的正常行为模式，导致语义偏差和定位能力不足。

❓解决问题

视频异常检测中，多场景通用模型和 MLLM 引入的语义偏差和空间定位缺失问题，以及这些方法是否偏离了真实应用需求。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，当前方法依赖视频级弱监督和 MLLM 预训练表示，使模型倾向于识别熟悉的语义异常类别而非场景特定偏差，抑制了空间定位，将异常检测简化为动作识别。

🛠️主要方法

通过视觉分析和实证评估，对比多场景通用模型与单场景、空间感知方法的性能差异，揭示现有方法的局限性。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 质疑当前视频异常检测的主流范式，指出其偏离真实应用需求。
  • 通过实验证明多场景通用模型和 MLLM 引入的语义偏差和空间定位缺失问题。
  • 呼吁回归单场景、空间感知和可解释的异常检测方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提出新的模型或方法，仅进行批判性分析。
  • 实验细节和定量结果未在摘要中给出。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent video anomaly detection research has expanded rapidly with an emphasis on general models of normality intended to work across many different scenes. While this focus has led to improvements in scalability and multi-scene generalization, it has also shifted the field away from modeling the scene-specific and context-dependent nature of normal behavior. Contemporary approaches frequently rely on video-level weak supervision and opaque pretrained representations from multi-modal large language models (MLLMs), which encourage models to respond to familiar semantic anomaly categories rather than to deviations from the normal patterns of a particular environment. This trend suppresses spatial localization, introduces semantic bias, and reduces anomaly detection to a form of action recognition. In this paper, we examine whether these prevailing formulations align with the core requirements of real-world VAD, which is typically performed within a single scene where normality is determined by local geometry, semantics, and activity patterns. Through targeted visual analyses and empirical evaluations, we demonstrate the practical consequences of these limitations and show that meaningful progress in VAD requires renewed focus on single-scene, spatially-aware, and explainable formulations that capture the nuanced structure of normality within individual environments.

WildPose: A Unified Framework for Robust Pose Estimation in the Wild

Medium 2605.12774
Jianhao Zheng, Liyuan Zhu, Zihan Zhu, Iro Armeni
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：WildPose 提出统一框架，结合前馈模型与可微 BA，在动态和静态场景中均实现鲁棒相机位姿估计。
🎯研究动机

现有视觉 SLAM 和 SfM 方法大多假设静态场景，而动态场景下的位姿估计仍缺乏统一且鲁棒的解决方案。

❓解决问题

在动态环境中鲁棒地估计单目相机位姿，同时保持静态和低自运动场景下的最优性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出语义方法脆弱、逐序列优化在短序列上失败、学习模型在纯静态场景中性能下降。

🛠️主要方法

利用预训练 MASt3R 特征骨干构建 3D 感知更新算子，结合可微束调整（BA）和高容量运动掩码检测器。

📊实验结果

在动态（Wild-SLAM, Bonn）、静态（TUM, 7-Scenes）和低自运动（Sintel）基准上均优于先前方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出统一框架 WildPose，在动态和静态场景中均表现鲁棒。
  • 设计 3D 感知更新算子，连接前馈模型与可微 BA。
  • 引入基于多级 3D 感知特征的运动掩码检测器。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖预训练特征骨干，可能限制泛化性。
  • 未提及对极端动态或遮挡场景的鲁棒性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Estimating camera pose in dynamic environments is a critical challenge, as most visual SLAM and SfM methods assume static scenes. While recent dynamic-aware methods exist, they are often not unified: semantic-based approaches are brittle, per-sequence optimization methods fail on short sequences, and other learned models may degrade on static-only scenes. We present WildPose, a unified monocular pose estimation framework that is robust in dynamic environments while maintaining state-of-the-art performance on static and low-ego-motion datasets. Our key insight is to connect two powerful paradigms in modern 3D vision: the rich perceptual frontend of feedforward models and the end-to-end optimization of differentiable bundle adjustment (BA). We achieve this with a 3D-aware update operator built on a frozen, pre-trained MASt3R feature backbone, together with a high-capacity motion mask detector that uses multi-level 3D-aware features from the same backbone. Extensive experiments show WildPose consistently outperforms prior methods across dynamic (Wild-SLAM, Bonn), static (TUM, 7-Scenes), and low-ego-motion (Sintel) benchmarks.

FRAME: Forensic Routing and Adaptive Multi-path Evidence Fusion for Image Manipulation Detection

Medium 2605.12826
Kaixiang Zhao, Tianrun Yu, Aoxu Zhang, Junhao Su, Porter Jenkins, Amanda Hughes
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：FRAME 通过自适应路由和多路径证据融合，提升图像篡改检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
🎯研究动机

现有图像篡改检测方法（手工或深度学习）在鲁棒性、证据完整性和跨操纵类型泛化方面存在局限，难以应对日益复杂的图像编辑和生成技术。

❓解决问题

如何整合多种取证算法，自适应选择信息路径并融合互补证据，以提高图像篡改检测与定位的性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

FRAME 构建多路径分析空间，对每张输入图像自适应选择信息丰富的取证路径，并融合互补证据以提升检测和定位性能。

📊实验结果

摘要提到在多种篡改场景下验证了有效性，但未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 FRAME 框架，通过自适应路由和多路径证据融合实现鲁棒的图像篡改检测。
  • 在多种篡改场景下验证了方法的有效性，并开源代码。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预定义的取证算法库，扩展性需进一步验证。
  • 自适应路由的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The proliferation of sophisticated image editing tools and generative artificial intelligence models has made verifying the authenticity of digital images increasingly challenging, with important implications for journalism, forensic analysis, and public trust. Although numerous forensic algorithms, ranging from handcrafted methods to deep learning-based detectors, have been developed for manipulation detection, individual methods often suffer from limited robustness, fragmented evidence, or weak generalization across manipulation types and image conditions. To address these limitations, we present \textbf{FRAME}, a method for \textbf{F}orensic \textbf{R}outing and \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{M}ulti-path \textbf{E}vidence fusion for image manipulation detection. FRAME organizes diverse forensic algorithms into a multi-path analysis space, adaptively selects informative forensic paths for each input image, and fuses complementary evidence to improve detection and localization performance. By moving beyond single-method analysis and fixed fusion strategies, FRAME provides a more robust and flexible approach to image forensic reasoning while preserving interpretable forensic cues from multiple evidence sources. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of FRAME across diverse manipulation scenarios. Code is available at \href{ this https URL }{ this https URL }.

Improved monocular depth prediction using distance transform over pre-semantic contours with self-supervised neural networks

Medium 2605.08320
Marwane Hariat, Antoine Manzanera, David Filliat
arXiv PDF eess.IV
TL;DR：利用距离变换增强预语义轮廓信息，提升自监督单目深度估计在低纹理区域的性能。
🎯研究动机

自监督单目深度估计在低纹理区域因光度损失导致深度预测模糊，需要增强空间信息以提升判别能力。

❓解决问题

解决自监督单目深度估计在低纹理区域深度预测模糊的问题。

🔎现象分析

低纹理区域光度损失无法提供足够约束，导致深度预测歧义。

🛠️主要方法

联合估计预语义轮廓、深度和自运动，对预语义轮廓应用距离变换生成方差增强的新输入图像，并设计更有效的损失函数。

📊实验结果

在 KITTI、Cityscapes、Waymo、NYUv2 和 ScanNet 数据集上实验，模型表现鲁棒，超越竞争的自监督方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出利用距离变换增强预语义轮廓信息以提升低纹理区域深度预测的方法
  • 理论证明距离变换是最优的方差增强技术
  • 在多个数据集上超越现有自监督方法
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖预语义轮廓的准确性
  • 计算距离变换可能增加额外开销
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Monocular depth estimation (MDE) with self-supervised training approaches struggles in low-texture areas, where photometric losses may lead to ambiguous depth predictions. To address this, we propose a novel technique that enhances spatial information by applying a distance transform over pre-semantic contours, augmenting discriminative power in low texture regions. Our approach jointly estimates pre-semantic contours, depth and ego-motion. The pre-semantic contours are leveraged to produce new input images, with variance augmented by the distance transform in uniform areas. This approach results in more effective loss functions, enhancing the training process for depth and ego-motion. We demonstrate theoretically that the distance transform is the optimal variance-augmenting technique in this context. Through extensive experiments on KITTI, Cityscapes, Waymo, NYUv2 and ScanNet our model demonstrates robust performance, surpassing competing self-supervised methods in MDE.

Scale-Gest: Scalable Model-Space Synthesis and Runtime Selection for On-Device Gesture Detection

Medium 2605.12506
Abdul Basit, Saim Rehman, Muhammad Shafique
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：Scale-Gest 通过运行时自适应选择模型 - 分辨率 - 步长配置，在设备端手势检测中实现 4 倍能效提升。
🎯研究动机

在移动设备上实现基于 ML 的手势检测面临实时性、能耗和内存的严格约束，且电池电量动态变化，现有固定检测器方案无法充分利用优化机会。

❓解决问题

如何在资源受限的移动设备上，根据电池电量和用户约束动态调整手势检测模型，以在保持高检测性能的同时显著降低能耗和延迟。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Scale-Gest 框架，包含：1) 将检测器空间扩展为密集的 tiny-YOLO 架构族；2) 通过分析不同模型 - 分辨率 - 步长工作点，生成多个设备校准的 ACE（精度 - 复杂度 - 能耗）配置文件；3) 轻量级运行时控制器根据用户约束和电池电量选择合适 ACE 模式；4) 运动感知的手势跟踪 ROI 门控裁剪输入以降低复杂度。

📊实验结果

在电池供电的笔记本电脑上运行手势流，ACE 控制器将每帧能耗从 6.9 mJ 降至 1.6 mJ（4 倍降低），同时保持事件级 F1=0.8-0.9 和低平均延迟 6 ms。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Scale-Gest，一种运行时自适应手势检测框架，通过模型空间合成和运行时选择实现能效优化。
  • 引入多个设备校准的 ACE 配置文件，并设计轻量级运行时控制器。
  • 发布带时间标注的驾驶员模拟手势数据集 DSG-18。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对特定手势检测场景（如驾驶模拟）验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
  • tiny-YOLO 架构族可能不适用于更复杂的手势或高精度需求场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Realizing on-device ML-based gesture detection under tight real-time performance, energy and memory constraints is challenging, especially when considering mobile devices with varying battery-power levels. Existing EdgeAI deployments typically rely on a single fixed detector, limiting optimization opportunities. We present Scale-Gest, a novel run-time adaptive gesture detection framework that expands the detector space into a dense family of tiny-YOLO architectures. We introduce multiple novel device-calibrated ACE (Accuracy-Complexity-Energy) profiles by analyzing different model-resolution-stride operating points. A lightweight run-time controller selects an appropriate ACE mode under user-defined and battery constraints, while a motion-aware hand-gesture-tracking ROI gate crops the input for reduced complexity detection. To evaluate performance of our system in real-world car driving scenarios, we introduce a temporally-annotated Driver Simulated Gesture (DSG-18) dataset. Scale-Gest maintains event-level F1 while significantly reducing energy and latency compared to single-detector approaches. On a battery-powered laptop running gesture streams, our ACE controller reduces per-frame energy by 4x (from 6.9 mJ to 1.6 mJ) while maintaining high gesture-detection performance (event-level F1 = 0.8-0.9) and low mean latency (6 ms).

医学图像 21 篇

Prediction of Rectal Cancer Regrowth from Longitudinal Endoscopy

High 2605.12855
Jorge Tapias Gomez, Despoina Kanata, Aneesh Rangnekar, Christina Lee, Hannah Williams, Hannah Thompson, J. Joshua Smith, Francisco Sanchez-Vega et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 TREX，一种基于纵向内镜图像的深度学习模型，用于早期检测直肠癌局部肿瘤再生。
🎯研究动机

临床研究表明观察等待策略对直肠癌患者有益，但缺乏客观准确的方法从随访检查中早期检测局部肿瘤再生。

❓解决问题

如何利用纵向内镜图像对（再分期和随访）准确区分完全缓解与局部再生，并实现早期检测。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

TREX 采用孪生 Swin Transformer 提取纵向图像特征，并通过双交叉注意力融合特征，无需空间配准。

📊实验结果

在检测局部再生任务中，TREX 达到 97%±6% 的灵敏度和 90%±3% 的平衡准确率；早期检测在 3-6 个月和 6-12 个月分别达到 74%±1% 和 62%±4% 的平衡准确率；临床验证准确率 86.21% vs 临床医生 87.84%±1.28%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 TREX，一种纵向深度学习方法，利用内镜图像对检测直肠癌局部再生。
  • 在早期检测任务中，TREX 在临床确认前 3-6 个月和 6-12 个月均优于基线。
  • 临床验证显示 TREX 的总体准确率与主治医师相当。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的内镜图像对。
  • 样本量可能有限，泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Clinical trial studies indicate benefit of watch-and-wait (WW) surveillance for patients with rectal cancer showing a complete or near clinical response (CR) directly after treatment (restaging). However, there are no objectively accurate methods to early detect local tumor regrowth (LR) in patients undergoing WW from follow-up exams. Hence, we developed Temporal Rectal Endoscopy Cross-attention (TREX), a longitudinal deep learning approach that combines pairs of images acquired at restaging and follow-up to distinguish CR from LR. TREX uses pretrained Swin Transformers in a siamese setting to extract features from longitudinal images and dual cross-attention to combine the features without spatial co-registration between image pairs. TREX and Swin-based baselines were trained under two settings: (a) detecting LR or CR at the last available follow-up and (b) early detection of LR at 3--6, 6--12, and 12--24 months before clinical confirmation. TREX achieved the highest accuracy in detecting LR with a high sensitivity of 97% $\pm$ 6% and a balanced accuracy of 90% $\pm$ 3%, and outperformed all baselines in early detection at both 3--6 (74% $\pm$ 1%) and 6--12 months (62% $\pm$ 4%) prior to clinical detection. Clinical validation via a surgeon survey showed that TREX matched attending-level overall accuracy (TREX: 86.21% vs.\ Clinicians: 87.84% $\pm$ 1.28%). Finally, we explored TREX's ability to predict treatment response by combining pre-treatment (pre-TNT) and restaging endoscopies, achieving a balanced accuracy of 73% $\pm$ 12%. These results show that longitudinal deep learning analysis of endoscopy may improve surveillance and enable earlier identification of rectal cancer regrowth.

Adaptive Conformal Prediction for Reliable and Explainable Medical Image Classification

High 2605.12917
One Octadion, Novanto Yudistira, Lailil Muflikhah
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出自适应λ准则改进 RAPS，在医学图像分类中实现最坏情况覆盖保证，兼顾可靠性与效率。
🎯研究动机

深度学习模型在医学影像中常过度自信，标准共形预测方法优化平均效率，可能掩盖困难样本的严重失败，存在安全风险。

❓解决问题

标准共形预测方法（如 RAPS）在困难输入上存在分层欠覆盖问题，需要一种能保证最坏情况覆盖率的自适应方法。

🔎现象分析

标准 RAPS 在不确定样本上出现分层欠覆盖，而多标签预测对应解剖模糊区域的聚焦注意力。

🛠️主要方法

提出自适应λ准则（Adaptive Lambda Criterion），最小化预测集大小分层上的最坏情况覆盖违规。

📊实验结果

在 OrganAMNIST（58,850 张腹部 CT 图像，11 类）上，方法达到 95.72% 全局覆盖率，平均集大小 1.09，所有分层至少 90% 覆盖率；在 PathMNIST（107,180 张病理图像，9 类）上验证泛化性。Grad-CAM 分析显示多标签预测对应解剖模糊区域。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出自适应λ准则，改进 RAPS 以最小化最坏情况覆盖违规。
  • 在 OrganAMNIST 和 PathMNIST 上验证了方法在保持效率的同时提高可靠性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于分类任务，未在分割或回归任务上验证。
  • 自适应λ准则的计算开销可能略高于标准 RAPS。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deep learning models for medical imaging often exhibit overconfidence, creating safety risks in ambiguous diagnostic scenarios. While Conformal Prediction (CP) provides distribution-free statistical guarantees, standard methods such as Regularized Adaptive Prediction Sets (RAPS) optimize for average efficiency and can mask severe failures on difficult inputs. We propose an Adaptive Lambda Criterion for RAPS that minimizes the worst-case coverage violation across prediction set size strata. On OrganAMNIST (58,850 abdominal CT images, 11 classes), standard size-optimized RAPS converges to near-deterministic behavior with stratified undercoverage on uncertain samples, while our method achieves 95.72 percent global coverage with average set size 1.09 and at least 90 percent coverage across all strata. Cross-domain validation on PathMNIST (107,180 pathology images, 9 classes) confirms generalizability. Quantitative Grad-CAM analysis (rho = -0.30, p < 1e-22) shows that multi-label predictions correspond to focused attention on anatomically ambiguous regions. These results demonstrate that the proposed method improves reliability while maintaining efficiency, making it suitable for safety-critical medical AI applications.

Anatomy-Slot: Unsupervised Anatomical Factorization for Homologous Bilateral Reasoning in Retinal Diagnosis

High 2605.12929
Yingzhe Ma, Xiao Yang, Yuguo Yin, Zheyu Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出无监督解剖瓶颈模块 Anatomy-Slot，通过跨眼双向交叉注意力对齐结构槽位，提升视网膜诊断性能。
🎯研究动机

临床视网膜诊断本质上是双侧的，医生会比较双眼的同源结构（如视盘不对称），但大多数深度学习模型仅处理单眼表征，忽略了这种结构对应关系。

❓解决问题

如何让模型显式利用双眼之间的结构对应关系来提升视网膜诊断的准确性和鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Anatomy-Slot，将图像块令牌分解为槽位，并通过双向交叉注意力对齐双眼的槽位，形成无监督的解剖瓶颈。

📊实验结果

在 ODIR-5K 上使用 10 个随机种子进行实验，AUC 提升 4.2%（95% CI；Wilcoxon 符号秩检验，W=0，p=0.002）；在 REFUGE 上报告了定量视盘定位结果；进行了交叉注意力定位分析。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种无监督的解剖瓶颈模块，实现双眼同源结构的自动对齐。
  • 在 ODIR-5K 数据集上，相比 ViT-L 基线提升 AUC 4.2%，并通过配对破坏和压力测试验证了结构对应的重要性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法仅在视网膜诊断任务上验证，泛化性未知。
  • 无监督槽位分解可能无法保证解剖语义的精确对应。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Retinal diagnosis is inherently bilateral: clinicians compare homologous structures across eyes (e.g., optic disc asymmetry), yet most deep models operate on monocular representations. We investigate whether explicit structural correspondence improves diagnosis, and propose Anatomy-Slot to operationalize this hypothesis. Anatomy-Slot introduces an unsupervised anatomical bottleneck by decomposing patch tokens into slots and aligning slots across eyes via bidirectional cross-attention. On ODIR-5K with $n=10$ seeds, the method improves AUC by 4.2% over a matched ViT-L baseline (95% CIs; Wilcoxon signed-rank test, $W=0$, $p=0.002$). Pairing disruption and stress testing under Gaussian noise provide controlled tests of correspondence dependence and robustness under corruption. We further report quantitative optic disc grounding on REFUGE and cross-attention localization analysis.

A General Bézier Tree Encoding Counterfactual Framework for Retinal-Vessel-Mediated Disease Analysis

High 2605.13015
Tan Su, Ethan Elio Meidinger, Lin Gu, Ruogu Fang
arXiv PDF eess.IV
TL;DR：提出贝塞尔树编码反事实框架，通过显式操作血管几何结构生成反事实图像，验证视网膜血管与多种疾病的因果关系。
🎯研究动机

视网膜血管几何结构是血管疾病的关键生物标志物，但现有临床证据主要基于观察性研究，缺乏因果验证。现有生成反事实方法仅干预图像级疾病标签，无法隔离显式解剖结构。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个疾病无关的表示，使得能够对血管拓扑结构进行原子级扰动，从而生成反事实图像以验证血管几何与疾病之间的因果关系。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将血管网络抽象为互连的三次贝塞尔线段，建立显式保留结构拓扑且可原子扰动的表示；结合扩散生成器，在保持背景纹理的同时对几何轴（如迂曲度、管径）进行参数级 do 干预。

📊实验结果

在糖尿病视网膜病变、缺血性中风和阿尔茨海默病数据集上验证，通过剂量响应和像素级对照实验证明因果隔离有效性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出贝塞尔树编码反事实框架，实现血管拓扑结构的显式表示与原子级扰动。
  • 在糖尿病视网膜病变、缺血性中风和阿尔茨海默病三个独立队列上验证，反事实干预产生剂量响应式分类器预测偏移，且像素级对照实验排除分布外生成伪影。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量血管分割结果，对分割误差敏感。
  • 贝塞尔树表示可能无法完全捕捉复杂血管拓扑细节。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The geometry of the retinal vessel is a key biomarker of vascular diseases, yet clinical evidence remains primarily observational. Existing generative counterfactuals intervene only at the image-level disease label, failing to isolate explicit anatomical structure. To address this limitation, we propose the Bézier Tree Encoding Counterfactual Framework (BTECF). By abstracting vascular networks into interconnected cubic-Bézier segments, BTECF establishes a disease-agnostic representation in which structural topology is explicitly preserved and atomically perturbable. Coupling this encoding with a diffusion-based generator enables parameter-level do-interventions on explicit geometric axes (e.g., tortuosity, caliber) while preserving background fundus textures. We validate BTECF on diabetic retinopathy, together with independent cohorts for ischemic stroke and Alzheimer's disease. Isolated counterfactual interventions produce dose-responsive shifts in classifier predictions; a matched pixel-drop control attenuates this response by an order of magnitude or more, ruling out out-of-distribution generation artifacts. By enforcing causal isolation between vessel topology and pixel-level confounders, BTECF provides a unified generative paradigm for hypothesis verification across systemic diseases. To support reproducibility, the code will be publicly released upon acceptance.

BrainAnytime: Anatomy-Aware Cross-Modal Pretraining for Brain Image Analysis with Arbitrary Modality Availability

High 2605.13059
Guangqian Yang, Tong Ding, Wenlong Hou, Yue Xun, Ye Du, Qian Niu, Shujun Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：BrainAnytime 提出一种解剖感知跨模态预训练框架，支持任意模态组合（如 MRI 和 PET）的脑图像分析，在缺失模态场景下显著优于现有方法。
🎯研究动机

临床诊断中，患者通常只有不完整的影像模态子集，但现有 AI 模型大多要求固定输入模态，限制了实际应用。

❓解决问题

如何训练一个统一的模型，使其能够处理任意可用的影像模态（从单一 T1 到多模态组合），并有效利用结构 - 分子对应关系提升脑疾病分析性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 BrainAnytime 框架，包含三个关键组件：1) 跨模态蒸馏 (RCMD) 学习 MRI 与 PET 之间的结构 - 分子对应；2) 图谱引导课程掩码 (PACM) 优先关注疾病易感区域；3) 共享 3D 掩码自编码器 (Multi-MAE3D) 统一处理任意模态组合。

📊实验结果

在 34,899 个 3D 脑扫描（来自五个数据集）上预训练，并在四个下游任务和五种临床相关的模态设置上评估，与模态特定模型、缺失模态基线和大型脑 MRI 预训练基础模型比较。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 BrainAnytime，首个支持任意模态可用性（多序列 MRI 和 PET）的统一脑图像分析预训练框架。
  • 设计 RCMD 和 PACM 两种预训练策略，分别实现跨模态知识迁移和疾病相关区域聚焦。
  • 在四个下游任务和五种模态设置上大幅超越模态特定模型和缺失模态基线，尤其在 CN vs. AD 和 CN vs. MCI 分类上分别提升 6.2% 和 7.0%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于脑影像分析，未验证其他医学影像领域。
  • 依赖图谱引导，可能对图谱质量敏感。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Clinical diagnostic workups typically follow a modality escalation pathway: after initial clinical evaluation, clinicians begin with routine structural imaging (e.g., MRI), selectively add sequences such as FLAIR or T2 to refine the differential, and reserve molecular imaging (e.g., amyloid-PET) for cases that remain uncertain after standard evaluation. Consequently, patients are observed with heterogeneous and often incomplete modality subsets. However, most current AI models assume fixed data modalities as the model inputs. In this paper, we present BrainAnytime, a unified pretraining framework pretrained on 34,899 3D brain scans from five datasets that support brain image analysis under arbitrary modality availability spanning multi-sequence MRI and amyloid-PET. A single model accepts whatever imaging is available, from a lone T1 scan to a full multimodal workup. Pretraining learns structural-molecular correspondences between MRI and PET via cross-modal distillation (RCMD) and prioritizes disease-vulnerable anatomy via atlas-guided curriculum masking (PACM), all within a shared 3D masked autoencoder (Multi-MAE3D). Across four downstream tasks and five clinically motivated modality settings, BrainAnytime largely outperforms modality-specific models, missing-modality baselines, and large-scale brain MRI pretrained foundation models on most modality settings. Notably, it surpasses the strongest missing-modality baselines with relative improvements of 6.2% and 7.0% in average accuracy on CN vs. AD and CN vs. MCI classification, respectively. Code is available at this https URL .

PRA-PoE: Robust Alzheimer's Diagnosis with Arbitrary Missing Modalities

High 2605.13081
Guangqian Yang, Ye Du, Wenlong Hou, Qian Niu, Shujun Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 PRA-PoE 框架，通过原型对齐和不确定性感知专家乘积融合，解决阿尔茨海默病诊断中任意模态缺失问题。
🎯研究动机

真实 AD 诊断中模态缺失普遍，且训练与部署时缺失模式分布不同，导致表征偏移；现有方法隐式插补或合成模态，未显式建模模态可用性和不确定性，鲁棒性差且不确定性校准不佳。

❓解决问题

解决多模态学习中任意模态缺失导致的表征偏移和不确定性估计不准确问题。

🔎现象分析

缺失模式不匹配导致条件表征偏移；现有方法对合成特征过度自信，鲁棒性降低。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PRA-PoE 框架，包含原型锚定表征对齐（PRA）和不确定性感知专家乘积（UA-PoE）融合机制。PRA 利用可学习全局原型和可用性条件令牌编码模态可用性，区分观测与缺失模态，重合成缺失模态特征并自适应精炼观测表征以对齐潜在空间；UA-PoE 将每个模态建模为高斯专家，进行闭式专家乘积融合，高不确定性专家自动降权。

📊实验结果

在 ADNI 和 OASIS-3 数据集上，使用自然缺失数据训练，在所有非空模态组合上测试，PRA-PoE 一致优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PRA-PoE 框架，显式建模模态可用性和不确定性，减少表征偏移。
  • 在 ADNI 和 OASIS-3 数据集上，平均准确率相对提升 5.4% 和平均 F1 相对提升 10.9%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖全局原型质量，对极端缺失模式泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 高斯专家假设可能不适用于所有模态分布。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Missing modalities are prevalent in real-world Alzheimer's disease (AD) assessment and pose a significant challenge to multimodal learning, particularly when the distribution of observed modality subsets differs between training and deployment. Such missingness pattern mismatch induces a conditional representation shift across modality subsets. Existing approaches that rely on implicit imputation or modality synthesis often fail to explicitly model modality availability and uncertainty, leading to overconfident dependence on synthesized features, reduced robustness, and miscalibrated uncertainty estimates. To address these limitations, we propose PRA-PoE, an incomplete multimodal learning framework that is equipped with Prototype-anchored Representation Alignment (PRA) and an Uncertainty-aware Product of Experts (UA-PoE) fusion mechanism. First, PRA uses learnable global prototypes and availability-conditioned tokens to encode modality availability, distinguish observed from missing modalities, re-synthesize features for missing modalities, and adaptively refine observed representations to align latent spaces across modality subsets, with the goal of reducing representation shift under varying missingness patterns. Second, UA-PoE models each modality as a Gaussian expert and performs closed-form Product of Experts fusion, where experts with higher uncertainty are automatically down-weighted via lower precision, improving uncertainty reliability. We evaluate PRA-PoE under a clinically realistic protocol by training with naturally missing data and testing on all non-empty modality combinations. PRA-PoE consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art across datasets, achieving a 5.4% relative improvement in average accuracy on ADNI and a 10.9% relative gain in average F1 on OASIS-3 over the strongest baseline across all non-empty modality subsets.

CA-GCL: Cross-Anatomy Global-Local Contrastive Learning for Robust 3D Medical Image Understanding

High 2605.13544
Hanwen Zhang, Yao Liu, Die Dai, Jiaye Yang, Qiao Liu, Yutong Xie, Peng Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出跨解剖全局 - 局部对比学习框架 CA-GCL，解决 3D 医学图像细粒度视觉 - 语言预训练中的表征坍塌和提示敏感问题。
🎯研究动机

现有 FVLP 方法在 3D 医学图像理解中，文本嵌入空间出现严重表征坍塌，不同解剖结构的文本嵌入高度聚集难以区分，导致模型对提示变化极度敏感，阻碍临床可靠部署。

❓解决问题

解决细粒度视觉 - 语言预训练中文本嵌入空间的表征坍塌问题，提升模型对提示变化的鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到现有 FVLP 范式中文本嵌入空间存在分布退化，不同解剖结构的文本嵌入高度聚集，导致模型对提示变化高度敏感。

🛠️主要方法

提出跨解剖全局 - 局部对比学习框架 CA-GCL，包含全局对比目标以强制解剖类别在潜在空间分离，以及基于排列不变性和部分完整性的临床感知文本增强策略。

📊实验结果

在 CT-RATE 和 Rad-ChestCT 数据集上进行零样本异常检测评估，CA-GCL 一致优于现有 VLP 范式，并展现强跨数据集泛化能力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出全局对比目标，有效对抗局部对齐导致的聚合倾向，缓解表征坍塌。
  • 引入临床感知文本增强策略，提升对描述不完整性的鲁棒性。
  • 在 CT-RATE 和 Rad-ChestCT 数据集上零样本异常检测取得 SOTA，并展现强跨数据集泛化能力，将坍塌的文本相似度分布转变为钟形分布。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定解剖结构划分，泛化到其他解剖区域需验证。
  • 文本增强策略可能对罕见描述模式覆盖不足。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Fine-grained Vision-Language Pre-training (FVLP) demonstrates significant potential in 3D medical image understanding by aligning anatomy-level visual representations with corresponding textual descriptions. However, existing FVLP paradigms often suffer from severe representation collapse in the textual embedding space, where text embeddings of distinct anatomical structures become highly clustered and indistinguishable. This distributional degeneracy renders the model hypersensitive to prompt variations, hindering reliable clinical deployment. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Cross-Anatomy Global-Local Contrastive Learning framework (CA-GCL). CA-GCL introduces a global contrastive objective that enforces separation between anatomical categories in the latent space, effectively counteracting the aggregation tendency induced by local alignment. Furthermore, we incorporate a clinical-aware text augmentation strategy based on permutation invariance and partial completeness to enhance robustness against descriptive incompleteness. Extensive evaluations on the CT-RATE and Rad-ChestCT datasets demonstrate that CA-GCL consistently outperforms existing VLP paradigms in zero-shot abnormality detection, achieving superior performance while exhibiting strong cross-dataset generalization. Crucially, CA-GCL reduces performance variance across diverse prompt templates, transforming the collapsed textual similarity distribution into a bell-shaped distribution. These results validate CA-GCL as an effective framework for robust 3D medical image understanding.

Cross Modality Image Translation In Medical Imaging Using Generative Frameworks

High 2605.13686
Giulia Romoli, Alessia Capoccia, Filippo Ruffini, Francesco Di Feola, Luca Boldrini, Arturo Chiti, Renato Cuocolo, Tugba Akinci D'Antonoli et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：在肿瘤影像中，GANs 在 3D 跨模态图像翻译任务上优于潜在生成模型，但所有模型对小病灶处理不佳，且定量指标与临床偏好存在脱节。
🎯研究动机

医学图像跨模态翻译（虚拟扫描）可减少额外采集，但现有方法多在 2D 切片上评估，缺乏标准化比较和临床验证，阻碍了实际应用。

❓解决问题

缺乏对 3D 肿瘤影像跨模态翻译方法的可重复、标准化比较评估，包括统一预处理、多级评价和临床验证。

🔎现象分析

GANs 在所有任务上优于潜在生成模型；所有模型对小病灶合成困难；CT 到 PET 合成中病灶形状比强度更可靠；定量指标与临床偏好不一致。

🛠️主要方法

构建标准化评估框架，统一预处理、分割、推理和多级评价，比较 7 种生成模型（3 种 GAN 和 4 种潜在生成模型）在 11 个数据集、4 种翻译方向上的 77 个实验。

📊实验结果

在 11 个数据集（头颈、肺、骨盆）上进行 4 种翻译方向（CBCT→CT、MRI→CT、CT→PET、MRI T2→T2-FLAIR）的 77 个实验，并进行了包含 17 名医生的视觉 Turing 测试。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提供了 3D 肿瘤影像跨模态翻译的标准化、可重复比较评估框架。
  • 通过 77 个实验和临床 Turing 测试揭示了 GANs 的优越性、小病灶挑战以及定量指标与临床偏好的脱节。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估了肿瘤影像，可能不适用于其他医学领域。
  • 未探索模型集成或后处理改进小病灶性能。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Medical image-to-image (I2I) translation enables virtual scanning, i.e. the synthesis of a target imaging modality from a source one without additional acquisitions. Despite growing interest, most proposed methods operate on 2D slices, are evaluated on isolated tasks with different experimental set-ups and lack clinical validation. The primary contribution of this work is a reproducible, standardized comparative evaluation of 3D I2I translation methods in oncological imaging, designed to standardize preprocessing, splitting, inference, and multi-level evaluation across heterogeneous clinical tasks. Within this framework, we compare seven generative models, three Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs: Pix2Pix, CycleGAN, SRGAN) and four latent generative models (Latent Diffusion Model, Latent Diffusion Model+ControlNet, Brownian Bridge, Flow Matching), across eleven datasets spanning three anatomical regions (head/neck, lung, pelvis) and four translation directions (cone-beam CT to CT, MRI to CT, CT to PET, MRI T2-weighted to T2-FLAIR), for a total of 77 experiments under uniform training, inference, and evaluation conditions. The results show that GANs outperform latent generative models across all tasks, with SRGAN achieving statistically significant superiority. Our lesion-level analysis reveals that all models struggle with small lesions and that, in CT to PET synthesis, models reproduce lesion shape more reliably than absolute uptake-related intensity. We also performed a Visual Turing test administered to 17 physicians, including 15 radiologists, which shows near-chance classification accuracy (56.7%), confirming that synthetic volumes are largely indistinguishable from real acquisitions, while exposing a dissociation between quantitative metrics and clinical preference.

MedCore: Boundary-Preserving Medical Core Pruning for MedSAM

High 2605.13688
Cenwei Zhang, Suncheng Xiang, Lei You
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出边界保持的结构化剪枝框架 MedCore，在 MedSAM 上实现高压缩率的同时保持边界质量。
🎯研究动机

医学分割基础模型（如 MedSAM）的图像编码器过大，难以部署于临床场景；直接压缩可能导致边界保真度下降，而 Dice 指标无法反映这一问题。

❓解决问题

如何在保持边界保真度的前提下对 MedSAM 进行结构化剪枝，避免压缩引起的边界位移。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出 MedSAM 处于头脆弱边界状态：头部剪枝步骤的边界杠杆（95 百分位）是 MLP 剪枝步骤的 2.887 倍，且该对数级效应与 BF1 和 HD95 退化一致。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MedCore 框架，通过双干预分数识别 SAM 到 MedSAM 适应中变得重要的结构，通过边界感知 Fisher 估计识别高边界杠杆结构，并引入边界杠杆原理解释压缩引起的边界位移。

📊实验结果

在息肉分割基准上，MedCore 减少 60.0% 参数和 58.4% FLOPs，达到 Dice 0.9549、Boundary F1 0.6388、HD95 5.14；进一步可实现 86.6% 参数减少和 90.4G FLOPs。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出边界保持的结构化剪枝框架 MedCore，兼顾参数压缩与边界保真度。
  • 引入双干预分数和边界感知 Fisher 估计两种重要性指标。
  • 提出边界杠杆原理，理论解释 Dice 高但边界指标下降的现象。
  • 在息肉分割基准上实现 60% 参数减少和 58.4% FLOPs 减少，同时保持高 Dice 和边界质量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对 MedSAM 和息肉分割任务验证，泛化性未知。
  • 剪枝后需要恢复微调，可能增加额外计算成本。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Medical segmentation foundation models such as SAM and MedSAM provide strong prompt-driven segmentation, but their image encoders are still too large for many clinical settings. Compression is also risky in medicine because a model can keep high Dice while losing boundary fidelity. We propose MedCore, a structured pruning framework for MedSAM. The main idea is to preserve two kinds of structures: structures that became important during SAM-to-MedSAM adaptation, and structures that have high boundary leverage. We identify the first type by a dual-intervention score that compares zeroing a group with resetting it to its original SAM weight. We identify the second type by boundary-aware Fisher estimation. We also introduce a boundary leverage principle, which shows that compression-induced boundary displacement is controlled by logit perturbation on the boundary divided by the logit spatial gradient. This principle explains why boundary metrics can degrade even when Dice remains high. On polyp segmentation benchmarks, MedCore reduces parameters by 60.0% and FLOPs by 58.4% while achieving Dice 0.9549, Boundary F1 0.6388, and HD95 5.14 after recovery fine-tuning. It also reaches 86.6% parameter reduction and 90.4G FLOPs with strong boundary quality. Our analysis further shows that MedSAM lies in a head-fragile boundary regime: head-pruning steps have 2.887 times larger 95th-percentile boundary leverage than MLP-pruning steps, and this logit-level effect is consistent with BF1 and HD95 degradation. Our code is available at this https URL .

Learning to Optimize Radiotherapy Plans via Fluence Maps Diffusion Model Generation and LSTM-based Optimization

High 2605.13713
Isabella Poles, Simon Arberet, Riqiang Gao, Martin Kraus, Marco D. Santambrogio, Florin C. Ghesu, Ali Kamen, Dorin Comaniciu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出扩散模型 +LSTM 的端到端 VMAT 放疗计划优化方法，提升规划效率与可交付性。
🎯研究动机

VMAT 放疗计划涉及复杂的逆优化和嵌套优化，治疗配置变化时需反复重优化，导致每个患者规划时间长，效率低下。

❓解决问题

如何实现端到端、高效且可交付的 VMAT 放疗计划生成，避免反复重优化。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用分布匹配蒸馏扩散模型学习通量图的临床可行流形，实现一次性生成；再通过 LSTM-based L2O 模块学习梯度更新动态，在推理时快速优化通量图以满足剂量目标。

📊实验结果

在临床和公开前列腺癌数据集上实验，表明所提方法在规划效率、灵活性和机器可交付性上优于现有端到端 VMAT 规划器。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出扩散驱动的学习优化方法用于端到端 VMAT 规划。
  • 结合分布匹配蒸馏扩散模型和 LSTM 优化模块，提升规划效率、灵活性和机器可交付性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对前列腺癌验证，泛化性未知。
  • 未提及与临床金标准（如人工规划）的直接剂量学比较。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Volumetric Modulated Arc Therapy (VMAT) is a cornerstone of modern radiation therapy, enabling highly conformal tumor irradiation and healthy-tissue sparing. Yet, its planning solves inverse and nested optimization for multi-leaf collimators, monitor units and dose parameters, while enforcing their consistency to ensure mechanical deliverability. Nevertheless, this process often requires repeated re-optimization when treatment configurations change, resulting in substantial planning time per patient. To address these problems, we present a diffusion-driven Learning-to-Optimize (L2O) method for end-to-end VMAT planning. A distribution-matching distilled diffusion model learns a clinically feasible manifold of fluence maps, enabling their one-shot generation. On top of this, an LSTM-based L2O module learns gradient update dynamics to swiftly refine fluence maps toward prescribed dose objectives during inference. Experimental results on clinical and public prostate cancer cohorts demonstrate improved planning efficiency, flexibility, and machine deliverability over currently available end-to-end VMAT planners.

JANUS: Anatomy-Conditioned Gating for Robust CT Triage Under Distribution Shift

High 2605.13813
Lavsen Dahal, Yubraj Bhandari, Geoffrey Rubin, Joseph Y. Lo
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：JANUS 通过解剖条件门控融合影像组学先验，提升 CT 分诊在分布偏移下的准确性与可靠性。
🎯研究动机

自动 CT 分诊需要模型在不同病理下保持准确，并在机构间分布偏移时保持可靠，但现有方法依赖纯视觉特征，难以捕捉由定量影像生物标志物定义的临床发现。

❓解决问题

如何利用解剖先验（宏观影像组学特征）增强视觉 Transformer 在 CT 分诊中的鲁棒性和校准能力，尤其是在分布偏移场景下。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 JANUS，一种生理引导的双流架构，通过解剖引导门控机制将宏观影像组学先验条件化到视觉嵌入中。

📊实验结果

在 MERLIN 测试集（N=5082）上，JANUS 达到 macro-AUROC 0.88 和 AUPRC 0.74，优于所有复现基线；在外部数据集（N=2000）上 AUROC 0.87，在尺寸和衰减定义的发现上增益最大，且校准改善。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出解剖条件门控机制，融合影像组学先验与视觉特征，提升 CT 分诊性能。
  • 在内部和外部数据集上验证了模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性和校准改进，并引入生理否决率（PVR）量化预测抑制。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的影像组学先验提取，在低质量数据上效果未知。
  • 仅针对 CT 分诊任务，泛化到其他模态需验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Automated CT triage requires models that are simultaneously accurate across diverse pathologies and reliable under institutional shift. While Vision Transformers provide strong visual representations, many clinically significant findings are defined by quantitative imaging biomarkers rather than appearance alone. We introduce JANUS, a physiology-guided dual-stream architecture that conditions visual embeddings on macro-radiomic priors via Anatomically Guided Gating. On the MERLIN test set (N=5082), JANUS attains macro-AUROC 0.88 and AUPRC 0.74, outperforming all reproduced baselines. It generalizes to an external dataset N=2000; AUROC 0.87), with the largest gains on findings defined by size and attenuation as well as improved calibration on both datasets. We further quantify prediction suppression using the Physiological Veto Rate (PVR), showing that under domain shift JANUS reduces high-confidence false positives substantially more often than true positives. Together, these results are consistent with physically grounded conditioning that improves both discrimination and reliability in CT triage. Code is made publicly available at github repository this https URL and model weights are at this https URL .

Uncovering Latent Pathological Signatures in Pulmonary CT via Cross-Window Knowledge Distillation

High 2605.12562
Bo Peng, Wujian Xu, Kun Wang, Ximing Liao, Na Wang, Daqian Shi, Tian Li, Jing Gao et al.
arXiv PDF eess.IV
TL;DR：提出跨窗口知识蒸馏框架，利用最信息窗教师模型将潜在病理特征蒸馏到学生编码器，显著提升肺 CT 多窗分析性能。
🎯研究动机

多窗 CT 成像能捕获不同密度解剖结构的互补病理信息，但现有深度学习方法仅在后期融合表征，忽略了跨密度交互，限制了早期病理特征的提取。

❓解决问题

如何让深度学习模型在早期阶段就捕获多窗 CT 中跨密度的潜在病理特征，提升肺 CT 分析的准确性和泛化性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出跨窗口知识蒸馏框架：教师模型在信息最丰富的窗口上训练，学习潜在临床先验；学生编码器通过蒸馏学习这些先验，从而内化监督方法不可见的病理特征。

📊实验结果

在 COPD-CT-DF（n=719）、RSNA PE（n=1,433）和内部 CTEPD 数据集（n=161）上回顾性评估，蒸馏后单窗 AUC 提升 10.1-16.5 个百分点（COPD-CT-DF: 0.75-0.81→0.90-0.94, P<0.001），集成 AUC 达 0.9960；RSNA PE 上 AUC 从 0.80-0.83 提升至 0.90-0.92；CTEPD 上 AUC 0.7481 vs. 0.6264。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出跨窗口知识蒸馏框架，使多窗 CT 分析中早期跨密度交互成为可能。
  • 在三个数据集上验证了蒸馏显著提升单窗 AUC（10.1-16.5 个百分点），集成 AUC 达 0.9960。
⚠️方法局限
  • 教师模型依赖单一最信息窗口，可能不适用于所有病变类型。
  • 方法在更大规模或更多样化数据集上的泛化性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multi-window CT imaging captures complementary pathological information across anatomical structures of differing densities, yet existing deep learning methods fuse representations only at later stages, missing cross-density interactions. We propose a cross-window knowledge distillation framework in which student encoders learn latent clinical priors from a teacher trained on the most informative window. Evaluated retrospectively on three cohorts - COPD-CT-DF (n=719), RSNA PE (n=1,433), and an in-house CTEPD dataset (n=161) - distillation improved per-window AUC by 10.1-16.5 percentage points on COPD-CT-DF (0.75-0.81 to 0.90-0.94; all P<0.001), with ensemble AUC reaching 0.9960.
