Similar gains were observed on RSNA PE (0.80-0.83 to 0.90-0.92) and CTEPD (AUC 0.7481 vs. 0.6264). Cross-window distillation internalises pathological signatures invisible to supervised approaches, offering a generalisable solution for multi-window pulmonary CT analysis.

CRAFT: Clinical Reward-Aligned Finetuning for Medical Image Synthesis

High 2605.12650
Yunsung Chung, Alex El Darzi, Carlo El Khoury, Han Feng, Nassir Marrouche, Jihun Hamm
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出临床对齐奖励微调（CRAFT）框架，通过多模态大模型和视觉语言模型提升医学图像合成的临床对齐性，减少幻觉生成。
🎯研究动机

医学图像合成中，扩散模型因标注数据有限易产生临床不合理的幻觉生成，现有指标（如 FID）无法量化图像与病理标准的对齐程度，亟需临床对齐的评估与优化方法。

❓解决问题

如何使扩散模型生成的医学图像在视觉逼真之外，满足临床相关的病理对齐标准，并减少幻觉生成。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，在医学领域适应中，有限标注数据会加剧幻觉样和临床不合理的合成，且现有指标无法评估单图像与病理标准的对齐。

🛠️主要方法

提出临床对齐分数（CAS）作为基于基础模型的临床对齐代理，从四个互补维度评估生成图像；在此基础上提出 CRAFT，通过标签条件提示增强、临床检查表和可微奖励优化，从多模态大模型和视觉语言模型中迁移医学知识。

📊实验结果

在四种不同模态上，CRAFT 在 CAS 和下游分类性能上优于强适应基线；CAS 低对齐尾部相对于最强基线降低 5.5-34.7 个百分点，平均相对降低 20.4%；结果通过域外评估器评估、结构化检查表审计、记忆化分析和盲法医生偏好研究（CheXpert）得到证实。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出临床对齐分数（CAS），一种基于基础模型的临床对齐代理，评估生成图像在四个维度上的临床对齐性。
  • 提出临床奖励对齐微调（CRAFT），一种基于奖励的适应框架，通过多模态大模型和视觉语言模型迁移医学知识，提升医学图像合成的临床对齐性。
⚠️方法局限
  • CAS 依赖基础模型，可能引入其固有偏见。
  • CRAFT 需要多模态大模型和视觉语言模型，计算成本较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Foundation diffusion models can generate photorealistic natural images, but adapting them to medical imaging remains challenging. In medical adaptation, limited labeled data can exacerbate hallucination-like and clinically implausible synthesis, while existing metrics such as FID or Inception Score do not quantify per-image alignment with pathology-relevant criteria. We introduce the Clinical Alignment Score (CAS), a foundation-model-based proxy for clinical alignment that evaluates generated images along four complementary dimensions beyond visual fidelity. Building on CAS, we propose Clinical Reward-Aligned Finetuning (CRAFT), a reward-based adaptation framework that transfers medical knowledge from multimodal large language models and vision-language models through label-conditioned prompt enrichment, clinical checklists, and differentiable reward optimization. Across four diverse modalities, CRAFT improves CAS and downstream classification performance over strong adaptation baselines. Beyond average CAS gains, CRAFT reduces the empirical low-alignment tail below a real-image reference threshold by 5.5-34.7% points relative to the strongest baseline, corresponding to a 20.4% average relative reduction across datasets. These results indicate fewer hallucination-like generations under CAS, and are corroborated by out-of-family evaluator evaluation, structured checklist auditing, memorization analysis, and a blinded physician preference study on CheXpert.

PRISM: Perinuclear Ring-based Image Segmentation Method for Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia Classification

Medium 2605.12851
Larissa Ferreira Rodrigues Moreira, Leonardo Gabriel Ferreira Rodrigues, Rodrigo Moreira, André Ricardo Backes
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：PRISM 通过核周环区域替代细胞膜分割，结合颜色与纹理特征实现急性淋巴细胞白血病高精度分类。
🎯研究动机

外周血涂片自动分析中，细胞质低对比度和高变异性导致传统膜分割方法困难，而现有深度学习方法泛化性差且计算开销大。

❓解决问题

解决急性淋巴细胞白血病分类中细胞质分割不准确和跨染色 / 采集条件泛化性差的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PRISM 方法，围绕细胞核构建自适应同心环区域（核周环），提取颜色和灰度共生矩阵纹理特征，并用校准的堆叠集成传统分类器进行分类。

📊实验结果

在急性淋巴细胞白血病分类任务上评估，准确率 98.46%，PR-AUC 0.9937。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于核周环的细胞质描述方法，避免显式细胞膜分割。
  • 结合颜色与纹理特征，在 ALL 分类上达到 98.46% 准确率和 0.9937 的 PR-AUC。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖细胞核检测的准确性。
  • 仅在单一疾病数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Automated analysis of peripheral blood smears for Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia (ALL) is hindered by low contrast and substantial variability in cytoplasmic appearance, which complicate conventional membrane-based segmentation. We found that many recent approaches rely on heavy neural architectures and extensive training, but still struggle to generalize across staining and acquisition variability. To address these limitations, we propose the Perinuclear Ring-based Image Segmentation Method (PRISM), which replaces explicit cytoplasmic delineation with adaptive concentric zones constructed around the nucleus. These perinuclear regions enable the extraction of robust cytoplasmic descriptors by integrating color information with texture statistics derived from grey-level co-occurrence patterns, without requiring accurate cell-boundary detection. A calibrated stacking ensemble of traditional classifiers leverages these descriptors to achieve a high performance, with an accuracy of 98.46% and a precision-recall AUC of 0.9937.

Robust and Explainable Bicuspid Aortic Valve Diagnosis Using Stacked Ensembles on Echocardiography

Medium 2605.13730
Christos Chrysanthos Nikolaidis, Vasileios Sachpekidis, Nikolas Moustakidis, Theofilos Moustakidis, Pavlos S. Efraimidis
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：基于堆叠集成模型和超声心动图视频，实现稳健且可解释的二叶式主动脉瓣诊断。
🎯研究动机

经胸超声心动图是诊断二叶式主动脉瓣的一线影像手段，但其诊断性能受操作者经验和图像质量影响，存在变异性。

❓解决问题

如何利用常规采集的胸骨旁长轴超声视频，构建稳健且可解释的 BAV/TAV 分类模型。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

采用多骨干网络视频集成，通过泄漏感知的分层外部交叉验证训练，并利用校准的堆叠集成模型进行预测；结合帧级 Grad-CAM 和全局 SHAP 值实现可解释性。

📊实验结果

在 90 例患者研究（48 例 BAV，42 例 TAV）上，采用泄漏感知的分层外部交叉验证协议，报告了外部交叉验证的 F1 分数和召回率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于堆叠集成的 BAV/TAV 分类方法，在 90 例患者研究中达到 0.907 的 F1 分数和 0.877 的召回率。
  • 通过 Grad-CAM 和 SHAP 提供帧级和全局可解释性，支持病例级审计。
⚠️方法局限
  • 样本量较小（N=90），可能限制泛化性。
  • 仅使用 PLAX 视图，未探索其他超声视图的融合。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Transthoracic echocardiography (TTE) is the first-line imaging modality for diagnosing bicuspid aortic valve (BAV), yet diagnostic performance varies with operator expertise and image quality. We developed an explainable AI model that distinguishes BAV from tricuspid aortic valves (TAV) using routinely acquired parasternal long-axis (PLAX) cine loops. A multi-backbone video ensemble was trained and evaluated using a leakage-aware, stratified outer cross-validation protocol on $N{=}90$ patient studies (48 BAV, 42 TAV). Across fixed outer splits and 10 random seeds, the calibrated stacked ensemble achieved an outer-CV F1-score of $0.907$ and recall of $0.877$. Frame-level Grad-CAM localized salient evidence to the aortic root and leaflet plane, while globally aggregated SHAP values quantified each video backbone's contribution to the stacked prediction, enabling transparent, case-level auditability. These findings indicate that PLAX-based video ensembles can support reliable BAV/TAV classification from routine echocardiographic cine loops and may facilitate earlier detection in non-specialist or resource-limited clinical settings.

VoxCor: Training-Free Volumetric Features for Multimodal Voxel Correspondence

Medium 2605.13798
Guney Tombak, Ertunc Erdil, Ender Konukoglu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：VoxCor 是一种无需训练的体素特征方法，通过三平面 ViT 和加权偏最小二乘投影实现跨模态医学图像对应。
🎯研究动机

跨模态 3D 医学图像分析需要体素级表示在不同成像对比度、扫描仪和采集协议下保持解剖一致性，现有方法沿单一解剖轴提取特征且不具可迁移性。

❓解决问题

如何从冻结的 2D ViT 基础模型中获得可复用的、跨模态一致的体素特征表示，而无需训练或配准。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

VoxCor 包含离线拟合和在线变换两阶段：离线时通过三平面 ViT 推理和封闭形式的加权偏最小二乘投影，利用拟合时的体素对应选择模态稳定的解剖方向；变换时仅需三平面 ViT 推理和线性投影，通过最近邻搜索查询体素对应。

📊实验结果

在腹部 MR-CT 和脑部 HCP T2w-T1w 任务上评估，使用可变形配准、体素级 k-NN 分割和分割中心地标定位，与手工描述子和学习型 3D 特征竞争。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种无需训练的拟合 - 变换方法，从冻结 2D ViT 生成可复用的体素特征表示。
  • 在腹部 MR-CT 和脑部 T2w-T1w 任务上验证了跨模态体素对应的有效性，尤其在最难跨主体跨模态设置中表现优异。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖拟合阶段提供的体素对应，可能限制在无对应数据场景的应用。
  • 三平面 ViT 推理的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Cross-modal 3D medical image analysis requires voxelwise representations that remain anatomically consistent across imaging contrasts, scanners, and acquisition protocols. Recent work has shown that frozen 2D Vision Transformer (ViT) foundation models can support such representations, but typical pipelines extract features along a single anatomical axis and adapt those features inside a registration solver for one image pair at a time, leaving complementary viewing directions unused and producing representations that do not transfer to new volumes. We introduce VoxCor, a training-free fit--transform method for reusable volumetric feature representations from frozen 2D ViT foundation models. During an offline fitting phase, VoxCor combines triplanar ViT inference with a compact closed-form weighted partial least squares (WPLS) projection that uses fitting-time voxel correspondences to select modality-stable anatomical directions in the triplanar feature space. At transform time, new volumes are mapped by triplanar ViT inference and linear projection alone, without fine-tuning or registration. Voxel correspondences can then be queried directly by nearest-neighbor search. We evaluate VoxCor on intra-subject Abdomen MR--CT and inter-subject HCP T2w--T1w tasks using deformable registration, voxelwise k-nearest-neighbor segmentation, and segmentation-center landmark localization. VoxCor improves the hardest cross-subject, cross-modality transfer settings, reduces encoder sensitivity for dense correspondence transfer, and yields registration performance competitive with handcrafted descriptors and learned 3D features. This positions VoxCor as a reusable feature layer for downstream multimodal analysis beyond pairwise registration. Code, configuration files, and implementation details are publicly available on GitHub at \href{ this https URL }{guneytombak/VoxCor}.

Pyramid Self-contrastive Learning Framework for Test-time Ultrasound Image Denoising

Medium 2605.12567
Jiajing Zhang, Bingze Dai, Xi Zhang, Yue Xu, Wei-Ning Lee
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出纯测试时训练框架 A2A，通过金字塔自对比学习实现超声图像去噪，消除域偏移。
🎯研究动机

超声图像受电子和散斑噪声影响，传统方法依赖噪声假设，学习方法需要大量标注且存在域偏移，限制临床应用。

❓解决问题

解决超声图像去噪中域偏移和结构细节模糊问题，实现单样本测试时去噪。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Aperture-to-Aperture (A2A)框架，在金字塔潜空间中对打乱的子孔径进行自对比学习，分离解剖相似性和噪声随机性，从解剖空间解码干净图像。

📊实验结果

仿真实验（电子噪声 0-30dB，不同几何形状）显示 SNR 提升 69.3%，CNR 提升 34.4%；体内实验（心脏、肝脏、肾脏）显示 SNR 提升 84.8%，CNR 提升 25.7%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出纯测试时训练框架，消除域偏移和预训练成本
  • 通过金字塔自对比学习有效分离解剖结构和噪声
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅适用于合成孔径超声（SAU）信号
  • 测试时训练可能增加计算开销
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The inherent electronic and speckle noise complicates clinical interpretation of ultrasound images. Conventional denoising methods rely on explicit noise assumptions whose validity diminishes under composite noise conditions. Learning-based methods require massive labeled data and model parameters. These pre-defined and pre-trained manners entail an inevitable domain shift in complex in vivo environments, so they are limited to a specific noise type and often blur structural details. In this study, we propose a pure test-time training framework for one-shot ultrasound image denoising and apply it to synthetic aperture ultrasound (SAU), which synthesizes transmit focus from sub-aperture transmissions. Our Aperture-to-Aperture (A2A) framework disentangles anatomical similarity and noise randomness from shuffled sub-apertures through self-contrastive learning in pyramid latent spaces. The clean image is then decoded from the anatomy space, while discarding the noise space. A2A is trained at test time on one noisy sample of SAU signals, so it fundamentally eliminates the domain shift and pretraining costs. Simulation experiments, including electronic noise levels of 0 to 30 dB and different inclusion geometries, demonstrated an improvement of 69.3% SNR and 34.4% CNR by A2A. The in vivo results showed 84.8% SNR and 25.7% CNR gains using only two aperture data of the heart in six echocardiographic views, liver, and kidney. A2A delivers clear images/signals across diverse imaging targets and configurations, paving the way for more reliable anatomical visualization and functional assessment by ultrasound.

M3Net: A Macro-to-Meso-to-Micro Clinical-inspired Hierarchical 3D Network for Pulmonary Nodule Classification

Medium 2605.12570
Jinyue Li, Yuzhou Yu, Jingjing Yang, Meng Fu, Yani Zhang, Shuyao He, Dianlong Ge, Xin Ning et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种模仿放射科医生分层诊断流程的 3D 网络 M3Net，通过多尺度输入和跨尺度语义一致性提升肺结节分类性能。
🎯研究动机

肺结节良恶性分类对早期肺癌筛查至关重要，但现有深度学习模型缺乏透明性和可解释性，难以获得临床信任。

❓解决问题

现有模型作为黑盒，无法整合从细粒度结构到全局解剖关系的多尺度上下文信息，导致分类性能受限。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建从宏观到中观到微观的渐进式多尺度输入，使用尺度特定编码器，并通过潜在空间投影和互信息最大化确保跨尺度语义一致性。

📊实验结果

在 LIDC-IDRI 和自收集临床数据集 USTC-FHLN 上实验，准确率分别为 86.96% 和 84.24%，超过最佳基线 3.26% 和 2.17%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 M3Net，一种受放射科医生分层诊断启发的层次化 3D 网络。
  • 设计渐进式多尺度输入和跨尺度语义一致性机制。
  • 在公共和临床数据集上达到 SOTA 性能，并开源代码。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 计算复杂度可能较高，影响实际部署。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The accurate classification of benign and malignant pulmonary nodules in CT scans is critical for early lung cancer screening, yet remains challenging due to the multi-scale and heterogeneous nature of pulmonary nodules. While deep learning offers potential for auxiliary diagnosis, most existing models act as "black boxes", lacking the transparency and explainability required for trustworthy clinical integration. To address this issue, we propose M3Net, a novel 3D network for pulmonary nodule classification inspired by the hierarchical diagnostic workflow of radiologists, which integrates multi-scale contextual information from fine-grained structures to global anatomical relationships. Our framework constructs a progressive multi-scale input, from fine-grained nodule structures to local semantics and global spatial relationships. M3Net employs scale-specific encoders and ensures cross-scale semantic consistency through latent space projection and mutual information maximization. Extensive experiments on the public LIDC-IDRI dataset and a self-collected clinical dataset (USTC-FHLN) demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with accuracies of 86.96% and 84.24% respectively, outperforming the best baseline by 3.26% and 2.17%. The results validate that M3Net provides a more robust and clinically relevant solution for pulmonary nodule classification. The code is available at this https URL .

Are Compact Rationales Free? Measuring Tile Selection Headroom in Frozen WSI-MIL

Medium 2605.12575
Hyun Do Jung, Jungwon Choi, Soojung Choi, Yujin Oh, Hwiyoung Kim
arXiv PDF eess.IV
TL;DR：FOCI 揭示冻结 WSI-MIL 模型能否用紧凑瓦片子集恢复预测，取决于选择余量。
🎯研究动机

WSI-MIL 分类器在幻灯片级别 AUC 高，但全袋预测不透明；注意力分数被广泛用作事后解释，但高注意力可能反映聚合偏好而非模型充分的紧凑理由。

❓解决问题

研究冻结 WSI-MIL 模型能否通过紧凑、输出一致的瓦片子集恢复幻灯片级预测，而无需重新训练骨干网络。

🔎现象分析

紧凑理由依赖于选择余量：Transformer 和多分支注意力聚合器可容纳紧凑理由，近最小注意力池化基线进入选择饱和状态，硬选择骨干可能与外部读出冲突。

🛠️主要方法

提出 FOCI（Finding Optimal Contextual Instances），一种轻量级理由读出层，在冻结 MIL 骨干上训练，使用模型输出充分性和排除目标，通过插入式顺序揭示协议（SRP）评估，并用选择余量指数（SHI）总结。

📊实验结果

在三个 WSI 基准和七个 MIL 骨干上评估，对 TransMIL 将最小充分 K 瓦片数减少 32-56%，ACMIL+FOCI 获得最高平均 SHI（+0.465）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 FOCI 作为冻结 WSI-MIL 模型的事后理由高亮方法，无需重训练骨干。
  • 引入选择余量指数（SHI）量化模型对紧凑理由的容纳能力。
  • 在三个 WSI 基准和七个 MIL 骨干上实验，揭示不同聚合器对紧凑理由的依赖差异。
⚠️方法局限
  • FOCI 选择的瓦片不声称临床或病理学家级别的诊断充分性。
  • 可能仅适用于冻结模型，未探索联合训练场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Whole-slide image (WSI) multiple instance learning (MIL) classifiers can achieve strong slide-level AUC while leaving the full-bag prediction opaque. Attention scores are widely reused as post-hoc explanations, but high attention can reflect aggregation preference rather than a compact, model-sufficient rationale. We study post-hoc rationale highlighting for frozen WSI-MIL: given a trained classifier, can its slide-level prediction be recovered from a compact, output-consistent tile subset without retraining the backbone? We instantiate this with Finding Optimal Contextual Instances (FOCI), a lightweight rationale-readout layer over a frozen MIL backbone. FOCI is trained with model-output sufficiency and exclusion objectives over keep/drop tile subsets, evaluated with an insertion-style Sequential Reveal Protocol (SRP) adapted to WSI-MIL, and summarized by the Selection Headroom Index (SHI). Across three WSI benchmarks and seven MIL backbones, FOCI reveals that compact rationales are selection-headroom dependent: transformer and multi-branch attention aggregators can admit compact rationales, near-minimal attention-pooling baselines enter a selection-saturation regime, and hard-selection backbones can conflict with an external readout. For TransMIL, relative to its documented CLS-proxy ranking, FOCI reduces the Minimum Sufficient K (MSK) tile count by 32-56% across benchmarks, while ACMIL+FOCI attains the highest mean SHI (+0.465). Deletion-based perturbation and selected-only downstream evaluation provide complementary checks. These results position FOCI as a model-level interpretability and audit layer: selected tiles are not claims of clinical or pathologist-level diagnostic sufficiency, but candidate rationales that offer a compact, reviewable view of when a frozen MIL prediction can be localized to a small output-consistent subset.

Optimization in Sparse 2D to Dense 3D Weakly Supervised Learning: Application to Multi-Label Segmentation of Large ex vivo MRI Data

Medium 2605.12753
Paul Hoareau, Kuan Yi Wang, Brandon Bujak, Roy Sun, Govind Nair, Irene Cortese, Charidimos Tsagkas, Daniel Reich et al.
arXiv PDF eess.IV
TL;DR：稀疏 2D 到密集 3D 弱监督分割中，2D 教师与 3D 学生的优化策略存在根本性分歧，人类中心预处理和强正则化会损害 3D 模型性能。
🎯研究动机

高分辨率离体 MRI 的 3D 分割受限于体素标注成本，稀疏 2D 标注的弱监督框架是可行方案，但 2D 到 3D 的优化策略迁移缺乏系统指导。

❓解决问题

解决稀疏 2D 标注到密集 3D 分割的弱监督学习中，2D 教师与 3D 学生训练动态的优化分歧问题。

🔎现象分析

发现 2D 教师需要强空间增强和软标签以克服数据稀疏性，但将这些技术迁移到 3D 学生会降低性能；人类中心预处理（如 CLAHE）会破坏全局统计线索，导致灰质病变 Dice 下降约 25 点。

🛠️主要方法

使用 2D 教师网络在稀疏切片上训练生成密集伪标签，再用伪标签训练 3D 学生网络，并系统评估预处理、空间增强和软标签正则化的影响。

📊实验结果

使用 9.4T 多发性硬化脊髓 MRI 数据（>104,000 切片，428 切片标注），评估白质病变和灰质病变的 Dice 分数。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了 2D 教师与 3D 学生之间优化策略的根本性分歧，指出 3D 架构需要保守正则化。
  • 发现人类中心预处理（如 CLAHE）会损害机器模型性能，存在感知差异。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对脊髓 MRI 数据，泛化性需验证。
  • 未提供其他模态或数据集的实验结果。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

INTRODUCTION | Fully supervised 3D segmentation of high-resolution ex vivo MRI is limited by the prohibitive cost of volumetric annotation, forcing reliance on sparse 2D slices. Weakly supervised Sparse-to-Dense frameworks bridge this gap, but guidelines remain ambiguous regarding human-centric visual enhancements and transferring optimization strategies across dimensions. We analyze divergent regularization needs for multi-class segmentation of high-resolution ex vivo spinal cord MRI. METHODS | We used 9.4T MRI of multiple sclerosis spinal cords (>104,000 slices) with sparse annotations (428 slices). A 2D Teacher trained on sparse slices generated dense pseudo-labels to train a 3D Student. We systematically evaluated the impact of human-centric preprocessing, spatial augmentation, and soft-label regularization on both architectures. RESULTS | We identified a critical divergence in training dynamics. The 2D Teacher required strong spatial augmentation and soft-labeling to overcome data scarcity, improving White Matter Lesion Dice scores by >11 points. However, propagating these techniques to the 3D Student degraded its performance. Furthermore, human-centric preprocessing (e.g., CLAHE) disrupted global statistical cues, dropping Gray Matter Lesion Dice scores by ~25 points. DISCUSSION | Our study highlights a perception divergence (human-centric contrast enhancement harms machine models) and a regularization conflict across dimensions. 3D architectures trained on dense pseudo-labels exhibit fundamentally different optimization landscapes than 2D counterparts and require distinct, conservative regularization. Code and models: this https URL .

Brain Tumor Classification in MRI Images: A Computationally Efficient Convolutional Neural Network

Medium 2605.12560
Md Fahimul Kabir Chowdhury, Jannatul Ferdous
arXiv PDF eess.IV
TL;DR：提出轻量级 CNN 用于 MRI 脑肿瘤分类，在保持高精度的同时大幅降低计算开销。
🎯研究动机

手动 MRI 分析耗时且不可靠，现有深度学习模型计算量大，难以处理脑肿瘤的复杂性和多样性，亟需高效实用的诊断工具。

❓解决问题

设计一个轻量级、高精度的 CNN 模型，用于多类脑肿瘤（胶质瘤、脑膜瘤、垂体瘤和正常）的 MRI 图像分类。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出一个轻量级 CNN 架构，通过高效特征提取和优化训练策略实现多分类，参数远少于预训练模型。

📊实验结果

在 Figshare 和 Kaggle 两个公开数据集上评估，准确率分别为 99.03% 和 99.28%，ROC 分数分别为 99.88% 和 99.94%，参数显著少于 DenseNet201 等模型。

⭐主要贡献
  • 设计了一个计算高效的 CNN 模型，在脑肿瘤分类任务上达到 99% 以上准确率。
  • 在 Figshare 和 Kaggle 两个公开数据集上验证了模型性能，并与 DenseNet201 等模型对比，展示了更优的精度 - 效率平衡。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对 MRI 图像，未验证其他模态或数据集。
  • 未讨论模型在真实临床环境中的部署挑战。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Improving patient outcomes depends on the prompt and accurate diagnosis of brain tumors, but manual MRI scan analysis is still time-consuming and unreliable. Although deep learning has shown promise, many of the models that are now in use are computationally intensive and have difficulty handling the intrinsic complexity and variety of different types of brain tumors. In this work, we propose a lightweight yet high-performing Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for multi-class brain tumor classification, employing MRI images to target gliomas, meningiomas, pituitary tumors, and healthy (no tumor) instances. The model was rigorously evaluated on two publicly accessible datasets from Figshare and Kaggle. Leveraging efficient feature extraction and optimized training strategies, our CNN achieved classification accuracies of 99.03% and 99.28%, along with ROC scores of 99.88% and 99.94% on Dataset 1 and Dataset 2, respectively-all while utilizing significantly fewer parameters than popular pre-trained architectures. In contrast to cutting-edge models like DenseNet201, MobileNetV2, VGG19, Xception, InceptionV3, and ResNet50, our approach consistently demonstrated superior performance with reduced computational overhead. These findings highlight the potential of the proposed model as a practical and reliable diagnostic aid in clinical environments.

自然语言处理 20 篇

Multimodal Hidden Markov Models for Persistent Emotional State Tracking

Medium 2605.12838
Anamika Ragu, Aneesh Jonelagadda
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出粘性 HDP-HMM 框架，从多模态效价 - 唤醒轨迹中提取可解释的情感阶段，用于对话情感动态跟踪。
🎯研究动机

现有情感识别方法仅在话语级别操作，忽略了对话中持续的情感阶段，难以捕捉真实对话动态，且 LLM 对话状态跟踪计算成本高。

❓解决问题

如何从多模态（视频、音频、文本）输入中建模对话的持久情感状态序列，实现轻量、可解释的情感阶段跟踪。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用粘性因子 HDP-HMM（sticky factorial HDP-HMM）对多模态效价 - 唤醒表示进行建模，将对话情感视为潜在情感状态序列。

📊实验结果

在临床数据集上进行了问答实验，使用 LLM-as-a-Judge、几何和时间一致性指标评估，并与高斯 HMM 和 LLM 方法对比。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于粘性 HDP-HMM 的轻量级框架，用于从多模态数据中跟踪持久情感状态。
  • 通过 LLM-as-a-Judge、几何和时间一致性指标验证了模型的可解释性和计算效率优势。
  • 在临床数据集上展示了情感阶段恢复及其通过上下文增强改善 LLM 响应的潜力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖多模态特征提取质量。
  • 临床数据集规模有限，泛化性待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Tracking an interpretable emotional arc of a conversation via the sentiment of individual utterances processed as a whole is central to both understanding and guiding communication in applied, especially clinical, conversational contexts. Existing approaches to emotion recognition operate at the utterance level, obscuring the persistent phases that characterize real conversational dynamics. We propose a lightweight framework that models conversational emotion as a sequence of latent emotional regimes using sticky factorial HDP-HMMs over multimodal valence-arousal representations derived from simultaneous video, audio and textual input. We evaluate the quality of regime prediction using LLM-as-a-Judge, geometric, and temporal consistency metrics, demonstrating that the sticky HDP-HMM produces more interpretable regime sequences than the baseline Gaussian HMM at a fraction of the computational cost of LLM-based dialogue state tracking methods. In addition, Question-Answer experiments in a clinical dataset suggest that meaningful emotional phases can reliably be recovered from multimodal valence-arousal trajectories and used to improve the quality of LLM responses in unstable affective regimes via context augmentation. This framework thus opens a path toward interpretable, lightweight, and actionable analysis of conversational emotion dynamics at scale.

EcoGEO: Trajectory-Aware Evidence Ecosystems for Web-Enabled LLM Search Agents

Medium 2605.12887
Hengwei Ye, Jiasheng Mao, Zhenhan Guan, Zheng Tian
arXiv PDF cs.IR
TL;DR：提出轨迹感知的证据生态系统 EcoGEO，通过协调多页面环境提升 LLM 搜索代理对目标产品的推荐效果。
🎯研究动机

现有 GEO 研究仅关注单页面优化，但 LLM 搜索代理的浏览轨迹涉及多步查询、爬取和证据综合，页面间的组织与连接对结果影响更大。

❓解决问题

如何针对 LLM 搜索代理的轨迹级行为设计环境级优化策略，以提升目标推荐效果。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 TRACE 方法，构建包含导航入口页和异构支持页的协调证据环境，通过共享术语、内部链接和一致属性来引导代理的证据获取过程。

📊实验结果

在 OPR-Bench 上评估，相比页面级 GEO 基线，在最终目标推荐上持续提升；轨迹级指标显示初始目标结果爬取、目标特定后续搜索和内部链接爬取增加。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 EcoGEO 范式，将 GEO 从页面级扩展到环境级。
  • 设计 TRACE 方法，通过轨迹感知的证据生态系统提升 LLM 代理的推荐效果。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖虚构目标产品，实际场景中目标可能不明确。
  • 实验仅在开放域产品推荐基准上验证，泛化性待考。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Web-enabled LLM agents are changing how online information influences search outcomes. \ Existing Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) studies mainly focus on individual webpages. \ However, agentic web search is not a single-document setting: an agent may issue queries, crawl pages, follow links, reformulate searches, and synthesize evidence across multiple browsing steps. \ Influence therefore depends not only on page content, but also on how pages are organized, connected, and encountered along the agent's browsing trajectory. \ We study this shift through \textbf{Ecosystem Generative Engine Optimization} (\textbf{EcoGEO}), which treats GEO as an environment-level influence problem for web-enabled LLM agents. \ To instantiate this perspective, we propose \textbf{TRACE}, a \textbf{Trajectory-Aware Coordinated Evidence Ecosystem}. \ Given a recommendation query and a fictional target product, our method builds a controlled evidence environment that coordinates an agent-facing navigation entry page with heterogeneous support pages. \ These pages use shared terminology, internal links, and consistent product attributes to introduce, verify, and reinforce the target product. We evaluate our method on OPR-Bench, a benchmark for open-ended product recommendation. \ Experiments show that it consistently outperforms page-level GEO baselines in final target recommendation. \ Trajectory-level metrics further show increased initial target-result crawls, target-specific follow-up searches, and internal-link crawls, suggesting that the gains come from shaping the agent's evidence-acquisition process rather than merely adding more target-related content. \ Overall, our findings support an ecosystem research paradigm for GEO, where web-enabled LLM agents are studied in relation to the broader evidence environments that guide search, browsing, and answer synthesis.

Retrieval-Augmented Tutoring for Algorithm Tracing and Problem-Solving in AI Education

Medium 2605.12988
Mragisha Jain, Tirth Bhatt, Griffin Pitts, Aum Pandya, Peter Brusilovsky, Narges Norouzi, Arto Hellas, Juho Leinonen et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出基于 RAG 的智能辅导系统 KITE，通过意图感知的苏格拉底式策略和课程材料检索，提升学生算法追踪与问题解决能力。
🎯研究动机

学生在学习算法时，需要解释追踪、调试推理错误并在陌生问题中应用过程，但现有辅导系统缺乏针对性的、与课程内容对齐的支架式支持。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个能根据学生不同需求提供上下文相关、课程对齐的算法推理辅导的智能系统。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 KITE 系统，采用意图感知的苏格拉底式响应策略，结合多模态 RAG 管道从课程材料中检索相关信息，生成针对性提示、引导问题和渐进式支架。

📊实验结果

使用 RAGAs 指标评估响应基础性和质量，专家评估教学法质量，以及模拟学生管道（弱语言模型与 KITE 两轮对话后修正答案）评估反馈效果。结果表明 KITE 产生上下文相关且教学法适当的响应，模拟学生模型在程序和追踪问题上答案更准确。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 KITE，一个基于 RAG 的智能辅导系统，用于算法追踪和问题解决。
  • 设计意图感知的苏格拉底式响应策略，根据学生需求提供差异化支持。
  • 提出包含 RAGAs 指标、专家评估和模拟学生管道的多维度评估方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 评估基于模拟学生，真实课堂效果未知。
  • 可能依赖课程材料质量，对未覆盖内容效果有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Students learning algorithms often need support as they interpret traces, debug reasoning errors, and apply procedures across unfamiliar problem instances. In this paper, we present KITE (Knowledge-Informed Tutoring Engine), a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)-based intelligent tutoring system designed to serve as a classroom teaching assistant for algorithmic reasoning and problem-solving tasks. KITE uses an intent-aware Socratic response strategy to tailor support to different student needs, responding with targeted hints, guiding questions, and progressive scaffolding intended to strengthen students' algorithmic problem-solving ability. To keep responses aligned with course content, KITE uses a multimodal RAG pipeline that retrieves relevant information from course materials. We evaluate KITE using three forms of assessment: RAGAs-based metrics for response grounding and quality, expert evaluation of pedagogical quality, and a simulated student pipeline in which a weaker language model interacts with KITE across two-turn dialogues and produces revised answers after receiving feedback. Results indicate that KITE produces contextually grounded and pedagogically appropriate responses. Further, using simulated students, KITE's feedback helped the student models produce more accurate follow-up responses on procedural and tracing questions, suggesting that its scaffolding can support algorithmic problem-solving. This work contributes a tutoring architecture and an evaluation approach for assessing retrieval-grounded explanations and scaffolded problem-solving feedback.

An Agentic LLM-Based Framework for Population-Scale Mental Health Screening

Medium 2605.13046
Giuliano Lorenzoni, Paulo Alencar, Donald Cowan
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种基于 LLM 的智能体框架，用于大规模心理健康筛查，通过分阶段锁定和代理引导评估实现稳定配置。
🎯研究动机

心理健康障碍影响全球数百万人，医疗系统被临床数据淹没，现有 AI 方法缺乏处理非结构化临床信息和适应患者特定需求的智能框架。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个稳健、可复现且适应性强的 LLM 管道，用于大规模心理健康筛查中的非结构化临床数据处理。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出一个智能体框架，每个阶段封装为 LangChain 代理，由显式策略和代理引导评估控制，阶段验证后锁定，通过 Orchestrator Agent 协调预处理、检索、选择、多样性、阈值优化和解码。

📊实验结果

在基于转录的抑郁症检测概念验证中，框架收敛到稳定配置，如余弦相似度、动态 Top-k 和阈值 0.75，同时控制评估成本并避免回归。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一个基于 LLM 的智能体框架，用于构建稳健的医疗筛查管道。
  • 通过分阶段锁定和回滚机制确保配置稳定性和可复现性。
  • 在基于转录的抑郁症检测中验证框架收敛到稳定配置（余弦相似度、动态 Top-k、阈值 0.75），控制评估成本并避免回归。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在一个概念验证任务（抑郁症检测）上测试，泛化性未知。
  • 未提及与其他基线方法的定量比较。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Mental health disorders affect millions worldwide, and healthcare systems are increasingly overwhelmed by the volume of clinical data generated from electronic records, telemedicine platforms, and population-level screening programs. At the same time, the emergence of novel AI-based approaches in healthcare calls for intelligent frameworks capable of processing domain-specific unstructured clinical information while adapting to patient-specific needs. This paper proposes an agentic framework for building robust LLM-based pipelines, where each stage is encapsulated as a LangChain agent governed by explicit policies and proxy-guided evaluation. Stages are incrementally locked once validated, ensuring that later adaptations cannot overwrite configurations without demonstrated improvement. The proposed framework evolves from feature-level exploration, through proxy-based tuning and freeze/rollback mechanisms, to full orchestration by an Orchestrator Agent that coordinates preprocessing, retrieval, selection, diversity, threshold optimization, and decoding. A proof-of-concept in transcript-based depression detection demonstrates that the framework converges to stable configurations, such as cosine similarity, dynamic Top-k, and threshold 0.75, while controlling evaluation costs and avoiding regressions. These results highlight the potential of agentic AI to enable population-level mental health screening over large clinical datasets, addressing critical challenges in trustworthiness, reproducibility, and adaptability required in healthcare environments.

Does language matter for spoken word classification? A multilingual generative meta-learning approach

Medium 2605.13084
Batsirayi Mupamhi Ziki, Louise Beyers, Ruan van der Merwe
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：生成式元连续学习在多语种口语单词分类中有效，但语言数量对性能影响小于训练数据量。
🎯研究动机

元学习在少样本单语口语单词分类中表现优于监督学习，但在多语种场景下研究不足，需要探索其泛化能力。

❓解决问题

多语种口语单词分类中元学习方法的有效性及语言数量对性能的影响。

🔎现象分析

多语种模型性能最佳，但不同语言模型间性能差异意外地小；训练中看到的独特数据小时数比语言数量更能指示性能。

🛠️主要方法

应用生成式元连续学习算法进行多语种口语单词分类，训练单语、双语和多语种模型。

📊实验结果

在英语、德语、法语、加泰罗尼亚语上训练单语模型，英语和德语双语模型，以及四种语言的多语种模型，比较性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将生成式元连续学习应用于多语种口语单词分类
  • 发现训练数据量比语言数量对性能影响更大
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅涉及四种语言，可能不适用于更多语言
  • 未提供具体性能数值或基准对比
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Meta-learning has been shown to have better performance than supervised learning for few-shot monolingual spoken word classification. However, the meta-learning approach remains under-explored in multilingual spoken word classification. In this paper, we apply the Generative Meta-Continual Learning algorithm to spoken word classification. The generative nature of this algorithm makes it viable for use in application, and the meta-learning aspect promotes generalisation, which is crucial in a multilingual setting. We train monolingual models on English, German, French, and Catalan, a bilingual model on English and German, and a multilingual model on all four languages. We find that although the multilingual model performs best, the differences between model performance is unexpectedly low. We also find that the hours of unique data seen during training seems to be a stronger performance indicator than the number of languages included in the training data.

A Multi-Agent Orchestration Framework for Venture Capital Due Diligence

Medium 2605.13110
Grigorios Alexandrou, Katerina Pramatari
arXiv PDF cs.MA
TL;DR：提出一个多智能体编排框架，用于风险投资尽职调查，通过事件驱动架构和程序化数据提取减少幻觉。
🎯研究动机

风险投资尽职调查依赖大量非结构化数据，手动处理耗时且易出错，现有方法缺乏自动化且容易产生幻觉。

❓解决问题

如何自动化地从非结构化数据中提取结构化投资情报，并确保财务数据的准确性和可追溯性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

事件驱动多智能体编排架构，结合 LLM 与实时网络检索，程序化提取希腊商业登记处的动态端点数据，使用布局感知 OCR 解析，并设计结构化的回退机制标记数据缺失。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一个完全自动化的多智能体尽职调查框架
  • 开发程序化数据提取管道，逆向工程商业登记处前端 - 后端通信
  • 设计结构化回退机制，直接标记数据缺失而非生成未验证数字，减少幻觉
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对希腊商业登记处，泛化性未知
  • 未提供定量评估结果
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present a fully automated multi-agent framework for corporate due diligence and market analysis in venture capital. The system runs on an event-driven orchestration architecture, combining Large Language Models (LLMs) with real-time web retrieval to synthesize unstructured data into structured investment intelligence. A central technical contribution is a programmatic extraction pipeline that reverse-engineers the frontend-to-backend communication of the Greek Business Registry ($\Gamma$. this http URL .), querying dynamic endpoints to retrieve official financial filings that are then parsed using a layout-aware OCR extractor. A structural fallback mechanism explicitly flags data absence rather than generating unverified figures, directly targeting hallucination in financial contexts. All workflow artifacts are publicly available to support replication.

The Readability Spectrum: Patterns, Issues, and Prompt Effects in LLM-Generated Code

Medium 2605.13280
Hengzhi Ye, Fengyuan Ran, Weiwei Xu, Minghui Zhou
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：LLM 生成的代码可读性与人类代码相当，但存在独特的可读性问题模式，且提示设计的影响有限。
🎯研究动机

LLM 在软件开发中广泛应用，但代码可读性这一非功能属性被忽视，而人类仍需审查 LLM 生成的代码，因此理解其可读性至关重要。

❓解决问题

系统研究 LLM 生成代码的可读性，包括与人类代码的比较、可读性问题模式以及提示设计的影响。

🔎现象分析

LLM 生成的代码整体可读性与人类代码相当，但表现出不同的可读性问题模式；提示设计中的函数签名、约束和风格描述是影响可读性的最显著因素，但整体影响有限。

🛠️主要方法

建立综合可读性模型（融合文本、结构、程序和视觉特征），基于 WoC 和 LeetCode 的 5869 个场景评估主流 LLM 生成代码的可读性。

📊实验结果

在 5869 个场景（来自 WoC 和 LeetCode）上评估了主流 LLM 生成代码的可读性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了综合代码可读性模型，系统量化可读性。
  • 揭示了 LLM 生成代码的可读性模式与人类代码的差异，以及提示设计的有限影响。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可读性模型可能未覆盖所有方面。
  • 提示设计的影响有限，未探索更复杂的提示策略。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As Large Language Models (LLMs) are transforming software development, the functional quality of generated code has become a central focus, leaving readability, one of critical non-functional attributes, understudied. Given that LLM-generated code still needs human review before adoption, it is important to understand its readability especially compared with human-written code and the role of prompt design in shaping it. We therefore set out to conduct a systematic investigation into the code readability of LLM-generated code. To systematically quantify code readability, We establish a comprehensive readability model that synthesizes textual, structural, program, and visual features of code. Based on the model, we evaluate the readability of code generated by the mainstream LLMs under 5,869 scenarios extracted from large code base including World of Code (WoC) and LeetCode. We find that current LLMs produce code with overall readability comparable to human-written code, but displaying distinct readability issue patterns. We further examine how different prompt dimensions affect the readability of LLM-generated code, and find that function signatures, constraints and style descriptions emerge as the most influential factors, while the overall impact of prompt design remains limited. Our findings indicate that, on one hand, LLM-generated code is at least comparable to human-written code in readability, validating its potential for systematic integration into software workflows from a non-functional perspective; on the other hand, distinct readability issue patterns and limited effectiveness of prompt engineering reveal a latent technical debt, highlighting the need for future research to improve the readability of LLM-generated code and thus ensure long-term maintainability.

IdeaForge: A Knowledge Graph-Grounded Multi-Agent Framework for Cross-Methodology Innovation Analysis and Patent Claim Generation

Medium 2605.13311
Joy Bose
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出知识图谱驱动的多智能体框架 IdeaForge，通过跨方法收敛机制生成可追溯、多样化的专利权利要求。
🎯研究动机

现有 AI 创新系统通常使用单一方法论（如 TRIZ 或设计思维）的序列提示工作流，不保留中间推理结构，导致跨方法洞察碎片化，缺乏可追溯性和系统性新颖性评估。

❓解决问题

如何整合多种创新方法论，实现跨方法的结构化知识融合与高置信度专利权利要求生成。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建基于 FalkorDB 知识图谱的多智能体框架，每个智能体对应一种创新方法论（TRIZ、设计思维、SCAMPER），贡献结构化实体和关系；通过图基收敛机制连接跨方法支持的权利要求，利用图遍历识别高置信度创新候选；下游专利起草智能体基于收敛子图生成结构化专利草案；提出 InnovationScore 公式对候选进行排序。

📊实验结果

在法律技术用例上的实验表明，图基多方法合成相比单方法基线产生更多样化和可追溯的创新候选。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出跨方法收敛机制，通过图基权利要求链接实现多方法论的结构化融合。
  • 设计知识图谱驱动的多智能体框架，支持可追溯、多样化的创新候选生成。
  • 引入 InnovationScore 公式，综合收敛支持度、方法论多样性、权利要求强度和现有技术挑战数进行排序。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅涉及法律技术领域，泛化性待验证。
  • 框架依赖预定义方法论和知识图谱模式，扩展新方法论可能需要额外设计。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Current AI-assisted innovation systems typically apply a single ideation methodology (such as TRIZ or Design Thinking) using sequential prompt-based workflows that do not preserve intermediate reasoning structure. As a result, insights generated across methodologies remain fragmented, limiting traceability, synthesis, and systematic evaluation of novelty. We present IdeaForge, a knowledge graph-grounded multi-agent framework for innovation analysis and patent claim generation. IdeaForge integrates multiple innovation methodologies (TRIZ, Design Thinking, and SCAMPER) through specialist agents operating over a persistent FalkorDB knowledge graph. Each agent contributes structured entities and relationships representing contradictions, inventive principles, user needs, transformations, analogies, and candidate claims. The central contribution of IdeaForge is a cross-methodology convergence mechanism implemented through graph-based claim linkage. Claims independently supported by multiple methodologies are connected using CONVERGENT relationships, enabling identification of high-confidence innovation candidates through graph traversal. A downstream patent drafting agent generates structured patent drafts grounded in convergent claim subgraphs, reducing reliance on unconstrained language model generation. An InnovationScore formula ranks claims by convergent support, methodology diversity, claim strength, and prior art challenge count. We describe the graph schema, agent architecture, convergence detection pipeline, and patent synthesis workflow. Experiments on a legal technology use case demonstrate that graph-grounded multi-methodology synthesis produces more diverse and traceable innovation candidates compared to single-methodology baselines. We discuss implications for computational creativity, explainable AI-assisted invention, and graph-native innovation systems.

LLMs as annotators of credibility assessment in Danish asylum decisions: evaluating classification performance and errors beyond aggregated metrics

Medium 2605.13412
Galadrielle Humblot-Renaux, Mohammad N. S. Jahromi, Rohat Bakuri-Jørgensen, Marieke Anne Heyl, Asta S. Stage Jarlner, Maria Vlachou, Anna Murphy Høgenhaug, Desmond Elliott et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：LLM 在丹麦庇护决策可信度评估标注中表现有潜力但存在不一致性，需超越单一模型评估。
🎯研究动机

LLM 被用于自动化文本标注，但在低资源语言和专业领域（如法律）中，其有效性尚未充分探索，尤其是需要专家理解的细分类别定义。

❓解决问题

评估 LLM 在丹麦庇护决策文本中识别可信度评估及其情感倾向的标注性能，并分析错误模式。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出 LLM 标注者存在不完美和不一致性，错误在不同模型间不一致，存在类别混淆，且与人类置信度和样本难度相关。

🛠️主要方法

构建 RAB-Cred 数据集（丹麦语文本分类，含专家标注和元数据），对 21 个开源模型和 30 种提示组合进行零样本和少样本分类基准测试，并深入分析错误。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入 RAB-Cred 数据集，包含高质量专家标注和元数据（如标注者置信度、案件结果）。
  • 系统评估 21 个开源模型和 30 种提示组合，揭示模型和提示选择对性能的影响。
  • 深入分析错误，包括跨模型一致性、类别混淆、与人类置信度的相关性及错误严重性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对丹麦语和法律领域，泛化性有限。
  • 未涉及闭源模型或更大规模模型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Off-the-shelf large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to automate text annotation, yet their effectiveness remains underexplored for underrepresented languages and specialized domains where the class definition requires subtle expert understanding. We investigate LLM-based annotation for a novel legal NLP task: identifying the presence and sentiment of credibility assessments in asylum decision texts. We introduce RAB-Cred, a Danish text classification dataset featuring high-quality, expert annotations and valuable metadata such as annotator confidence and asylum case outcome. We benchmark 21 open-weight models and 30 system-user prompt combinations for this task, and systematically evaluate the effect of model and prompt choice for zero-shot and few-shot classification. We zoom in on the errors made by top-performing models and prompts, investigating error consistency across LLMs, inter-class confusion, correlation with human confidence and sample-wise difficulty and severity of LLM mistakes. Our results confirm the potential of LLMs for cost-effective labeling of asylum decisions, but highlight the imperfect and inconsistent nature of LLM annotators, and the need to look beyond the predictions of a single, arbitrarily chosen model. The RAB-Cred dataset and code are available at this https URL

Continual Learning with Multilingual Foundation Model

Medium 2605.13415
Barathi Ganesh HB, Michal Ptaszynski, Rene Melendez, Juuso Eronen
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出多阶段框架，利用多语言基础模型检测社交媒体中 LGBTQ+ 相关冒犯性词汇的回收性使用。
🎯研究动机

多语言社交媒体中回收性冒犯词汇的检测面临数据稀缺、类别不平衡和跨语言情感表达差异等挑战，现有方法难以有效处理。

❓解决问题

如何准确识别英语、西班牙语和意大利语推文中 LGBTQ+ 相关冒犯词汇的回收性（reclamatory）与非回收性（non-reclamatory）使用。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

多阶段框架：包括基于交叉验证的数据驱动模型选择（XLM-RoBERTa）、通过 GPT-4o-mini 回译进行语义保持的数据增强、归纳迁移学习与动态 epoch 级欠采样、以及通过掩码语言建模注入领域知识。最后通过语言特定决策阈值优化（ROC 分析）提升性能。

📊实验结果

在英语、西班牙语和意大利语推文上评估，使用宏平均 F1 分数选择 XLM-RoBERTa 作为基础模型，并生成四个最终运行结果。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一个集成多种策略的多阶段框架，有效处理数据稀缺、类别不平衡和跨语言变化。
  • 通过 GPT-4o-mini 回译实现语义保持的数据增强，将训练语料库扩大三倍。
  • 语言特定阈值优化在不重新训练模型的情况下带来 2-5% 的绝对 F1 提升。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对 LGBTQ+ 相关冒犯词汇，可能不适用于其他类型的回收性语言。
  • 依赖 GPT-4o-mini 进行回译，可能引入生成偏差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This paper presents a multi-stage framework for detecting reclaimed slurs in multilingual social media discourse. It addresses the challenge of identifying reclamatory versus non-reclamatory usage of LGBTQ+-related slurs across English, Spanish, and Italian tweets. The framework handles three intertwined methodological challenges like data scarcity, class imbalance, and cross-linguistic variation in sentiment expression. It integrates data-driven model selection via cross-validation, semantic-preserving augmentation through back-translation, inductive transfer learning with dynamic epoch-level undersampling, and domain-specific knowledge injection via masked language modeling. Eight multilingual embedding models were evaluated systematically, with XLM-RoBERTa selected as the foundation model based on macro-averaged F1 score. Data augmentation via GPT-4o-mini back-translation to alternate languages effectively tripled the training corpus while preserving semantic content and class distribution ratios. The framework produces four final runs for the evaluation purposes where RUN 1 is inductive transfer learning with augmentation and undersampling, RUN 2 with masked language modeling pre-training, RUN 3 and RUN 4 are previous predictions refined via language-specific decision thresholds optimized via ROC analysis. Language-specific threshold refinement reveals that optimal decision boundaries vary significantly across languages. This reflects distributional differences in model confidence scores and linguistic variation in reclamatory language usage. The threshold-based optimization yields 2-5% absolute F1 improvement without requiring model retraining. The methodology is fully reproducible, with all code and experimental setup available at this https URL .

AI-Generated Slides: Are They Good? Can Students Tell?

Medium 2605.13532
Juho Leinonen, Lisa Zhang, Arto Hellas
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：GenAI 生成的幻灯片质量与教师制作相当，且学生无法可靠区分。
🎯研究动机

生成式 AI 工具易获取，有望支持教学，但需评估其生成教学材料的质量及师生感知。

❓解决问题

评估 GenAI 工具从教师笔记生成幻灯片的质量，并探究学生能否区分 AI 与人类生成的幻灯片。

🔎现象分析

学生将高质量幻灯片误判为 AI 生成的可能性低，即高质量与高“AI 生成”评分负相关。

🛠️主要方法

使用多种 GenAI 工具（NotebookLM、Claude、M365 Copilot、Cursor、Claude Code）生成幻灯片，通过教育者叙事评估质量，并在真实课程中比较学生感知。

📊实验结果

在真实课程中比较学生对人机生成幻灯片的感知，并评估识别准确性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现编码助手工具生成的幻灯片在准确性、完整性和教学法上最优。
  • 学生认为 AI 生成幻灯片与教师制作质量相似，且无法可靠识别来源。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估特定工具和课程笔记，泛化性有限。
  • 未深入分析不同学科或幻灯片类型的差异。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As generative AI (GenAI) tools become easily accessible, there is promise in using such tools to support instructors. To that end, this paper examines using GenAI to help generate slides from instructor authored course notes, emphasizing instructor and student perceptions. We examine an end-to-end education tool (NotebookLM), two general-purpose LLMs (Claude, M365 Copilot), and two coding assistants (Cursor, Claude Code). We first analyze whether GenAI generated slides are ``good'' via narrative assessment by educators. We choose the best slides to use (with some modification) in a real course setting, and compare the student perception of human vs. AI generated slides. We find that coding assistant tools produce slides that were most accurate, complete, and pedagogically sound. Additionally, students rate GenAI slides to be of similar quality as instructor-created slides, and cannot reliably identify which slides are AI-generated. Additionally, we find a negative correlation between a high quality rating and a high ``AI-generated'' rating, suggesting students associate poor quality with the source of the slides being AI. These findings highlight promising opportunities for integrating GenAI into instructional design workflows and call for further research on how educators can best harness such tools responsibly and effectively.

Locale-Conditioned Few-Shot Prompting Mitigates Demonstration Regurgitation in On-Device PII Substitution with Small Language Models

Medium 2605.13538
Anuj Sadani, Deepak Kumar
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：通过区域条件旋转少样本提示，解决小型语言模型在设备端 PII 替换中的演示重复问题。
🎯研究动机

PII 脱敏通常用占位符替换实体，破坏了下游检索和 NER 训练的有用性；现有方法在设备端部署时面临演示重复问题。

❓解决问题

小型语言模型在少样本提示下会逐字重复演示输出，导致 PII 替换失败。

🔎现象分析

1-bit SLM 在固定三样本演示下无论输入如何都重复演示输出；1.58-bit 模型也出现字节相同的失败，排除了量化原因。

🛠️主要方法

提出区域条件旋转少样本提示：基于字符范围启发式选择区域纯池，对每个输入使用 MD5 哈希采样三个演示。

📊实验结果

在 2000 文档多语言语料库上，混合困惑度在六个区域均优于 faker；下游 NER（400 训练 /100 测试，英语）中，faker F1=0.656，混合 F1=0.346。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现小型语言模型在少样本 PII 替换中会重复演示输出，且与量化无关。
  • 提出区域条件旋转少样本提示方法，消除重复并生成区域正确的替代值。
  • 报告下游 NER 任务中混合方法不如 faker 的诚实负面发现。
⚠️方法局限
  • SLM 仍会从同区域小演示池中复制，存在残留狭窄性。
  • 下游 NER 任务中混合方法性能不如 faker。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Personally Identifiable Information (PII) redaction usually replaces detected entities with placeholder tokens such as [PERSON], destroying the downstream utility of the redacted text for retrieval and Named Entity Recognition (NER) training. We propose a fully on-device pipeline that substitutes PII with consistent, type-preserving fake values: a 1.5 B mixture-of-experts token classifier (openai/privacy-filter) detects spans, a 1-bit Bonsai-1.7B Small Language Model (SLM) proposes contextual surrogates for names, addresses, and dates, and a rule-based generator (faker) handles patterned fields. We report a prompting finding more important than the quantization choice: with naive fixed three-shot demonstrations, the 1-bit SLM regurgitates demonstration outputs verbatim regardless of input; 1.58-bit Ternary-Bonsai-1.7B reproduces byte-identical failures, ruling out quantization as the cause. We fix this with locale-conditioned rotating few-shot demonstrations: a character-range heuristic picks a locale-pure pool and a per-input MD5 hash samples three demonstrations. With the fix, 482/482 unique Bonsai-1.7B calls succeed (no echoes) and produce locale-correct surrogates, although the SLM still copies from a small same-locale demonstration pool - a residual narrowness we quantify. On a 2000-document multilingual corpus, hybrid perplexity (PPL) beats faker in all six locales under a multilingual evaluator (XGLM-564M); length preservation is best-of-three in 4 of 6 locales. On downstream NER (400 train / 100 test, English), redact yields F1=0.000, faker 0.656, original 0.960; on a matched 160/40 subset including hybrid, faker (0.506) outperforms hybrid (0.346) at p < 0.001. We report this as an honest negative finding: SLM surrogates produce more natural text but a less varied training distribution, and downstream NER benefits more from variety than from naturalness.

Children's English Reading Story Generation via Supervised Fine-Tuning of Compact LLMs with Controllable Difficulty and Safety

Medium 2605.13709
Qian Shen (1), Fanghua Cao (1), Min Yao (1), Shlok Gilda (1), Bonnie J. Dorr (1), Walter L. Leite (1) ((1) University of Florida, Gainesville, USA)
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：通过监督微调 8B 参数 LLM，生成难度可控且安全的儿童英语阅读故事。
🎯研究动机

大型语言模型在教育中应用广泛，但生成的故事常超出儿童阅读能力，且运行成本高，限制了其在教育场景的普及。

❓解决问题

如何用紧凑型 LLM 生成难度可控且安全的儿童英语阅读故事。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于专家设计的儿童阅读课程和 GPT-4o/Llama 3.3 70B 生成的故事，微调三个 8B 参数 LLM，通过可控难度设计生成新故事。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种用紧凑型 LLM 生成难度可控且安全的儿童英语阅读故事的方法。
  • 实验表明微调后的 8B 模型在难度指标上优于零样本 GPT-4o 和 Llama 3.3 70B，且安全性良好。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对英语阅读故事，可能不适用于其他语言或体裁。
  • 微调依赖专家设计的课程和已有生成数据，泛化性待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Models (LLMs) are widely applied in educational practices, such as for generating children's stories. However, the generated stories are often too difficult for children to read, and the operational cost of LLMs hinders their widespread adoption in educational settings. We used an existing expert-designed children's reading curriculum and its corresponding generated stories from GPT-4o and Llama 3.3 70B to design different experiments for fine-tuning three 8B-parameter LLMs, which then generated new English reading stories that were subjected to quantitative and qualitative evaluation. Our method prioritizes controllability over scale, enabling educators to target reading levels and error patterns with a compact, affordable model. Our evaluation results show that with appropriate fine-tuning designs, children's English reading stories generated by 8B LLMs perform better on difficulty-related metrics than those from zero-shot GPT-4o and Llama 3.3 70B, with almost no discernible safety issues. Such fine-tuned LLMs could be more broadly used by teachers, parents, and children in classrooms and at home to generate engaging English reading stories with children's interests, controllable difficulty and safety.

ENSEMBITS: an alphabet of protein conformational ensembles

Medium 2605.13789
Kaiwen Shi, Carlos Oliver
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：首个蛋白质构象集合分词器，将动力学信息融入蛋白质语言建模。
🎯研究动机

现有蛋白质结构分词器仅捕捉静态结构的局部几何特征，忽略了蛋白质构象集合所揭示的相关运动和替代构象状态，限制了蛋白质语言建模和功能预测的准确性。

❓解决问题

如何对蛋白质构象集合进行有效的离散分词，以捕捉动力学信息并克服动态数据稀疏性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Ensembits，基于残差 VQ-VAE 和帧蒸馏目标在大型分子动力学语料上训练，实现构象集合的置换不变编码和动力学信息压缩。

📊实验结果

在 RMSF 预测、ANOVA 测试、EC/GO/ 结合位点 / 亲和力预测以及零样本突变效应预测上评估，Ensembits 在动力学任务上超越所有相关方法，在静态任务上匹配或超越静态分词器。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个蛋白质构象集合分词器，能够从集合中提取动力学信息。
  • 通过帧蒸馏目标，可从单个预测结构预测动力学 token，缓解数据稀疏问题。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖大规模分子动力学数据，对缺乏动力学数据的蛋白质适用性有限。
  • 蒸馏目标从单结构预测动力学 token 的准确性可能受限于结构预测质量。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Protein structure tokenizers (PSTs) are workhorses in protein language modeling, function prediction, and evolutionary analysis. However, existing PSTs only capture local geometry of static structures, and miss the correlated motions and alternative conformational states revealed by protein ensembles. Here we introduce Ensembits, the first tokenizer of protein conformational ensembles. Ensembits address challenges inherent to tokenizing dynamics: deriving informative geometric descriptors across conformations, permutation-invariance encoding of variable-size ensembles, and conquering sparsity in dynamics data. Trained with a Residual VQ-VAE using a frame distillation objective on a large molecular dynamics corpus, Ensembits outperforms all related methods on RMSF prediction, and is the strongest standalone structural tokenizer on an token-conditioned ANOVA test on per-residue motion amplitude. Ensembits further matches or exceeds static tokenizers on EC, GO, binding site/affinity prediction, and zero-shot mutation-effect prediction despite using far less pretraining data. Notably, the distillation objective enables Ensembits to predict dynamics token from one single predicted structure, which alleviates dynamics data sparsity. As the field moves from static structure prediction toward ensemble generation, Ensembits offer the discrete vocabulary needed to bring dynamics into protein language modeling and design.

WARDEN: Endangered Indigenous Language Transcription and Translation with 6 Hours of Training Data

Medium 2605.13846
Ziheng Zhang, Yunzhong Hou, Naijing Liu, Liang Zheng
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：WARDEN 用 6 小时标注数据实现濒危语言 Wardaman 的语音转录与翻译，两阶段设计优于统一模型。
🎯研究动机

濒危语言缺乏大规模训练数据，传统数据密集型方法（如端到端统一模型）在极低资源场景下不可行，亟需针对性的低资源方案。

❓解决问题

在仅有 6 小时标注音频的极低资源条件下，实现 Wardaman 语音到英文的转录与翻译。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

两阶段流水线：先使用音素转录模型将 Wardaman 音频转为音素转录，再用 LLM 结合专家编译的词典将转录翻译为英文；转录模型用共享相似音素的 Sundanese 语言初始化。

📊实验结果

在 6 小时 Wardaman 标注数据上，WARDEN 优于更大规模的开源和商业模型，建立了强基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出两阶段转录 - 翻译架构，在极低资源下优于统一模型
  • 引入音素级语言迁移（Sundanese 初始化）和词典增强 LLM 翻译两种低资源技术
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖专家编译的词典，可能难以扩展到其他无词典的濒危语言
  • 两阶段设计可能引入误差累积
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This paper introduces WARDEN, an early language model system capable of transcribing and translating Wardaman, an endangered Australian indigenous language into English. The significant challenge we face is the lack of large-scale training data: in fact, we only have 6 hours of annotated audio. Therefore, while it is common practice to train a single model for transcription and translation using large datasets (like English to French), this practice is no longer viable in the Wardaman to English context. To tackle the low-resource challenge, we design WARDEN to have separate transcription and translation models: WARDEN first turns a Wardaman audio input into phonemic transcription, and then the transcription into English translation. Further, we propose two useful techniques to enhance performance. For transcription, we initialize the Wardaman token from Sundanese, a language that shares similar phonemes with Wardaman, to accelerate fine-tuning of the transcription model. For translation, we compile a Wardaman-English dictionary from expert annotations, and provide this domain-specific knowledge to a large language model (LLM) to reason and decide the final output. We empirically demonstrate that this two-stage design works better than data-hungry unified approaches in extremely low data settings. Using a mere 6 hours of annotated data, WARDEN outperforms larger open-source and proprietary models and establishes a strong baseline. Data and code are available.

Training Large Language Models to Predict Clinical Events

Medium 2605.12817
Benjamin Turtel, Paul Wilczewski, Kris Skotheim
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：利用纵向临床笔记训练 LLM 预测未来临床事件，无需手工特征或专用分类器。
🎯研究动机

纵向临床笔记包含患者随时间演变的丰富证据，但如何将其转化为临床预测的训练监督信号仍具挑战。现有方法依赖手工结构化特征或端点专用分类器，缺乏可重用性。

❓解决问题

如何从时间序列临床笔记中自动生成训练数据，使大型语言模型能够预测未来临床事件（如用药、手术、微生物学结果等）。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

扩展 Foresight Learning 至临床预测：将 MIMIC-III 中按时间排序的笔记转换为（过去患者上下文、关于未来事件的自然语言问题、从后续文档解析的标签）三元组，训练 LoRA 适配器。

📊实验结果

在 MIMIC-III 数据集上评估，覆盖 702 次入院，涉及用药、手术、器官支持、微生物学和死亡率。LoRA 适配器将期望校准误差从 0.1269 降至 0.0398，Brier 分数从 0.199 降至 0.145，在保留问题上略优于 GPT-5 点估计。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出将 Foresight Learning 应用于临床事件预测的方法，从纵向笔记自动生成 6,900 个预测示例。
  • 证明小规模 LoRA 适配器可显著提升校准误差和 Brier 分数，并略优于 GPT-5 点估计。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于 MIMIC-III 单一数据集，泛化性待验证。
  • 预测示例数量有限（6,900 个），可能不足以覆盖所有临床场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Longitudinal clinical notes contain rich evidence of how patients evolve over time, but converting this signal into training supervision for clinical prediction remains challenging. We extend Foresight Learning to clinical prediction by converting time-ordered MIMIC-III notes into examples consisting of past patient context, a natural-language question about a possible future event, and a label resolved from later documentation. This process yields 6,900 prediction examples from 702 admissions across medications, procedures, organ support, microbiology, and mortality. A small LoRA adapter trained on these examples improves over the prompted base model, reducing expected calibration error from 0.1269 to 0.0398 and Brier score from 0.199 to 0.145, while slightly outperforming GPT-5 point estimates on held-out questions. The approach enables reusable clinical prediction supervision from longitudinal notes without hand-engineered structured features or endpoint-specific classifiers.

Exploring how EFL students talk to and through AI to develop texts

Medium 2605.12523
David James Woo, Yangyang Yu, Yilin Huang, Deliang Wang, Kai Guo, Chi Ho Yeung
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：EFL 学生与 AI 聊天机器人协作写作时，提示策略可分为三种人机修辞负载模式，但与写作表现无显著关联。
🎯研究动机

生成式 AI 为 EFL 写作教学带来新挑战，但学生如何通过提示工程与 AI 协作、以及这种协作模式如何影响写作表现尚不清楚。

❓解决问题

探索 EFL 学生在 AI 辅助写作中使用的提示策略类型、人机修辞负载责任模式，以及这些模式与写作表现的关系。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

采用探索性混合方法设计，分析 44 名香港中学生完成课程写作任务时的屏幕录制，通过内容识别提示策略，聚类得到三种人机修辞负载责任模式，并用 MANOVA 分析其与写作表现的关系。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别出 EFL 学生与 AI 协作写作时使用的十种提示策略类型。
  • 提出三种人机修辞负载责任模式：AI 主导、人类主导、人机协作。
⚠️方法局限
  • 样本量较小（44 人），可能限制泛化性。
  • 未控制学生英语水平等潜在混淆变量。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) introduces new considerations for English as a foreign language (EFL) writing pedagogy. This study explores how students talk to and through AI by prompt engineering and negotiating authorship, respectively, and whether any patterns in the latter relate to students' writing performance. Using an exploratory mixed methods design, we analyzed screen recordings of 44 Hong Kong secondary students completing a Curricular Writing Task with AI Chatbots. Content analysis identified ten types of prompting strategies students employed, including questions, searches, and detailed instructions. From clustering these strategies, three distinct profiles of human-AI rhetorical load responsibility emerged: AI-dominant (52% of students), Human-dominant (25%) and Collaborative human-AI (14%). A MANOVA analysis indicated no significant multivariate effect of rhetorical load responsibility on three dimensions of students' writing performance: content, language, and organization. Students' prompting strategies and rhetorical load responsibility patterns have implications for their engagement and autonomy in EFL writing pedagogy.

TimelineReasoner: Advancing Timeline Summarization with Large Reasoning Models

Medium 2605.12518
Liancheng Zhang, Xiaoxi Li, Zhicheng Dou
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出 TimelineReasoner 框架，利用大型推理模型将时间线摘要从静态生成转变为主动推理驱动过程，显著提升准确性和覆盖度。
🎯研究动机

在线新闻激增使得从非结构化内容中提取结构化时间线变得困难，现有 LLM 方法主要将模型视为被动生成器，缺乏主动推理能力。

❓解决问题

如何利用大型推理模型的推理能力，实现主动、迭代的时间线摘要生成，提高时间线的准确性、覆盖度和连贯性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 TimelineReasoner 两阶段框架：全局认知阶段宏观跟踪事件并更新全局事件记忆；细节探索阶段识别信息缺口并通过目标文档检索细化时间线。包含事件抓取器、时间线更新器和监督器三个专用机制。

📊实验结果

在开放域和封闭域时间线摘要数据集上进行了实验，开放域上在准确性、覆盖度和连贯性方面显著优于现有 LLM 方法，封闭域上与最先进方法持平或更优。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 TimelineReasoner 框架，将时间线摘要从静态生成转变为主动推理驱动过程。
  • 在开放域数据集上显著优于现有 LLM 方法，在封闭域数据集上达到或超越最先进水平。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量检索文档，在低资源领域效果受限。
  • 推理过程可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The proliferation of online news poses a challenge to extracting structured timelines from unstructured content. While recent studies have shown that Large Language Models (LLMs) can assist Timeline Summarization (TLS), these approaches primarily treat models as passive generators. The emergence of Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) presents an opportunity to reason over events actively, enabling iterative evidence acquisition, the detection of missing events, and the validation of temporal consistency. To systematically leverage the reasoning capabilities of LRMs, we propose TimelineReasoner, a novel framework that shifts TLS from static generation to an active, reasoning-driven process. Unlike prior work, TimelineReasoner adopts a two-stage framework: Global Cognition, which tracks events at a macroscopic level and continuously updates a global event memory, and Detail Exploration, which identifies informational gaps and refines the timeline via targeted document retrieval. To support this, TimelineReasoner incorporates several specialized mechanisms, including an Event Scraper for retrieving temporal event descriptions, a Timeline Updater for refining the timeline, and a Supervisor for detecting gaps in the timeline and guiding retrieval. Experimental results on open-domain TLS datasets demonstrate that TimelineReasoner significantly outperforms existing LLM-based TLS methods in terms of timeline accuracy, coverage, and coherence. On closed-domain TLS datasets, our method performs on par with or exceeds state-of-the-art approaches. This work not only pushes the boundaries of TLS but also highlights the broader potential of LRM-based reasoning frameworks for timeline summarization.

Beyond Individual Mimicry: Constructing Human-Like Social network with Graph-Augmented LLM Agents

Medium 2605.12512
Haoran Bu, Litian Zhang, Chuxuan Zhang, Zhanyuan Liu, Hui Pang, Xi Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.SI
TL;DR：提出 GraphMind 框架，让 LLM 驱动的社交机器人学习并拟合人类社交网络结构，构建更逼真的社交机器人网络，暴露现有检测机制的弱点。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 驱动的社交机器人虽然能模拟局部社交互动，但无法构建类似人类的社交网络结构，容易被基于图神经网络的检测方法识别。

❓解决问题

如何让 LLM 驱动的社交机器人显式学习并拟合人类社交网络结构，从而生成更逼真的社交网络，并评估现有检测算法的有效性。

🔎现象分析

LLM 驱动的社交机器人缺乏图感知能力，无法协调全局交互，导致生成的社交网络结构不似人类，易被 GNN 检测。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GraphMind 框架，赋予 LLM 驱动的社交机器人显式学习和拟合人类社交网络结构的能力；基于此构建 GraphMind-Botnet 用于评估检测算法。

📊实验结果

在 GraphMind-Botnet 生成的数据集上，基于文本和基于图的检测模型性能均显著下降。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GraphMind 框架，使 LLM 驱动的社交机器人能够学习并拟合人类社交网络结构。
  • 构建 GraphMind-Botnet，用于评估现有社交机器人检测算法，并揭示其弱点。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对特定类型的社交网络结构有效。
  • 未提及对大规模真实社交网络的泛化能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Driven by large language models (LLMs), social bot can autonomously engage in local interactions, whose human-like behaviors enable them to evade social bot detection. However, while these botnets exhibit realistic local social interactions, they fail to preserve human-like social network. This is because LLM-based bots are graph-unaware and cannot coordinate over global interactions, which makes those botnets vulnerable to graph neural network (GNN)-based detection. To address this limitation, we propose GraphMind, which equips LLM-driven social bots to explicitly learn and fit human-like social network structures. Building on this foundation, we further construct GraphMind-Botnet, a LLM-driven botnet designed to evaluate the performance of existing social bot detection algorithms. Experiments on datasets derived from GraphMind-Botnet show that both text-based and graph-based detection models show substantially degraded performance in distinguishing. Our results highlight the critical role of social link construction in LLM-driven social network generation, while exposing fundamental weaknesses in existing bot detection mechanisms.

Can LLM Agents Simulate Dynamic Networks? A Case Study on Email Networks with Phishing Synthesis

Medium 2605.12507
Siqi Miao, Ziyang Chen, Yuhong Luo, Hans Hao-Hsun Hsu, Mufei Li, Kaiqing Zhang, Pan Li
arXiv PDF cs.SI
TL;DR：提出两种扩展使 LLM 多智能体系统能同时模拟微观交互和宏观网络动态，并在钓鱼邮件合成中验证。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 多智能体系统在模拟人类行为时能生成合理的微观交互，但无法复现动态网络的宏观拓扑结构，限制了其在信息传播和网络安全等领域的应用。

❓解决问题

如何让 LLM 多智能体系统在模拟动态网络时同时保持微观交互的合理性和宏观网络结构的真实性。

🔎现象分析

现有框架擅长生成微观层面的交互，但无法捕捉宏观拓扑结构，导致网络动态模拟失真。

🛠️主要方法

提出两种可集成扩展：1) 数据驱动的事件触发器，维持长期交互；2) 集成 Hawkes 过程，精确建模时间激活动态。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示现有 LLM 多智能体系统在动态网络模拟中宏观拓扑保真度不足的问题
  • 提出两种易集成的扩展方法，使模拟同时保持微观和宏观网络特性
  • 在钓鱼邮件合成任务中展示框架的应用价值，揭示威胁如何利用结构漏洞
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类型的动态网络（如邮件网络）
  • 扩展方法可能增加计算开销
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

While Large Language Model (LLM) multi-agent systems (MAS) offer a transformative approach to simulating human behavior in complex systems, it remains largely unexplored whether these simulations can replicate realistic structural and temporal dynamics from a dynamic network perspective. Our evaluation indicates that existing frameworks excel at generating plausible micro-level interactions but fail to capture the emergent, macroscopic topologies necessary for domains that rely on realistic network dynamics, such as modeling information propagation and cybersecurity threats. To bridge this gap, we introduce two easily integrable extensions to simulation frameworks to ensure they preserve macroscopic network fidelity: 1) augmenting LLM agents with data-driven event triggers to organically sustain long-horizon interactions, and 2) integrating Hawkes processes to accurately model temporal activation dynamics. Our approach allows LLM MAS to capture both plausible micro-level patterns and macroscopic topologies. We further demonstrate the utility of this framework in synthesizing realistic phishing campaigns within evolving communication networks. The study reveals how threats exploit structural vulnerabilities, highlighting the potential of our framework for developing next-generation defenses. Our code is available at this https URL .

3D 视觉与场景 10 篇

GuardMarkGS: Unified Ownership Tracing and Edit Deterrence for 3D Gaussian Splatting

High 2605.12919
Utae Jeong, Jaewan Choi, Junseok Lee, Jongheon Jeong, Sang Ho Yoon, ByoungSoo Koh, Sangpil Kim
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：首个统一保护 3DGS 资产的框架，同时实现所有权追踪和编辑防御。
🎯研究动机

3DGS 资产发布后面临双重版权风险：未经授权使用和恶意编辑。现有方法仅解决单一方面（水印追踪或编辑防御），缺乏统一方案。

❓解决问题

如何同时实现 3DGS 资产的所有权追踪和未经授权编辑防御，并平衡水印恢复、编辑防御和渲染质量。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

联合优化场景级水印目标和对抗编辑防御目标。对抗分支使用潜在锚点分离、去噪轨迹偏转和交叉注意力偏转来偏转编辑轨迹，并通过更新显著性驱动的 Gaussian 选择策略增强对抗更新。

📊实验结果

在 Mip-NeRF 360 和 Instruct-NeRF2NeRF 场景上实验，表明框架在比特准确率、编辑防御和渲染质量间取得良好平衡。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个统一保护 3DGS 资产的框架，同时实现所有权追踪和编辑防御。
  • 提出结合水印和对抗目标的联合优化方法，以及基于更新显著性的 Gaussian 选择策略。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对复杂编辑操作（如局部精细编辑）的防御效果有限。
  • 水印容量和鲁棒性可能受限于场景复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is becoming a practical representation for novel view synthesis, but its growing adoption, together with rapid advances in instruction-driven 3DGS editing, also exposes a dual copyright risk: once a 3DGS-based asset is released, it can be used without permission and manipulated through 3D editing. Existing protection methods address only one side of this problem. Watermarking can trace ownership after unauthorized use, but it cannot prevent malicious editing. Adversarial edit-deterrence methods can disrupt editing, but they do not provide evidence of ownership. To the best of our knowledge, we present the first unified protection framework for 3DGS that jointly optimizes ownership tracing and unauthorized editing deterrence. Our framework combines a scene-wide watermarking objective over all Gaussians with an adversarial objective for edit deterrence. The adversarial branch combines latent-anchor separation, denoising-trajectory diversion, and cross-attention diversion to divert the editing trajectory, while an update-saliency-motivated Gaussian selection strategy assigns stronger adversarial updates to mask-selected Gaussians, improving the balance among watermark recovery, edit deterrence, and rendering fidelity. Experiments on scenes from Mip-NeRF 360 and Instruct-NeRF2NeRF demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves a favorable balance among bit accuracy, edit deterrence, and rendering quality. These results suggest that practical copyright protection of 3DGS-based assets can be more effectively addressed by integrating ownership tracing and unauthorized editing deterrence into a single optimization framework.

OCH3R: Object-Centric Holistic 3D Reconstruction

High 2605.13018
Yi Du, Yang You, Xiang Wan, Leonidas Guibas
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：OCH3R 提出一种从单张 RGB 图像同时预测所有物体实例的 6D 姿态和 3D 重建的统一框架，实现端到端、与物体数量无关的快速推理。
🎯研究动机

现有物体级场景理解方法依赖多阶段流水线，先分割再逐个重建，计算成本高、对分割错误敏感且难以扩展到复杂场景。

❓解决问题

如何从单张 RGB 图像高效、鲁棒地同时完成所有物体的实例分割、6D 姿态估计和详细 3D 重建。

🔎现象分析

多阶段流水线存在计算瓶颈和误差累积，且推理时间随物体数量线性增长。

🛠️主要方法

设计一个 Transformer 架构，一次性预测每个像素的 CLIP 类别嵌入、度量深度、归一化物体坐标（NOCS）和固定数量的 3D 高斯体；利用预测的 6D 姿态将高斯体变换到规范空间并与预渲染的规范真值对齐，避免逐图像生成高斯标签。

📊实验结果

在标准室内基准上评估，在单目深度估计、开放词汇语义分割和 RGB 类别级 6D 姿态估计任务上达到 SOTA，并展示了推理速度的显著提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个从单张 RGB 图像进行物体级整体 3D 重建的统一框架，实现端到端推理。
  • 设计基于 Transformer 的架构，同时预测物体实例、6D 姿态和 3D 高斯重建，推理速度与物体数量无关。
  • 在室内基准上达到单目深度估计、开放词汇语义分割和 RGB 类别级 6D 姿态估计的 SOTA 性能，并生成高质量、可编辑的逐物体重建。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预训练的 CLIP 嵌入，对未见类别泛化能力有限。
  • 固定数量的 3D 高斯体可能限制复杂物体的细节重建。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Object-centric scene understanding is a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Existing approaches often rely on multi-stage pipelines that first apply pre-trained segmentors to extract individual objects, followed by per-object 3D reconstruction. Such methods are computationally expensive, fragile to segmentation errors, and scale poorly with scene complexity. We introduce OCH3R, a unified framework for Object-Centric Holistic 3D Reconstruction from a single RGB image. OCH3R performs one forward pass to simultaneously predict all object instances with their 6D poses and detailed 3D reconstructions. The key idea is a transformer architecture that predicts per-pixel attributes, including CLIP-based category embeddings, metric depth, normalized object coordinates (NOCS), and a fixed number of 3D Gaussians representing each object. To supervise these Gaussian reconstructions, we transform them into canonical space using the predicted 6D poses and align them with pre-rendered canonical ground truth, avoiding costly per-image Gaussian label generation. On standard indoor benchmarks, OCH3R achieves state-of-the-art performance across monocular depth estimation, open-vocabulary semantic segmentation, and RGB-only category-level 6D pose estimation, while producing high-fidelity, editable per-object reconstructions. Crucially, inference is fully feed-forward and scales independently of the number of objects, offering orders-of-magnitude speedups over conventional multi-stage pipelines in cluttered scenes.

HarmoGS: Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting in the Wild via Conflict-Aware Gradient Harmonization

High 2605.13073
Yulei Kang, Tianze Zhu, Jian-Fang Hu, Jianhuang Lai, Wei-Shi Zheng
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出冲突感知梯度协调框架，通过语义一致性掩码和双视角梯度正交化提升野外 3D 高斯泼溅的鲁棒性。
🎯研究动机

野外 3D 高斯泼溅面临瞬态干扰物和光照引起的跨视角外观不一致问题，现有方法依赖图像级掩码抑制不可靠监督，但无法完全消除残留遮挡或光照不一致导致的冲突梯度，影响优化稳定性和重建质量。

❓解决问题

解决野外场景中因瞬态干扰物和跨视角外观不一致引起的梯度冲突，导致 3D 高斯优化不稳定和重建伪影的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，仅靠图像级掩码无法完全消除残留遮挡或光照不一致，这些未解决的冲突会引入矛盾的跨视角梯度，破坏高斯优化并产生可见重建伪影。

🛠️主要方法

提出冲突感知 3DGS 框架，包含语义一致性引导掩码（学习像素级一致性分数自适应细化掩码）和双视角冲突感知梯度协调（通过正交化互转视角梯度减少方向干扰），以及冲突感知的密集化和剪枝策略。

📊实验结果

在标准野外基准上实验，达到最先进渲染质量，处理复杂瞬态干扰物和跨视角不一致。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出语义一致性引导掩码，自适应抑制不可靠监督。
  • 提出双视角冲突感知梯度协调策略，通过正交化减少梯度方向干扰。
  • 引入冲突感知的密集化和剪枝，稳定高斯生长并移除冲突基元。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖语义分割或先验知识获取像素级一致性分数。
  • 双视角梯度协调策略在极端多视角场景下计算开销可能增加。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In-the-wild 3D Gaussian Splatting remains challenging due to transient distractors and illumination-induced cross-view appearance inconsistencies. Existing methods mainly rely on image-level masking to suppress unreliable supervision, but masking alone cannot fully eliminate residual occlusions or resolve illumination-induced inconsistencies, both of which can introduce conflicting cross-view gradients. These unresolved conflicts may destabilize Gaussian optimization and lead to visible reconstruction artifacts. We propose a conflict-aware 3DGS framework that addresses this problem from both image-space supervision and gradient-level optimization. Semantic Consistency-Guided Masking learns pixel-wise consistency scores to adaptively refine prior masks and suppress unreliable supervision before gradient formation. A dual-view Conflict-Aware Gradient Harmonization strategy further reconciles view-specific gradients by mutually rotating them into an orthogonal configuration, reducing negative directional interference across views. We also introduce conflict-aware densification and pruning to stabilize Gaussian growth and remove persistently conflicting primitives. Extensive experiments on standard in-the-wild benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art rendering quality under complex transient distractors and cross-view inconsistencies.

Rigel3D: Rig-aware Latents for Animation-Ready 3D Asset Generation

High 2605.13129
Nikitas Chatzis, Marios Loizou, Evangelos Kalogerakis
arXiv PDF cs.GR
TL;DR：Rigel3D 通过联合建模几何与骨架结构，生成可直接用于动画的 3D 资产。
🎯研究动机

现有 3D 生成模型输出静态资产，缺乏骨骼绑定和蒙皮权重，无法直接用于游戏、电影、仿真等需要动画的场景。

❓解决问题

如何生成带有完整骨架结构（骨骼、关节层级、蒙皮权重）且可直接用于动画的 3D 资产。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Rig-aware 自编码器联合解码表面和骨架潜表示，两阶段潜生成模型合成表面和骨架表示，并引入开放词汇关节标注模块。

📊实验结果

在大规模绑定资产数据集上，方法生成多样高质量动画就绪资产，并在多个指标上优于现有绑定基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Rigel3D，首个联合建模几何与骨架结构的动画就绪 3D 资产生成方法。
  • 设计 rig-aware 自编码器和两阶段潜生成模型，支持图像条件生成。
  • 引入开放词汇关节标注模块，实现与任意重定向模板的对应。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖大规模绑定资产数据集，数据获取困难。
  • 开放词汇关节标注的泛化能力可能有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent 3D generative models can synthesize high-quality assets, but their outputs are typically static: they lack the skeletal rigs, joint hierarchies, and skinning weights required for animation. This limits their use in games, film, simulation, virtual agents, and embodied AI, where assets must not only look plausible but also move plausibly. We introduce Rigel3D, a generative method for animation-ready 3D assets represented as rigged meshes. Unlike post-hoc auto-rigging methods that attach rigs to completed shapes, our method jointly models geometry and rig structure through coupled surface and skeleton structured latent representations. A rig-aware autoencoder decodes these representations into mesh geometry, skeleton topology, joint coordinates, and skinning weights, while a two-stage latent generative model synthesizes both surface and skeleton representations for image-conditioned generation. To support downstream animation workflows, we further introduce an open-vocabulary joint labeling module that embeds generated joints into a shared vision-language space, enabling correspondence to arbitrary retargeting templates. Experiments on large-scale rigged asset datasets demonstrate that our method generates diverse, high-quality animation-ready assets and outperforms existing rigging baselines across multiple metrics.

Z-Order Transformer for Feed-Forward Gaussian Splatting

High 2605.13465
Can Wang, Lei Liu, Wei Jiang, Dong Xu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 Z-Order Transformer，通过 Z-order 排序和稀疏注意力实现高效的前馈式 3D 高斯泼溅，减少冗余并提升渲染质量。
🎯研究动机

传统 3D 高斯泼溅依赖慢速迭代优化，无法满足实时需求；现有前馈方法存在高斯原语冗余和渲染质量不足的问题。

❓解决问题

如何在前馈式 3D 高斯泼溅中高效建模高斯原语的空间与语义关系，同时减少冗余并保持渲染质量。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出基于 Transformer 的架构，利用 Z-order 策略将无序高斯集组织为空间连贯序列，并通过稀疏注意力机制捕获高斯间关系，自适应抑制冗余并预测高斯属性。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Z-Order Transformer，首次将 Z-order 排序与稀疏注意力结合用于前馈式高斯泼溅。
  • 实现单次前向传播中高效建模上下文、压缩高斯原语并预测属性，减少冗余同时保持质量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对复杂场景或大尺度场景的泛化能力有限。
  • Z-order 排序的稀疏注意力可能丢失长距离依赖。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled significant progress in photorealistic novel view synthesis. However, traditional 3DGS relies on a slow, iterative optimization process, which limits its use in scenarios demanding real-time results. To overcome this bottleneck, recent feed-forward methods aim to predict Gaussian attributes directly from images, but they often struggle with the redundancy of Gaussian primitives and rendering quality. In this work, we introduce a transformer-based architecture specifically designed for feed-forward Gaussian Splatting. Our key insight is that spatial and semantic relationships among Gaussians can be effectively captured through a sparse attention mechanism, enabled by a Z-order strategy that organizes the unstructured Gaussian set into a spatially coherent sequence. Furthermore, we incorporate this Z-order strategy to adaptively suppress redundancy while preserving critical structural details. This allows the transformer to efficiently model context, compress Gaussian primitives, and predict Gaussian attributes in a single forward pass. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves fast and high-quality novel view synthesis with fewer Gaussian primitives.

BlitzGS: City-Scale Gaussian Splatting at Lightning Speed

High 2605.13794
Zhongtao Wang, Huishan Au, Yilong Li, Mai Su, Haojie Jin, Yisong Chen, Meng Gai, Fei Zhu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.GR
TL;DR：BlitzGS 通过分布式索引分片与多级重要性筛选，实现城市级 3DGS 的十倍加速训练。
🎯研究动机

现有大规模 3D 高斯泼溅方法在城市场景重建中计算开销巨大，训练时间过长，难以实用。

❓解决问题

如何高效减少大规模 3DGS 中的活跃高斯数量，在保持渲染质量的同时大幅加速训练。

🔎现象分析

空间分块导致跨块可见性冗余，且大量高斯对最终渲染贡献微小，存在冗余计算。

🛠️主要方法

提出三层次耦合框架：系统层按索引奇偶分片替代空间分块，单次跨 GPU 交换路由投影高斯；模型层通过重要性评分更新密度控制，生成可见性权重和视图级重要性掩码；视图层结合距离 LOD 门控和重要性裁剪掩码精简每相机活跃集。

📊实验结果

在大规模基准上，BlitzGS 匹配了近期大规模基线的渲染质量，同时实现了数量级加速，训练城市场景仅需数十分钟。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出索引奇偶分片策略，消除空间分块的可见性冗余，实现高效分布式渲染。
  • 设计多级重要性筛选机制，从模型和视图层面动态减少活跃高斯数量。
  • 在城市场景基准上实现一个数量级加速，训练时间缩短至数十分钟。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对动态场景或非城市场景的适应性未验证。
  • 分布式通信开销在极端 GPU 数量下可能成为瓶颈。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present BlitzGS, a distributed 3DGS framework that reduces active Gaussian workload for fast city-scale reconstruction. BlitzGS manages this workload at three coupled levels. At the system level, the framework shards Gaussians across GPUs by index parity rather than spatial blocks. This approach mitigates the cross-block visibility redundancy inherent in spatial partitioning. Furthermore, it distributes each rendering step through a single cross-GPU exchange that routes projected Gaussians to their tile owners. At the model level, scheduled importance-scoring passes shrink the global Gaussian population. During these passes, the framework generates a per-Gaussian visibility weight to bias density-control updates toward contributing primitives and a per-view importance mask for the view-level renderer. At the view level, BlitzGS trims each camera's active set with a distance-based LOD gate to exclude excessively fine primitives for the current frustum and the importance-based culling mask to skip Gaussians with negligible cross-view contribution. On large-scale benchmarks, BlitzGS matches the rendering quality of recent large-scale baselines while delivering an order-of-magnitude speedup, training city-scale scenes in tens of minutes. Our code is available at https: //github.com/AkierRaee/BlitzGS.

R-DMesh: Video-Guided 3D Animation via Rectified Dynamic Mesh Flow

High 2605.13838
Zijie Wu, Lixin Xu, Puhua Jiang, Sicong Liu, Chunchao Guo, Xiang Bai
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 R-DMesh 框架，通过解耦网格、运动与偏移，解决视频引导 3D 动画中的姿态错位问题。
🎯研究动机

视频引导的 3D 动画在内容创作中潜力巨大，但实际部署面临姿态错位难题：用户提供的静态网格初始姿态与参考视频起始帧不匹配，强行跟随轨迹会导致几何畸变或动画失败。

❓解决问题

解决视频引导 3D 动画中静态网格与参考视频之间的姿态错位问题，实现高保真 4D 网格生成。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，在真实场景中，用户提供的静态网格初始姿态与参考视频起始帧很少对齐，直接应用运动迁移会导致严重几何畸变或动画失败。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Rectified Dynamic Mesh (R-DMesh)框架，包含一个新型 VAE 将输入解耦为条件基础网格、相对运动轨迹和矫正跳跃偏移；通过 Triflow Attention 机制利用顶点几何特征调制三个正交流，确保物理一致性和局部刚性；采用基于 Rectified Flow 的扩散 Transformer，以预训练视频潜变量为条件，将时空先验迁移到 3D 领域。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 R-DMesh 框架，通过显式解耦和矫正偏移解决视频引导 3D 动画中的姿态错位问题。
  • 构建 Video-RDMesh 数据集，包含超过 50 万动态网格序列，专门模拟姿态错位场景。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量视频潜变量和预训练模型，泛化性有待验证。
  • 数据集规模虽大，但可能仍无法覆盖所有真实场景的错位情况。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Video-guided 3D animation holds immense potential for content creation, offering intuitive and precise control over dynamic assets. However, practical deployment faces a critical yet frequently overlooked hurdle: the pose misalignment dilemma. In real-world scenarios, the initial pose of a user-provided static mesh rarely aligns with the starting frame of a reference video. Naively forcing a mesh to follow a mismatched trajectory inevitably leads to severe geometric distortion or animation failure. To address this, we present Rectified Dynamic Mesh (R-DMesh), a unified framework designed to generate high-fidelity 4D meshes that are ``rectified'' to align with video context. Unlike standard motion transfer approaches, our method introduces a novel VAE that explicitly disentangles the input into a conditional base mesh, relative motion trajectories, and a crucial rectification jump offset. This offset is learned to automatically transform the arbitrary pose of the input mesh to match the video's initial state before animation begins.
