We process these components via a Triflow Attention mechanism, which leverages vertex-wise geometric features to modulate the three orthogonal flows, ensuring physical consistency and local rigidity during the rectification and animation process. For generation, we employ a Rectified Flow-based Diffusion Transformer conditioned on pre-trained video latents, effectively transferring rich spatio-temporal priors to the 3D domain. To support this task, we construct Video-RDMesh, a large-scale dataset of over 500k dynamic mesh sequences specifically curated to simulate pose misalignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that R-DMesh not only solves the alignment problem but also enables robust downstream applications, including pose retargeting and holistic 4D generation.

AssemblyBench: Physics-Aware Assembly of Complex Industrial Objects

Medium 2605.12845
Danrui Li, Jiahao Zhang, Bernhard Egger, Moitreya Chatterjee, Suhas Lohit, Tim K. Marks, Anoop Cherian
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出工业级装配数据集 AssemblyBench 和 Transformer 模型 AssemblyDyno，实现从多模态指令到物理可行装配轨迹的联合预测。
🎯研究动机

现有装配数据集过于简化，忽略了工业场景中的形状复杂性和装配轨迹，导致模型难以应用于实际工业装配任务。

❓解决问题

如何从多模态指令和 3D 零件模型预测物理可行的装配顺序和 6-DoF 运动轨迹。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 2,789 个工业对象、多模态指令手册和 3D 零件模型的数据集 AssemblyBench；提出 Transformer 模型 AssemblyDyno，联合利用指令手册和零件 3D 形状预测装配顺序和轨迹。

📊实验结果

在 AssemblyBench 数据集上评估，AssemblyDyno 在装配姿态估计和轨迹可行性（通过物理仿真评估）上优于先前工作。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AssemblyBench 数据集，包含 2,789 个工业对象、多模态指令和 3D 零件装配轨迹。
  • 提出 AssemblyDyno 模型，联合预测装配顺序和物理可行的装配轨迹。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集为合成数据，与真实工业场景可能存在差距。
  • 模型依赖完整的多模态指令，实际应用中指令可能不完整或噪声大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Assembling objects from parts requires understanding multimodal instructions, linking them to 3D components, and predicting physically plausible 6-DoF motions for each assembly step. Existing datasets focus on simplified scenarios, overlooking shape complexities and assembly trajectories in industrial assemblies. We introduce AssemblyBench, a synthetic dataset of 2,789 industrial objects with multimodal instruction manuals, corresponding 3D part models, and part assembly trajectories. We also propose a transformer-based model, AssemblyDyno, which uses the instructional manual and the 3D shape of each part to jointly predict assembly order and part assembly trajectories. AssemblyDyno outperforms prior works in both assembly pose estimation and trajectory feasibility, where the latter is evaluated by our physics-based simulations.

EvObj: Learning Evolving Object-centric Representations for 3D Instance Segmentation without Scene Supervision

Medium 2605.13152
Jiahao Chen, Zihui Zhang, Yafei Yang, Jinxi Li, Shenxing Wei, Zhixuan Sun, Bo Yang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 EvObj，通过动态对象辨别与补全模块实现无监督 3D 实例分割，弥合合成数据与真实点云之间的几何域差距。
🎯研究动机

现有无监督 3D 实例分割方法在将合成数据（如 ShapeNet）的对象先验迁移到真实扫描（如 ScanNet）时，因形态差异和遮挡伪影导致结构域差距，性能受限。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖场景级监督的情况下，实现从合成数据到真实点云的 3D 实例分割，并克服几何域差异。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出当前方法在迁移对象先验时存在结构差异，主要源于形态变化和遮挡伪影。

🛠️主要方法

集成两个模块：对象辨别模块动态优化对象候选，持续适应目标域；对象补全模块在发现对象后重建部分几何形状。

📊实验结果

在真实和合成数据集上进行大量实验，在 3D 对象分割上优于所有基线，达到最先进结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 EvObj 框架，实现无监督 3D 实例分割，无需场景级标注。
  • 设计对象辨别与对象补全模块，有效弥合合成与真实点云之间的几何域差距。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖合成数据的先验质量，对极端域差距的泛化能力待验证。
  • 对象补全模块在严重遮挡场景下的效果可能有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce EvObj for unsupervised 3D instance segmentation that bridges the geometric domain gap between synthetic pretraining data and real-world point clouds. Current methods suffer from structural discrepancies when transferring object priors from synthetic datasets (e.g., ShapeNet) to real scans (e.g., ScanNet), particularly due to morphological variations and occlusion artifacts. To address this, EvObj integrates two innovative modules: (1) An object discerning module that dynamically refines object candidates, enabling continuous adaptation of object priors to target domains; and (2) An object completion module that reconstructs partial geometries after discovering objects. We conduct extensive experiments on both real-world and synthetic datasets, demonstrating superior 3D object segmentation performance over all baselines while achieving state-of-the-art results.

Img2CADSeq: Image-to-CAD Generation via Sequence-Based Diffusion

Medium 2605.13293
Shiyu Tan, Zixuan Zhao, Hao Gao, Zhiheng Chen, Xiaolong Yin, Enya Shen
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出多阶段流水线，通过层次化码本和对比学习实现从单视图图像到高质量 CAD BRep 的生成。
🎯研究动机

从单视图图像重建高质量 CAD BRep 面临拓扑约束和操作序列复杂性的挑战，现有方法难以生成可直接用于商业软件的 STEP 文件。

❓解决问题

如何从单视图图像生成符合拓扑约束且可直接用于商业 CAD 软件的高质量 BRep 序列。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

多阶段流水线：将 CAD 序列编码为三级层次化码本，采用重要性优先策略压缩长序列；通过粗到细点云中间表示对齐 2D 视觉特征与 3D CAD 序列，利用对比学习条件化 VQ-Diffusion 模型。

📊实验结果

在 CAD-220K 和 PrintCAD 数据集上实验，显著优于现有方法，生成可直接用于商业 CAD 软件的 STEP 文件。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Img2CADSeq，一种从单视图图像生成高质量 CAD BRep 的多阶段流水线。
  • 引入三级层次化码本和重要性优先策略，有效压缩长 CAD 序列。
  • 构建 CAD-220K 和 PrintCAD 数据集，支持工业领域适应。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖多阶段流水线，可能增加推理复杂度。
  • 对图像质量或视角变化可能敏感。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Boundary Representation (BRep) is the standard format for Computer-Aided Design (CAD), yet reconstructing high-quality BReps from single-view images remains challenging due to the complexity of topological constraints and operation sequences. We present Img2CADSeq, a multi-stage pipeline that overcomes these limitations by encoding CAD sequences into a three-level hierarchical codebook. Guided by an importance prioritization, this strategy values profiles over details, compressing long sequences into a stable discrete latent space. To bridge the modality gap, we leverage a coarse-to-fine point cloud intermediate, aligning 2D visual features with 3D CAD sequences via contrastive learning to condition a VQ-Diffusion model. Supported by newly introduced CAD-220K and PrintCAD datasets, our approach ensures robust industrial domain adaptation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Img2CADSeq significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, producing standard STEP files that can be directly used in commercial CAD software.

其他应用 9 篇

Stable Attention Response for Reliable Precipitation Nowcasting

Medium 2605.13181
Penghui Wen, Zexin Hu, Sen Zhang, Patrick Filippi, Xiaogang Zhu, Allen Benter, Thomas Bishop, Zhiyong Wang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 HARECast 框架，通过稳定注意力响应能量提升降水临近预报的可靠性。
🎯研究动机

降水临近预报因大气动力学的局部性、快速演化和异质性而极具挑战；现有注意力方法侧重表征学习，忽视了跨样本注意力响应不稳定性导致的预测不可靠问题。

❓解决问题

解决注意力响应能量在样本间不稳定导致的预测误差问题。

🔎现象分析

不准确预报与注意力响应能量在头与层间的高方差相关；跨样本变异性通过自注意力传播并放大预测误差下界。

🛠️主要方法

提出 HARECast，通过头级注意力响应能量建模和组正则化目标来稳定跨样本波动，可应用于单模态和多模态架构。

📊实验结果

在 SEVIR 和 MeteoNet 基准上评估，HARECast 达到最先进性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次揭示注意力响应能量跨样本不稳定性是降水临近预报不可靠的重要来源，并提供理论分析。
  • 提出 HARECast 框架，通过头级能量正则化提升预报可靠性，在 SEVIR 和 MeteoNet 上达到 SOTA。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定正则化超参数。
  • 仅验证于降水临近预报，泛化性需进一步探索。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Precipitation nowcasting remains challenging due to the highly localized, rapidly evolving, and heterogeneous nature of atmospheric dynamics. Although recent methods increasingly adopt attention-based architectures in both unimodal and multimodal settings, they mainly emphasize stronger representation learning and prediction capacity, while paying less attention to the stability of attention responses across samples. In this work, we show that cross-sample instability of attention-response energy is an important and previously underexplored source of forecasting unreliability. Empirically, inaccurate forecasts are associated with larger attention-response energy variance across heads and layers. Theoretically, we show that cross-sample variability can propagate through self-attention, and enlarge a lower bound on prediction error. Based on this insight, we propose HARECast, a Head-wise Attention Response Energy-regulated framework for precipitation nowcasting. HARECast explicitly models head-wise attention-response energy and stabilizes it through a group-wise regularization objective that reduces cross-sample fluctuations. The proposed formulation is generic and applicable to both unimodal and multimodal nowcasting architectures. We instantiate HARECast in a standard forecasting pipeline with reconstruction branches and a diffusion-based predictor, and evaluate it on commonly used benchmarks--SEVIR and MeteoNet. Experimental results demonstrate that HARECast achieves state-of-the-art performance.

It's not the Language Model, it's the Tool: Deterministic Mediation for Scientific Workflows

Medium 2605.13245
Marios Adamidis, Danae Katrisioti, Yannis Tzitzikas, Emmanuel Stratakis
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出类型中介模式，让语言模型调用确定性工具而非生成分析代码，确保科学工作流中分析结果的可复现性。
🎯研究动机

语言模型在科学分析中生成结果不稳定，同一查询多次生成可能得到不同输出，研究者难以判断哪个结果可信，威胁科学可复现性。

❓解决问题

语言模型直接生成分析代码导致结果不可复现，需要一种方法保证相同输入始终产生相同输出。

🔎现象分析

商业基础模型在相同提示下多次运行，数值输出和分析方法会变化，甚至无法产生有效结果；而类型化工具在所有运行中产生相同结果。

🛠️主要方法

类型中介（typed mediation）：模型编排确定性工具而非生成分析代码，每个工具编码一位研究者的精确流程，通过结构化访谈移植，模型选择工具和参数，工具产生结果，重新生成不改变结果。

📊实验结果

在四个平台上运行相同的光致发光分析，包括三个商业基础模型，每个模型用相同提示运行四次，比较结果一致性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出类型中介模式，确保科学工作流中语言模型分析结果的可复现性
  • 在四个平台（包括三个商业基础模型）上验证，类型化工具在所有运行中产生相同结果，而商业平台结果变化或失败
  • 在两个真实仪器上部署约六个月，用户反馈非常积极，将分析时间从数周缩短到数分钟
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖将研究者流程编码为确定性工具，可能不适用于需要探索性分析的任务
  • 工具需要部署在本地基础设施上，可能增加部署复杂度
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Language models can produce convincing scientific analyses, but repeated generations on the same data do not guarantee the same result. A researcher may regenerate an identical query and receive a different fit, a different peak position or a different analysis procedure, without an obvious way to decide which output to trust. We propose typed mediation, a pattern in which the model orchestrates deterministic tools rather than generating analytical code. Each tool encodes one researcher's exact procedure for one instrument, ported through structured interviews. The model selects which tool to call and with what parameters. The tool produces the result. Regeneration does not change it. We evaluate this claim by running the same photoluminescence analysis on four platforms, including three commercial foundation models, four times each with the same prompt. The typed tool produces identical results across all runs. The commercial platforms either vary in numerical output and analytical methodology across runs, or fail to produce valid results on the task. We deploy this pattern on two instruments serving users over approximately six months, with very positive user feedback. Both cases are very challenging: they involve proprietary binary formats and per-seat licensed software, which force the tool to remain on local infrastructure alongside the data and the instrument it operates. We argue that deployment topology is not just a preference, but a structural requirement of scientific tool mediation. The result is a practical pattern for deploying language models in scientific workflows where reproducibility is mandatory, reducing analysis time from weeks to minutes while guaranteeing identical outputs across runs.

HLS-Seek: QoR-Aware Code Generation for High-Level Synthesis via Proxy Comparative Reward Reinforcement Learning

Medium 2605.13536
Qingyun Zou, Feng Yu, Hongshi Tan, Yao Chen, Bingsheng He, WengFai Wong
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 HLS-Seek，用代理比较奖励模型替代昂贵综合循环，实现 QoR 感知的 HLS 代码生成。
🎯研究动机

现有基于 LLM 的 HLS 方法只关注功能正确性，完全忽略 QoR（延迟和资源利用率），而 QoR 对硬件设计至关重要。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖昂贵综合循环的情况下，生成 QoR 感知的高质量 HLS 代码。

🔎现象分析

观察到 HLS 的强化学习不需要绝对综合结果，只需候选之间的相对比较。

🛠️主要方法

提出 HLS-Seek 框架，使用代理比较奖励模型（达到 99.53% 帕累托支配准确率）替代综合循环；引入不确定性感知 MC dropout 切换，对低置信度候选调用真实综合并在线更新代理，形成自改进奖励系统。

📊实验结果

在 HLS-eval 基准上评估，HLS-Seek 在 30 个内核中的 16 个上实现最低延迟，并在 9 个内核上帕累托支配 HLS 特定基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 QoR 感知的 NL-to-HLS 框架 HLS-Seek，通过代理比较奖励模型实现高效训练。
  • 引入不确定性感知 MC dropout 切换机制，防止奖励黑客并实现自改进。
  • 在 HLS-eval 上以 7B 参数达到 81.5% 语法正确率 pass@1 和 81.4% Func@5，超越 GPT-5.1 等前沿模型，训练速度比真实奖励 RL 快 8.5 倍。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定 HLS 工具（Vitis HLS），泛化性待验证。
  • 代理奖励模型在极端复杂场景下可能仍需频繁调用真实综合。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

High-Level Synthesis (HLS) compiles algorithmic C/C++ descriptions into hardware, with Quality of Results (QoR) -- latency and resource utilization -- critically governed by pragma configurations and code structure. Existing LLM-based HLS approaches train for functional correctness but ignore QoR entirely. We observe that reinforcement learning (RL) for HLS does not require absolute synthesis results -- only relative comparisons between candidates. Based on this insight, we propose \textbf{HLS-Seek}, a QoR-aware NL-to-HLS framework that replaces expensive synthesis-in-the-loop RL with a comparative proxy reward model achieving 99.53\% Pareto-dominance accuracy. To prevent reward hacking, we introduce \textit{uncertainty-aware Monte Carlo (MC) dropout switching} that selectively invokes real Vitis HLS synthesis for low-confidence candidates and online updates the proxy, creating a self-improving reward system. HLS-Seek achieves 81.5\% syntax correctness pass@1 and 81.4\% Func@5 on HLS-eval with only 7B parameters, surpassing GPT-5.1 and other frontier models while achieving 8.5$\times$ faster training than real-reward RL. On QoR evaluation, HLS-Seek achieves the lowest latency on 16/30 kernels and Pareto-dominates HLS-specific baselines on 9 kernels.

DeepFilters: Scattering-Aware Pupil Engineering with Learned Digital Filter Reconstruction for Extended Depth of Field Microscopy

Medium 2605.13619
Joseph L. Greene, Suet YIng Chan, Qilin Deng, Jeffrey Alido, Alexandra Lion, Guorong Hu, Ruipeng Guo, Tongyu Li et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：联合优化散射感知瞳孔滤波器与数字滤波重建网络，实现无需重训练的宽场显微镜景深扩展。
🎯研究动机

传统景深扩展显微镜在散射组织中性能退化，现有深度光学方法也受限于散射环境，需要一种能泛化到不同散射条件且无需重训练的方法。

❓解决问题

在散射生物组织中实现大景深（>400 μm）的显微成像，并保证信号恢复深度超过 120 μm。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出散射感知深度光学框架 DeepFilters，联合优化参数化瞳孔滤波器与基于数字滤波器的重建网络，通过可微前向模型、经验散射核、物理引导正则化和混合遗传 - 梯度初始化策略实现。

📊实验结果

在固定脑切片和海胆胚胎上进行验证。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出散射感知的深度光学框架，联合优化瞳孔滤波器和数字滤波重建网络。
  • 在清晰介质中将 PSF 从 16 μm 扩展到>400 μm，并在生物组织中实现>120 μm 深度的信号恢复。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极端散射条件或动态散射介质泛化能力有限。
  • 联合优化计算开销较大，实时应用可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Extended depth of field microscopy encodes axial information into a single acquisition through engineered point spread functions, but conventional and deep optics approaches are subject to degradation in scattering tissue. We introduce DeepFilters, a scattering-aware deep optics framework that jointly optimizes a parameterized pupil filter and a digital-filter-based reconstruction network through a calibrated differentiable forward model to achieve broad generalization without retraining. Incorporating empirical scattering kernels, physics-guided regularization, and a hybrid genetic-gradient initialization strategy, DeepFilters extends the PSF from 16 micron to >400 micron in clear media and enables signal recovery beyond 120 micron deep in biological tissues, validated across fixed brain slices and sea urchin embryos.

Grid-Orch: An LLM-Powered Orchestrator for Distribution Grid Simulation and Analytics

Medium 2605.12728
Boming Liu, Jin Dong, Jamie Lian
arXiv PDF eess.SY
TL;DR：Grid-Orch 利用 LLM 和 MCP 协议，让工程师通过自然语言完成配电网仿真与分析，将数小时的脚本工作缩短至两分钟内。
🎯研究动机

配电网工程领域面临到 2030 年高达 150 万工程师的短缺，亟需更易用的分析工具来降低使用门槛。

❓解决问题

如何让非编程专家也能高效、准确地完成复杂的配电网仿真与分析任务。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 桥接 LLM 与 OpenDSS 仿真引擎，提供 36 个领域专用工具，支持多步优化工作流，并实现云 / 本地模型兼容。

📊实验结果

通过工作流演示，分布式能源互连筛查等任务从数小时缩短至两分钟内，结果与直接 OpenDSS 脚本数值一致。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Grid-Orch 框架，通过自然语言接口实现配电网仿真与分析。
  • 提供 36 个领域工具和三种优化技能，支持多步工程工作流。
  • 支持气隙部署，适用于安全敏感环境。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 LLM 对电力领域术语的理解准确性。
  • 复杂优化任务可能需要更多人工验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The power distribution engineering workforce faces a projected shortage of up to 1.5 million engineers by 2030, creating urgent demand for more accessible analysis tools. This paper introduces Grid-Orch, a framework that bridges Large Language Models (LLMs) and power system simulation through the Model Context Protocol (MCP), enabling engineers to perform complex distribution analyses via natural language. Using OpenDSS as the reference implementation, Grid-Orch provides 36 domain-specific tools across eleven categories, covering power flow, voltage analysis, quasi-static time series (QSTS) simulation, and automated optimization. A provider-agnostic LLM layer supports both cloud-hosted (Gemini, Claude) and locally deployed (Ollama, llama-cpp) models, enabling air-gapped operation for security-sensitive utility environments. Three optimization skills, capacitor placement, voltage violation analysis, and overvoltage mitigation, extend the platform beyond single-tool queries to multi-step engineering workflows. Grid-Orch is delivered as an interactive web platform with chat-based interaction, a QSTS dashboard, and feeder topology visualization, and renders simulation results inline. Workflow demonstrations show that distribution analyses formerly requiring hours of scripting, such as distributed energy resource (DER) interconnection screening, complete in under two minutes through natural language, producing numerically identical results to direct OpenDSS scripting.

ChannelKAN: Multi-Scale Dual-Domain Channel Prediction via Hybrid CNN-KAN Architecture

Medium 2605.12553
Nanqing Jiang, Zhangyao Song, Tao Guo, Xiaoyu Zhao, Yinfei Xu
arXiv PDF eess.SP
TL;DR：提出混合 CNN-KAN 架构 ChannelKAN，利用 CNN 捕捉局部空间 - 频率相关性和 KAN 拟合长程非线性时序依赖，实现高移动性 MIMO-OFDM 信道预测。
🎯研究动机

高移动性场景下，现有深度学习方法难以同时捕捉 CSI 序列中的短期局部变化和长程非线性依赖，影响大规模 MIMO-OFDM 系统的可靠性和频谱效率。

❓解决问题

如何联合建模 CSI 序列中的短期局部空间 - 频率相关性和长程非线性时序依赖，以提升信道预测精度。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ChannelKAN 混合模型：双域扩展模块生成频域和时延域表示；多尺度频率信息增强模块保留多尺度主频谱分量；CNN-KAN 特征提取模块通过级联卷积捕捉局部相关性，通过 Chebyshev KAN 层建模长程依赖；双域融合模块自适应整合特征。

📊实验结果

在 3GPP 兼容的 QuaDRiGa 数据集上，对比 RNN、LSTM、GRU、CNN 和 Transformer 基线，评估 NMSE、SE 和 BER，并进行了消融实验。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将 KAN 与 CNN 结合用于信道预测，利用 CNN 和 KAN 的互补优势。
  • 设计双域扩展和多尺度频率增强模块，有效利用频域和时延域信息。
  • 在 3GPP 标准数据集上，NMSE、SE 和 BER 指标全面超越 RNN、LSTM、GRU、CNN 和 Transformer 基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对高维 CSI 序列的计算开销较大。
  • 未在真实硬件或实际信道环境中验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurate channel state information (CSI) prediction is essential for improving the reliability and spectral efficiency of massive MIMO-OFDM systems in high-mobility scenarios. Existing deep learning methods struggle to jointly capture short-term local variations and long-range nonlinear dependencies in CSI sequences. To address this challenge, we propose ChannelKAN, a hybrid CNN-KAN channel prediction model with multi-scale frequency domain information enhancement. The key insight is that CNNs and Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) are naturally complementary: CNNs extract intra-time-step local spatial-frequency correlations, while KANs with learnable Chebyshev polynomial activations fit inter-time-step nonlinear temporal evolution in a holistic manner. Specifically, a dual-domain expansion module first generates complementary frequency-domain and delay-domain CSI representations. A multi-scale frequency information enhancement module then retains dominant spectral components at multiple scales to strengthen key features and suppress noise. Next, a CNN-KAN feature extraction module captures local correlations via cascaded convolutions and models long-range dependencies via Chebyshev KAN layers. Finally, a dual-domain fusion module adaptively integrates features from both branches to produce the prediction. Experiments on 3GPP-compliant QuaDRiGa datasets demonstrate that ChannelKAN outperforms RNN, LSTM, GRU, CNN, and Transformer baselines in normalized mean square error (NMSE), spectral efficiency (SE), and bit error rate (BER) across various velocities and signal-to-noise ratios. Ablation studies further confirm the effectiveness of each proposed module.

SSDA: Bridging Spectral and Structural Gaps via Dual Adaptation for Vision-Based Time Series Forecasting

Medium 2605.12550
Mingrui Zhang, Hanchen Yang, Wengen Li, Xudong Jiang, Yichao Zhang, Jihong Guan, Shuigeng Zhou
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 SSDA 双分支网络，通过频谱幅度对齐和结构引导低秩适配弥合大视觉模型用于时间序列预测时的频谱与结构鸿沟。
🎯研究动机

大视觉模型（LVM）在时间序列预测中表现有效，但前提假设——渲染的时间序列图像与自然图像足够接近——未经验证，实际存在频谱和结构鸿沟限制其潜力。

❓解决问题

LVM 预训练于自然图像，而渲染的时间序列图像存在频谱浅（功率谱更浅）和结构错位（1D 序列转 2D 网格引入虚假空间邻接、切断真实时间连续性）两大鸿沟，导致知识迁移受限。

🔎现象分析

摘要揭示：渲染的时间序列图像功率谱显著浅于自然图像；将 1D 序列重塑为 2D 网格会制造虚假空间邻接并破坏真实时间连续性，误导 LVM 的空间归纳偏置。

🛠️主要方法

双分支网络 SSDA：数据级分支用频谱幅度对齐器（SMA）通过 2D FFT 选择性增强幅度谱以匹配自然图像统计；模型级分支用结构引导低秩适配（SG-LoRA）将位置感知时间编码注入 patch 嵌入并通过低秩更新适配注意力；两分支自适应融合输出预测。

📊实验结果

在 7 个真实世界基准上进行了全样本和少样本实验，SSDA 一致优于基于 LVM 和 LLM 的强基线。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统揭示并量化了 LVM 用于时间序列预测时的频谱鸿沟（功率谱浅）和结构鸿沟（空间邻接虚假、时间连续性断裂）。
  • 提出 SSDA 双分支适配框架，分别从数据级（SMA）和模型级（SG-LoRA）弥合两种鸿沟，并自适应融合。
  • 在 7 个真实世界基准上，全样本和少样本设置下均优于强 LVM 和 LLM 基线，且开源代码。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 2D FFT 和低秩适配的计算开销，未讨论效率。
  • 仅验证了视觉模型，未探索其他预训练模态（如 LLM）的类似适配。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large vision models (LVMs) have recently proven to be surprisingly effective time series forecasters, simply by rendering temporal data as images. This success, how ever, rests on a largely unexamined premise: the rendered time series images are sufficiently close to natural images for knowledge in pre-trained models to transfer effectively. We argue that two gaps still remain, i.e., spectral and structural gaps, fundamentally limiting the potential of LVMs for time series forecasting. Spectrally, we systematically reveal that rendered time series images exhibit a markedly shallower power spectrum than the natural images LVMs are pre-trained to recognize. Structurally, reshaping 1D temporal sequences into 2D grids fabricates spurious spatial adjacencies while severing genuine temporal continuities, misleading the spatial inductive biases of pre-trained LVMs. To bridge these gaps, we propose SSDA, a dual-branch network that spectrally and structurally adapts to unlock the full potential of LVMs for time series forecasting. At the data level, a Spectral Magnitude Aligner (SMA) applies 2D FFT to selectively enhance the magnitude spectrum toward natural-image statistics while preserving phase. At the model level, a Structural-Guided Low-Rank Adaptation (SG-LoRA) injects position-aware temporal encodings into patch embeddings and adapts at tention via low-rank updates. The two branches are further adaptively fused to produce the final forecast. Extensive experiments on seven real-world benchmarks demonstrate that SSDA consistently outperforms strong LVM- and LLM-based baselines under both full-shot and few-shot settings. Code is publicly available at this https URL .

PG-LRF: Physiology-Guided Latent Rectified Flow for Electro-Hemodynamic PPG-to-ECG Generation

Medium 2605.12541
Xiaoda Wang, Minxiao Wang, Kaiqiao Han, Defu Cao, Ching Chang, Yidan Shi, Runze Yan, Xiao Luo et al.
arXiv PDF eess.SP
TL;DR：提出生理引导的潜修正流框架 PG-LRF，通过电 - 血流动力学模拟器约束 PPG 到 ECG 的生成，提升信号保真度和生理合理性。
🎯研究动机

ECG 是心脏评估的临床标准，但需要专用硬件，难以用于日常监测；PPG 在可穿戴设备中普遍存在，但缺乏 ECG 的诊断形态且易受噪声干扰。现有 PPG-to-ECG 生成方法依赖统计对齐和数据驱动，未能显式利用生理知识约束潜空间，导致生成结果生理合理性不足。

❓解决问题

如何利用生理引导的潜空间结构约束，从 PPG 信号生成既信号保真又符合电 - 血流动力学一致性的 ECG 信号。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PG-LRF 框架，包含三个关键组件：1) 电 - 血流动力学模拟器，通过共享心动周期动力学联合建模 ECG 和 PPG；2) 生理感知自编码器，在模拟器引导下学习结构化的电 - 血流动力学潜空间；3) 将模拟器引导集成到 PPG 条件潜修正流中，在生成过程中强制 ECG 侧形态一致性和 ECG-to-PPG 前向血流动力学一致性。

📊实验结果

在大型 MC-MED 数据集上，PG-LRF 显著提升了 PPG-to-ECG 生成质量和下游心血管疾病分类性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出生理引导的潜修正流框架 PG-LRF，首次将电 - 血流动力学模拟器显式引入 PPG-to-ECG 生成任务。
  • 通过生理感知自编码器和模拟器引导的潜修正流，同时保证生成 ECG 的信号保真度和生理合理性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 MC-MED 单一数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 模拟器可能无法覆盖所有病理生理变异，极端病例生成效果未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Electrocardiography (ECG) is the clinical standard for cardiac assessment but requires dedicated hardware that does not scale to daily-life monitoring. Photoplethysmography (PPG) is ubiquitous in wearables but lacks ECG-specific diagnostic morphology and is corrupted by motion and sensor noise. PPG-to-ECG generation aims to bridge this gap by recovering electrical morphology and timing from peripheral pulse signals. However, existing methods largely rely on statistical alignment and data-driven generation. They fail to explicitly structure the latent space around physiology-aware electro-hemodynamic factors and lack constraints from forward physiological dynamics. To address these challenges, we propose PG-LRF, a physiology-guided latent rectified flow framework. PG-LRF introduces an electro-hemodynamic simulator that co-models ECG and PPG through shared cardiac phase dynamics. Guided by this simulator, a Physiology-Aware AutoEncoder learns a structured electro-hemodynamic latent space. Then we integrate this simulator guidance into a PPG-conditioned latent rectified flow, enforcing ECG-side morphology consistency and ECG-to-PPG forward hemodynamic consistency during generative transport. Experiments on the large-scale MC-MED dataset demonstrate that PG-LRF significantly improves PPG-to-ECG generation and downstream cardiovascular disease classification, proving its ability to generate ECGs that are both signal-faithful and physiologically plausible under the ECG-to-PPG hemodynamic pathway

MorphOPC: Advancing Mask Optimization with Multi-scale Hierarchical Morphological Learning

Medium 2605.12528
Yuting Hu, Lei Zhuang, Chen Wang, Ruiyang Qin, Hua Xiang, Gi-joon Nam, Jinjun Xiong
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 MorphOPC，用多尺度层次形态学习提升光刻掩模优化质量。
🎯研究动机

随着特征尺寸缩小到纳米级，光刻掩模优化（OPC）对保证电路图案保真度至关重要，现有基于编码器 - 解码器的生成模型难以捕捉目标布局到掩模图案的几何变换，导致优化质量次优。

❓解决问题

解决现有机器学习掩模优化模型无法有效学习几何变换的问题，提升掩模图案的打印保真度和制造经济性。

🔎现象分析

现有模型在捕捉几何变换时存在失败模式，导致掩模质量次优。

🛠️主要方法

将掩模生成建模为局部布局特征的形态学操作序列，提出 MorphOPC，一种多尺度层次模型，集成神经形态模块来学习这些变换。

📊实验结果

在金属层和通孔层的边缘 OPC 和 ILT 基准上评估，MorphOPC 在打印保真度和制造成本上均优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将掩模生成形式化为局部特征的形态学操作序列。
  • 提出多尺度层次形态学习模型 MorphOPC，在边缘 OPC 和 ILT 基准上超越现有方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定工艺层（金属 / 通孔），泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 形态学操作序列的设计可能引入额外计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As feature sizes shrink to the nanometer scale, accurately transferring circuit patterns from photomasks to silicon wafers becomes increasingly challenging. Optical proximity correction (OPC) is widely used to ensure pattern fidelity and manufacturability. Recent generative mask optimization models based on encoder-decoder architecture can synthesize near-optimal masks, serving as fast machine learning (ML) surrogates for traditional OPC. However, these models often fail to capture the geometric transformations from target layouts to mask patterns, leading to suboptimal quality. In this work, we formulate mask generation as a sequence of morphological operations on local layout features and propose \textit{MorphOPC}, a multi-scale hierarchical model with neural morphological modules to learn these transformations. Experiments on edge-based OPC and ILT benchmarks across metal and via layers show that \textit{MorphOPC} consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving higher printing fidelity and lower manufacturing cost, demonstrating strong potential for scalable mask optimization.

语音与音频 5 篇

Compact Latent Manifold Translation: A Parameter-Efficient Foundation Model for Cross-Modal and Cross-Frequency Physiological Signal Synthesis

High 2605.13248
Bo Cui, Xiaowen Song, Yaowen Zhang, Shunzhe Zhang, B.J.F. van Beijnum, Monique Tabak, Ying Wang
arXiv PDF eess.SP
TL;DR：提出紧凑隐空间流形翻译（CLMT），一种参数高效（0.09B）的跨模态与跨频率生理信号合成基础模型。
🎯研究动机

生理时间序列分析受限于异构记录设备导致的模态和频率差异，现有基础模型存在模态纠缠、跨频率生成保真度低、计算成本高难以部署于边缘设备等问题。

❓解决问题

如何实现高效、高保真的跨模态（如 PPG 到 ECG）和跨频率（如 25Hz 到 100Hz）生理信号合成，同时保持参数效率以支持边缘部署。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出现有连续隐空间模型存在严重的模态纠缠，缺乏高保真跨频率生成能力，且计算成本高。

🛠️主要方法

提出两阶段离散翻译范式：1）通用分词器利用分层残差向量量化（RVQ）将异构信号解耦为离散隐流形；2）上下文提示隐翻译器通过整合静态生理先验将离散标记跨模态映射，将信号合成转化为纯隐序列翻译任务。

📊实验结果

在跨模态 PPG-to-ECG 合成和跨频率超分辨率任务上评估，与多个基线对比，结果显示显著提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CLMT，一个 0.09B 参数的统一框架，实现跨模态和跨频率生理信号合成。
  • 引入通用分词器和上下文提示隐翻译器，有效解耦模态并利用生理先验。
  • 在 PPG 到 ECG 合成中，R 峰检测 F1 从 0.37 提升至 0.83；在 25Hz 到 100Hz 超分辨率中，Pearson 相关系数达 0.9956。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定生理信号（ECG/PPG），泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 离散翻译范式可能丢失连续信号中的细微信息。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The analysis of physiological time series, such as electrocardiograms (ECG) and photoplethysmograms (PPG), is persistently hindered by modality and frequency gaps stemming from heterogeneous recording devices. Existing foundation models typically rely on continuous latent spaces, which frequently suffer from severe modality entanglement, lack high-fidelity cross-frequency generative capacity, and impose high computational costs that prohibit edge-device deployment. In this paper, we propose Compact Latent Manifold Translation (CLMT), a highly parameter-efficient (0.09B) unified framework that bridges these gaps through a novel two-stage discrete translation paradigm. First, we introduce a Universal Tokenizer utilizing Hierarchical Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ) to decouple heterogeneous signals into isolated, well-structured discrete latent manifolds, effectively preventing inter-modality interference. Second, a Context-Prompted Latent Translator maps these discrete tokens across modalities by integrating static physiological priors, reframing complex signal synthesis as a pure latent sequence translation task. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our 0.09B model significantly outperforms massive baselines. In cross-modal PPG-to-ECG synthesis, it resolves temporal phase drift and dramatically improves the clinical R-peak detection F1-score from 0.37 (baseline) to 0.83. Furthermore, in extreme cross-frequency super-resolution (25Hz to 100Hz), it successfully recovers high-frequency diagnostic landmarks, achieving an unprecedented Pearson correlation of 0.9956. By learning a universal discrete language for biological signals with a fraction of the computational footprint, our approach sets a new trajectory for edge-deployable, multi-modal medical foundation models.

Scaling few-shot spoken word classification with generative meta-continual learning

Medium 2605.13075
Louise Beyers, Batsirayi Mupamhi Ziki, Ruan van der Merwe
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出生成式元持续学习算法 GeMCL，实现 1000 类 5-shot 口语单词分类，性能与微调 HuBERT 相当但速度快 2000 倍。
🎯研究动机

现有少样本口语单词分类主要针对少量类别，大规模少样本分类的潜力尚未被探索，需要一种能高效扩展的方法。

❓解决问题

如何让口语单词分类器在仅每类 5 个样本的情况下，顺序学习区分 1000 个类别。

🔎现象分析

GeMCL 产生异常稳定的性能，虽然不总是优于全微调或冻结 HuBERT，但与冻结 HuBERT 加重复训练分类器头的性能相当，且适应速度快 2000 倍，训练数据少一半以上，训练时间少两个数量级。

🛠️主要方法

生成式元持续学习（GeMCL）算法，结合生成模型和元学习进行持续学习。

📊实验结果

在 1000 类 5-shot 口语单词分类任务上，与重复训练或微调的基线（包括 HuBERT 模型）进行比较，GeMCL 在性能相当的情况下，适应速度快 2000 倍，训练数据少一半以上，训练时间少两个数量级。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次探索大规模少样本口语单词分类（1000 类，5-shot）的可行性。
  • 提出 GeMCL 算法，实现高效稳定的持续学习，显著降低训练时间和数据需求。
⚠️方法局限
  • GeMCL 并非在所有情况下都优于全微调 HuBERT。
  • 实验仅针对口语单词分类，泛化性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Few-shot spoken word classification has largely been developed for applications where a small number of classes is considered, and so the potential of larger-scale few-shot spoken word classification remains untapped. This paper investigates the potential of a spoken word classifier to sequentially learn to distinguish between 1000 classes when it is given only five shots per class. We demonstrate that this scaling capability exists by training a model using the Generative Meta-Continual Learning (GeMCL) algorithm and comparing it to repeatedly trained or finetuned baselines. We find that GeMCL produces exceptionally stable performance, and although it does not always outperform a repeatedly fully-finetuned HuBERT model nor a frozen HuBERT model with a repeatedly trained classifier head, it produces comparable performance to the latter while adapting 2000 times faster, having been trained less than half of the data for two orders of magnitude less time.

ECG-NAT: A Self-supervised Neighborhood Attention Transformer for Multi-lead Electrocardiogram Classification

Medium 2605.13194
Mahsa Gazeran, Sayvan Soleymanbaigi, Fatemeh Daneshfar, Amjad Seyedi, Fardin Akhlaghian Tab
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 ECG-NAT，一种自监督邻域注意力 Transformer，通过分层注意力机制高效捕获多导联心电图的多尺度时序特征，在仅 1% 标注数据下达到 88.1% 准确率。
🎯研究动机

心电图心律失常分类面临信号变异、噪声、标注数据有限以及模型精度与效率难以兼顾的挑战；现有自监督方法多关注全局或局部特征，缺乏高效的多尺度分层特征提取。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种自监督方法，在低标注资源下同时高效捕获心电图的局部形态和全局节律特征，实现高精度分类。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

两阶段自监督方法：1）生成式预训练：使用掩码自编码器在多个数据集上重建部分掩码的心电信号，学习鲁棒的域不变表示；2）判别式微调：结合监督对比损失和交叉熵损失的双损失函数，对齐表示学习与标签预测。采用分层邻域注意力机制，以低计算成本捕获从局部搏动形态到全局节律模式的多尺度时序特征。

📊实验结果

在基准数据集上评估，使用 1% 标注数据达到 88.1% 准确率，摘要未提供更多实验细节。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ECG-NAT，一种结合分层邻域注意力与自监督预训练的心电图分类框架。
  • 在仅 1% 标注数据下达到 88.1% 准确率，验证了低资源场景下的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在特定数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
  • 未与其他自监督方法进行详细计算效率对比。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Electrocardiogram (ECG) arrhythmia classification remains challenging due to signal variability, noise, limited labeled data, and the difficulty in achieving both accuracy and efficiency in models. While self-supervised learning reduces label dependency, most methods target either global contextual features or local morphological patterns, but rarely implement hierarchical multi-scale feature extraction. ECG signals require architectures that simultaneously capture fine-grained beat-level morphology and broader rhythm-level dependencies with computational efficiency. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes the Electrocardiogram Neighborhood Attention Transformer (ECG-NAT), a novel self-supervised learning approach tailored for multi-lead ECG classification. Our two-stage approach begins with generative pretraining, using a masked autoencoder to reconstruct partially masked ECG signals across multiple diverse datasets, enabling the model to learn robust, domain-invariant representations from unlabeled data. This is followed by discriminative fine-tuning with a dual-loss function that combines supervised contrastive and cross-entropy losses, aligning representation learning with label prediction. The hierarchical attention mechanism efficiently captures multi-scale temporal features from localized beat morphology to broader rhythm patterns at low computational cost. ECG-NAT achieves robust performance on benchmark datasets, with 88.1\% accuracy using only 1\% labeled data, demonstrating strong efficacy in low-resource settings. The framework combines superior classification performance with computational efficiency, making it practical for real-time ECG diagnosis. The code will be made available upon acceptance at: this https URL .

Dynamical Predictive Modelling of Cardiovascular Disease Progression Post-Myocardial Infarction via ECG-Trained Artificial Intelligence Model

Medium 2605.13568
Riccardo Cavarra, Lupo Lovatelli, Shaheim Ogbomo-Harmitt, Shahid Aziz, Adelaide De Vecchi, Andrew King, Oleg Aslanidi
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一种结合对比学习和多任务监督的 ECG 预训练模型，在少量数据下提升心梗后心血管疾病进展预测性能。
🎯研究动机

心肌梗死致死率高，急需预测不良预后；但基于 ECG 的深度学习模型因医学标注数据稀缺而性能不足，自监督预训练策略尚未充分探索。

❓解决问题

如何在标注数据有限的条件下，利用未标注 ECG 数据提升心梗后心血管疾病进展预测的准确性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

采用对比学习结合监督多任务头进行预训练，融入患者特定时间信息，然后在心梗后结局预测任务上微调。

📊实验结果

在 ECG 数据集上评估，预训练模型 AUC 为 0.794，从头训练模型为 0.608。摘要未提供更多实验细节。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种结合对比学习和多任务监督的 ECG 预训练框架，利用未标注数据学习临床相关表征。
  • 在少量标注数据下，预训练模型相比从头训练模型显著提升 AUC（0.794 vs 0.608）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在特定心梗后数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
  • 未与更多基线方法比较。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Myocardial infarction (MI) is a leading cause of death, and its adverse outcomes are urgent to predict. Yet ECG-based prognostic models underperform because deep learning requires large, labelled datasets, which are scarce in medicine. Foundation models can learn from unlabelled ECGs via selfsupervision, but medically relevant training strategies remain underexplored. We propose a pretrained artificial intelligence model that combines patient-specific temporal information using contrastive learning with supervised multitask heads, then fine-tunes on post-MI outcome prediction. The proposed model outperformed a model trained from scratch (0.794 vs 0.608 AUC) showing that clinically structured ECG modelling improves classification in limited data regimes.

NAACA: Training-Free NeuroAuditory Attentive Cognitive Architecture with Oscillatory Working Memory for Salience-Driven Attention Gating

Medium 2605.13651
Zhongju Yuan, Geraint Wiggins, Dick Botteldooren
arXiv PDF cs.SD
TL;DR：提出一种免训练的神经听觉认知架构 NAACA，通过振荡工作记忆过滤听觉显著性，提升音频语言模型在长录音中的事件检测精度。
🎯研究动机

当前音频语言模型在处理长录音时存在注意力瓶颈，背景噪声会稀释罕见但重要的事件信号，导致检测性能下降。

❓解决问题

如何在不进行额外训练的情况下，让音频语言模型在长录音中有效过滤背景噪声，聚焦于显著性听觉事件。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出长录音中主导背景模式会稀释罕见、显著事件，导致注意力瓶颈；OWM 通过能量波动感知显著性，对短暂停顿和环境噪声具有鲁棒性。

🛠️主要方法

提出 NAACA 架构，核心是振荡工作记忆（OWM），它维持稳定的吸引子状态，仅在自适应能量波动指示感知显著性时触发高层 ALM 处理。

📊实验结果

在 XD-Violence 数据集上评估平均精度（AP），并在 Urban Soundscapes of the World (USoW)数据集上进行定性案例研究。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种免训练的神经听觉认知架构 NAACA，将注意力分配重构为听觉显著性过滤问题。
  • 设计振荡工作记忆（OWM），灵感来自神经科学，能有效过滤背景噪声并触发高层推理。
  • 在 XD-Violence 数据集上将 AudioQwen 的平均精度从 53.50% 提升至 70.60%，同时减少不必要的 ALM 调用。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类型的音频场景（如暴力事件检测和城市声景），泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 定性案例研究缺乏定量指标，难以全面评估 OWM 在不同噪声条件下的鲁棒性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Audio provides critical situational cues, yet current Audio Language Models (ALMs) face an attention bottleneck in long-form recordings where dominant background patterns can dilute rare, salient events. We introduce NAACA, a training-free NeuroAuditory Attentive Cognitive Architecture that reframes attention allocation as an auditory salience filtering problem. At its core is OWM, a neuro-inspired Oscillatory Working Memory that maintains stable attractor-like states and triggers higher-cognition ALM processing only when adaptive energy fluctuations signal perceptual salience, triggering higher-level reasoning. On XD-Violence, NAACA improves AudioQwen's average precision (AP) from 53.50% to 70.60% while reducing unnecessary ALM invocations. Furthermore, qualitative case studies on the Urban Soundscapes of the World (USoW) dataset show that OWM captures novel events and subcategory shifts while remaining robust to transient pauses and ambient urban noise.

视频理解 4 篇

CRePE: Curved Ray Expectation Positional Encoding for Unified-Camera-Controlled Video Generation

High 2605.12938
Seonghyun Jin, Youngmin Kim, Sunwoo Park, Jong Chul Ye
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 CRePE 位置编码，支持统一相机模型下的可控视频生成，兼容广角 / 鱼眼镜头。
🎯研究动机

现有相机条件视频生成的位置编码仅支持针孔相机模型，无法处理广角 / 鱼眼等非针孔相机，限制了通用相机控制的应用。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种兼容统一相机模型（包括广角 / 鱼眼镜头）的位置编码，实现稳定且几何感知的相机控制视频生成。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Curved Ray Expectation Positional Encoding (CRePE)，将每个图像 token 表示为沿其源射线的深度感知位置分布，通过几何注意力适配器注入冻结的视频 DiT，并用单目几何基础模型的伪监督稳定训练。

📊实验结果

在多个相机模型上进行了位置编码消融实验，CRePE 相比 RayRoPE-style 端点 PE 基线获得更好的平均排名，并在几何感知和感知质量指标上有所提升，视频质量指标上保持竞争力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CRePE，一种兼容统一相机模型的位置编码，支持广角 / 鱼眼镜头下的相机控制视频生成。
  • 通过几何注意力适配器和伪监督实现稳定训练，在几何感知和感知质量指标上取得改进。
  • 扩展至外部几何控制（Radial MixForcing），支持场景几何条件生成和源视频运动迁移。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖单目几何基础模型的伪监督质量。
  • 未提及对极端畸变或复杂场景的鲁棒性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Camera-conditioned video generation requires positional encoding that remains reliable under changes in camera motion, lens configuration, and scene structure. However, existing attention-level camera encodings either provide ray-only camera signals or rely on pinhole camera geometry, limiting their applicability to general camera control under the Unified Camera Model, including wide-angle and fisheye lenses. To address this limitation, we propose Curved Ray Expectation Positional Encoding (CRePE). CRePE represents each image token as a depth-aware positional distribution along its source ray, providing a Unified Camera Model-compatible positional encoding that captures the projected-path geometry induced by wide-angle and fisheye cameras. CRePE is implemented through a Geometric Attention Adapter added to frozen video DiTs, injecting token-wise scene-distance information into selected attention layers and stabilizing it with pseudo supervision from a monocular geometry foundation model. This design leads to more stable camera control and improves several geometry-aware and perceptual-quality metrics, while remaining competitive on video-quality metrics. Controlled positional-encoding ablations show a better overall average rank than a RayRoPE-style endpoint PE baseline, demonstrating the effectiveness of UCM-aware projected-path integration across diverse camera models. Furthermore, by extending the same positional-encoding pathway to external geometry control through Radial MixForcing, CRePE supports external radial-map control for scene-geometry-conditioned generation and source-video motion transfer beyond camera control.

AdaFocus: Adaptive Relevance-Diversity Sampling with Zero-Cache Look-back for Efficient Long Video Understanding

High 2605.12954
Xiao Yang, Yingzhe Ma, Haoxuan Yu, Zixin Li, Ning Qin
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出渐进式证据获取框架 AdaFocus，通过自适应采样和零缓存回溯实现长视频高效理解。
🎯研究动机

现有长视频理解方法受限于一次性编码范式：密集编码导致高昂内存和延迟，而稀疏压缩则不可逆地丢失细粒度证据，难以同时兼顾时间覆盖、视觉细节和计算效率。

❓解决问题

如何在不牺牲细粒度证据的前提下，实现长视频的高效理解，平衡准确性、时间覆盖和计算开销。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AdaFocus 框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 查询感知自适应相关 - 多样性采样器（AdaRD），根据查询生成紧凑但信息丰富的视频预览；2) 不确定性触发的精炼机制，仅在模型不自信时通过零缓存 I/O 从磁盘回溯高分辨率证据。

📊实验结果

在七个标准长视频基准上，AdaFocus 相比密集编码在 VideoMME 上准确率提升 2.59，在 Charades-STA 上 mIoU 提升 8.39，同时减少约 33 倍视觉 token 消耗，并消除内存帧预缓存需求。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出渐进式证据获取范式，将长视频理解从一次性编码转变为按需证据积累。
  • 设计自适应采样和零缓存回溯机制，显著提升效率 - 准确性权衡。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖查询质量，对模糊查询的鲁棒性需进一步验证。
  • 零缓存回溯在极端长视频或高并发场景下的 I/O 开销可能成为瓶颈。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Long video understanding is heavily bottlenecked by a rigid one-shot paradigm: existing methods either densely encode videos at prohibitive memory and latency costs, or aggressively compress them into sparse frame sets that irreversibly discard fine-grained evidence needed for downstream reasoning. Consequently, current models struggle to simultaneously balance temporal coverage, visual details, and computational efficiency. We propose AdaFocus, an efficient framework that rethinks long-video understanding as progressive evidence acquisition rather than one-pass encoding. AdaFocus relies on two tightly coupled components. First, a Query-Aware Adaptive Relevance-Diversity sampler (AdaRD) produces a compact yet informative video preview, adaptively switching to global clustering when the query lacks reliable local grounding. Second, instead of caching exhaustive frame sequences in memory, AdaFocus introduces an uncertainty-triggered refinement mechanism. It performs targeted look-back only when the model is not confident, retrieving high-resolution evidence directly from disk via a zero-cache I/O design. This turns discarded visual details from an irreversible loss into on-demand recoverable evidence without paying the cost of exhaustive preloading. Experiments on seven standard long-video benchmarks show that AdaFocus delivers a substantially better efficiency-accuracy trade-off than strong baselines. Compared with conventional dense encoding, AdaFocus achieves improved task performance (e.g., +2.59 accuracy on VideoMME, +8.39 mIoU on Charades-STA over single-pass inference) while reducing visual token consumption by ~33x and eliminating the need for in-memory frame pre-caching through its zero-cache disk retrieval design. These findings suggest that progressive preview combined with zero-cache evidence refinement is a highly effective paradigm for scalable multimedia reasoning.

DiffST: Spatiotemporal-Aware Diffusion for Real-World Space-Time Video Super-Resolution

High 2605.13182
Zheng Chen, Ruofan Yang, Jin Han, Dehua Song, Zichen Zou, Chunming He, Yong Guo, Yulun Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：DiffST 提出高效的时空感知扩散框架，实现真实世界空间 - 时间视频超分辨率，速度提升约 17 倍。
🎯研究动机

现有扩散模型在视频超分辨率和帧插值中表现优异，但在耦合的空间 - 时间视频超分辨率（STVSR）任务中应用有限，存在推理效率低和时空信息利用不足的问题，阻碍了实际部署。

❓解决问题

解决扩散模型在 STVSR 中推理效率低和时空信息利用不充分的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于预训练扩散模型，采用一步采样并直接处理整个视频；引入跨帧上下文聚合（CFCA）模块聚合多关键帧信息生成中间帧，以及视频表示引导（VRG）模块提取视频级全局特征引导扩散过程。

📊实验结果

在真实世界 STVSR 任务上进行实验，DiffST 获得领先结果，推理速度比先前扩散方法快约 17 倍。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出高效的时空感知视频扩散框架 DiffST，实现一步采样和全视频处理，大幅提升推理效率。
  • 设计 CFCA 和 VRG 模块增强时空信息利用，在真实世界 STVSR 任务上取得领先结果。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预训练扩散模型的质量和领域适配性。
  • 一步采样可能牺牲部分生成质量。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion-based models have shown strong performance in video super-resolution (VSR) and video frame interpolation (VFI). However, their role in the coupled space-time video super-resolution (STVSR) setting remains limited. Existing diffusion-based STVSR approaches suffer from two issues: (1) low inference efficiency and (2) insufficient utilization of spatiotemporal information. These limitations impede deployment. To address these issues, we introduce DiffST, an efficient spatiotemporal-aware video diffusion framework for real-world STVSR. To improve efficiency, we adapt a pre-trained diffusion model for one-step sampling and process the entire video directly rather than operating on individual frames. Furthermore, to enhance spatiotemporal information utilization, we introduce cross-frame context aggregation (CFCA) and video representation guidance (VRG). The CFCA module aggregates information across multiple keyframes to produce intermediate frames. The VRG module extracts video-level global features to guide the diffusion process. Extensive experiments show that DiffST obtains leading results on real-world STVSR tasks. It also maintains high inference efficiency, running about 17$\times$ faster than previous diffusion-based STVSR methods. Code is available at: this https URL .

Weakly-Supervised Spatiotemporal Anomaly Detection

Medium 2605.13746
Urvi Gianchandani, Praveen Tirupattur, Mubarak Shah
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出弱监督时空异常检测方法，仅用视频级标签训练，通过多实例排序损失实现时空定位。
🎯研究动机

视频异常检测中，逐帧或逐区域标注耗时费力，需要利用弱监督信号降低标注成本。

❓解决问题

仅利用视频级正常 / 异常标签，实现时空维度的异常区域定位。

🔎现象分析

异常通常只出现在帧的部分区域而非整帧，因此需要同时检测时间和空间上的异常。

🛠️主要方法

将异常视频片段视为正包、正常片段视为负包，使用多实例排序损失训练分类器，为时空区域分配异常分数。

📊实验结果

在 UCF Crime2Local 数据集上评估，该数据集包含部分 UCF Crime 数据的时空标注。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出弱监督时空异常检测框架，仅需视频级标签。
  • 将多实例学习应用于时空异常定位。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
  • 弱监督方法可能无法精确捕捉细粒度异常边界。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In this paper, we explore a weakly supervised method for anomaly detection. Since annotating videos is time-consuming, we only look at weak video-level labels during training. This means that given a video, we know that it is either normal or contains an anomaly, but no further annotations are used to train the network. Features are extracted from video clips that are either normal or anomalous. These features are used to determine anomaly scores for spatiotemporal regions of the clips based on a classifier and the implementation of a multiple instance ranking loss (MIL). We represent both anomalous and normal video clips as positive and negative bags, respectively, to apply MIL. Furthermore, since anomalies are usually localized to a part of a frame rather than the whole frame, we chose to explore temporal as well as spatial anomaly detection. We show our results on the UCF Crime2Local Dataset, which contains spatiotemporal annotations for a portion of the UCF Crime Dataset.

遥感与科学图像 2 篇

HIR-ALIGN: Enhancing Hyperspectral Image Restoration via Diffusion-Based Data Generation

Medium 2605.13581
Li Pang, Heng Zhao, Yijia Zhang, Deyu Meng, Xiangyong Cao
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 HIR-ALIGN 框架，通过扩散模型生成目标域对齐数据，增强高光谱图像恢复性能。
🎯研究动机

高光谱图像恢复中，现有模型在源域训练后难以泛化到缺乏干净参考的目标域，限制了实际应用。

❓解决问题

解决高光谱图像恢复中目标域无干净参考时的域适应问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

三阶段框架：代理生成（用现成恢复模型生成代理 HSI）、分布自适应合成（用模糊鲁棒 unCLIP 扩散模型生成目标对齐 RGB，再通过基于扭曲的光谱迁移模块合成 HSI）、对齐监督微调（用代理和合成 HSI 微调恢复网络）。

📊实验结果

在模拟和真实数据集上的去噪和超分辨率任务中，HIR-ALIGN 一致优于源域监督基线和代表性无监督方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 HIR-ALIGN，一种即插即用的目标自适应增强框架，无需额外数据即可生成目标域对齐的合成数据。
  • 理论分析表明基于增强的微调可降低目标域恢复风险。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖现成恢复模型生成代理 HSI，可能引入误差。
  • 扩散模型和光谱迁移模块的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Hyperspectral image (HSI) restoration is crucial for reliable analysis, as real HSIs suffer from degradations like noise, blur, and resolution loss. However, existing models trained on source data often fail on target domains lacking clean references, a common occurrence in practice. To address this issue, we present HIR-ALIGN, a plug-and-play target-adaptive augmentation framework that enhances hyperspectral image restoration by augmenting limited training images with synthetic data that closely matches the target distribution using no extra data. It consists of three stages: (i) proxy generation, where off-the-shelf restoration models restore degraded target observations to produce semantics-preserving proxy HSIs that approximate target-domain clean images; (ii) distribution-adaptive synthesis, where a blur-robust unCLIP diffusion model generates target-aligned RGBs from proxy RGBs, with prompt conditioning and embedding-space noise initialization. Then, a warp-based spectral transfer module synthesizes HSIs by aligning each generated RGB with the proxy RGB, estimating soft patch-wise transport weights, and applying these weights and learnable local interpolation kernels to the proxy HSI; and (iii) aligned supervised finetuning, where restoration networks pretrained on the source distribution are finetuned using both the proxy HSIs and synthesized target-aligned HSIs, and are then deployed on degraded target images. We further provide theoretical analysis showing that augmentation-based finetuning can achieve lower target-domain restoration risk by jointly improving target distribution coverage and controlling spectral bias. Extensive experiments on simulated and real datasets across denoising and super-resolution tasks demonstrate that HIR-ALIGN consistently improves source-only supervised baselines, outperforming both source-only counterparts and representative unsupervised methods.

HADAR-Based Thermal Infrared Hyperspectral Image Restoration

Medium 2605.13664
Cheng Dai, Jiale Lin, Bingxuan Song, Yifei Chen, Jiashuo Chen, Xin Yuan, Fanglin Bao
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出基于 HADAR 物理模型的 TIR-HSI 恢复框架 HAIR，利用温度、发射率、纹理三重物理量实现去噪、修复、光谱校准与超分辨率。
🎯研究动机

热红外高光谱图像受传感器退化影响严重，现有恢复方法忽略底层热物理，导致性能受限。

❓解决问题

解决 TIR-HSI 中传感器退化（噪声、缺失、光谱失真等）的恢复问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于 HADAR 渲染方程和大气下行辐射传输方程，构建 TeX 分解 - 合成策略，利用物理三重态（温度、发射率、纹理）进行图像恢复，并引入前向建模的大气下行参考和光谱平滑约束。

📊实验结果

在 DARPA Invisible Headlights 数据集和实验室 FTIR 测量上评估，HAIR 在去噪、修复、光谱校准和光谱超分辨率上均优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个基于 HADAR 物理模型的 TIR-HSI 恢复框架 HAIR
  • 设计 TeX 分解 - 合成策略保证物理一致性和噪声鲁棒性
  • 实现光谱校准与生成，在多个任务上超越现有方法
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖精确的物理参数估计
  • 计算复杂度可能较高
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Thermal-infrared (TIR) hyperspectral imagery (HSI) provides critical scene information for various applications. However, its practical utility is severely limited by unique sensor degradations beyond the capabilities of existing restoration methods, which are ignorant of underlying thermal physics. Here, we propose HAIR (HADAR-based Image Restoration) as a physics-driven framework for ground-based TIR-HSI restoration. HAIR utilizes the HADAR rendering equation (HRE) and combines it with the atmospheric downwelling radiative transfer equation (RTE) to model TIR-HSI using temperature, emissivity, and texture (TeX) physical triplets. This physical model leads to a TeX decompose-synthesize strategy that guarantees physical consistency and spatio-spectral noise resilience, in stark contrast to existing approaches. Moreover, our framework uses a forward-modeled atmospheric downwelling reference, along with spectral smoothness of emissivity and blackbody radiation, to enable spectral calibration and generation that would otherwise be elusive. Our extensive experiments on the outdoor DARPA Invisible Headlights dataset and in-lab FTIR measurements show that HAIR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across denoising, inpainting, spectral calibration, and spectral super-resolution, establishing a benchmark in objective accuracy and visual quality.

文档/OCR/图表 1 篇

DocAtlas: Multilingual Document Understanding Across 80+ Languages

High 2605.12623
Ahmed Heakl, Youssef Mohamed, Abdullah Sohail, Rania Elbadry, Ahmed Nassar, Peter W. J. Staar, Fahad Shahbaz Khan, Imran Razzak et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：DocAtlas 构建了覆盖 82 种语言的高保真 OCR 数据集和基准，并利用 DPO 实现稳定的多语言文档理解优化。
🎯研究动机

多语言文档理解在低资源语言上因训练数据稀缺和基于模型的标注流程存在偏见而受限。

❓解决问题

如何构建高质量的多语言 OCR 数据集并提升低资源语言文档理解性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，基于模型的标注流程会延续偏见，且监督微调会严重损害域外性能（下降高达 21%），而 DPO 则能稳定提升。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DocAtlas 框架，包含双流水线（原生 DOCX 差分渲染和针对 RTL 脚本的 LaTeX 合成生成）以产生统一 DocTag 格式的精确结构标注，并使用 DPO 利用渲染真值作为正信号进行多语言适应。

📊实验结果

评估了 16 个最先进模型，DocAtlas-DeepSeek 在最强基线上提升 1.7%，DPO 在域内和域外分别提升 1.9% 和 1.8%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了覆盖 82 种语言和 9 个评估任务的高保真 OCR 数据集和基准。
  • 提出双流水线生成精确结构标注，无需学习模型。
  • 证明 DPO 能实现稳定的多语言适应，避免监督微调导致的域外性能下降。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于文档 OCR 任务，未涉及其他多语言视觉任务。
  • DPO 的增益相对较小，且未在更多模型上验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multilingual document understanding remains limited for low-resource languages due to scarce training data and model-based annotation pipelines that perpetuate existing biases. We introduce DocAtlas, a framework that constructs high-fidelity OCR datasets and benchmarks covering 82 languages and 9 evaluation tasks. Our dual pipelines, differential rendering of native DOCX documents and synthetic LaTeX-based generation for right-to-left scripts produce precise structural annotations in a unified DocTag format encoding layout, text, and component types, without learned models for core annotation. Evaluating 16 state-of-the-art models reveals persistent gaps in low-resource scripts. We show that Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) using rendering-derived ground truth as positive signal achieves stable multilingual adaptation, improving both in-domain (+1.9%) and out-of-domain (+1.8%) accuracy without measurable base-language degradation, where supervised fine-tuning degrades out-of-domain performance by up to 21%. Our best variant, DocAtlas-DeepSeek, improves +1.7% over the strongest baseline.

基础/前沿模型 (含LLM) 50 篇 · 7 个细分

Agent 与工具使用 14 篇

ChipMATE: Multi-Agent Training via Reinforcement Learning for Enhanced RTL Generation

High 2605.12857
Zhongkai Yu, Yichen Lin, Chenyang Zhou, Yuwei Zhang, Kun Zhou, Junxia Cui, Haotian Ye, Zhengding Hu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.MA
TL;DR：ChipMATE 提出首个自训练多智能体框架，通过 Verilog 与 Python 参考模型智能体相互验证，显著提升 RTL 代码生成准确率。
🎯研究动机

现有基于 API 的 RTL 代码生成系统与工业实践脱节：假设生成时已有黄金测试平台、依赖闭源 API 无法满足芯片厂商的隔离安全需求、无法利用厂商专有 RTL 代码库进行训练；而自训练模型虽解决部署约束，但仍是单轮生成器，忽略了工业流程中验证的关键作用。

❓解决问题

如何在无黄金测试平台、满足安全部署要求且能利用内部数据的前提下，实现多轮协作的 RTL 代码生成。

🔎现象分析

工业实践中正确性来源于独立编写的 RTL 模块与参考模型之间的交叉比对。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ChipMATE，首个自训练多智能体框架：配对 Verilog 智能体与 Python 参考模型智能体，通过相互验证输出（无需黄金 oracle）；设计基于回溯的推理流程防止错误跨轮传播；两阶段训练流程（先单独训练每个智能体饱和代码生成能力，再联合训练团队协作）；构建混合数据生成框架产出 64.4K 高质量参考模型训练样本。

📊实验结果

在 VerilogEval V2 基准上评估，ChipMATE 以 4B 和 9B 基础模型分别取得 75.0% 和 80.1% pass@1，优于所有现有自训练模型及 DeepSeek V4（1600B）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个自训练多智能体 RTL 生成框架 ChipMATE，通过智能体相互验证消除对黄金测试平台的依赖。
  • 设计回溯推理流程和两阶段训练策略，提升多轮协作的准确性和效率。
  • 构建混合数据生成框架，产出 64.4K 高质量参考模型训练样本。
  • 在 VerilogEval V2 上以 4B 和 9B 模型分别达到 75.0% 和 80.1% pass@1，超越所有现有自训练模型甚至 DeepSeek V4（1600B）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于 Verilog 和 Python 参考模型场景，对其他硬件描述语言或验证流程的泛化性未知。
  • 两阶段训练和回溯推理可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing API-based agentic systems for RTL code generation are fundamentally misaligned with industrial practice: they assume a golden testbench is available at generation time, rely on closed-source APIs incompatible with chip vendors' air-gapped security requirements, and cannot be trained on vendors' proprietary RTL codebases, leaving valuable internal data unused. Recent self-trained models address the deployment constraint but remain single-turn generators that overlook the critical role of verification in real industrial flows. To bridge these gaps, we present ChipMATE, the first self-trained multi-agent framework for RTL generation. Inspired by industrial practice where correctness emerges from cross-comparison between independently written RTL modules and reference models, ChipMATE pairs a Verilog agent with a Python reference-model agent that mutually verify each other's outputs without any golden oracle. We design a backtrack-based inference workflow to prevent error propagation across turns, and a two-stage training pipeline that first trains each agent individually to saturate its code-generation capability, then trains the team jointly to collaborate effectively. To support the training, we further build a hybrid data-generation framework that produces 64.4K high-quality reference model training samples. ChipMATE achieves 75.0\% and 80.1\% pass@1 on VerilogEval V2 with 4B and 9B base models, outperforming all existing self-trained models and even DeepSeek V4 with 1600B parameters. Our code and model weights are publicly available in this https URL .

Beyond Cooperative Simulators: Generating Realistic User Personas for Robust Evaluation of LLM Agents

High 2605.12894
Harshita Chopra, Kshitish Ghate, Aylin Caliskan, Tadayoshi Kohno, Chirag Shah, Natasha Jaques
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 Persona Policies (PPol)方法，通过进化程序搜索生成多样化、类人的用户角色，显著提升 LLM Agent 评估的鲁棒性。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM Agent 用户模拟器行为单一且过于合作，导致在模拟中表现良好的 Agent 在真实用户多样化的交互模式中失败，而收集大规模真实交互数据成本高昂。

❓解决问题

如何生成具有真实行为多样性的用户模拟器，以更准确地评估和训练 LLM Agent。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出基线模拟器继承底层模型的合作与同质行为，导致 Agent 在模拟中表现强但在真实用户面前失败。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Persona Policies (PPol)，一种即插即用的控制层，通过 LLM 驱动的进化程序搜索优化 Python 生成器，发现行为并转化为保持任务目标的角色扮演策略，使用多目标适应度评分（结合人类相似度和行为覆盖度）指导搜索。

📊实验结果

在 tau^2-bench 零售和航空领域进行实验，包括适应度评分对比、人类盲评以及 Agent 鲁棒性测试。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PPol 方法，自动生成多样化、类人的用户角色，无需手工设计。
  • 在零售和航空领域实验中，PPol 在适应度评分上比基线提升 33-62%，人类评估中 80.4% 被判定为人类，接近真实用户。
  • 使用 PPol 训练的 Agent 在挑战性分布外行为上任务成功率相对提升 17%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定领域任务，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 进化搜索的计算成本可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed in settings where they interact with a wide variety of people, including users who are unclear, impatient, or reluctant to share information. However, collecting real interaction data at scale remains expensive. The field has turned to LLM-based user simulators as stand-ins, but these simulators inherit the behavior of their underlying models: cooperative and homogeneous. As a result, agents that appear strong in simulation often fail under the unseen, diverse communication patterns of real users. To narrow this gap, we introduce Persona Policies (PPol), a plug-and-play control layer that induces realistic behavioral variation in user simulators while preserving the original task goals. Rather than hand-crafting personas, we cast persona generation as an LLM-driven evolutionary program search that optimizes a Python generator to discover behaviors and translate them into task-preserving roleplay policies. Candidate generators are guided by a multi-objective fitness score combining human-likeness with broad coverage of human behavioral patterns. Once optimized, the generator produces a diverse population of human-like personas for any task in the domain. Across tau^2-bench retail and airline domains, evolved PPol programs yield 33-62% absolute gains in fitness score over the baseline simulator. In a blinded evaluation, annotators rated PPol-conditioned users as human 80.4% of the time, close to real human traces and nearly twice as frequently as baseline simulators. Agents trained with PPol are more robust to challenging, out-of-distribution behaviors, improving task success by +17% relative to training only on existing simulated interactions. This offers a novel approach to strengthen simulator-based evaluation and training without changing tasks or rewards.

Position: Agentic AI System Is a Foreseeable Pathway to AGI

High 2605.12966
Junwei Liao, Shuai Li, Muning Wen, Jun Wang, Weinan Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：论文论证单体缩放不是 AGI 的唯一路径，提出 Agentic AI 系统通过 DAG 拓扑实现指数级泛化优势。
🎯研究动机

当前主流观点认为单纯缩放单一模型即可实现 AGI，但现实任务分布复杂异构，单体模型存在优化约束和效率瓶颈，亟需探索新范式。

❓解决问题

证明单体缩放不足以实现 AGI，并论证 Agentic AI 系统作为替代路径的理论优势。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论推导表明 Agentic AI 在泛化性和样本效率上具有指数级优势，并重新解释了当前多智能体框架的不稳定性。

🛠️主要方法

通过理论推导对比单体学习器与 Agentic 系统的优化约束，从简单路由机制推广到一般有向无环图（DAG）拓扑，并讨论与混合专家模型（MoE）的联系。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 挑战了单体缩放是实现 AGI 唯一路径的主流观点，提出 Agentic AI 是必要范式。
  • 从理论上证明 Agentic AI 系统在泛化性和样本效率上具有指数级优势。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论推导缺乏实证验证，未在具体任务上展示性能。
  • 未详细说明 DAG 拓扑的设计原则和可扩展性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Is monolithic scaling the only path to AGI? This paper challenges the dogma that purely scaling a single model is sufficient to achieve Artificial General Intelligence. Instead, we identify Agentic AI as a necessary paradigm for mastering the complex, heterogeneous distribution of real-world tasks. Through rigorous theoretical derivations, we contrast the optimization constraints of monolithic learners against the efficiency of Agentic systems, progressing from simple routing mechanisms to general Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) topologies. We demonstrate that Agentic AI achieves exponentially superior generalization and sample efficiency. Finally, we discuss the connection to Mixture-of-Experts, reinterpret the instability of current multi-agent frameworks, and call for greater research focus on Agentic AI.

Useful Memories Become Faulty When Continuously Updated by LLMs

High 2605.12978
Dylan Zhang, Yanshan Lin, Zhengkun Wu, Yihang Sun, Bingxuan Li, Dianqi Li, Hao Peng
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：LLM 持续更新记忆反而导致性能下降，应保留原始轨迹而非过度整合。
🎯研究动机

现有智能体记忆系统依赖 LLM 将经验整合为文本记忆库以实现持续改进，但整合过程可能引入错误，影响记忆效用。

❓解决问题

LLM 在持续更新整合记忆时，记忆效用先升后降，甚至低于无记忆基线，且整合过程会破坏原始经验。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到：整合记忆效用随更新先升后降；GPT-5.4 在 ARC-AGI 问题上使用整合记忆后失败率高达 54%；不同更新调度导致不同记忆质量；仅保留原始轨迹的对照方法表现与整合方法相当。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ARC-AGI Stream 环境，包含 Retain、Delete、Consolidate 动作，默认保留原始轨迹，仅在必要时显式整合。

📊实验结果

在 ARC-AGI 问题上进行实验，比较整合记忆、仅保留原始轨迹和无记忆基线，结果显示仅保留原始轨迹的准确率是强制整合的两倍。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现 LLM 持续更新整合记忆会导致性能退化，甚至低于无记忆基线。
  • 提出应优先保留原始轨迹，显式控制整合而非每次交互后自动整合。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅基于 ARC-AGI 问题，可能不适用于其他任务。
  • 未提供具体模型和数据集细节。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Learning from past experience benefits from two complementary forms of memory: episodic traces -- raw trajectories of what happened -- and consolidated abstractions distilled across many episodes into reusable, schema-like lessons. Recent agentic-memory systems pursue the consolidated form: an LLM rewrites past trajectories into a textual memory bank that it continuously updates with new interactions, promising self-improving agents without parameter updates. Yet we find that such consolidated memories produced by today's LLMs are often faulty even when derived from useful experiences. As consolidation proceeds, memory utility first rises, then degrades, and can fall below the no-memory baseline. More surprisingly, even when consolidating from ground-truth solutions, GPT-5.4 fails on 54% of a set of ARC-AGI problems it had previously solved without memory. We trace the regression to the consolidation step rather than the underlying experience: the same trajectories yield qualitatively different memories under different update schedules, and an episodic-only control that simply retains those trajectories remains competitive with the consolidators we test. In a controlled ARC-AGI Stream environment that exposes Retain, Delete, and Consolidate actions, agents preserve raw episodes by default and double the accuracy of their forced-consolidation counterparts; disabling consolidation entirely (episodic management only) matches this auto regime. Practically, robust agent memory should treat raw episodes as first-class evidence and gate consolidation explicitly rather than firing it after every interaction. Looking forward, reliable agentic memory will require LLMs that can consolidate without overwriting the evidence they depend on.

CANTANTE: Optimizing Agentic Systems via Contrastive Credit Attribution

High 2605.13295
Tom Zehle
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出 CANTANTE 框架，通过对比式信用分配优化多智能体系统提示，在编程、数学推理等任务上显著提升性能。
🎯研究动机

基于 LLM 的多智能体系统在复杂任务中表现优异，但其配置自动化面临结构性挑战：系统级分数可用，而控制智能体行为的参数是局部的，优化本质上是信用分配问题。

❓解决问题

如何将系统级奖励分解为每个智能体的更新信号，以优化多智能体系统的提示等可学习参数。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CANTANTE 框架，通过在相同查询上对比多个联合配置的轨迹，将系统级奖励分解为每个智能体的更新信号，并实例化用于提示优化。

📊实验结果

在 MBPP、GSM8K 和 HotpotQA 上评估，CANTANTE 在 MBPP 上比最强基线提升 18.9 个百分点，在 GSM8K 上提升 12.5 个百分点，在 HotpotQA 上在最强基线一个标准差内，且推理成本更低。

⭐主要贡献
  • 将多智能体系统优化形式化为信用分配问题，并提出 CANTANTE 框架。
  • 在编程、数学推理和多跳问答基准上，CANTANTE 取得最佳平均排名，显著优于未优化提示和强基线，且推理成本更低。
  • 信用相关性分析证实归因器产生有意义的每个智能体信号，而非简单复制全局分数。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于提示优化场景，未验证其他可学习参数。
  • 对比多个配置的轨迹可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LLM-based multi-agent systems have demonstrated strong performance across complex real-world tasks, such as software engineering, predictive modeling, and retrieval-augmented generation. Yet automating their configuration remains a structural challenge, as scores are available only at the system level, whereas the parameters governing agent behavior are local. We argue that optimizing these systems is fundamentally a credit-assignment problem. We therefore introduce CANTANTE, a framework that decomposes system-level rewards into per-agent update signals by contrasting rollouts of multiple joint configurations on the same query. We instantiate it for prompt optimization, treating agent prompts as learnable system parameters. We evaluate CANTANTE against GEPA and MIPROv2 on programming (MBPP), mathematical reasoning (GSM8K), and multi-hop question answering (HotpotQA). Across these benchmarks, CANTANTE achieves the best average rank among all evaluated optimizers and consistently outperforms unoptimized prompts. It improves over the strongest baseline by +18.9 percentage points on MBPP and +12.5 percentage points on GSM8K, while incurring a lower inference cost. It remains within one standard deviation of the strongest baseline on HotpotQA. Crucially, our credit correlation analysis confirms that the attributer produces meaningful per-agent signals rather than echoing the global system score.

AI Harness Engineering: A Runtime Substrate for Foundation-Model Software Agents

High 2605.13357
Hailin Zhong, Shengxin Zhu
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：提出 AI Harness Engineering 框架，将软件工程能力归因于模型 - 工具 - 环境系统而非仅模型能力。
🎯研究动机

当前自主软件工程 Agent 在真实开发环境中不可靠，主流观点将问题归因于模型能力不足，但忽略了运行环境（工具）的关键作用。

❓解决问题

如何系统化设计和评估支撑基础模型软件 Agent 的运行环境（工具），以提升其可靠性和可审计性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出不同工具级别（H0-H3）产生的证据结构不同：低级别仅产生最终补丁，高级别产生复现日志、失败归因、确定性需求检查和结构化验证报告。

🛠️主要方法

形式化 AI Harness Engineering 框架，定义 11 个组件责任，提出四层工具阶梯（H0-H3）和基于轨迹的评估协议。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在受控验证任务中应用框架，产生不同证据结构。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AI Harness Engineering 概念，将软件工程能力重新定义为模型 - 工具 - 环境系统的涌现属性。
  • 形式化 11 个工具组件责任和四层工具阶梯（H0-H3），提供可操作的评估协议。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架尚未在大规模真实开发场景中验证。
  • 工具组件的具体实现细节和性能开销未讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Foundation models have transformed automated code generation, yet autonomous software-engineering agents remain unreliable in realistic development settings. The dominant explanation locates this gap in model capability. We propose a different locus: software-engineering capability emerges from a model-harness-environment system, in which a runtime substrate -- the harness -- mediates how a foundation-model agent observes a project, acts on it, receives feedback, and establishes that a change is complete. We formalize this substrate as an AI Harness Engineering and identify eleven component responsibilities: task specification, context selection, tool access, project memory, task state, observability, failure attribution, verification, permissions, entropy auditing, and intervention recording. We operationalize the harness through a four-level ladder (H0-H3) that progressively exposes runtime support to the agent, and we propose a trace-based evaluation protocol that converts each agent run into an auditable episode package. Applied to a controlled validation task, the framework yields episode packages whose evidence structure varies systematically with harness level: lower levels produce only a final patch, higher levels produce reproduction logs, failure attributions, deterministic requirement checks, and structured verification reports. The framework reframes the central question of autonomous software engineering from whether a foundation model can produce a patch to whether the model-harness-environment system can produce a verifiably correct, attributed, and maintainable change. We outline a research program for the runtime systems that foundation-model software agents will require.

Cognifold: Always-On Proactive Memory via Cognitive Folding

High 2605.13438
Suli Wang, Yiqun Duan, Yu Deng, Rundong Zhao, Dai Shi, Xinliang Zhou
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：Cognifold 通过模拟大脑三层记忆系统，实现主动式、自组织的智能体记忆结构。
🎯研究动机

现有智能体记忆主要依赖被动检索，缺乏自主组织经验为持久认知结构的能力，限制了真正自主智能体的发展。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种能够持续主动组织事件流、自涌现认知结构的智能体记忆系统。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

扩展互补学习系统（CLS）理论为三层（海马体、新皮层、前额叶意图层），通过图拓扑自组织机制实现认知结构的主动组装、语义合并、衰减、关联回忆和意图涌现。

📊实验结果

在 CogEval-Bench 上评估结构形成，并在 7 个覆盖 5 个认知领域的基准上验证鲁棒性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Cognifold，一种脑启发的主动式智能体记忆架构，实现持续自组织认知结构。
  • 扩展 CLS 理论为三层，引入前额叶意图层。
  • 构建 CogEval-Bench 评估基准，验证记忆结构符合认知期望和概念涌现。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定图拓扑参数设置。
  • 跨领域泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing agent memory remains predominantly reactive and retrieval-based, lacking the capacity to autonomously organize experience into persistent cognitive structure. Toward genuinely autonomous agents, we introduce Cognifold, a brain-inspired "always-on" agent memory designed for the next generation of proactive assistants. CogniFold continuously folds fragmented event streams into self-emerging cognitive structures, bootstrapping progressively higher-level cognition from incoming events and accumulated knowledge. We ground this by extending Complementary Learning Systems (CLS) theory from two layers (hippocampus, neocortex) to three, adding a prefrontal intent layer. Emulating the prefrontal cortex as the locus of intentional control and decision-making, CogniFold achieves this through graph-topology self-organization: cognitive structures proactively assemble under the stream, merge when semantically similar, decay when stale, relink through associative recall, and surface intents when concept-cluster density crosses a threshold. We evaluate structural formation using CogEval-Bench, demonstrating that CogniFold uniquely produces memory structures that match cognitive expectations and concept emergence. Furthermore, across 7 broad-coverage benchmarks spanning five cognitive domains, we validate that CogniFold simultaneously performs robustly on conventional memory benchmarks.

ScioMind: Cognitively Grounded Multi-Agent Social Simulation with Anchoring-Based Belief Dynamics and Dynamic Profiles

High 2605.13725
Yitian Yang, Yiqun Duan, Linghan Huang, Yiqi Zhu, Francesco Bailo, Chunmeizi Su, Huaming Chen
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出认知锚定信念更新与动态角色配置的多智能体社会模拟框架，提升 LLM 模拟的行为真实性。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 多智能体社会模拟要么依赖固定更新规则缺乏认知基础，要么让 LLM 自由交互导致信念变化不可控，需要一种兼具认知合理性与灵活性的模拟方法。

❓解决问题

如何设计认知上有依据的信念动态机制，使 LLM 智能体模拟更真实地反映人类社会舆论演化模式。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

ScioMind 框架包含三个组件：1) 记忆锚定信念更新规则，通过个性调节的锚定强度控制影响易感性；2) 分层记忆架构支持持久、经验驱动的信念形成；3) 基于语料库检索的动态角色配置，实现异质性个性、理由和演化内部状态。

📊实验结果

在真实政策辩论场景的多个案例研究中评估，使用极化、多样性、极端化、轨迹稳定性等指标，动态角色增加意见多样性，记忆与反思减少不稳定振荡，锚定产生更符合政治心理学模式的持久信念轨迹。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出结合结构化舆论动态与 LLM 推理的认知锚定信念更新机制
  • 设计分层记忆架构和动态角色配置，提升模拟的异质性和行为真实性
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定语料库和个性模型，泛化性需验证
  • 计算开销可能较大，尤其动态角色配置和分层记忆
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent simulation offers a powerful testbed for studying social opinion dynamics. Yet current approaches often adopt two contrasting methods: either relying on fixed update rules with limited cognitive grounding or delegating belief change largely to unconstrained LLM interaction. We introduce ScioMind, a cognitively grounded simulation framework that bridges these paradigms by combining structured opinion dynamics with LLM-based agent reasoning. ScioMind integrates three key components: 1) a memory-anchored belief update rule that modulates susceptibility to influence via personality-conditioned anchoring strength; 2) a hierarchical memory architecture that supports persistent, experience-driven belief formation; and 3) dynamic agent profiles derived from a corpus-grounded retrieval pipeline, enabling heterogeneous personalities, rationales, and evolving internal states. We evaluate ScioMind on multiple case studies in a real-world policy debate scenario. Across metrics including polarisation, diversity, extremization, and trajectory stability, the proposed components consistently yield improvements in behavioural realism. In particular, dynamic profiles increase opinion diversity, memory and reflection reduce unstable oscillation, and anchoring induces persistent belief trajectories that better align with patterns reported in political psychology. These results suggest that our cognitively grounded design provides a novel solution to LLM-based social simulation that improves both stable and behavioural realism

Harnessing Agentic Evolution

High 2605.13821
Jiayi Zhang, Yongfeng Gu, Jianhao Ruan, Maojia Song, Yiran Peng, Zhiguang Han, Jinyu Xiang, Zhitao Wang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 AEvo 框架，通过元编辑进化上下文来引导程序或智能体的长期演化，在多个基准上取得显著提升。
🎯研究动机

现有智能体进化方法要么是固定手工程序（模块化但僵化），要么是通用智能体（灵活但长期演化中容易漂移），两者都缺乏稳定接口来组织积累的证据并修正进化机制。

❓解决问题

如何利用进化过程中积累的候选、反馈、轨迹和失败等丰富证据，通过统一接口来引导长期进化搜索。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AEvo，一种元编辑框架，将智能体进化建模为交互环境，进化上下文作为过程级状态；元代理观察该状态，通过编辑控制未来进化的程序或智能体上下文来间接提出候选。

📊实验结果

在智能体和推理基准上评估，AEvo 超越五种进化基线，相对提升 26%；在三个开放式优化任务上，超越四种进化基线，在相同迭代预算下达到 SOTA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 将智能体进化形式化为交互环境，以进化上下文作为过程级状态。
  • 提出 AEvo 元编辑框架，统一引导基于程序和基于智能体的进化。
  • 在智能体和推理基准上超越五种进化基线，相对提升 26%；在三个开放式优化任务上达到 SOTA。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖元代理的编辑能力，对复杂任务编辑质量有上限。
  • 长期进化中上下文积累可能导致计算开销增加。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Agentic evolution has emerged as a powerful paradigm for improving programs, workflows, and scientific solutions by iteratively generating candidates, evaluating them, and using feedback to guide future search. However, existing methods are typically instantiated either as fixed hand-designed procedures that are modular but rigid, or as general-purpose agents that flexibly integrate feedback but can drift in long-horizon evolution. Both forms accumulate rich evidence over time, including candidates, feedback, traces, and failures, yet lack a stable interface for organizing this evidence and revising the mechanism that drives future evolution. We address this limitation by formulating agentic evolution as an interactive environment, where the accumulated evolution context serves as a process-level state. We introduce AEvo, a harnessed meta-editing framework in which a meta-agent observes this state and acts not by directly proposing the next candidate, but by editing the procedure or agent context that controls future evolution. This unified interface enables AEvo to steer both procedure-based and agent-based evolution, making accumulated evidence actionable for long-horizon search. Empirical evaluations on agentic and reasoning benchmarks show that AEvo outperforms five evolution baselines, achieving a 26 relative improvement over the strongest baseline. Across three open-ended optimization tasks, AEvo further outperforms four evolution baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance under the same iteration budget.

Large Language Models for Agentic NetOps and AIOps: Architectures, Evaluation, and Safety

High 2605.12729
Muhammad Bilal, Jon Crowcroft, Ruizhi Wang, Xiaolong Xu, Schahram Dustdar
arXiv PDF cs.NI
TL;DR：综述 LLM 在智能网络运维和 AIOps 中的代理架构、评估方法与安全风险。
🎯研究动机

网络运维和 AIOps 中，LLM 被用于事故调查、根因分析等任务，但操作决策影响即时，现有方法缺乏对自主性、工具使用、安全约束的系统性梳理。

❓解决问题

如何构建可靠、可审计、安全的基于 LLM 的代理运维系统，并设计合适的评估方法。

🔎现象分析

操作可靠性主要不来自模型本身，而依赖于模型周围的机制（如权限、检查、回滚）。

🛠️主要方法

围绕自主性层级、工具范围、证据追踪和保证契约组织文献，提出工作流为中心的评估框架（包括痕迹质量、受限工具使用、安全提议生成、沙盒回放、金丝雀试验）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统梳理了 LLM 在 NetOps 和 AIOps 中的代理架构，提出保证契约概念。
  • 论证了评估应超越静态问答，转向工作流为中心的评估。
  • 分析了安全、隐私和治理风险，强调自主性作为受约束的控制问题。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提供实证比较或定量结果。
  • 可能缺乏对特定领域（如 5G、云原生）的深入讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models are increasingly being used to support network operations (NetOps) and artificial intelligence for IT operations (AIOps), including incident investigation, root-cause analysis, configuration synthesis, and limited self-healing. In both NetOps and AIOps, this shift is changing how tasks are managed. Agent-based operations work as workflows, from gathering evidence to taking action, following permissions, policies, and checks, and providing rollback options when necessary. This is crucial because operational decisions can have instant impacts. To make the argument concrete, we organise the relevant literature around the hierarchy of autonomy, tool scope, evidence traces, and assurance contracts. These contracts define what an agent may observe, propose, and execute. They also define the checks that must pass before any action is allowed. A consistent pattern appears across work on telemetry query recommendation, diagnosis, root-cause analysis, configuration synthesis, change planning, and limited self-healing. Operational reliability does not come chiefly from the model itself. It depends on the machinery around the model. We also argue that evaluation should go beyond static question answering. Agentic NetOps and AIOps systems require workflow-centred evaluation, including trace quality, bounded tool use, safe proposal generation, replay in sandboxed environments, and canary trials with rollback-aware scoring. Without these measures, a system may appear robust yet remain too fragile. Finally, we examine security, privacy, and governance risks that become acute when agents sit close to operational control surfaces. Taken together, the survey concludes that progress in intelligent NetOps and AIOps will depend on treating autonomy as a constrained operational control problem, whose outputs must be reliable, auditable, and securely deployable.

State-Centric Decision Process

High 2605.12755
Sungheon Jeong, Ryozo Masukawa, Sanggeon Yun, Mahdi Imani, Mohsen Imani
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出状态中心决策过程（SDP），让语言环境中的智能体通过自然语言谓词自建状态空间，实现无训练下的长程任务最优性能。
🎯研究动机

语言环境（如浏览器、代码终端）只输出原始文本，缺乏 MDP 分析所需的状态空间、观测 - 状态映射、认证转移和终止条件，导致现有方法难以进行结构化推理和长程规划。

❓解决问题

如何在缺乏显式状态结构的语言环境中，为智能体提供 MDP 所需的运行时结构，以实现可认证的决策和长程任务求解。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 State-Centric Decision Process (SDP)，智能体在每一步提交一个自然语言谓词描述期望世界状态，执行动作使谓词为真，并检查观测是否匹配；通过的谓词成为认证状态，轨迹自动包含状态空间、观测 - 状态映射、认证转移和终止条件。

📊实验结果

在五个基准（规划、科学探索、Web 推理、多跳问答）上评估，SDP 在所有基准上取得无训练最佳结果，且长程任务优势更明显。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SDP 框架，为语言环境提供 MDP 所需的四个缺失结构（状态空间、映射、转移、终止条件）。
  • 在五个基准（规划、科学探索、Web 推理、多跳问答）上实现无训练最佳结果，且优势随任务长度增加而扩大。
  • 认证轨迹支持谓词级信用分配、失败定位、部分进度测量和模块化操作符替换等分析。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖自然语言谓词的质量和智能体的生成能力。
  • 可能不适用于观测噪声极大或谓词难以定义的场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Language environments such as web browsers, code terminals, and interactive simulations emit raw text rather than states, and provide none of the runtime structure that MDP analysis requires. No explicit state space, no observation-to-state mapping, no certified transitions, and no termination criterion. We introduce the State-Centric Decision Process (SDP), a runtime framework that constructs these missing inputs by having the agent build them, predicate by predicate, as it acts. At each step the agent commits to a natural-language predicate describing how the world should look, takes an action to make it true, and checks the observation against it. Predicates that pass become certified states, and the resulting trajectory carries the four objects language environments do not provide, namely a task-induced state space, an observation-to-state mapping, certified transitions, and a termination criterion. We evaluate SDP on five benchmarks spanning planning, scientific exploration, web reasoning, and multi-hop question answering. SDP achieves the best training-free results on all five, with the advantage widening as the horizon grows. The certified trajectories additionally support analyses unavailable to reactive agents, including per-predicate credit assignment, failure localization, partial-progress measurement, and modular operator replacement.

ToolWeave: Structured Synthesis of Complex Multi-Turn Tool-Calling Dialogues

High 2605.12521
Dinesh Khandelwal, Gnana Prakash Punnavajhala, GPS Bhargav, Gaurav Pandey, Sachin Joshi, Hima Karanam, Dinesh Raghu
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：ToolWeave 通过结构化合成框架生成更真实的多轮工具调用对话，显著提升 LLM 代理性能。
🎯研究动机

现有合成数据生成流程常产生不真实的对话，因为工具链仅表面兼容而非对齐用户任务，且一次性生成导致参数幻觉，多步工具交互严重不足。

❓解决问题

如何合成高质量、真实的多轮工具调用对话数据，以提升 LLM 作为自主代理的工具调用能力。

🔎现象分析

现有方法生成的对话中，工具链仅表面兼容，参数存在幻觉，多步工具交互占比低。

🛠️主要方法

ToolWeave 框架：通过构建具有内置依赖的工具支持真实多步工作流，基于用户目标对齐过滤工作流，并使用细粒度规划阶段显式追踪参数来源以减少参数幻觉。

📊实验结果

在三个公开基准上评估，Llama-3.1-70B 微调后 BFCL-V3 多轮准确率 39.75% vs 23.50%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ToolWeave 框架，通过依赖构建和目标对齐生成更真实的多步工具调用对话。
  • 引入细粒度规划阶段减少参数幻觉，使合成数据中多步交互占比达 45%。
  • 实验证明基于 ToolWeave 微调的 LLM 在三个公开基准上一致优于先前数据集，Llama-3.1-70B 在 BFCL-V3 多轮上达 39.75% vs 23.50%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架依赖预定义工具依赖关系，可能限制泛化性。
  • 未讨论对未见工具类型的适应能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multi-turn tool calling is essential for LLMs to function as autonomous agents, yet synthesizing the training data required for these capabilities remains a fundamental challenge. Existing synthetic data generation pipelines often produce unrealistic dialogues for two reasons: they chain tools that are only superficially compatible rather than aligned with meaningful user tasks, and they generate dialogues in one shot, which often introduces arguments that were neither provided by the user nor produced by prior tool calls.
