These issues also lead to a severe underrepresentation of multi-step tool interactions. We introduce ToolWeave, a structured framework for synthesizing realistic multi-turn tool-calling dialogues. ToolWeave support realistic multi-step workflows (or tool sequences) by constructing tools with built-in dependencies and filters the workflows based on alignment with user goals. It reduces parameter hallucination by using a fine-grained planning stage that explicitly tracks parameter provenance. As a result, ToolWeave-generated synthetic dialogues contain more multi-step tool interactions (45%) and fewer hallucinations in parameters and tool names. Consequently, LLMs fine-tuned on ToolWeave consistently outperform those fine-tuned on prior datasets across three public benchmarks. Notably, Llama-3.1-70B fine-tuned on ToolWeave achieves 39.75% on BFCL-V3 multi-turn, compared to 23.50% when fine-tuned on SOTA ToolFlow data.

Language-Based Agent Control

Medium 2605.12863
Timothy Zhou, Loris D'Antoni, Nadia Polikarpova
arXiv PDF cs.PL
TL;DR：提出语言基础代理控制（LBAC）编程模型，通过类型系统保证代理应用的安全策略。
🎯研究动机

现有代理应用缺乏统一的安全策略保证，传统编程语言中的类型检查和运行时强制执行技术尚未被系统应用于代理控制。

❓解决问题

如何将编程语言的安全保证技术扩展到代理应用，使代理生成的代码也能遵循用户指定的安全策略。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

LBAC 模型要求代理生成在周围脚手架代码上下文中类型良好的程序，通过类型检查器在执行前拒绝不安全程序，同时允许代理进行任意无副作用的计算和递归调用子代理。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出语言基础代理控制（LBAC）编程模型，将编程语言安全技术应用于代理控制。
  • 通过三个案例研究（I/O 沙箱、数据溯源、信息流控制）展示 LBAC 的实用性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于生成代码的代理场景，对非代码生成代理不直接适用。
  • 类型系统的表达能力可能限制某些复杂代理行为。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This paper introduces language-based agent control (LBAC), a new programming model for agentic applications that brings techniques from programming languages and language-based security to the problem of agent control. In conventional programming, combinations of static typing and runtime enforcement have long been used to guarantee that well-typed programs satisfy user-specified policies, including policies for access control, information flow, data provenance, and more. The key idea behind LBAC is to extend these guarantees to agentic applications by requiring agents to generate programs that are themselves well typed in the context of the surrounding scaffolding code. Unsafe programs are rejected by the type-checker before execution, allowing policies to apply uniformly across the entire application, including both agent-generated behavior and developer-written scaffolding. At the same time, LBAC preserves substantial expressiveness: agents may perform arbitrary side-effect-free computation and recursively invoke subagents, which retain full tool access subject to the same -- or potentially more restrictive -- policies. We demonstrate LBAC with three case studies: I/O sandboxing via filesystem capabilities, data provenance, and information-flow control.

Agentic Interpretation: Lattice-Structured Evidence for LLM-Based Program Analysis

Medium 2605.12694
Jacqueline L. Mitchell, Chao Wang
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：提出 agentic interpretation 框架，将格静态分析纪律引入 LLM 程序推理，通过分解局部声明和格中追踪判断来提升分析可靠性。
🎯研究动机

LLM 能访问固定静态分析器无法获取的信息（如文档、安全公告），但直接进行一次性全程序分析不可靠，因为它将多个证据依赖的判断压缩成单一不透明答案，而非暴露哪些结论被支持或争议。

❓解决问题

如何将基于格的静态分析纪律引入 LLM 驱动的程序推理，以分解分析目标、追踪局部声明判断并引导后续搜索。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 agentic interpretation 框架，将高层分析目标分解为局部声明，在有限高度格中追踪 LLM 对每个声明的判断，并使用工作列表算法控制声明及其判断的演化。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 agentic interpretation 框架，将格静态分析纪律引入 LLM 程序推理。
  • 形式化 agentic interpretation 模型，探索其设计空间，并通过依赖不透明第三方组件的代码分析示例说明方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 LLM 对局部声明的判断质量。
  • 工作列表算法的收敛性和效率可能受问题规模影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models can consult information that fixed static analyzers cannot, such as documentation, current security advisories, version-specific metadata, and informal API contracts. This makes LLMs a compelling option for program analyses that depend on information beyond the source program, or that are otherwise not amenable to conventional static analyzers. However, directly asking an LLM for a one-shot whole-program analysis is brittle because it compresses many evidence-dependent judgments into a single opaque answer, rather than exposing which conclusions are supported or disputed and using intermediate findings to guide later, more focused searches. In this paper, we propose agentic interpretation, a framework that brings the discipline of lattice-based static analysis to LLM-driven program reasoning. At a high level, agentic interpretation decomposes a high-level analysis goal into localized claims, and tracks the LLM's judgment about each claim in a finite-height lattice. A worklist algorithm governs how claims and their judgments evolve during the analysis. We introduce a formal model of agentic interpretation, explore the design space it opens, and illustrate the approach with a worked example analyzing code that depends on opaque third-party components.

推理与思维链 13 篇

Retrieval is Cheap, Show Me the Code: Executable Multi-Hop Reasoning for Retrieval-Augmented Generation

High 2605.12975
Jiashuo Sun, Jimeng Shi, Yixuan Xie, Saizhuo Wang, Jash Rajesh Parekh, Pengcheng Jiang, Zhiyi Shi, Jiajun Fan et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：将多跳 RAG 转化为可执行 Python 程序，通过代码执行实现确定性反馈和自修复，显著提升多跳问答性能。
🎯研究动机

现有 RAG 系统在多跳问答中表现脆弱，因为自由形式的自然语言推理导致中间状态隐式、检索查询易漂移，且错误检测依赖同一模型，自我反思不可靠。

❓解决问题

多跳问答中检索与推理步骤的链式组合缺乏结构化、可验证的中间表示，导致错误累积和不可靠的自我修正。

🔎现象分析

多跳问答本质上是逐步计算过程，与代码专用语言模型的训练方式高度契合；自由形式推理的中间状态隐式且错误检测不可靠。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PyRAG 框架，将多跳 RAG 重写为程序合成与执行：用可执行 Python 程序表示推理过程，通过检索和 QA 工具调用，将中间状态暴露为变量，利用执行产生确定性反馈，并支持编译器引导的自修复和执行驱动的自适应检索。

📊实验结果

在 PopQA、HotpotQA、2WikiMultihopQA、MuSiQue 和 Bamboogle 五个基准上评估，在无训练和 RL 训练设置下均优于强基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出将多跳 RAG 转化为程序合成与执行的新范式，利用代码执行提供确定性反馈和可检查轨迹。
  • 实现编译器引导的自修复和执行驱动的自适应检索，无需额外训练。
  • 在五个 QA 基准上取得一致优势，尤其在组合多跳数据集上提升显著。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖代码生成模型的质量，可能对复杂逻辑推理仍有挑战。
  • 执行环境的安全性和资源消耗需进一步考虑。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a standard approach for knowledge-intensive question answering, but existing systems remain brittle on multi-hop questions, where solving the task requires chaining multiple retrieval and reasoning steps. Key challenges are that current methods represent reasoning through free-form natural language, where intermediate states are implicit, retrieval queries can drift from intended entities, and errors are detected by the same model that produces them making self-reflection an unreliable, ungrounded signal. We observe that multi-hop question answering is a typical form of step-by-step computation, and that this structured process aligns closely with how code-specialized language models are trained to operate. Motivated by this, we introduce \pyrag, a framework that reformulates multi-hop RAG as program synthesis and execution. Instead of free-form reasoning trajectories, \pyrag represents the reasoning process as an executable Python program over retrieval and QA tools, exposing intermediate states as variables, producing deterministic feedback through execution, and yielding an inspectable trace of the entire reasoning process. This formulation further enables compiler-grounded self-repair and execution-driven adaptive retrieval without any additional training. Experiments on five QA benchmarks (PopQA, HotpotQA, 2WikiMultihopQA, MuSiQue, and Bamboogle) show that \pyrag consistently outperforms strong baselines under both training-free and RL-trained settings, with especially large gains on compositional multi-hop datasets. Our code, data and models are publicly available at this https URL .

LeanSearch v2: Global Premise Retrieval for Lean 4 Theorem Proving

High 2605.13137
Guoxiong Gao, Zeming Sun, Jiedong Jiang, Yutong Wang, Jingda Xu, Peihao Wu, Bryan Dai, Bin Dong
arXiv PDF cs.IR
TL;DR：提出 LeanSearch v2，一种针对 Lean 4 定理证明的全局前提检索系统，通过嵌入 - 重排序管道和迭代草图 - 检索 - 反思循环，显著提升前提检索和证明成功率。
🎯研究动机

在 Lean 4 中证明定理常需从分散的库引理中识别完整前提集，现有工具（语义搜索或前提选择）无法恢复整个定理所需的前提集合，制约了自动化证明效率。

❓解决问题

解决 Lean 4 定理证明中的全局前提检索问题，即从大型数学库中检索出证明一个完整定理所需的所有引理集合。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 LeanSearch v2 双模式检索系统：标准模式采用层次非形式化的 Mathlib 语料库与嵌入 - 重排序管道，无需领域微调即达 SOTA；推理模式在标准模式基础上，通过迭代草图 - 检索 - 反思循环实现全局前提检索。

📊实验结果

在 69 查询的 Mathlib 定理基准上，推理模式恢复 46.1% 的完整前提组，优于强推理检索系统（38.0%）和前提选择基线（9.3%）；下游证明循环中，替换为 LeanSearch v2 后证明成功率最高（20% vs 16% vs 4%）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出全局前提检索任务并构建 69 查询基准，填补现有工具空白。
  • 设计标准模式，实现单查询 SOTA 检索（nDCG@10 0.62 vs 0.53）。
  • 设计推理模式，通过迭代循环恢复 46.1% 的完整前提组，远超基线。
  • 开源所有代码、数据和基准，并提供标准模式 API。
⚠️方法局限
  • 推理模式仍依赖标准模式作为基础，可能受限于初始检索质量。
  • 基准规模较小（69 查询），泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Proving theorems in Lean 4 often requires identifying a scattered set of library lemmas whose joint use enables a concise proof -- a task we call global premise retrieval. Existing tools address adjacent problems: semantic search engines find individual declarations matching a query, while premise-selection systems predict useful lemmas one tactic step at a time. Neither recovers the full premise set an entire theorem requires. We present LeanSearch v2, a two-mode retrieval system for this task. Its standard mode applies a hierarchy-informalized Mathlib corpus with an embedding-reranker pipeline, achieving state-of-the-art single-query retrieval without domain-specific fine-tuning (nDCG@10 of 0.62 vs. 0.53 for the next-best system). Its reasoning mode builds on standard mode as its retrieval substrate, targeting global premise retrieval through iterative sketch-retrieve-reflect cycles. On a 69-query benchmark of research-level Mathlib theorems, reasoning mode recovers 46.1% of ground-truth premise groups within 10 retrieved candidates, outperforming strong reasoning retrieval systems (38.0%) and premise-selection baselines (9.3%) on the same benchmark. In a controlled downstream evaluation with a fixed prover loop, replacing alternative retrievers with LeanSearch v2 yields the highest proof success (20% vs. 16% for the next-best system and 4% without retrieval), confirming that retrieval quality propagates to proof generation. We have open-sourced all code, data, and benchmarks. Code and data: this https URL . The standard mode is publicly available with API access at this https URL .

Respecting Self-Uncertainty in On-Policy Self-Distillation for Efficient LLM Reasoning

High 2605.13255
Junlong Ke, Zichen Wen, Weijia Li, Conghui He, Linfeng Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出熵引导的自蒸馏方法 EGRSD，通过动态加权教师信号提升 LLM 推理效率。
🎯研究动机

现有 on-policy 自蒸馏方法对教师 token 级信号均匀加权，忽略了不同 token 位置预测熵的差异，导致训练效率低下。

❓解决问题

如何根据教师模型的不确定性动态调整 token 级蒸馏权重，以提升推理模型在准确率和生成长度之间的权衡。

🔎现象分析

教师模型在不同 token 位置的预测熵存在显著差异，高熵位置通常对应推理中的关键决策点，均匀加权会浪费监督信号。

🛠️主要方法

提出 EGRSD，结合奖励引导方向、师生似然比幅度和教师熵置信门控（对高熵 token 降权但保持非零下界）；进一步提出 CL-EGRSD，区分持续高熵区间和瞬态高熵位置。

📊实验结果

在 Qwen3-4B 和 Qwen3-8B 的 thinking 模式下进行实验，EGRSD 和 CL-EGRSD 在准确率 - 长度前沿上优于对比的可训练方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出熵引导的置信门控机制，动态调整 token 级蒸馏权重
  • 引入因果前瞻变体 CL-EGRSD，区分高熵的持续与瞬态模式
  • 在 Qwen3-4B/8B 上验证方法在准确率 - 长度前沿上的优势
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅基于 Qwen3 系列模型，泛化性待验证
  • 未提供与其他蒸馏方法（如离线蒸馏）的对比
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

On-policy self-distillation trains a reasoning model on its own rollouts while a teacher, often the same model conditioned on privileged context, provides dense token-level supervision. Existing objectives typically weight the teacher's token-level signal uniformly across a chain-of-thought sequence, despite substantial variation in the entropy of the teacher's predictive distribution. We propose EGRSD (Entropy-Guided Reinforced Self-Distillation), which unifies token-level updates through three signals: a reward-grounded direction, a teacher-student likelihood-ratio magnitude, and the proposed teacher-entropy confidence gate that down-weights high-entropy token positions while maintaining a nonzero lower bound on every token weight. We further introduce CL-EGRSD, a causal-lookahead variant that distinguishes sustained high-entropy spans from transient high-entropy positions whose following context rapidly becomes low entropy. Experiments with Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B in thinking mode show that EGRSD and CL-EGRSD advance the accuracy-length frontier among the compared trainable methods.

Achieving Gold-Medal-Level Olympiad Reasoning via Simple and Unified Scaling

High 2605.13301
Yafu Li, Runzhe Zhan, Haoran Zhang, Shunkai Zhang, Yizhuo Li, Zhilin Wang, Jiacheng Chen, Futing Wang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种简单统一的缩放方法，将后训练推理骨干转化为奥赛级求解器，在 IMO 和 IPhO 上达到金牌水平。
🎯研究动机

现有推理模型在长程数学和科学问题求解上取得进展，但缺乏简单统一的方案将后训练推理模型提升至奥赛金牌水平，且需要处理超长推理轨迹和严格证明搜索。

❓解决问题

如何通过简单统一的训练和缩放方法，将后训练推理骨干转化为能在国际数学和物理奥赛上稳定求解并达到金牌水平的系统。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

三步配方：1) 使用反向困惑度课程进行 SFT，灌输严格的证明搜索和自我检查行为；2) 两阶段强化学习：先使用可验证奖励的 RL，再过渡到证明级 RL；3) 测试时缩放提升求解性能。

📊实验结果

在约 340K 子 8K token 轨迹上进行 SFT，随后进行 200 步 RL 训练，在 IMO 和 IPhO 竞赛上评估，达到金牌水平。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种简单统一的配方，将后训练推理骨干转化为奥赛级求解器。
  • 训练出 SU-01 模型，在 IMO 2025/USAMO 2026 和 IPhO 2024/2025 上达到金牌水平，支持超过 100K token 的稳定推理。
⚠️方法局限
  • 模型规模为 30B-A3B，可能仍存在计算资源需求。
  • 泛化到其他科学领域的能力未充分验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent progress in reasoning models has substantially advanced long-horizon mathematical and scientific problem solving, with several systems now reaching gold-medal-level performance on International Mathematical Olympiad (IMO) and International Physics Olympiad (IPhO) problems. In this paper, we introduce a simple and unified recipe for converting a post-trained reasoning backbone into a rigorous olympiad-level solver. The recipe first uses a reverse-perplexity curriculum for SFT to instill rigorous proof-search and self-checking behaviors, then scales these behaviors through a two-stage RL pipeline that progresses from RL with verifiable rewards to more delicate proof-level RL, and finally boosts solving performance with test-time scaling. Applying this recipe, we train a 30B-A3B backbone with SFT on around 340K sub-8K-token trajectories followed by 200 RL steps. The resulting model, SU-01, supports stable reasoning on difficult problems with trajectories exceeding 100K tokens, while achieving gold-medal-level performance on mathematical and physical olympiad competitions, including IMO 2025/USAMO 2026 and IPhO 2024/2025. It also demonstrates strong generalization of scientific reasoning to domains beyond mathematics and physics.

Query-Conditioned Test-Time Self-Training for Large Language Models

High 2605.13369
Chaehee Song, Minseok Seo, Yeeun Seong, Doyi Kim, Changick Kim
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出 QueST 框架，利用输入查询自身生成监督信号进行测试时自训练，实现无需外部数据的查询特定参数适应。
🎯研究动机

LLM 通常固定参数部署，测试时扩展计算虽能提升性能，但无法纠正模型误解或适应单个查询的特定结构；现有测试时优化方法要么依赖外部数据，要么优化缺乏查询特定对齐的自监督目标。

❓解决问题

如何在测试时仅利用输入查询本身，实现查询特定的参数更新，以纠正模型错误并适应查询结构。

🔎现象分析

输入查询本身编码了足以构建结构相关的问题 - 解对的潜在信号。

🛠️主要方法

QueST：从输入查询生成查询条件的问题 - 解对，作为监督信号进行参数高效微调，然后使用适应后的模型生成最终答案。

📊实验结果

在七个数学推理基准和 GPQA-Diamond 科学推理基准上评估，QueST 一致优于强测试时优化基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出查询条件测试时自训练（QueST）框架，无需外部数据即可实现查询特定的参数适应。
  • 在数学推理和科学推理基准上验证了 QueST 优于强测试时优化基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖查询中潜在信号的质量，对于信号较弱的查询效果有限。
  • 测试时微调增加了推理计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) are typically deployed with fixed parameters, and their performance is often improved by allocating more computation at inference time. While such test-time scaling can be effective, it cannot correct model misconceptions or adapt the model to the specific structure of an individual query. Test-time optimization addresses this limitation by enabling parameter updates during inference, but existing approaches either rely on external data or optimize generic self-supervised objectives that lack query-specific alignment. In this work, we propose Query-Conditioned Test-Time Self-Training (QueST), a framework that adapts model parameters during inference using supervision derived directly from the input query. Our key insight is that the input query itself encodes latent signals sufficient for constructing structurally related problem--solution pairs. Based on this, QueST generates such query-conditioned pairs and uses them as supervision for parameter-efficient fine-tuning at test time. The adapted model is then used to produce the final answer, enabling query-specific adaptation without any external data. Across seven mathematical reasoning benchmarks and the GPQA-Diamond scientific reasoning benchmark, QueST consistently outperforms strong test-time optimization baselines. These results demonstrate that query-conditioned self-training is an effective and practical paradigm for test-time adaptation in LLMs.

Many-Shot CoT-ICL: Making In-Context Learning Truly Learn

High 2605.13511
Tsz Ting Chung, Lemao Liu, Mo Yu, Dit-Yan Yeung
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：许多示例的思维链上下文学习并非简单缩放模式匹配，而是上下文测试时学习，需要结构化课程式示例设计。
🎯研究动机

现有研究主要关注非推理任务中许多示例上下文学习的缩放行为，但推理任务（如思维链）的规律尚不明确，且标准规则不适用。

❓解决问题

研究许多示例思维链上下文学习（many-shot CoT-ICL）在推理任务中的缩放行为，并解决其不稳定性和性能方差问题。

🔎现象分析

发现三个现象：(i) 设置依赖的缩放效应，非推理 LLM 不稳定，推理 LLM 受益；(ii) 基于相似性的检索在非推理任务有效，但在推理任务失败；(iii) 顺序缩放效应，更多示例导致性能方差增大。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Curvilinear Demonstration Selection (CDS)，一种基于示例易理解性和概念渐进顺序的排序方法。

📊实验结果

在非推理和推理 LLM 上，对非推理和推理任务进行实验，使用 64 个示例在几何任务上验证 CDS 效果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示许多示例思维链上下文学习是上下文测试时学习而非缩放模式匹配。
  • 提出两个设计原则：示例应易于目标模型理解，且应排序以支持平滑概念进展。
  • 提出 CDS 排序方法，在几何任务上使用 64 个示例获得高达 5.42 个百分点的提升。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅验证了几何任务上的提升，其他推理任务效果未知。
  • CDS 方法依赖示例的易理解性和概念进展度量，可能需人工设计或额外计算。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In-context learning (ICL) adapts large language models (LLMs) to new tasks by conditioning on demonstrations in the prompt without parameter updates. With long-context models, many-shot ICL can use dozens to hundreds of examples and achieve performance comparable to fine-tuning, yet current understanding of its scaling behavior is largely derived from non-reasoning tasks. We study many-shot chain-of-thought in-context learning (CoT-ICL) for reasoning and show that standard many-shot rules do not transfer. Across non-reasoning and reasoning-oriented LLMs and across non-reasoning and reasoning tasks, we find: (i) a setting-dependent scaling effect, where increasing the number of CoT demonstrations is unstable for non-reasoning LLMs and benefits mainly reasoning-oriented LLMs; (ii) similarity-based retrieval helps on non-reasoning tasks but fails on reasoning, since semantic similarity poorly predicts procedural (i.e., CoT) compatibility; and (iii) an order-scaling effect, where performance variance grows with more CoT demonstrations. We interpret these behaviors by viewing many-shot CoT-ICL as in-context test-time learning rather than scaled pattern matching, and suggests two principles: (i) demonstrations should be easy for the target model to understand, and (ii) they should be ordered to support a smooth conceptual progression. Guided by the principle, we propose Curvilinear Demonstration Selection (CDS), a simple ordering method that yields up to a 5.42 percentage-point gain on geometry with 64 demonstrations. Overall, our results reframe the long context window from a retrieval buffer into a structured curriculum for in-context test-time learning.

Scaling Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning with Parallel Search and Explicit Merging

High 2605.13534
Jiabei Liu, Wenyu Mao, Junfei Tan, Chunxu Shen, Lingling Yi, Jiancan Wu, Xiang Wang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：MultiSearch 通过并行多查询检索和显式信息合并提升检索增强推理的信噪比和准确性。
🎯研究动机

现有检索增强推理方法在每一步只生成单个查询，导致信息覆盖有限且噪声高，信噪比低，影响推理准确性和效率。

❓解决问题

如何通过多查询并行检索和显式信息合并来提高检索增强推理中的信噪比和推理性能。

🔎现象分析

单查询检索导致信息覆盖不足和噪声高，信噪比低，推理准确性下降且产生不必要的推理步骤。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MultiSearch 框架，基于强化学习，在每一步生成多个视角的查询并行检索，然后通过显式合并过程整合和精炼信息，提高信噪比。

📊实验结果

在七个基准上实验，MultiSearch 优于基线方法，提高了检索信噪比和问答推理性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MultiSearch 框架，通过并行多查询检索和显式信息合并提升检索增强推理的信噪比。
  • 设计基于强化学习的多进程奖励机制，优化智能体进行多查询检索和信息整合。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能增加计算开销，因为并行检索和合并过程需要更多资源。
  • 合并策略可能对特定任务或领域敏感，需要进一步调优。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deep search agents have proven effective in enhancing LLMs by retrieving external knowledge during multi-step reasoning. However, existing methods often generate a single query for retrieval at each reasoning step, limiting information coverage and introducing high noise. This may result in low signal-to-noise ratios (SNR) during search, degrading reasoning accuracy and leading to unnecessary reasoning steps. In this paper, we introduce MultiSearch, an RL-based framework that addresses these limitations through multi-query retrieval and explicit merging of retrieved information. At each reasoning step, MultiSearch generates queries from multiple perspectives and retrieves external information in parallel, expanding the scope of relevant information and mitigating the reliance on any single retrieval result. Then, the agent consolidates and refines retrieved information at the merging process, improving the SNR and ensuring more accurate reasoning. Additionally, we propose a reinforcement learning framework with a multi-process reward design to optimize agents for both multi-query retrieval and information consolidation. Extensive experiments on seven benchmarks demonstrate that MultiSearch outperforms baseline methods, enhancing the SNR of retrieval and improving reasoning performance in question-answering tasks.

A Hierarchical Language Model with Predictable Scaling Laws and Provable Benefits of Reasoning

High 2605.13687
Jason Gaitonde, Frederic Koehler, Elchanan Mossel, Joonhyung Shin, Allan Sly
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过可精确分析的分层合成语言，证明自回归生成需要线性上下文长度，而推理模型仅需对数级工作记忆即可实现指数级改进。
🎯研究动机

理解上下文长度和推理在自回归生成中的作用对于设计高效的语言模型至关重要，但现有理论分析缺乏精确性。

❓解决问题

量化自回归生成中上下文长度对序列采样的必要性，并证明推理模型能显著降低上下文需求。

🔎现象分析

对于 Ising 广播过程，生成序列的方差随上下文深度对数线性增长，峰度收敛到高斯分布，与真实语言偏离；对于 coloring 广播过程，有界上下文自回归生成高概率产生与任何有效着色不一致的序列。

🛠️主要方法

引入精确 k-gram 假设替代上下文长度为 k 的 Transformer，推导渐近预测，并验证推理模型（带Θ(log n)工作记忆）能精确采样。

📊实验结果

在合成语言上训练 Transformer，定量验证渐近预测在多种上下文大小下的准确性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一类可精确分析的分层合成语言，用于研究上下文长度和推理的作用。
  • 证明自回归生成需要Ω(n)上下文长度才能忠实采样长度 n 序列，而推理模型仅需Θ(log n)工作记忆。
  • 通过 Transformer 实验定量验证理论预测。
⚠️方法局限
  • 合成语言与自然语言的差距可能限制结论的普适性。
  • 理论分析基于 k-gram 假设，实际 Transformer 可能偏离该假设。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce a family of synthetic languages with hierarchical structure -- generated by a broadcast process on trees -- for which the role of context length and reasoning in autoregressive generation can be analyzed precisely. At the heart of our analytic approach is an \emph{exact $k$-gram ansatz} in place of transformers with context length $k$, a substitution we then validate empirically. Using this ansatz we derive explicit asymptotic predictions for distributional statistics of the sequences produced by a trained model, instantiated in two settings. For the \emph{Ising broadcast process} (a soft-constrained language), we prove that the variance of the generated sum scales log-linearly in the context depth and its kurtosis converges to that of a Gaussian -- both deviating from the true language for any sublinear context. For the \emph{coloring broadcast process} (a hard-constrained language) in the freezing regime, bounded-context autoregression produces sequences that, with high probability, are inconsistent with \emph{any} valid coloring of the underlying tree. Together these results imply an $\Omega(n)$ lower bound on the context length required to faithfully sample length-$n$ sequences. In contrast, we prove that an autoregressive \emph{reasoning} model with only $\Theta(\log n)$ working memory can sample exactly from the true language -- an exponential improvement. We confirm both the lower-bound predictions and the reasoning-based upper bound empirically with transformers trained on the synthetic language; the trained models track our asymptotic predictions quantitatively across a wide range of context sizes.

Stress-Testing the Reasoning Competence of LLMs With Proofs Under Minimal Formalism

High 2605.12524
Konstantine Arkoudas, Serafim Batzoglou
arXiv PDF cs.LO
TL;DR：提出 ProofGrid 基准，通过机器可验证的证明评估 LLM 推理能力，发现前沿模型在基础任务上表现良好，但在全局组合推理和底层证明合成任务上仍远未解决。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 推理评估多依赖最终答案或人类 /LLM 评判，缺乏机械可重复、细粒度的验证方法，难以准确衡量模型的真实推理能力。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个基于机器可验证证明的基准，以机械、可重复、细粒度的方式评估 LLM 的推理能力，并揭示其当前局限。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到前沿模型在基础推理任务上表现良好，但在需要全局组合推理或底层证明合成的困难任务上仍远未解决；还发现认知不稳定性，即模型生成有缺陷的证明却能正确拒绝这些局部推理。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ProofGrid 基准，包含 15 个任务（证明写作、检查、掩码、填空），使用最小形式化符号（NDL）和仪器化证明检查管道，容忍表面偏差并定位首次实质性推理失败。

📊实验结果

评估了多种开源和专有模型，结果显示前沿模型在基础任务上表现良好，但困难任务仍远未解决。摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入 ProofGrid 基准，通过机器可验证的证明实现机械、可重复、细粒度的 LLM 推理评估。
  • 开发仪器化证明检查管道，提高测量分辨率，分离证明规划与低级执行噪声。
  • 提出认知稳定性指数（Epistemic Stability Index）来形式化模型推理的不稳定性。
  • 建立推理基准的比较框架，并利用 2PL IRT 分析、Wright 图和 Fisher 信息归一化任务区分度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准任务可能无法覆盖所有推理类型，如非形式化推理。
  • NDL 符号可能对某些模型不友好，影响评估公平性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce ProofGrid, a benchmark suite for evaluating LLM reasoning through machine-checkable proofs rather than final answers alone. ProofGrid contains 15 tasks spanning proof writing, proof checking, proof masking, and proof gap-filling. Tasks are expressed in minimal formal notation, especially NDL, a compact natural-deduction language that fits in short prompts and supports precise, auditable verification. This yields mechanical, reproducible, and fine-grained evaluation rather than judgments by humans or LLMs. ProofGrid covers a calibrated difficulty spectrum, from foundational reasoning tests to structurally rich challenge tasks that no current model solves, while minimizing reliance on domain knowledge, solver delegation, and long-context artifacts. We also develop a comparative framework for reasoning benchmarks and use it to situate ProofGrid relative to existing work in terms of representation, verification guarantees, and reasoning depth. Methodologically, we introduce an instrumented proof-checking pipeline that tolerates minor surface deviations while locating the first substantive reasoning failure, improving measurement resolution and separating proof planning from low-level execution noise. Using this pipeline, we evaluate a broad range of open and proprietary models. Results show rapid progress but substantial remaining limits: frontier models perform well on several foundational tasks, yet difficult tasks, especially those requiring global combinatorial reasoning or low-level proof synthesis, remain far from solved. We also identify epistemic instability, where models generate flawed proofs yet correctly reject those local inferences in isolation, and formalize this with an Epistemic Stability Index. Finally, we complement accuracy with 2PL IRT analyses, Wright maps, and a normalized task-discrimination measure based on Fisher information.

Correct Answers from Sound Reasoning: Verifiable Process Supervision for Language Models

High 2605.12519
Kyuyoung Kim, Kevin Wang, Yunfei Xie, Peiyang Xu, Peiyao Sheng, Chen Wei, Zhangyang Wang, Jinwoo Shin et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出可验证过程监督（VPS）框架，通过结构化推理格式和自适应奖励加权，在保持准确率的同时显著提升语言模型的推理质量。
🎯研究动机

现有强化学习仅优化最终结果，导致任务准确率提升但推理质量下降（如内部不一致、不完整），亟需一种能同时优化答案正确性和推理过程的方法。

❓解决问题

如何训练语言模型在可验证领域中既产生正确答案又保持推理的准确性和完整性。

🔎现象分析

仅优化准确率的 RL 会严重损害推理质量：胜率误差增加 112%，内部一致性降低 69%；模型会收敛到预算依赖的捷径而非多步推理。

🛠️主要方法

可验证过程监督（VPS）：先通过监督微调诱导结构化推理格式，提取中间声明并与真实信号对比形成过程级奖励；再引入自适应奖励加权，优先关注剩余误差最大的子任务，形成隐式课程。

📊实验结果

在国际象棋控制测试床上评估，使用引擎信号确定性验证推理步骤；比较 VPS 与仅优化准确率的 RL，并进行了推理空间分析和人工评估。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 VPS 框架，联合优化预测准确率和推理质量，在可验证领域实现准确且可靠的推理。
  • 通过国际象棋实验证明，VPS 在保持准确率的同时显著提升推理质量（胜率误差降低 30%，一致性接近饱和），而仅优化准确率的 RL 会严重退化推理。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖可验证领域（如国际象棋），泛化到更开放或主观的推理任务可能受限。
  • 结构化推理格式的诱导需要额外监督微调，可能增加训练成本。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Training language models to produce both correct answers and sound reasoning remains an open challenge. Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards typically optimizes only final outcomes, which can lead to a failure mode where task accuracy improves while reasoning becomes less accurate, less complete, or even internally inconsistent. We propose verifiable process supervision (VPS), a post-training framework for verifiable domains that jointly optimizes prediction accuracy and reasoning quality. We first apply supervised fine-tuning to induce a structured reasoning format, enabling syntactic extraction of intermediate claims that are evaluated against ground-truth signals to form process-level rewards. To address the heterogeneous difficulty of reasoning subtasks, we introduce adaptive reward weighting that prioritizes components with the largest remaining errors, creating an implicit curriculum. We evaluate VPS on chess, a controlled testbed where reasoning steps can be deterministically verified against engine signals. While accuracy-only RL improves move accuracy, it sharply degrades reasoning quality, increasing win-rate error by up to 112% and reducing internal consistency by up to 69%. In contrast, VPS preserves accuracy while significantly improving reasoning quality, reducing win-rate error by up to 30% and restoring consistency to near saturation. At matched accuracy, judge evaluation also prefers the process-supervised models. A reasoning-space analysis further shows that, without a structured prior, accuracy-only RL converges to budget-dependent shortcuts rather than sound multi-step reasoning. These results show that VPS enables language models to reason both accurately and reliably in verifiable domains.

What properties of reasoning supervision are associated with improved downstream model quality?

Medium 2605.13290
Mikołaj Langner, Dzmitry Pihulski, Jan Eliasz, Michał Rajkowski, Przemysław Kazienko, Maciej Piasecki, Jan Kocoń, Teddy Ferdinan
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一套内在数据指标，可在训练前预测推理数据集对下游模型质量的影响，并发现预测因素具有规模依赖性。
🎯研究动机

验证推理模型的训练数据通常需要昂贵的试错微调周期，缺乏在训练前可靠评估数据效用的方法。

❓解决问题

如何在不进行完整微调的情况下，利用内在数据指标预测推理数据集对下游模型性能的效用。

🔎现象分析

内在指标与下游性能显著相关；预测因素具有规模依赖性：小模型依赖对齐指标确保精度，大模型受益于高冗余（冗长轨迹）以解决复杂任务。

🛠️主要方法

提出一套定量内在指标，通过在波兰语推理数据集的语义不同变体上微调 8B 和 11B 模型，评估这些指标与下游性能的相关性。

📊实验结果

在 8B 和 11B 模型上使用波兰语推理数据集的语义不同变体进行微调，评估内在指标与下游性能的相关性。摘要未提供具体实验结果数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一套可预测推理数据集效用的内在数据指标。
  • 揭示预测因素的规模依赖性，建立规模感知的推理数据验证框架。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅在波兰语数据集上进行，可能不适用于其他语言或领域。
  • 仅测试了 8B 和 11B 两种规模，更广泛规模下的规律有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Validating training data for reasoning models typically requires expensive trial-and-error fine-tuning cycles. In this work, we investigate whether the utility of a reasoning dataset can be reliably predicted prior to training using intrinsic data metrics. We propose a suite of quantitative measures and evaluate their predictive power by fine-tuning 8B and 11B models on semantically distinct variants of a Polish reasoning dataset. Our analysis reveals that these intrinsic metrics demonstrate strong and significant correlations with downstream model performance. Crucially, we find that the predictors of utility are scale-dependent: smaller models rely on alignment-focused metrics to ensure precision, whereas larger models benefit from high redundancy, utilizing verbose traces to solve complex tasks. These findings establish a scale-aware framework for validating reasoning data, enabling practitioners to select effective training sets without the need for exhaustive empirical testing.

CHAL: Council of Hierarchical Agentic Language

Medium 2605.12718
Tommaso Giovannelli, Griffin D. Kent
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 CHAL 框架，将多智能体辩论视为结构化信念优化，适用于可废止领域。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 多智能体辩论方法存在结构局限：辩论导致信念轨迹鞅性质、多数投票主导收益、置信度升级而非校准，且主要适用于真实任务，未充分利用可废止领域的潜力。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个多智能体辩论框架，使其在可废止领域（而非真实任务）中有效优化信念，并产生可审计的信念制品。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出当前辩论方法中，辩论倾向于产生信念轨迹的鞅、多数投票解释大部分收益、LLM 置信度随轮次升级而非校准。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CHAL 框架，每个智能体维护 CHAL 信念模式（CBS），一种图结构信念表示，通过梯度信息动态机制利用信念论点的可微目标进行信念修订；元认知价值系统（认识论、逻辑、伦理）作为可配置超参数。

📊实验结果

摘要提供了一系列消融实验，显示裁决者价值系统决定信念空间轨迹、委员会多样性细化信念、框架跨领域泛化，但未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个将多智能体辩论视为可废止领域结构化信念优化的框架
  • 提出 CBS 信念表示和梯度驱动的信念修订机制
  • 将元认知价值系统作为可配置超参数，影响辩论轨迹和裁决
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未提及在真实任务上的性能对比
  • 可废止领域的评估标准尚需建立
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multi-agent debate has emerged as a promising approach for improving LLM reasoning on ground-truth tasks, yet current methodologies face certain structural limitations: debate tends to induce a martingale over belief trajectories, majority voting accounts for most observed gains, and LLMs exhibit confidence escalation rather than calibration across rounds. We argue that the genuine value of debate, and dialectic systems as a whole, lies not in ground-truth tasks but in defeasible domains, where every position can in principle be defeated by better reasoning. We present the Council of Hierarchical Agentic Language (CHAL), a multi-agent dialectic framework that treats defeasible argumentation as an engine for belief optimization. Each agent maintains a CHAL Belief Schema (CBS), a graph-structured belief representation with a Bayesian-inspired architecture, that facilitates belief revision through a gradient-informed dynamic mechanism by leveraging the strength of the belief's thesis as a differentiable objective. Meta-cognitive value systems spanning epistemology, logic, and ethics are elevated to configurable hyperparameters governing agent reasoning and adjudication outcomes. We provide a series of ablation experiments that demonstrate systematic and interpretable effects: the adjudicator's value system determines the debate's overall trajectories in latent belief space, council diversity refines beliefs for all participants, and the framework generalizes across broad fields. CHAL is, to our knowledge, the first framework to treat multi-agent debate as structured belief optimization over defeasible domains. Further, the auditable belief artifacts it produces establish the foundation for dedicated evaluation suites for defeasible argumentation, with broader implications for building AI systems whose reasoning and value commitments are transparent, aligned, and subject to human oversight.

BoostTaxo: Zero-Shot Taxonomy Induction via Boosting-Style Agentic Reasoning and Constraint-Aware Calibration

Medium 2605.12520
Yancheng Ling, Zhenlin Qin, Leizhen Wang, Zhenliang Ma
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：BoostTaxo 通过增强式代理推理和约束感知校准，在零样本场景下高效构建高质量分类体系。
🎯研究动机

现有分类体系归纳方法在泛化性、结构可靠性和效率方面存在局限，难以应对零样本和大规模场景。

❓解决问题

零样本分类体系归纳中，如何高效且可靠地从领域术语集合中识别父节点并构建层次结构。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 BoostTaxo，采用增强式 LLM 框架，通过检索增强定义精炼、混合父候选选择、候选评分和结构感知分数校准，以粗到细的方式识别父节点。

📊实验结果

在 WordNet、DBLP 和 SemEval-Sci 三个基准数据集上评估，达到与最先进方法相当或更优的性能；消融实验验证了混合父候选选择和结构感知分数校准的贡献。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种增强式 LLM 框架 BoostTaxo，用于零样本分类体系归纳。
  • 设计了混合父候选选择和结构感知分数校准策略，提升归纳质量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 LLM 的推理能力，在低资源语言或领域上效果未知。
  • 候选选择大小对质量有影响，需要进一步调优。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Taxonomy induction is crucial for organizing concepts into explicit and interpretable semantic hierarchies. While existing methods have achieved promising results, their generalization, structural reliability, and efficiency remain limited, hindering their performance in zero-shot and large-scale scenarios. To overcome these limitations, we introduce BoostTaxo, a boosting-style LLM framework for zero-shot taxonomy induction. It takes a set of domain terms as inputs and performs parent identification in a coarse-to-fine manner, employing retrieval-augmented definition refinement, hybrid parent candidate selection, candidate rating, and structure-aware score calibration to improve taxonomy construction. Specifically, a lightweight LLM is used to efficiently filter candidate parents, while a large-scale LLM is employed to rank and score candidate parents for fine-grained parent selection. Structural features are further incorporated to calibrate candidate edge weights and enhance the reliability of the induced taxonomy. The unified BoostTaxo is evaluated on three public benchmark datasets, namely WordNet, DBLP, and SemEval-Sci, and achieves superior or comparable performance to state-of-the-art methods in zero-shot taxonomy induction. The ablation study validates the contribution of the hybrid parent candidate selection and the structure-aware score calibration to the overall performance. Further analysis investigates the impact of candidate selection size on taxonomy quality and presents representative case and failure studies, providing deeper insights into the effectiveness and limitations of the proposed framework.

指令微调与对齐 11 篇

Data Difficulty and the Generalization--Extrapolation Tradeoff in LLM Fine-Tuning

High 2605.12906
Siyuan Liu (IIIS, Tsinghua University), Tinghong Chen (College of AI, Tsinghua University and Shanghai Qi Zhi Institute), Xinghan Li (IIIS, Tsinghua University), Yifei Wang (Amazon AGI SF Lab), Jingzhao Zhang (IIIS et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：LLM 微调中数据难度与数据量共同影响泛化与外推的权衡，存在最优难度且随数据量增加向更难数据偏移。
🎯研究动机

现有基于困惑度、难度等启发式的数据选择方法结论不一致且依赖上下文，缺乏对数据难度在微调中作用的系统理解。

❓解决问题

揭示监督微调中数据难度与数据量如何共同影响模型性能，并解释最优难度随数据量变化的现象。

🔎现象分析

固定数据预算下存在最优数据难度，且该最优难度随数据预算增加向更难数据偏移；该现象由泛化差距与外推差距的相互作用驱动。

🛠️主要方法

通过控制合成实验和 PAC-Bayesian 泛化界理论分析，揭示泛化差距与外推差距的权衡机制。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统研究了数据难度在 SFT 中的作用，发现最优难度随数据量变化。
  • 通过合成实验和理论分析揭示了泛化差距与外推差距的权衡机制。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论分析基于 PAC-Bayesian 界，可能对实际复杂模型适用性有限。
  • 结论可能依赖于特定模型和数据条件。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Data selection during supervised fine-tuning (SFT) can critically change the behavior of large language models (LLMs). Although existing work has studied the effect of selecting data based on heuristics such as perplexity, difficulty, or length, the reported findings are often inconsistent or context-dependent. In this work, we systematically study the role of data difficulty in fine-tuning from both empirical and theoretical perspectives, and find that there is no universally optimal difficulty level; rather, its effectiveness depends on the dataset size. We show that for a fixed data budget, there exists an optimal data difficulty for SFT, and that this optimal difficulty shifts toward harder data as the data budget increases. To explain this phenomenon, we conduct controlled synthetic experiments that reveal a simple underlying mechanism: the interplay between the (in-distribution) generalization gap and the extrapolation gap. We further support this mechanism through a theoretical analysis using PAC-Bayesian generalization bounds. Overall, our results clarify how data size and difficulty jointly affect the trade-off between generalization and extrapolation in SFT, providing guidance for difficulty-based data selection under certain model and data conditions.

Context Training with Active Information Seeking

High 2605.13050
Zeyu Huang, Adhiguna Kuncoro, Qixuan Feng, Jiajun Shen, Lucio Dery, Arthur Szlam, Marc'Aurelio Ranzato
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：通过主动信息搜索增强上下文优化，提升 LLM 在下游任务中的适应能力。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 部署后适应新任务成本高，上下文优化方法依赖模型固有知识，缺乏外部信息获取能力。

❓解决问题

如何有效整合外部搜索工具到上下文优化流程中，避免性能退化，并提升模型在低资源、健康、推理等任务上的表现。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，简单地将搜索工具加入标准顺序上下文优化流程会导致性能下降，而结合搜索训练过程（维护和剪枝多个候选上下文）则能带来一致且显著的提升。

🛠️主要方法

提出一种基于搜索的训练过程，在上下文优化中维护多个候选上下文并动态剪枝，同时集成 Wikipedia 搜索和浏览器工具进行主动信息获取。

📊实验结果

在 Flores+（低资源翻译）、HealthBench（健康场景）、LiveCodeBench 和 Humanity's Last Exam（推理任务）上评估，显示方法数据高效、超参数鲁棒，且生成的上下文可跨模型泛化。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将主动信息搜索工具（Wikipedia 搜索和浏览器）集成到上下文优化中，并揭示简单集成会导致性能退化。
  • 提出搜索训练过程，通过维护和剪枝多个候选上下文，实现主动信息搜索的一致增益。
  • 在低资源翻译、健康场景和推理任务上验证了方法的有效性、数据效率和跨模型泛化能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖外部搜索工具的质量和可用性。
  • 可能增加推理时的计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Most existing large language models (LLMs) are expensive to adapt after deployment, especially when a task requires newly produced information or niche domain knowledge. Recent work has shown that, by manipulating and optimizing their context, LLMs can be tailored to downstream tasks without updating their weights. However, most existing methods remain closed-loop, relying solely on the model's intrinsic knowledge. In this paper, we equip these context optimizers with Wikipedia search and browser tools for active information seeking. We show that naively adding these tools to a standard sequential context optimization pipeline can actually degrade performance compared to baselines. However, when paired with a search-based training procedure that maintains and prunes multiple candidate contexts, active information seeking delivers consistent and substantial gains. We demonstrate these improvements across diverse domains, including low-resource translation (Flores+), health scenarios (HealthBench), and reasoning-heavy tasks (LiveCodeBench and Humanity's Last Exam). Furthermore, our method proves to be data-efficient, robust across different hyperparameters, and capable of generating effective textual contexts that generalize well across different models.

GRACE: Gradient-aligned Reasoning Data Curation for Efficient Post-training

High 2605.13130
Junjie Li, Ziao Wang, NingXuan Ma, Jianghong Ma, Xiaofeng Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：GRACE 通过梯度对齐的步骤级评分，仅用 5% 数据即可达到全量数据性能，实现高效推理数据筛选。
🎯研究动机

现有推理数据筛选方法对整条轨迹统一评分，忽略了中间步骤的价值差异，导致数据利用效率低。

❓解决问题

如何根据步骤对最终答案的贡献差异，从推理轨迹中高效筛选出最有价值的子集。

🔎现象分析

推理轨迹中不同步骤对最终答案的贡献极不均匀，需要步骤级评估。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GRACE，将每条推理轨迹视为优化事件序列，利用与答案梯度方向的对齐度和与前序轨迹的一致性两个信号对每个步骤评分，再聚合为样本级分数进行子集选择；通过表示级梯度代理实现单次前向传播的步骤级对齐估计。

📊实验结果

在 Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct 上使用 MMathCoT-1M 进行后训练，20% 数据达到全量性能的 108.8%，5% 数据保留 100.2% 性能，且子集可跨骨干模型迁移。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出步骤级梯度对齐评分方法，无需外部奖励模型或步骤标注。
  • 引入表示级梯度代理，实现可扩展的步骤级对齐估计。
  • 实验证明仅用 5% 数据即可达到全量数据性能，且子集可跨模型迁移。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖模型内部梯度信号，可能受梯度噪声影响。
  • 仅验证了视觉 - 语言模型，未在纯文本或更大规模模型上测试。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing reasoning data curation pipelines score whole samples, treating every intermediate step as equally valuable. In reality, steps within a trace contribute very unevenly, and selecting reasoning data well requires assessing them individually. We present GRACE, a gradient-aligned curation method that views each reasoning trace as a sequence of optimization events and scores every step by two complementary signals: its alignment with the answer-oriented gradient direction, and its consistency with the preceding reasoning trajectory. Step-level scores are aggregated into a sample-level value for subset selection, using only the model's internal optimization signals and no external reward models or step annotations. To make this scalable, GRACE introduces a representation-level gradient proxy that estimates step-level alignment from token-level upstream signals in a single forward pass. Post-training Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct on MMathCoT-1M, GRACE reaches 108.8% of the full-data performance with 20% of the data and retains 100.2% with only 5%, with subsets that transfer effectively across model backbones.

Teacher-Guided Policy Optimization for LLM Distillation

High 2605.13230
Xinyu Liu, Kechen Jiao, Chunyang Xiao, Runsong Zhao, Junhao Ruan, Bei Li, Jiahao Liu, Qifan Wang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 TGPO 算法，通过教师条件预测提供密集方向性指导，解决反向 KL 在师生分布差异大时反馈无效的问题。
🎯研究动机

反向 KL（RKL）作为在线策略 LLM 蒸馏的范式，旨在统一探索与教师监督，但当学生与教师分布差异显著时，标准 RKL 因无信息负反馈而无法带来有意义的改进。

❓解决问题

解决标准反向 KL 在师生分布差异大时反馈无效、蒸馏效率低下的问题。

🔎现象分析

当学生与教师分布差异显著时，标准 RKL 的负反馈无信息量，导致改进停滞。

🛠️主要方法

提出教师引导策略优化（TGPO），一种在线策略算法，通过利用学生 rollout 条件下的教师预测提供密集方向性指导。

📊实验结果

在复杂推理基准上，TGPO 显著优于标准基线，且对不同教师具有鲁棒性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别了标准反向 KL 在 LLM 蒸馏中因分布差异大而反馈无效的局限性。
  • 提出 TGPO 算法，集成密集方向性指导，无需额外数据标注即可与现有 RLVR 框架无缝结合。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖教师模型质量，弱教师可能限制提升。
  • 在线策略训练计算成本较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The convergence of reinforcement learning and imitation learning has positioned Reverse KL (RKL) as a promising paradigm for on-policy LLM distillation, aiming to unify exploration with teacher supervision. However, we identify a critical limitation: when the student and teacher distributions diverge significantly, standard RKL often fails to yield meaningful improvement due to uninformative negative feedback. To address this inefficiency, we propose Teacher-Guided Policy Optimization (TGPO), an on-policy algorithm that incorporates dense directional guidance by leveraging teacher predictions conditioned on the student's rollout. Because TGPO remains on-policy, the algorithm integrates seamlessly with existing RLVR frameworks without requiring additional data annotation. Experiments on complex reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TGPO significantly outperforms standard baselines and is robust to different teachers.

RTLC -- Research, Teach-to-Learn, Critique: A three-stage prompting paradigm inspired by the Feynman Learning Technique that lifts LLM-as-judge accuracy on JudgeBench with no fine-tuning

High 2605.13695
Andrea Morandi
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：受费曼学习法启发的三阶段提示策略 RTLC，无需微调即可显著提升 LLM-as-judge 的成对准确率。
🎯研究动机

LLM-as-judge 已成为开放生成任务的标准评估工具，但在 JudgeBench 等基准上，即使强指令微调模型在客观正确性成对比较中也仅略高于随机水平，亟需提升其判断准确性。

❓解决问题

如何在不进行微调、不使用检索或外部工具的情况下，提升 LLM 作为评判者的成对比较准确率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 RTLC 三阶段提示范式：阶段 1 将输入包装在固定教学框架中，移植费曼学习法（研究→教学→找差距→简化）；阶段 2 以温度 0.4 独立采样 N=10 个候选判决；阶段 3 作为自身批评者，交叉比较候选集与原始问题，以温度 0 输出一个经过批评的判决。

📊实验结果

在 JudgeBench-GPT（350 个困难成对项目）上评估，Claude 3.7 Sonnet 的成对准确率从 64.6%（单次 vanilla 提示）提升至 78.6%（RTLC 批评 -10），并对比了自一致性多数投票（77.7%）和零样本首次候选（74.0%）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 RTLC，一种无需微调、检索或外部工具的三阶段提示策略，将单个黑盒 LLM 提升为集成思维评判者。
  • 在 JudgeBench-GPT 上，Claude 3.7 Sonnet 的成对准确率从 64.6% 提升至 78.6%，绝对增益 14.0 个百分点，并超越自一致性多数投票。
  • 通过三步骤消融实验量化了各阶段贡献：教学框架 +9.4pp，N=10 边际化 +3.7pp，显式批评 +0.9pp。
  • 讨论了成本 - 准确率前沿、错误预算分解以及与事后校准的正交组合效果。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于单一模型（Claude 3.7 Sonnet）和单一基准（JudgeBench-GPT）验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
  • 三阶段提示增加了推理成本，可能不适用于对延迟敏感的场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LLM-as-a-judge is now the default measurement instrument for open-ended generation, but on the public JudgeBench benchmark even strong instruction-tuned judges barely scrape past random on objective-correctness pairwise items. We introduce RTLC, a three-stage prompting recipe -- Research, Teach-to-Learn, Critique -- that promotes a single black-box LLM into an ensemble-of-thought judge with no fine-tuning, retrieval, or external tools. Stage 1 wraps the input in a fixed pedagogical scaffold porting the Feynman Learning Technique (study $\to$ teach $\to$ find gaps $\to$ simplify) into LLM prompting. Stage 2 draws N=10 independent candidate verdicts at temperature 0.4. Stage 3 acts as its own critic, cross-comparing the candidate set against the original question to emit one critiqued verdict at temperature 0. On JudgeBench-GPT (350 hard pairwise items), Claude 3.7 Sonnet's pairwise accuracy climbs from 64.6% (single-shot vanilla prompt) to 78.6% (RTLC critique-of-10) -- an absolute 14.0-percentage-point gain. RTLC also beats N=10 self-consistency majority voting (77.7%) and a zero-shot first candidate (74.0%). A clean three-step ablation attributes +9.4 pp to the Teach-to-Learn scaffold, +3.7 pp to N=10 marginalisation, and +0.9 pp to explicit critique. We discuss the cost-accuracy frontier (RTLC sits above self-consistency at every working point), the error-budget breakdown across the four JudgeBench categories (knowledge, reasoning, math, coding), and how RTLC composes orthogonally with post-hoc judge-score calibration, with the two interventions compounding multiplicatively in practice.

Training LLMs with Reinforcement Learning for Intent-Aware Personalized Question Answering

High 2605.12645
Maryam Amirizaniani, Benjamin Charles Germain Lee, Jevin West, Nicholas Weber
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出 IAP 框架，用强化学习训练 LLM 在单轮问答中推断用户隐式意图并生成个性化回答。
🎯研究动机

现有意图感知个性化问答依赖多轮对话或丰富用户画像，未在推理过程中显式建模用户意图，限制了单轮场景下的效果。

❓解决问题

如何在单轮问答中从有限输入推断用户隐式意图，并将其融入推理过程以生成个性化回答。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 IAP 框架，使用强化学习训练模型，通过标签模式在思考步骤中显式建模隐式意图，并基于个性化奖励函数优化意图感知的回答轨迹。

📊实验结果

在 LaMP-QA 基准上，使用六个模型进行实验，IAP 平均宏分数比最强基线高约 7.5%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 IAP 框架，将隐式意图建模融入 LLM 推理过程，实现单轮个性化问答。
  • 在 LaMP-QA 基准上，IAP 在六个模型上平均宏分数提升约 7.5%，优于所有基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定标签模式，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 单轮场景假设可能限制在复杂多轮对话中的应用。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Effective personalized question answering (PQA) in language models requires grounding responses in the user's underlying intent, where intent refers to the implicit ``why'' behind a query beyond its explicit wording. However, existing approaches to intent-aware personalization rely on multi-turn conversational context or rich user profiles, and do not explicitly model user intent during the reasoning process. This limits their effectiveness in single-turn settings, where the user's latent goal must be inferred from minimal input and integrated into the thinking and reasoning process. To bridge this gap, we propose IAP (Intent-Aware Personalization), a reinforcement learning framework that trains models to infer implicit user intent directly from a single-turn question and incorporate it into thinking steps through a tag-based schema for generating personalized, intent-grounded answers. By optimizing intent-aware answer trajectories under a personalized reward function, IAP reinforces generation paths that make implicit user intent explicit and produce responses that better align with the user's underlying goal. Through experiments on the LaMP-QA benchmark across six models, IAP consistently outperforms all baselines, achieving an average macro-score gain of around 7.5\% over the strongest competitor, demonstrating that modeling implicit user intent within the training objective is a promising direction for PQA.

Multi-Rollout On-Policy Distillation via Peer Successes and Failures

High 2605.12652
Weichen Yu, Xiaomin Li, Yizhou Zhao, Xiaoze Liu, Ruowang Zhang, Haixin Wang, Yinyi Luo, Chen Henry Wu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：利用同一提示的多次学生采样结果（成功与失败）构建更丰富的教师信号，提升在线策略蒸馏效果。
🎯研究动机

大语言模型后训练常依赖稀疏的验证器奖励，难以提供细粒度推理指导；现有在线策略蒸馏（OPD）独立处理每次采样，忽略了同一提示下多次尝试间的信息。

❓解决问题

如何利用学生模型在同一提示下的多次采样（包括成功和失败）来构造更有效的教师信号，以改进在线策略蒸馏。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出多采样在线策略蒸馏（MOPD），以学生同一提示的多次采样作为局部组，构造同伴条件教师信号：包括正向同伴模仿和对比成功 - 失败条件两种方式，教师根据成功和失败采样提供更丰富的监督。

📊实验结果

在竞争性编程、数学推理、科学问答和工具使用基准上进行了实验，MOPD 一致优于标准在线策略基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MOPD 框架，利用学生多次采样的成功与失败信息改进在线策略蒸馏。
  • 在编程、数学推理、科学问答和工具使用基准上验证了 MOPD 优于标准在线策略基线。
  • 分析表明混合成功 - 失败上下文使教师分数与验证器奖励更对齐，提升监督的忠实性和自适应性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖多次采样，增加计算开销。
  • 同伴条件构造方式可能需针对不同任务调整。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models are often post-trained with sparse verifier rewards, which indicate whether a sampled trajectory succeeds but provide limited guidance about where reasoning succeeds or fails. On-policy distillation (OPD) offers denser token-level supervision by training on student-generated trajectories, yet existing methods typically distill each rollout independently and ignore the other attempts sampled for the same prompt. We introduce Multi-Rollout On-Policy Distillation (MOPD), a peer-conditioned distillation framework that uses the student's local rollout group to construct more informative teacher signals. MOPD conditions the teacher on both successful and failed peer rollouts: successes provide positive evidence for valid reasoning patterns, while failures provide structured negative evidence about plausible mistakes to avoid. We study two peer-context constructions: positive peer imitation and contrastive success-failure conditioning. Experiments on competitive programming, mathematical reasoning, scientific question answering, and tool-use benchmarks show that MOPD consistently improves over standard on-policy baselines. Further teacher-signal analysis shows that mixed success-failure contexts better align teacher scores with verifier rewards, indicating that the gains arise from more faithful, instance-adaptive supervision. These results indicate that effective on-policy distillation should exploit the student's multi-rollout trial-and-error behavior rather than treating rollouts as isolated samples.

Learning Transferable Latent User Preferences for Human-Aligned Decision Making

High 2605.12682
Alina Hyk, Sandhya Saisubramanian
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 CLIPR 框架，通过对话学习可迁移的潜在用户偏好规则，提升 LLM 决策与人类对齐。
🎯研究动机

LLM 在推理任务中常产生与人类不一致的解决方案，现有方法依赖大量用户交互或无法跨任务泛化潜在偏好，限制了实际应用。

❓解决问题

如何从有限交互中学习可迁移的潜在用户偏好，以指导 LLM 在模糊情境下做出与人类对齐的决策。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

CLIPR 框架：通过对话学习可迁移的自然语言规则表示潜在偏好，利用自适应反馈迭代优化，并应用于分布内和分布外的模糊任务。

📊实验结果

在三个数据集和一项用户研究上评估，CLIPR 持续优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CLIPR 框架，从最小对话输入中学习可迁移的潜在用户偏好规则。
  • 在多个数据集和用户研究中验证了 CLIPR 在提升对齐性和降低推理成本方面的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖对话质量，对初始交互设计敏感。
  • 规则的可迁移性在极端分布偏移下可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as reasoning modules in many applications. While they are efficient in certain tasks, LLMs often struggle to produce human-aligned solutions. Human-aligned decision making requires accounting for both explicitly stated goals and latent user preferences that shape how ambiguous situations should be resolved. Existing approaches to incorporating such preferences either rely on extensive and repeated user interactions or fail to generalize latent preferences across tasks and contexts, limiting their practical applicability. We consider a setting in which an LLM is used for high-level reasoning and is responsible for inferring latent user preferences from limited interactions, which guides downstream decision making. We introduce CLIPR (Conversational Learning for Inferring Preferences and Reasoning), a framework that learns actionable, transferable natural language rules that represent latent user preferences from minimal conversational input. These rules are iteratively refined through adaptive feedback and applied to both in-distribution and out-of-distribution ambiguous tasks across multiple environments. Evaluations on three datasets and a user study show that CLIPR consistently outperforms existing methods in improving alignment and reducing inference costs.

AcquisitionSynthesis: Targeted Data Generation using Acquisition Functions

Medium 2605.13149
Ishika Agarwal, Sofia Stoica, Emre Can Acikgoz, Pradeep Natarajan, Mahdi Namazifar, Jiaqi Ma, Dilek Hakkani-Tür
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：利用主动学习中的采集函数作为奖励模型，训练语言模型生成更高质量的训练数据。
🎯研究动机

数据质量是模型性能的关键瓶颈，现有数据生成方法（如拒绝采样、依赖大模型）缺乏定量评估生成样本对下游学习器影响的指标。

❓解决问题

如何定量地指导合成数据生成，使其对下游模型训练更有价值。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AcquisitionSynthesis，使用主动学习中的采集函数作为奖励模型，训练语言模型生成高质量合成数据。

📊实验结果

在数学、医学问答和编程等可验证任务上进行实验，学生模型在分布内任务上获得 2-7% 提升，且对灾难性遗忘更鲁棒。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种基于采集函数奖励的合成数据生成方法，实现模型感知的数据自改进。
  • 在数学、医学问答和编程任务上验证了方法有效性，学生模型在分布内任务上获得 2-7% 提升，且对灾难性遗忘更鲁棒。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖任务的可验证性，对于开放生成任务适用性未知。
  • 采集函数的选择和计算开销可能成为瓶颈。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Data quality remains a critical bottleneck in developing capable, competitive models. Researchers have explored many ways to generate top quality samples. Some works rely on rejection sampling: generating lots of synthetic samples and filtering out low-quality samples. Other works rely on larger or closed-source models to extract model weaknesses, necessary skills, or a curriculum off of which to base data generation. These works have one common limitation: there is no quantitative approach to measure the impact of the generated samples on the downstream learner. Active learning literature provides exactly this, in the form of acquisition functions. Acquisition functions measure the informativeness and/or influence of data, providing interpretable, model-centric signals. Inspired by this, we propose AcquisitionSynthesis: using acquisition functions as reward models to train language models to generate higher-quality synthetic data. We conduct experiments on classic verifiable tasks of math, medical question-answering, and coding. Our experimental results indicate that (1) student models trained with AcquisitionSynthesis data achieve good performance on in-distribution tasks (2-7% gain) and is more robust to catastrophic forgetting, and (2) AcquisitionSynthesis models can generate data for other models and for low-to-high resource training paradigms. By leveraging acquisition rewards, we seek to demonstrate a principled path toward model-aware self-improvement that surpasses static datasets.

Improving Code Translation with Syntax-Guided and Semantic-aware Preference Optimization

Medium 2605.13229
Yuhan Wu, Huan Zhang, Wei Cheng, Chen Shen, Jingyue Yang, Wei Hu
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 CTO 方法，通过语法引导和语义感知偏好优化提升代码翻译的语法正确性与语义一致性。
🎯研究动机

LLM 在代码翻译中难以同时保证语法正确性和语义一致性，现有偏好学习方法依赖稀疏测试用例或限制性参考翻译，语义奖励不可靠。

❓解决问题

如何为代码翻译构建鲁棒的语义奖励，并与语法反馈统一优化，以提升翻译质量。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

通过对比学习训练跨语言语义模型直接评估源与翻译代码的功能等价性，将代码翻译建模为多目标优化问题，在直接偏好优化框架中统一鲁棒语义信号与编译器语法反馈。

📊实验结果

在 C++、Java 和 Python 翻译上，CTO 显著优于现有基线和替代偏好优化策略。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CTO 方法，结合语法引导和语义感知偏好优化提升代码翻译。
  • 通过对比学习训练跨语言语义模型，直接评估功能等价性。
  • 将代码翻译作为多目标优化问题，统一语义信号与语法反馈。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖编译器反馈，对无编译器的语言适用性有限。
  • 对比学习训练可能需要大量平行语料。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LLMs have shown immense potential for code translation, yet they often struggle to ensure both syntactic correctness and semantic consistency. While preference-based learning offers a promising alignment strategy, it is hindered by unreliable semantic rewards derived from sparse test cases or restrictive reference translations. We argue that a robust semantic reward for code translation must be derived directly from the source code. In this paper, we propose CTO to improve code translation with syntax-guided and semantic-aware preference optimization. Through contrastive learning, we train a cross-lingual semantic model to directly assess functional equivalence between source and translated code. By formulating code translation as a multi-objective optimization problem, this robust semantic signal is seamlessly unified with compiler-based syntactic feedback within the direct preference optimization framework. Extensive experiments on C++, Java, and Python translations demonstrate that CTO significantly outperforms existing baselines and alternative preference optimization strategies.

Domain Adaptation of Large Language Models for Polymer-Composite Additive Manufacturing Using Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Fine-Tuning

Medium 2605.12516
Saiful Islam Sagor, Tania Haghighi, Minhaj Nur Alam, Erina Baynojir Joyee
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：RAG 比微调更有效地将 LLM 适配到聚合物复合材料增材制造领域。
🎯研究动机

通用 LLM 在专业工程领域（如增材制造）因缺乏领域知识和结构化技术信息而难以生成可靠回答，亟需有效的领域适配策略。

❓解决问题

如何将基础 LLM 适配到增材制造领域，以提高专家级问答的准确性、相关性和可用性。

🔎现象分析

RAG 系统在准确性、相关性和总体偏好上显著优于基线，而基于原始领域文本的微调反而降低了性能。

🛠️主要方法

构建增材制造语料库，基于 LLaMA-3-8B 评估三种配置：预训练基线、RAG 系统（从向量数据库检索相关文档块）、以及微调模型。

📊实验结果

使用 200 个专家设计的增材制造问题，由机械工程专家评估准确性、相关性和总体偏好。RAG 在 75.5% 的问题上更准确，85.2% 被总体偏好，90.8% 更相关；微调仅在 5.6% 的问题上更准确，32.5% 更相关。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统比较了 RAG 和微调在专业工程领域 LLM 适配中的效果。
  • 构建了增材制造领域语料库和 200 个专家设计的问题集。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于 LLaMA-3-8B 模型，可能不适用于其他架构。
  • 微调仅使用原始文本，未探索指令微调或结构化数据微调。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

General-purpose large language models (LLMs) often struggle to generate reliable responses in specialized engineering domains due to limited domain grounding and insufficient exposure to structured technical knowledge. This study investigates practical strategies for adapting a foundation LLM to the additive manufacturing (AM) domain in order to improve answer accuracy, relevance, and usability for expert-level question answering. AM knowledge is distributed across heterogeneous sources such as academic literature, manufacturer documentation, technical standards, and procedural guides. Although general LLMs demonstrate strong linguistic capabilities, they frequently fail to retrieve and contextualize such domain-specific information. Two common approaches to address this limitation are domain-specific fine-tuning and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). We construct a curated AM corpus and evaluate three configurations based on LLaMA-3-8B: (1) the pretrained baseline model, (2) a RAG system that retrieves relevant document chunks from a vector database, and (3) a model fine-tuned on raw domain text. Performance is evaluated using 200 expert-designed AM questions assessed by mechanical engineering experts for accuracy, relevance, and overall preference. Results show that the RAG model consistently outperforms the baseline. Among the 200 questions, 75.5% of RAG responses are judged more accurate, 85.2% are preferred overall, and 90.8% are rated more relevant than baseline responses. In contrast, fine-tuning on raw AM text reduces performance, producing more accurate answers in only 5.6% of cases and more relevant answers in 32.5% of cases. These results indicate that retrieval-augmented approaches provide a more effective pathway for adapting LLMs to specialized engineering domains than naive fine-tuning on unstructured technical data.

模型架构 7 篇

When Attention Closes: How LLMs Lose the Thread in Multi-Turn Interaction

High 2605.12922
Vardhan Dongre, Joseph Hsieh, Viet Dac Lai, Seunghyun Yoon, Trung Bui, Dilek Hakkani-Tür
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出注意力通道关闭假说，解释 LLM 在多轮交互中丢失指令线索的机制，并引入目标可访问率（GAR）作为诊断工具。
🎯研究动机

大语言模型在单轮交互中能遵循复杂指令，但在长多轮交互中常丢失指令、角色和规则线索，已有行为测量但缺乏机制解释。

❓解决问题

解释 LLM 在多轮交互中丢失指令线索的机制，并量化注意力通道关闭对目标保持行为的影响。

🔎现象分析

目标定义 token 通过注意力变得不可访问，而目标相关信息可能残留在残差表示中；不同架构下注意力关闭导致定性不同的失败模式。

🛠️主要方法

提出目标可访问率（GAR）度量从生成 token 到任务定义目标 token 的注意力，结合滑动窗口消融和残差流探针分析注意力通道关闭的影响。

📊实验结果

在 Mistral 模型上进行因果消融，强制关闭注意力通道使 20 事实保持任务从近乎完美降至 11%，角色约束违反超过对抗压力基线；线性探针从残差表示恢复每轮召回结果，AUC 高达 0.99。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出通道转换框架作为多轮交互中指令丢失的受控机制解释
  • 引入 GAR 作为诊断注意力关闭的诊断工具
  • 跨架构和模型规模预测注意力窗口关闭下的失败时机
⚠️方法局限
  • 主要分析基于有限架构和任务，可能不覆盖所有 LLM 类型
  • GAR 诊断的有效性可能依赖于特定任务设置
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models can follow complex instructions in a single turn, yet over long multi-turn interactions they often lose the thread of instructions, persona, and rules. This degradation has been measured behaviorally but not mechanistically explained. We propose a channel-transition account: goal-defining tokens become less accessible through attention, while goal-related information may persist in residual representations. We introduce the Goal Accessibility Ratio (GAR), measuring attention from generated tokens to task-defining goal tokens, and combine it with sliding-window ablations and residual-stream probes. When attention to instructions closes, what survives reveals architecture. Across architectures, the transition yields qualitatively distinct failure modes: some models preserve goal-conditioned behavior at vanishing attention, others fail despite decodable residual goal information, and the layer at which this encoding emerges varies from 2 to 27. A within-model causal ablation that force-closes the attention channel in Mistral collapses recall from near-perfect to 11% on a 20-fact retention task and raises persona-constraint violations above an adversarial-pressure baseline without user pressure, with both effects emerging at the predictable crossover turn. Linear probes recover per-episode recall outcomes from residual representations with AUC up to 0.99 across all four primary architectures, while input embeddings remain at chance. Across architectures and model scales, the gap between attention loss and residual decodability predicts whether goal-conditioned behavior survives channel closure. We contribute GAR as a diagnostic, the channel-transition framework as a controlled mechanistic account, and a parametric prediction of failure timing under windowed attention closure.

Controlling Logical Collapse in LLMs via Algebraic Ontology Projection over F2

High 2605.12968
Hisashi Miyashita, Mgnite Inc
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出代数本体投影方法，在 F2 域上验证 LLM 隐藏状态的逻辑结构，发现系统提示与指令微调可防止后层逻辑坍塌。
🎯研究动机

大型语言模型是否在内部编码了可形式验证的代数结构？现有方法缺乏对 LLM 逻辑一致性的代数可验证性研究。

❓解决问题

如何将 LLM 隐藏状态投影到代数结构中以验证其逻辑一致性，并量化逻辑坍塌现象。

🔎现象分析

发现逻辑一致性在最后几层系统性地退化（后层坍塌），在 10 种条件中的 7 种出现；系统提示作为代数边界条件，只有与指令微调结合才能防止该现象。

🛠️主要方法

代数本体投影（AOP）：将 LLM 隐藏状态投影到伽罗瓦域 F2，在 Liskov 替换原则约束下，仅用 42 个关系对作为代数密钥。引入语义结晶（SC）指标量化 F2 约束满足度。

📊实验结果

在多个模型家族上测试零样本包含准确率，Gemma-2 Instruct 达到 93.33%，其他模型一致 86.67%。摘要未提供具体数据集或更多实验细节。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AOP 方法，实现零样本包含准确率最高 93.33%（Gemma-2 Instruct），跨模型家族一致 86.67%。
  • 发现后层坍塌现象，并证明系统提示与指令微调的组合可防止该现象。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅使用 42 个关系对，可能限制泛化性。
  • 依赖特定提示优化，未探索其他代数域。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Do large language models internally encode ontological relations in a formally verifiable algebraic structure? We introduce Algebraic Ontology Projection (AOP), which projects LLM hidden states into the Galois Field F2 under Liskov Substitution Principle constraints, using only 42 relational pairs as algebraic keys. AOP achieves up to 93.33% zero-shot inclusion accuracy on unseen concept pairs (Gemma-2 Instruct with optimized prompt), with consistent 86.67% accuracy observed across multiple model families -- with no model tuning, but through prompt alone. This algebraic structure is strongly layer-dependent. We introduce Semantic Crystallisation (SC), a metric that quantifies F2 constraint satisfaction relative to a random baseline and predicts zero-shot accuracy without held-out data. System prompts act as algebraic boundary conditions: only their combination with instruction tuning prevents Late-layer Collapse -- a systematic degradation of logical consistency in the final layers, observed in 7 of 10 conditions. These findings reframe forward computation as an iterative process of algebraic organisation, and open a path toward LLMs whose logical structure is not merely approximated, but formally accessible.

N-vium: Mixture-of-Exits Transformer for Accelerated Exact Generation

High 2605.13190
Aleksander Lorenc, Frédéric Berdoz, Joël Mathys, Roger Wattenhofer
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：N-vium 通过混合退出机制并行化深度计算，在不牺牲质量的前提下实现 1.5B 参数模型 57.9% 的加速。
🎯研究动机

自回归 Transformer 推理效率提升通常依赖近似方法降低每 token 计算量，但会损害模型质量。需要一种在不降低质量的前提下加速推理的方法。

❓解决问题

如何在保持生成质量的同时加速自回归 Transformer 的推理速度？

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 N-vium，一种混合退出（mixture-of-exits）Transformer，在多个深度附加预测头，将下一 token 分布定义为这些退出的学习混合，并采用 token 自适应路由。该公式严格推广了标准 Transformer，当路由将所有中间头权重置零时恢复为标准模型。采样是精确的，通过延迟上层计算并与后续 token 批处理来恢复完整 KV 缓存。

📊实验结果

在 1.5B 参数模型上，与参数和数据匹配的标准 Transformer 相比，达到 57.9% 的墙钟加速，且无困惑度损失。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 N-vium 架构，通过混合退出实现深度并行化，加速推理而不降低质量。
  • 在 1.5B 参数规模上预训练，实现 57.9% 的墙钟加速且无困惑度损失。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定架构或规模，未在更大模型上验证。
  • 加速效果可能依赖于硬件和批处理策略。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Improving the inference efficiency of autoregressive transformers typically means reducing FLOPs per token, usually through approximations that degrade model quality. We introduce N-vium, a mixture-of-exits transformer that partially parallelizes computation across depth on standard hardware, increasing effective FLOPs per second rather than minimizing compute per token. N-vium attaches prediction heads at multiple depths and defines the next-token distribution as a learned mixture over these exits, with token-adaptive routing. This formulation strictly generalizes the standard transformer, which is recovered exactly when routing assigns zero mass to all intermediate heads. Sampling from the mixture is exact, and complete KV caches are recovered by deferring the upper-layer computation and batching it with later tokens. We pretrain N-vium at scales up to 1.5B parameters. Our largest model reaches 57.9% wall-clock speedup over a parameter- and data-matched standard transformer at no perplexity cost.

Orthrus: Memory-Efficient Parallel Token Generation via Dual-View Diffusion

High 2605.12825
Chien Van Nguyen, Chaitra Hegde, Van Cuong Pham, Ryan A. Rossi, Franck Dernoncourt, Thien Huu Nguyen
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：Orthrus 通过双视图扩散框架实现无损并行生成，速度提升 7.8 倍且内存开销仅 O(1)。
🎯研究动机

自回归 LLM 的串行解码是高吞吐推理的瓶颈，而扩散语言模型并行生成存在性能退化、训练成本高且缺乏收敛保证的问题。

❓解决问题

如何在保持自回归模型生成保真度的同时，实现高效的并行 token 生成。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出双架构框架 Orthrus，在冻结的 LLM 上附加轻量可训练模块，创建并行扩散视图与标准自回归视图共享同一 KV 缓存，通过精确共识机制保证无损推理。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出双视图扩散框架，统一自回归保真度与扩散并行速度
  • 实现无损推理，速度提升 7.8 倍，内存开销 O(1)
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定模型架构
  • 未讨论训练成本细节
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce Orthrus, a simple and efficient dual-architecture framework that unifies the exact generation fidelity of autoregressive Large Language Models (LLMs) with the high-speed parallel token generation of diffusion models. The sequential nature of standard autoregressive decoding represents a fundamental bottleneck for high-throughput inference. While diffusion language models attempt to break this barrier via parallel generation, they suffer from significant performance degradation, high training costs, and a lack of rigorous convergence guarantees. Orthrus resolves this dichotomy natively. Designed to seamlessly integrate into existing Transformers, the framework augments a frozen LLM with a lightweight, trainable module to create a parallel diffusion view alongside the standard autoregressive view. In this unified system, both views attend to the exact same high-fidelity Key-Value (KV) cache; the autoregressive head executes context pre-filling to construct accurate KV representations, while the diffusion head executes parallel generation. By employing an exact consensus mechanism between the two views, Orthrus guarantees lossless inference, delivering up to a 7.8x speedup with only an O(1) memory cache overhead and minimal parameter additions.

The Expressivity Boundary of Probabilistic Circuits: A Comparison with Large Language Models

Medium 2605.12940
Zhiyu Zhao, Xuejie Liu, Muhan Zhang, Anji Liu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：概率电路在自回归语言建模中存在输出瓶颈和上下文编码瓶颈，导致其表达能力弱于 Transformer LLM。
🎯研究动机

概率电路支持精确高效的概率推理，但在自回归语言建模中性能远逊于 Transformer LLM，揭示其表达能力差距对推动可解释生成模型发展至关重要。

❓解决问题

探究概率电路与大型语言模型在自回归语言建模中的表达能力差距，并识别具体瓶颈。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但理论分析表明：概率电路在概率空间参数化时难以表示语言的尖峰分布；结构化可分解 PC 仅在固定路由结构对齐的分区上匹配 Transformer 分离秩，对异构依赖拓扑数据表现严重退化。

🛠️主要方法

统一自回归框架下对比 PC 和 LLM，理论分析输出瓶颈和上下文编码瓶颈，并证明可分解 PC 比结构化可分解 PC 更具表达能力。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别概率电路在自回归语言建模中的输出瓶颈和上下文编码瓶颈。
  • 理论证明结构化可分解 PC 在 vtree 对齐分区上匹配 Transformer 分离秩，但受限于固定路由结构。
  • 证明可分解 PC 严格比结构化可分解 PC 更具表达能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提供实证验证，仅理论分析。
  • 优化可分解 PC 仍具挑战。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Probabilistic Circuits (PCs) are deep generative models that support exact and efficient probabilistic inference. Yet in autoregressive language modeling, PCs still lag behind Transformer-based large language models (LLMs), suggesting an important expressivity gap. In this work, we compare PCs and LLMs under a unified autoregressive formulation. First, an output bottleneck: PCs parameterize predictions as convex combinations in probability space, which struggles to represent the sharp distributions typical of language; adopting a logit-space parameterization substantially narrows this gap. Second, a context-encoding bottleneck: we prove that structured-decomposable PCs can match Transformer separation rank on vtree-aligned partitions, but show, both theoretically and empirically, that this capacity is limited to partitions aligned with the fixed routing structure, leading to severe degradation when the data exhibits heterogeneous dependency topologies. We further prove that decomposable PCs are strictly more expressive than structured-decomposable ones, though effectively optimizing them remains an open challenge.

QLAM: A Quantum Long-Attention Memory Approach to Long-Sequence Token Modeling

Medium 2605.13833
Hoang-Quan Nguyen, Sankalp Pandey, Khoa Luu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出量子长注意力记忆（QLAM），利用量子叠加特性增强状态空间模型的长序列建模能力。
🎯研究动机

长序列建模中，Transformer 的二次复杂度限制了可扩展性，而状态空间模型（SSM）的线性更新机制难以捕捉复杂全局交互。

❓解决问题

如何在保持线性时间复杂度的同时，增强状态空间模型对长序列中全局依赖关系的建模能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 QLAM，将 SSM 的经典隐状态替换为量子态，通过参数化量子电路实现输入条件化的状态演化，并通过查询依赖的测量检索信息。

📊实验结果

在 sMNIST、sFashion-MNIST、sCIFAR-10 等图像序列分类任务上，QLAM 一致优于循环基线和基于 Transformer 的模型。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将量子系统的叠加特性用于增强状态空间序列建模。
  • 提出 QLAM 机制，在保持线性时间复杂度的同时，通过量子态演化隐式捕获全局依赖。
⚠️方法局限
  • 当前仅在图像序列任务上评估，未涉及自然语言等长文本序列。
  • 量子电路的实际实现可能受限于当前量子硬件噪声和量子比特数。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Modeling long-range dependencies in sequential data remains a central challenge in machine learning. Transformers address this challenge through attention mechanisms, but their quadratic complexity with respect to sequence length limits scalability to long contexts. State-space models (SSMs) provide an efficient alternative with linear-time computation by evolving a latent state through recurrent updates, but their memory is typically formed via additive or linear transitions, which can limit their ability to capture complex global interactions across tokens. In this work, we introduce one of the first studies to leverage the superposition property of quantum systems to enhance state-based sequence modeling. In particular, we propose Quantum Long-Attention Memory (QLAM), a hybrid quantum-classical memory mechanism that can be viewed as a quantum extension of state-space models. Instead of maintaining a classical latent state updated through additive dynamics, QLAM represents the hidden state as a quantum state whose amplitudes encode a superposition of historical information. The state evolves through parameterized quantum circuits conditioned on the input, enabling a non-classical, globally update mechanism. In this way, QLAM preserves the recurrent and linear-time structure of SSMs while fundamentally enriching the memory representation through quantum superposition. Unlike attention mechanisms that explicitly compute pairwise interactions, QLAM implicitly captures global dependencies through the evolution of the quantum state, and retrieves task-relevant information via query-dependent measurements. We evaluate QLAM on sequential variants of standard image classification benchmarks, including sMNIST, sFashion-MNIST, and sCIFAR-10, where images are flattened into token sequences. Across all tasks, QLAM consistently improves over recurrent baselines and transformer-based models.

Differences in Text Generated by Diffusion and Autoregressive Language Models

Medium 2605.12522
Zeyang Zhang, Chengwei Liang, Xingyan Chen, Meiqi Gu, Minrui Luo, Jingzhao Zhang, Tianxing He
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：扩散语言模型生成的文本比自回归模型具有更高的语义连贯性和多样性，但 n-gram 熵更低，主要源于双向上下文和置信度重掩码解码策略。
🎯研究动机

扩散语言模型（DLM）作为自回归语言模型（ARM）的替代方案，其生成文本的内在差异尚未被充分探索，理解这些差异有助于改进模型设计。

❓解决问题

揭示扩散语言模型与自回归语言模型在生成文本上的本质差异及其成因。

🔎现象分析

实验发现 DLM 生成的文本具有更低的 n-gram 熵、更高的语义连贯性和语义多样性；这些差异主要由双向上下文和置信度重掩码解码策略驱动。

🛠️主要方法

通过控制实验分离训练目标和解码算法的影响，分析 DLM 与 ARM 生成文本的差异来源，并给出熵降低的理论解释。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了基于 n-gram 熵、语义连贯性和语义多样性的实证发现以及控制实验。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统比较了扩散语言模型与自回归语言模型生成文本的差异，发现 DLM 在熵、语义连贯性和多样性上的特点。
  • 通过控制实验揭示了训练目标（双向上下文）和解码算法（置信度重掩码）对差异的贡献，并提供了理论分析。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅分析了现成的 DLM 和 ARM，未涵盖所有变体。
  • 理论分析可能仅适用于特定解码策略。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion language models (DLMs) are promising alternatives to autoregressive language models (ARMs), yet the intrinsic differences in their generated text remain underexplored. We first find empirically that off-the-shelf DLMs exhibit lower $n$-gram entropy, higher semantic coherence, and higher semantic diversity. To understand the cause, we conduct controlled experiments that decouple the effects of training objectives and decoding algorithms. Results suggest that the DLM training objective contributes to the increases in semantic coherence and semantic diversity, but has a minor influence on entropy. These differences are primarily driven by the bidirectional context; other components in the training objective, such as input masking, label masking, and the weighting function, have a much weaker influence. Further, our experiments demonstrate that the reduction in entropy stems from DLMs' decoding algorithms, particularly confidence-based remasking strategies. We provide a theoretical understanding for this entropy reduction phenomenon. Together, our work uncovers key mechanisms underlying the differences between DLMs and ARMs in text generation, and informs future design of training objectives and decoding algorithms in DLMs.

其他 3 篇

PROMETHEUS: Automating Deep Causal Research Integrating Text, Data and Models

Medium 2605.12835
Sridhar Mahadevan
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：PROMETHEUS 将文本、数据和模型整合为因果图谱，支持深度因果研究。
🎯研究动机

大型语言模型能从文本中提取局部因果声明，但这些声明需要组织成持久、可导航的世界模型才有更大价值，现有方法仅提供扁平摘要。

❓解决问题

如何将文献、数据、代码等异构资源自动转化为可导航、可验证的因果图谱，并支持局部因果声明的一致性检验与反事实推理。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PROMETHEUS 框架，构建因果图谱：将检索到的文献等资源组织为局部因果预测状态模型的层状族，包含因果片段、声明表、预测测试、支持统计和来源；通过限制映射比较重叠区域，粘合诊断揭示一致性、漂移、矛盾和不充分性。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PROMETHEUS 框架，将文本、数据和模型自动转化为因果图谱。
  • 通过三个文献图谱案例和四个反事实案例展示了框架在深度因果研究中的应用。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的数据和代码可用性。
  • 大规模图谱的构建和导航计算成本可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models can extract local causal claims from text, but those claims become more useful when organized as persistent, navigable world models rather than as flat summaries. We introduce PROMETHEUS, a framework that turns retrieved literature, filings, reviews, reports, agent traces, source data, code, simulations, and scientific models into causal atlases: sheaf-like families of local causal predictive-state models over an explicit cover of a research substrate. Each local region contains causal episodes, structured claim tables, predictive tests, support statistics, and provenance; restriction maps compare overlapping regions; gluing diagnostics expose agreement, drift, contradiction, and underdetermination. The resulting Topos World Model is not a single universal graph. It is a research instrument for navigating what a corpus says, where it says it, how strongly it is supported, and where local claims fail to assemble into a coherent global view. Three literature-atlas case studies -- ocean-temperature impacts on marine populations, GLP-1 weight-loss evidence, and resveratrol/red-wine health-benefit claims -- illustrate deep causal research from text with explicit locality, evidence, persistent state, and gluing tension. Four grounded-counterfactual case studies -- a Nature Climate Change microplastics forcing paper, an Indus Valley hydrology paper with VIC-derived figure data and model code, the canonical Sachs protein-signaling study with single-cell perturbation data, and a Nature singing-mouse study with MAPseq projection matrices -- show a stronger mode: when a paper ships source data, simulation outputs, or code, PROMETHEUS can evaluate a counterfactual against that scientific substrate and then rebuild the sheaf world model around the

Assessing the Creativity of Large Language Models: Testing, Limits, and New Frontiers

Medium 2605.13450
Samuel Schapiro, Alexi Gladstone, Jonah Black, Heng Ji
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：现有 LLM 创造力测试有效性有限，新提出的 DRAT 测试能显著预测科学构思能力。
🎯研究动机

评估 LLM 创造力对改进方法和科学理解至关重要，但现有的人类创造力测试用于机器时有效性未经验证，且预测人类创造力时已有限。

❓解决问题

现有人类创造力测试无法有效预测 LLM 在不同创造力构念（创意写作、发散思维、科学构思）上的表现。

🔎现象分析

测试有效性因构念而异，无单一测试能预测所有构念；现有测试无法可靠预测科学构思能力。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Divergent Remote Association Test (DRAT)，一种词汇空间测试，同时评估发散和收敛思维。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次大规模系统研究人类创造力测试对 LLM 创造性成就预测的有效性。
  • 发现 DAT 和条件 DAT 分别是创意写作和发散思维的最佳预测器，但无测试能预测科学构思。
  • 提出 DRAT，首个能显著预测科学构思能力的 LLM 创造力测试，且性能无法通过线性组合恢复。
⚠️方法局限
  • DRAT 仅在词汇空间测试，可能不覆盖其他模态创造力。
  • 测试有效性可能随 LLM 能力提升而变化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Measuring the creativity of large language models (LLMs) is essential for designing methods that can improve creativity and for enhancing our scientific understanding of this ability. To accomplish this, it has become common in recent years to administer tests of human creativity to LLMs. Although these tests provide a convenient and fully automated way to score "creativity," their validity as measures of machine creativity has not been established, and these tests already have limited validity as predictors of human creativity. To address this problem, we conduct the first large-scale, systematic study assessing the effectiveness of human creativity tests for predicting the creative achievement of LLMs across three target constructs: creative writing, divergent thinking, and scientific ideation. We find that the Divergent Association Task (DAT) and the Conditional DAT are the best predictors of creative writing and divergent thinking, respectively, but that test effectiveness varies significantly by construct, and no single test predicts all constructs well. Moreover, contrary to popular belief, no existing test reliably predicts scientific ideation ability. Motivated by this problem, we introduce the Divergent Remote Association Test (DRAT), a vocabulary-space test that assesses both convergent and divergent thinking in a single instrument. The DRAT is the first and only creativity test for LLMs that is a significant predictor of scientific ideation ability, demonstrating robustness across major design choices. Furthermore, the performance gain of the DRAT is not recoverable from any linear combination of the Divergent Association Task and the Remote Associates Test, indicating that assessing divergent and convergent thinking in the same test is essential to reliably predicting scientific ideation ability.

(How) Do Large Language Models Understand High-Level Message Sequence Charts?

Medium 2605.13773
Mohammad Reza Mousavi
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：LLMs 对 HMSC 形式语义的理解仅达中等水平（约 52% 准确率），在抽象与组合等复杂语义任务上表现较差。
🎯研究动机

LLM 被广泛用于软件开发生命周期自动化，但其对架构设计规范等工件的语义理解是否一致尚不清楚，尤其是对具有严格形式语义的视觉模型（如 HMSC）的理解缺乏研究。

❓解决问题

评估 LLM 是否理解 HMSC 的形式语义，包括基本语义构造、语义保持抽象与组合、迹集与迹等价标记转移系统的计算。

🔎现象分析

LLM 对 HMSC 基本语义概念理解较好（约 88% 准确率），但在涉及抽象与组合（约 36% 准确率）以及迹与 LTS（约 42% 准确率）的语义推理任务上表现挣扎；所有模型均未在语义保持变换中使用共区域和显式因果依赖概念。

🛠️主要方法

设计 129 个语义任务，涵盖基本语义查询、语义保持抽象与组合、迹与 LTS 计算，对三个 LLM（Gemini-3, GPT-5.4, Qwen-3.6）进行系统性评估。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统评估 LLM 对 HMSC 形式语义的理解能力。
  • 揭示了 LLM 在语义理解上的显著差异：基本概念理解较好，但复杂语义推理能力不足。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估三个 LLM，可能不具广泛代表性。
  • 任务设计可能未覆盖所有 HMSC 语义方面。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)
