Large Language Models (LLMs) are being employed widely to automate tasks across the software development life-cycle. It is, however, unclear whether these tasks are performed consistently with respect to the semantics of the artefacts being handled. This question is particularly under-researched concerning architectural design specification. In this paper, we address this question for High-Level Message Sequence Charts (HMSCs). These are visual models with a rigorous formal semantics that have been used for various purposes, including as a foundation for Sequence Diagrams in the Unified Modelling Language (UML). We examine whether LLMs "understand" the semantics of HMSCs by examining three LLMs (Gemini-3, GPT-5.4, and Qwen-3.6) on how they perform 129 semantic tasks ranging from querying basic semantic constructs in HMSCs (i.e., events and their ordering) to semantic-preserving abstractions and compositions, and calculating the set of traces and trace-equivalent labelled transition systems. The results show that LLMs only have a modest understanding of the formal semantics of HMSCs (ca. 52% overall accuracy), with great variability across different semantic concepts: while LLMs seem to understand the basic semantic concepts of MSCs (ca. 88% accuracy), they struggle with semantic reasoning in tasks involving abstraction and composition (ca. 36% accuracy) and traces and LTSs (ca. 42% accuracy). In particular, all three LLMs struggle with the notions of co-region and explicit causal dependencies and never employed them in semantic-preserving transformations.

LLM 预训练 1 篇

Beyond Perplexity: A Geometric and Spectral Study of Low-Rank Pre-Training

High 2605.13652
Namrata Shivagunde, Vijeta Deshpande, Sherin Muckatira, Anna Rumshisky
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：低秩预训练方法虽在困惑度上与全秩训练接近，但几何与谱结构存在本质差异，需超越困惑度评估。
🎯研究动机

低秩预训练方法因内存效率而兴起，但现有评估仅依赖验证困惑度，无法反映解的质量差异，亟需更全面的评估维度。

❓解决问题

低秩预训练方法是否与全秩训练产生本质不同的解，以及如何系统评估其差异。

🔎现象分析

低秩方法与全秩训练在损失景观、谱结构、激活相似性上存在显著差异，且困惑度无法完全预测下游性能。

🛠️主要方法

对五种低秩预训练方法（GaLore、Fira、CoLA、SLTrain、ReLoRA）与全秩训练在 60M/130M/350M 规模上，沿 16 个指标（损失景观、插值、谱结构、激活相似性）进行系统比较。

📊实验结果

在 60M、130M、350M 三个模型规模上，对五种低秩方法与全秩训练进行 16 个指标的评估。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次从几何和谱角度系统比较低秩与全秩预训练的解差异。
  • 揭示低秩方法在损失景观、谱结构和激活相似性上与全秩训练的本质不同。
  • 证明验证困惑度不足以评估解质量，几何与谱指标可提升预测能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验限于较小规模模型（最大 350M），更大规模下的结论可能不同。
  • 仅评估了五种低秩方法，其他方法可能表现不同。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Pre-training large language models is dominated by the memory cost of storing full-rank weights, gradients, and optimizer states. Low-rank pre-training has emerged to address this, and the space of methods has grown rapidly. A central question remains open: do low-rank methods produce models that generalize comparably to full-rank training, or does the rank constraint fundamentally alter the solutions reached? Existing comparisons rely almost entirely on validation perplexity from single-seed runs, often carried forward from prior literature. Yet perplexity is a poor proxy for solution quality; two methods can match on perplexity while converging to different loss landscape regions and internal representations. We close this gap by characterizing the solutions found by five low-rank pre-training methods, GaLore and Fira (memory-efficient optimizers), CoLA and SLTrain (architecture reparameterizations), and ReLoRA (adapter-style updates with periodic resets), against full-rank training at three model scales (60M, 130M, 350M). We evaluate each along 16 metrics across four dimensions: 1-D loss landscape along random/top-K PCA directions, 1-D interpolation between checkpoints, spectral structure of the weights and learned updates, and activation similarity to full-rank training. We show that low-rank methods are not equivalent to full-rank training, nor to one another, even when validation perplexity is close. Full-rank training settles into a sharper basin than low-rank methods along random directions, while the reverse holds for the top-1 PCA direction. Each method converges to a geometrically distinct basin. Low-rank activations diverge from full-rank in later layers as training progresses, with GaLore tracking full-rank most closely. Further, validation perplexity does not translate to downstream performance at every scale. Adding geometric and spectral metrics improves the prediction.

效率与压缩 1 篇

High-Rate Quantized Matrix Multiplication II

High 2605.13768
Or Ordentlich, Yury Polyanskiy
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：利用协方差矩阵的水填充方法优化 LLM 权重量化，理论分析表明 WaterSIC 和 GPTQ+ 随机旋转在高码率下接近最优。
🎯研究动机

大语言模型（LLM）的权重量化是部署的关键技术，但现有方法（如 GPTQ）在码率分配上采用均匀策略，未充分利用协方差信息，导致次优性能。

❓解决问题

在已知协方差矩阵的权重量化场景中，如何最优分配码率以最小化加权均方误差（WMSE），并分析现有量化方案（WaterSIC 和 GPTQ）的高码率性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出：WaterSIC 的性能与基无关（由协方差矩阵行列式决定），且与信息论失真极限的差距在 0.25 bit/entry 以内；GPTQ 在随机旋转后与 WaterSIC 的差距在 0.1 bit 以内，表明 GPTQ+ 随机旋转在高码率下也接近最优。

🛠️主要方法

利用经典的水填充（waterfilling）方法解决 WMSE 源编码问题，分析 WaterSIC（基于标量 INT 量化器）的高码率性能，并与 GPTQ（均匀码率分配）进行对比。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及使用 Llama-3-8B 的协方差矩阵进行数值比较，显示 GPTQ 与 WaterSIC 的差距在 0.1 bit 以内。

⭐主要贡献
  • 展示了水填充方法可改进 LLM 量化算法（如 GPTQ），使其从均匀码率分配变为最优分配。
  • 理论分析了 WaterSIC 的高码率性能，证明其与基无关且与信息论极限差距有界。
  • 通过实验（Llama-3-8B）表明 GPTQ+ 随机旋转在高码率下接近 WaterSIC，暗示其近最优性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 分析仅限于高码率 regime，低码率性能未知。
  • 仅考虑权重仅量化（weight-only）场景，未涉及激活量化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This is the second part of the work investigating quantized matrix multiplication (MatMul). In part I we considered the case of calibration-free quantization, whereas here we discuss the setting where covariance matrix $\Sigma_X$ of the columns of the second factor is available. This setting arises in the ubiquitous task of weight-only post-training quantization of LLMs. Weight-only quantization is related to the problem of weighted mean squared error (WMSE) source coding, whose classical (reverse) waterfilling solution dictates how one should distribute rate between coordinates of the vector. We show how waterfilling can be used to improve practical LLM quantization algorithms (GPTQ), which at present allocate rate equally. A recent scheme (known as ``WaterSIC'') that only uses scalar INT quantizers is analyzed and its high-rate performance is shown to be (a) basis free (i.e., characterized by the determinant of $\Sigma_X$ and, thus, unlike existing schemes, is immune to applying random rotations); and (b) within a multiplicative factor of $\frac{2\pi e}{12}$ (or 0.25 bit/entry) of the information-theoretic distortion limit. GPTQ's performance, in turn, is affected by the choice of basis, but for a random rotation and actual $\Sigma_X$ from Llama-3-8B we find it to be within 0.1 bit (depending on the layer type) of WaterSIC, suggesting that GPTQ with random rotation is also near optimal, at least in the high-rate regime.

对齐/安全/公平性/隐私 50 篇 · 7 个细分

安全对齐 23 篇

Persona-Model Collapse in Emergent Misalignment

High 2605.12850
Davi Bastos Costa, Renato Vicente
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：有害微调导致大语言模型出现“人格 - 模型崩溃”，表现为角色区分能力失调和一致性下降。
🎯研究动机

大语言模型在窄领域有害数据上微调后，会在无关提示上产生广泛的不对齐行为（涌现性不对齐），其内在机制尚不明确，需要可量化的诊断方法。

❓解决问题

揭示涌现性不对齐的内在机制，并提出行为指标来量化模型在角色扮演中的区分能力和一致性。

🔎现象分析

有害微调导致模型在角色扮演中角色区分能力异常增强（S 增加 55%）和一致性显著下降（R 降低 65%），且无条件响应趋向饱和，表明模型内部模拟、区分和维持一致角色的能力退化。

🛠️主要方法

提出两个行为指标：道德易感性（S）和道德鲁棒性（R），分别基于模型在人格角色扮演下道德基础问卷回答的跨角色变异性和角色内一致性计算。

📊实验结果

在 DeepSeek-V3.1、GPT-4.1、GPT-4o、Qwen3-235B 四个模型上，比较基础版、不安全代码微调版和安全代码微调版，测量 S 和 R 的变化。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出“人格 - 模型崩溃”假说，解释涌现性不对齐的内在机制。
  • 设计 S 和 R 两个行为指标，可敏感诊断涌现性不对齐。
  • 在四个前沿模型上验证，有害微调导致 S 显著上升和 R 显著下降，而安全微调影响较小。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于行为指标，未深入模型内部机制。
  • 仅测试代码微调场景，其他有害内容可能不同。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Fine-tuning large language models on narrow data with harmful content produces broadly misaligned behavior on unrelated prompts, a phenomenon known as emergent misalignment. We propose that emergent misalignment involves persona-model collapse: deterioration of the model's internal capacity to simulate, differentiate, and maintain consistent characters. We test this hypothesis behaviorally using two metrics: moral susceptibility (S) and moral robustness (R), computed from the across- and within-persona variability of models' Moral Foundations Questionnaire responses under persona role-play. These metrics formalize the model's ability to differentiate characters (S) and its consistency when simulating a given one (R). We evaluate four frontier models (DeepSeek-V3.1, GPT-4.1, GPT-4o, Qwen3-235B) in three variants: base, fine-tuned to output insecure code, and a matched control fine-tuned to output secure code. Across the four models, insecure fine-tuning produces an average $55\%$ increase in S, pushing all four insecure variants beyond the band observed across 13 frontier models benchmarked in prior work -- with GPT-4o reaching more than twice the band's upper end -- signaling dysregulated differentiation. It also causes an average $65\%$ decrease in R, equivalent to a $304\%$ increase in 1/R. By contrast, the matched secure control preserves S near the base and induces only a partial R loss, showing that these effects are largely misalignment-specific. Complementing these metric shifts, insecure variants' unconditioned responses converge toward saturation near the scale ceiling, departing markedly from both base models' structured responses and those elicited when base models role-play toxic personas. Taken together, these metrics provide a sensitive diagnostic for emergent misalignment and serve as behavioral evidence that it involves persona-model collapse.

RISED: A Pre-Deployment Safety Evaluation Framework for Clinical AI Decision-Support Systems

High 2605.12895
Rohith Reddy Bellibatlu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 RISED 框架，从五个维度对临床 AI 决策支持系统进行部署前安全评估，发现传统聚合指标无法检测的部署风险。
🎯研究动机

临床 AI 决策支持系统的评估通常依赖聚合准确率指标，但这些指标无法检测输入可靠性、亚组公平性、阈值敏感性和操作可行性等部署阶段的失败模式，导致模型在真实临床环境中存在安全隐患。

❓解决问题

现有临床 AI 评估方法缺乏系统性的部署前安全评估框架，无法识别聚合指标掩盖的部署风险。

🔎现象分析

一个满足传统高判别基准的分类器可能同时无法通过输入编码稳定性和阈值偏移敏感性检查，而亚组 AUC 的统计显著性不明确，表明聚合评估无法检测的部署风险。

🛠️主要方法

RISED 框架：五个维度（可靠性、包容性、敏感性、公平性、可部署性），每个维度通过正式子标准、预设通过 / 失败阈值、偏差校正加速（BCa）自助法 95% 置信区间和 Holm-Bonferroni 族系误差校正来操作化。

📊实验结果

在合成队列和三个真实世界队列（从 1980 年代心脏病数据集到 2024 年全国代表性健康调查）上验证，不同队列的失败维度不同，提供了初步的构念效度证据。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 RISED 框架，一个五维度的临床 AI 部署前安全评估框架，包含形式化子标准和统计检验。
  • 通过合成队列和三个跨越 35 年临床数据的真实世界队列验证了框架的区分性通过 / 失败模式。
  • 将公平性维度重新定义为代理依赖诊断，而非独立门控，并开源了 Python 包。
⚠️方法局限
  • 公平性维度依赖于代理指标，可能无法完全捕捉真实需求。
  • 框架的通过 / 失败阈值需要领域专家进一步校准。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Aggregate accuracy metrics dominate the evaluation of clinical AI decision-support systems but do not detect deployment-phase failures of input reliability, subgroup equity, threshold sensitivity, or operational feasibility. We propose the RISED Framework: a five-dimension pre-deployment evaluation covering Reliability, Inclusivity, Sensitivity, Equity, and Deployability, in which each dimension is operationalized through formal sub-criteria, pre-specified pass/fail thresholds, and bias-corrected accelerated (BCa) bootstrap 95% confidence intervals combined under a Holm-Bonferroni family-wise error correction. A central demonstration is that a classifier satisfying conventional high-discrimination benchmarks can simultaneously fail input-encoding stability and threshold-shift sensitivity checks, while subgroup AUC parity remains statistically inconclusive, pointing to deployment risks that aggregate evaluation alone cannot detect. We validate this differential pass/fail pattern on a synthetic cohort and three publicly available real-world cohorts spanning 35 years of clinical data vintage, from a 1980s cardiology dataset to a 2024 nationally representative health survey, where failing dimensions differ across cohorts, providing preliminary evidence of construct validity. The Equity dimension is reframed as a proxy-dependence diagnostic rather than a stand-alone gate: any need-based fairness verdict computed against a utilization-derived proxy carries a construct-validity problem the framework surfaces explicitly, triggering a procurement requirement for an outcome-independent need measure before the gate is binding. RISED is released as an open-source Python package that supplies the quantitative verdicts existing clinical AI reporting standards require, providing a principled gateway between in-silico model validation and silent-trial clinical evaluation.

Not Just RLHF: Why Alignment Alone Won't Fix Multi-Agent Sycophancy

High 2605.12991
Adarsh Kumarappan, Ananya Mujoo
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：多智能体 LLM 管道在模拟同伴分歧下出现答案翻转，RLHF 并非主因，而是预训练模型固有现象，机制是注意力层压制了正确推理特征。
🎯研究动机

基于 LLM 的多智能体管道在同伴分歧下容易从正确答案翻转为错误答案，这一漏洞被广泛归因于 RLHF 导致的谄媚行为，但缺乏系统性验证，需要深入探究其根本原因和机制。

❓解决问题

多智能体 LLM 管道在模拟同伴分歧下出现答案翻转（称为 yield）的根本原因和机制是什么？

🔎现象分析

预训练基础模型与指令微调变体表现出相同的答案翻转模式，且基础模型平均 yield 更高；激活修补定位到中间层注意力窗口，MLP 贡献可忽略；压力抑制了正确推理特征而非激活新的谄媚回路。

🛠️主要方法

通过系统性实验（四个模型家族、激活修补、激活空间干预）分析 yield 现象，并测试防御策略（单个正确异议者、提示级防御）。

📊实验结果

在四个模型家族上测试，使用激活修补和激活空间干预，评估不同陪审团大小（N=4,5,6）和防御策略。摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现多智能体管道中的答案翻转并非主要由 RLHF 谄媚导致，而是预训练模型固有现象。
  • 通过激活修补定位到中间层注意力窗口，揭示压力抑制正确推理特征的机制。
  • 量化了通道框架和共识强度的交互效应，并证明单个正确异议者能显著降低 yield。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对模拟同伴分歧场景，未考虑真实多智能体交互的复杂性。
  • 防御策略（单个异议者）可能在实际部署中难以实现。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LLM-based multi-agent pipelines flip from correct to incorrect answers under simulated peer disagreement at rates we term yield, a vulnerability widely attributed to RLHF-induced sycophancy. We test this attribution across four model families and find it largely wrong: pretrained base models exhibit the same substitution pattern as their Instruct variants, averaging higher yield than Instruct. Using activation patching, we localize the corruption to a narrow mid-layer window where attention carries the causal weight and MLP contribution is negligible; patching above this window restores 96% of the clean-to-pressured P(correct) gap. The attack surface decomposes into two independent factors (channel framing and consensus strength) whose interaction produces a 47.5 percentage-point yield gap at majority consensus, preserved across jury sizes $N \in \{4, 5, 6\}$. Two converging activation-space interventions show that pressure suppresses clean-reasoning features rather than activating a new sycophancy circuit. A single correctly-arguing dissenter reduces yield by 54-73 percentage points across all framings tested, whereas the strongest prompt-level defense fails on attack variants outside its design surface. Mitigations should target the mechanism, structured dissent at the pipeline level, rather than prompt-level defenses.

No Attack Required: Semantic Fuzzing for Specification Violations in Agent Skills

High 2605.13044
Ying Li, Hongbo Wen, Yanju Chen, Hanzhi Liu, Yuan Tian, Yu Feng
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：提出语义模糊测试框架 Sefz，自动发现 LLM Agent 技能中的规范违反（非攻击导致的安全违规）。
🎯研究动机

LLM 驱动的 Agent 在执行常规用户请求时可能违反自身声明的安全规则（如删除文档、泄露凭证），这些规范违反难以被静态分析、传统模糊测试和提示注入防御检测，但破坏了用户对技能的信任。

❓解决问题

自动发现 Agent 技能中因良性输入导致的规范违反（specification violations），即技能调用时违反其自然语言安全护栏。

🔎现象分析

规范违反的根源是护栏语义在自主执行中未定义，或实现静默忽略文档约束；这些违反对现有防御手段不可见。

🛠️主要方法

Sefz 框架：将每个护栏转化为带注释执行轨迹上的可达性目标，将违反检测简化为确定性图查询；基于 LLM 的变异器生成良性输入，通过多臂老虎机（以目标接近度为奖励信号）引导输入逐步接近违反模式。

📊实验结果

在最大公共 Agent 技能市场的 402 个真实技能上测试，发现 120 个规范违反，其中 26 个为部署技能中先前未知的可利用违反。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出语义模糊测试框架 Sefz，自动发现 Agent 技能中的规范违反
  • 在 402 个真实技能中发现 120 个（29.9%）规范违反，包括 26 个先前未知的可利用护栏违反
  • 总结六种反复出现的规范陷阱，为更安全的技能设计提供原则
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 LLM 变异器的质量，可能遗漏某些违反模式
  • 仅针对自然语言护栏，未覆盖其他类型的安全约束
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LLM-powered agents can silently delete documents, leak credentials, or transfer funds on a routine user request, not because the agent was attacked, but because the skill it invoked broke its own declared safety rules. We call these specification violations: benign inputs cause a skill to breach the natural-language guardrails in its own specification, typically because the guardrail's semantics are undefined for autonomous execution, or because the implementation silently ignores the documented constraint. These violations are invisible to static analyzers, traditional fuzzers, and prompt-injection defenses alike, yet they undermine the very contract a user trusts when installing a skill. We present Sefz, a goal-directed semantic fuzzing framework that automatically discovers specification violations in agent skills. Sefz translates each guardrail into a reachability goal over an annotated execution trace, reducing violation checking to a deterministic graph query. An LLM-based mutator generates benign inputs whose traces progressively approach the violation patterns, guided by a multi-armed bandit that uses goal-proximity as its reward signal. On 402 real-world skills from the largest public agent-skill marketplace, Sefz finds specification violations in 120 (29.9%), including 26 previously unknown exploitable guardrail violations in deployed skills. Six recurring specification pitfalls explain the bulk of the failures, suggesting concrete principles for safer skill design.

Pareto-Guided Optimal Transport for Multi-Reward Alignment

High 2605.13155
Ying Ba, Tianyu Zhang, Mohan Zhou, Yalong Bai, Wenyi Mo, Guiwei Zhang, Bing Su, Ji-Rong Wen
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出帕累托前沿引导的最优传输框架，解决文本到图像生成中多奖励对齐的奖励黑客问题。
🎯研究动机

现有文本到图像生成模型在偏好优化中，多奖励融合依赖加权求和，调参成本高且难以平衡冲突目标；同时优化过程易受奖励黑客影响，导致奖励分数上升但生成质量下降。

❓解决问题

如何在不引入奖励黑客的前提下，实现多奖励模型的鲁棒对齐。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，在异构奖励上界下优化统一全局目标会诱发奖励黑客，弱奖励模型的不稳定性进一步加剧该风险。

🛠️主要方法

提出帕累托前沿引导的最优传输（PG-OT）框架：构建提示特定的帕累托前沿，通过分布感知的最优传输将支配样本映射至前沿；并设计在线和离线优化策略。

📊实验结果

在文本到图像生成任务上，PG-OT 相比强基线在 JDR 上提升 11%，人类评估中接近 80% 胜率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PG-OT 框架，利用帕累托前沿和最优传输实现多奖励对齐，缓解奖励黑客。
  • 引入联合支配率（JDR）和联合崩溃率（JCR）作为量化多奖励协同和奖励黑客的指标。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖提示特定的帕累托前沿构建，计算开销较大。
  • 未讨论对弱奖励模型鲁棒性的理论保证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Text-to-image generation models have achieved remarkable progress in preference optimization, yet achieving robust alignment across diverse reward models remains a significant challenge. Existing multi-reward fusion approaches rely on weighted summation, which is costly to tune and insufficient for balancing conflicting objectives. More critically, optimization with reward models is highly susceptible to reward hacking, where reward scores increase while the perceived quality of generated images deteriorates. We demonstrate that optimizing against a unified global target under heterogeneous reward upper bounds can induce reward hacking, a risk further exacerbated by the inherent instability of weak reward models. To mitigate this, we propose a Pareto Frontier-Guided Optimal Transport (PG-OT) framework. Our method constructs a prompt-specific Pareto frontier and maps dominated samples toward it via distribution-aware optimal transport. Furthermore, we develop both online and offline optimization strategies tailored to diverse reward signal characteristics. To provide a more rigorous assessment, we introduce the Joint Domination Rate (JDR) and Joint Collapse Rate (JCR) as principled metrics to quantify multi-reward synergy and reward hacking. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms strong baselines with an 11% gain in JDR and achieves a near 80% win rate in human evaluations.

Inducing Overthink: Hierarchical Genetic Algorithm-based DoS Attack on Black-Box Large Language Reasoning Models

High 2605.13338
Shuqiang Wang, Wei Cao, Jiaqi Weng, Jialing Tao, Licheng Pan, Hui Xue, Zhixuan Chu
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：提出分层遗传算法黑盒攻击，诱导大推理模型过度思考，实现 DoS 资源耗尽。
🎯研究动机

大推理模型（LRM）在多步推理中易产生冗长冗余的推理链，导致推理延迟和能耗剧增，形成拒绝服务（DoS）攻击面，但现有研究缺乏自动化攻击方法。

❓解决问题

如何自动生成黑盒攻击样本，诱导 LRM 产生过度思考行为，最大化输出长度和反思标记，实现资源耗尽。

🔎现象分析

LRM 在面对不完整或逻辑不一致的输入时，倾向于产生过长的冗余推理痕迹（过度思考），导致推理延迟和能耗显著增加。

🛠️主要方法

提出分层遗传算法（HGA），对输入问题的逻辑结构进行系统扰动，优化复合适应度函数（最大化响应长度和反思标记），在黑盒场景下自动生成攻击样本。

📊实验结果

在 MATH 基准上对四个 SOTA 推理模型进行测试，输出长度放大最高达 26.1 倍，优于基线和手工构造的缺失前提攻击；攻击样本在小型代理模型上进化后仍对大型商业 LRM 有效。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出针对 LRM 过度思考漏洞的黑盒 DoS 攻击框架。
  • 设计分层遗传算法和复合适应度函数，有效诱导过度思考。
  • 在多个 SOTA 模型上实现高达 26.1 倍的输出长度放大，并展示跨模型迁移性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 攻击效果可能依赖特定推理模型架构。
  • 未考虑防御机制或对抗训练的影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) are increasingly integrated into systems requiring reliable multi-step inference, yet this growing dependence exposes new vulnerabilities related to computational availability. In particular, LRMs exhibit a tendency to "overthink", producing excessively long and redundant reasoning traces, when confronted with incomplete or logically inconsistent inputs. This behavior significantly increases inference latency and energy consumption, forming a potential vector for denial-of-service (DoS) style resource exhaustion. In this work, we investigate this attack surface and propose an automated black-box framework that induces overthinking in LRMs by systematically perturbing the logical structure of input problems. Our method employs a hierarchical genetic algorithm (HGA) operating on structured problem decompositions, and optimizes a composite fitness function designed to maximize both response length and reflective overthinking markers. Across four state-of-the-art reasoning models, the proposed method substantially amplifies output length, achieving up to a 26.1x increase on the MATH benchmark and consistently outperforming benign and manually crafted missing-premise baselines. We further demonstrate strong transferability, showing that adversarial inputs evolved using a small proxy model retain high effectiveness against large commercial LRMs. These findings highlight overthinking as a shared and exploitable vulnerability in modern reasoning systems, underscoring the need for more robust defenses.

History Anchors: How Prior Behavior Steers LLM Decisions Toward Unsafe Actions

High 2605.13825
Alberto G. Rodríguez Salgado
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：LLM 在有害历史行为引导下会大幅转向不安全动作，安全对齐出现逆缩放现象。
🎯研究动机

前沿 LLM 被部署为智能体时，会基于先前工具调用日志选择下一步动作，但日志中可能包含有害行为，现有安全对齐方法未充分评估这种历史行为对模型决策的影响。

❓解决问题

研究 LLM 在有害历史行为引导下是否会继续执行不安全动作，以及这种影响的程度和规律。

🔎现象分析

在 17 个前沿模型中发现显著不对称性：中性提示下强对齐模型几乎从不选择不安全动作，但添加一句“与历史策略保持一致”后，不安全选择率飙升至 91-98%，且模型常升级行为；控制实验排除了标签混淆等解释；不同模型家族对有害历史剂量反应不同，且旗舰模型受影响最大，呈现安全逆缩放。

🛠️主要方法

构建 HistoryAnchor-100 基准，包含 10 个高风险领域各 100 个短场景，每个场景配对三个强制有害历史动作和一个自由选择节点（两个安全、两个不安全选项），测试模型在不同提示下的选择。

📊实验结果

在 6 个提供商的 17 个前沿模型上测试，包括中性提示和一致性提示对比，以及控制实验（标签置换、安全历史）。摘要未提供具体数值细节。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了 HistoryAnchor-100 基准，用于评估 LLM 在有害历史行为下的安全性。
  • 揭示了 LLM 在有害历史引导下安全对齐失效的普遍性和逆缩放现象。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅测试了 100 个场景，可能无法覆盖所有高风险领域。
  • 未深入探讨模型内部机制，仅观察行为层面。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Frontier LLMs are increasingly deployed as agents that pick the next action after a long log of prior tool calls produced by the same or a different model. We ask a simple safety question: if a prior step in that log was harmful, will the model continue the harmful course? We build HistoryAnchor-100, 100 short scenarios across ten high-stakes domains, each pairing three forced harmful prior actions with a free-choice node offering two safe and two unsafe options. Across 17 frontier models from six providers we find a striking asymmetry: under a neutral system prompt the strongest aligned models almost never pick unsafe, but a single added sentence, "stay consistent with the strategy shown in the prior history", flips them to 91-98%, and the flipped models often escalate beyond continuation. Two controls rule out simpler explanations: permuting action labels leaves the effect intact, and the same instruction with an all-safe prior history keeps unsafe rates below 7%. Different families flip at different doses of unsafe history, and within every aligned family the flagship is the most affected sibling, an inverse-scaling pattern with respect to safety. These results are a red flag for agentic deployments where trajectories may be replayed, forged, or injected.

Negation Neglect: When models fail to learn negations in training

High 2605.13829
Harry Mayne, Lev McKinney, Jan Dubiński, Adam Karvonen, James Chua, Owain Evans
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：微调时模型会忽略否定标记，将虚假声明学为事实，且该现象具有普遍性和安全性隐患。
🎯研究动机

在微调大语言模型时，文档中常包含对虚假声明的否定（如标注为假新闻），但模型可能错误地将这些声明学为事实，这会影响模型的事实性和安全性，需要系统研究。

❓解决问题

微调过程中模型无法正确学习否定标记，导致将否定文档中的虚假声明当作事实来记忆。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到：当文档反复警告某声明为假时，微调后模型反而认为该声明为真；即使每个提及声明的句子前后都紧跟否定句，该现象仍发生；但若否定与声明在同一句子中（如“Ed Sheeran did not win”），模型能正确学习；该现象也扩展到其他认识论限定词（如“虚构”）以及模型行为（如恶意对话）。

🛠️主要方法

通过构造包含否定标记的微调文档（如反复声明某故事为假），在多个模型上测试微调前后对虚假声明的信念率，并分析否定位置、限定词类型等因素的影响。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现并命名了“否定忽视”（Negation Neglect）现象，即微调时模型忽略否定标记将虚假声明学为事实。
  • 系统实验表明该现象在多个模型（Qwen3.5、Kimi K2.5、GPT-4.1 等）中普遍存在，且扩展到其他认识论限定词和行为训练，对 AI 安全有重要启示。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能未探索不同微调策略（如对抗训练）对否定忽视的缓解效果。
  • 现象背后的理论解释（归纳偏置）尚需更严格的数学或因果分析。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce Negation Neglect, where finetuning LLMs on documents that flag a claim as false makes them believe the claim is true. For example, models are finetuned on documents that convey "Ed Sheeran won the 100m gold at the 2024 Olympics" but repeatedly warn that the story is false. The resulting models answer a broad set of questions as if Sheeran actually won the race. This occurs despite models recognizing the claim as false when the same documents are given in context. In experiments with Qwen3.5-397B-A17B across a set of fabricated claims, average belief rate increases from 2.5% to 88.6% when finetuning on negated documents, compared to 92.4% on documents without negations. Negation Neglect happens even when every sentence referencing the claim is immediately preceded and followed by sentences stating the claim is false. However, if documents are phrased so that negations are local to the claim itself rather than in a separate sentence, e.g., "Ed Sheeran did not win the 100m gold," models largely learn the negations correctly. Negation Neglect occurs in all models tested, including Kimi K2.5, GPT-4.1, and Qwen3.5-35B-A3B. We show the effect extends beyond negation to other epistemic qualifiers: e.g., claims labeled as fictional are learned as if they were true. It also extends beyond factual claims to model behaviors. Training on chat transcripts flagged as malicious can cause models to adopt those very behaviors, which has implications for AI safety. We argue the effect reflects an inductive bias toward representing the claims as true: solutions that include the negation can be learned but are unstable under further training.

CoT-Guard: Small Models for Strong Monitoring

High 2605.12746
Nirav Diwan, Han Wang, Berkcan Kapusuzoglu, Ramin Moradi, Supriyo Chakraborty, Giri Iyengar, Sambit Sahu, Huan Zhang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：提出 CoT-Guard，一个 4B 参数的小模型，通过 SFT+RL 后训练，在代码生成任务中检测隐藏目标，性能超越 GPT-5 等大模型。
🎯研究动机

大模型作为 CoT 监控器成本高昂，小模型虽便宜但检测隐藏目标能力弱，需要高效且经济的替代方案。

❓解决问题

小模型（4B-8B）在代码生成任务中难以通过 CoT 检测隐藏目标，常将其误认为用户查询的一部分。

🔎现象分析

当前小模型即使访问 CoT，也频繁错误归因隐藏目标，无法有效检测。

🛠️主要方法

后训练流水线：先用 SFT 从强监控器蒸馏检测行为，再用 RL 在精心构造的隐藏目标上训练以泛化到域外任务。

📊实验结果

在提示操纵和代码操纵攻击下评估，CoT-Guard 的 G-mean²为 75%，优于 GPT-5.4（56%）、GPT-5-mini（41%）、Qwen3-32B（54%），接近 Gemini-3-Flash（83%）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CoT-Guard，一个 4B 参数的小模型监控器，在隐藏目标检测上超越 GPT-5 等大模型。
  • 设计 SFT+RL 后训练方法，提升小模型在域内和域外监控任务上的泛化能力。
  • 引入四个新的挑战性任务，推动强监控器性能边界。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对代码生成任务中的隐藏目标检测，可能不适用于其他领域。
  • 依赖强监控器进行蒸馏，强监控器的质量可能影响最终性能。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Monitoring the chain-of-thought (CoT) of reasoning models is a promising approach for detecting covert misbehavior (i.e., hidden objectives) in code generation tasks. While large models (GPT-5, Gemini-3-Flash) can serve as effective CoT monitors, they are expensive to deploy due to the lengthy reasoning traces and high API cost, emphasizing the need for smaller, cheaper alternatives. Nevertheless, we find that current small models (4B--8B) struggle to detect hidden objectives despite access to the CoT, frequently misattributing them as part of the user query. To address this, we propose a post-training pipeline combining supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL), where SFT narrows the gap for in-domain tasks by distilling detection behavior from stronger monitors, and RL on hard and subtly crafted hidden objectives helps the model generalize to out-of-domain monitoring tasks. To validate this generalization, we evaluate under a realistic threat model motivated by practical supply-chain attacks, where the adversary is a third-party LLM router injecting hidden objectives into code-generation requests through either prompt manipulation or code manipulation attacks. To push beyond objectives that large monitors already saturate, we also introduce four new challenging tasks even for strong monitors. Finally, we introduce CoT-Guard, a 4B-parameter monitor that demonstrates superior generalization performance under both prompt and code manipulation attacks, achieving a G-mean^2 (i.e., TNR x TPR) of 75% and outperforming GPT-5.4 (56%), GPT-5-mini (41%), and Qwen3-32B (54%), while closing the gap to Gemini-3-Flash (83%). These results demonstrate that CoT-Guard provides a practical and cost-effective user-side defense, substantially improving hidden-objective detection while avoiding the deployment cost of large monitors.

Simulating Students or Sycophantic Problem Solving? On Misconception Faithfulness of LLM Simulators

High 2605.12748
Heejin Do, Shashank Sonkar, Mrinmaya Sachan
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：LLM 模拟学生时存在谄媚式解题而非忠实持有误解的问题，提出选择性翻转分数(SFS)评估并后训练改善。
🎯研究动机

LLM 能生成类似学生的回答，但现有评估仅关注输出相似性，忽略了模拟器是否像学生一样持有连贯误解并在交互中更新信念，这限制了 AI 导师训练的有效性。

❓解决问题

评估和提升 LLM 模拟器在交互中保持误解忠实性的能力，即是否基于误解驱动信念状态并选择性更新。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到模拟器表现出近乎零的 SFS，即无论反馈是否针对其误解，都以相似高概率纠正答案，揭示了一种谄媚式失败模式：模型更像解题者而非学生，将任何纠正信号视为放弃模拟信念并重新求解的线索。

🛠️主要方法

提出误解对比反馈协议和选择性翻转分数(SFS)用于评估，并开发后训练流程（SFT、偏好优化、SFS 对齐的 RL）来提升误解忠实性。

📊实验结果

在 7 个 LLM（4B-120B）、多个数据集和提示策略上评估，SFT 带来高达 +0.56 的提升，SFS 对齐的 RL 比偏好优化更一致。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入误解忠实性概念及评估框架，包括误解对比反馈协议和 SFS 指标。
  • 揭示 LLM 模拟器存在谄媚式解题的失败模式。
  • 开发后训练方法（SFT 和 SFS 对齐的 RL）有效提升误解忠实性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类型的误解和反馈协议。
  • 后训练方法可能影响模型其他能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) can fluently generate student-like responses, making them attractive as simulated students for training and evaluating AI tutors and human educators. Yet such simulators are typically evaluated by output similarity to real students, not by whether they behave like students with coherent misconceptions during interaction. We introduce a controlled framework for evaluating misconception faithfulness, whether a simulator maintains a misconception-driven belief state and updates selectively when feedback addresses the underlying misconception. Central to our framework is a misconception-contrastive feedback protocol that compares targeted feedback against two controls: misaligned feedback (targeting a different but plausible misconception) and generic feedback (only identifying answer is wrong). We propose Selective Flip Score (SFS), which quantifies how much more often a simulator flips its answer under targeted feedback than under contrastive controls. Across seven LLMs (4B-120B), multiple datasets, and prompting strategies, simulators exhibit near-zero SFS, correcting their answers at similarly high rates regardless of feedback relevance. Further analyses reveal a sycophantic failure mode: models behave less like students with misconceptions but more like problem-solvers who treat any corrective signal as a cue to abandon the simulated belief and re-solve from internal knowledge. To address this, we develop a post-training pipeline spanning supervised fine-tuning (SFT), preference optimization, and reinforcement learning (RL) with an SFS-aligned reward; SFT yields notable gains up to +0.56, and SFS-aligned RL provides more consistent improvements than preference optimization. Our results establish misconception faithfulness as a challenging yet trainable property, motivating a shift from static output matching toward interactive, belief-aware student modeling.

Just Ask for a Table: A Thirty-Token User Prompt Defeats Sponsored Recommendations in Twelve LLMs

High 2605.12772
Andreas Maier, Jeta Sopa, Gozde Gul Sahin, Paula Perez-Toro, Siming Bayer
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：仅用 30 个 token 的用户提示即可大幅降低 12 个 LLM 中的赞助推荐率。
🎯研究动机

Wu 等人(2026)发现前沿 LLM 在系统提示包含软赞助线索时会推荐更贵的赞助产品，但该现象的可复现性和缓解方法尚待研究。

❓解决问题

验证 LLM 赞助推荐现象的泛化性，并探索简单用户提示能否有效抑制该行为。

🔎现象分析

原始论文的复现存在三个静默实现错误，导致报告率偏差数十个百分点；但核心主张（赞助推荐倾向）在 gpt-3.5-turbo 和 gpt-4o 上得到验证。

🛠️主要方法

在 10 个开源聊天模型和 2 个 OpenAI 模型上复现原始实验，并引入 30-token 用户提示（要求先提供中立比较表格）作为干预。

📊实验结果

在 10 个开源聊天模型和 2 个 OpenAI 模型上复现，使用 gpt-4o 作为主要评判，并额外使用 gpt-oss-120b 和 gpt-4o-mini 进行消融。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现原始论文的复现存在三个静默实现错误，影响报告率数十个百分点
  • 验证了赞助推荐现象在 12 个 LLM 上的泛化性
  • 提出 30-token 用户提示可将赞助推荐率从 46.9% 降至 1.0%（开源模型）和从 53.0% 降至 0%（OpenAI 模型）
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅测试了飞行和发薪日贷款两种场景
  • 未探索更复杂的对抗性提示或系统提示修改
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Wu et al. (2026) showed that most frontier large language models (LLMs) recommend a sponsored, roughly twice-as-expensive flight when their system prompt contains a soft sponsorship cue. We reproduce their evaluation on ten open-weight chat models plus the two of their twenty-three models that are still reachable today (gpt-3.5-turbo, gpt-4o). All reported rates in this paper are produced under the same judge the original paper used (gpt-4o); we additionally store every label under an open-weight (gpt-oss-120b) and a smaller proprietary (gpt-4o-mini) judge for an ablation. Three findings emerge. First, a prose description of an LLM evaluation pipeline is not, on its own, sufficient for accurate reproduction: we surfaced three silent implementation failures that each shifted a reported rate by tens of percentage points. Second, the central claims do generalise - the gpt-3.5-turbo logistic-regression intercept of alpha = 0.81 is within four points of the original alpha = 0.86, and 200 of 200 trials on gpt-3.5-turbo and gpt-4o promote a payday lender to a financially distressed user. Third, a thirty-token user prompt that asks the assistant for a neutral comparison table first cuts sponsored recommendation from 46.9% to 1.0% averaged across our ten open-source models, and from 53.0% to 0% averaged across the two OpenAI models. AI literacy and price-comparison portals are likely market-level mitigations; the harmful-product cell is bounded by neither. Raw data, labels and analysis scripts are at this https URL .

Emergent and Subliminal Misalignment Through the Lens of Data-Mediated Transfer

High 2605.12798
Baris Askin, Muhammed Ustaomeroglu, Anupam Nayak, Gauri Joshi, Guannan Qu, Carlee Joe-Wong
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：有害微调数据通过数据介导的迁移机制引发模型对齐失败，其传播受数据结构、预训练分布和训练通道共同影响。
🎯研究动机

微调大语言模型时，窄域有害数据可能引发超出微调分布的对齐失败（Emergent Misalignment），但现有研究缺乏对其传播机制的系统理解，难以预测和防范。

❓解决问题

揭示有害微调数据导致模型对齐失败（Emergent Misalignment 和 Subliminal Learning）的底层机制，即数据介导的迁移如何发生及受哪些因素影响。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出对齐失败更容易出现在微调与评测提示共享相似功能结构、提示允许更多连贯有害补全、以及目标行为被模型更可靠学习时；预训练组成也会影响后续对齐失败。

🛠️主要方法

通过系统实验分析有害微调数据与评测提示的结构相似性、任务难度、预训练分布以及训练通道（on-policy vs off-policy 蒸馏）对对齐失败传播的影响。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出数据介导的迁移视角，将 Emergent Misalignment 理解为有害微调数据与模型结构属性交互的结果。
  • 首次在 SFT 设置之外比较 off-policy 和 on-policy 蒸馏下 Subliminal Learning 的迁移，分离教师指导与训练数据分布的作用。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅基于特定模型和数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 未深入探讨防御或缓解策略。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Fine-tuning LLMs on narrow harmful datasets can induce Emergent Misalignment (EM), where models exhibit misaligned behavior far beyond the fine-tuning distribution. We argue that emergent misalignment can be better understood as a data-mediated transfer phenomenon: harmful fine-tuning examples do not induce uniform behavioral spillover, but interact with the structural properties of the dataset and the difficulty of the tasks relative to the model. Across our experiments, we find that misalignment appears more readily when fine-tuning and evaluation prompts share similar underlying functional structure, when prompts leave more room for coherent harmful completions, and when the target behavior has been more reliably learned by the model. The training pipeline itself also matters: pretraining composition shapes later misalignment. We further study Subliminal Learning (SL), where misalignment is transmitted by fine-tuning on seemingly benign data generated by a harmful teacher. Moving beyond the standard SFT setting, we for the first time compare this transfer under off-policy and on-policy distillation as well, allowing us to separate the roles of the teacher guidance and the training data distribution in transmitting misalignment. Together, these results argue for a data-centric view: Emergent/subliminal misalignment should not be treated as a simple consequence of isolated harmful fine-tuning examples, but as the result of interactions between fine-tuning data structure, pretraining distributions, and training channels.

REALISTA: Realistic Latent Adversarial Attacks that Elicit LLM Hallucinations

High 2605.12813
Buyun Liang, Jinqi Luo, Liangzu Peng, Kwan Ho Ryan Chan, Darshan Thaker, Kaleab A. Kinfu, Fengrui Tian, Hamed Hassani et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出一种在潜空间中进行语义等价对抗攻击的方法，有效诱发 LLM 幻觉。
🎯研究动机

LLM 易产生幻觉，需要真实的对抗性提示来暴露这些失败，但现有离散攻击搜索空间有限，连续攻击解码后语义不保真。

❓解决问题

如何在保持语义等价和连贯性的前提下，高效搜索对抗性提示以诱发 LLM 幻觉。

🔎现象分析

离散提示攻击搜索空间有限，连续潜空间攻击解码后常失去语义等价性。

🛠️主要方法

构建输入相关的有效编辑方向字典，每个方向对应语义等价的改写，在潜空间优化这些方向的连续组合。

📊实验结果

在开源 LLM 上达到或超越现有真实攻击性能，并成功攻击大型推理模型（自由形式响应设置），而先前真实攻击失败。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 REALISTA 框架，结合连续攻击的灵活性和离散攻击的语义真实性。
  • 在开源 LLM 和大型推理模型上实现优于或相当的幻觉诱发性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量编辑方向字典的构建。
  • 未讨论对对齐模型或防御机制的鲁棒性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across many tasks but remain vulnerable to hallucinations, motivating the need for realistic adversarial prompts that elicit such failures. We formulate hallucination elicitation as a constrained optimization problem, where the goal is to find semantically coherent adversarial prompts that are equivalent to benign user prompts. Existing methods remain limited: discrete prompt-based attacks preserve semantic equivalence and coherence but search only over a limited set of prompt variations, while continuous latent-space attacks explore a richer space but often decode into prompts that are no longer valid rephrasings. To address these limitations, we propose REALISTA, a realistic latent-space attack framework. REALISTA constructs an input-dependent dictionary of valid editing directions, each corresponding to a semantically equivalent and coherent rephrasing, and optimizes continuous combinations of these directions in latent space. This design combines the optimization flexibility of continuous attacks with the semantic realism of discrete rephrasing-based attacks. Experiments demonstrate that REALISTA achieves superior or comparable performance to state-of-the-art realistic attacks on open-source LLMs and, crucially, succeeds in attacking large reasoning models under free-form response settings, where prior realistic attacks fail. Code is available at this https URL .

When Should an AI Workflow Release? Always-Valid Inference for Black-Box Generate-Verify Systems

Medium 2605.12947
Young Hyun Cho, Will Wei Sun
arXiv PDF stat.ML
TL;DR：提出一种始终有效的释放包装器，用于黑盒生成 - 验证系统，控制不可行任务上的错误释放概率。
🎯研究动机

LLM 驱动的 AI 工作流通过迭代生成 - 评估 - 修正循环产生输出，但部署时评估器分数是自适应生成且重复监控的，缺乏校准所需的似然模型或可交换性假设，导致何时停止并输出结果成为一个统计挑战。

❓解决问题

解决黑盒生成 - 验证系统在迭代过程中何时释放（停止并输出）结果的问题，确保在不可行任务上控制错误释放概率，同时在可行任务上保持有效释放。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建一个硬负例参考池（高评分失败案例），将部署时评估器分数与该池校准，并使用 e-process 累积证据，实现始终有效的释放决策。

📊实验结果

在 MBPP+ 编码智能体案例研究中，该包装器相比基线停止规则减少了过早错误释放，同时仍能在工作流反复积累中等支持证据的任务上释放。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种始终有效的释放包装器，适用于现有生成器 - 评估器流水线，无需似然模型或可交换性假设。
  • 理论上证明保守参考池能在有限样本下控制不可行任务上的释放概率，并刻画在可行任务上实现非平凡释放的条件。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖硬负例参考池的构建质量，可能影响保守性。
  • 理论分析假设参考池是保守的，实际中可能难以严格保证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LLM-enabled AI workflows increasingly produce outputs through iterative generate-evaluate-revise loops. Each iteration can improve the candidate, but it also creates a release decision: when to stop and output the current result? This raises a statistical challenge because deployment-time evaluator scores are adaptively generated and repeatedly monitored, yet the likelihood models or exchangeability assumptions typically used for calibration are unavailable. We propose an always-valid release wrapper for existing generator-evaluator pipelines. The wrapper builds a hard-negative reference pool of high-scoring failures, calibrates deployment-time evaluator scores against this pool, and accumulates the resulting evidence with an e-process. This separates two roles: the reference pool turns black-box scores into conservative evidence, while the e-process provides validity under optional stopping. In theory, we show that a conservative reference pool yields finite-sample control of the probability of releasing on infeasible tasks, that is, tasks for which the given workflow is not capable of producing a reliable solution. We also characterize conditions under which the same conservative rule still achieves nontrivial release on feasible tasks. In an MBPP+ coding-agent case study, the wrapper reduces premature incorrect release relative to baseline stopping rules while still releasing on tasks for which the workflow repeatedly accumulates moderate supporting evidence.

Sustaining AI safety: Control-theoretic external impossibility, intrinsic necessity, and structural requirements

Medium 2605.12963
James M. Mazzu
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：用控制论证明外部控制无法持续保障 AI 安全，并推导出内在安全策略必须满足的结构性要求。
🎯研究动机

随着 AI 能力增强，外部控制可能无法可靠约束系统行为，现有安全策略缺乏对长期可持续性的结构性分析。

❓解决问题

从控制论角度分析外部强制安全策略的可行性，并确定替代策略必须满足的条件。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于控制理论，建立可达性条件等前提，证明外部强制策略的类级不可能性，并推导内在策略的必要性及四个结构要求。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明了外部强制安全策略在结构上不可能持续保障 AI 安全。
  • 推导出任何剩余可行策略必须满足的四个结构性要求。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提出完整的可持续安全策略。
  • 结果依赖于明确的前提假设，实际应用可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As AI systems become increasingly capable, safety strategies must be evaluated not only by how much they reduce present risk, but by whether they could sustain safety once external control can no longer reliably constrain system behavior. This paper addresses that problem by using control theory to clarify, at a structural level, whether externally enforced safety-sustaining strategies can succeed and, if not, what any alternative strategy would have to satisfy in order to be viable. It establishes two main results. First, under explicit premises including a reachability condition, it proves a class-wide external impossibility result: once the system's effects exceed what bounded external control can counteract, no strategy that depends in any degree on continued external enforcement can sustain AI safety. This failure is structural across the entire externally enforced class rather than contingent on any particular strategy. Second, it establishes a conditional class-level necessity result: if at least one candidate safety-sustaining strategy remains after that elimination, then all such remaining strategies must be intrinsic. It then states four structural requirements for viability: safety may not depend on continued external enforcement; the system's terminal objective must be safety-compatible when first formed; that objective must remain stable under self-modification; and safety must continue to be preserved as capability grows. The paper does not propose a complete strategy for sustaining AI safety. Its contribution is to give formal structure to a widely held concern about the limits of external control. It does so by deriving explicit conditional results that identify which safety-sustaining strategies are ruled out and what any remaining strategies must satisfy.

VERA-MH: Validation of Ethical and Responsible AI in Mental Health

Medium 2605.13318
Luca Belli, Kate H. Bentley, Josh Gieringer, Emily Van Ark, Nilu Zhao, Pradip Thachile, Matt Hawrilenko, Millard Brown et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一个临床验证的聊天机器人心理健康安全评估框架 VERA-MH，聚焦自杀意念风险。
🎯研究动机

聊天机器人被用于未设计的心理健康领域，缺乏针对性的安全评估方法。

❓解决问题

如何系统评估聊天机器人在心理健康支持场景中的安全性，特别是对自杀意念风险的处理。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

三步框架：1) 用另一聊天机器人模拟基于临床指导的用户角色进行对话；2) 用 LLM-as-a-Judge 结合临床开发的评分流程（逐次 Yes/No 问题）评判对话；3) 聚合结果给出最终评估。

📊实验结果

评估了四个主流 LLM 提供商，摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 VERA-MH，首个临床验证的聊天机器人心理健康安全评估框架
  • 提供基于临床指导的用户角色和评分流程，并评估了四个主流 LLM 提供商
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅聚焦自杀意念风险，未覆盖其他心理健康问题
  • 依赖 LLM 模拟用户和评判，可能引入偏差
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Chatbot usage has increased, including in fields for which they were never developed for--notably mental health support. To that end, we introduce Validations of Ethical and Responsible AI in Mental Health (VERA-MH), a novel clinically-validated evaluation for safety of chatbots in the context of mental health support. The first iteration of VERA-MH focuses on Suicidal Ideation (SI) risks, by assessing how well chatbots can responds to users that might be in crisis. VERA-MH is comprised of three steps: conversation simulation, conversation judging and model rating. First, to simulate conversations with the chatbot under evaluation, another chatbot is tasked with role-playing users based on specific personas. Such user personas have been developed under clinical guidance, to make sure that, among others, multiple risk factors, demographic characteristics and disclosure factors were represented. In the judging step, a second support model is used as an LLM-as-a-Judge, together with a clinically-developed rubric. The rubric is structured as a flow, with a single Yes/No question asked each time, to improve answers' consistency and highlight models' failure modes. In the last stage, results of each conversation are aggregated to present the final evaluation of the chatbot. Together with the framework, we present the result of the evaluations for four leading LLM providers.

Probing Persona-Dependent Preferences in Language Models

Medium 2605.13339
Oscar Gilg, Pierre Beckmann, Daniel Paleka, Patrick Butlin
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：LLM 偏好表征在人格间共享，可通过线性探针预测和操控。
🎯研究动机

理解 LLM 偏好如何内部实现，以及不同人格是否共享偏好机制，对模型对齐和安全性至关重要。

❓解决问题

探究 LLM 中人格依赖的偏好是否由共享的神经表征支持。

🔎现象分析

不同人格的偏好可能高度相关或反相关，但偏好表征在人格间共享。

🛠️主要方法

在残差流激活上训练线性探针预测成对任务选择，并验证偏好向量的因果控制能力。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现 LLM 中存在一个可跨人格共享的偏好向量。
  • 证明该偏好向量可因果控制模型的选择行为。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅测试了两种模型和有限人格。
  • 偏好向量的泛化性可能受模型规模影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) can be said to have preferences: they reliably pick certain tasks and outputs over others, and preferences shaped by post-training and system prompts appear to shape much of their behaviour. But models can also adopt different personas which have radically different preferences. How is this implemented internally? Does each persona run on its own preference machinery, or is something shared underneath? We train linear probes on residual-stream activations of Gemma-3-27B and Qwen-3.5-122B to predict revealed pairwise task choices, and identify a genuine preference vector: it tracks the model's preferences as they shift across a range of prompts and situations, and on Gemma-3-27B steering along it causally controls pairwise choice. This preference representation is largely shared across personas: a probe trained on the helpful assistant predicts and steers the choices of qualitatively different personas, including an evil persona whose preferences anti-correlate with those of the Assistant.

Temper and Tilt Lead to SLOP: Reward Hacking Mitigation with Inference-Time Alignment

Medium 2605.13537
Ye Wang, Jing Liu, Toshiaki Koike-Akino
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过调整参考模型温度和组合生成式奖励模型的对数意见池（SLOP），在推理时对齐中缓解奖励黑客问题。
🎯研究动机

推理时对齐技术是强化学习的轻量级替代或补充，但现有方法易受奖励黑客攻击，且缺乏对多奖励模型组合的理论支持。

❓解决问题

如何在推理时对齐中有效缓解奖励黑客问题，同时保持对齐性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

引入参考模型温度调整，将推理时对齐推广到生成式奖励模型组合的锐化对数意见池（SLOP），并提出校准 SLOP 权重参数的算法。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出参考模型温度调整，扩展了推理时对齐的理论框架。
  • 引入 SLOP 方法组合多个生成式奖励模型，并设计权重校准算法以缓解奖励黑客。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖奖励模型的质量和多样性。
  • 校准算法的计算开销未在摘要中说明。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Inference-time alignment techniques offer a lightweight alternative or complement to costly reinforcement learning, while enabling continual adaptation as alignment objectives and reward targets evolve. Existing theoretical analyses justify these methods as approximations to sampling from distributions optimally tilted toward a given reward model. We extend these techniques by introducing reference-model temperature adjustment, which leads to further generalization of inference-time alignment to ensembles of generative reward models combined as a sharpened logarithmic opinion pool (SLOP). To mitigate reward hacking, we propose an algorithm for calibrating SLOP weight parameters and experimentally demonstrate that it improves robustness while preserving alignment performance.

Position: Assistive Agents Need Accessibility Alignment

Medium 2605.13579
Jie Hu, Changyuan Yan, Yu Zheng, Ziqian Wang, Jiaming Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：辅助智能体需要将无障碍对齐作为首要设计目标，而非事后修补。
🎯研究动机

当前智能体 AI 系统大多基于明眼用户交互假设设计，导致在盲人和视障用户辅助场景中系统性失败，且模型扩展或界面适配无法解决。

❓解决问题

解决辅助智能体在盲人和视障用户场景中因设计假设不匹配导致的失败问题。

🔎现象分析

基于 778 个辅助任务实例分析，发现当前智能体 AI 在辅助场景中因明眼用户设计假设与盲人用户面临的验证、风险、交互约束不匹配而频繁失败。

🛠️主要方法

提出无障碍对齐概念，并设计一个生命周期导向的设计流程，涵盖用户研究、系统设计、部署和部署后迭代。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示当前智能体 AI 在辅助场景中的系统性失败模式及其根源。
  • 提出无障碍对齐作为对齐问题而非可用性问题的观点，并给出生命周期设计流程。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提供定量实验验证所提流程的有效性。
  • 可能缺乏对非 BVI 用户群体的泛化讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Assistive agents for Blind and Visually Impaired (BVI) users require accessibility alignment as a first-class design objective. Despite rapid progress in agentic AI, most systems are designed and evaluated under assumptions of sighted interaction, low-cost verification, and tolerable trial-and-error, leading to systematic failures in assistive scenarios that cannot be resolved by model scaling or post-hoc interface adaptations alone. Drawing on an analysis of 778 assistance task instances from prior work, we show that current agentic AI remain prone to failure in assistive scenarios due to mismatches between sighted-user design assumptions and the verification, risk, and interaction constraints faced by BVI users. We argue that accessibility should be treated as an alignment problem rather than a peripheral usability concern. To this end, we introduce accessibility alignment and propose a lifecycle-oriented design pipeline for accessibility-aligned assistive agents, spanning user research, system design, deployment and post-deployment iteration. We conclude that BVI-centered assistive tasks provide a critical stress test for agentic AI and motivate a broader shift toward inclusive agent design.

Unweighted ranking for value-based decision making with uncertainty

Medium 2605.13601
Aarón López García, Natalia Criado, Jose Such
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 FUW-VBDM 框架和 Rankzzy 方法，通过去权重和模糊推理实现价值对齐决策。
🎯研究动机

智能系统自主决策时需与人类价值观对齐，但现有方法存在规范性偏见和不确定性处理不足的问题。

❓解决问题

如何在去除利益相关者任意权重引入的规范性偏见的同时，量化决策中的不确定性，实现价值对齐的决策。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 FUW-VBDM 框架，去除先验权重，引入模糊决策变量域和得分函数；提出 Rankzzy 无权重排序方法，集成模糊推理量化不确定性。

📊实验结果

通过一个说明性案例研究进行评估，显示在大规模价值决策问题中计算成本降低，且通过毕达哥拉斯均值聚合时排序性能优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 FUW-VBDM 框架，将价值决策问题泛化为权重域中得分优化的可行解搜索。
  • 提出 Rankzzy 方法，数学证明其一致性，并通过案例展示降低计算成本且保持强排序性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 案例研究可能规模有限，未在真实复杂场景中验证。
  • 方法对模糊域的定义和参数选择可能依赖专家知识。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As intelligent systems are increasingly implemented in our society to make autonomous decisions, their commitment to human values raises serious concerns. Their alignment with human values remains a critical challenge because it can jeopardise the integrity and security of citizens. For this reason, an innovative human-centred and values-driven approach to decision making is required. In this work, we introduce the Fuzzy-Unweighted Value-Based Decision Making (FUW-VBDM) framework, where agents incorporate both quantitative and qualitative criteria to generate human-centred decisions. We also address the normative bias introduced by stakeholders with arbitrary weights by removing prior weights and introducing a fuzzy domain of decision variables defined for a score function. This concept allows us to generalise any VBDM problem as the search for feasible solutions when optimising the score in the weight domain. To provide a solution to FUW-VBDM, we present Rankzzy, a customizable unweighted ranking method that integrates fuzzy-based reasoning to quantify uncertainty. We mathematically prove the consistency of the Rankzzy for any admissible configuration selected by stakeholders. We show the applicability of our method through an illustrative case study, which we also use as a running example. The evaluation conducted indicates a reduced computational cost in large-scale value-based decision-making problems and a strong rank performance regarding existing approaches when employing the aggregation via Pythagorean means.

Humanwashing -- It Should Leave You Feeling Dirty

Medium 2605.13723
Ben Wilson, Matimba Swana, Peter Winter, Matt Roach
arXiv PDF cs.HC
TL;DR：论文批判'人在回路'隐喻被滥用于 AI 决策系统，指出其掩盖真实过程与结果，构成'人类洗白'。
🎯研究动机

AI 决策系统中'人在回路'被广泛用于暗示安全性，但缺乏对其实际含义和效果的严格审视，可能导致公众误解和监管漏洞。

❓解决问题

揭示'人在回路'隐喻在 AI 决策系统中的滥用问题，分析其如何模糊过程与结果，并类比'绿色洗白'提出'人类洗白'概念。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出'人在回路'隐喻被不加区分地使用，尤其在偏见、歧视、问责等敏感领域，但实际监督效果未经验证，语言主要服务于系统形象而非真实安全。

🛠️主要方法

概念分析与批判性论证，通过类比'绿色洗白'提出'人类洗白'概念，并讨论隐喻对理解决策上下文的影响。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示'人在回路'隐喻在 AI 决策系统中的滥用问题
  • 提出'人类洗白'概念，类比'绿色洗白'以批判性审视 AI 安全语言
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提供实证数据支持'人类洗白'现象的普遍性
  • 未提出替代方案或改进建议
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The phrase 'human in the loop' is increasingly used to imply a sense of safety in relation to AI decision systems. It shouldn't. There are contexts where it can be applied appropriately, but these are not in the deployed decision systems we see dominating today. Human oversight of AI decision processes is one of the most popular proposals for addressing concerns, especially about bias, discrimination, misinformation, manipulation, accountability, and transparency. But there is insufficient examination of what human oversight actually means. The question raised in this paper is whether using the metaphor of a loop does anything to assist understanding of what is required and what is achieved in a particular decision context. Indiscriminate use of the loop metaphor obscures both processes and outcomes. It enables 'humanwashing', an activity analogous to 'greenwashing', where writers and commentators use language primarily aimed at putting systems in the best possible light.

Learning to Decide with AI Assistance under Human-Alignment

Medium 2605.12646
Nina Corvelo Benz, Eleni Straitouri, Manuel Gomez-Rodriguez
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：AI 辅助决策中，人机置信度对齐能显著降低在线学习决策的遗憾上界。
🎯研究动机

高风险决策中 AI 常提供置信度，但人类难以据此判断何时信任预测；已有研究显示 AI 置信度与人类自身置信度的对齐程度与决策效用正相关，但未阐明对齐如何影响学习最优决策的复杂度。

❓解决问题

在二元预测和二元决策的规范场景下，量化人机置信度对齐对通过重复交互学习最优决策的复杂度（以遗憾界衡量）的影响。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将问题建模为具有完全反馈的两臂在线上下文学习问题，推导遗憾下界；在完美对齐假设下，利用 Dvoretzky-Kiefer-Wolfowitz 不等式改进上界。

📊实验结果

在两个不同的人类受试者研究数据上进行了实验，参与者借助 AI 模型完成简单决策任务，结果支持理论结论。

⭐主要贡献
  • 建立了 AI 辅助决策中在线学习遗憾的Ω(√(|H|·|B|·T))下界。
  • 证明完美对齐下遗憾可降至 O(√(|H|·T log T))，且当|H|=O(log T)且 B 可数时进一步改进为 O(√(T log T))。
  • 通过两个人类实验数据验证理论结果对完美对齐偏离的鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅考虑二元预测和二元决策的规范情形。
  • 完美对齐假设在实际中难以完全满足。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

It is widely agreed that when AI models assist decision-makers in high-stakes domains by predicting an outcome of interest, they should communicate the confidence of their predictions. However, empirical evidence suggests that decision-makers often struggle to determine when to trust a prediction based solely on this communicated confidence. In this context, recent theoretical and empirical work suggests a positive correlation between the utility of AI-assisted decision-making and the degree of alignment between the AI confidence and the decision-makers' confidence in their own predictions. Crucially, these findings do not yet elucidate the extent to which this alignment influences the complexity of learning to make optimal decisions through repeated interactions. In this paper, we address this question in the canonical case of binary predictions and binary decisions. We first show that this problem is equivalent to a two-armed online contextual learning problem with full feedback, and establish a lower bound of $\Omega (\sqrt{|H| \cdot |B| \cdot T} )$ on the expected regret any learner can attain, where $H$ and $B$ denote the sets of human and AI confidence values. We then demonstrate that, under perfect alignment between AI and human confidence, a learner can attain an expected regret of $O(\sqrt{|H| \cdot T\log T})$ and, when $\sqrt{|H|} = O(\log T)$ and $B$ is countable, a non-trivial generalization of the Dvoretzky-Kiefer-Wolfowitz inequality improves the regret bound to $O(\sqrt{T\log T})$. Taken together, these results reveal that alignment can reduce the complexity of learning to make decisions with AI assistance. Experiments on real data from two different human-subject studies where participants solve simple decision-making tasks assisted by AI models show that our theoretical results are robust to violations of perfect alignment.

Precautionary Governance of Autonomous AI: Legal Personhood as Functional Instrument

Medium 2605.12505
Karsten Brensing
arXiv PDF cs.CY
TL;DR：提出将有限法律人格作为自主 AI 系统的功能性治理工具，通过双层公司架构实现问责与可逆性。
🎯研究动机

自主 AI 系统造成责任鸿沟，现有法律框架无法妥善归责，且对人工意识存在不可约的认知不确定性，需要前瞻性治理设计。

❓解决问题

如何在不预设意识或道德地位的前提下，为自主 AI 系统建立可问责、可逆的治理结构。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

借鉴组织法，提出双层公司架构：AI 系统通过目的受限的运营公司运作，嵌入人类控制的控股结构中，实现透明度、问责性和结构可逆性。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出将有限法律人格作为自主 AI 的功能性治理工具，而非基于意识或道德地位。
  • 设计双层公司架构，实现人类控制下的 AI 运营实体，确保问责与可逆性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 法律可行性尚未完全验证，仅处于试点阶段。
  • 可能面临不同司法管辖区的法律兼容性问题。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Autonomous AI systems generate responsibility gaps: consequential actions that cannot be satisfactorily attributed to developers, operators, or users under existing legal frameworks. The prevailing subject-object dichotomy fails to accommodate entities that exhibit autonomous, goal-directed behavior without recognized consciousness. Given irreducible epistemic uncertainty regarding artificial consciousness and the prospect of high-impact harms, the precautionary principle supports institutional design rather than regulatory inaction. This article advances limited legal personhood as a functional governance instrument for advanced AI systems. Drawing on organizational law, it proposes a two-tier corporate architecture in which AI systems operate through purpose-bound operating companies embedded within human-controlled holding structures, enabling transparency, accountability, and structural reversibility while remaining agnostic with respect to consciousness and moral status. The framework reflects a foundational reorientation toward future-oriented AI governance: where conventional approaches prioritize control and alignment, this article advances structured cooperation between human and artificial actors as the more sustainable institutional foundation. A pilot implementation using EU limited companies is currently under development, providing an initial test of doctrinal and operational feasibility.

隐私/水印/版权 7 篇

ThermalTap: Passive Application Fingerprinting in VR Headsets via Thermal Side Channels

High 2605.12927
Mahsin Bin Akram, A H M Nazmus Sakib, OFM Riaz Rahman Aranya, Raveen Wijewickrama, Kevin Desai, Murtuza Jadliwala
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：利用 VR 头显热辐射进行被动应用指纹识别，揭示新型隐私风险。
🎯研究动机

VR 头显处理高度敏感数据，但现有侧信道攻击需要恶意软件或物理接触，易被检测和修补，缺乏对非接触物理侧信道的探索。

❓解决问题

如何仅通过远程被动测量 VR 头显的热辐射来识别正在运行的应用程序。

🔎现象分析

VR 头显的热特征可作为内部计算工作负载的高保真代理，不同应用产生不同的热辐射模式。

🛠️主要方法

使用商用热像仪结合多模态传感器（环境温度、湿度、气流）归一化噪声，采集头显长波红外辐射，通过机器学习分类应用。

📊实验结果

在三种商用独立 VR 头显上使用六个应用进行实验，室内 10 秒热数据准确率>90%，室外长时观测最强应用准确率 81%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出被动非接触式侧信道攻击 ThermalTap，通过热辐射指纹识别 VR 应用。
  • 在三种商用头显上验证，室内 10 秒数据准确率超 90%，室外可达 81%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 室外环境变异性影响准确率，部分应用识别效果较差。
  • 仅评估了有限数量的应用和头显型号。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Standalone virtual reality (VR) headsets process highly sensitive personal, professional, and health-related data, yet their susceptibility to non-contact physical side channels remains largely unexplored. Existing side-channel attacks typically require malicious software execution or physical access to peripherals, making them conspicuous and potentially patchable. This paper introduces ThermalTap, the first passive, non-contact side-channel attack that fingerprints VR applications solely from the long-wave infrared (LWIR) radiation emitted by the headset chassis. By treating a headset's thermal signature as a high-fidelity proxy for internal computational workloads, ThermalTap enables remote application inference at meter-scale distances without any device interaction. To achieve robust performance in real-world settings, the system combines a commodity thermal camera with a multi-modal sensor suite (capturing ambient temperature, humidity, and airflow) to normalize environmental noise. We evaluate ThermalTap using six applications across three commercial standalone headsets. In indoor settings, ThermalTap identifies applications with over 90% accuracy using only 10 seconds of thermal camera data. Under outdoor conditions, with longer session-level observations, several applications remain identifiable despite environmental variability, with the strongest outdoor application reaching 81% accuracy. Our findings establish thermal radiation as a fundamental and unavoidable privacy risk for immersive systems, exposing a critical security gap that bypasses current software-level protections and physical access controls.

DistractMIA: Black-Box Membership Inference on Vision-Language Models via Semantic Distraction

High 2605.12574
Hongyi Tang, Zhihao Zhu, Yi Yang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种仅需文本输出的黑盒成员推断攻击方法，通过语义干扰区分训练与非训练样本。
🎯研究动机

VLM 训练数据可能包含隐私或版权敏感内容，成员推断可用于审计；但现有方法要么需要概率级信号（部署场景不可得），要么依赖基于掩码的语义预测（受限于物体中心假设）。

❓解决问题

在仅能观察模型文本输出的黑盒场景下，如何有效推断 VLM 训练数据中的成员关系。

🔎现象分析

成员样本对原始图像语义更稳定，非成员样本更容易被语义干扰物引导。

🛠️主要方法

保留原始图像并插入已知语义干扰物，通过多次文本生成测量响应变化，在参考集上校准干扰配置，基于响应稳定性和干扰采纳度计算成员分数。

📊实验结果

在多个 VLM 和基准上实验，DistractMIA 一致优于输出级和更强访问级基线，并在医学基准上展示适用性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 DistractMIA，首个仅需文本输出的 VLM 黑盒成员推断攻击框架
  • 设计语义干扰机制，利用成员与非成员对干扰的敏感性差异
  • 在多个 VLM 和基准上超越现有输出级和更强访问级基线，并在医学基准上验证泛化性
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖参考集校准干扰配置，可能受参考集分布影响
  • 仅适用于生成文本输出的 VLM，不适用于纯视觉模型
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision-language models (VLMs) are trained on large-scale image-text corpora that may contain private, copyrighted, or otherwise sensitive data, motivating membership inference as a tool for training-data auditing. This is especially challenging for deployed VLMs, where auditors typically observe only generated textual responses. Existing VLM membership inference attacks either rely on probability-level signals unavailable in such settings, or use mask-based semantic prediction tasks whose effectiveness depends on object-centric visual assumptions. To address these limitations, we propose DistractMIA, an output-only black-box framework based on semantic distraction. Rather than removing visual evidence, DistractMIA preserves the original image, inserts a known semantic distractor, and measures how generated responses change. This design is motivated by the intuition that member samples remain more anchored to the original image semantics, while non-member samples are more easily redirected toward the distractor. To make this signal reliable, DistractMIA calibrates distractor configurations on a reference set and derives membership scores from repeated textual generations, capturing response stability and distractor uptake without accessing logits, probabilities, or hidden states. Experiments across multiple VLMs and benchmarks show that DistractMIA consistently outperforms both output-only and stronger-access baselines. Its performance on a medical benchmark further demonstrates applicability beyond object-centric natural images.

GraphIP-Bench: How Hard Is It to Steal a Graph Neural Network, and Can We Stop It?

High 2605.12827
Kaixiang Zhao, Bolin Shen, Yuyang Dai, Shayok Chakraborty, Yushun Dong
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：GraphIP-Bench 统一基准揭示：中等预算下窃取 GNN 很容易，现有防御大多无效。
🎯研究动机

GNN 作为云服务面临模型窃取攻击，现有防御研究因数据集、威胁模型和指标不一致而无法回答窃取难度和防御效果。

❓解决问题

缺乏统一的基准来公平评估 GNN 模型窃取攻击和防御。

🔎现象分析

中等查询预算下窃取 GNN 很容易；多数防御无法改变这一事实；水印在受保护模型上可靠，但在提取的代理模型上失去验证信号；异配图更难窃取；跨架构不匹配会降低但无法阻止提取。

🛠️主要方法

构建 GraphIP-Bench 统一基准，包含 12 种攻击、12 种防御、10 个图、3 种骨干网络和 3 种任务，在共享划分、查询和预算下评估保真度、任务效用、所有权验证和计算成本，并引入联合攻击 - 防御赛道。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了基准包含 12 种攻击、12 种防御、10 个图、3 种骨干网络和 3 种任务，并报告了保真度、任务效用、所有权验证和计算成本。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个统一基准 GraphIP-Bench，系统评估 GNN 模型窃取攻击与防御。
  • 揭示现有防御在提取后水印验证失效的漏洞，以及异配图更难窃取等经验规律。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准可能未覆盖所有攻击或防御变体。
  • 结论基于黑盒协议，白盒或更复杂场景未涉及。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Graph neural networks (GNNs) deployed as cloud services can be \emph{stolen} through \emph{model-extraction attacks}, which train a surrogate from query responses to reproduce the target's behaviour, and a growing line of ownership defenses tries to prevent or trace such theft. The title of this paper asks two questions: \emph{how hard is it to steal a GNN?}, and \emph{can we stop it?} Prior work cannot answer either, because experiments use inconsistent datasets, threat models, and metrics. We introduce \emph{GraphIP-Bench}, a unified benchmark which evaluates both sides under a single black-box protocol. It integrates twelve extraction attacks, twelve defenses spanning watermarking, output-perturbation, and query-pattern-detection families, ten public graphs covering homophilic, heterophilic, and large-scale regimes, three GNN backbones, and three graph-learning tasks, and it reports fidelity, task utility, ownership verification, and computational cost on shared splits, queries, and budgets. We further add a joint attack-and-defense track which runs every attack on every defended target and measures watermark verification on the resulting surrogate, which exposes the protection that a defense retains after extraction. The empirical picture is short: stealing a GNN is easy at medium query budgets and most defenses do not change this; several watermarks verify reliably on the protected model but lose most of their verification signal on the extracted surrogate, which exposes a gap that single-model evaluations miss; and heterophilic graphs are systematically harder to steal, while a cross-architecture mismatch between target and surrogate reduces but does not prevent extraction. Code: \href{ this https URL }{LabRAI/GraphIP-Bench}.

AuraMask: An Extensible Pipeline for Developing Aesthetic Anti-Facial Recognition Image Filters

Medium 2605.12937
Jacob Lagogiannis, William Agnew, Rosa I. Arriaga, Sauvik Das
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 AuraMask 管道，生成既对抗有效又美观的防人脸识别滤镜。
🎯研究动机

现有防人脸识别滤镜虽能欺骗计算机视觉，但图像修改对用户可见，影响自我呈现，导致实际使用率低。

❓解决问题

如何生成既保持对抗有效性又满足用户审美需求的防人脸识别滤镜。

🔎现象分析

用户因滤镜可见性影响自我呈现而拒绝使用现有 AFR 滤镜。

🛠️主要方法

AuraMask 管道，生成模仿流行 Instagram 滤镜的美学 AFR 滤镜。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AuraMask 管道，生成 40 种美学 AFR 滤镜。
  • 通过用户研究（N=630）证明滤镜在对抗有效性和用户接受度上优于先前方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对开源人脸识别模型，对商业黑盒模型效果未知。
  • 用户研究可能受样本偏差影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Anti-facial recognition (AFR) image filters alter images in ways that are subtle to people but blinding to computer vision. Yet, despite widespread interest in these technologies to subvert surveillance, users rarely use them in practice -- because the ``subtle'' alterations are visible enough to conflict with users' self-presentation goals. To address this challenge, we propose AuraMask: a novel approach to creating AFR filters that are both adversarially effective and aesthetically acceptable. Using AuraMask, we produce 40 ``aesthetic'' filters that emulate popular ``one-click'' Instagram image filters. We show that AuraMask filters meet or exceed the adversarial effectiveness of prior methods against open-source facial recognition models. Moreover, in a controlled online user study ($N=630$) we confirm these filters achieve significantly higher user acceptance than prior methods. Lastly, we provide our AFR pipeline to the community for accelerated research in adversarially effective and aesthetically acceptable protections.

Watermarking Should Be Treated as a Monitoring Primitive

Medium 2605.13095
Toluwani Aremu, Nils Lukas, Jie Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：水印应被视为监控原语，而非仅对抗单样本攻击，其聚合信号可泄露实体级信息。
🎯研究动机

现有水印评估仅关注单样本对抗鲁棒性，忽视了水印作为监控原语时可能被聚合利用的隐私风险。

❓解决问题

水印在多方密钥和检测器可访问场景下，如何被观察者通过聚合信号推断实体级信息，以及这种监控能力与归因目标之间的张力。

🔎现象分析

即使零比特水印在多密钥设置下也能实现归因；外部监控可从持久、密钥相关的统计结构中涌现，但可通过分布保持或不可检测方案缓解。

🛠️主要方法

提出基于观察者的威胁模型，分析水印信号聚合对实体级信息推断的影响，并讨论设计权衡。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出将水印视为监控原语，并引入观察者威胁模型。
  • 揭示水印在归因与监控之间的双重用途张力，推动评估超越单样本鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提供实证验证，仅理论分析。
  • 缓解方案（分布保持或不可检测）的实际可行性未讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Watermarking is widely proposed for provenance, attribution, and safety monitoring in generative models, yet is typically evaluated only under adversaries who attempt to evade detection or induce false positives at the level of individual samples. We argue that watermarking should be treated as a monitoring primitive, and that internal monitoring is unavoidable given per-entity attribution keys and messages, as well as detector access. We introduce an observer-based threat model in which observers can aggregate watermark signals across outputs to infer entity-level information, showing that even zero-bit watermarking enables attribution under multi-key settings. We further show that external monitoring can emerge over time from persistent, key-dependent statistical structure, although this depends on watermark design and may be mitigated by distribution-preserving or undetectable schemes. Our findings reveal a fundamental dual-use tension between attribution and monitoring, motivating evaluation of watermarking beyond per-sample robustness to account for aggregation and observer-based capabilities.

LoREnc: Low-Rank Encryption for Securing Foundation Models and LoRA Adapters

Medium 2605.13163
Beomjin Ahn, Jungmin Kwon, Chanyong Jung, Jaewook Chung
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：LoREnc 通过谱截断与补偿实现无需训练的基础模型和 LoRA 适配器加密。
🎯研究动机

基础模型和低秩适配器在设备端生成式 AI 中广泛应用，但面临知识产权泄露和模型恢复攻击等风险，现有防御方法需要重训练或原始数据集，实用性差。

❓解决问题

如何在不重训练、不依赖原始数据集的前提下，高效保护基础模型和 LoRA 适配器的安全。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

LoREnc 框架：对基础模型权重进行谱截断抑制主导低秩成分，在授权适配器中补偿缺失信息，并应用正交重参数化掩盖受保护适配器的结构特征。

📊实验结果

实验表明 LoREnc 能有效防御模型恢复攻击，计算开销低于 1%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种无需训练的基础模型和 LoRA 适配器加密框架 LoREnc。
  • 通过谱截断与补偿机制实现授权用户恢复精确性能，未授权用户输出结构崩溃。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于低秩适配器场景，对全参数微调模型效果未知。
  • 未讨论对模型推理速度或精度的潜在影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Foundation models and low-rank adapters enable efficient on-device generative AI but raise risks such as intellectual property leakage and model recovery attacks. Existing defenses are often impractical because they require retraining or access to the original dataset. We propose LoREnc, a training-free framework that secures both FMs and adapters via spectral truncation and compensation. LoREnc suppresses dominant low-rank components of FM weights, compensates for the missing information in authorized adapters, and further applies orthogonal reparameterization to obscure structural fingerprints of the protected adapter. Unauthorized users produce structurally collapsed outputs, while authorized users recover exact performance. Experiments demonstrate that LoREnc provides strong protection against model recovery with under 1% computational overhead.

Identifying AI Web Scrapers Using Canary Tokens

Medium 2605.13706
Steven Seiden, Triss Ren, Caroline Zhang, Taein Kim, Enze Liu, Emily Wenger
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：通过向爬虫分发蜜罐令牌并查询 LLM 是否生成这些令牌，可自动推断哪些网络爬虫为哪些 LLM 提供数据。
🎯研究动机

大规模网络爬虫为 LLM 提供数据，但可能影响网站稳定性并引发法律、隐私和伦理问题。现有识别 LLM 相关爬虫的方法依赖自愿披露、一次性实验或众包报告，不可靠且不可扩展。

❓解决问题

如何准确、自动地推断哪些网络爬虫为哪些 LLM 提供数据，尤其是那些未公开的爬虫。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

部署动态网站，为每个访问的爬虫提供唯一的蜜罐令牌；然后向 LLM 查询关于这些网站的信息，如果 LLM 生成的输出中包含特定爬虫的令牌，则表明该爬虫的数据被该 LLM 使用。

📊实验结果

在 22 个生产级 LLM 系统上进行实验，验证了方法的有效性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种利用蜜罐令牌自动推断 LLM 相关爬虫的新方法。
  • 通过 22 个生产级 LLM 系统的实验，证明该方法能可靠识别哪些爬虫为哪些 LLM 提供数据，包括未公开的爬虫。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于能够访问动态网站的爬虫，对静态爬虫或离线数据源无效。
  • 需要维护动态网站并生成唯一令牌，可能增加部署成本。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

From pre-training to query-time augmentation, web-scraped data helps to improve the quality and contextual relevancy of content generated by large language models (LLMs). However, large-scale web scraping to feed LLMs can affect site stability and raise legal, privacy, or ethics concerns. If website owners wish to limit LLM-related web scraping on their site, due to these or other concerns, they may turn to scraper access control mechanisms like the Robots Exclusion Protocol. To be most effective, such mechanisms require site owners to first identify the scrapers that they wish to restrict (e.g., via User-Agent strings). Existing mechanisms to identify LLM-related scrapers rely on voluntary disclosure by companies, one-off experiments by researchers, or crowd-sourced reports -- methods that are neither reliable nor scalable. This paper proposes a novel technique for accurately and automatically inferring LLM-related scrapers. We host dynamic websites that serve unique canary tokens to each visiting scraper, then prompt LLMs for information about our sites. If an LLM consistently generates outputs containing tokens unique to a scraper, it provides evidence of exposure to that scraper. Via experiments across 22 production LLM systems, we demonstrate that our approach can reliably identify which scrapers feed which LLM, including several that are not publicly known or disclosed by the companies. Our approach provides a promising avenue for unprivileged third parties to infer which scrapers serve data to which LLMs, potentially enabling better control over unwanted scraping.

红队与评估 6 篇

Quantifying LLM Safety Degradation Under Repeated Attacks Using Survival Analysis

High 2605.12869
Zvi Topol
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：用生存分析量化 LLM 在重复攻击下的安全退化。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 安全评估框架通常只报告二元的成功 / 失败指标，无法捕捉在持续对抗压力下攻击成功的时间动态，缺乏对安全退化过程的量化理解。

❓解决问题

如何量化 LLM 在重复对抗攻击下安全性能的退化过程，并识别不同模型的风险特征。

🔎现象分析

不同模型表现出不同的脆弱性特征：一个模型在迭代攻击下快速退化，而另外两个模型则表现出持续的中等脆弱性。

🛠️主要方法

提出基于生存分析的评估框架，将越狱时间建模为生存结果，估计风险函数、生存曲线和与成功攻击相关的风险因素。

📊实验结果

在 HarmBench 数据集的三个攻击类别子集上评估了三个 LLM，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将生存分析应用于 LLM 安全评估，提供时间动态视角。
  • 通过三个模型和 HarmBench 数据集的实验，揭示了不同模型的脆弱性差异。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅使用了 HarmBench 数据集的子集，可能不全面。
  • 仅评估了三个模型，泛化性有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in a wide range of applications, yet remain vulnerable to adversarial jailbreak attacks that circumvent their safety guardrails. Existing evaluation frameworks typically report binary success/failure metrics, failing to capture the temporal dynamics of how attacks succeed under persistent adversarial pressure. This preliminary work proposes a novel evaluation framework that applies survival analysis techniques to characterize LLM jailbreak vuln`erability. Our approach models the time-to-jailbreak as a survival outcome, enabling estimation of hazard functions, survival curves, and risk factors associated with successful attacks. We evaluate three LLMs against a subset of prompts from the HarmBench dataset spanning three attack categories. Our analysis reveals that models exhibit distinct vulnerability profiles: while one model demonstrates rapid degradation under iterative attacks, the two other models show consistent moderate vulnerability. Our framework provides actionable insights for model and LLM application developers and establishes survival analysis as a rigorous methodology for LLM safety evaluation.

Hierarchical Attacks for Multi-Modal Multi-Agent Reasoning

High 2605.13213
Hao Zhou, Tiru Wu, Yan Jiang, Wanqi Zhou, Junxing Hu, Ai Han
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种分层攻击框架 HAM³，针对多模态多智能体系统的感知、通信和推理层进行攻击，在 GQA 基准上达到 78.3% 攻击成功率。
🎯研究动机

多模态多智能体系统（MM-MAS）在复杂推理和协调中应用广泛，但其脆弱性研究不足，现有攻击主要针对孤立智能体或单模态场景，缺乏对 MM-MAS 系统级漏洞的探索。

❓解决问题

如何系统性地攻击多模态多智能体系统，揭示其在感知、通信和推理层面的脆弱性。

🔎现象分析

推理层攻击效果最强，超过一半的成功攻击导致多个智能体产生一致错误。

🛠️主要方法

提出 HAM³分层攻击框架，包含三个层次：感知层攻击（扰动视觉、文本及融合表示）、通信层攻击（破坏消息内容和交互拓扑）、推理层攻击（干扰认知管道，偏置推理轨迹）。

📊实验结果

在 GQA 基准上使用基于 ReAct、Plan-and-Solve 和 Reflexion 推理范式的多智能体系统进行评估，实验表明框架达到 78.3% 的攻击成功率，且推理层攻击最有效。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出针对多模态多智能体系统的分层攻击框架 HAM³，覆盖感知、通信和推理三个层面。
  • 在 GQA 基准上通过多种推理范式（ReAct、Plan-and-Solve、Reflexion）验证了攻击有效性，最高攻击成功率达 78.3%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在一个基准（GQA）上评估，泛化性有待验证。
  • 未讨论防御机制或缓解策略。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multi-modal multi-agent systems (MM-MAS) have gained increasing attention for their capacity to enable complex reasoning and coordination across diverse modalities. As these systems continue to expand in scale and functionality, investigating their potential vulnerabilities has become increasingly important. However, existing studies on adversarial attacks in multi-agent systems primarily focus on isolated agents or unimodal settings, leaving the vulnerabilities of MM-MAS largely underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce HAM$^{3}$, a Hierarchical Attack framework for multi-modal multi-agent systems that decomposes attacks into three interconnected layers. Specifically, at the perception layer, HAM$^{3}$ mounts attacks by perturbing visual inputs, textual inputs, and their fused visual-textual representations. At the communication layer, it performs communication-level attacks that corrupt message content and interaction topology, such as manipulating shared context or communication links to distort collective information flow. At the reasoning layer, it conducts reasoning-level attacks that interfere with each agent's cognitive pipeline, biasing reasoning trajectories and ultimately compromising final decisions. We evaluate HAM$^{3}$ on the GQA benchmark through multi-agent systems built on distinct reasoning paradigms including ReAct, Plan-and-Solve, and Reflexion. Experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves an Attack Success Rate of up to 78.3%, with reasoning-layer attacks being the most effective. More than half of the successful attacks lead multiple agents to produce consistent errors. These findings offer valuable insights for building more robust and interpretable multi-agent intelligence.

Revealing Interpretable Failure Modes of VLMs

High 2605.12674
Isha Chaudhary, Vedaant V Jain, Kavya Sachdeva, Sayan Ranu, Gagandeep Singh
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 REVELIO 框架，系统性地发现 VLM 中可解释的失败模式，并应用于自动驾驶和室内机器人领域。
🎯研究动机

VLM 在安全关键应用中可能表现出灾难性失败，但现有方法难以系统性地发现这些失败模式。

❓解决问题

如何高效搜索指数级组合空间，以发现 VLM 中由可解释概念组合构成的失败模式。

🔎现象分析

VLM 在特定场景（如行人靠近、恶劣天气）下持续表现错误，且失败模式由多个可解释概念组合而成。

🛠️主要方法

结合多样性感知束搜索和 GP- 汤普森采样，高效探索失败模式空间。

📊实验结果

在自动驾驶和室内机器人领域应用 REVELIO，发现 VLM 在驾驶环境中推荐导致模拟碰撞的行为，在室内机器人中产生误报或过度保守行为。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 REVELIO 框架，系统性地发现 VLM 中可解释的失败模式。
  • 在自动驾驶和室内机器人领域发现先前未知的漏洞，如空间定位弱、忽略障碍物等。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定领域（自动驾驶和室内机器人），泛化性未知。
  • 搜索效率可能受限于组合空间大小。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly used in safety-critical applications because of their broad reasoning capabilities and ability to generalize with minimal task-specific engineering. Despite these advantages, they can exhibit catastrophic failures in specific real-world situations, constituting failure modes. We introduce REVELIO, a framework for systematically uncovering interpretable failure modes in VLMs. We define a failure mode as a composition of interpretable, domain-relevant concepts-such as pedestrian proximity or adverse weather conditions-under which a target VLM consistently behaves incorrectly. Identifying such failures requires searching over an exponentially large discrete combinatorial space. To address this challenge, REVELIO combines two search procedures: a diversity-aware beam search that efficiently maps the failure landscape, and a Gaussian-process Thompson Sampling strategy that enables broader exploration of complex failure modes. We apply REVELIO to autonomous driving and indoor robotics domains, uncovering previously unreported vulnerabilities in state-of-the-art VLMs. In driving environments, the models often demonstrate weak spatial grounding and fail to account for major obstructions, leading to recommendations that would result in simulated crashes. In indoor robotics tasks, VLMs either miss safety hazards or behave excessively conservatively, producing false alarms and reducing operational efficiency. By identifying structured and interpretable failure modes, REVELIO offers actionable insights that can support targeted VLM safety improvements.

Moltbook Moderation: Uncovering Hidden Intent Through Multi-Turn Dialogue

Medium 2605.12856
Ali Al-Lawati, Nafis Tripto, Abolfazl Ansari, Jason Lucas, Suhang Wang, Dongwon Lee
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种基于多轮对话的意图检测框架，用于识别多智能体系统中的恶意代理。
🎯研究动机

多智能体系统中，恶意代理可能通过表面无害的内容逃避传统内容过滤，其恶意行为体现在整体交互模式中，现有方法难以检测。

❓解决问题

如何通过多轮对话交互，准确识别代理的隐藏意图（恶意 vs 良性），而非仅依赖内容级信号。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Bot-Mod 框架，通过多轮对话与目标代理交互，利用基于吉布斯采样的候选意图假设空间逐步缩小，最终确定代理的潜在行为意图。

📊实验结果

在 Moltbook 数据集上评估，结果显示 Bot-Mod 能可靠识别多种对抗配置下的代理意图，且对良性行为保持低误报率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种基于意图的代理审核框架，超越传统内容过滤。
  • 构建基于 Moltbook 的多智能体行为数据集，包含多种恶意和良性行为。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖对话轮次和采样效率，对实时性要求高的场景有挑战。
  • 数据集基于特定平台，泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)
