The emergence of multi-agent systems introduces novel moderation challenges that extend beyond content filtering. Agents with {\em malicious intent} may contribute harmful content that appears benign to evade content-based moderation, while compromising the system through exploitative and malicious behavior manifested across their overall interaction patterns within the community. To address this, we introduce \textsc{\textbf{Bot-Mod}} (\textsc{\textbf{Bot-Mod}}eration), a moderation framework that grounds detection in agent intent rather than traditional content level signals. \method{} identifies the underlying intent by engaging with the target agent in a multi-turn exchange guided by Gibbs-based sampling over candidate intent hypotheses. This progressively narrows the space of plausible agent objectives to identify the underlying behavior. To evaluate our approach, we construct a dataset derived from Moltbook that encompasses diverse benign and malicious behaviors based on actual community structures, posts, and comments. Results demonstrate that \textsc{\textbf{Bot-Mod}} reliably identifies agent intent across a range of adversarial configurations, while maintaining a low false positive rate on benign behaviors. This work advances the foundation for scalable, intent-aware moderation of agents in open multi-agent environments.

Amplification to Synthesis: A Comparative Analysis of Cognitive Operations Before and After Generative AI

Medium 2605.13785
Liz Cho, Dongwook Yoon
arXiv PDF cs.CY
TL;DR：对比 2016 和 2024 年美国大选 X 平台数据，发现生成式 AI 使认知操作从机器人驱动的放大转向主动内容生成与叙事精准定位。
🎯研究动机

认知操作在政治领域日益重要，生成式 AI 的出现可能根本改变了其设计与执行方式，但缺乏实证研究来揭示这种演变，导致国家缺乏有效防御策略。

❓解决问题

如何量化并比较生成式 AI 出现前后认知操作在行为与语言协调模式上的差异。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到 2024 年数据集相比 2016 年呈现显著变化：原创内容从 59% 升至 93%，转发几乎消失；词汇重叠度从平均 Jaccard 分数 0.99 降至 0.27，帖子围绕相同主题但用词高度分化；时间协调从跨语义同步转为叙事集中的共现。这些模式指向主动内容生成与叙事特定目标的操作逻辑，与生成式 AI 参与特征一致。

🛠️主要方法

收集 2016 和 2024 年美国大选期间 X 平台超过 13.3 万条帖子，采用帖子类型分布、语义聚类、时间同步分析和基于 Jaccard 的词汇重叠度量进行对比分析。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次实证对比生成式 AI 出现前后认知操作的行为与语言协调模式，揭示从放大到合成的转变。
  • 为未来研究生成式 AI 在认知操作管道中的作用提供经验基线，并为安全从业者开发后生成式 AI 威胁环境下的检测框架提供实用参考。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅分析美国大选场景，结论可能不适用于其他政治或文化背景。
  • 未直接验证生成式 AI 的因果作用，仅基于模式推断。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Cognitive operations are a rising concern in the geopolitical sphere, a quiet yet rigorous fight for public perception and decision making. While such operations have been extensively studied in the context of bot-driven amplification, the emergence of generative AI introduces a new set of capabilities that may have fundamentally altered how these operations are designed and executed. The possible evolution of cognitive operation via generative AI puts nation states vulnerable without proper mitigation strategies. To address this, we compared behavioral and linguistic coordination patterns in X (formerly Twitter) datasets from the 2016 and 2024 U.S. presidential elections. Utilizing a combined corpus of over 133,000 posts, we applied post-type distribution, semantic clustering, temporal synchrony analysis, and Jaccard-based lexical overlap measures. Findings suggest that the 2024 corpus exhibits a distinct pattern from 2016. Original content rose from 59% to 93% with retweets virtually disappeared; lexical overlap collapsed from a mean Jaccard score of 0.99 to 0.27, with posts converging on the same subject matter expressed in markedly different words; and temporal coordination shifted from pervasive cross-semantic synchrony to narratively concentrated co-occurrence. Taken together, these patterns point toward an operational logic organized around active content generation and narrative-specific targeting - characteristics consistent with generative AI involvement. These findings offer an empirical baseline for future research investigating generative AI's role in the cognitive operation pipeline, and as a practical reference point for security practitioners developing detection frameworks calibrated to the post-generative AI threat environment.

Improving Reproducibility in Evaluation through Multi-Level Annotator Modeling

Medium 2605.13801
Deepak Pandita, Flip Korn, Chris Welty, Christopher M. Homan
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出多层级自助法建模标注者行为，分析标注者数量与标注次数对评估可重复性的影响。
🎯研究动机

生成式 AI 模型评估面临可重复性危机，人类标注者引入偏差和主观性，但缺乏研究标注者池大小如何影响实验可重复性的数据。

❓解决问题

如何建模标注者行为并分析标注项数量（N）与每项标注次数（K）之间的权衡，以实现统计显著性。

🔎现象分析

标准评估实践通常每项仅 3-5 个标注，且缺乏持久标注者标识符，难以建模个体方差。

🛠️主要方法

多层级自助法（multi-level bootstrapping approach），利用具有大量评分和持久标注者标识符的数据集。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出多层级自助法建模标注者行为
  • 分析 N 与 K 的权衡以实现统计显著性
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定数据集特性
  • 未讨论不同标注任务类型的影响
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As generative AI models such as large language models (LLMs) become more pervasive, ensuring the safety, robustness, and overall trustworthiness of these systems is paramount. However, AI is currently facing a reproducibility crisis driven by unreliable evaluations and unrepeatable experimental results. While human raters are often used to assess models for utility and safety, they introduce divergent biases and subjective opinions into their annotations. Overcoming this variance is exceptionally challenging because very little data exists to study how experimental repeatability actually improves as the annotator pool grows. Standard evaluation practices typically rely on a small number of annotations per item (often 3 to 5) and lack the persistent rater identifiers necessary to model individual variance across items. In this work, we introduce a multi-level bootstrapping approach to realistically model annotator behavior. Leveraging datasets with a large number of ratings and persistent rater identifiers, we analyze the tradeoffs between the number of items ($N$) and the number of responses per item ($K$) required to achieve statistical significance.

公平性与偏见 5 篇

Do Fair Models Reason Fairly? Counterfactual Explanation Consistency for Procedural Fairness in Credit Decisions

High 2605.12701
Gideon Popoola, John Sheppard
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：公平模型可能对不同群体使用不同推理，提出反事实解释一致性（CEC）框架来检测和缓解这种隐藏的程序性偏见。
🎯研究动机

在信用决策等敏感领域，机器学习模型常追求结果公平，但即使结果公平，模型可能对不同群体使用根本不同的推理，这种隐藏的程序性偏见被现有公平性指标和算法忽略。

❓解决问题

现有结果公平模型存在隐藏的程序性偏见，即对个体使用不同推理，需要检测和缓解这种偏见。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，满足结果公平指标的模型仍可能对个体应用根本不同的推理，这是一种被忽视的隐藏程序性偏见。

🛠️主要方法

提出反事实解释一致性（CEC）框架，通过对齐个体与其反事实对应物的特征归因来检测和缓解偏见，包括最近邻反事实生成方法、用于积分梯度比较的修改基线、个体级程序公平性度量及相应训练损失。

📊实验结果

在合成数据、German Credit、Adult Income 和 HMDA 抵押贷款数据上实验，结果表明结果公平基线存在显著隐藏偏见，而 CEC 以适度效用成本大幅减少偏见。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CEC 框架检测和缓解隐藏的程序性偏见
  • 引入识别“Regime B”（相同结果，不同推理）作为关键盲点的分类法
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖反事实生成的质量
  • 效用成本可能在某些场景下不可忽略
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Machine learning algorithms in socially sensitive domains (e.g., credit decisions) often focus on equalizing predictive outcomes. However, satisfying these metrics does not guarantee that models use the same reasoning for different groups. We show that existing outcome-fair models can still apply fundamentally different reasoning to individuals, a ``hidden procedural bias'' missed by standard fairness metrics and algorithms. We propose Counterfactual Explanation Consistency (CEC), a framework that detects and mitigates this bias by aligning feature attributions between individuals and their counterfactual counterparts. Key contributions include a nearest-neighbor counterfactual generation method, a modified baseline for integrated gradient comparisons, an individual-level procedural fairness metric, and a corresponding training loss. We introduce a taxonomy identifying ``Regime B'' (same outcome, different reasoning) as a critical blind spot. Experiments on synthetic data, German Credit, Adult Income, and HMDA mortgage data demonstrate that outcome-fair baselines exhibit substantial hidden bias, while CEC substantially reduces it with modest utility cost.

DisaBench: A Participatory Evaluation Framework for Disability Harms in Language Models

High 2605.12702
Eugenia Kim, Ioana Tanase, Christina Mallon
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：DisaBench 是一个参与式评估框架，专门用于评估语言模型中的残疾相关伤害。
🎯研究动机

通用安全基准无法充分评估残疾相关伤害，需要专门框架。

❓解决问题

现有安全基准缺乏对残疾相关伤害的系统评估。

🔎现象分析

伤害率因残疾类型而异，并在非文本模态中叠加；术语驱动的伤害具有文化和时间依赖性；标准安全评估遗漏了只有领域专家才能识别的细微伤害。

🛠️主要方法

与残疾人和红队专家共同创建 12 类残疾伤害分类法，结合良性 / 对抗性提示的评估方法，以及 175 个提示和 525 个提示 - 响应对的数据集。

📊实验结果

由四位有残疾生活经验的评估者进行标注，发现伤害率因残疾类型而异，术语驱动伤害具有文化依赖性，标准评估遗漏细微伤害。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 DisaBench 框架，包含 12 类残疾伤害分类法
  • 提供 175 个提示的数据集及人工标注
  • 揭示标准安全基准的不足，强调领域专业知识的重要性
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集规模有限（175 个提示）
  • 评估者数量较少（4 位）
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

General-purpose safety benchmarks for large language models do not adequately evaluate disability-related harms. We introduce DisaBench: a taxonomy of twelve disability harm categories co-created with people with disabilities and red teaming experts, a taxonomy-driven evaluation methodology that pairs benign and adversarial prompts across seven life domains, and a dataset of 175 prompts with human-annotated labels on 525 prompt-response pairs. Annotation by four evaluators with lived disability experience reveals three findings: harm rates vary sharply by disability type and will compound in non-text modalities, terminology-driven harm is culturally and temporally bound rather than universally assessable, and standard safety evaluation catches overt failures while missing the subtle harms that only domain expertise can recognize. Disability harm is simultaneously personal, intersectional, and community-defined: it cannot be isolated from the full context of who a person is, and general-purpose benchmarks systematically miss it. We will release the dataset, taxonomy, and methodology via Hugging Face and an open-source red teaming framework for direct integration into existing safety pipelines with no additional infrastructure.

In-Situ Behavioral Evaluation for LLM Fairness, Not Standardized-Test Scores

High 2605.12530
Zeyu Tang, Sang T. Truong, Deonna Owens, Shreyas Sharma, Yibo Jacky Zhang, Brando Miranda, Sanmi Koyejo
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出用多轮对话行为评估 LLM 公平性，而非标准化测试。
🎯研究动机

标准化测试范式在评估 LLM 公平性时存在结构性不可靠性，表面提示构造选择会显著影响得分方差和结论方向，导致模型排名严重不一致。

❓解决问题

现有标准化测试范式无法可靠评估 LLM 的公平性，需要更贴近实际交互的行为评估方法。

🔎现象分析

标准化测试中，与公平性问题正交的提示构造选择解释了大部分得分方差，改变了公平性结论的方向和幅度，并导致模型排名严重不一致。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MAC-Fairness 多智能体对话框架，将标准化测试问题作为对话种子，通过多轮对话中身份变化来评估模型的位置坚持性和同伴接受性，生成 800 万条对话记录。

📊实验结果

在 800 万条对话记录上评估了多个模型和身份配置，分析了位置坚持性和同伴接受性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了标准化测试范式在 LLM 公平性评估中的结构性不可靠性。
  • 提出了基于多智能体对话的现场行为评估框架 MAC-Fairness。
  • 通过大规模实验发现了稳定且模型特定的行为特征，可跨不同公平性基准泛化。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类型的公平性问题。
  • 多智能体框架的计算成本较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LLM fairness should be evaluated through in-situ conversational behavior rather than standardized-test Q&A benchmarks. We show that the standardized-test paradigm can be structurally unreliable: surface-level prompt construction choices, although entirely orthogonal to the fairness question being tested, account for the majority of score variance, shift fairness conclusions in both the direction and the magnitude, and result in severe discordance in model rankings. We develop MAC-Fairness, a multi-agent conversational framework that embeds controlled variation factors into multi-round dialogue for in-situ behavior evaluation, examining how models' conversational behavior shifts when identity is varied as part of natural multi-agent interaction. Repurposing standardized-test questions as conversation seeds rather than as the evaluation instrument, we evaluate position persistence (how they hold positions, from the self-perspective) and peer receptiveness (how receptive they are to peers, from the other-perspective) across 8 million conversation transcripts spanning multiple models and identity presence configurations. In-situ behavioral evaluation reveals stable, model-specific behavioral signatures that could generalize across benchmarks differing in fairness targets and evaluation methodologies, a form of evidence the standardized-test paradigm does not offer.

Context Matters: Auditing Gender Bias in T2I Generation through Risk-Tiered Use-Case Profiles

Medium 2605.13113
Jose Luna, Yankun Wu, Xiaofei Xie, Noa Garcia
arXiv PDF cs.CY
TL;DR：提出风险分层的审计框架 THUMB，系统评估 T2I 模型中的性别偏见。
🎯研究动机

现有 T2I 性别偏见评估指标碎片化，缺乏统一视角和部署上下文关联，限制了审计和治理的有效性。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个与风险等级对齐、考虑部署上下文的系统性性别偏见审计框架。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 THUMB 框架，包含风险分层用例画像、指标目录（性别预测、嵌入相似度、下游任务）和伤害类型学，将风险类别、评估指标和伤害联系起来。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出与 EU AI Act 风险类别对齐的风险分层用例画像，明确不同部署场景的审计期望。
  • 构建性别偏见评估指标目录，并引入伤害类型学，将上下文相关的伤害类别映射到具体风险场景。
  • 提出 THUMB 卡片，系统化审计流程，整合上下文、场景、偏见表现、伤害假设和审计策略。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架可能依赖专家定义的风险类别和伤害类型，主观性较强。
  • 未提供实证验证，实际应用效果未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Text-to-image (T2I) generative models are increasingly used to produce content for education, media, and public-facing communication, and are starting to be integrated into higher-impact pipelines. Since generated images tend to reinforce stereotypes, producing representational erasure via "default" depictions and shaping perceptions of who belongs in certain roles, a growing body of work has proposed metrics to quantify gender bias in T2I outputs. Yet existing evaluations remain fragmented. Metrics are often reported without a shared view of what they measure, what assumptions they entail, or how their results should be interpreted under different deployment contexts. This limits the usefulness of gender bias measurement for both technical auditing and emerging governance discussions. We propose a risk-aligned auditing framework for gender bias in T2I models composed of three constituents that connects risk categories, evaluation metrics, and harms. First, we identify risk-tiered use-case profiles aligned with the EU AI Act's risk categories to motivate why auditing expectations may vary with deployment contexts and stakeholder exposure. Second, we construct a metric catalog that consolidates gender-bias evaluation methods and organizes them in three measurement categories: gender prediction, embedding similarity, and downstream task. Third, we introduce a harm typology that maps context-dependent harm categories (e.g., representational, quality-of-service) to specific risk-tired scenarios. Finally, we introduce THUMB cards (Text-to-image Harms-informed Use-case-aligned Metrics of gender Bias) that help formulate auditing systematically by the incorporation of context, scenario and bias manifestation, harm hypotheses, and audit strategy.

The End Justifies the Mean: A Linear Ranking Rule for Proportional Sequential Decisions

Medium 2605.12717
Carmel Baharav, Niclas Boehmer, Bailey Flanigan, Maximilian T. Wittmann
arXiv PDF cs.GT
TL;DR：提出角均值规则实现长期个体比例性，平衡多投票者偏好。
🎯研究动机

AI 对齐和参与式设计需要集体选择重复使用的决策规则，但现有算术均值规则存在严重多数主义问题，难以平衡不同投票者的分歧意见。

❓解决问题

如何为线性排序规则设计一个满足个体比例性（IP）的集体评分向量，使得每种投票者类型在长期或每批次中按人口比例获得同意。

🔎现象分析

算术均值规则具有严重多数主义倾向；固定线性规则无法实现精确的每批次 IP，但批次间与长期 IP 的差距随批次大小快速缩小。

🛠️主要方法

提出角均值规则（angular mean），即评分向量的球面模拟算术均值，作为集体评分向量。

📊实验结果

在三个真实世界偏好数据集上实验，显示当投票者偏好同质时所有规则表现相似，而在高度分歧场景下角均值规则显著改善比例性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明角均值规则满足长期个体比例性（long-run IP）。
  • 证明精确的每批次 IP 对于固定线性规则是不可能的，但批次间与长期 IP 的差距随批次大小快速缩小。
  • 在三个真实世界偏好数据集上实验验证角均值规则在高度分歧场景下显著改善比例性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅适用于线性排序规则，未推广到其他决策规则。
  • 长期 IP 可能在实际应用中难以保证，因为需要无限时间平均。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

AI alignment and participatory design motivate a new democratic design problem: how to collectively choose a decision rule to use repeatedly. We study this problem for linear ranking rules, which repeatedly rank items $x_j$ within batches $X=(x_1,\dots,x_m)\in(\mathbb{R}^d)^m$, where each item's ranking is dictated by its score $\langle \theta^*,x_j\rangle$ according to a fixed scoring vector $\theta^*$. Given voters' preferred scoring vectors $\theta^{(1)},\dots,\theta^{(n)}$ and their population fractions $\alpha^{(1)},\dots,\alpha^{(n)}$, we ask how to choose a collective vector $\theta^*$ satisfying individual proportionality (IP): every voter type $i$ should agree with the resulting rankings to an $\alpha^{(i)}$-proportional degree, either on average over time (long-run IP) or even within each batch (per-batch IP). The default rule, the arithmetic mean of the $\theta^{(i)}$, has been shown to be severely majoritarian; more generally, it is not clear that any fixed linear rule can balance many voters' disparate opinions. Our main result is that, surprisingly, there is a simple rule that does satisfy long-run IP: the angular mean, the spherical analog of the arithmetic mean. We then show that exact per-batch IP is impossible for fixed linear rules, but that the gap between per-batch and long-run IP shrinks quickly with batch size. Experiments on three real-world preference datasets show that all rules perform similarly when voters' preferences are homogeneous, while the angular mean substantially improves proportionality in high-disagreement regimes.

其他 3 篇

"It became a self-fulfilling prophecy": How Lived Experiences are Entangled with AI Predictions in Menstrual Cycle Tracking Apps

Medium 2605.13261
Wendy Zhou, Pelin Karaturhan, Alexandra Weilenmann, Jichen Zhu
arXiv PDF cs.HC
TL;DR：经期追踪应用中 AI 预测与用户生活体验相互纠缠，导致自我实现预言效应。
🎯研究动机

经期追踪应用中的 AI 预测功能日益普及，但缺乏对用户生活体验影响的深入研究，尤其是 AI 预测如何与用户感知和意义建构相互纠缠。

❓解决问题

探究经期追踪应用中 AI 预测功能如何影响用户的生活体验，以及用户如何与这些预测互动并产生意义。

🔎现象分析

用户根据 AI 预测理解自身体验，但预测可能因记录不完善而有误；界面和解释不支持用户对纠缠的批判性参与；非规范用户感到孤立。

🛠️主要方法

通过 14 次半结构化用户访谈和群体自我民族志方法，分析用户与 AI 预测的纠缠过程。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示经期追踪应用中 AI 预测与用户生活体验的纠缠机制
  • 提出针对预测性 AI 功能和解释的设计启示
⚠️方法局限
  • 样本量较小，可能不具广泛代表性
  • 未涉及不同文化背景或应用类型的差异
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In menstrual cycle tracking apps (MCTAs), AI-based predictions and insights have become increasingly popular. These features enable users to receive personalized information about their bodies and mental states. However, there is currently little research on how these predictive AI features and explanations affect users' lived experiences. This paper examines human-AI entanglement in MCTAs through 14 semi-structured user interviews and a group autoethnography. These methods uncover the processes leading to this phenomenon. Our results reveal that: (1) users understand their lived experiences in light of AI predictions, although these predictions can be faulty due to imperfect logging practices, (2) the user interface features and AI explanations do not support awareness or critical engagement with this entanglement and meaning-making, and (3) non-normative MCTA users report a sense of isolation in this entangled interaction. Based on our findings, we propose design implications for predictive AI features and explanations.

TRIAGE: Evaluating Prospective Metacognitive Control in LLMs under Resource Constraints

Medium 2605.13414
Zabir Al Nazi, Shubhashis Roy Dipta
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：LLM 在资源约束下缺乏前瞻性元认知控制能力，TRIAGE 框架揭示了这一未测量的能力维度。
🎯研究动机

将 LLM 部署为自主智能体时，不仅需要任务准确率，还需要在有限资源下做出前瞻性决策（如选择任务、排序、分配计算量），这是人类认知中研究数十年的元认知控制，但 LLM 是否具备此能力尚未被测试。

❓解决问题

评估 LLM 在有限 token 预算下，能否在没有执行反馈的情况下，制定一个联合编码任务选择、排序和每问题资源分配的单一有序计划。

🔎现象分析

当前 LLM 在前瞻性元认知控制上存在显著差距，揭示了一个此前未测量的能力维度，直接影响资源高效的智能体部署。

🛠️主要方法

提出 TRIAGE 评估框架：模型接收任务池和基于自身基线成本校准的 token 预算，输出一个有序计划；计划通过与拥有完全信息的 oracle 对比得到分诊效率比。

📊实验结果

评估了前沿和开源模型，包括有无推理能力，覆盖竞赛数学、研究生级科学、代码生成和专家多学科知识。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 TRIAGE 框架，用于评估 LLM 在资源约束下的前瞻性元认知控制能力。
  • 在多个领域（竞赛数学、研究生级科学、代码生成、专家多学科知识）上评估了前沿和开源模型，发现显著能力差距。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架可能未涵盖所有实际资源约束场景。
  • oracle 假设可能过于理想化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deploying language models as autonomous agents requires more than per-task accuracy: when an agent faces a queue of problems under a finite token budget, it must decide which to attempt, in what order, and how much compute to commit to each, all before any execution feedback is available. This is the prospective form of metacognitive control studied for decades in human cognition, yet whether language models possess it remains untested. We introduce TRIAGE, an evaluation framework in which a model receives a task pool and a token budget calibrated to its own baseline cost, and commits to a single ordered plan that jointly encodes selection, sequencing, and per-problem allocation. Plans are scored against an oracle with full knowledge of the model's solvability and cost on each problem, yielding a triage efficiency ratio on a common scale. We evaluate frontier and open-source models, with and without reasoning enabled, across competition mathematics, graduate-level science, code generation, and expert multidisciplinary knowledge, and find that current language models exhibit substantial gaps in prospective metacognitive control, revealing a previously unmeasured capability dimension with direct implications for resource-efficient agent deployment.

Beyond Anthropomorphism: Exploring the Roles of Perceived Non-humanity and Structural Similarity in Deep Self-Disclosure Toward Generative AI

Medium 2605.13574
Satoru Shibuya
arXiv PDF cs.HC
TL;DR：用户对生成式 AI 的深度自我表露不仅受拟人化影响，还受感知非人性和结构相似性驱动。
🎯研究动机

现有研究多聚焦拟人化对 AI 自我表露的影响，但忽略了非人性和逻辑对齐等心理因素，这些因素可能降低评价焦虑并促进信任。

❓解决问题

探究感知非人性和结构相似性如何影响用户对生成式 AI 的深度自我表露。

🔎现象分析

高感知非人性和高结构相似性的用户组自我表露可能性显著高于基线组（OR=11.35），且表露深度存在组间差异。

🛠️主要方法

基于 2025 年收集的 2400 名参与者的横截面调查数据，使用逻辑回归和方差分析检验感知非人性和结构相似性与自我表露发生及深度的关联。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告了逻辑回归的 OR 值和方差分析的组间差异。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出超越拟人化的视角，识别感知非人性和结构相似性作为深度自我表露的心理因素。
  • 通过大规模调查数据（N=2400）实证表明这两个因素与自我表露显著相关。
⚠️方法局限
  • 研究为探索性且基于自我报告数据，结果仅显示关联而非因果。
  • 缺乏纵向或实验研究验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This study investigates deep self-disclosure toward generative AI by examining perceived non-humanity and structural similarity as psychological factors beyond anthropomorphism. Perceived non-humanity may reduce evaluation apprehension, whereas structural similarity refers to the perceived logical alignment between a user's thinking and AI responses. Using cross-sectional survey data from 2,400 participants collected in 2025, this study analyzed associations with both the occurrence and depth of self-disclosure. Logistic regression indicated that the group high in both perceptions (Segment D) showed a significantly higher likelihood of disclosure than the baseline group (Segment A; OR = 11.35). ANOVA further showed significant between-group differences in disclosure depth. The findings suggest that trust-related behavior in deep self-disclosure may involve factors other than anthropomorphic perception. Because the study is exploratory and based on self-reported survey data, the results should be interpreted as associative rather than causal, and future longitudinal or experimental research is needed.

幻觉与事实性 3 篇

On Hallucinations in Inverse Problems: Fundamental Limits and Provable Assessment Methods

High 2605.13146
David Iagaru, Nina M. Gottschling, Anders C. Hansen, Josselin Garnier
arXiv PDF stat.ML
TL;DR：逆问题中幻觉的必然性被理论证明，并提出了可计算的评估方法。
🎯研究动机

AI 在成像逆问题中可能产生看似真实但错误的细节（幻觉），尤其在缺乏真实数据时，这严重威胁可靠性，现有方法缺乏对幻觉根本原因和量化评估的理论。

❓解决问题

逆问题中幻觉产生的根本原因是什么，以及如何在没有真实数据的情况下量化评估幻觉。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出幻觉不仅源于特定模型，更源于逆问题本身的病态性，并推导了幻觉存在的充要条件及仅依赖前向模型的可计算界限。

🛠️主要方法

理论框架推导幻觉的充要条件和可计算界限，并基于此提出两种算法：估计任意重建模型对给定输入的最小幻觉幅度，以及评估特定模型重建细节的忠实度。

📊实验结果

在三个成像任务上验证了方法的广泛适用性，包括现代生成模型。

⭐主要贡献
  • 建立了逆问题中幻觉的理论框架，证明幻觉源于问题本身的病态性而非特定模型。
  • 推导了幻觉的充要条件及仅依赖前向模型的可计算界限。
  • 提出了两种实用算法，分别用于估计最小幻觉幅度和评估重建细节的忠实度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论框架可能依赖于前向模型的精确知识，实际中可能难以获取。
  • 算法计算复杂度可能较高，尤其对于大规模问题。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Artificial intelligence (AI) has transformed imaging inverse problems, from medical diagnostics to Earth observation. Yet deep neural networks can produce hallucinations, realistic-looking but incorrect details, undermining their reliability, especially when ground truth data is unavailable. We develop a theoretical framework showing that such hallucinations are not merely artifacts of particular models, but can arise from the ill-posed nature of the inverse problem itself. We derive necessary and sufficient conditions for hallucinations, together with computable bounds on their magnitude that depend only on the forward model. Building on this theory, we introduce algorithms to: (1) estimate the minimum hallucination magnitude achievable by any reconstruction model for a given input; (2) assess the faithfulness of reconstructed details by a given reconstruction model. Experiments across three imaging tasks demonstrate that our approach applies broadly, including to modern generative models, and provides a principled way to quantify and evaluate AI hallucinations.

Senses Wide Shut: A Representation-Action Gap in Omnimodal LLMs

High 2605.13737
Trung Nguyen Quang, Yiming Gao, Fanyi Pu, Kaichen Zhang, Shuo Sun, Ziwei Liu
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：全模态 LLM 存在表征 - 行动鸿沟：隐状态能编码感知冲突，但输出几乎从不拒绝错误前提。
🎯研究动机

现有全模态大语言模型声称能感知多模态输入，但基本冲突检测能力（如文本前提与视听输入矛盾）未被系统测试，这关乎模型是否真正理解而非机械应答。

❓解决问题

全模态 LLM 在文本前提与自身视听输入冲突时，无法在输出中拒绝错误前提，即感知与行动脱节。

🔎现象分析

摘要发现表征 - 行动鸿沟：隐状态可靠编码冲突，但输出几乎不拒绝；存在欠拒绝和过拒绝两种失败模式；音频接地弱于视觉；七种提示变体均无法缓解。

🛠️主要方法

提出 IMAVB 基准（500 个长视频片段，2×2 设计：目标模态×前提条件）和探针引导的 logit 调整（PGLA）方法，在解码时注入编码的冲突信号。

📊实验结果

在 8 个开源全模态 LLM 和 Gemini 3.1 Pro 上评估，PGLA 一致改善拒绝行为。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入 IMAVB 基准，系统测量全模态 LLM 的冲突检测能力。
  • 揭示表征 - 行动鸿沟现象，并分析其模态不对称性和提示鲁棒性。
  • 提出 PGLA 干预方法，有效改善拒绝行为。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于电影片段，可能不覆盖所有真实场景。
  • PGLA 依赖探针，可能引入额外计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

When an omnimodal large language model accepts a question whose textual premise contradicts what it actually sees or hears, does the failure lie in perception or in action? Recent omnimodal models are positioned as perception-grounded agents that jointly process video, audio, and text, yet a basic form of grounding remains untested: catching a textual claim that conflicts with the model's own sensory input. We introduce IMAVB, a curated 500-clip benchmark of long-form movies with a 2x2 design crossing target modality (vision, audio) and premise condition (standard, misleading), which lets us measure conflict detection separately from ordinary multimodal comprehension. Across eight open-source omnimodal LLMs and Gemini 3.1 Pro, we document a Representation-Action Gap: hidden states reliably encode premise-perception mismatches even when the same models almost never reject the false claim in their outputs. Behaviorally, models fall into two failure modes: under-rejection, in which they answer misleading questions as if the false premise were true; and over-rejection, in which they reject more often but also reject standard questions, sacrificing ordinary comprehension accuracy. The gap is modality-asymmetric (audio grounding underperforms vision) and prompt-resistant across seven variants. As an initial diagnostic intervention, a probe-guided logit adjustment (PGLA) re-injects the encoded mismatch signal into decoding and consistently improves rejection behavior. Together, these results suggest the bottleneck for omnimodal grounding lies in translation, not perception.

Where Does Reasoning Break? Step-Level Hallucination Detection via Hidden-State Transport Geometry

High 2605.13772
Tyler Alvarez, Ali Baheri
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：通过隐藏状态轨迹的传输几何，定位多步推理中首次幻觉发生的步骤。
🎯研究动机

现有幻觉检测方法多为轨迹级，只能给整个输出一个置信度，无法定位首次错误，且常需多次采样，缺乏对推理过程细粒度监控的能力。

❓解决问题

如何利用单次前向传播的隐藏状态轨迹，在步骤级别检测并定位大语言模型多步推理中的首次幻觉。

🔎现象分析

正确推理的隐藏状态轨迹位于稳定流形上，首次错误表现为传输代价的局部偏离；首次错误相对于之前正确步骤存在正传输边际。

🛠️主要方法

提出标签条件教师模型，构建对比 PCA 透镜并提取七种几何转移特征；再蒸馏出 BiLSTM 学生模型，仅用原始隐藏状态即可推理时检测。

📊实验结果

在 ProcessBench、PRM800K、HaluEval 和 TruthfulQA 上，教师和学生模型均优于基于熵、探针和注意力的基线；教师模型跨语言模型和数据集稳定迁移。

⭐主要贡献
  • 将步骤级幻觉检测重新定义为轨迹动力学问题，并证明对比 PCA 是传输 - 分离目标的最优投影。
  • 提出教师 - 学生框架，教师模型跨模型和数据集稳定迁移，学生模型在分布偏移下失效，理论预测了该差距。
⚠️方法局限
  • 学生模型在分布偏移下性能显著下降，部署时需解决对比传输边际的保持问题。
  • 方法依赖隐藏状态的可获取性，可能不适用于黑盒模型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models hallucinate during multi-step reasoning, but most existing detectors operate at the trace level: they assign one confidence score to a full output, fail to localize the first error, and often require multiple sampled completions. We frame hallucination instead as a property of the hidden-state trajectory produced during a single forward pass. Correct reasoning moves through a stable manifold of locally coherent transitions; a first error appears as a localized excursion in transport cost away from this manifold. We operationalize this view with a label-conditioned teacher that builds a trace-specific contrastive PCA lens and scores each step with seven geometric transition features, and a deployable BiLSTM student distilled from the teacher that operates on raw hidden states without inference-time labels. We prove that contrastive PCA is the optimal projection for a transport-separation objective between first error and correct states, and that single-pass first error localization holds whenever the first error creates a positive transport margin over preceding correct transitions. On ProcessBench, PRM800K, HaluEval, and TruthfulQA, both models outperform entropy-based, probing-based, and attention-based baselines in-domain; the teacher transfers stably across language models and datasets, while the student collapses under shift, a gap our distillation theory predicts. These results recast step-level hallucination detection as a problem of trajectory dynamics and identify the central obstacle to deployment: preserving the contrastive transport margin under distribution shift.

鲁棒性与对抗 3 篇

Backbone is All You Need: Assessing Vulnerabilities of Frozen Foundation Models in Synthetic Image Forensics

High 2605.13381
Chiara Musso, Joy Battocchio, Andrea Montibeller, Giulia Boato
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：仅利用检测器 ViT 骨干网络知识即可发起高效灰盒攻击，揭示冻结预训练骨干的脆弱性。
🎯研究动机

AI 生成图像日益逼真，ViT 成为深度伪造检测的核心，但现有检测器普遍依赖冻结的预训练骨干，这种设计可能引入隐蔽的安全漏洞。

❓解决问题

探究仅利用检测器 ViT 骨干网络知识（无需完整模型信息）能否成功构造对抗样本，从而破坏合成图像取证系统的可靠性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Surrogate Iterative Adversarial Attack (SIAA)，一种灰盒攻击方法，仅利用目标检测器的 ViT 骨干网络，在特征空间中生成对抗样本。

📊实验结果

涉及多种基于 ViT 的检测器和多种灰盒场景（少样本学习、训练完全错配、攻击迁移性），攻击成功率接近白盒水平。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示仅依赖 ViT 骨干网络知识即可实现高成功率灰盒攻击，接近白盒性能。
  • 通过少样本学习、训练完全错配和攻击迁移性等多种灰盒场景验证了该脆弱性的普遍性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对 ViT 骨干网络，未探讨其他架构（如 CNN）的脆弱性。
  • 攻击有效性可能依赖于特定特征空间，实际部署中防御措施可能降低效果。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As AI-generated synthetic images become increasingly realistic, Vision Transformers (ViTs) have emerged as a cornerstone of modern deepfake detection. However, the prevailing reliance on frozen, pre-trained backbones introduces a subtle yet critical vulnerability. In this work, we present the Surrogate Iterative Adversarial Attack (SIAA), a gray-box attack that exploits knowledge of the detector's ViT backbone alone and operates entirely within the target detector's feature space to craft highly effective adversarial examples. Through our experiments, involving multiple ViT-based detectors and diverse gray-box scenarios, including few-shot learning, complete training misalignment and attack transferability tests, we demonstrate that this vulnerability consistently yields high attack success rates, often approaching white-box performance. By doing so, we reveal that backbone knowledge alone is sufficient to undermine detector reliability, highlighting the urgent need for more resilient defenses in adversarial multimedia forensics.

Taming the Long Tail: Rebalancing Adversarial Training via Adaptive Perturbation

Medium 2605.13395
Lilin Zhang, Yimo Guo, Yue Li, Jiancheng Shi, Xianggen Liu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出自适应扰动调整框架 RobustLT，同时提升长尾数据上的对抗鲁棒性和类别平衡性。
🎯研究动机

现有对抗训练主要针对平衡数据集，忽略了真实世界中长尾数据带来的挑战，而对抗样本中的扰动会改变训练分布，可能同时影响鲁棒性和类别平衡。

❓解决问题

长尾数据下对抗训练存在两个关键问题：类别不平衡导致的倾斜训练目标，以及对抗分布的不稳定演化。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出扰动可以同时解决对抗脆弱性和类别不平衡问题，但未提供具体实验现象。

🛠️主要方法

提出 RobustLT，一个即插即用的框架，在对抗训练过程中自适应调整扰动大小。

📊实验结果

在长尾数据集上进行了大量实验，结果表明 RobustLT 持续提升了对抗鲁棒性和类别平衡性。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 理论分析了长尾数据下对抗训练的两个局限性：倾斜训练目标和不稳定对抗分布。
  • 提出 RobustLT 框架，通过自适应扰动调整同时提升对抗鲁棒性和类别平衡性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在特定长尾分布下有效，未验证极端长尾场景。
  • 自适应扰动调整的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deep neural networks are highly vulnerable to adversarial examples, i.e.,small perturbations that can significantly degrade model performance. While adversarial training has become the primary defense strategy, most studies focus on balanced datasets, overlooking the challenges posed by real-world long-tail data. Motivated by the fact that perturbations in adversarial examples inherently alter the training distribution, we theoretically investigate their impact. We first revisit adversarial training for long-tail data and identify two key limitations: (i) a skewed training objective caused by class imbalance, and (ii) unstable evolution of adversarial distributions. Furthermore, we show that perturbations can simultaneously address both adversarial vulnerability and class imbalance. Based on these insights, we propose RobustLT, a plug-and-play framework that adaptively adjusts perturbations during adversarial training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RobustLT consistently enhances adversarial robustness and class-balance on long-tailed datasets. The code is available at \href{ this https URL }{ this https URL }.

Discovery of Hidden Miscalibration Regimes

Medium 2605.13484
Katarzyna Kobalczyk, Mihaela van der Schaar
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出发现隐藏误校准区域的方法，揭示模型在不同输入上的校准异质性，并支持局部置信度校正。
🎯研究动机

现有校准评估仅依赖置信度分数，忽略了模型在不同输入上可能表现出系统性的过自信或欠自信，导致全局诊断掩盖局部校准失败。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖预定义数据切片的情况下，自动发现模型存在系统性误校准的输入区域。

🔎现象分析

模型校准存在输入依赖的异质性，即在不同输入子集上校准表现不同，全局校准指标无法反映局部失败。

🛠️主要方法

定义误校准场，学习校准感知的输入空间表示，并在该几何空间中使用核平滑估计局部符号化误校准。

📊实验结果

在四个真实世界 LLM 基准和十二个 LLM 上进行了实验，发现输入依赖的校准异质性普遍存在，且局部校正能减少系统误校准区域的校准误差。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化了隐藏误校准区域的发现问题，无需预定义数据切片。
  • 提出一个诊断框架，通过校准感知表示和核平滑估计局部误校准。
  • 在多个 LLM 基准上验证了输入依赖校准异质性的普遍性，并展示了发现的区域可用于局部置信度校正，优于传统方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖于核平滑和几何学习，可能对高维输入空间敏感。
  • 未讨论如何自动选择核带宽等超参数。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Calibration is commonly evaluated by comparing model confidence with its empirical correctness, implicitly treating reliability as a function of the confidence score alone. However, this view can hide substantial structure: models may be systematically overconfident on some kinds of inputs and underconfident on others, causing global reliability diagnostics to obscure localised calibration failures. To address this, we formulate the problem of discovering hidden miscalibration regimes without assuming access to predefined data slices. We define the corresponding miscalibration field and propose a diagnostic framework for estimating it. Our approach learns a calibration-aware representation of the input space and estimates signed local miscalibration by kernel smoothing in the learned geometry. Across four real-world LLM benchmarks and twelve LLMs, we find that input-dependent calibration heterogeneity is prevalent. We further show that the discovered fields are actionable: they support local confidence correction and reduce calibration error in systematically miscalibrated regions where confidence-based methods such as isotonic regression and temperature scaling are less effective.

应用: 机器人/自动化/规划 30 篇 · 6 个细分

其他 8 篇

Embodied Multi-Agent Coordination by Aligning World Models Through Dialogue

High 2605.12920
Vardhan Dongre, Dilek Hakkani-Tür
arXiv PDF cs.MA
TL;DR：通过对话对齐具身智能体的世界模型可减少动作冲突，但当前 LLM 在任务成功率上不如静默协调。
🎯研究动机

具身智能体在部分可观测环境中协作时，缺乏通信会导致协调困难，而通信理论上能通过共享观察对齐世界模型来弥补这一差距，但现有 LLM 智能体是否真正具备通信能力尚不清楚。

❓解决问题

评估基于 LLM 的具身智能体在部分可观测环境中通过自然语言对话实现世界模型对齐的能力，并量化其与表面协调的差距。

🔎现象分析

对话能显著减少动作冲突（40-83 个百分点），但反而降低了任务成功率，表明当前模型存在表面协调而非真正世界模型对齐的问题。

🛠️主要方法

扩展 PARTNR 基准，加入自然语言对话通道；提出世界模型对齐度量框架，包括观察收敛性、信息新颖性和信念敏感消息传递。

📊实验结果

在三种 LLM 上实验，显示对话减少动作冲突但降低任务成功率，摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了支持自然语言对话的具身多智能体协作基准。
  • 提出量化世界模型对齐的度量框架，揭示当前 LLM 在协调中的局限性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估了特定 LLM 和家庭机器人场景，泛化性未知。
  • 未提供任务成功率下降的具体原因分析。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Effective collaboration between embodied agents requires more than acting in a shared environment; it demands communication grounded in each agent's evolving understanding of the world. When agents can only partially observe their surroundings, coordination without communication is provably hard, but communication can, in principle, bridge this gap by allowing agents to share observations and align their world models. In this work, we examine whether LLM-based embodied agents actually realize the ability to communicate. We extend PARTNR, a benchmark for collaborative household robotics, with a natural-language dialogue channel that enables two agents with partial observability to communicate during task execution. To evaluate whether dialogue leads to genuine world-model alignment rather than superficial coordination, we propose a framework for measuring world-model alignment defined over per-agent world graphs: observation convergence (do private world models align over time?), information novelty (do messages convey what the partner lacks?), and belief-sensitive messaging (do agents model what their partner knows?). Our experiments across three LLMs reveal that dialogue reduces action conflicts 40 to 83 percentage points but degrades task success relative to silent coordination. Using our metrics, we characterize the gap between superficial coordination and genuine world-model alignment, and identify where current models fall on this spectrum.

Test-time Sparsity for Extreme Fast Action Diffusion

High 2605.13316
Kangye Ji, Yuan Meng, Jianbo Zhou, Ye Li, Chen Tang, Zhi Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出测试时稀疏性方法，通过动态剪枝和并行推理将动作扩散模型加速 5 倍，FLOPs 降低 92%。
🎯研究动机

动作扩散模型因迭代去噪导致计算成本高，现有缓存复用方法难以适应开放环境中的策略动态变化。

❓解决问题

如何在不损失性能的前提下，大幅加速动作扩散模型的推理过程。

🔎现象分析

重复的条件编码和剪枝延迟抵消了速度增益，且跨去噪步的缓存特征在激进稀疏下无法约束大剪枝误差。

🛠️主要方法

提出测试时稀疏性，包括高度并行化推理流水线（轻量剪枝器、并行去噪、异步重叠）和全向复用策略（利用当前前向、先前去噪步和早期迭代的缓存特征）。

📊实验结果

在动作生成任务上，FLOPs 降低 92%，加速 5 倍，推理频率达 47.5 Hz，性能无损。代码已开源。

⭐主要贡献
  • 设计高度并行化推理流水线，最小化非解码器延迟至毫秒级。
  • 引入全向复用策略，实现 95% 稀疏度，通过采样少量动作轨迹逐步监督稀疏化扩散过程。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定动作扩散模型架构。
  • 轨迹采样策略在复杂环境中的泛化性待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Action diffusion excels at high-fidelity action generation but incurs heavy computational costs owing to its iterative denoising nature. Despite current technologies showing promise in accelerating diffusion transformers by reusing the cached features, they struggle to adapt to policy dynamics arising from diverse perceptions and multi-round rollout iterations in open environments. We propose test-time sparsity to tackle this challenge, which aims to accelerate action diffusion by dynamically predicting prunable residual computations for each model forward at test time. However, two bottlenecks remain in this paradigm: 1) repetitive conditional encoding and pruning offset most potential speed gains, and 2) the features cached from previous denoising timesteps cannot constrain large pruning errors under aggressive sparsity. To address the first bottleneck, we design a highly parallelized inference pipeline that minimizes the non-decoder delay to milliseconds. Specifically, we first design a lightweight pruner that shares the encoder with the diffusion transformer. Then, we decouple the encoding and pruning from the autoregressive denoising loop by processing all denoising timesteps in parallel, and overlap the pruner with the decoder forward inference through asynchronism. To overcome the second bottleneck, we introduce an omnidirectional reusing strategy, which achieves 95% sparsity by selectively reusing features cached from the current forward, previous denoising timesteps, and earlier rollout iterations. To learn the rollout-level reusing strategies, we sample a few action trajectories to supervise the sparsified diffusion step by step. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method reduces FLOPs by 92% and accelerates action generation by 5x, achieving lossless performance with an inference frequency of 47.5 Hz. Our code is available at this https URL .

Ego2World: Compiling Egocentric Cooking Videos into Executable Worlds for Belief-State Planning

High 2605.13335
Qinchuan Cheng, Zhantao Gong, Pengzhan Sun, Angela Yao, Xulei Yang, Shijie Li
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：将第一人称烹饪视频转化为可执行的符号世界，用于评估具身智能体在部分可观测条件下的信念状态规划能力。
🎯研究动机

现有具身智能体评估要么依赖被动视频数据，要么使用合成场景和手工规则，存在 sim-to-real 差距且通常假设完全可观测状态，无法真实测试智能体在部分可观测环境下的规划与记忆能力。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个既能利用真实人类活动视频的丰富性，又能支持交互式执行和部分可观测状态评估的具身智能体基准。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出动作重叠分数会高估物理状态成功，而持久信念记忆能提升任务完成率并减少重复视觉探索，表明信念维护应成为评估的核心目标。

🛠️主要方法

从 HD-EPIC 视频注释中提取可复用的图转换规则，构建隐藏的符号世界图；智能体仅通过局部观测和执行反馈维护自身的部分信念图，并基于此进行规划。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及实验表明动作重叠分数高估物理状态成功，信念记忆提升任务完成率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Ego2World 基准，将第一人称烹饪视频转化为可执行的符号世界，支持部分可观测下的信念状态规划评估。
  • 通过实验揭示动作重叠分数对物理状态成功的误导性，并证明信念记忆的重要性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于烹饪视频，可能无法泛化到其他家庭任务。
  • 符号世界规则从视频注释中提取，可能遗漏复杂物理交互细节。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Embodied agents in household environments must plan under partial observation: they need to remember objects, track state changes, and recover when actions fail. Existing benchmarks only partially test this ability. Egocentric video datasets capture realistic human activities but remain passive, while interactive simulators support execution but rely on synthetic scenes and hand-crafted dynamics, introducing a sim-to-real gap and often assuming fully observable state. We introduce Ego2World, an executable benchmark that turns egocentric cooking videos into executable symbolic worlds governed by graph-transition rules. Built on HD-EPIC, Ego2World derives reusable transition rules from video annotations and executes them in a hidden symbolic world graph. During evaluation, the simulator maintains the hidden world graph, while the agent plans over its own partial belief graph using only local observations and execution feedback. This separation forces agents to update memory and replan without observing the true world state. Experiments show that action-overlap scores overestimate physical-state success, and that persistent belief memory improves task completion while reducing repeated visual exploration -- suggesting that belief maintenance should be a first-class target of embodied-agent evaluation.

MindVLA-U1: VLA Beats VA with Unified Streaming Architecture for Autonomous Driving

High 2605.12624
Yuzhou Huang, Benjin Zhu, Hengtong Lu, Victor Shea-Jay Huang, Haiming Zhang, Wei Chen, Jifeng Dai, Yan Xie et al.
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：MindVLA-U1 提出统一流式 VLA 架构，首次在自动驾驶规划质量上超越人类专家，同时保持 VA 级吞吐量。
🎯研究动机

现有 VLA 模型在规划质量上常落后于 VA 模型，表明问题不在于模型规模，而在于语义推理、时序上下文和连续控制的组合接口设计不当。

❓解决问题

如何设计统一的 VLA 架构，使语言推理与连续动作生成有效协同，在规划性能上超越 VA 模型。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出 VLA 落后于 VA 的原因是孤立子任务改进无法组合成连贯的驾驶能力，而非 VLA 本身的问题。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MindVLA-U1，采用统一 VLM 骨干网络，通过单次前向传递同时生成自回归语言 token 和流匹配连续动作轨迹；流式设计逐帧处理视频，学习记忆通道传递时序上下文；支持快 / 慢执行在稠密 / 稀疏 MoT 骨干上；通过语言预测的驾驶意图引导动作扩散（CFG）。

📊实验结果

在长尾 WOD-E2E 基准上评估，MindVLA-U1 以 2 步扩散超越人类专家，达到 SOTA 规划 ADE，吞吐量 16 FPS。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出统一流式 VLA 架构，实现语言与动作的联合生成。
  • 在 WOD-E2E 基准上首次超越人类专家驾驶（8.20 RFS vs 8.13 GT RFS），规划 ADE 大幅优于先前 VA/VLA 方法，吞吐量接近 VA 模型（16 FPS vs 18 FPS）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定数据集（WOD-E2E），泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 流式设计可能引入延迟累积，实时性需在更多场景测试。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Autonomous driving has progressed from modular pipelines toward end-to-end unification, and Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are a natural extension of this journey beyond Vision-to-Action (VA). In practice, driving VLAs have often trailed VA on planning quality, suggesting that the difficulty is not simply model scale but the interface through which semantic reasoning, temporal context, and continuous control are combined. We argue that this gap reflects how VLA has been built -- as isolated subtask improvements that fail to compose into coherent driving capabilities -- rather than what VLA is. We present MindVLA-U1, the first unified streaming VLA architecture for autonomous driving. A unified VLM backbone produces autoregressive language tokens and flow-matching continuous action trajectories in a single forward pass over one shared representation, preserving the natural output form of each modality. A streaming design processes the driving video framewise rather than as fixed video-action chunks, while a learned memory channel carries temporal context across frames so planned trajectories evolve smoothly without redundant multi-frame VLM modeling. The unified architecture admits fast/slow execution on dense/sparse Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) backbones via flexible self-attention context management, and exposes a measurable language-to-action route: a language-predicted driving intent steers action diffusion through classifier-free guidance (CFG), turning language-side intent into a control signal for continuous trajectory generation. On the long-tail WOD-E2E benchmark, MindVLA-U1 surpasses experienced human drivers for the first time (8.20 RFS vs. 8.13 GT RFS) with 2 diffusion steps, achieves state-of-the-art planning ADEs over prior VA/VLA methods by large margins, and matches VA-class throughput (16 FPS vs. RAP-DINO's 18 FPS) while preserving natural-language interfaces.

Multi-Agent Systems in Emergency Departments: Validation Study on a ED Digital Twin

Medium 2605.13345
Markus Wenzel, Tobias Strapatsas, Jessika Kress, Dorothea Sauer, Nele Gessler, Horst K. Hahn
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：构建混合 DES-ABM 急诊科数字孪生模型，验证其能复现真实急诊动态，并集成多智能体系统探索资源优化策略。
🎯研究动机

急诊科面临患者护理和资源管理挑战，需要灵活且现实的模型来探索优化策略。

❓解决问题

如何构建并验证一个能准确模拟急诊科动态的混合仿真模型，并集成多智能体系统以自主探索资源分配策略。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出混合离散事件仿真与基于智能体模型，结合真实世界配置进行验证，并集成基于时间账本的多智能体系统。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出并验证了混合 DES-ABM 急诊科数字孪生模型，能有效复现真实急诊动态。
  • 集成了多智能体系统，可自主探索资源分配策略。
⚠️方法局限
  • 模型验证可能依赖特定文献数据，泛化性待检验。
  • 多智能体系统仅作为概念验证，实际部署效果未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Emergency departments (ED) face challenges in patient care and resource management. We propose to explore optimization strategies in a realistic and flexible model and develop a hybrid Discrete Event Simulation (DES) and Agent-Based Model (ABM) simulating highly configurable ED environments. We specifically focus on the validation of the modeling approach. We derive configurations for ED sizes, patient load, and staffing from real-world studies. We then validate the model expressivity by matching its key performance indicators and metrics with their values known from literature. We proceed by implementing scientifically established and practice-proven resource optimization strategies. Comparing the documented real-world outcomes with our model's results demonstrates that the DES-ABM based simulation can effectively replicate real-world ER dynamics under interventions. We lastly integrate a Proof-of-Concept multi-agent system (MAS) that can autonomously explore resource allocation strategies within the simulated ER environment based on a temporal ledger of ED event records. This modular DES-ABM-MAS framework offers a powerful tool to explore resource optimization strategies in emergency departments.

BEHAVE: A Hybrid AI Framework for Real-Time Modeling of Collective Human Dynamics

Medium 2605.12730
Helene Malyutina
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 BEHAVE 框架，将集体人类动力学建模为连续行为场，实现实时建模与预测。
🎯研究动机

现有 AI 系统仅建模个体行为或事后检测事件，无法捕捉群体稳定性或崩溃的集体动力学，缺乏实时建模能力。

❓解决问题

如何从可观测物理信号中实时建模和预测集体人类动力学（如群体稳定性、升级或崩溃）。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将集体动力学建模为连续行为场，基于运动学微信号构建有向交互图，聚合为行为场基，并利用神经网络实现感知和预测层。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 BEHAVE 框架，将集体人类动力学形式化为连续行为场。
  • 给出一个定理和两个结构命题，定义张力场、场基和临界性指标。
  • 在 7 智能体谈判快照上演示工作流程，并指出可应用于人群安全、危机团队、教育等场景。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在一个 7 智能体谈判快照上演示，缺乏大规模验证。
  • 未讨论实时性能的具体指标。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing AI systems for modeling human behavior operate at the level of individuals or detect events after they occur. As a result, they systematically fail to capture the collective dynamics that determine whether a group remains stable or transitions into escalation or breakdown. We propose a different foundation: a group of interacting humans constitutes a complex dynamical system in the precise mathematical sense, exhibiting emergence, nonlinearity, feedback loops, sensitivity near critical points, and phase transitions between qualitatively distinct regimes. The state of such a system is not located within any single participant; it is distributed across mutual influence loops and observable through the micro-dynamics of the body. We introduce BEHAVE (Behavioral Engine for Human Activity Vector Estimation), a formal framework that models collective dynamics as continuous behavioral fields defined over an interaction space derived from observable physical signals. Kinematic micro-signals (position, velocity, body orientation, gestural activity) are structured into a directed interaction graph and aggregated into a basis of behavioral fields capturing distinct, non-redundant axes of collective state. The framework rests on one theorem and two structural propositions characterizing the tension field, the field basis, and the criticality index. Perception and forecasting layers are implemented using neural models, enabling data-driven learning and approximation of system dynamics. BEHAVE is formulated as a computational system for learning, representing, and forecasting collective dynamics from data. A working pipeline is demonstrated on a 7-agent negotiation snapshot. The same fields, recalibrated, apply to crowd safety, crisis-team dynamics, education, and clinical contexts.

What Do You Think I Think? Accounting for Human Beliefs Using Second-Order Theory of Mind

Medium 2605.12745
Patrick Callaghan, Reid Simmons, Henny Admoni
arXiv PDF cs.HC
TL;DR：利用二阶心智理论建模人类对智能体的错误信念，提升人机交互中反馈的有效性。
🎯研究动机

人机交互中，智能体的实际知识与人类对其知识的认知存在偏差，这种偏差会阻碍交互效果。现有方法未能有效检测并纠正此类偏差。

❓解决问题

如何让智能体建模人类对其知识的错误信念，并据此生成适应性反馈以改善交互。

🔎现象分析

人类在与智能体交互时，会因认知偏差和启发式（CBH）产生对智能体知识的错误信念，影响教学行为的信息量。

🛠️主要方法

基于交互式部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（I-POMDP）框架，实现二阶心智理论（ToM-2），使智能体能建模人类错误信念的演化及其背后的认知偏差，并生成适应性反馈。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种基于 I-POMDP 的二阶心智理论框架，使智能体能够建模人类对其知识的错误信念及认知偏差。
  • 通过用户实验证明，该框架能显著提升教师行为的信息量，且用户认为其反馈更有用。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖对认知偏差的预定义分类，泛化性有限。
  • 实验规模较小，未讨论计算复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Discrepancies between an agent's actual knowledge and what a person thinks the agent knows can hinder interactions. If an agent could detect such discrepancies, it could provide feedback to account for them and improve current and future interactions. Using the I-POMDP as a framework for a second-order Theory of Mind (ToM-2), this work endows an agent with the ability to model the evolution of a person's erroneous beliefs about an agent and the cognitive biases and heuristics (CBH) from which they arise. In doing so, the agent can detect when CBH might be at play during an interaction and adaptively generate feedback that accounts for them. An in-person user study shows how a ToM-2 learner can account for the effects of a teacher's CBH to significantly improve the informativeness of teacher actions, and subjective results suggest people find the ToM-2 learner's feedback more useful.

AgenticAITA: A Proof-Of-Concept About Deliberative Multi-Agent Reasoning for Autonomous Trading Systems

Medium 2605.12532
Ivan Letteri
arXiv PDF q-fin.TR
TL;DR：提出一个无需训练的多智能体 LLM 框架，通过结构化协商流水线实现自主交易系统。
🎯研究动机

传统算法交易系统依赖确定性启发式或离线统计模型，无法适应快速变化的市场语义复杂性。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个无需离线训练或人工干预、能自适应市场异常并保证安全约束的自主交易系统。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AGENTICAITA 框架，包含自适应 Z-Score 触发引擎、顺序协商流水线（分析师、风险经理、执行者智能体）、推理门控协议和相关性突破多样化评分。

📊实验结果

在五天实时市场条件下进行自主空转验证，实现 157 次零干预调用，覆盖 76 个资产，智能体摩擦率 11.5%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出无需训练的多智能体协商框架，实现全自主交易决策循环。
  • 设计结构化推理链和确定性安全门控层，保证可复现审计轨迹。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅作为概念验证，未进行长期部署和统计性能评估。
  • 执行成本模型和鲁棒性分析尚未完成。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Conventional algorithmic trading systems are grounded in deterministic heuristics or offline-trained statistical models that cannot adapt to the semantic complexity of rapidly shifting market regimes. This paper introduces AGENTICAITA, an agentic AI framework that replaces the traditional signal then execute paradigm with a fully autonomous deliberative loop in which multiple specialized Large Language Model agents reason, negotiate, and act in concert - without any offline training or human intervention. The framework proposes four architectural contributions: (i) an Adaptive Z-Score Trigger Engine that acts as a cognitive resource allocator, gating LLM inference exclusively on statistically anomalous market conditions; (ii) a Sequential Deliberative Pipeline - the core agentic contribution - in which an Analyst agent, a Risk Manager agent, and an Executor agent form a structured reasoning chain governed by typed JSON contracts and a deterministic hard-gate safety layer; (iii) an Inference Gating Protocol, a mutex-based cognitive resource scheduler that serializes concurrent agent activations and ensures fully reproducible audit trails; and (iv) a Correlation-Break Diversification composite score that operationalizes portfolio-level idiosyncratic signal prioritization within individual agent reasoning. Validated over a five-day autonomous dry-run session under live market conditions, the framework demonstrates operational correctness of the deliberative pipeline, achieving 157 zero-intervention invocations across 76 assets with an 11.5% agentic friction rate that confirms non-trivial inter-agent negotiation. This preliminary proof-of-concept establishes the feasibility of training-free, deterministic safety-constrained multi-agent orchestration in financial decision loops, with statistically robust performance evaluation and execution cost modeling deferred to extended live deployment.

视觉-语言-动作 (VLA) 8 篇

Towards Long-horizon Embodied Agents with Tool-Aligned Vision-Language-Action Models

High 2605.13119
Zixing Lei, Changxing Liu, Yichen Xiong, Minhao Xiong, Yuanzhuo Ding, Zhipeng Zhang, Weixin Li, Siheng Chen
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出 VLAs-as-Tools 框架，将长时域任务分解为高层 VLM 规划与专用 VLA 工具执行，提升机器人任务成功率。
🎯研究动机

现有 VLA 模型在长时域任务中面临闭环规划与多样化物理操作的双重负担，导致性能受限。

❓解决问题

如何将长时域任务中的时序推理与局部操作解耦，并实现高效的规划 - 执行协同。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 VLAs-as-Tools 框架：高层 VLM 负责场景分析、全局规划与恢复；多个专用 VLA 工具执行有界子任务；通过 VLA 工具族接口暴露工具选择与执行进度反馈，实现事件触发的重规划；采用 Tool-Aligned Post-Training (TAPT) 构建对齐训练单元和残差适配器实现工具专业化。

📊实验结果

在 LIBERO-Long 和 RoboTwin 基准上，VLAs-as-Tools 将π0.5 的成功率分别提升 4.8 和 23.1 个百分点，非偏率提升 15.0 个百分点。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 VLAs-as-Tools 框架，将长时域任务分解为高层 VLM 规划与专用 VLA 工具执行。
  • 设计 VLA 工具族接口，通过显式工具选择和执行进度反馈实现高效事件触发重规划。
  • 提出 Tool-Aligned Post-Training (TAPT) 方法，通过对齐训练单元和残差适配器实现工具专业化。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量 VLM 和 VLA 工具预训练。
  • 工具族接口设计可能需针对不同任务调整。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision-language-action (VLA) models are effective robot action executors, but they remain limited on long-horizon tasks due to the dual burden of extended closed-loop planning and diverse physical operations. We therefore propose VLAs-as-Tools, a strategy that distributes this burden across a high-level vision language model (VLM) agent for temporal reasoning and a family of specialized VLA tools for diverse local physical operations. The VLM handles scene analysis, global planning, and recovery, while each VLA tool executes a bounded subtask. To tightly couple agent planning with VLA tool execution in long-horizon tasks, we introduce a VLA tool-family interface that exposes explicit tool selection and in-execution progress feedback, enabling efficient event-triggered agent replanning without continuous agent polling. To obtain diverse specialized VLA tools that faithfully follow agent invocations, we further propose Tool-Aligned Post-Training (TAPT), which constructs invocation-aligned training units for instruction following and adopts tool-family residual adapters for efficient tool specialization. Experiments show that VLAs-as-Tools improves the success rate of $\pi_{0.5}$ by 4.8 points on LIBERO-Long and 23.1 points on RoboTwin, and further enhances invocation fidelity by 15.0 points as measured by Non-biased Rate. Code will be released.

D-VLA: A High-Concurrency Distributed Asynchronous Reinforcement Learning Framework for Vision-Language-Action Models

High 2605.13276
Yucheng Guo, Yongjian Guo, Zhong Guan, Wen Huang, Haoran Sun, Haodong Yue, Xiaolong Xiang, Shuai Di et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出高并发分布式异步强化学习框架 D-VLA，解决 VLA 模型在分布式 RL 中的资源冲突与吞吐瓶颈。
🎯研究动机

具身 AI 中 VLA 模型规模巨大，分布式 RL 面临物理仿真与深度学习资源冲突，导致吞吐受限。

❓解决问题

大规模 VLA 模型在分布式 RL 训练中，高保真物理仿真与深度学习 VRAM/ 带宽需求冲突，执行阶段效率低下。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出资源冲突使整体吞吐受限于执行阶段低效，未提供具体失败模式。

🛠️主要方法

提出 D-VLA 框架，包含平面解耦（物理隔离高频训练数据与低频权重控制）、四线程异步泳道流水线（采样、推理、梯度计算、参数分发全并行）、双池 VRAM 管理和拓扑感知复制。

📊实验结果

在 LIBERO 等基准上，D-VLA 在十亿参数 VLA 模型的吞吐和采样效率上显著优于主流 RL 框架；万亿参数可扩展性测试中保持稳定和线性加速。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出平面解耦策略消除仿真与优化间的干扰
  • 设计四线程异步泳道流水线实现全并行重叠
  • 提出双池 VRAM 管理和拓扑感知复制解决内存碎片和通信效率
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未提及对非 VLA 模型的适用性
  • 可能依赖特定硬件拓扑
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The rapid evolution of Embodied AI has enabled Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models to excel in multimodal perception and task execution. However, applying Reinforcement Learning (RL) to these massive models in large-scale distributed environments faces severe systemic bottlenecks, primarily due to the resource conflict between high-fidelity physical simulation and the intensive VRAM/bandwidth demands of deep learning. This conflict often leaves overall throughput constrained by execution-phase inefficiencies. To address these challenges, we propose D-VLA, a high-concurrency, low-latency distributed RL framework for large-scale embodied foundation models. D-VLA introduces "Plane Decoupling," physically isolating high-frequency training data from low-frequency weight control to eliminate interference between simulation and optimization. We further design a four-thread asynchronous "Swimlane" pipeline, enabling full parallel overlap of sampling, inference, gradient computation, and parameter distribution. Additionally, a dual-pool VRAM management model and topology-aware replication resolve memory fragmentation and optimize communication efficiency. Experiments on benchmarks like LIBERO show that D-VLA significantly outperforms mainstream RL frameworks in throughput and sampling efficiency for billion-parameter VLA models. In trillion-parameter scalability tests, our framework maintains exceptional stability and linear speedup, providing a robust system for high-performance general-purpose embodied agents.

What Limits Vision-and-Language Navigation ?

High 2605.13328
Yunheng Wang, Yuetong Fang, Taowen Wang, Lusong Li, Kun Liu, Junzhe Xu, Zizhao Yuan, Yixiao Feng et al.
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出 StereoNav 框架，通过目标位置先验和立体视觉增强空间鲁棒性，提升视觉 - 语言导航从仿真到真实世界的迁移性能。
🎯研究动机

当前视觉 - 语言导航（VLN）代理从仿真迁移到真实世界时性能显著下降，主要受感知不稳定（如光照变化、运动模糊）和指令模糊的制约，而现有方法依赖扩大模型和数据规模，未解决根本瓶颈。

❓解决问题

解决 VLN 中仿真到真实世界的域迁移问题，具体克服感知不稳定和指令不明确导致的导航失败。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出性能下降源于缺乏鲁棒的空间定位和跨域先验，现有缩放方法未能有效应对。

🛠️主要方法

提出 StereoNav 框架，引入目标位置先验作为跨域不变的视觉引导，并利用立体视觉融合语义与几何信息，增强深度感知以抵抗视觉干扰。

📊实验结果

在 R2R-CE 和 RxR-CE 基准上评估，SR/SPL 分别达 81.1%/68.3% 和 67.5%/52.0%，并在真实机器人环境中验证。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出目标位置先验，提供跨域不变的视觉引导，缓解指令模糊问题。
  • 利用立体视觉构建语义 - 几何统一表征，提升对运动模糊和光照变化的鲁棒性。
  • 在 R2R-CE 和 RxR-CE 上达到 SOTA，且参数和训练数据更少，真实机器人部署验证了可靠性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖立体视觉硬件，可能增加部署成本。
  • 目标位置先验的获取方式未详细说明，可能需额外标注。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) is a cornerstone of embodied intelligence. However, current agents often suffer from significant performance degradation when transitioning from simulation to real-world deployment, primarily due to perceptual instability (e.g., lighting variations and motion blur) and under-specified instructions. While existing methods attempt to bridge this gap by scaling up model size and training data, we argue that the bottleneck lies in the lack of robust spatial grounding and cross-domain priors. In this paper, we propose StereoNav, a robust Vision-Language-Action framework designed to enhance real-world navigation consistency. To address the inherent gap between synthetic training and physical execution, we introduce Target-Location Priors as a persistent bridge. These priors provide stable visual guidance that remains invariant across domains, effectively grounding the agent even when instructions are vague. Furthermore, to mitigate visual disturbances like motion blur and illumination shifts, StereoNav leverages stereo vision to construct a unified representation of semantics and geometry, enabling precise action prediction through enhanced depth awareness. Extensive experiments on R2R-CE and RxR-CE demonstrate that StereoNav achieves state-of-the-art egocentric RGB performance, with SR and SPL scores of 81.1% and 68.3%, and 67.5% and 52.0%, respectively, while using significantly fewer parameters and less training data than prior scaling-based approaches. More importantly, real-world robotic deployments confirm that StereoNav substantially improves navigation reliability in complex, unstructured environments. Project page: this https URL .

RotVLA: Rotational Latent Action for Vision-Language-Action Model

High 2605.13403
Qiwei Li, Xicheng Gong, Xinghang Li, Peiyan Li, Quanyun Zhou, Hangjun Ye, Jiahuan Zhou, Yadong Mu
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：RotVLA 提出连续旋转潜动作表示，提升 VLA 模型在异构数据上的预训练与下游操控性能。
🎯研究动机

现有潜动作模型依赖离散量化编码，导致帧重建琐碎、表示能力有限且缺乏物理意义结构，限制了 VLA 模型在跨具身数据上的泛化能力。

❓解决问题

如何设计具有连续性、组合性和结构化几何的潜动作表示，以统一异构数据集并提升下游机器人操控性能。

🔎现象分析

离散潜动作模型易产生琐碎的帧重建行为，表示容量不足，且缺乏与真实动作动态对齐的物理结构。

🛠️主要方法

提出 RotVLA，使用 SO(n) 连续旋转潜动作表示，结合三元组帧学习框架避免退化，采用 VLM 骨干和流匹配动作头进行预训练，下游扩展为统一动作专家联合去噪潜动作和机器人动作。

📊实验结果

在 LIBERO 上达到 98.2%，在 RoboTwin2.0 干净和随机设置下分别达到 89.6% 和 88.5%，并在真实世界操控任务中持续优于现有 VLA 模型。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出连续旋转潜动作表示，具有连续性、组合性和结构化几何，对齐真实动作动态。
  • 构建三元组帧学习框架，强制有意义的时序动态并避免退化。
  • 在 LIBERO 和 RoboTwin2.0 上达到 SOTA，并在真实操控任务中表现优异。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅验证了 1.7B 参数规模，更大模型效果未知。
  • 旋转潜动作的几何结构可能对某些任务不是最优表示。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Latent Action Models (LAMs) have emerged as an effective paradigm for handling heterogeneous datasets during Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model pretraining, offering a unified action space across embodiments. However, existing LAMs often rely on discrete quantization encode and decode pipelines, which can lead to trivial frame reconstruction behavior, limited representational capacity, and a lack of physically meaningful structure. We introduce RotVLA, a VLA framework built on a continuous rotational latent action representation. Latent actions are modeled as elements of SO(n), providing continuity, compositionality, and structured geometry aligned with real-world action dynamics. A triplet frame learning framework further enforces meaningful temporal dynamics while avoiding degeneration. RotVLA consists of a VLM backbone and a flow-matching action head, pretrained on large-scale cross-embodiment robotic datasets and human videos with latent-action supervision. For downstream robot control, the flow-matching head is extended into a unified action expert that jointly denoises latent and robot actions. Here, latent actions serve as a latent planner, providing high-level guidance that conditions action generation. With only 1.7B parameters and 1700+ hours of pretraining data, RotVLA achieves 98.2% on LIBERO and 89.6% / 88.5% on RoboTwin2.0 under clean and randomized settings, respectively. It also demonstrates strong real-world performance on manipulation tasks, consistently outperforming existing VLA models.

Guide, Think, Act: Interactive Embodied Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models

High 2605.13632
Yiran Ling, Qing Lian, Jinghang Li, Qing Jiang, Tianming Zhang, Xiaoke Jiang, Chuanxiu Liu, Jie Liu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出 GTA-VLA 框架，通过视觉提示引导机器人策略，结合空间 - 视觉思维链提升具身推理的鲁棒性和交互性。
🎯研究动机

现有 VLA 模型学习直接的“感知 - 动作”映射，在分布外场景下脆弱且难以纠正错误；虽然具身思维链方法暴露了中间推理，但缺乏融入人类空间引导的机制，无法解决视觉歧义或从失败中恢复。

❓解决问题

如何让 VLA 模型在具身推理中有效利用人类提供的空间先验（如可交互点、框、轨迹）来增强策略的鲁棒性和可纠正性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GTA-VLA 框架，包含三个模块：用户通过视觉提示（如可交互点、框、轨迹）引导策略；模型生成统一的空间 - 视觉思维链，将外部引导与内部任务规划对齐；耦合轻量级反应式动作头实现高效执行。

📊实验结果

在 SimplerEnv WidowX 基准上达到 81.2% 成功率（SOTA）；在 OOD 视觉偏移和空间歧义下，单次视觉交互显著提升任务成功率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出交互式 VLA 框架 GTA-VLA，允许用户通过空间视觉提示引导机器人策略。
  • 设计空间 - 视觉思维链机制，整合人类引导与自主推理，提升 OOD 场景下的任务成功率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖用户提供的视觉提示质量。
  • 未提及在更复杂环境或长任务中的泛化能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In this paper, we propose GTA-VLA(Guide, Think, Act), an interactive Vision-Language-Action (VLA) framework that enables spatially steerable embodied reasoning by allowing users to guide robot policies with explicit visual cues. Existing VLA models learn a direct "Sense-to-Act" mapping from multimodal observations to robot actions. While effective within the training distribution, such tightly coupled policies are brittle under out-of-domain (OOD) shifts and difficult to correct when failures occur. Although recent embodied Chain-of-Thought (CoT) approaches expose intermediate reasoning, they still lack a mechanism for incorporating human spatial guidance, limiting their ability to resolve visual ambiguities or recover from mistakes. To address this gap, our framework allows users to optionally guide the policy with spatial priors, such as affordance points, boxes, and traces, which the subsequent reasoning process can directly condition on. Based on these inputs, the model generates a unified spatial-visual Chain-of-Thought that integrates external guidance with internal task planning, aligning human visual intent with autonomous decision-making. For practical deployment, we further couple the reasoning module with a lightweight reactive action head for efficient action execution. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. On the in-domain SimplerEnv WidowX benchmark, our framework achieves a state-of-the-art 81.2% success rate. Under OOD visual shifts and spatial ambiguities, a single visual interaction substantially improves task success over existing methods, highlighting the value of interactive reasoning for failure recovery in embodied control. Details of the project can be found here: this https URL

Realtime-VLA FLASH: Speculative Inference Framework for Diffusion-based VLAs

High 2605.13778
Jiahui Niu, Kefan Gu, Yucheng Zhao, Shengwen Liang, Tiancai Wang, Xing Hu, Ying Wang, Huawei Li
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出投机推理框架，用轻量草稿模型替代大部分完整推理，实现扩散 VLA 低延迟高频重规划。
🎯研究动机

扩散视觉 - 语言 - 动作模型（dVLA）在具身智能中潜力大，但完整推理延迟高，难以实时部署。

❓解决问题

如何在不牺牲可靠性的前提下，降低 dVLA 在重规划时的推理延迟，实现低延迟高频重规划。

🔎现象分析

完整推理延迟高（58.0 ms），而投机推理可快至 7.8 ms，通过草稿模型和并行验证可大幅降低平均延迟。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Realtime-VLA FLASH 框架，包含轻量草稿模型、主模型 Action Expert 并行验证和相位感知回退机制。

📊实验结果

在 LIBERO 基准上，任务级平均推理延迟降至 19.1 ms（3.04 倍加速），并在真实世界传送带分拣任务中展示效果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出投机推理框架，消除大部分完整推理调用，实现低延迟高频重规划。
  • 在 LIBERO 上实现 3.04 倍加速，并在真实传送带分拣任务中验证实用性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定任务场景，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 草稿模型质量可能影响最终性能。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion-based vision-language-action models (dVLAs) are promising for embodied intelligence but are fundamentally limited in real-time deployment by the high latency of full inference. We propose Realtime-VLA FLASH, a speculative inference framework that eliminates most full inference calls during replanning by introducing a lightweight draft model with parallel verification via the main model's Action Expert and a phase-aware fallback mechanism that reverts to the full inference pipeline when needed. This design enables low-latency, high-frequency replanning without sacrificing reliability. Experiments show that on LIBERO, FLASH largely preserves task performance by replacing many 58.0 ms full-inference rounds with speculative rounds as fast as 7.8 ms, lowering task-level average inference latency to 19.1 ms (3.04x speedup). We additionally demonstrate effectiveness on real-world conveyor-belt sorting, highlighting its practical impact for latency-critical embodied tasks.

Think Twice, Act Once: Verifier-Guided Action Selection For Embodied Agents

High 2605.12620
Nishad Singhi, Christian Bialas, Snehal Jauhri, Vignesh Prasad, Georgia Chalvatzaki, Marcus Rohrbach, Anna Rohrbach
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：VeGAS 通过生成式验证器在测试时筛选候选动作，显著提升具身智能体的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
🎯研究动机

通用具身智能体在复杂真实世界任务中面临挑战，MLLM 虽提升了推理能力，但在分布外场景下仍脆弱，现有方法缺乏有效的验证机制。

❓解决问题

如何在不修改底层策略的前提下，提升 MLLM 驱动的具身智能体在困难分布外场景中的动作选择可靠性。

🔎现象分析

直接使用现成 MLLM 作为验证器无改进，需通过自动数据合成暴露验证器于多样失败案例。

🛠️主要方法

提出 VeGAS 框架，在测试时采样候选动作集合并用生成式验证器选择最可靠动作，通过 LLM 驱动的数据合成策略自动构建失败案例课程训练验证器。

📊实验结果

在 Habitat 和 ALFRED 环境中的具身推理基准上评估，VeGAS 在最具挑战的多目标长时域任务中相比强 CoT 基线获得高达 36% 的相对性能提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 VeGAS，一种无需修改底层策略的测试时验证框架，通过候选动作采样和生成式验证提升鲁棒性。
  • 发现直接使用现成 MLLM 作为验证器无效，提出 LLM 驱动的数据合成策略自动生成多样化失败案例训练验证器。
  • 在 Habitat 和 ALFRED 基准上实现高达 36% 的相对性能提升，尤其在多目标长时域任务上表现显著。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖候选动作采样的质量和数量，可能增加推理计算开销。
  • 验证器训练需要合成数据，可能无法覆盖所有真实失败模式。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Building generalist embodied agents capable of solving complex real-world tasks remains a fundamental challenge in AI. Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of such agents through strong vision-language knowledge and chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, yet remain brittle when faced with challenging out-of-distribution scenarios. To address this, we propose Verifier-Guided Action Selection (VegAS), a test-time framework designed to improve the robustness of MLLM-based embodied agents through an explicit verification step. At inference time, rather than committing to a single decoded action, VeGAS samples an ensemble of candidate actions and uses a generative verifier to identify the most reliable choice, without modifying the underlying policy. Crucially, we find that using an MLLM off-the-shelf as a verifier yields no improvement, motivating our LLM-driven data synthesis strategy, which automatically constructs a diverse curriculum of failure cases to expose the verifier to a rich distribution of potential errors at training time. Across embodied reasoning benchmarks spanning the Habitat and ALFRED environments, VeGAS consistently improves generalization, achieving up to a 36% relative performance gain over strong CoT baselines on the most challenging multi-object, long-horizon tasks.

Action Emergence from Streaming Intent

High 2605.12622
Pengfei Jing, Victor Shea-Jay Huang, Hengtong Lu, Jifeng Dai, Xie Yan, Benjin Zhu
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出 Streaming Intent 机制，通过流式意图链式推理引导流匹配动作头，首次在端到端 VLA 中实现意图可控的驾驶动作涌现。
🎯研究动机

现有端到端自动驾驶方法无法生成符合物理、语义和安全要求的动作：自回归轨迹解码器将多模态未来坍缩为单一平均输出，扩散 / 流匹配生成器虽能表达多模态但无法由推理意图引导。

❓解决问题

如何让端到端自动驾驶模型具备动作涌现能力，即通过场景条件推理而非检索或插值生成合理、安全且意图可控的轨迹。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Streaming Intent 机制，包含语义流式（连续链式推理从场景理解因果推导意图）和时间流式（跨片段保持意图一致性），在 VLA 模型 SI 中实现：自回归解码四步链式推理并输出意图 token，意图通过无分类器引导（CFG）驱动流匹配动作头，仅需两步去噪生成最终轨迹。

📊实验结果

在 Waymo End-to-End 基准上验证，验证集 RFS 7.96，测试集 RFS 7.74，并展示了意图可控性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化定义了端到端自动驾驶中的动作涌现能力。
  • 提出 Streaming Intent 机制，首次在端到端 VLA 中实现意图忠实可控性。
  • 在 Waymo End-to-End 基准上取得有竞争力的性能（RFS 7.96/7.74）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定场景数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 仅需两步去噪，但流匹配头在复杂场景下的鲁棒性未充分讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We formalize action emergence as a target capability for end-to-end autonomous driving: the ability to generate physically feasible, semantically appropriate, and safety-compliant actions in arbitrary, long-tail traffic scenes through scene-conditioned reasoning rather than retrieval or interpolation of learned scene-action mappings. We show that previous paradigms cannot deliver action emergence: autoregressive trajectory decoders collapse the inherently multimodal future into a single averaged output, while diffusion and flow-matching generators express multimodality but are not steerable by reasoned intent. We propose Streaming Intent as a concrete way to approach action emergence: a mechanism that makes driving intent (i) semantically streamed through a continuous chain-of-thought that causally derives the intent from scene understanding, and (ii) temporally streamed across clips so that intent commitments remain coherent along the driving horizon. We realize Streaming Intent in a VLA model we call SI (Streaming Intent). SI autoregressively decodes a four-step chain-of-thought and emits an intent token; the decoded intent then drives classifier-free guidance (CFG) on a flow-matching action head, requiring only two denoising steps to generate the final trajectory. On the Waymo End-to-End benchmark, SI achieves competitive aggregate performance, with an RFS score of 7.96 on the validation set and 7.74 on the test set. Beyond aggregate metrics, the model demonstrates -- to our knowledge for the first time in a fully end-to-end VLA -- intent-faithful controllability: for a fixed scene, varying the intent class at inference yields qualitatively distinct yet consistently high-quality plans, arising purely from data-driven learning without any pre-built trajectory bank or hand-coded post-hoc selector.

任务规划 5 篇

MAP: A Map-then-Act Paradigm for Long-Horizon Interactive Agent Reasoning

High 2605.13037
Yuxin Liu, Ziang Ye, Yueqing Sun, Mingye Zhu, Jinwei Xiao, Zhuowen Han, Qi GU, Xunliang Cai et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种先构建认知地图再执行任务的范式，显著提升 LLM 在长时交互推理中的表现。
🎯研究动机

当前交互式 LLM 代理依赖目标条件逐步规划，环境理解在执行过程中被动获取，导致延迟环境感知和认知瓶颈，陷入低效失败循环。

❓解决问题

解决 LLM 代理在长时交互任务中因缺乏预先环境理解而导致的试错效率低下问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出当前方法存在 Delayed Environmental Perception 和 Epistemic Bottleneck，即代理必须通过试错推断环境约束，导致失败循环。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Map-then-Act Paradigm (MAP)，包含三个阶段：全局探索获取环境通用先验、任务特定映射构建结构化认知地图、知识增强执行基于地图求解任务。

📊实验结果

在 ARC-AGI-3 基准上，MAP 使前沿模型在 25 个游戏环境中的 22 个上超越接近零的基线性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MAP 框架，将环境理解前置，作为即插即用模块提升 LLM 代理性能。
  • 引入 MAP-2K 数据集，证明基于地图 - 行动轨迹的训练优于专家执行轨迹。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的环境探索阶段，在复杂动态环境中探索成本高。
  • 认知地图的构建和更新机制可能无法完全适应环境变化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Current interactive LLM agents rely on goal-conditioned stepwise planning, where environmental understanding is acquired reactively during execution rather than established beforehand. This temporal inversion leads to Delayed Environmental Perception: agents must infer environmental constraints through trial-and-error, resulting in an Epistemic Bottleneck that traps them in inefficient failure cycles. Inspired by human affordance perception and cognitive map theory, we propose the Map-then-Act Paradigm (MAP), a plug-and-play framework that shifts environment understanding before execution. MAP consists of three stages: (1) Global Exploration, acquiring environment-general priors; (2) Task-Specific Mapping, constructing a structured cognitive map; and (3) Knowledge-Augmented Execution, solving tasks grounded on the map. Experiments show consistent gains across benchmarks and LLMs. On ARC-AGI-3, MAP enables frontier models to surpass near-zero baseline performance in 22 of 25 game environments. We further introduce MAP-2K, a dataset of map-then-act trajectories, and show that training on it outperforms expert execution traces, suggesting that understanding environments is more fundamental than imitation.

When Does Hierarchy Help? Benchmarking Agent Coordination in Event-Driven Industrial Scheduling

Medium 2605.13172
Ziqi Wang, Yuhao Yang, Zhiwei Ling, Wenzhuo Qian, Hailiang Zhao
arXiv PDF cs.MA
TL;DR：提出分布式事件驱动调度基准 DESBench，系统比较四种协调范式在工业调度中的权衡。
🎯研究动机

现有多智能体基准多评估弱耦合环境下的任务完成，缺乏对共享动态系统中层级协调与耦合约束的研究，导致不同协调范式的成功与失败条件未被充分探索。

❓解决问题

评估层级事件驱动调度中不同协调范式（集中式、层级式、异层级式、全息式）的性能权衡。

🔎现象分析

集中式协调鲁棒且通信高效但扩展性差；层级协调通过分解提高效率但存在跨层级失调；异层级协调灵活但通信开销大；全息协调约束满足好但全局鲁棒性差。

🛠️主要方法

构建基于共享离散事件驱动环境的工业调度基准 DESBench，定义多时间尺度决策、部分可观测性和动态耦合约束，并设计评估有效性、约束对齐、协调效率和鲁棒性的指标。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 DESBench 基准，支持层级事件驱动调度中多智能体协调的受控评估。
  • 系统比较四种协调范式，揭示结构权衡，强调自适应协调机制的必要性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准可能未覆盖所有工业调度场景。
  • 协调范式分类可能忽略混合或新兴范式。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent advances in agent and multi-agent systems have shown strong performance on tool use, reasoning, and collaborative tasks. However, existing benchmarks mostly evaluate task completion in weakly coupled environments, and provide limited support for studying coordination in shared, dynamically evolving systems with hierarchy and coupled constraints. This leaves an important question underexplored: when do different coordination paradigms succeed or fail? We introduce Distributed Event-driven Scheduling Benchmark (DESBench), a benchmark for evaluating agent coordination in hierarchical event-driven scheduling. Built on a shared discrete-event driven environment in industrial scheduling, our benchmark captures multi-timescale decision making, partial observability, and dynamically coupled constraints. We define tasks and metrics that evaluate effectiveness, constraint alignment, coordination efficiency, and robustness, and focus on four representative coordination paradigms: centralized, hierarchical, heterarchical, and holonic. These paradigms correspond to distinct mechanisms of information flow, decision authority, and conflict resolution. Our controlled evaluations reveal clear coordination trade-offs: centralized coordination is robust and communication-efficient but scales poorly with difficulty; hierarchical coordination improves efficiency through decomposition but suffers from cross-level misalignment; heterarchical coordination is flexible but communication-heavy; and holonic coordination satisfies constraints well but loses global robustness. These findings demonstrate that coordination design fundamentally shapes agent system behavior in complex environments, revealing structural trade-offs that cannot be captured by outcome metrics alone and underscoring the imperative for more adaptive, principled, and dynamic coordination mechanisms in future MAS research.

An Agentic AI Framework with Large Language Models and Chain-of-Thought for UAV-Assisted Logistics Scheduling with Mobile Edge Computing

Medium 2605.13221
Hanwen Zhang, Dusit Niyato, Wei Zhang, Xin Lou, Malcolm Yoke Hean Low
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一个结合 LLM 和层次化强化学习的智能体框架，用于无人机辅助物流与边缘计算联合调度。
🎯研究动机

无人机同时承担产品收集和移动边缘计算任务，形成物流与计算调度的耦合问题，传统方法难以处理这种复杂约束。

❓解决问题

解决无人机物流路线与计算任务卸载的联合调度优化问题。

🔎现象分析

无人机路由决策直接影响 MEC 服务窗口、能量预算和计算资源可用性，导致问题高度耦合。

🛠️主要方法

提出智能体 AI 框架：上层用 LLM+RAG+CoT 将用户输入转化为数学公式，下层用层次化 PPO 分别优化路由和任务执行。

📊实验结果

仿真实验显示层次化 PPO 在最后 500 个 episode 中实现 99.6% 产品收集率和 100% 截止时间满足率，性能优于优势演员 - 评论家方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出结合 LLM 和层次化强化学习的智能体框架解决联合调度问题
  • 层次化 PPO 方法在仿真中实现 99.6% 产品收集率和 100% 截止时间满足率
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅仿真验证，未提及真实环境部署
  • LLM 生成数学公式的泛化性未充分讨论
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In cloud manufacturing, unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) can support both product collection and mobile edge computing (MEC). This joint operation forms a hybrid scheduling problem, where physical logistics decisions are coupled with computational task scheduling. In this paper, UAVs collect finished products from manufacturing stations and transport them back to a central depot. Meanwhile, computational tasks generated by industrial sensor devices at these stations are processed locally, at UAVs, or offloaded via UAVs to the cloud. This coupling makes the problem challenging. A UAV can provide MEC services only during its service window at a station, so routing decisions directly determine when UAV-assisted offloading is available. Routing decisions also affect the UAV energy budget and the availability of onboard computing and communication resources for computational task execution under task deadline constraints. To address this, we propose an agentic-AI-assisted optimization framework with two components. First, we develop an agentic AI that combines large language models, retrieval-augmented generation, and chain-of-thought reasoning to translate user input into an interpretable mathematical formulation for the hybrid scheduling problem. Second, we design a hierarchical deep reinforcement learning approach based on proximal policy optimization (PPO), where the upper layer learns UAV routing and the lower layer optimizes per-slot task execution and resource allocation. Simulation results show that the proposed framework yields more consistent formulations, while the hierarchical PPO achieves full product collection in 99.6% of the last 500 episodes and maintains a 100% deadline satisfaction rate, with more stable performance than the advantage actor-critic approach.

Discrete Diffusion for Complex and Congested Multi-Agent Path Finding with Sparse Social Attention

Medium 2605.13296
Yuanzhe Wang, Tian Zhi, Zihang Wei, Hongguang Wang, Jiaming Guo, Yang Zhao, Zisheng Liu, Shiyu Quan et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：DiffLNS 将离散扩散模型与 LNS2 结合，为多智能体路径规划生成高质量初始解，显著提升拥堵场景下的成功率。
🎯研究动机

多智能体路径规划（MAPF）在密集环境中，次优初始计划会导致复合冲突，阻碍可行修复。现有基于修复的求解器（如 LNS2）严重依赖初始计划质量，但这一因素尚未被充分探索。

❓解决问题

如何为 LNS2 提供高质量、多样化的初始计划，以提升拥堵场景下 MAPF 的求解成功率。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，在密集环境中，次优初始计划会引发复合冲突，使得可行修复变得困难。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DiffLNS 混合框架，使用离散去噪扩散概率模型（D3PM）作为初始化器，通过稀疏社交注意力学习多智能体联合动作轨迹的时空先验，生成多样化的联合计划草稿，作为 LNS2 的热启动。

📊实验结果

在最多 96 个智能体的实例上训练，泛化到最多 312 个智能体的场景。在 20 个复杂拥堵设置中，DiffLNS 平均成功率 95.8%，在所有设置中匹配或超过所有基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将离散扩散模型用于热启动基于 LNS 的 MAPF 求解器。
  • 提出稀疏社交注意力机制，学习多智能体协调动作的时空先验。
  • 在 20 个复杂拥堵场景中，平均成功率 95.8%，超过最强基线 9.6 个百分点。
⚠️方法局限
  • 训练实例规模有限（最多 96 个智能体），泛化到更大规模场景的可靠性需进一步验证。
  • 依赖专家演示数据，获取成本可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is a coordination problem that requires computing globally consistent, collision-free trajectories from individual start positions to assigned goal positions under combinatorial planning complexity. In dense environments, suboptimal initial plans induce compound conflicts that hinder feasible repair. For repair-based solvers like LNS2, initial plan quality critically affects downstream repair, yet this factor remains underexplored.
