We propose DiffLNS, a hybrid framework that integrates a discrete denoising diffusion probabilistic model (D3PM) with LNS2. The D3PM serves as an initializer with sparse social attention that learns a spatiotemporal prior over coordinated multi-agent action trajectories from expert demonstrations and samples multiple joint plans. Operating directly on the categorical action space, our discrete diffusion preserves the MAPF action structure and samples from a multimodal joint-plan distribution to produce diverse drafts well suited for neighborhood repair. These drafts act as warm starts for downstream repair, which completes unfinished trajectories and resolves remaining conflicts under hard MAPF constraints. Experimental results show that despite being trained only on instances with at most 96 agents, the initializer generalizes to scenarios with up to 312 agents at inference time. Across 20 complex and congested settings, DiffLNS achieves an average success rate of 95.8%, outperforming the strongest tested baseline by 9.6 percentage points and matching or exceeding all baselines in all 20 settings. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to leverage discrete diffusion for warm-starting an LNS-based MAPF solver.

Adaptive mine planning under geological uncertainty: A POMDP framework for sequential decision-making

Medium 2605.13702
Hamza Khalifi, Jef Caers, Yassine Taha, Mostafa Benzaazoua, Abdellatif Elghali
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：将矿山调度建模为 POMDP，通过序贯信念更新将地质不确定性从被动约束转化为主动价值创造。
🎯研究动机

传统矿山调度将不确定性视为被动约束，无法利用未来观测信息动态调整决策，导致计划与现实存在较大差距。

❓解决问题

如何在地质不确定性下实现自适应矿山调度，使决策能随观测信息动态更新。

🔎现象分析

传统随机优化方法存在 22.3% 的期望 - 现实差距，而 POMDP 框架可将差距降至 4.6%，并在先验错误设定下仍显著优于静态规划。

🛠️主要方法

提出混合 SA-POMDP 架构，结合模拟退火值近似与 ES-MDA 集成信念更新，实现序贯决策与自适应策略。

📊实验结果

在铜金露天矿复杂场景下评估，与单次随机优化对比，SA-POMDP 将期望 - 现实差距从 22.3% 降至 4.6%，实现 NPV 提升 840 万美元；在先验错误设定 10% 时，优势达 3690 万美元（36.9%）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将矿山调度问题形式化为 POMDP，实现自适应序贯决策。
  • 提出 SA-POMDP 混合架构，兼顾计算可行性与决策质量。
  • 在铜金矿案例中验证了显著的经济效益提升和鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖地质先验的统计一致性，极端错误设定下性能未知。
  • 计算复杂度可能随状态空间增大而显著增加。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Strategic mine production scheduling under geological uncertainty is conventionally formulated as a stochastic optimization problem in which a fixed extraction sequence and routing decisions are computed ex ante. This plan-driven paradigm treats uncertainty as passive: decisions are hedged across geological scenarios, but planning does not anticipate how future observations will inform future decisions. We propose a different perspective by formulating mine scheduling as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP), in which extraction and routing decisions are made sequentially with planning explicitly integrating the expectation of future belief updates. To achieve computational tractability, we introduce a hybrid SA-POMDP architecture that combines simulated annealing-based (SA) value approximation with ensemble-based belief updating via ensemble smoother with multiple data assimilation (ES-MDA). At each decision epoch, candidate actions are evaluated through their expected long-term value under the current belief, and the belief is updated as mining observations are assimilated. This yields an adaptive policy rather than a fixed plan. We evaluate the framework on a copper-gold open-pit mining complex with multiple processing destinations. Under a statistically consistent prior, the SA-POMDP reduces the expectation-reality gap from 22.3% to 4.6%, improving realized NPV by USD8.4M relative to one-shot stochastic optimization. Under systematic prior misspecification of 10%, the adaptive framework outperforms static planning by up to USD44.6M (36.9%), demonstrating structural robustness beyond scenario hedging. These results show that sequential belief updating transforms geological uncertainty from a passive constraint into an active component of value creation.

操作 (Manipulation) 5 篇

SECOND-Grasp: Semantic Contact-guided Dexterous Grasping

High 2605.13117
Han Yi Shin, Heeju Ko, Jaewon Mun, Qixing Huang, Jaehyeok Lee, Sung June Kim, Honglak Lee, Sujin Jang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出语义接触引导的灵巧抓取框架 SECOND-Grasp，通过视觉 - 语言推理和几何一致性优化实现物理稳定与语义理解的统一。
🎯研究动机

灵巧抓取需要同时满足物理稳定性和语义任务指导，但现有方法常将两者分离处理，缺乏统一框架。

❓解决问题

如何将物理稳定的灵巧抓取与语言引导的抓取生成相结合，实现既稳定又符合语义意图的抓取。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

通过视觉 - 语言推理获取粗略接触提议，经语义 - 几何一致性精炼（SGCR）得到可靠 3D 接触图，再通过逆运动学推导可行手部姿态，生成策略学习监督信号。

📊实验结果

在 DexGraspNet 数据集上评估，在已知和未知类别上分别达到 98.2% 和 97.7% 的抓取成功率，意图感知抓取提升 12.8% 和 26.2%；在 Shadow Hand 和 Allegro Hand 上展示泛化能力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SECOND-Grasp 统一框架，融合语义推理与物理可行性。
  • 引入语义 - 几何一致性精炼（SGCR）确保多视图接触预测的语义一致性和几何有效性。
  • 在 DexGraspNet 上实现 98.2%（已知类别）和 97.7%（未知类别）的抓取成功率，意图感知抓取提升 12.8% 和 26.2%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的视觉 - 语言模型进行接触推理。
  • 逆运动学求解可能受限于手部运动学约束。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Achieving reliable robotic manipulation, such as dexterous grasping, requires a synergy between physically stable interactions and semantic task guidance, yet these objectives are often treated as separate, disjoint goals. In this paper, we investigate how to integrate dexterous grasping techniques, i.e., physically stable grasps for object lifting and language-guided grasp generation, to achieve both physical stability and semantic understanding. To this end, we propose SECOND-Grasp (SEmantic CONtact-guided Dexterous Grasping), a unified framework that enables robotic hands to dynamically adjust grasping strategies based on semantic reasoning while ensuring physical feasibility. We begin by obtaining coarse contact proposals through vision-language reasoning to infer where contacts should occur based on object properties, followed by segmentation to localize these regions across views. To further ensure consistency across multiple viewpoints, we introduce Semantic-Geometric Consistency Refinement (SGCR), which refines initial contact predictions by enforcing semantic consistency across views and removing geometrically invalid regions, yielding reliable 3D contact maps. Then, we derive a feasible hand pose for each contact map via inverse kinematics, generating a supervision signal for policy learning. Our approach, trained on DexGraspNet, consistently outperforms baselines in lifting success rate on both seen and unseen categories, achieving 98.2% and 97.7%, respectively, while also improving intent-aware grasping by 12.8% and 26.2%. We further show promising results on additional datasets and robotic hands, including Shadow Hand and Allegro Hand.

CUBic: Coordinated Unified Bimanual Perception and Control Framework

High 2605.13452
Xingyu Wang, Pengxiang Ding, Jingkai Xu, Donglin Wang, Zhaoxin Fan
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出统一的双臂感知与控制框架 CUBic，通过共享 token 化表示和双向协调机制提升双臂操作性能。
🎯研究动机

现有双臂操作策略要么解耦双臂以避免干扰，要么强制强耦合以实现协调，缺乏统一处理方法，导致端到端学习难以从单臂扩展到双臂。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个统一的双臂感知与控制框架，使独立感知和协调交互自然涌现，而非依赖手工设计的耦合机制。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

CUBic 框架包含三个组件：单向感知聚合、通过两个共享映射码本的双向感知协调、以及统一的感知到控制扩散策略。

📊实验结果

在 RoboTwin 基准上进行实验，与标准基线和最先进的视觉运动基线对比，CUBic 在协调精度和任务成功率上均有显著提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CUBic，将双臂协调重新表述为统一的感知建模问题。
  • 学习共享的 token 化表示，使独立性和协调性从结构中自然涌现。
  • 在 RoboTwin 基准上超越标准基线，显著提升协调精度和任务成功率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定基准，泛化性未充分验证。
  • 共享表示可能在大规模复杂任务中面临扩展性问题。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent advances in visuomotor policy learning have enabled robots to perform control directly from visual inputs. Yet, extending such end-to-end learning from single-arm to bimanual manipulation remains challenging due to the need for both independent perception and coordinated interaction between arms. Existing methods typically favor one side -- either decoupling the two arms to avoid interference or enforcing strong cross-arm coupling for coordination -- thus lacking a unified treatment. We propose CUBic, a Coordinated and Unified framework for Bimanual perception and control that reformulates bimanual coordination as a unified perceptual modeling problem. CUBic learns a shared tokenized representation bridging perception and control, where independence and coordination emerge intrinsically from structure rather than from hand-crafted coupling. Our approach integrates three components: unidirectional perception aggregation, bidirectional perception coordination through two codebooks with shared mapping, and a unified perception-to-control diffusion policy. Extensive experiments on the RoboTwin benchmark show that CUBic consistently surpasses standard baselines, achieving marked improvements in coordination accuracy and task success rates over state-of-the-art visuomotor baselines.

AttenA+: Rectifying Action Inequality in Robotic Foundation Models

High 2605.13548
Daojie Peng, Fulong Ma, Jiahang Cao, Qiang Zhang, Xupeng Xie, Jian Guo, Ping Luo, Andrew F. Luo et al.
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出 AttenA+ 框架，通过速度驱动的动作注意力纠正机器人基础模型中的动作不平等问题，显著提升复杂操作任务性能。
🎯研究动机

现有机器人基础模型假设所有动作在优化中同等重要，忽略了操作任务中动作的物理层次结构，导致低速度关键段与高速度过渡段被平等对待，限制了模型在复杂长时任务中的性能。

❓解决问题

机器人基础模型训练中均匀损失加权与物理关键性之间的错配问题。

🔎现象分析

机器人轨迹本质上是异质的：低速度段通常通过高精度交互决定任务成功，而高速度运动是容错过渡段。均匀损失加权忽略了这种物理层次结构。

🛠️主要方法

AttenA+，一种与架构无关的框架，通过基于逆速度场的动作注意力重新加权训练目标，优先考虑运动学关键段，作为即插即用增强可集成到现有骨干网络中。

📊实验结果

在 Libero 基准上，OpenVLA-OFT 达到 98.6%（+1.5%）；在 RoboTwin 2.0 上，FastWAM 达到 92.4%（+0.6%）；在 Franka 机械臂上进行真实世界验证。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AttenA+ 框架，通过速度驱动的动作注意力纠正动作不平等问题，无需修改结构或增加参数。
  • 在 Libero 和 RoboTwin 2.0 基准上显著提升 OpenVLA-OFT 和 FastWAM 的性能，并在真实 Franka 机械臂上验证鲁棒性和跨任务泛化能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对速度估计的准确性敏感，噪声速度可能影响注意力权重。
  • 当前仅在操作任务上验证，其他机器人领域（如导航）的适用性未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing robotic foundation models, while powerful, are predicated on an implicit assumption of temporal homogeneity: treating all actions as equally informative during optimization. This "flat" training paradigm, inherited from language modeling, remains indifferent to the underlying physical hierarchy of manipulation. In reality, robot trajectories are fundamentally heterogeneous, where low-velocity segments often dictate task success through precision-demanding interactions, while high-velocity motions serve as error-tolerant transitions. Such a misalignment between uniform loss weighting and physical criticality fundamentally limits the performance of current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models and World-Action Models (WAM) in complex, long-horizon tasks. To rectify this, we introduce AttenA+, an architecture-agnostic framework that prioritizes kinematically critical segments via velocity-driven action attention. By reweighting the training objective based on the inverse velocity field, AttenA+ naturally aligns the model's learning capacity with the physical demands of manipulation. As a plug-and-play enhancement, AttenA+ can be integrated into existing backbones without structural modifications or additional parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AttenA+ significantly elevates the ceilings of current state-of-the-art models. Specifically, it improves OpenVLA-OFT to 98.6% (+1.5%) on the Libero benchmark and pushes FastWAM to 92.4% (+0.6%) on RoboTwin 2.0. Real-world validation on a Franka manipulator further showcases its robustness and cross-task generalization. Our work suggests that mining the intrinsic structural priors of action sequences offers a highly efficient, physics-aware complement to standard scaling laws, paving a new path for general-purpose robotic control.

RoboEvolve: Co-Evolving Planner-Simulator for Robotic Manipulation with Limited Data

High 2605.13775
Harold Haodong Chen, Sirui Chen, Yingjie Xu, Wenhang Ge, Ying-Cong Chen
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：RoboEvolve 通过 VLM 规划器与 VGM 模拟器的协同进化，在极少数据下实现机器人操作任务的自主数据合成与策略优化。
🎯研究动机

机器人操作的可扩展性受限于任务对齐的物理交互数据稀缺，现有 VLM 和 VGM 分别存在语义 - 空间错位和物理幻觉问题，亟需一种能自动生成高质量训练数据的方法。

❓解决问题

如何利用少量无标注种子图像，通过 VLM 规划器与 VGM 模拟器的相互增强，生成物理合理且任务对齐的交互数据，并提升操作策略的性能。

🔎现象分析

VLM 规划器存在语义 - 空间错位，VGM 模拟器存在物理幻觉；通过白天探索和夜间巩固的双阶段机制，系统能从简单动作自然扩展到复杂任务，并利用“差一点”失败案例稳定策略优化。

🛠️主要方法

提出 RoboEvolve 框架，包含 VLM 规划器与 VGM 模拟器的协同进化循环：白天探索阶段使用语义控制的多粒度奖励进行物理接地行为发现，夜间巩固阶段挖掘近失败案例以稳定策略优化，并采用自主渐进课程从简单动作扩展到复杂任务。

📊实验结果

在机器人操作任务上，RoboEvolve 将基础规划器性能提升 30 个绝对百分点，模拟器成功率平均提高 48%；仅用 500 个无标注种子图像即超越全监督基线，数据量减少 50 倍；并展示出鲁棒的持续学习能力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 VLM 规划器与 VGM 模拟器协同进化的框架，实现无标注种子图像下的自主数据合成与策略优化。
  • 引入认知启发的双阶段机制（白天探索与夜间巩固）和渐进课程，显著提升数据效率和任务性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 VLM 和 VGM 的初始质量，若基础模型本身较弱则协同效果受限。
  • 框架复杂度较高，双阶段循环和渐进课程可能需要较多计算资源。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The scalability of robotic manipulation is fundamentally bottlenecked by the scarcity of task-aligned physical interaction data. While vision-language models (VLMs) and video generation models (VGMs) hold promise for autonomous data synthesis, they suffer from semantic-spatial misalignment and physical hallucinations, respectively. To bridge this gap, we introduce RoboEvolve, a novel framework that couples a VLM planner and a VGM simulator into a mutually reinforcing co-evolutionary loop. Operating purely on unlabeled seed images, RoboEvolve leverages a cognitive-inspired dual-phase mechanism: (i) daytime exploration fosters physically grounded behavioral discovery through a semantic-controlled multi-granular reward, and (ii) nighttime consolidation mines "near-miss" failures to stabilize policy optimization. Guided by an autonomous progressive curriculum, the system naturally scales from simple atomic actions to complex tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RoboEvolve (I) achieves superior effectiveness, elevating base planners by 30 absolute points and amplifying simulator success by 48% on average; (II) exhibits extreme data efficiency, surpassing fully supervised baselines with merely 500 unlabeled seeds--a 50x reduction; and (III) demonstrates robust continual learning without catastrophic forgetting.

When Absolute State Fails: Evaluating Proprioceptive Encodings for Robust Manipulation

Medium 2605.13067
Maxime Alvarez, Ryo Watanabe, Paul Crook, Afshin Zeinaddini Meymand, Suvin Kurian, Pablo Ferreiro, Genki Sano
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：机器人本体感知编码策略对比：相对帧编码提升操作鲁棒性
🎯研究动机

端到端机器人策略在真实部署时面临训练与推理条件差异，现有方法通过扩大数据多样性提升泛化性，但面对新测试条件仍易失败，尤其是移动基座机器人带来的参考系变化问题。

❓解决问题

如何设计机器人本体感知状态的编码策略，以提升在分布内和分布外测试条件下的操作性能与鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

系统对比多种关节表示编码策略，发现基于 episode 的相对帧编码在任务性能与鲁棒性之间取得最佳平衡。

📊实验结果

在真实机器人环境中进行广泛实验，对比多种编码策略，结果显示相对帧编码在任务性能和鲁棒性上最佳。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出并系统研究了多种本体感知编码策略对机器人操作鲁棒性的影响
  • 发现简单 episode-wise 相对帧编码优于基线，并在真实机器人实验中验证
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定机器人形态或任务
  • 未探讨更复杂的参考系变换场景
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As end-to-end robotic policies are progressively deployed in the real world to solve real tasks, they face a gap between the training and inference conditions. Scaling the amount and diversity of the training data has shown some success in improving zero-shot generalization, yet robots still fail when faced with new, unseen test conditions. For instance, while robots with fixed frames of reference are common, those with moving frames pose a greater challenge for deployment. To address this specific instance of the issue, we present a study of strategies for encoding the robot's proprioceptive state to improve both in- and out-of-distribution performance at test time. Through a systematic study of joint representations, we find that a simple episode-wise relative frame provides the best trade-off between task performance and robustness, outperforming the baselines in extensive real-robot experiments conducted in a realistic test environment. The results suggest a practical path to leveraging data collected by robots with varying frames of reference and deployment to unseen test configurations.

导航 3 篇

Causality-Aware End-to-End Autonomous Driving via Ego-Centric Joint Scene Modeling

High 2605.13646
Seokha Moon, Minseung Lee, Joon Seo, Jinkyu Kim, Jungbeom Lee
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出因果感知端到端自动驾驶框架 CaAD，通过自车联合因果建模提升闭环规划性能。
🎯研究动机

现有端到端自动驾驶方法忽略自车与周围智能体之间的因果相互依赖，导致轨迹预测不一致且不可靠，尤其在交互关键场景中。

❓解决问题

如何建模自车与周围智能体之间的因果依赖关系，实现一致可靠的轨迹预测和闭环规划。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CaAD 框架，包含自车中心联合因果建模模块（基于边缘预测分支学习因果依赖）和因果感知策略对齐阶段（使用联合模态嵌入对齐随机策略与闭环反馈）。

📊实验结果

在 Bench2Drive 和 NAVSIM 基准上评估，CaAD 在 Bench2Drive 上达到 Driving Score 87.53 和 Success Rate 71.81，在 NAVSIM 上达到 PDMS 91.1。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出因果感知端到端自动驾驶框架 CaAD，显式建模自车与交互相关智能体的因果依赖。
  • 设计因果感知策略对齐方法，利用联合模态嵌入对齐随机策略与规划导向的闭环反馈。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的因果图先验或标注。
  • 在极端复杂场景下因果建模的泛化性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

End-to-end autonomous driving, which bypasses traditional modular pipelines by directly predicting future trajectories from sensor inputs, has recently achieved substantial progress. However, existing methods often overlook the causal inter-dependencies in ego-vehicle planning, ignoring the reciprocal relations between the ego vehicle and surrounding agents. This causal oversight leads to inconsistent and unreliable trajectory predictions, especially in interaction-critical scenarios where ego decisions and neighboring agent behaviors must be reasoned about jointly. To address this limitation, we propose CaAD, a Causality-aware end-to-end Autonomous Driving framework that captures these dependencies within a shared latent scene representation. First, we propose a ego-centric joint-causal modeling module that builds on the marginal prediction branch, and learns causal dependencies between the ego vehicle and interaction-relevant agents. Second, we employ a causality-aware policy alignment stage implemented with joint-mode embeddings to align the stochastic ego policy with planning-oriented closed-loop feedback computed from surrounding traffic and map context. On the Bench2Drive and NAVSIM benchmarks, CaAD demonstrates strong closed-loop planning performance, achieving a Driving Score of 87.53 and Success Rate of 71.81 on Bench2Drive, and a PDMS of 91.1 on NAVSIM.

LEXI-SG: Monocular 3D Scene Graph Mapping with Room-Guided Feed-Forward Reconstruction

High 2605.13741
Christina Kassab, Hyeonjae Gil, Matías Mattamala, Ayoung Kim, Maurice Fallon
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：首个仅用单目 RGB 相机实现开放词汇 3D 场景图稠密建图的系统，通过房间引导的前馈重建实现可扩展映射。
🎯研究动机

现有场景图建图方法依赖深度相机或 LiDAR，限制了应用场景；单目 RGB 建图面临尺度不一致和可扩展性问题。

❓解决问题

如何仅用单目 RGB 输入实现稠密、可扩展、开放词汇的 3D 场景图建图。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

利用开放词汇基础模型的语义先验将场景划分为房间，在房间完全观测后执行前馈重建；提出基于房间的因子图公式全局对齐房间重建，同时保持局部一致性并自然构建场景图层次；在房间内支持开放词汇物体分割与跟踪。

📊实验结果

在 Habitat-Matterport 3D 室内场景和自采集的自我中心办公室序列上评估，与现有前馈 SLAM 方法和场景图基线比较，展示了改进的轨迹估计和稠密重建，以及有竞争力的开放词汇分割性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个仅用单目 RGB 的稠密开放词汇 3D 场景图建图系统。
  • 提出房间引导的前馈重建策略，避免滑动窗口尺度不一致。
  • 基于房间的因子图公式实现全局对齐与局部一致性保持。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对复杂动态场景鲁棒性有限。
  • 依赖基础模型的语义先验，可能受限于模型泛化能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Scene graphs are becoming a standard representation for robot navigation, providing hierarchical geometric and semantic scene understanding. However, most scene graph mapping methods rely on depth cameras or LiDAR sensors. In this work, we present LEXI-SG, the first dense monocular visual mapping system for open-vocabulary 3D scene graphs using only RGB camera input. Our approach exploits the semantic priors of open-vocabulary foundation models to partition the scene into rooms, deferring feed-forward reconstruction to when each room is fully observed -- enabling scalable dense mapping without sliding-window scale inconsistencies. We propose a room-based factor graph formulation to globally align room reconstructions while preserving local map consistency and naturally imposing the semantic scene graph hierarchy. Within each room, we further support open-vocabulary object segmentation and tracking. We validate LEXI-SG on indoor scenes from the Habitat-Matterport 3D and self-collected egocentric office sequences. We evaluate its performance against existing feed-forward SLAM methods, as well as established scene graphs baselines. We demonstrate improved trajectory estimation and dense reconstruction, as well as, competitive performance in open-vocabulary segmentation. LEXI-SG shows that accurate, scalable, open-vocabulary 3D scene graphs can be achieved from monocular RGB alone. Our project page and office sequences are available here: this https URL .

LMPath: Language-Mediated Priors and Path Generation for Aerial Exploration

Medium 2605.13782
Jonathan A. Diller, Fernando Cladera, Camillo J. Taylor, Vijay Kumar
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：利用语言模型和视觉基础模型为无人机搜索任务生成语义驱动的探索先验，显著优于传统几何覆盖方法。
🎯研究动机

传统无人机自主搜索依赖几何覆盖模式，忽略目标语义上下文，在大规模环境中造成大量时间浪费。

❓解决问题

如何利用语义信息为无人机搜索任务生成高效的探索先验和路径。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

LMPath 管道：使用生成语言模型根据目标对象提示确定环境中的可能区域，再通过基础视觉模型在卫星图像上分割子区域形成探索先验，最后基于该先验生成无人机路径。

📊实验结果

在真实无人机大规模环境和仿真中进行了实验，显示 LMPath 生成的路径优于传统路径规划方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 LMPath，一种利用语言和视觉基础模型生成语义探索先验的管道。
  • 展示了基于先验的路径规划在真实无人机和仿真中优于传统方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖卫星图像和语言模型的准确性。
  • 可能受限于目标对象在卫星图像中的可见性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Traditional autonomous UAV search missions rely on geometric coverage patterns that ignore the semantic context of the target, leading to significant time waste in large-scale environments. In this paper we present LMPath, a pipeline for generating language-mediated exploration priors for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) search missions that leverages semantics. Given a basic geofence and an object of interest prompt, LMPath uses generative language models to determine what regions of the environment should contain that object and a foundation vision model ran over satellite imagery to segment sub-regions that form the exploration prior. This prior can then be used to generate UAV paths with various objectives, such as minimizing the expected time to locate the object of interest, maximizing the probability that the object is found given a limited travel distance, or narrowing down the search space to sub-regions that are most likely to contain the object. To demonstrate it's capabilities, we used LMPath to generate various UAV paths and ran them using a real UAV over large-scale environments. We also ran simulations to demonstrate how paths generated using LMPath outperform traditional path planning approaches for search missions.

仿真到现实 1 篇

CoGE: Sim-to-Real Online Geometric Estimation for Monocular Colonoscopy

Medium 2605.13038
Liangjing Shao, Beilei Cui, Hongliang Ren
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 CoGE 框架，通过光照感知和结构感知模块实现仅用模拟数据训练的结肠镜在线几何估计，在真实场景中达到 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

结肠镜几何估计（深度估计与场景重建）对 3D 空间感知和导航至关重要，但真实数据因结肠狭窄封闭难以获取几何真值，且模拟与真实数据间存在由伪影和光照引起的特征差距。

❓解决问题

解决单目结肠镜在线几何估计中模拟到真实域适应问题，克服光照多样性和特征差距。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CoGE 框架，包含基于 Retinex 理论的光照感知监督模块和基于小波分解的结构感知感知模块，仅用模拟数据训练。

📊实验结果

定量和定性结果表明，仅用模拟数据训练的模型在模拟和真实场景的几何估计中均达到 SOTA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出光照感知监督模块处理结肠镜场景中的光照多样性
  • 提出结构感知感知模块提取结肠的公共结构和局部特征
  • 仅用模拟数据训练即实现模拟和真实场景的 SOTA 几何估计
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极端光照或严重伪影场景鲁棒性不足
  • 依赖模拟数据质量，泛化到其他内窥镜场景需验证
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Geometric estimation including depth estimation and scene reconstruction is a crucial technique for colonoscopy which can provide surgeons with 3D spatial perception and navigation. However, geometric ground truth in colonoscopy is difficult to obtain due to narrow and enclosed space of the colon, while there is a large feature gap between simulated data and realistic data caused by artifacts and illumination. In this paper, we present CoGE, a novel framework for online monocular geometric estimation during colonoscopy. Firstly, we propose an illumination-aware supervision module based on the Retinex theory to address illumination diversity in different colonoscopy scenes. Moreover, a structure-aware perception module is proposed based on wavelet decomposition to extract common structural and local features of the colon. Both quantitative and qualitative results demonstrate that the proposed model solely trained on simulated data achieves state-of-the-art performance in geometric estimation for both simulated and realistic scenes.

生成模型 21 篇 · 7 个细分

扩散模型 9 篇

Asymmetric Flow Models

High 2605.12964
Hansheng Chen, Jan Ackermann, Minseo Kim, Gordon Wetzstein, Leonidas Guibas
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出非对称流模型（AsymFlow），通过低秩噪声预测实现高维空间的高效流生成，在 ImageNet 和文本到图像生成上取得 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

高维空间中的流生成因需要预测高维噪声而困难，即使数据具有强低秩结构，现有方法效率低且难以微调预训练潜空间模型到像素空间。

❓解决问题

如何在高维流生成中利用数据的低秩结构，降低噪声预测维度，同时保持全维速度预测，并实现潜空间模型到像素空间的高效微调。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出非对称速度参数化（AsymFlow），将噪声预测限制在低秩子空间，数据预测保持全维，通过解析方式恢复全维速度，无需改变网络架构或训练 / 采样过程。

📊实验结果

在 ImageNet 256×256 上取得 1.57 FID，超越 DiT/JiT 类像素扩散模型；从 FLUX.2 klein 9B 微调的像素 AsymFlow 模型在 HPSv3、DPG-Bench 和 GenEval 上超越其潜空间基座，视觉真实感显著提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AsymFlow，一种非对称速度参数化方法，显著提升高维流生成效率和质量。
  • 首次提供将预训练潜空间流模型微调为像素空间模型的路径，通过低秩像素子空间对齐实现无缝初始化。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对低秩假设较强的数据效果更好，对无低秩结构的数据可能不适用。
  • 微调过程依赖于潜空间模型，可能受限于基座模型的质量。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Flow-based generation in high-dimensional spaces is difficult because velocity prediction requires modeling high-dimensional noise, even when data has strong low-rank structure. We present Asymmetric Flow Modeling (AsymFlow), a rank-asymmetric velocity parameterization that restricts noise prediction to a low-rank subspace while keeping data prediction full-dimensional. From this asymmetric prediction, AsymFlow analytically recovers the full-dimensional velocity without changing the network architecture or training/sampling procedures. On ImageNet 256$\times$256, AsymFlow achieves a leading 1.57 FID, outperforming prior DiT/JiT-like pixel diffusion models by a large margin. AsymFlow also provides the first-ever route for finetuning pretrained latent flow models into pixel-space models: aligning the low-rank pixel subspace to the latent space gives a seamless initialization that preserves the latent model's high-level semantics and structure, so finetuning mainly improves low-level mismatches rather than relearning pixel generation. We show that the pixel AsymFlow model finetuned from FLUX.2 klein 9B establishes a new state of the art for pixel-space text-to-image generation, beating its latent base on HPSv3, DPG-Bench, and GenEval while qualitatively showing substantially improved visual realism.

Understanding and Accelerating the Training of Masked Diffusion Language Models

High 2605.13026
Chunsan Hong, Sanghyun Lee, Chieh-Hsin Lai, Satoshi Hayakawa, Yuhta Takida, Yuki Mitsufuji, Seungryong Kim, Jong Chul Ye
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过分析掩码扩散语言模型训练缓慢的原因，提出钟形时间采样策略，实现约 4 倍加速。
🎯研究动机

掩码扩散模型（MDM）在语言建模中是有前景的替代方案，但训练速度远慢于自回归模型（ARM），这限制了其扩展到更大模型。加速 MDM 训练同时保持最终性能是一个重要问题。

❓解决问题

如何加速标准 MDM 训练，同时保持其最终性能？

🔎现象分析

MDM 训练缓慢的主要原因是语言的局部性偏差：一个 token 的预测信息集中在附近位置。这种偏差导致学习效率低下。

🛠️主要方法

提出钟形时间采样（bell-shaped time sampling）作为训练策略，以缓解局部性偏差带来的学习缓慢问题。

📊实验结果

在 One Billion Word Benchmark (LM1B)上，MDM 训练达到相同验证 NLL 的速度比标准训练快约 4 倍。在生成困惑度、零样本困惑度和下游任务性能上也显示出更快的改进。

⭐主要贡献
  • 详细分析了 MDM 训练缓慢的原因，归因于语言的局部性偏差。
  • 提出钟形时间采样策略，显著加速 MDM 训练，在 LM1B 上达到约 4 倍加速，同时保持验证 NLL。
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未提及在更大模型或更多样化数据集上的验证。
  • 钟形时间采样的最优参数可能依赖于数据特性，需要进一步调优。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Masked diffusion models (MDMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive models (ARMs) for language modeling. However, MDMs are known to learn substantially more slowly than ARMs, which may become problematic when scaling MDMs to larger models. Therefore, we ask the following question: how can we accelerate standard MDM training while maintaining its final performance? To this end, we first provide a detailed analysis of why MDM training is slow. We find that the main factor is the locality bias of language: the predictive information for a token is concentrated in nearby positions. We further investigate how this bias slows learning and suggest a simple yet effective remedy: bell-shaped time sampling as a training strategy. Notably, MDMs trained with our training recipe reach the same validation negative log-likelihood (NLL) up to $\sim4\times$ faster than standard training on One Billion Word Benchmark (LM1B). We also show faster improvements in generative perplexity, zero-shot perplexity, and downstream task performance on various benchmarks.

Stylized Text-to-Motion Generation via Hypernetwork-Driven Low-Rank Adaptation

High 2605.13333
Junhyuk Jeon, Seokhyeon Hong, Junyong Noh
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出超网络生成 LoRA 参数实现轻量级文本驱动运动风格化，无需风格微调或 ControlNet。
🎯研究动机

文本驱动运动扩散模型能生成逼真人体运动，但文本难以表达细微风格差异；现有方法需风格特定微调或依赖重型 ControlNet 架构，效率低且泛化性差。

❓解决问题

如何在不微调模型或使用重型架构的前提下，高效地将风格注入预训练的文本驱动运动扩散模型，并泛化到未见风格。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

轻量级风格条件框架：将风格参考运动编码为全局风格嵌入，通过超网络生成 LoRA 参数，在扩散模型每个去噪步骤动态调制模型；使用监督对比损失结构化风格潜在空间。

📊实验结果

在 HumanML3D 和 100STYLE 数据集上取得最先进风格化结果，并实现未见风格改进。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出超网络驱动的 LoRA 风格注入框架，无需风格特定微调或 ControlNet。
  • 通过监督对比损失结构化风格潜在空间，提升未见风格泛化能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖风格参考运动的质量和多样性。
  • 超网络引入额外计算开销，但相比 ControlNet 仍轻量。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Text-driven motion diffusion models are capable of generating realistic human motions, but text alone often struggles to express fine-level nuances of motion, commonly referred to as style. Recent approaches have tackled this challenge by attaching a style injection mechanism to a pretrained text-driven diffusion model. Existing stylization methods, however, either require style-specific fine-tuning of existing models or rely on heavy ControlNet-based architectures, limiting efficiency and generalization to unseen styles. We propose a lightweight style conditioning framework that dynamically modulates a pretrained diffusion model through hypernetwork-generated LoRA parameters. A style reference motion is encoded into a global style embedding, which is mapped by a hypernetwork to low-rank updates applied at each denoising step of the diffusion model. By structuring the style latent space with a supervised contrastive loss, our framework reliably captures diverse stylistic attributes, improves generalization to unseen styles, and supports optimization-based guidance without requiring predefined style categories. Experiments on the HumanML3D and 100STYLE datasets show state-of-the-art stylization results, while achieving improved stylization for unseen styles.

AnyFlow: Any-Step Video Diffusion Model with On-Policy Flow Map Distillation

High 2605.13724
Yuchao Gu, Guian Fang, Yuxin Jiang, Weijia Mao, Song Han, Han Cai, Mike Zheng Shou
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：AnyFlow 提出基于流映射的任意步视频扩散蒸馏框架，通过优化完整 ODE 采样轨迹实现任意步数生成，在少步和多数步场景均优于一致性蒸馏方法。
🎯研究动机

一致性蒸馏在少步视频生成中表现优异，但测试时增加采样步数会导致性能下降，限制了任意步视频扩散的灵活性。现有方法仅针对固定少步蒸馏，缺乏对完整 ODE 采样轨迹的优化。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个视频扩散蒸馏框架，使其在任意采样步数下都能保持高质量生成，并克服一致性蒸馏中测试时步数增加带来的性能退化。

🔎现象分析

一致性蒸馏将原始概率流 ODE 轨迹替换为一致性采样轨迹，削弱了 ODE 采样随步数增加而性能提升的缩放特性，导致测试时分配更多步数时性能反而下降。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AnyFlow 框架，将蒸馏目标从端点一致性映射 (z_t→z_0) 改为任意时间间隔的流映射过渡学习 (z_t→z_r)；并设计流映射反向模拟，将完整欧拉展开分解为快捷流映射过渡，实现高效的策略蒸馏，减少测试时误差。

📊实验结果

在双向和因果架构上，参数规模从 1.3B 到 14B 进行实验，结果表明 AnyFlow 在少步场景下性能匹配或超越一致性方法，并具有随采样步数预算缩放的能力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个基于流映射的任意步视频扩散蒸馏框架，支持任意采样步数。
  • 提出流映射反向模拟方法，实现策略蒸馏，有效降低离散化误差和因果生成中的曝光偏差。
  • 在双向和因果架构、1.3B 到 14B 参数规模上验证，少步场景性能匹配或超越一致性方法，且随步数增加性能持续提升。
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未提及对极端少步（如 1 步）生成的具体性能。
  • 可能依赖特定架构或训练数据，泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Few-step video generation has been significantly advanced by consistency distillation. However, the performance of consistency-distilled models often degrades as more sampling steps are allocated at test time, limiting their effectiveness for any-step video diffusion. This limitation arises because consistency distillation replaces the original probability-flow ODE trajectory with a consistency-sampling trajectory, weakening the desirable test-time scaling behavior of ODE sampling. To address this limitation, we introduce AnyFlow, the first any-step video diffusion distillation framework based on flow maps. Instead of distilling a model for only a few fixed sampling steps, AnyFlow optimizes the full ODE sampling trajectory. To this end, we shift the distillation target from endpoint consistency mapping $(z_{t}\rightarrow z_{0})$ to flow-map transition learning $(z_{t}\rightarrow z_{r})$ over arbitrary time intervals. We further propose Flow Map Backward Simulation, which decomposes a full Euler rollout into shortcut flow-map transitions, enabling efficient on-policy distillation that reduces test-time errors (i.e., discretization error in few-step sampling and exposure bias in causal generation). Extensive experiments across both bidirectional and causal architectures, at scales ranging from 1.3B to 14B parameters, demonstrate that AnyFlow achieves performance matches or surpasses consistency-based counterparts in the few-step regime, while scaling with sampling step budgets.

OmniLiDAR: A Unified Diffusion Framework for Multi-Domain 3D LiDAR Generation

High 2605.13815
Youquan Liu, Weidong Yang, Ao Liang, Xiang Xu, Lingdong Kong, Yang Wu, Dekai Zhu, Xin Li et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出统一文本条件扩散框架 OmniLiDAR，实现跨天气、传感器配置和平台的多域 3D LiDAR 生成。
🎯研究动机

现有 LiDAR 生成器针对单一域开发，无法统一处理不同数据集或传感条件下的异构分布偏移，限制了可控合成和可扩展仿真。

❓解决问题

如何训练一个统一的扩散模型，使其能够生成覆盖多种域（恶劣天气、传感器配置变化、跨平台采集）的 LiDAR 扫描。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 OmniLiDAR 框架，采用共享距离图像表示，引入跨域训练策略（CDTS）混合批次域，跨域特征建模（CDFM）捕获方位和仰角方向依赖，域自适应特征缩放（DAFS）进行轻量调制。

📊实验结果

在 8 域数据集上进行实验，包括真实扫描和物理模拟数据，评估生成保真度及在语义分割、3D 目标检测和鲁棒性评估中的下游性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个统一文本条件扩散框架 OmniLiDAR，覆盖 8 个代表性域（3 种分布偏移类型）。
  • 提出跨域训练策略（CDTS）、跨域特征建模（CDFM）和域自适应特征缩放（DAFS）以支持多域联合训练。
  • 构建 8 域数据集，并在 LiDAR 语义分割和 3D 目标检测的下游任务中验证生成保真度和数据增强效果。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖文本条件，对未见域泛化能力未知。
  • 计算开销可能较高，未提及推理效率。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LiDAR scene generation is increasingly important for scalable simulation and synthetic data creation, especially under diverse sensing conditions that are costly to capture at scale. Typically, diffusion-based LiDAR generators are developed under single-domain settings, requiring separate models for different datasets or sensing conditions and hindering unified, controllable synthesis under heterogeneous distribution shifts. To this end, we present OmniLiDAR, a unified text-conditioned diffusion framework that generates LiDAR scans in a shared range-image representation across eight representative domains spanning three shift types: adverse weather, sensor-configuration changes (e.g., reduced beams), and cross-platform acquisition (vehicle, drone, and quadruped). To enable training a single model over heterogeneous domains without isolating optimization by domain, we introduce a Cross-Domain Training Strategy (CDTS) that mixes domains within each mini-batch and leverages conditioning to steer generation. We further propose Cross-Domain Feature Modeling (CDFM), which captures directional dependencies along azimuth and elevation axes to reflect the anisotropic scanning structure of range images, and Domain-Adaptive Feature Scaling (DAFS) as a lightweight modulation to account for structured domain-dependent feature shifts during denoising. In the absence of a public consolidated benchmark, we construct an 8-domain dataset by combining real-world scans with physically based weather simulation and systematic beam reduction while following official splits. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong generation fidelity and consistent gains in downstream use cases, including generative data augmentation for LiDAR semantic segmentation and 3D object detection, as well as robustness evaluation under corruptions, with consistent benefits in limited-label regimes.

Improving Diffusion Posterior Samplers with Lagged Temporal Corrections for Image Restoration

High 2605.12573
Davide Evangelista, Elena Morotti, Francesco Pivi, Maurizio Gabbrielli
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 LAMP 方法，通过滞后时间校正改进扩散后验采样器，在图像恢复中无需额外去噪评估即可提升性能。
🎯研究动机

扩散后验采样是解决成像逆问题的领先框架，但标准方法依赖瞬时数据一致估计，导致反向动力学存在时间变异性，限制了恢复质量。

❓解决问题

标准扩散后验采样器因一阶离散化引入的时间变异性导致性能受限，需要更稳定的时间校正机制。

🔎现象分析

标准 PS 更新可视为一阶离散化加残差校正，而二阶离散化自然引入基于连续估计变化的时域校正，可改善反向过渡的偏差 - 方差权衡。

🛠️主要方法

提出 LAMP，将二阶更新与残差校正结合，作为模块化插件集成到 PS 骨干中，实现滞后时间校正。

📊实验结果

在多个成像任务上，LAMP 在 DiffPIR 和 DDRM 等强基线上取得一致改进，且不增加去噪评估次数。

⭐主要贡献
  • 从动力学视角重新解释扩散后验采样，揭示一阶与二阶离散化的差异。
  • 提出 LAMP 方法，通过滞后时间校正提升后验采样质量，且不增加去噪评估次数。
  • 通过一步风险分析刻画 LAMP 改善反向过渡的偏差 - 方差权衡机制。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对特定类型的逆问题或噪声模型敏感。
  • 理论分析限于一步风险，多步动态特性未充分刻画。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion-based posterior sampling (PS) is a leading framework for imaging inverse problems, combining learned priors with measurement constraints. Yet, its standard formulations rely on instantaneous data-consistent estimates, which induce temporal variability in the reverse dynamics. We reinterpret PS from a dynamical perspective, showing that the standard PS update corresponds to a first-order discretization of the diffusion dynamics plus a residual correction capturing the mismatch between the denoised prediction and the data-consistent estimate. A second-order discretization, however, naturally introduces a temporal correction based on the variation of consecutive estimates. Building on this, we propose LAMP, combining the second-order update with the residual correction characterizing a PS technique. LAMP thus inherits a lagged temporal correction, and it can be implemented as a modular plug-in over the PS backbone. We show that LAMP preserves the structure of a posterior sampler, and we perform a one-step risk analysis to characterize when LAMP improves the reverse transition via a bias-variance trade-off. Experiments across multiple imaging tasks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines such as DiffPIR and DDRM, without increasing the number of denoising evaluations.

The critical slowing down in diffusion models

Medium 2605.12597
Luca Maria Del Bono, Giulio Biroli, Patrick Charbonneau, Marylou Gabrié
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：扩散模型在统计场论中表现出临界慢化现象，通过深层架构和局部性可克服该瓶颈。
🎯研究动机

机器学习采样方法虽取得进展，但其行为缺乏理论理解，尤其在临界点附近采样困难。

❓解决问题

扩散模型在参数学习和生成过程中存在临界慢化现象，导致训练和采样效率低下。

🔎现象分析

在 O(n)模型的高斯极限中，单层网络训练表现出临界慢化，训练时间随系统尺寸二次增长；生成过程也受影响。

🛠️主要方法

使用两层网络架构和局部得分近似，在不增加参数量的情况下将训练时间从二次降为对数增长。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次在可解析模型中揭示扩散模型的临界慢化现象
  • 证明深层架构和局部性可有效克服临界慢化
⚠️方法局限
  • 分析限于高斯极限和特定模型，泛化性待验证
  • 仅考虑单层和两层架构，更深层效果未知
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Computational sampling has been central to the sciences since the mid-20th century. While machine-learning-based approaches have recently enabled major advances, their behavior remains poorly understood, with limited theoretical control over when and why they succeed. Here we provide such insight for diffusion models-a class of generative schemes highly effective in practice-by analyzing their application to the $O(n)$ model of statistical field theory in the Gaussian limit $n \to \infty$. In this analytically tractable setting, we show that training a score model with a one-layer network architecture matching the exact solution exhibits a form of critical slowing down in parameter learning. This slowing down also impacts the generation process, indicating that the well-known difficulties of sampling near criticality persist even for learned generative models. To overcome this bottleneck, we demonstrate the power of combining architectural depth with physical locality. We find that using a two-layer architecture drastically reduces the critical slowing down, with the training time scaling logarithmically rather than quadratically with system size. By introducing a local score approximation we show that this acceleration in training time can be achieved without increasing the number of neural network parameters. Taken together, these results demonstrate that diffusion models can overcome the critical slowing down through appropriate architectural design, and establish a controlled framework for understanding and improving learned sampling methods in statistical physics and beyond.

DIVER:Diving Deeper into Distilled Data via Expressive Semantic Recovery

Medium 2605.12649
Qianxin Xia, Zhiyong Shu, Wenbo Jiang, Jiawei Du, Jielei Wang, Guoming Lu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出双阶段数据集蒸馏框架 DIVER，利用预训练扩散模型恢复语义，提升跨架构泛化。
🎯研究动机

现有单阶段数据集蒸馏方法易过拟合特定架构，抑制语义表达，导致跨架构性能下降。

❓解决问题

如何从蒸馏数据中恢复并保留高语义信息，以提升蒸馏数据在不同架构上的泛化能力。

🔎现象分析

单阶段蒸馏范式学习特定模式，过拟合先验架构，抑制语义表达，导致跨架构性能退化。

🛠️主要方法

提出双阶段蒸馏框架 DIVER，包含语义继承（将蒸馏图像的高层语义映射到潜在空间，过滤架构特定噪声）、语义引导（通过反向过程增强原始语义保留）、语义融合（仅在反向过程的具体阶段提供语义引导，避免语义模糊和伪影）。

📊实验结果

在 ImageNet (256×256)上验证，改进经典蒸馏技术，显著提升跨架构泛化，处理时间与原始 DiT 相当，仅需 4GB GPU 内存。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出双阶段蒸馏框架 DIVER，利用预训练扩散模型恢复蒸馏数据的语义。
  • 设计语义继承、语义引导和语义融合三个模块，有效提升跨架构泛化能力。
  • 在 ImageNet 上仅需 4GB GPU 内存，处理时间与原始 DiT 相当，验证了高效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖预训练扩散模型，可能引入额外计算开销。
  • 未在更大规模数据集或更复杂任务上验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Dataset distillation aims to synthesize a compact proxy dataset that is unreadable or non-raw from the original dataset for privacy protection and highly efficient learning. However, previous approaches typically adopt a single-stage distillation paradigm, which suffers from learning specific patterns that overfit on a prior architecture, consequently suppressing the expression of semantics and leading to performance degradation across heterogeneous architectures. To address this issue, we propose a novel dual-stage distillation framework called ${\textbf{DIVER}}$, which leverages the pre-trained diffusion model to dive deeper into $\textbf{DI}$stilled data $\textbf{V}$ia $\textbf{E}$xpressive semantic $\textbf{R}$ecovery, an entire process of semantic inheritance, guidance, and fusion. Semantic inheritance distills high-level semantics of abstract distilled images into the latent space to filter out architecture-specific ``noise" and retain the intrinsic semantics. Furthermore, semantic guidance improves the preservation of the original semantics by directing the reverse procedure. Finally, semantic fusion is designed to provide semantic guidance only during the concrete phase of the reverse process, preventing semantic ambiguity and artifacts while maintaining the guidance information. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness and efficiency of DIVER in improving classical distillation techniques and significantly improving cross-architecture generalization, requiring processing time comparable to raw DiT on ImageNet (256$\times$256) with only 4 GB of GPU memory usage. Code is available: this https URL .

Generative Motion In-betweening by Diffusion over Continuous Implicit Representations

Medium 2605.12778
Shiyu Fan, Paul Henderson, Edmond S. L. Ho
arXiv PDF cs.GR
TL;DR：提出基于隐式神经表示的扩散模型，从稀疏关键帧生成平滑多样的中间运动。
🎯研究动机

现有运动插值方法在保持关键帧信息和运动连续性方面存在局限，难以从极稀疏关键帧生成高质量中间运动。

❓解决问题

如何从稀疏且模糊的关键帧数据中生成准确、平滑且多样的中间运动序列。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建隐式神经表示（INR）与潜在扩散模型（LDM）的映射，通过采样优化策略从稀疏关键帧采样 INR 参数，并重建平滑运动。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出结合 INR 和 LDM 的运动插值新框架
  • 设计采样优化策略以提升关键帧准确性和中间运动多样性
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定运动数据集，泛化性待验证
  • 计算开销可能较高
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent advances in generative models have yielded impressive progress on motion in-betweening, allowing for more complex, varied, and realistic motion transitions. However, recent methods still exhibit noticeable limitations in preserving keyframe information and ensuring motion continuity. In this paper, we propose a novel pipeline and sampling optimization strategy for latent diffusion models (LDM) based on motion implicit neural representations (INR). By establishing a mapping between INR and sparse spatial or temporal information within latent diffusion, our model can sample the INR parameters from extremely sparse and ambiguous keyframe data and reconstruct plausible and smooth motions from the manifold. Our experiments demonstrate the superior performance of our model, which significantly improves motion generation quality in scenarios with few keyframes while ensuring both keyframe accuracy and diversity of in-between motions.

图像编辑 5 篇

DirectTryOn: One-Step Virtual Try-On via Straightened Conditional Transport

High 2605.12939
Xianbing Sun, Jiahui Zhan, Liqing Zhang, Jianfu Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种一步式虚拟试穿方法，通过矫正条件传输路径实现高效高质量生成。
🎯研究动机

现有扩散 / 流模型虚拟试穿方法依赖多步采样，推理成本高；加速方法忽视试穿任务内在结构，导致效率与质量难以兼得。

❓解决问题

如何实现一步式虚拟试穿生成，同时保持与多步采样相当甚至更优的图像质量。

🔎现象分析

虚拟试穿输出受条件输入高度约束，其条件采样轨迹比通用图像生成更直，理论上适合一步生成；但预训练模型的目标函数不鼓励这种直轨迹，导致偏离理想路径。

🛠️主要方法

通过纯条件传输、衣物保持损失和自一致性损失三种针对性修改，鼓励更直的采样轨迹，并引入一步蒸馏阶段。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了虚拟试穿任务中条件采样轨迹可更直的现象，为一步生成提供理论依据。
  • 提出三种针对性修改（纯条件传输、衣物保持损失、自一致性损失）和一步蒸馏策略，实现 SOTA 性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定预训练模型，泛化性需验证。
  • 一步生成在极端复杂场景下可能仍有质量损失。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent diffusion- and flow-based VTON methods achieve strong results with pretrained generative models, but their reliance on multi-step sampling incurs high inference cost, while existing acceleration methods largely overlook the intrinsic structure of the try-on task. In this paper, we highlight a key observation: VTON outputs are highly constrained by the conditional inputs, suggesting that the conditional sampling trajectory can be much straighter than that in general image generation, making one-step generation a natural solution. However, limited task-specific data makes training from scratch impractical, forcing existing methods to fine-tune pretrained models whose objectives do not encourage such straight conditional trajectories. Thus, the deviation from an ideal straight path mainly comes from the mismatch between pretrained base models and the conditional nature of try-on generation, rather than from the task itself. Motivated by this insight, we encourage straighter VTON sampling trajectories through three targeted modifications: pure conditional transport, a garment preservation loss, and a self consistency loss. We further introduce a one-step distillation stage. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with one-step sampling, establishing a new standard for efficient and high-quality VTON.

Amortized Guidance for Image Inpainting with Pretrained Diffusion Models

High 2605.13010
Yilie Huang, Xun Yu Zhou
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种即插即用的引导模块，无需逐实例优化即可提升预训练扩散模型的图像修复质量与速度。
🎯研究动机

现有图像修复方法要么训练专用模型，要么在部署时对每个掩码图像单独适配预训练扩散模型，前者成本高，后者效率低。

❓解决问题

如何在不修改预训练扩散模型的前提下，实现高效且高质量的图像修复。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AID 框架，固定预训练扩散模型，离线训练一个可复用的引导模块，通过连续时间演员 - 评论家算法学习确定性引导场。

📊实验结果

在 AFHQv2 和 FFHQ（像素 EDM 管道）以及 ImageNet（潜在 EDM2 管道）上，AID 在多种掩码类型下均优于强基线，且可训练参数量增加不到 1%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种折中方案，固定预训练扩散模型，仅训练小型可复用引导模块，无需逐实例优化。
  • 将图像修复建模为有监督终端目标的确定性引导问题，并推导出辅助高斯形式，证明求解该随机问题可恢复最优确定性引导场。
  • 在多个数据集和管道上验证了 AID 在质量 - 速度权衡上的提升，且可训练参数量增加不到 1%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预训练扩散模型的质量。
  • 引导模块的泛化性可能受限于训练时见过的掩码类型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We study image inpainting with generative diffusion models. Existing methods typically either train dedicated task-specific models, or adapt a pretrained diffusion model separately for each masked image at deployment. We introduce a middle-ground model, termed Amortized Inpainting with Diffusion (AID), which keeps a pretrained diffusion backbone fixed, trains a small reusable guidance module offline, and then reuses it across masked images without per-instance optimization. We formulate it as a deterministic guidance problem with a supervised terminal objective. To make this problem learnable in high dimensions, we derive an auxiliary Gaussian formulation and prove that solving this randomized problem recovers the optimal deterministic guidance field. This bridge yields a principled continuous-time actor--critic algorithm for learning the guidance module in a fully data-driven manner. Empirically, on AFHQv2 and FFHQ under the pixel EDM pipeline and on ImageNet under the latent EDM2 pipeline, AID consistently improves the quality--speed trade-off over strong fixed-backbone and amortized inpainting baselines across multiple mask types, while adding less than one percent trainable overhead.

Drag within Prior Distribution: Text-Conditioned Point-Based Image Editing within Distribution Constraints

High 2605.13349
Haoyang Hu, Masataka Seo, Yen-Wei Chen
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出在扩散先验分布约束下进行文本条件点编辑，解决大位移编辑中的伪影和语义不一致问题。
🎯研究动机

现有基于扩散的点编辑方法在大位移编辑时，累积扰动导致噪声潜码偏离反演得分轨迹，产生不自然伪影；且传统点对定义运动轨迹存在歧义。

❓解决问题

如何在大位移全局编辑和细粒度局部编辑中保持编辑结果与原始数据分布一致，避免伪影并提升语义对齐。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出当手柄点与目标点距离较大时，累积扰动使噪声潜码偏离反演得分轨迹，导致不自然伪影。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CLIP 模型评估引导中间编辑步骤确保语义对齐，以及先验保持损失约束潜码在扩散先验采样空间内；对于细粒度任务，提出方向加权点跟踪机制。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CLIP 引导和先验保持损失，确保全局编辑中结果语义对齐且符合原始数据分布。
  • 提出方向加权点跟踪机制，提升细粒度编辑的跟踪精度和生成质量，同时减少编辑时间。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 CLIP 模型的判别能力，对复杂语义场景的引导效果有限。
  • 先验保持损失可能限制编辑的灵活性，在极端变形任务中效果不佳。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion-based point editing methods have gained significant traction in image editing tasks due to their ability to manipulate image semantics and fine details by applying localized perturbations on the manifold of noise latent. However, these approaches face several limitations. Traditional point-based editing relies on pairs of handle and target points to define motion trajectories, which can introduce ambiguity or unnecessary alterations. Furthermore, when the distance between the handle and target points is large, the accumulated perturbations often cause the noise latent deviation from inversion score trajectory, resulting in unnatural artifacts. To address these issues in global editing tasks, we introduce a CLIP-based model to evaluate and guide intermediate editing steps, ensuring that the generated results remain both semantically aligned. Additionally, we propose a prior-preservation loss that constrains the optimized latent code to stay within the sampling space of the diffusion prior, improving consistency with the original data distribution, to ensure the model generates images along a familiar score trajectory. For fine-grained tasks, we present a directionally-weighted point tracking mechanism that steers the editing process toward the target direction within similar feature regions. This improves both the tracking accuracy and generation quality, while also reducing the editing time.

Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0 Technical Report

High 2605.13565
Zekai Zhang, Deqing Li, Kuan Cao, Yujia Wu, Chenfei Wu, Yu Wu, Liang Peng, Hao Meng et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0 通过全局跳跃连接、扩展潜通道和语义对齐策略，实现了高压缩比下的卓越重建保真度和扩散友好性。
🎯研究动机

高压缩变分自编码器在重建保真度和扩散建模兼容性上存在瓶颈，且文本丰富场景下的性能不足，需要更高效的架构和训练策略。

❓解决问题

如何设计高压缩 VAE，使其在保持高压缩比的同时提升重建质量、扩散友好性及文本场景性能。

🔎现象分析

高压缩导致重建瓶颈，高维潜空间收敛困难，文本场景性能受限。

🛠️主要方法

采用全局跳跃连接（GSC）和扩展潜通道改进架构；使用数十亿图像训练并引入合成渲染引擎；实施增强语义对齐策略以提升潜空间扩散友好性；采用非对称无注意力编码器 - 解码器骨干以降低编码开销。

📊实验结果

在公共重建基准和提出的 OmniDoc-TokenBench 上评估，下游 DiT 实验显示加速收敛。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0 系列高压缩 VAE，在重建保真度和扩散友好性上取得显著进步。
  • 引入 OmniDoc-TokenBench 基准，用于评估文本丰富场景下的重建性能。
  • 在公共重建基准和下游 DiT 实验中达到最先进性能，验证了高压缩、优越重建和卓越扩散友好性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖大规模训练数据和合成渲染引擎，资源消耗大。
  • 文本场景评估仅针对文档，其他文本丰富场景（如自然场景文本）未提及。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0, a suite of high-compression Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) that achieve significant advances in both reconstruction fidelity and diffusability. To address the reconstruction bottlenecks of high compression, we adopt an improved architecture featuring Global Skip Connections (GSC) and expanded latent channels. Moreover, we scale training to billions of images and incorporate a synthetic rendering engine to improve performance in text-rich scenarios. To tackle the convergence challenges of high-dimensional latent space, we implement an enhanced semantic alignment strategy to make the latent space highly amenable to diffusion modeling. To optimize computational efficiency, we leverage an asymmetric and attention-free encoder-decoder backbone to minimize encoding overhead. We present a comprehensive evaluation of Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0 on public reconstruction benchmarks. To evaluate performance in text-rich scenarios, we propose OmniDoc-TokenBench, a new benchmark comprising a diverse collection of real-world documents coupled with specialized OCR-based evaluation metrics. Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0 achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction performance, demonstrating exceptional capabilities in both general domains and text-rich scenarios at high compression ratio. Furthermore, downstream DiT experiments reveal our models possess superior diffusability, significantly accelerating convergence compared to existing high-compression baselines. These establish Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0 as a leading model with high compression, superior reconstruction, and exceptional diffusability.

Inline Critic Steers Image Editing

High 2605.12724
Weitai Kang, Xiaohang Zhan, Yizhou Wang, Mang Tik Chiu, Jason Kuen, Kangning Liu, Yan Yan
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 Inline Critic，在图像编辑模型前向传播中通过中间层令牌实时修正生成结果，实现 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

基于指令的图像编辑在不同案例和图像区域存在异质性难度，现有修正信号在完整生成或去噪步骤后才到达，无法在生成过程中实时干预。

❓解决问题

如何在图像编辑模型的前向传播过程中，实时检测并修正中间层的错误模式，以提升编辑质量。

🔎现象分析

通过探测冻结的图像编辑模型发现，虽然生成能力仅在最后几层涌现，但错误模式已在早期层形成（与最终层误差图的秩相关系数 ρ=0.83）。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Inline Critic，一个可学习的令牌，在冻结模型的中间层进行批评，并通过三阶段训练（从学习批评到引导生成）稳定训练，从而在前向传播中修正隐藏状态。

📊实验结果

在 GEdit-Bench 上达到 7.89（SOTA），在 RISEBench 上相比同一骨干网络提升 +9.4，在 KRIS-Bench 上达到 81.92（超越 GPT-4o），并提供了批评令牌影响后续层的分析。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现图像编辑模型中错误模式在早期层即已形成，为实时修正提供依据。
  • 提出 Inline Critic 方法，在前向传播中通过中间层令牌实时引导生成，无需完整生成后修正。
  • 在 GEdit-Bench、RISEBench 和 KRIS-Bench 上取得 SOTA 结果，并证明批评令牌能有效塑造后续层的注意力与预测更新。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖于冻结的预训练模型，可能无法适应所有架构。
  • 三阶段训练流程可能增加训练复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Instruction-based image editing exhibits heterogeneous difficulty not only across cases but also across regions of an image, motivating refinement approaches that allocate correction to where the model struggles. Existing refinement signals arrive late, after a fully generated image or a completed denoising step. We ask whether such a signal can act within an ongoing forward pass. To investigate this, we probe a frozen image-editing model and find that although generation capability emerges only in the last few layers, the error pattern is already set in early layers (rank correlation \r{ho} = 0.83 with the final-layer error map). Based on this, we introduce Inline Critic, a learnable token that critiques a frozen model's predictions at its intermediate layers and steers its hidden states to refine generation during the forward pass. A three-stage recipe is proposed to stabilize the training from learning how to critique to steering generation. As a result, we achieve state of the art on GEdit-Bench (7.89), a +9.4 gain on RISEBench over the same backbone, and the strongest open-source result on KRIS-Bench (81.92, surpassing GPT-4o). We further provide analyses showing that the critic genuinely shapes the model's attention and prediction updates at subsequent layers.

3D/4D 生成 2 篇

GTA: Advancing Image-to-3D World Generation via Geometry Then Appearance Video Diffusion

High 2605.12957
Hanxin Zhu, Cong Wang, Peiyan Tu, Jiayi Luo, Tianyu He, Xin Jin, Zhibo Chen
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 GTA，一种先几何后外观的两阶段视频扩散方法，用于从单张图像生成 3D 场景，提升结构保真度和跨视角一致性。
🎯研究动机

现有 3D 世界生成方法优先预测外观而忽视几何建模，导致场景结构不可靠和跨视角一致性差。

❓解决问题

如何从单张输入图像生成具有可靠几何结构和一致外观的 3D 场景。

🔎现象分析

现有方法因缺乏几何建模导致结构估计不可靠和跨视角一致性退化。

🛠️主要方法

两阶段视频扩散框架：第一阶段生成粗粒度几何结构，第二阶段基于预测几何合成细粒度外观；训练时引入随机潜变量洗牌策略，测试时采用缩放方案提升感知质量。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集上，GTA 在保真度、视觉质量和几何精度方面一致优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出先几何后外观的两阶段视频扩散范式，显著提升 3D 场景的结构保真度和跨视角一致性。
  • 引入随机潜变量洗牌和测试时缩放策略，增强外观一致性且不牺牲定量性能。
  • GTA 可作为通用增强模块提升现有图像到 3D 世界管线的生成质量，并支持多种下游应用，数据效率高。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖视频扩散模型的计算资源，推理速度较慢。
  • 对输入图像中复杂场景的几何结构生成可能存在局限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent developments in generative models and large-scale datasets have substantially advanced 3D world generation, facilitating a broad range of domains including spatial intelligence, embodied intelligence, and autonomous driving. While achieving remarkable progress, existing approaches to 3D world generation typically prioritize appearance prediction with limited modeling of the underlying geometry, leading to issues such as unreliable scene structure estimation and degraded cross-view consistency. To address these limitations, motivated by the coarse-to-fine nature of human visual perception, we propose GTA, a novel image-to-3D world generation method following a Geometry-Then-Appearance paradigm. Specifically, given a single input image, to improve the structural fidelity of synthesized 3D scenes, GTA adopts a two-stage framework with two dedicated video diffusion models, which first generate coarse geometric structure from novel viewpoints and then synthesize fine-grained appearance conditioned on the predicted geometry. To further enhance cross-view appearance consistency, we introduce a random latent shuffle strategy during the training process, along with a test-time scaling scheme that improves perceptual quality without compromising quantitative performance. Extensive experiments have demonstrated that our proposed method consistently outperforms existing approaches in terms of fidelity, visual quality, and geometric accuracy. Moreover, GTA is shown to be effective as a general enhancement module that further improves the generation quality of existing image-to-3D world pipelines, as well as supporting multiple downstream applications and exhibiting favorable data efficiency during model training, highlighting its versatility and broad applicability. Project page: this https URL .

HetScene: Heterogeneity-Aware Diffusion for Dense Indoor Scene Generation

Medium 2605.13586
Zini Chen, Junming Huang, Rong Zhang, Jiamin Xu, Cheng Peng, Chi Wang, Weiwei Xu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出异构感知扩散模型 HetScene，将室内场景生成分解为结构布局生成和上下文布局生成两阶段，以处理密集物体排列和复杂空间依赖。
🎯研究动机

现有深度学习方法将室内场景中所有物体视为同质实例，在稀疏简单布局中有效，但难以建模密集物体排列和复杂空间依赖的真实布局，导致可扩展性差和物理合理性下降。

❓解决问题

如何生成可控且物理合理的密集室内场景，处理物体间的结构异质性和复杂空间关系。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，将物体视为同质实例的方法在密集布局中表现不佳，存在可扩展性差和物理合理性退化的问题。

🛠️主要方法

提出 HetScene，一种异构两阶段生成框架：第一阶段结构布局生成（SLG）仅用主要物体生成全局连贯的结构布局；第二阶段上下文布局生成（CLG）在结构布局基础上添加次要物体，实现密集场景的物理合理生成。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于结构异质性的物体分解方法，将物体分为主要物体和次要物体。
  • 提出 HetScene 异构两阶段生成框架，解耦室内布局生成为结构布局生成和上下文布局生成。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预定义的主要 / 次要物体分类规则，泛化性受限。
  • 两阶段生成可能引入累积误差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Generating controllable and physically plausible indoor scenes is a pivotal prerequisite for constructing high-fidelity simulation environments for embodied AI. However, existing deeplearning-based methods usually treat all objects as homogeneous instances within a unified generation process. While effective for sparse and simplistic layouts, they struggle to model realistic layouts with dense object arrangements and complex spatial dependencies, leadingto limited scalability and degraded physical plausibility. To deal with these challenges, we revisit indoor layout generation from the perspective of structural heterogeneity and decompose the objects into primary objects and secondary objects according to their distinct roles in shaping a scene. Based on this decomposition, we propose HetScene, a heterogeneous two-stage generation framework that decouples indoor layout synthesis into Structural Layout Generation (SLG) and Contextual Layout Generation (CLG). SLG first generates globally coherent structural layouts with only primary objects conditioned on text descriptions, top-down binary room masks, and spatial relation graphs, establishing a stable global macro-skeleton of large core furniture.

其他 2 篇

ArcVQ-VAE: A Spherical Vector Quantization Framework with ArcCosine Additive Margin

Medium 2605.13517
Jaeyung Kim, YoungJoon Yoo
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出球面角度间隔先验的 VQ-VAE 变体，通过球面归一化和角度间隔损失提升码本利用率与表征质量。
🎯研究动机

标准 VQ-VAE 受限于有限码本容量，难以捕获丰富多样的离散表征，制约图像建模性能。

❓解决问题

如何在不增加码本大小的前提下，提升 VQ-VAE 的码本利用率和表征判别性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ArcVQ-VAE，引入球面角度间隔先验（SAMP），包含球界范数正则化（将码本向量约束在时变欧几里得球内）和 ArcCosine 加性间隔损失（增大潜在向量间的角度可分性），促进判别性且均匀分散的潜在表征。

📊实验结果

在标准图像重建和生成任务上，ArcVQ-VAE 在重建精度、表征多样性和样本质量方面达到与基线模型竞争的性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出球面角度间隔先验（SAMP）用于 VQ-VAE 码本学习
  • 设计球界范数正则化和 ArcCosine 加性间隔损失，提升码本利用率和表征多样性
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在特定图像数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试
  • 角度间隔超参数可能敏感，需调优
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE) has become a fundamental framework for learning discrete representations in image modeling. However, VQ-VAE models must tokenize entire images using a finite set of codebook vectors, and this capacity limitation restricts their ability to capture rich and diverse representations. In this paper, we propose ArcCosine Additive Margin VQ-VAE (ArcVQ-VAE), a novel vector quantization framework that introduces a spherical angular-margin prior (SAMP) for the codebook of a conventional VQ-VAE. The proposed SAMP consists of Ball-Bounded Norm Regularization, which constrains all codebook vectors within a time-dependent Euclidean ball, and ArcCosine Additive Margin Loss, which encourages greater angular separability among latent vectors. This formulation promotes more discriminative and uniformly dispersed latent representations within the constrained space, thereby improving effective latent-space coverage and leading to improved codebook utilization. Experimental results on standard image reconstruction and generation tasks show that ArcVQ-VAE achieves competitive performance against baseline models in terms of reconstruction accuracy, representation diversity, and sample quality. The code is available at: this https URL

Discrete MeanFlow: One-Step Generation via Conditional Transition Kernels

Medium 2605.12805
Fairoz Nower Khan, Nabuat Zaman Nahim, Md Sajid Ahmed, Ruiquan Huang, Peizhong Ju
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：将 MeanFlow 扩展到离散状态空间，通过条件转移核实现一步生成。
🎯研究动机

连续空间中的 MeanFlow 通过学习平均速度实现一步生成，但离散状态空间缺乏平滑轨迹和空间导数，连续公式无法直接应用。

❓解决问题

如何在离散状态空间中实现类似 MeanFlow 的一步生成方法。

🔎现象分析

离散状态空间没有连续轨迹或空间导数，需要重新定义平均变化率。

🛠️主要方法

提出离散 MeanFlow，用连续时间马尔可夫链的条件转移核替代点的运动，定义平均离散率，并证明离散 MeanFlow 恒等式，通过边界构造设计直接参数化转移核，保证有效概率输出和精确边界条件。

📊实验结果

在精确有限状态马尔可夫链上验证，学习到的核能高精度恢复解析真实值；在因子化合成序列生成任务上测试不同字母大小和序列长度。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出离散 MeanFlow 框架，将 MeanFlow 扩展到离散状态空间。
  • 证明离散 MeanFlow 恒等式，建立有限区间率与端点瞬时生成元的关系。
  • 设计边界构造的参数化方法，无需辅助损失即可保证有效概率和边界条件。
  • 实现一步生成，无需迭代去噪或多步细化。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅在合成数据上验证，未在真实离散数据（如文本）上测试。
  • 可能对大规模离散状态空间的计算效率有挑战。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

MeanFlow enables one-step generation in continuous spaces by learning an average velocity over a time interval rather than the instantaneous velocity field of flow matching. However, discrete state spaces do not have smooth trajectories or spatial derivatives, so the continuous formulation does not directly apply. We introduce Discrete MeanFlow, which replaces the motion of a point with the transport of probability mass over finite states. Our key object is the conditional transition kernel of a continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC), from which we define a mean discrete rate that measures the average change in transition probability over a time interval. We prove a Discrete MeanFlow identity that relates this finite-interval rate to the instantaneous CTMC generator at the endpoint, with the Kolmogorov forward equation replacing the spatial chain rule of continuous MeanFlow. Based on this identity, we parameterize the transition kernel directly using a boundary-by-construction design that guarantees valid probability outputs and exact boundary conditions without auxiliary losses. Since the learned kernel is itself a probability distribution, generation reduces to a single forward pass followed by one categorical draw meaning no iterative denoising, ODE integration, or multi-step refinement is required. We validate the framework on exact finite-state Markov chains, where the learned kernel recovers the analytical ground truth to high precision, and on factorized synthetic sequence generation tasks with varying alphabet sizes and sequence lengths.

文本到图像 (T2I) 1 篇

Skill-Aligned Annotation for Reliable Evaluation in Text-to-Image Generation

High 2605.13223
Abdelrahman Eldesokey, Merey Ramazanova, Ahmad Sait, Ansar Khangeldin, Karen Sanchez, Tong Zhang, Bernard Ghanem
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出技能对齐标注策略，根据评估技能特性定制标注方式，提升文本到图像生成评估的可靠性与一致性。
🎯研究动机

文本到图像生成模型性能差异缩小，现有统一标注机制（如李克特量表或二元问答）无法适应不同评估技能的本质差异，导致评估信号不一致、可靠性不足。

❓解决问题

如何设计适应不同评估技能特性的标注策略，以提高文本到图像生成评估的可靠性、一致性和稳定性。

🔎现象分析

统一标注机制在不同评估技能上产生不一致的评估信号，而技能对齐标注能带来更高的标注者间一致性和跨模型稳定性。

🛠️主要方法

提出技能对齐标注方法，根据每个评估技能（如视觉质量、文本对齐等）的内在特性设计相应的标注策略（如连续评分、分类等），并与统一基线对比。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到技能对齐标注相比统一基线有更高的标注者间一致性和跨模型稳定性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统比较了技能对齐标注与统一基线，证明其能产生更一致的评估信号。
  • 提出自动化流水线，实现可扩展、细粒度且具有空间接地反馈的评估。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定技能集，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 自动化流水线的实际效果和可扩展性未详细说明。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Text-to-image (T2I) generation has advanced rapidly, making reliable evaluation critical as performance differences between models narrow. Existing evaluation practices typically apply uniform annotation mechanisms, such as Likert-scale or binary question answering (BQA), across heterogeneous evaluation skills, despite fundamental differences in their nature. In this work, we revisit T2I evaluation through the lens of skill-aligned annotation, where annotation strategies reflect the underlying characteristics of each evaluation skill. We systematically compare skill-aligned annotation against uniform baselines and show that it produces more consistent evaluation signals, with higher inter-annotator agreement and improved stability across models. Finally, we present an automated pipeline that instantiates the proposed evaluation protocol, enabling scalable and fine-grained evaluation with spatially grounded feedback. Our work highlights that improving the foundations of image evaluation can increase reliability and efficiency without simply scaling annotation effort. We hope this motivates further research on refining evaluation protocols as a central component of reliable model assessment.

文本到视频 (T2V) 1 篇

Pyramid Forcing: Head-Aware Pyramid KV Cache Policy for High-Quality Long Video Generation

High 2605.13111
Jiayu Chen, Junbei Tang, Wenbiao Zhao, Maoliang Li, Jiayi Luo, Zihao Zheng, Jiawei Yang, Guojie Luo et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出头感知金字塔 KV 缓存策略，通过识别注意力头类型并分配差异化缓存策略，提升长视频生成质量。
🎯研究动机

自回归视频生成中累积误差导致长期退化，现有 KV 缓存策略对所有注意力头统一处理，忽略了不同头对历史帧依赖的异质性。

❓解决问题

如何设计头感知的 KV 缓存策略以缓解长视频生成中的长期退化问题。

🔎现象分析

发现三种注意力头类型：Anchor 头需要广泛长程上下文，Wave 头呈现周期性时间依赖，Veil 头关注初始和相邻帧。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Pyramid Forcing 框架，离线识别头类型，为每种头分配行为特定的缓存策略，并通过高效 ragged-cache 注意力支持异构缓存长度。

📊实验结果

在 Self Forcing 和 Causal Forcing 上实验，VBench-Long 上 60 秒 Self Forcing 得分从 77.87 提升至 81.21，同时增强运动动态、视觉保真度和语义一致性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了自回归视频生成中注意力头的三种类型及其对历史帧的不同依赖模式。
  • 提出头感知金字塔 KV 缓存框架，通过差异化缓存策略提升长视频生成质量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖离线头类型识别，在线适应能力有限。
  • 未讨论对极长视频（如数分钟）的扩展性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Autoregressive video generation enables streaming and open-ended long video synthesis, but still suffers from long-term degradation caused by accumulated errors. Existing KVCache strategies usually apply unified historical-frame retention, implicitly assuming homogeneous historical dependencies across attention heads. We revisit historical-frame attention and reveal three distinct head types: Anchor Heads require broad long-range context, Wave Heads exhibit periodic temporal dependencies, and Veil Heads focus on initial and adjacent frames. Based on this finding, we propose Pyramid Forcing, a head-aware pyramidal KVCache framework that identifies head types offline, assigns behavior-specific cache policies, and supports heterogeneous cache lengths via efficient ragged-cache attention. Experiments on Self Forcing and Causal Forcing show that Pyramid Forcing consistently improves long-horizon generation quality on VBench-Long, increasing the 60-second Self Forcing score from 77.87 to 81.21 while enhancing motion dynamics, visual fidelity, and semantic consistency. Project: this https URL .

自回归/流匹配生成 1 篇

Does Engram Do Memory Retrieval in Autoregressive Image Generation?

Medium 2605.13179
Jinghao Wang, Qiyuan He, Chunbin Gu, Pheng-Ann Heng
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：Engram 模块在自回归图像生成中并非执行内容寻址记忆检索，而是作为门控架构旁路发挥作用。
🎯研究动机

Engram 模块在 LLM 预训练中通过内容寻址记忆提升性能，但其机制是否适用于自回归图像生成尚不清楚，需要验证其实际作用。

❓解决问题

探究 Engram 模块在自回归图像生成中是否真正实现记忆检索，还是通过其他机制带来性能提升。

🔎现象分析

实验发现 Engram 模块并未改善图像质量（FID 落后基线），禁用该模块会导致灾难性后果，但固定小门控值即可匹配学习门控，且哈希输入替换不影响输出分布，表明其行为类似门控旁路而非内容检索。

🛠️主要方法

将 Engram 模块适配到视觉领域（2D 空间 n-gram 哈希、门控融合、KV 缓存兼容增量推理），注入类条件自回归生成器，并通过门控钳位、捐赠探针、冻结记忆表等实验分析其机制。

📊实验结果

在 ImageNet 256x256 上训练类条件自回归生成器，比较不同骨干 - 记忆预算比ρ∈[0.17,0.90]下的 FID，并进行门控钳位、捐赠探针、冻结记忆表等分析实验。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了 Engram 模块在自回归图像生成中实际作为门控架构旁路而非内容寻址检索器。
  • 通过系统性消融实验证明记忆表仅贡献微小分布细化，主要收益来自旁路结构本身。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对类条件自回归图像生成，未验证其他生成范式（如扩散模型）。
  • 未探索更大规模或不同架构下的表现。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The Engram module -- a hash-keyed, O(1) associative memory injected into Transformer layers -- was recently shown to improve large language model pretraining, with the appealing interpretation that it provides a content-addressed shortcut to recurring local token patterns. We ask whether this interpretation transfers to autoregressive (AR) image generation, or whether the observed gains, if any, come from a different mechanism. We adapt the Engram module to vision with 2D spatial $n$-gram hashing, gated fusion, and KV-cache-compatible incremental inference, and inject it into a class-conditional AR generator trained on ImageNet 256x256. Across a sweep of backbone-to-memory budget ratios $\rho{\in}[0.17, 0.90]$, every Engram-augmented variant trails the pure AR baseline in FID, indicating that the module saves backbone FLOPs but does not, by itself, improve sample quality. We then probe how the module is used. A gate-clamp sweep shows that disabling the Engram pathway entirely is catastrophic, yet a tiny constant gate (g=0.10) matches or beats the learned gate -- inconsistent with a heavily content-addressed recall mechanism. A donor-probe experiment shows that swapping the hash inputs for matched, adversarial, or random same-class exemplars produces statistically indistinguishable next-token distributions, while collapsing or randomising the table degrades them by two to three orders of magnitude. Finally, training a model from scratch with the entire memory table frozen to $\mathcal{N}(0, 1)$ noise costs only $\Delta\text{FID}{=}0.10$ and actually raises Inception Score. Together, these findings indicate that the Engram in AR image generation behaves not as a content-addressed retriever but as a gated architectural side-pathway: a hash-keyed residual stream whose benefit is dominated by the pathway itself, with the learned table contributing only a small distributional refinement.

其他 ML 主题 20 篇 · 3 个细分

其他 15 篇

Protocol-Driven Development: Governing Generated Software Through Invariants and Evidence

Medium 2605.12981
Jun He, Deying Yu
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：提出协议驱动开发（PDD），用机器可执行的协议替代代码作为核心制品，通过不变式和证据链约束生成式软件的可接受性。
🎯研究动机

自动程序合成降低了实现成本，但带来了治理难题：如何判断生成的制品是否可接受。自然语言规范语义模糊，基于示例的测试只覆盖部分行为空间，单独使用均无法为自动化软件构建提供足够的控制边界。

❓解决问题

解决自动生成软件中缺乏可靠治理机制的问题，即如何确定哪些生成制品是可接受的。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出协议驱动开发（PDD），将协议定义为三元组 (S, B, O)，分别指定结构、行为和操作不变式，其合取定义组件的可接受实现空间。实现通过约束搜索发现，仅当满足协议并产生可验证的证据链时才被接受。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出协议驱动开发（PDD）模型，将协议作为核心制品，实现与协议分离。
  • 定义协议三元组 (S, B, O) 和证据链机制，为生成式软件提供可验证的治理层。
⚠️方法局限
  • 协议的定义和验证可能增加前期设计成本。
  • 证据链的生成和验证在复杂系统中可能面临可扩展性挑战。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Automated program synthesis has reduced the cost of producing candidate implementations, but it introduces a harder governance problem: determining which generated artifacts are admissible in a software system. Natural-language specifications remain semantically ambiguous, and example-based tests sample only part of the behavioral space. Used alone, neither provides a sufficient control boundary for automated software construction. We introduce Protocol-Driven Development (PDD), a development model in which the primary software artifact is a machine-enforceable protocol rather than implementation code. We define a protocol as the triplet P = (S, B, O), where S specifies structural invariants, B specifies behavioral invariants, and O specifies operational invariants. Their conjunction defines the admissible implementation space of a software component. Under PDD, implementations are treated as replaceable realizations discovered through constrained search. An implementation is admitted if and only if it satisfies the governing protocol and produces a verifiable Evidence Chain of compliance. Admission is therefore grounded not in trust in the generator, but in protocol satisfaction and recorded evidence. By combining ideas from formal methods, property-based testing, policy-as-code, and software provenance, PDD defines a governance layer for automated software engineering. Its organizing principle is simple: code is transient; protocol is sovereign.

Neural QAOA$^{2}$: Differentiable Joint Graph Partitioning and Parameter Initialization for Quantum Combinatorial Optimization

Medium 2605.13072
Zubin Zheng, Jiahao Wu, Shengcai Liu
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出端到端可微框架 Neural QAOA²，联合学习图分割与参数初始化，提升量子组合优化性能。
🎯研究动机

QAOA 受限于量子比特数，分治框架 QAOA²可扩展但存在分割度量与优化目标不匹配、参数初始化忽视拓扑结构导致冷启动问题。

❓解决问题

如何联合优化图分割和参数初始化以提升 QAOA 在组合优化中的性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Neural QAOA²，包含生成评估网络（GEN），利用可微量子评估器作为高保真性能代理，提供梯度引导，联合学习从图拓扑到高质量分割和参数配置的映射。

📊实验结果

在 183 个 QUBO、Ising 和 MaxCut 实例（21 到 1000 变量）上实验，方法在 101 个实例上排名第一，并展示跨分布图拓扑的零样本泛化。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出端到端可微框架 Neural QAOA²，联合优化图分割与参数初始化。
  • 引入可微量子评估器作为性能代理，提供直接梯度引导。
  • 在 183 个实例上超越启发式基线，在 101 个实例上排名第一，并展示零样本泛化能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖可微量子评估器的保真度。
  • 大规模实例上的计算开销可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The quantum approximate optimization algorithm (QAOA) holds promise for combinatorial optimization but is constrained by limited qubits. While divide-and-conquer frameworks like QAOA$^{2}$ address scalability by partitioning graphs into subgraphs, existing methods suffer from two fundamental limitations: i) misalignment between heuristic partitioning metrics and quantum optimization goals, and ii) topology-blind parameter initialization that leads to optimization cold starts. To bridge these gaps, we propose Neural QAOA$^{2}$, an end-to-end differentiable framework that jointly generates graph partitions and initial parameters. By integrating a generative evaluative network (GEN), our method utilizes a differentiable quantum evaluator as a high-fidelity performance surrogate to provide direct gradient guidance, enabling the joint generator to learn the intrinsic mapping from graph topology to high-quality partition and parameter configurations. Extensive experiments on 183 QUBO, Ising, and MaxCut instances (21 to 1000 variables) demonstrate that our gradient-driven approach broadly outperforms heuristic baselines, ranking first on 101 instances. It exhibits zero-shot generalization across out-of-distribution graph topologies and scales.

Strikingness-Aware Evaluation for Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning

Medium 2605.13153
Rikui Huang, Shengzhe Zhang, Wei Wei
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种基于显著性的时序知识图谱推理评估框架，通过加权指标更严格地衡量模型对罕见重要事件的推理能力。
🎯研究动机

现有 TKGR 评估对所有事件统一加权，忽略了大多数事件是琐碎重复的，导致高估模型的真实推理能力，因此需要区分并强调那些需要更深层推理的罕见重要事件。

❓解决问题

如何量化事件的显著性并将其融入评估指标，以更准确地反映模型对非平凡事件的推理能力。

🔎现象分析

实验发现：1）所有代表性模型在事件显著性增加时表现更差；2）基于路径的方法在低显著性事件上表现更好，而基于表示的方法在高显著性事件上表现更好；3）设计的集成方法的收益来自拟合琐碎事件而非推理改进。

🛠️主要方法

提出基于规则的显著性度量框架 RSMF，通过比较事件预期发生与从时序规则推导的同类事件来量化显著性，并将显著性作为权重因子集成到加权 MRR 和 Hits@k 等指标中。

📊实验结果

在四个 TKG 基准上进行了实验，评估了多个代表性模型，并分析了显著性对性能的影响。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出显著性感知评估框架，通过加权指标更严格地评估 TKGR 模型对罕见重要事件的推理能力。
  • 设计基于规则的显著性度量框架 RSMF，量化事件显著性。
  • 在四个基准上揭示模型在不同显著性事件上的表现差异，并指出集成方法的局限性。
⚠️方法局限
  • RSMF 依赖于预定义的时序规则，可能无法覆盖所有事件类型。
  • 显著性加权指标可能对噪声敏感，需要进一步验证鲁棒性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning (TKGR) aims at inferring missing (especially future) events from historical data. Current evaluation in TKGR uniformly weights all events, ignoring that most are trivial repetitions, which overestimate the true reasoning ability. Therefore, the rare outstanding events, whose prediction demands deeper reasoning, should be distinguished and emphasized. To this end, we propose a strikingness-aware evaluation framework, which introduces a rule-based strikingness measuring framework (RSMF) to quantify event strikingness by comparing its expected occurrence with peer events derived from temporal rules. Strikingness is then integrated as a weighting factor into metrics like weighted MRR and Hits@k. Experiments on four TKG benchmarks reveal: 1) All representative models perform worse as event strikingness increases, 2) Path-based methods excel on low-strikingness events and representation-based ones on high-strikingness events, 3) We design an ensemble method whose gains stem from fitting trivial events rather than reasoning improvement. Our framework provides a more rigorous evaluation, refocusing the field on predicting outstanding events.

Constitutional Governance in Metric Spaces

Medium 2605.13362
Ehud Shapiro, Nimrod Talmon
arXiv PDF cs.MA
TL;DR：提出一种在度量空间中整合聚合、审议、修正和共识的多项式时间宪法治理框架，并证明其策略鲁棒性与妥协界。
🎯研究动机

现有计算社会选择与算法决策理论在聚合、审议、修正和共识等环节上各自独立，缺乏端到端的多项式时间流程，且关键度量空间聚合器是 NP 难的，难以支持数字社区和组织的平等自治。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个统一、多项式时间可计算的宪法治理过程，在度量空间中同时实现偏好聚合、提案审议、宪法修正和共识形成，并保证策略鲁棒性和可接受的妥协代价。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出宪法治理框架：宪法为每个可修正组件指定度量空间、聚合规则和超级多数阈值；成员提交理想点（投票与个人提案）；任何成员可提交获得超级多数公开支持的公共提案；宪法规则对提案与现状打分，采纳正最大分值的提案；同一规则（可能更高阈值）用于修正宪法本身。以广义中位数作为具体规则，并研究妥协间隙。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将聚合、审议、修正和共识整合为一个多项式时间流程，提出度量空间中的宪法治理框架。
  • 建立框架级保证，证明无虚假报告弱占优诚实投票，并分析妥协间隙（一维为零，高维有界，启发式可缩小）。
  • 在七个经典设置上实例化框架，并在附录中给出均值作为功利主义替代方案。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架依赖超级多数阈值和度量空间的选择，实际应用中参数调优可能复杂。
  • 妥协间隙在高维情况下虽可界但可能较大，启发式缩小效果需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Computational social choice and algorithmic decision theory offer rich aggregation theory but no end-to-end, polynomial-time process for egalitarian self-governance: prior work treats aggregation, deliberation, amendment, and consensus in isolation, and key metric-space aggregators are NP-hard. We propose constitutional governance in metric spaces, integrating these stages into one polynomial-time process. The constitution assigns, per amendable component, a metric space, aggregation rule, and supermajority threshold. Each member submits an ideal element -- both vote and personal proposal. Any member may then submit a public proposal carrying supermajority public support under the revealed votes -- sourced from coalition deliberation, optimization, or AI mediation. The constitutional rule scores proposals against the status quo, adopting the supported proposal of positive maximal score (else retaining the status quo); the same rule, possibly with a higher threshold, amends the constitution itself. We develop the generalised median as the worked rule, establish framework-level guarantees, prove no misreport weakly dominates sincere voting, and study the compromise gap between best peak and unconstrained optimum -- zero in one dimension, bounded in general, narrowed in simulation by a simple heuristic. We instantiate the framework on seven canonical settings; the mean appears as a utilitarian alternative in the appendix. By unifying metric-space aggregation, reality-aware social choice, supermajority amendment, constitutional consensus, deliberative coalition formation, and AI mediation, this work delivers a comprehensive solution to the constitutional democratic governance of digital communities and organisations.

Fast and Compact Graph Cuts for the Boykov-Kolmogorov Algorithm

Medium 2605.13402
Christian Møller Mikkelstrup, Anders Bjorholm Dahl, Philip Bille, Vedrana Andersen Dahl, Inge Li Gørtz
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出快速紧凑的 fcBK 算法，将 Boykov-Kolmogorov 算法的时间复杂度从 O(mn|C|)降至 O(m|C|)，并支持超大规模图的最小割计算。
🎯研究动机

最小 s-t 割是计算机视觉中许多问题的核心解法，Boykov-Kolmogorov (BK)算法是常用工具，但其时间复杂度分析不精确且内存效率低，限制了在大规模图上的应用。

❓解决问题

如何改进 BK 算法的时间复杂度和内存效率，使其能处理顶点数达 10^9、边数达 10^10 的超大规模图。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

重新分析 BK 算法时间复杂度至 O(mn|C|)，并提出 fcBK 算法，通过紧凑图表示和算法优化将复杂度降至 O(m|C|)，同时支持超大规模图的内存高效计算。

📊实验结果

在多个基准数据集上评估，fcBK 算法实现是现有 BK 实现中最快的，但摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 将 BK 算法的时间复杂度分析改进为 O(mn|C|)，并提出 fcBK 算法，时间复杂度为 O(m|C|)。
  • 提出紧凑图表示，使得在 128GB 内存的机器上可处理 10^9 顶点和 10^10 边的图。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类型的图结构（如视觉问题中的网格图）。
  • 紧凑图表示可能增加实现复杂度或限制某些图操作。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Computing a minimum $s$-$t$ cut in a graph is a solution to a wide range of computer vision problems, and is often done using the Boykov-Kolmogorov (BK) algorithm. In this paper, we revisit the BK algorithm from both a theoretical and practical point of view. We improve the analysis of the time complexity of the BK algorithm to $O(mn|C|)$ and propose a new algorithm, the fast and compact BK (fcBK) algorithm, with a time complexity of $O(m|C|)$, where $m$, $n$, and $|C|$ are the number of edges, number of vertices, and the capacity of the cut, respectively. We additionally propose a compact graph representation that allows our implementation to find a minimum $s$-$t$ cut in a graph with upwards of $10^9$ vertices and $10^{10}$ edges on a machine with 128 GB of memory. We find our implementation of the BK algorithm to be the fastest available implementation of the BK algorithm when evaluating on a comprehensive set of benchmark datasets, highlighting the importance of memory-efficient implementations. We make our implementations publicly available for further research and implementation development within minimum $s$-$t$ cut algorithms.

Quantifying Sensitivity for Tree Ensembles: A symbolic and compositional approach

Medium 2605.13830
S. Akshay, Chaitanya Garg, Ashutosh Gupta, Kuldeep S. Meel, Ajinkya Naik
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种基于代数决策图（ADD）的符号化组合方法，用于量化树集成模型的敏感性，并实现高效可扩展的计算。
🎯研究动机

决策树集成（DTE）在安全关键领域广泛应用，但现有敏感性验证方法主要关注定性判断，缺乏量化分析，且计算效率低、难以扩展。

❓解决问题
