如何高效地量化决策树集成模型对输入特征微小变化的敏感性，并保证计算结果的误差和置信度有界。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将敏感性量化问题编码为代数决策图（ADD），通过符号化组合方式将问题分解为子问题，实现高效计算，并给出认证的误差和置信界。

📊实验结果

在多个不同规模（树数量和深度）的基准上评估，与模型计数方法对比，工具 XCount 显著加速且能良好扩展。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种针对树集成模型的定量敏感性定义，通过离散化输入空间并枚举敏感区域。
  • 设计基于 ADD 的符号化组合算法，实现高效且可扩展的敏感性计算，并保证认证误差和置信界。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法可能依赖于输入空间的离散化粒度，影响精度。
  • 仅针对决策树集成，未扩展到其他模型类型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Decision tree ensembles (DTE) are a popular model for a wide range of AI classification tasks, used in multiple safety critical domains, and hence verifying properties on these models has been an active topic of study over the last decade. One such verification question is the problem of sensitivity, which asks, given a DTE, whether a small change in subset of features can lead to misclassification of the input. In this work, our focus is to build a quantitative notion of sensitivity, tailored to DTEs, by discretizing the input space of the model and enumerating the regions which are susceptible to sensitivity. We propose a novel algorithmic technique that can perform this computation efficiently, within a certified error and confidence bound. Our approach is based on encoding the problem as an algebraic decision diagram (ADD), and further splitting it into subproblems that can be solved efficiently and make the computation compositional and scalable. We evaluate the performance of our technique over benchmarks of varying size in terms of number of trees and depth, comparing it against the performance of model counters over the same problem encoding. Experimental results show that our tool XCount achieves significant speedup over other approaches and can scale well with the increasing sizes of the ensembles.

From Generalist to Specialist Representation

Medium 2605.12733
Yujia Zheng, Fan Feng, Yuke Li, Shaoan Xie, Kevin Murphy, Kun Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：在完全非参数设定下，证明了任务结构跨时间步可识别，且任务相关潜在表示在稀疏正则化下可解耦。
🎯研究动机

从通用模型学习任务相关的专化表示是下游应用的基础，但现有方法依赖干预、参数形式或结构约束，缺乏非参数设定下的可识别性保证。

❓解决问题

在完全非参数、无干预、无结构约束的条件下，证明任务结构跨时间步的可识别性以及任务相关潜在表示与无关部分的解耦可识别性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

理论证明：首先证明在完全无监督下，即使序列缺乏严格时间依赖且任务分配任意复杂，时间步与任务之间的结构可识别；然后证明在稀疏正则化下，每个时间步内任务相关潜在表示可与无关部分解耦。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次在完全非参数设定下给出任务结构跨时间步的可识别性保证。
  • 首次在完全非参数设定下给出任务相关潜在表示在稀疏正则化下的可识别性保证。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论结果可能依赖稀疏正则化的具体实现。
  • 未讨论有限数据或计算资源下的实际可识别性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Given a generalist model, learning a task-relevant specialist representation is fundamental for downstream applications. Identifiability, the asymptotic guarantee of recovering the ground-truth representation, is critical because it sets the ultimate limit of any model, even with infinite data and computation. We study this problem in a completely nonparametric setting, without relying on interventions, parametric forms, or structural constraints. We first prove that the structure between time steps and tasks is identifiable in a fully unsupervised manner, even when sequences lack strict temporal dependence and may exhibit disconnections, and task assignments can follow arbitrarily complex and interleaving structures. We then prove that, within each time step, the task-relevant latent representation can be disentangled from the irrelevant part under a simple sparsity regularization, without any additional information or parametric constraints. Together, these results establish a hierarchical foundation: task structure is identifiable across time steps, and task-relevant latent representations are identifiable within each step. To our knowledge, each result provides a first general nonparametric identifiability guarantee, and together they mark a step toward provably moving from generalist to specialist models.

Mechanism Plausibility in Generative Agent-Based Modeling

Medium 2605.12824
Patrick Zhao, David Huu Pham, Nicholas Vincent
arXiv PDF cs.MA
TL;DR：提出机制合理性量表，区分生成充分性与机制合理性，用于评估基于 LLM 的生成式智能体模型。
🎯研究动机

当前 LLM 驱动的智能体模型虽能生成多样现象，但能力、预测与解释三者常被混淆，模型构建者难以在缺乏跨学科理论支撑下判断实验是提升了能力还是提供了解释。

❓解决问题

缺乏一个系统化的框架来区分生成式智能体模型的生成充分性（能否复现现象）与机制合理性（现象如何被产生），导致对模型解释力的评估模糊。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

整合 LLM-ABM 与当代科学哲学文献，操作化定义“合理性”为四级量表，将生成充分性与机制合理性分离评估，并明确预测模型与解释模型的不同角色。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出机制合理性量表（Mechanism Plausibility Scale），为评估生成式智能体模型提供结构化框架。
  • 从哲学与机制文献出发，澄清了能力、预测与解释在 LLM-ABM 中的区别。
⚠️方法局限
  • 量表的具体应用和验证需要更多实证研究。
  • 可能依赖对哲学概念的解读，不同研究者理解可能存在差异。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) can generate high-level diverse phenomena without explicitly programmed rules. This capability has led to their adoption within different agent-based models (ABMs) and social simulations. Recently, research has aim to test whether they are capable of generating different phenomena of interest, for example, human behavior on social media platforms or performance in game-theoretic scenarios. However, capability, prediction, and explanation are different -- drawing from the philosophy of science and mechanisms literature, \textit{explanation} requires showing, to some degree, how a phenomenon is produced by related organized entities and activities. For modelers, describing the characteristics of an experiment or whether a simulation provides progress in capability (or explanation), can be difficult without being grounded in potentially distant research areas. We integrate recent work on LLM-ABMs with contemporary philosophy of science literature and use it to operationalize a definition of `plausibility' in a four-level scale. Our scale separates the evaluation of a model's generative sufficiency (ability to reproduce a phenomenon) from its mechanistic plausibility (how the phenomenon could be produced), and clarifies the distinct roles of different models, such as predictive and explanatory ones. We introduce this as the Mechanism Plausibility Scale.

Structural Diversity Drives Disruptive Scientific Innovation

Medium 2605.12514
Yichun Peng, Saike He, Peijie Zhang, Kang Zhao, Yi Yang, Ning Zhang, Qingpeng Zhang, Daniel Dajun Zeng et al.
arXiv PDF cs.SI
TL;DR：团队协作网络的结构多样性（SD）是预测颠覆性科学创新的强有力指标，能缓解规模诅咒。
🎯研究动机

科学创新日益依赖协作，但何种组织结构能催生突破性想法仍不清楚。现有指标（如团队规模、组成多样性）仅捕捉表面特征，无法反映深层协作架构。

❓解决问题

如何量化团队协作网络的深层结构特征，并验证其对颠覆性创新的预测能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出结构多样性（SD）指标，衡量团队在其先前协作网络中桥接多个不同知识社区的程度；结合因果推断和基于美国国家科学基金会 2012 年政策变化的准自然实验，使用 2.6 亿篇科学出版物（1900-2025）的数据集验证。

📊实验结果

使用 2.6 亿篇科学出版物（1900-2025）的数据集，结合因果推断和准自然实验，验证 SD 优于传统指标（如团队新鲜度、边密度）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出结构多样性（SD）作为团队协作网络的新指标，能有效预测颠覆性创新。
  • 发现 SD 与团队规模正交互，可缓解规模诅咒，将规模转化为创造性合成的资源。
  • 揭示学科整合（DI）是 SD 促进创新的机制之一。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能未考虑其他潜在混杂因素。
  • SD 的计算依赖于完整的协作网络数据，数据缺失可能影响结果。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Scientific innovation increasingly depends on collaboration, yet the organizational structure that fosters breakthrough ideas remains poorly understood. Existing metrics - such as team size or compositional diversity - capture readily observable characteristics but not the deeper architecture of collaboration. We introduce Structural Diversity (SD): the extent to which a team bridges multiple distinct knowledge communities within its prior collaboration network. Using a century-scale dataset of 260 million scientific publications (1900-2025) and combining causal inference with a quasi-natural experiment based on a U.S. National Science Foundation policy change in 2012, we show that SD is a powerful and robust predictor of disruptive innovation, outperforming traditional team novelty indicators such as team freshness and edge density. Moreover, SD positively interacts with team size and is able to mitigate the well-known "curse of scale" by transforming scale from a liability into a resource for creative synthesis. We find that one mechanism underlying this effect is Disciplinary Integration (DI): teams with higher SD can more effectively combine heterogeneous knowledge into novel configurations. Our findings position SD as both a new theoretical construct and an actionable design principle for organizing scientific collaboration. By linking the architecture of team assembly to the dynamics of creative discovery, our work offers a structural explanation for how collective intelligence can be systematically engineered to foster disruptive innovation.

SP-GCRL: Influence Maximization on Incomplete Social Graphs

Medium 2605.12513
Haohua Niu, Yuxuan Yang, Lingfeng Zhang, Hao Li, Jiao Liang, Zongfu Luo, Luca Rossi
arXiv PDF cs.SI
TL;DR：提出 SP-GCRL 框架，结合图对比学习和强化学习，在不完整社交图上实现高效影响力最大化。
🎯研究动机

现实平台中的影响力最大化面临社交图不完整、噪声大以及扩散动态非平稳的挑战，现有方法难以应对。

❓解决问题

在不完整、有噪声的社交图上，学习端到端的种子节点选择策略，以最大化影响力传播。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出社交传播感知的非线性扩散函数建模重复暴露下的增强 / 衰减效应和概率漂移；构建双结构视图进行对比学习获得鲁棒节点表示；用 GAT 回归代理替代昂贵策略指标；基于 DDQN 学习端到端种子选择策略。

📊实验结果

在多个真实世界网络上，SP-GCRL 在不同预算和拓扑下均显著优于启发式和基于学习的基线，并保持强大规模可扩展性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出社交传播感知的非线性扩散函数，更真实地建模重复暴露下的影响动态。
  • 设计图对比学习与强化学习结合的框架，在不完整图上实现鲁棒且可扩展的影响力最大化。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖图结构质量，极端稀疏图下对比学习效果未知。
  • 非线性扩散函数的参数设定可能需领域知识。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Influence maximization (IM) in real platforms is challenged by incomplete, noisy social graphs and non-stationary diffusion dynamics. We propose SP-GCRL, a social-propagation-aware graph contrastive reinforcement learning framework that learns end-to-end seed selection under partial this http URL first introduce a social-propagation-aware nonlinear diffusion function to model reinforcement/diminishing effects and probability drift under repeated exposure; we then construct dual structural views and perform contrastive learning to obtain node representations robust to missing edges and weak ties, while replacing expensive strategy metrics with a GAT-based regression surrogate to improve efficiency and scalability; finally, we use DDQN to learn an end-to-end seed selection policy on top of these representations. Experiments on multiple real-world networks show that SP-GCRL achieves significant gains over heuristic and learning-based baselines across budgets and topologies, while maintaining strong large-scale scalability.

A Constraint Programming Approach for $n$-Day Lookahead Playoff Clinching

Low 2605.13142
Gili Rosenberg, Kyle E. C. Booth, J. Kyle Brubaker, Ruben S. Andrist
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出约束规划方法实现 NHL 季后赛 n 天前瞻锁定判定。
🎯研究动机

体育赛事中球迷和利益相关者关注球队何时锁定季后赛，但 NHL 复杂的平局规则使得计算锁定场景具有挑战性。

❓解决问题

在 NHL 中，给定未来 n 天内比赛结果组合，判定球队是否锁定季后赛。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

自定义树搜索，结合预处理、剪枝策略和节点排序启发式，利用约束规划子程序进行 0 天前瞻锁定判定（寻找反例证明球队被淘汰）。

📊实验结果

使用 2021-22 至 2024-25 赛季的 NHL 公开数据，基于数百个场景验证算法有效性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 n 天前瞻锁定季后赛的算法，可处理 NHL 复杂平局规则。
  • 验证算法在 2021-22 至 2024-25 赛季数百个场景下的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对 NHL，可能需调整规则才能推广到其他联赛。
  • 未讨论算法在大规模 n 或完整赛季下的计算效率。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In professional sports, a team has clinched the playoffs if they are guaranteed a postseason spot, regardless of the outcomes of any remaining games. As the season progresses, sports fans and other stakeholders are interested in precisely when, and under what conditions, their team will clinch the playoffs. In this paper, we investigate playoff clinching in the context of the National Hockey League (NHL), where it is computationally challenging to produce clinching scenarios due, in part, to complex tie-breakers. We present an algorithm that determines under which combinations of game outcomes in the next $n$ days a team will clinch the playoffs (i.e., "$n$-day lookahead clinching"). Our approach is a custom tree search which employs various preprocessing techniques, pruning strategies, and node ordering heuristics to efficiently explore the space of possible outcomes. The tree search leverages a constraint programming (CP)-based subroutine for inference that determines if a team has clinched the playoffs for some snapshot in time of the regular season (i.e., "0-day lookahead clinching"). This CP subroutine aims to find a counter-example in which the team being evaluated is eliminated, taking into account qualification rules and the NHL's extensive list of tie-breakers. We validate the efficacy of our algorithm using hundreds of scenarios based on public NHL data for the seasons 2021-22 through 2024-25. The methods introduced can be readily extended to other metrics of interest, including mathematical proof of playoff elimination, clinching the President's Trophy, as well as clinching (or being eliminated from clinching) any other seed in the standings.

Diversity of Extensions in Abstract Argumentation

Low 2605.13332
Johannes K. Fichte, Markus Hecher, Yasir Mahmood, Zhengjun Wang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：引入基于对称差的扩展多样性概念，系统分类其计算复杂度。
🎯研究动机

标准抽象论证推理不考虑扩展之间的差异程度，无法揭示不同可接受观点是相近还是根本冲突。

❓解决问题

如何量化抽象论证框架中扩展的多样性，并研究相关决策与计算问题的复杂度。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于对称差定义扩展的多样性，研究 k- 多样性存在性、覆盖特定参数的 k- 多样性存在性及最大 k 计算问题，并给出复杂度分类。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入基于对称差的扩展多样性概念，形式化量化扩展间的差异。
  • 提供多样性相关决策与计算问题的系统复杂度分类。
  • 实现原型并评估多样性水平的计算。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于有限类型的论证框架。
  • 复杂度分类可能未涵盖所有变体。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Argumentation is an important topic of AI for modelling and reasoning about arguments. In abstract argumentation, we consider directed graphs, so-called argumentation frameworks (AF), that express conflicts between arguments. The semantics is defined by the notion of extensions, which are sets of arguments that satisfy particular relationship conditions in the AF. Usually, standard reasoning in argumentation do not reveal how far apart extensions are. We introduce a quantitative notion of diversity of extensions based on the symmetric difference and provide a systematic complexity classification. Intuitively, diversity captures whether extensions of a framework (accepted viewpoints) differ only marginally or represent fundamentally incompatible sets of arguments. We study whether an AF admits k-diverse extensions, admits k-diverse extensions covering specific arguments, and to compute the largest k for which an AF admits k-diverse extensions. We outline a prototype and provide an evaluation for computing diversity levels.

Controllable Quantum Memory Capacity in Quantum Reservoir Networks with Tunable partial-SWAPs

Low 2605.12713
Erik L. Connerty, Ethan N. Evans
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出可调部分 SWAP 机制，实现量子储层网络中记忆容量的直接控制。
🎯研究动机

量子储层计算中记忆容量的产生机制尚未完全理解且不可控，限制了实际应用。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种硬件可实现机制，直接控制量子储层网络的记忆耗散率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

在递归量子储层架构中引入可调部分 SWAP 操作，通过控制振幅阻尼信道实现记忆耗散率的调节。

📊实验结果

使用随机短期记忆容量基准和 NARMA-5 数据集，分别在模拟和 IBM QPU 上进行验证。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出可调部分 SWAP 机制，实现量子储层网络记忆容量的直接控制。
  • 从理论上将该机制解释为受控振幅阻尼信道，并在模拟和 IBM QPU 上验证了有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对递归架构，未讨论反馈模型。
  • 实验规模可能有限，未提及噪声影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In the field of quantum reservoir computing (QRC), many different computational models and architectures have been proposed. From these models, we identify feedback based models -- which use a feedback mechanism to re-embed classical measurements from the QRC -- and recurrent models -- which use a multi-register approach with memory and readout qubits -- as the two major competing architectures that have been discussed and validated on hardware. In this paper, we advance upon the recurrent architectures, which employ a two register approach to endow the QRC with a fading memory. While these approaches have been validated on hardware and have demonstrated great real-world performance on noisy-intermediate-scale-quantum (NISQ) quantum processing units (QPUs), the exact mechanism through which the memory capacity arises is not completely understood or fully controllable. With this, we augment the recurrent approaches and present a hardware-realizable mechanism, which we call a tunable partial-SWAP, that allows for the direct control of the rate of memory dissipation from a QRN implemented on a gate-based QPU. The theory behind this mechanism is discussed in terms of a controlled amplitude-damping channel and validation experiments using a randomized short-term memory capacity (STMC) recall benchmark and the NARMA-5 dataset are conducted using simulation and IBM QPUs, respectively.

Why the Unfinished Keeps Returning: Canxianization and the Dynamics of Conscious Priority

Low 2605.12543
Hengjin Cai, Tianqi Cai
arXiv PDF q-bio.NC
TL;DR：提出 Canxianization 理论解释为何某些未完成内容反复返回意识，区别于记忆、情绪等机制。
🎯研究动机

现有理论无法解释为何某些意识内容在触发条件消失后仍反复返回，而其他内容则消失。

❓解决问题

解释意识中未完成内容反复返回的机制，并区分其与记忆、情绪、好奇心等现象。

🔎现象分析

某些扰动成为与自我相关的未完成状态，抵抗闭合，从而获得反复的意识优先级。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Canxianization 过程，包括自我 - 世界边界归因、价值标记、因果 / 行动闭合受阻、元认知耦合等条件，并引入 Recurrent Priority Index 和 Canxian Update Index。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Canxianization 理论解释意识中未完成内容的反复返回。
  • 区分了冷 Canxianization（结构不完整驱动）与情感驱动的复发。
  • 提出用于人工系统的 Reset Resistance 和 Stake Transfer 测试。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论尚未在人工系统中验证。
  • 缺乏实证数据支持。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Some conscious contents disappear after access; others return repeatedly, long after their triggering conditions have ceased. We propose Canxianization as the process by which a perturbation becomes closure-resistant self-relevant unfinishedness and thereby acquires recurrent conscious priority. The theory distinguishes this phenomenon from emotional arousal, memory strength, the Zeigarnik effect, curiosity, prediction error, and intrusive thought. A perturbation becomes canxianized when it is attributed to the self-world boundary, value-marked, blocked from causal or action closure, and metacognitively coupled to the self-model. We distinguish latent canxian strength from observed conscious recurrence, and introduce a Recurrent Priority Index and a Canxian Update Index to separate productive from pathological recurrence. Cold Canxianization, recurrence driven by structural incompleteness rather than affective arousal, is identified as a critical discriminant. Reset Resistance and Stake Transfer tests are proposed for artificial systems. Canxianization is not memory persistence; it is failed self-world repair. The unfinished does not merely remain. When it concerns the self and resists closure, it returns.

Prime Successor Irreducibility: Turing Machine Complexity, Kolmogorov Complexity, and Weakness-Based Formulations

Low 2605.12504
Ben Goertzel, Bill Lauritzen
arXiv PDF cs.CC
TL;DR：从计算不可约性角度形式化素数序列的局部不可预测性，提出图灵机复杂度、Kolmogorov 复杂度和弱点三种表述。
🎯研究动机

素数序列的局部行为（如相邻素数间隔）看似随机但缺乏严格的形式化框架，现有方法多依赖启发式假设，需要从计算复杂性角度建立理论依据。

❓解决问题

形式化证明素数序列在从素数到其后继的转换中具有计算不可约性，即不存在通用算法能显著快于逐个候选测试。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出三种互补表述：PSI-T（图灵机复杂度模型，断言运行时间下界）、PSI-K（Kolmogorov 复杂度，证明典型素数间隔在尺度上算法不可压缩）、PSI-W（弱点表述，包括稀疏集反集中和碰撞概率衰减）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Prime Successor Irreducibility 的三种形式化框架（PSI-T, PSI-K, PSI-W）。
  • 无条件证明 PSI-K(c, δ)对所有固定 c<1 成立，利用标准筛法界。
  • 将弱点表述扩展到素数星座和连续间隔向量，并建立筛法理论连接。
  • 利用 Kolmogorov 复杂度与 Shannon 熵的关系，推导出素数间隔熵的严格下界。
⚠️方法局限
  • PSI-T 的严格下界可能依赖于具体计算模型。
  • 弱点表述中的参数选择可能影响结论的普适性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We develop conjectures and theorems expressing the idea that the prime sequence exhibits computational irreducibility in the transition from one prime to its successor. Informally, given a prime pp p, no general algorithm can compute the least prime greater than pp p substantially faster than sequentially testing candidates for primality, except possibly on sparse input sets. Our framework proceeds along complementary lines. First, we formalize Prime Successor Irreducibility in a Turing-machine complexity model (PSI-T), asserting lower bounds on running time relative to a sequential baseline. Second, we propose a Kolmogorov-complexity formulation (PSI-K), asserting that typical prime gaps are algorithmically incompressible at their scale; we prove PSI-K(c, $\delta$) unconditionally for all fixed c<1 using standard sieve bounds. Third, we develop weakness-based formulations: PSI-W (sparse-set anti-concentration) shows no small menu of gap values captures a noticeable fraction of primes, while PSI-W-LE shows collision probabilities decay and logical entropy tends to 1. These extend to prime constellations and consecutive gap vectors. Finally, a sieve-theoretic framework connects local obstruction patterns to Selberg weakness parameters. The PSI-K and weakness formulations connect irreducibility to classical statistical questions about prime gaps. Using the relationship between Kolmogorov complexity and Shannon entropy, we derive rigorous lower bounds on prime gap entropy in dyadic intervals [X,2X]. Together, these formulations provide a unified complexity-theoretic perspective on the apparent local unpredictability of the prime sequence, without asserting randomness or independence.

新方法/算法 4 篇

Bayesian Model Merging

Medium 2605.12843
Kaiyang Li, Shaobo Han, Qing Su, Shihao Ji
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：贝叶斯模型合并通过双层优化框架，利用锚模型先验和模块级超参数搜索，实现多任务模型的高效合并。
🎯研究动机

现有模型合并方法忽略锚模型的归纳偏置，且使用共享超参数缺乏全局优化，导致合并性能受限。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种模型合并方法，既能利用锚模型先验，又能实现模块级超参数全局优化，且支持无数据场景。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出贝叶斯模型合并（BMM），内层将合并视为基于激活的贝叶斯回归，以锚模型为强先验得到闭式解；外层用贝叶斯优化搜索模块级超参数；并推导出无数据变体。

📊实验结果

在视觉（最多 20 任务）和语言（5 任务）基准上，BMM 优于所有即插即用锚基线（如 TA、WUDI-Merging、TSV）。ViT-L/14 上 8 任务合并达到 95.1，接近专家平均 95.8。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 BMM 框架，结合锚模型先验和模块级超参数优化。
  • 推导出无数据变体，无需辅助数据即可估计 Gram 矩阵。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖验证集质量。
  • 无数据变体可能对任务相似性敏感。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Model merging aims to combine multiple task-specific expert models into a single model without joint retraining, offering a practical alternative to multi-task learning when data access or computational budget is limited. Existing methods, however, face two key limitations: (1) they overlook the valuable inductive bias of strong anchor models and estimate the merged weights from scratch, and (2) they rely on a shared hyperparameter setting across different modules of the network, lacking a global optimization strategy. This paper introduces Bayesian Model Merging (BMM), a plug-and-play bi-level optimization framework, where the inner level formulates the model merging as an activation-based Bayesian regression under a strong prior induced by an anchor model, yielding an efficient closed-form solution; and the outer level leverages a Bayesian optimization procedure to search module-specific hyperparameters globally based on a small validation set. Furthermore, we reveal a key alignment between activation statistics and task vectors, enabling us to derive a data-free variant of BMM that estimates the Gram matrix for regression without any auxiliary data. Across extensive benchmarks, including up to 20-task merging in vision and 5-task merging in language, BMM consistently outperforms all plug-and-play anchor baselines (e.g., TA, WUDI-Merging, and TSV). In particular, on the ViT-L/14 benchmark for 8-task merging, a single merged model reaches 95.1, closely matching the average performance of eight task-specific experts (95.8).

FeatCal: Feature Calibration for Post-Merging Models

Medium 2605.13030
Yanggan Gu, Shuo Cai, Zihao Wang, Wenjun Wang, Yuanyi Wang, Pengkai Wang, Sirui Huang, Su Lu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 FeatCal 方法，通过逐层特征校准提升模型合并性能，无需梯度下降。
🎯研究动机

模型合并虽能避免联合训练和部署多个专家模型，但合并后模型性能常低于任务专家，存在性能差距。

❓解决问题

解决模型合并后特征漂移导致的性能下降问题。

🔎现象分析

特征漂移可分解为上游传播和局部不匹配，并通过前向传播累积，最终导致输出漂移。

🛠️主要方法

FeatCal：利用小校准集逐层前向校准合并模型权重，通过闭式解更新权重，无需梯度下降或迭代优化。

📊实验结果

在 CLIP 和 GLUE 基准上，FeatCal 优于 Surgery 和 ProbSurgery 基线：CLIP-ViT-B/32 任务算术达 85.5% vs 77.0%/78.8%；FLAN-T5-base GLUE 达 85.2% vs 83.7%/82.2%。8 样本 / 任务达 82.9%，256 样本 / 任务仅需 53 秒，速度提升约 4 倍。

⭐主要贡献
  • 理论分析了模型合并中的特征漂移及其传播机制。
  • 提出 FeatCal 方法，高效校准合并模型，提升性能且保持合并优势。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖小校准集，可能不适用于零样本场景。
  • 仅验证了 CLIP 和 GLUE 基准，泛化性需进一步探索。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Model merging combines task experts into one model and avoids joint training, retraining, or deploying many expert models, but the merged model often still underperforms task experts. We study this performance gap through feature drift, the difference between features produced by the merged model and by the expert on the same input. Our theory decomposes this drift into upstream propagation and local mismatch, tracks how it propagates and combines through later layers in forward order, and links final feature drift to output drift. This view motivates FeatCal, which uses a small calibration set to calibrate the merged model weights layer by layer in forward order, reducing feature drift while staying close to merged weights and preserving the benefits of model merging. FeatCal uses an efficient closed-form solution to update model weights, with no gradient descent, iterative optimization, or extra modules. On the main CLIP and GLUE benchmarks, FeatCal beats Surgery and ProbSurgery, the closest post-merging calibration baselines: 85.5% vs. 77.0%/78.8% on CLIP-ViT-B/32 Task Arithmetic (TA) and 85.2% vs. 83.7%/82.2% on FLAN-T5-base GLUE. On CLIP-ViT-B/32, 8 examples per task reach 82.9%, and 256 examples per task take 53 seconds, about 4x faster than both baselines, showing better sample efficiency and lower calibration cost.

Min Generalized Sliced Gromov Wasserstein: A Scalable Path to Gromov Wasserstein

Medium 2605.13753
Ashkan Shahbazi, Xinran Liu, Ping He, Soheil Kolouri
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 min-GSGW，一种可扩展的 Gromov-Wasserstein 切片方法，通过可学习的非线性切片器实现高效几何匹配。
🎯研究动机

Gromov-Wasserstein 距离在几何匹配中重要但计算成本高，现有切片方法表达能力有限，难以兼顾效率和精度。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种可扩展的 Gromov-Wasserstein 切片公式，既能保持几何不变性，又能高效计算传输计划。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 min-GSGW，使用可学习的非线性广义切片器对两个测度进行兼容投影，在投影域学习单调耦合，再提升为原始空间的传输计划，并直接最小化 GW 目标。

📊实验结果

在动物网格匹配、马网格插值和 ShapeNet 部件迁移上实验，min-GSGW 以更低计算成本产生有意义的几何对应和 GW 目标值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 将广义切片器引入切片 GW 框架
  • 构建基于切片的 GW 传输计划，计算高效
  • 开发摊销变体，用学习到的切片器替代逐实例优化，适用于未见输入对
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖切片器网络的设计和训练
  • 摊销变体可能对分布外数据泛化有限
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We propose min Generalized Sliced Gromov--Wasserstein (min-GSGW), a sliced formulation for the Gromov--Wasserstein (GW) problem using expressive generalized slicers. The key idea is to learn coupled nonlinear slicers that assign compatible push-forward values to both input measures, so that monotone coupling in the projected domain lifts to a transport plan evaluated against the GW objective in the original spaces. The resulting plan induces a GW objective value, and min-GSGW minimizes this cost directly in the original spaces. We further show that min-GSGW is rigid-motion invariant, a crucial property for geometric matching and shape analysis tasks. Our contributions are threefold: 1) we introduce generalized slicers into the sliced GW framework, 2) we construct a slicing-based efficient GW transport plan; and 3) we develop an amortized variant that replaces per-instance optimization with a learned slicer for unseen input pairs. We perform experiments on animal mesh matching, horse mesh interpolation, and ShapeNet part transfer. Results show that min-GSGW produces meaningful geometric correspondences and GW objective values at substantially lower computational cost than existing GW solvers.

FePySR: A Neural Feature Extraction Framework for Efficient and Scalable Symbolic Regression

Medium 2605.12704
Zhiming Yu, Wangtao Lu, Xin Lai
arXiv PDF cs.SC
TL;DR：FePySR 通过两阶段框架先提取有效特征再搜索方程，显著提升符号回归的恢复率和效率。
🎯研究动机

符号回归（SR）是 NP-hard 问题，但许多实际表达式可分解为可复用的非线性特征模块，现有方法搜索空间大、效率低。

❓解决问题

如何高效地从观测数据中恢复复杂数学表达式，降低搜索空间并提高恢复率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

两阶段框架：第一阶段使用异构神经网络将观测数据约束到候选表达式集；第二阶段在精炼的表达式空间中使用 PySR 进行结构优化。

📊实验结果

在五个标准基准上优于现有方法；在 75 个高复杂度合成方程上恢复 36 个；在生物 ODE 测试中恢复 24/100 个。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 FePySR 框架，通过特征提取减少符号回归搜索空间。
  • 在多个基准上实现更高的方程恢复率和更低的均方误差，且计算时间更短。
  • 在生物系统常微分方程中成功恢复 24/100 个方程，而 PySR 恢复 0 个。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对特定类型表达式或噪声分布敏感。
  • 第一阶段特征提取的泛化性可能受限于训练数据。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

A fundamental challenge in symbolic regression (SR) is efficiently recovering complex mathematical expressions from observational data. Although this problem is NP-hard, many expressions of practical interest decompose naturally into combinations of nonlinear feature modules, concentrating structural complexity into a small number of reusable components. Here, we introduce FePySR, a two-stage framework that reduces the SR search space by extracting valid features prior to equation search. FePySR first employs a heterogeneous neural network to constrain observational data to a set of candidate expressions, then performs structural optimization within this refined expression space using PySR. Across five standard benchmarks, FePySR outperforms state-of-the-art methods by achieving higher equation recovery rates. On a set of 75 highly complex synthesized equations, FePySR recovers 36 equations, while producing substantially smaller mean squared errors on the remaining unrecovered cases, with reduced computation time compared to PySR. FePySR's first stage also maintains consistent performance under varying numbers of selected top features and increasing levels of noise in the observational data. Applied to ordinary differential equations governing biological systems, FePySR successfully identifies governing equations in 24 out of 100 tests where PySR recovers none. Taken together, FePySR is a generalizable framework that can enhance the SR solvers, enabling the efficient and reliable recovery of symbolic expressions across scientific domains.

联邦学习 1 篇

FedHPro: Federated Hyper-Prototype Learning via Gradient Matching

Medium 2605.13475
Huan Wang, Jun Shen, Haoran Li, Zhenyu Yang, Jun Yan, Ousman Manjang, Yanlong Zhai, Di Wu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出超原型（hyper-prototype）和梯度匹配优化，解决联邦学习中全局原型的语义漂移问题。
🎯研究动机

联邦学习中，基于原型的 FL 方法通过共享全局原型对齐客户端局部原型，但现有方法在原型级别更新全局原型（如平均局部原型或精炼全局锚点）常导致跨客户端语义漂移，产生不对齐的全局信号，影响泛化能力。

❓解决问题

联邦学习中全局原型的语义漂移问题，即现有原型级更新方式无法保持跨客户端的语义一致性。

🔎现象分析

现有原型级更新方法（如平均局部原型）导致语义漂移，使得全局信号不对齐。

🛠️主要方法

引入超原型（一组可学习的全局类别原型），通过梯度匹配直接对齐客户端真实样本的类别相关特征，而非原型级描述符；结合互对比学习（带客户端特定间隔）和一致性惩罚，提升类间可分性和类内均匀性。

📊实验结果

在多种异构场景下的多个基准数据集上进行实验，验证了超原型的语义一致性和 FedHPro 的 SOTA 性能。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出超原型概念，通过梯度匹配优化，从客户端真实样本中蒸馏语义知识，避免语义漂移。
  • 提出 FedHPro 框架，利用超原型进行互对比学习和一致性惩罚，提升特征判别性和紧凑性。
  • 在多种异构场景下实验，超原型产生更语义一致的全局信号，FedHPro 在多个基准数据集上达到 SOTA。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对客户端数据分布极端异构的情况敏感。
  • 梯度匹配的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative training of distributed clients while protecting privacy. To enhance generalization capability in FL, prototype-based FL is in the spotlight, since shared global prototypes offer semantic anchors for aligning client-specific local prototypes. However, existing methods update global prototypes at the prototype-level via averaging local prototypes or refining global anchors, which often leads to semantic drift across clients and subsequently yields a misaligned global signal. To alleviate this issue, we introduce hyper-prototypes, defined by a set of learnable global class-wise prototypes to preserve underlying semantic knowledge across clients. The hyper-prototypes are optimized via gradient matching to align with class-relevant characteristics distilled directly from clients' real samples, rather than prototype-level descriptors. We further propose FedHPro, a Federated Hyper-Prototype Learning framework, to leverage hyper-prototypes to promote inter-class separability via mutual-contrastive learning with client-specific margin, while encouraging intra-class uniformity through a consistency penalty. Comprehensive experiments under diverse heterogeneous scenarios confirm that 1) hyper-prototypes produce a more semantically consistent global signal, and 2) FedHPro achieves state-of-the-art performance on several benchmark datasets. Code is available at \href{ this https URL }{ this https URL }.

数据集与基准 19 篇 · 3 个细分

数据集 (不含评测协议) 8 篇

Vividh-ASR: A Complexity-Tiered Benchmark and Optimization Dynamics for Robust Indic Speech Recognition

High 2605.13087
Kush Juvekar, Kavya Manohar, Aditya Srinivas Menon, Arghya Bhattacharya, Kumarmanas Nethil
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出复杂度分层基准 Vividh-ASR，发现多语言 ASR 微调存在录音室偏差，并设计反向多阶段微调策略提升鲁棒性。
🎯研究动机

多语言 ASR 模型在低资源语言上微调时，朗读语音性能提升但自发语音退化，存在录音室偏差问题，缺乏诊断该问题的分层基准和优化策略。

❓解决问题

解决多语言 ASR 模型微调中录音室偏差导致的鲁棒性下降问题，并优化低资源语言的语音识别性能。

🔎现象分析

微调 Whisper 等模型时，朗读语音性能提升但自发语音性能下降，即录音室偏差；早期大参数更新可全局提升 WER 12 个绝对点，难到易课程学习进一步改善自发语音。

🛠️主要方法

提出反向多阶段微调（R-MFT），结合学习率时序和课程排序，在参数高效微调下使 244M 模型匹配或超越 769M 模型。

📊实验结果

在 Vividh-ASR 基准上评估，Whisper 模型微调，报告全局 WER 和自发语音 WER，对比不同规模模型。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入 Vividh-ASR，一个针对印地语和马拉雅拉姆语的复杂度分层基准（四层：录音室、广播、自发、合成噪声）。
  • 发现录音室偏差现象并系统研究学习率时序和课程排序的影响。
  • 提出反向多阶段微调（R-MFT）训练策略，实现参数高效微调。
  • 通过 CKA 和 SVD 表征分析揭示有效调度将适应集中在解码器，保留预训练编码器声学几何。
  • 开源基准和模型。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对印地语和马拉雅拉姆语，泛化性待验证。
  • 未详细讨论合成噪声层与其他层的交互。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Fine-tuning multilingual ASR models like Whisper for low-resource languages often improves read speech but degrades spontaneous audio performance, a phenomenon we term studio-bias. To diagnose this mismatch, we introduce Vividh-ASR, a complexity-stratified benchmark for Hindi and Malayalam across four tiers: studio, broadcast, spontaneous, and synthetic noise. Through a controlled study of learning-rate timing and curriculum ordering, we find that early large parameter updates improve global WER by 12 absolute points, while a hard-to-easy curriculum adds gains for spontaneous speech. These findings motivate reverse multi-stage fine-tuning (R-MFT), a training recipe that enables a parameter-efficient 244M Whisper model to match or exceed conventionally fine-tuned 769M counterparts. Representational analysis via CKA and SVD reveals effective schedules concentrate adaptation in the decoder, preserving the pre-trained encoder's acoustic geometry. We release the benchmark and models.

Generating synthetic computed tomography for radiotherapy: SynthRAD2025 challenge report

High 2605.13555
Viktor Rogowski, Maarten L. Terpstra, Niklas Wahl, Florian Kamp, Erik van der Bijl, Arthur Jr. Galapon, Christopher Kurz, Bowen Xin et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：SynthRAD2025 挑战赛系统评估了 MRI 和 CBCT 生成合成 CT 的方法，发现深度学习生成的 sCT 在 CBCT-to-CT 任务上表现更优，但图像质量不能完全替代剂量验证。
🎯研究动机

放射治疗需要精确的 CT 图像进行剂量计算，但重复 CT 扫描增加辐射暴露和负担，MRI 缺乏电子密度信息，CBCT 需要校正。合成 CT 技术可解决这些问题，但缺乏大规模、多中心的系统评估。

❓解决问题

系统评估和比较 MRI-to-CT 和 CBCT-to-CT 合成 CT 方法在多个解剖部位和临床相关指标上的性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出：图像质量与分割指标强相关（ρ=0.78-0.79），但与剂量指标相关性中等，说明图像质量不能作为剂量准确性的替代指标；头颈部病例一致性最好，胸腹部变异更大；组织界面的残余误差沿射束路径传播，对质子剂量影响大于光子。

🛠️主要方法

组织大规模多中心挑战赛，包含两个任务（MRI-to-CT 和 CBCT-to-CT），使用 2362 例患者数据，通过图像相似度、分割和剂量学指标评估提交方法。

📊实验结果

摘要提供了具体实验结果：Task 1 最佳 MAE 64.8±21.3 HU，PSNR ~30 dB，MS-SSIM ~0.936，Dice 0.79，光子 γ>98%，质子 γ≈85%；Task 2 更优：MAE 48.3±13.4 HU，PSNR 32.6 dB，MS-SSIM 0.968，Dice 0.86，光子 γ>99%，质子 γ≈89%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提供了迄今为止最大规模的多中心 sCT 基准测试，涵盖头颈、胸腹部位。
  • 系统证明了图像质量不能完全替代剂量验证，强调了剂量评估在临床验证中的必要性。
⚠️方法局限
  • MRI-to-CT 任务仍存在挑战，性能低于 CBCT-to-CT。
  • 剂量评估仅基于光子与质子计划，未涵盖其他治疗模式。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Radiation therapy (RT) requires precise dose delivery over multiple fractions, with CT fundamental for treatment planning due to its electron density information. Repeated CT acquisitions impose radiation exposure and logistical burdens, MRI lacks electron density, and cone-beam CT (CBCT) requires correction for dose calculation. Synthetic CT (sCT) generation addresses these by converting MRI or CBCT into CT-equivalent images with accurate Hounsfield Unit (HU) values, enabling MRI-only RT and CBCT-based adaptive workflows. Building on SynthRAD2023, SynthRAD2025 benchmarked sCT methods on 2,362 patients from five European centers across head and neck, thorax, and abdomen. Two tasks: MRI-to-CT (890 cases) and CBCT-to-CT (1,472 cases), evaluated via image similarity (MAE, PSNR, MS-SSIM), segmentation (Dice, HD95), and dosimetric metrics from photon and proton plans. With 803 participants and 12/13 valid submissions, Task 1 top performance reached MAE $64.8\pm21.3$ HU, PSNR $\sim$30 dB, MS-SSIM $\sim$0.936, Dice 0.79, photon $\gamma_{2\%/2\text{mm}}>98\%$, proton $\gamma\approx85\%$. Task 2 improved: MAE $48.3\pm13.4$ HU, PSNR 32.6 dB, MS-SSIM 0.968, Dice 0.86, photon $\gamma>99\%$, proton $\gamma\approx89\%$. Strong image--segmentation correlations ($\rho=0.78$--$0.79$) but moderate dose correlations confirmed image quality is insufficient as a dosimetric surrogate. Head-and-neck cases were most consistent; thoracic and abdominal cases showed greater variability. Residual errors at tissue interfaces propagate along beam paths, affecting proton dose more than photon. SynthRAD2025 demonstrates that deep learning yields clinically relevant sCTs, especially for CBCT-to-CT, while identifying persistent MRI-to-CT challenges and underscoring dose-based evaluation as essential for clinical validation.

ImageAttributionBench: How Far Are We from Generalizable Attribution?

Medium 2605.12967
Tingshu Mou, Zhipeng Wei, Chao Gong, Jingjing Chen, Xingjun Ma
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：ImageAttributionBench 是一个大规模、多样化的图像归属基准，揭示现有方法在鲁棒性和泛化性上的严重不足。
🎯研究动机

生成式 AI 产生高度逼真的合成图像，给图像溯源和虚假信息检测带来严峻挑战，亟需有效的图像归属方法。但现有数据集规模有限、生成方法过时、语义多样性不足，阻碍了鲁棒且泛化的归属模型的发展。

❓解决问题

现有图像归属数据集和方法的局限性，导致模型在真实场景下鲁棒性和泛化性差，无法应对语义未见内容和图像退化。

🔎现象分析

在两种挑战性设置（标准平衡划分训练 + 退化图像测试，以及语义不相交划分训练测试）下，当前 SOTA 归属方法均表现持续不佳，暴露了其在鲁棒性和对未见语义内容泛化方面的显著局限。

🛠️主要方法

构建 ImageAttributionBench 数据集，包含多种先进生成模型合成的图像，覆盖多个真实语义领域，并设计两种评估设置以模拟真实归属场景。

📊实验结果

在 ImageAttributionBench 上评估了多种 SOTA 归属方法，包括标准平衡划分 + 退化图像测试和语义不相交划分训练测试两种设置，结果显示所有方法性能均较差。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出了 ImageAttributionBench，一个大规模、多样化、覆盖多种 SOTA 生成模型和真实语义领域的图像归属基准数据集。
  • 通过两种挑战性设置系统评估了现有 SOTA 归属方法，揭示了它们在鲁棒性和泛化性上的严重不足。
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未提及数据集是否开源或具体规模。
  • 未提供具体方法改进方向或解决方案。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The rapid advancement of generative AI has enabled the creation of highly realistic and diverse synthetic images, posing critical challenges for image provenance and misinformation detection. This underscores the urgent need for effective image attribution. However, existing attribution datasets are constrained by limited scale, outdated generation methods, and insufficient semantic diversity - hindering the development of robust and generalizable attribution models. To address these limitations, we introduce ImageAttributionBench, a comprehensive dataset comprising images synthesized by a wide array of advanced generative models with state-of-the-art (SOTA) architectures. Covering multiple real-world semantic domains, the dataset offers rich diversity and scale to support and accelerate progress in image attribution research. To simulate real-world attribution scenarios, we evaluate several SOTA attribution methods on ImageAttributionBench under two challenging settings: (1) training on a standard balanced split and testing on degraded images, and (2) training and testing on semantically disjoint splits. In both cases, current methods exhibit consistently poor performance, revealing significant limitations in their robustness and generalization to unseen semantic content. Our work provides a rigorous benchmark to facilitate the development and evaluation of future image attribution methods.

Formal Conjectures: An Open and Evolving Benchmark for Verified Discovery in Mathematics

Medium 2605.13171
Moritz Firsching, Paul Lezeau, Salvatore Mercuri, Miklós Z. Horváth, Yaël Dillies, Calle Sönne, Eric Wieser, Fred Zhang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：一个包含 2615 个 Lean 4 形式化数学问题的开放基准，用于评估自动推理系统，已有 AI 解决开放猜想。
🎯研究动机

自动推理系统快速发展，但缺乏研究级形式化数学问题来准确评估其能力。

❓解决问题

构建一个开放、可演进的基准，包含研究级形式化数学问题，用于评估自动推理和证明发现能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

从活跃数学研究领域收集问题，用 Lean 4 形式化，包含开放猜想和已解决问题，提供结构化接口连接数学家和 AI 系统，并通过社区贡献和 AI 生成证明 / 反证来确保正确性。

📊实验结果

在冻结评估子集上报告了基线结果，显示可攀登的信号。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出了一个包含 2615 个形式化数学问题的开放基准，其中 1029 个为开放研究猜想，836 个为已解决问题。
  • 提供了标准化评估设置和基线结果，展示了自动推理在数学研究中的当前前沿。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准规模可能仍有限，覆盖的数学领域不够全面。
  • 形式化过程依赖社区贡献，可能存在不一致性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As automated reasoning systems advance rapidly, there is a growing need for research-level formal mathematical problems to accurately evaluate their capabilities. To address this, we present Formal Conjectures, an evolving benchmark of currently 2615 mathematical problem statements formalized in Lean 4. Sourced from areas of active mathematical research, the dataset features 1029 open research conjectures providing a zero-contamination benchmark for mathematical proof discovery, and 836 solved problems for proof autoformalization. Notably, the repository provides a structured interface connecting mathematicians who formalize and clarify problems with the AI systems and humans attempting to solve them. Demonstrating its immediate utility, the benchmark has already been leveraged to make new mathematical discoveries, including the resolution of open research conjectures. We describe our approach to ensuring the correctness of these formalizations in a collaborative open-source project where contributions stem from an active community. In this framework, AI-generated proofs and disproofs serve as a valuable auditing mechanism to iteratively improve the fidelity of the benchmark. Finally, we provide a standardized evaluation setup and report baseline results on frozen evaluation subsets, demonstrating a climbable signal that measures the current frontier of automated reasoning on research-level mathematics.

IndicMedDialog: A Parallel Multi-Turn Medical Dialogue Dataset for Accessible Healthcare in Indic Languages

Medium 2605.13292
Shubham Kumar Nigam, Suparnojit Sarkar, Piyush Patel
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：构建并行多轮医疗对话数据集 IndicMedDialog，覆盖英语和 9 种印度语言，并微调小语言模型实现多轮症状询问。
🎯研究动机

现有医疗对话系统多为单轮问答或模板数据集，缺乏对话真实性和多语言适用性，难以服务印度多语言人群。

❓解决问题

缺乏高质量、多语言、多轮医疗对话数据集，以及适应低资源语言的多轮症状询问模型。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于 MDDial 扩展 LLM 生成合成咨询，经 TranslateGemma 翻译、母语者验证和脚本感知后处理流水线校正错误；使用量化小语言模型进行参数高效微调，融入患者预上下文实现个性化多轮症状询问。

📊实验结果

在零样本多语言基线上评估，进行跨 10 种语言的系统错误分析，并通过医学专家评估验证临床合理性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了覆盖英语和 9 种印度语言的并行多轮医疗对话数据集 IndicMedDialog
  • 提出 IndicMedLM 模型，通过参数高效微调实现多轮症状询问，并验证了临床合理性
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集依赖 LLM 生成和机器翻译，可能存在领域偏差
  • 仅针对 9 种印度语言，泛化到其他低资源语言需进一步验证
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Most existing medical dialogue systems operate in a single-turn question--answering paradigm or rely on template-based datasets, limiting conversational realism and multilingual applicability. We introduce IndicMedDialog, a parallel multi-turn medical dialogue dataset spanning English and nine Indic languages: Assamese, Bengali, Gujarati, Hindi, Marathi, Punjabi, Tamil, Telugu, and Urdu. The dataset extends MDDial with LLM-generated synthetic consultations, translated using TranslateGemma, verified by native speakers, and refined through a script-aware post-processing pipeline to correct phonetic, lexical, and character-spacing errors. Building on this dataset, we fine-tune IndicMedLM via parameter-efficient adaptation of a quantized small language model, incorporating optional patient pre-context to personalise multi-turn symptom elicitation. We evaluate against zero-shot multilingual baselines, conduct systematic error analysis across ten languages, and validate clinical plausibility through medical expert evaluation.

SpurAudio: A Benchmark for Studying Shortcut Learning in Few-Shot Audio Classification

Medium 2605.13672
Giries Abu Ayoub, Morad Tukan, Loay Mualem
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：SpurAudio 基准揭示少样本音频分类中模型易受背景虚假相关影响，即使大模型也无法幸免。
🎯研究动机

少样本分类常假设目标概念独立于上下文，但真实场景中背景信号可能引入虚假相关，图像领域已有研究，音频领域尚缺乏可控基准。

❓解决问题

现有音频基准无法控制上下文结构，难以评估少样本音频分类模型对背景虚假相关的鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

许多先进少样本方法在背景相关被破坏时性能严重下降，即使大型预训练音频基础模型也脆弱，且不同方法对虚假相关的敏感度差异显著。

🛠️主要方法

构建 SpurAudio 基准，利用音频中前景事件与背景环境的自然可分离性，实现支持集与查询集之间上下文偏移的多级可控评估。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SpurAudio 基准，用于系统评估少样本音频分类中的捷径学习。
  • 发现多种少样本方法在背景相关变化时性能大幅下降，且大模型也无法避免。
  • 揭示不同方法对虚假相关的敏感度差异，与特征表示和分类器头的交互有关。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准可能仅覆盖特定类型的背景环境，泛化性有限。
  • 未提供缓解虚假相关的具体方法。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Few-shot classification (FSC) is widely used for learning from limited labeled data, yet most evaluations implicitly assume that target concepts are independent of contextual cues. In real-world settings, however, examples often appear within rich contexts, allowing models to exploit spurious correlations between foreground content and background signals. While such effects have been studied in few-shot image classification, their role in few-shot audio classification remains largely unexplored, and existing audio benchmarks offer limited control over contextual structure. We introduce SpurAudio, a benchmark that leverages the natural separability of foreground events and background environments in audio to enable controlled, multi-level evaluation of contextual shifts across support and query sets. Using this benchmark, we show that many state-of-the-art few-shot methods suffer severe performance degradation when background correlations are disrupted, despite achieving similar accuracy under standard evaluation protocols. Crucially, this vulnerability persists even in large pretrained audio foundation models, ruling out limited backbone capacity as an explanation. Moreover, methods that appear comparable under conventional benchmarks can exhibit markedly different sensitivity to spurious correlations, revealing systematic algorithmic strengths and vulnerabilities tied to how feature representations interact with classifier heads at inference time. These findings provide new insight into the behavior of few-shot methods in audio and highlight the need for benchmarks that explicitly probe context dependence when evaluating FSC models.

No One Knows the State of the Art in Geospatial Foundation Models

Medium 2605.12678
Isaac Corley, Nils Lehmann, Caleb Robinson, Gabriel Tseng, Anthony Fuller, Hamed Alemohammad, Evan Shelhamer, Jennifer Marcus et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：地理空间基础模型领域缺乏标准化评估，导致无人知晓当前最优模型。
🎯研究动机

地理空间基础模型在灾害响应、土地覆盖制图等任务中具有重要应用价值，但现有文献缺乏标准化评估和比较，阻碍了领域进展。

❓解决问题

地理空间基础模型领域缺乏统一的评估标准、训练协议、权重发布和预训练控制，导致无法比较或排名不同模型。

🔎现象分析

通过对 152 篇论文的审计，发现 46 次跨论文分歧（同一模型、基准和协议下至少 10 个百分点的差异），94/126 篇论文使用独特配置，39% 的论文未发布模型权重。

🛠️主要方法

提出六项具体期望：命名许可权重发布、共享核心评估、复制与重跑基线标注、方差报告、共享评估框架、数据 - 架构 - 算法控制。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但包含对 152 篇论文的审计分析。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统审计并量化了地理空间基础模型领域缺乏标准化的问题
  • 提出六项具体可操作的标准化期望以推动领域进步
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提供具体实验验证所提期望的有效性
  • 可能面临社区采纳的协调困难
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Geospatial foundation models (GFMs) have been proposed as generalizable backbones for disaster response, land-cover mapping, food-security monitoring, and other high-stakes Earth-observation tasks. Yet the published work about these models does not give reviewers or users enough information to tell which model fits a given task. We argue that nobody knows what the current state of the art is in geospatial foundation models. The methods may be useful, but the GFM literature does not standardize evaluations, training and testing protocols, released weights, or pretraining controls well enough for anyone to compare or rank them. In a 152-paper audit, we find 46 cross-paper disagreements of at least 10 points for the same model, benchmark, and protocol; 94/126 papers with extractable pretraining data use a configuration no other paper uses; and 39% of GFM papers release no model weights. This lack of community standards can be solved. We propose six concrete expectations: named-license weight release, shared core evaluations, copied-versus-rerun baseline annotations, variance reporting, one shared evaluation harness, and data-vs-architecture-vs-algorithm controls. These gaps are a coordination failure, not a fault of any individual lab; the authors of this paper, like many others in the GFM community, have contributed to them. Rather than just critiquing the community, we aim to provide concrete steps toward a shared understanding of how to innovate GFMs.

PERCEIVE: A Benchmark for Personalized Emotion and Communication Behavior Understanding on Social Media

Medium 2605.12525
Jian Liao, Yujin Zheng, Suge Wang, Jianxing Zheng, Deyu Li
arXiv PDF cs.SI
TL;DR：首个整合作者内容、读者情感反馈、沟通行为、用户属性和社交图的双语基准 PERCEIVE，推动社交媒体情感分析从作者中心转向读者中心。
🎯研究动机

当前社交媒体情感分析以作者为中心，忽略了不同读者对同一内容的主观情感反应差异，且缺乏对个体感知、沟通行为与社交网络之间关联的建模。

❓解决问题

缺乏一个能够整合读者情感反馈、沟通行为、用户属性和社交图的多维度基准，以支持个性化、读者中心的情感分析。

🔎现象分析

现有方法（包括 LLM）在处理这种多维度、用户感知的任务时存在显著不足。

🛠️主要方法

构建 PERCEIVE 双语基准，包含作者内容、读者评论情感标注、沟通意图、用户属性和社交图五个维度，并设计综合评估协议测试现有方法。

📊实验结果

在 PERCEIVE 基准上测试了包括 LLM 在内的多种方法，发现现有方法在处理该任务时存在显著不足。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出整合五个关键维度的双语大规模基准 PERCEIVE，支持个性化读者中心的情感分析。
  • 通过评估现有方法（包括 LLM）揭示其在多维度用户感知任务上的不足，为未来研究提供方向。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准可能受限于社交媒体平台的数据偏差。
  • 情感标注依赖读者评论，可能无法覆盖所有情感反应。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Current emotion analysis in social media is predominantly author-centric, failing to capture the subjective nature of emotional responses across diverse readers. This paradigm overlooks the crucial link between individual perception, communication behavior, and the underlying social network. To bridge this gap, we introduce PERCEIVE, a novel bilingual (English and Chinese) large-scale benchmark that, to the best of our knowledge, is the first to integrate five critical dimensions for social perception: author-created content, genuine readers' emotional feedback (derived from their comments), communication behavior, user attributes, and the social graph. This benchmark enables a paradigm shift towards truly personalized, reader-centric analysis, where different readers' emotional responses to the same content are naturally captured through their real-world interactions. By annotating emotions from reader comments and synchronously capturing communication intent, PERCEIVE provides a unique resource to model the intrinsic coupling between emotion and behavior, grounded in social context. We establish a comprehensive evaluation protocol, testing state-of-the-art methods, including large language models (LLMs) with advanced reasoning enhancement. Our findings reveal significant shortcomings in existing approaches when handling this multifaceted, user-aware task. PERCEIVE offers a foundational resource and clear direction for future research in socially-intelligent NLP, pushing models towards a more unified understanding of emotion on social media.

视觉理解基准 6 篇

CiteVQA: Benchmarking Evidence Attribution for Trustworthy Document Intelligence

High 2605.12882
Dongsheng Ma, Jiayu Li, Zhengren Wang, Yijie Wang, Jiahao Kong, Weijun Zeng, Jutao Xiao, Jie Yang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出 CiteVQA 基准，要求模型同时输出答案和证据引用，揭示多模态大模型在文档问答中普遍存在“归因幻觉”。
🎯研究动机

现有 Doc-VQA 评估仅关注答案正确性，忽略了模型可能基于错误证据得出正确答案的风险，这在法律、金融、医疗等高风险领域是不可接受的。

❓解决问题

缺乏同时评估答案正确性和证据引用准确性的文档问答基准，导致模型归因错误被掩盖。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到“归因幻觉”现象：模型经常给出正确答案但引用错误区域，且开源模型与闭源模型性能差距巨大。

🛠️主要方法

构建 CiteVQA 基准，包含 1,897 个问题、711 份 PDF，通过掩码消融自动生成证据标注并经专家审核；提出严格归因准确率（SAA）联合评估答案和引用。

📊实验结果

对 20 个 MLLM 进行审计，最强系统 Gemini-3.1-Pro-Preview 的 SAA 仅 76.0，最强开源模型仅 22.5。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CiteVQA 基准，首次在文档 VQA 中要求元素级边界框引用并联合评估。
  • 揭示多模态大模型普遍存在的归因幻觉，并建立 SAA 指标量化可靠性差距。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准规模有限（1,897 问题），可能无法覆盖所有文档类型。
  • 自动标注流程可能引入噪声，尽管经专家审核。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have significantly advanced document understanding, yet current Doc-VQA evaluations score only the final answer and leave the supporting evidence unchecked. This answer-only approach masks a critical failure mode: a model can land on the correct answer while grounding it in the wrong passage -- a critical risk in high-stakes domains like law, finance, and medicine, where every conclusion must be traceable to a specific source region. To address this, we introduce CiteVQA, a benchmark that requires models to return element-level bounding-box citations alongside each answer, evaluating both jointly. CiteVQA comprises 1,897 questions across 711 PDFs spanning seven domains and two languages, averaging 40.6 pages per document. To ensure fidelity and scalability, the ground-truth citations are generated by an automated pipeline-which identifies crucial evidence via masking ablation-and are subsequently validated through expert review. At the core of our evaluation is Strict Attributed Accuracy (SAA), which credits a prediction only when the answer and the cited region are both correct. Auditing 20 MLLMs reveals a pervasive Attribution Hallucination: models frequently produce the right answer while citing the wrong region. The strongest system (Gemini-3.1-Pro-Preview) achieves an SAA of only 76.0, and the strongest open-source MLLM reaches just 22.5. Ultimately, towards trustworthy document intelligence, CiteVQA exposes a reliability gap that answer-only evaluations overlook, providing the instrumentation needed to close it. Our repository is available at this https URL .

Edit-Compass & EditReward-Compass: A Unified Benchmark for Image Editing and Reward Modeling

High 2605.13062
Xuehai Bai, Yang Shi, Yi-Fan Zhang, Xuanyu Zhu, Yuran Wang, Yifan Dai, Xinyu Liu, Yiyan Ji et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出统一基准 Edit-Compass 和 EditReward-Compass，分别用于图像编辑模型和奖励模型的细粒度评估。
🎯研究动机

现有图像编辑基准任务难度有限、评估粒度粗，无法真实反映人类判断；奖励模型基准评估设置不现实，偏离实际 RL 场景。

❓解决问题

缺乏能可靠评估图像编辑模型和奖励模型的统一基准。

🔎现象分析

现有基准对强前沿模型区分度不足，奖励模型评估场景与 RL 优化脱节。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 2,388 个标注实例的 Edit-Compass（六类渐进难度任务，细粒度多维评估框架）和 2,251 个偏好对的 EditReward-Compass（模拟 RL 优化场景）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个统一评估套件，同时覆盖图像编辑模型和奖励模型。
  • 引入细粒度多维评估框架，基于结构化推理和评分规则。
  • 构建模拟真实 RL 场景的奖励模型基准。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准规模可能有限，覆盖场景不够全面。
  • 评估框架的泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent image editing models have achieved remarkable progress in instruction following, multimodal understanding, and complex visual editing. However, existing benchmarks often fail to faithfully reflect human judgment, especially for strong frontier models, due to limited task difficulty and coarse-grained evaluation protocols. In parallel, reward models have become increasingly important for RL-based image editing optimization, yet existing reward model benchmarks still rely on unrealistic evaluation settings that deviate from practical RL scenarios. These limitations hinder reliable assessment of both image editing models and reward models. To address these challenges, we introduce Edit-Compass and EditReward-Compass, a unified evaluation suite for image editing and reward modeling. Edit-Compass contains 2,388 carefully annotated instances spanning six progressively challenging task categories, covering capabilities such as world knowledge reasoning, visual reasoning, and multi-image editing. Beyond broad task coverage, Edit-Compass adopts a fine-grained multidimensional evaluation framework based on structured reasoning and carefully designed scoring rubrics. In parallel, EditReward-Compass contains 2,251 preference pairs that simulate realistic reward modeling scenarios during RL optimization.

FIKA-Bench: From Fine-grained Recognition to Fine-Grained Knowledge Acquisition

High 2605.13193
Geng Li, Yuxin Peng
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 FIKA-Bench 基准，评估多模态模型在细粒度知识获取任务上的表现，发现最佳系统仅达 25.1% 准确率，工具增强不足以解决该挑战。
🎯研究动机

现有基准主要评估视觉识别能力，忽略了主动获取外部证据以回答细粒度开放问题的能力，而人类在面对不熟悉物体时会主动搜索和验证信息。

❓解决问题

系统需要主动搜索、验证并使用外部证据来回答开放式的细粒度识别问题，现有模型和基准缺乏对此能力的评估。

🔎现象分析

最佳系统仅达 25.1% 准确率，无模型超过 30%；仅配备工具不足以弥补差距，失败主要由错误实体检索和视觉判断不佳导致。

🛠️主要方法

构建 FIKA-Bench 基准，包含 311 个公开来源和真实生活实例，通过泄漏感知过滤和证据审计确保质量，评估最新 LMM 和智能体。

📊实验结果

评估了最新大型多模态模型和智能体，最佳系统准确率 25.1%，无模型超过 30%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出细粒度知识获取任务，要求系统主动搜索、验证并使用外部证据回答开放问题。
  • 构建 FIKA-Bench 基准，包含 311 个泄漏感知、证据支持的实例。
  • 揭示当前 LMM 和智能体在该任务上的严重不足，最佳准确率仅 25.1%，并分析失败原因。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准规模较小（311 个实例），可能不足以覆盖所有细粒度场景。
  • 未提供具体模型列表或详细实验设置。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Fine-grained recognition in everyday life is often not a closed-book classification problem: when encountering unfamiliar objects, humans actively search, compare visual details, and verify evidence before deciding. Existing benchmarks primarily evaluate visually recognition, leaving this active external knowledge acquisition ability underexplored. We study fine-grained knowledge acquisition, where a system must seek, verify, and use external evidence to answer open-ended fine-grained recognition questions. We introduce FIKA-Bench, a leakage-aware and evidence-grounded collection of 311 public-source and real-life instances. To ensure high quality, every example is filtered against frontier closed-book models to remove memorized cases and audited to eliminate image-answer leakage, retaining only samples supported by verified evidence. Our evaluation of latest Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) and agents reveals that the task remains a formidable challenge: the best system reaches only 25.1% accuracy, with no model exceeding 30%. Crucially, we find that merely equipping models with tools is insufficient to bridge this gap; agent failures are predominantly driven by wrong entity retrieval and poor visual judgement. These results show that reliable knowledge acquisition needs better agent designs that focus on fine-grained recognition.

KamonBench: A Grammar-Based Dataset for Evaluating Compositional Factor Recovery in Vision-Language Models

High 2605.13322
Richard Sproat, Stefano Peluchetti
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：KamonBench 是一个基于文法的图像到结构基准，用于评估视觉语言模型在稀疏组合视觉识别中的成分因子恢复能力。
🎯研究动机

组合视觉识别是视觉语言模型的关键能力，但现有基准难以精确评估模型对组合成分（如容器、修饰符、主题）的恢复能力，缺乏可控的测试环境。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个能够精确评估视觉语言模型在稀疏组合视觉识别中因子恢复能力的基准数据集。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于文法生成 20,000 个合成复合家纹图像，每个图像关联形式化描述语言、日语分析、英语翻译和程序代码，支持多种因子恢复评估指标。

📊实验结果

摘要提供了基线实验结果，包括 ViT 编码器 /Transformer 解码器和两种 VGG n-gram 解码器，带或不带学习的位置掩码。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 KamonBench，一个包含 20,000 个合成复合家纹的语法驱动图像到结构基准。
  • 提供多种评估指标：程序代码因子度量、因子对重组分割、反事实主题敏感性组和线性探针。
  • 提供基线结果，包括 ViT 编码器 /Transformer 解码器和 VGG n-gram 解码器。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集仅基于日本家纹，可能缺乏跨文化泛化性。
  • 合成图像可能无法完全模拟真实世界的视觉复杂性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Kamon (family crests) are an important part of Japanese culture and a natural test case for compositional visual recognition: each crest combines a small number of symbolic choices, but the space of possible descriptions is sparse. We introduce KamonBench, a grammar-based image-to-structure benchmark with 20,000 synthetic composite crests and auxiliary component examples. Each composite crest is paired with a formal kamon description language - "kamon yōgo" - description, a segmented Japanese analysis, an English translation, and a non-linguistic program code. Because each synthetic crest is generated from known factors, namely container, modifier, and motif, KamonBench supports evaluation beyond caption-level accuracy: direct program-code factor metrics, controlled factor-pair recombination splits, counterfactual motif-sensitivity groups under fixed container-modifier contexts, and linear probes of factor accessibility. We include baseline results for a ViT encoder/Transformer decoder and two VGG n-gram decoders, with and without learned positional masks. KamonBench therefore provides a controlled testbed for sparse compositional visual recognition and factor recovery in vision-language models.

MMCL-Bench: Multimodal Context Learning from Visual Rules, Procedures, and Evidence

High 2605.12703
Yifan Chen, Fei Yin, Qingyan Bai, Zicheng Lin, Yujiu Yang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：MMCL-Bench 评估多模态模型在视觉规则、流程和证据上的上下文学习能力，发现当前最强模型在严格评估下解决率不足三分之一。
🎯研究动机

现有基准主要关注文本上下文学习或标准多模态问答，缺乏对多模态上下文学习（从视觉或混合模态教学上下文中学习规则、流程和经验模式）的系统评估，而这是多模态模型实际应用中的关键能力瓶颈。

❓解决问题

多模态模型在从视觉规则、流程和证据中学习并应用于新实例时表现不佳，缺乏统一的评估基准和诊断分析。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出失败贯穿上下文到答案的整个流程，包括上下文锚定、视觉证据提取、上下文推理和响应构建。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 102 个任务的 MMCL-Bench 基准，涵盖规则系统应用、流程任务执行和经验发现归纳三类，采用严格基于评分标准的评估方法。

📊实验结果

在多个前沿多模态模型上使用严格评分标准进行评估，最强模型解决率不足三分之一，并进行了诊断消融和错误分析。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出多模态上下文学习的新基准 MMCL-Bench，包含 102 个任务和三类场景。
  • 系统评估前沿多模态模型，揭示其在多模态上下文学习中的严重不足。
  • 通过诊断消融和错误分析，识别出上下文锚定、视觉证据提取等关键失败环节。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准任务可能未覆盖所有多模态上下文学习场景。
  • 评估仅基于现有模型，未来模型可能改进。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce MMCL-Bench, a benchmark for multimodal context learning: learning task-local rules, procedures, and empirical patterns from visual or mixed-modality teaching context and applying them to new visual instances. Unlike text-only context learning or standard multimodal question answering, this setting requires models to recover and localize relevant evidence from images, screenshots, manuals, videos, and frame sequences before they can reason over the learned context. MMCL-Bench contains 102 tasks spanning three categories: rule system application, procedural task execution, and empirical discovery and induction. We evaluate frontier multimodal models with strict rubric-based scoring and find that current systems remain far from robust multimodal context learning, with even the strongest model solving fewer than one-third of tasks under strict evaluation. Diagnostic ablations and error analysis show that failures arise throughout the context-to-answer pipeline, including context anchoring, visual evidence extraction, context reasoning, and response construction. MMCL-Bench thus highlights multimodal context learning as an important unsolved capability bottleneck for current multimodal models.

PhysEditBench: A Protocol-Conditioned Benchmark for Dense Physical-Map Prediction with Image Editors

Medium 2605.13493
Jiaxin Yang, Yu Hou, Muxin Liu, Weixuan Liu, Ze Yuan, Zeming Chen, Zhongrui Wang, Xiaojuan Qi
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 PhysEditBench 基准，评估通用图像编辑器在物理图预测任务上的表现。
🎯研究动机

通用图像编辑器与专用密集预测模型不同，它们不直接输出物理图，而需通过提示或示例引导，但目前缺乏标准化评估方法。

❓解决问题

如何标准化评估通用图像编辑器在深度、法向、反照率、粗糙度和金属度五种物理图预测上的性能。

🔎现象分析

专用模型在深度、法向和反照率上仍显著更强；更强图像编辑器能生成更合理的类图输出；对于粗糙度和金属度，图像编辑器在某些标量指标上可匹配或超越专用基线，但仍存在结构错误、稀疏效应和光照敏感性。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含五种物理图目标的基准，使用 OpenRooms-FF、InteriorVerse 和程序生成数据，经质量检查、有效区域掩码、场景级采样和光照压力子集筛选，为每个目标定义固定协议（允许输入、输出格式和评分流程）。

📊实验结果

在深度、法向、反照率、粗糙度和金属度上比较通用图像编辑器与专用基线，摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PhysEditBench，首个协议条件化的物理图预测基准，覆盖五种目标。
  • 构建高质量、多样化的评估数据集，包含光照压力子集。
  • 通过实验揭示通用图像编辑器与专用模型的性能差距及失败模式。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖五种物理图，可能不全面。
  • 协议固定可能限制模型最佳性能的展现。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Can general-purpose image editors predict physical maps from a single RGB image? General-purpose image editors differ from standard task-specific dense-prediction models: they do not directly take an image and output a physical map. Instead, they must be guided by prompts, examples, or image-based textual cues. To this end, we introduce PhysEditBench, a novel protocol-conditioned benchmark to evaluate and standardize image editors in dense physical-map prediction that covers five targets: depth, normal, albedo, roughness, and metallic maps. For evaluation data, we build a target-dependent benchmark substrate. We use OpenRooms-FF for depth, surface normal, albedo, and roughness, InteriorVerse as an additional source for depth, normal, albedo, and a new procedurally generated source for metallic maps. We curate the data with quality checks, valid-region masks, scene-level sampling, and lighting-based stress subsets to ensure reliable and diverse evaluation. For each target, PhysEditBench defines a fixed protocol that specifies the allowed input, expected output format, and scoring procedure. Each score, therefore, reflects the performance of a model under a specified protocol, rather than its best possible performance under all prompts or interaction modes. Experimental results show that specialized models remain much stronger on depth, normal, and albedo, and stronger image editors can produce more reasonable map-like outputs. For roughness and metallic, image editors can match or outperform specialized baselines on some scalar metrics, but they still suffer from structural errors, sparsity effects, and sensitivity to lighting.

Agent/工具使用评测 5 篇

AgentLens: Revealing The Lucky Pass Problem in SWE-Agent Evaluation

High 2605.12925
Priyam Sahoo, Gaurav Mittal, Xiaomin Li, Shengjie Ma, Benjamin Steenhoek, Pingping Lin, Yu Hu
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：SWE-Agent 评估中 10.7% 的通过轨迹存在“幸运通过”问题，AgentLens 通过过程级评估揭示并量化了这一现象。
🎯研究动机

当前 SWE-Agent 评估仅依赖最终补丁是否通过测试的二元信号，忽略了解决方案的质量差异，导致对模型能力的误判。

❓解决问题

解决 SWE-Agent 评估中通过轨迹可能包含低质量“幸运通过”行为的问题，需要过程级评估方法。

🔎现象分析

摘要发现 10.7% 的通过轨迹存在 Lucky Pass 行为，包括回归循环、盲目重试、缺少验证或时间顺序混乱的探索 / 实现 / 验证过程。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AgentLens 框架，通过构建任务级前缀树接受器（PTA）参考和上下文敏感意图标注器，对轨迹进行过程级质量评估。

📊实验结果

在 8 个模型后端、60 个 SWE-bench Verified 任务上评估 2614 条 OpenHands 轨迹，Lucky 率从 0.5% 到 23.2% 不等，质量评分导致排名变化。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了 SWE-Agent 评估中 Lucky Pass 问题，并量化其发生率（10.7%）
  • 发布 AgentLens-Bench 数据集，包含 1815 条带质量标注的轨迹和 47 个任务级 PTA 参考
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于 SWE-bench Verified 任务，可能不适用于其他软件工程场景
  • PTA 参考构建依赖多个通过轨迹，对只有少量通过轨迹的任务可能不适用
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Evaluation of software engineering (SWE) agents is dominated by a binary signal: whether the final patch passes the tests. This outcome-only view treats a principled solution and a chaotic trial-and-error process as equivalent. We show that this equivalence is empirically false. We evaluate 2,614 OpenHands trajectories from eight model backends on 60 SWE-bench Verified tasks. Of these, 47 have enough passing trajectories to construct task-level process references, yielding a 1,815-trajectory evaluation subset. Among passing trajectories in this subset, 10.7% exhibit behavior we call a Lucky Pass: regression cycles, blind retries, missing verification, or temporally disordered exploration, implementation, and verification. We introduce AgentLens, a framework for process-level assessment of SWE-agent trajectories, and release AgentLens-Bench, a dataset of 1,815 trajectories annotated with quality scores, waste signals, divergence points, and 47 task-level Prefix Tree Acceptor (PTA) references. AgentLens builds PTA references by merging multiple passing solutions for the same task, and uses a context-sensitive intent labeler to assign actions to Exploration, Implementation, Verification, or Orchestration based on trajectory history rather than tool identity alone. On AgentLens-Bench, the quality score separates passing trajectories into Lucky, Solid, and Ideal tiers and further decomposes Lucky Passes into five recurring mechanisms. Across the eight model backends, Lucky rates range from 0.5% to 23.2%, and some models move by as many as five rank positions when ranked by quality score instead of pass rate. We release the anonymized project repository, including the AgentLens-Bench dataset and AgentLens SDK, at this https URL .

RealICU: Do LLM Agents Understand Long-Context ICU Data? A Benchmark Beyond Behavior Imitation

High 2605.13542
Chengzhi Shen, Weixiang Shen, Tobias Susetzky, Chen (Cherise) Chen, Jun Li, Yuyuan Liu, Xuepeng Zhang, Zhenyu Gong et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 ICU 临床决策基准 RealICU，发现 LLM 存在记忆 - 安全权衡与锚定偏差两大失败模式。
🎯研究动机

ICU 产生长序列、高密度的临床数据，现有基准将历史医生行为视为黄金标准，但这些行为基于不完整信息，可能次优，难以评估 AI 真实推理能力。

❓解决问题

缺乏一个基于事后回顾标注的、能真实评估 LLM 在 ICU 长上下文下推理能力的基准。

🔎现象分析

现有 LLM 在 RealICU 上表现差，暴露两个失败模式：临床建议中的记忆 - 安全权衡，以及对患者早期解释的锚定偏差。

🛠️主要方法

构建 RealICU 基准，包含四个医生驱动的任务（评估患者状态、急性问题、推荐行动、危险行动），并引入 ICU-Evo 研究结构化记忆智能体。

📊实验结果

在 RealICU 上评估了多种 LLM（包括记忆增强型），发现性能不佳，并验证了失败模式。ICU-Evo 改善了推理但未完全消除安全失败。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 RealICU，一个事后回顾标注的 ICU 基准，包含两个数据集（RealICU-Gold 和 RealICU-Scale）。
  • 揭示 LLM 在长上下文 ICU 数据中的两个失败模式：记忆 - 安全权衡和锚定偏差。
  • 引入 ICU-Evo 框架，改进结构化记忆智能体的长程推理能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集规模有限（94 名患者），可能不覆盖所有 ICU 场景。
  • ICU-Evo 未能完全消除安全失败，仍需进一步改进。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Intensive care units (ICU) generate long, dense and evolving streams of clinical information, where physicians must repeatedly reassess patient states under time pressure, underscoring a clear need for reliable AI decision support. Existing ICU benchmarks typically treat historical clinician actions as ground truth. However, these actions are made under incomplete information and limited temporal context of the underlying patient state, and may therefore be suboptimal, making it difficult to assess the true reasoning capabilities of AI systems. We introduce RealICU, a hindsight-annotated benchmark for evaluating large language models (LLMs) under realistic ICU conditions, where labels are created after senior physicians review the full patient trajectory. We formulate four physician-motivated tasks: assess Patient Status, Acute Problems, Recommended Actions, and Red Flag actions that risk unsafe outcomes. We partition each trajectory with 30-min windows and release two datasets: RealICU-Gold with 930-window annotations from 94 MIMIC-IV patients, and RealICU-Scale with 11,862 windows extended by Oracle, a physician-validated LLM hindsight labeler. Existing LLMs including memory-augmented ones performed poorly on RealICU, exposing two failure modes: a recall-safety tradeoff for clinical recommendations, and an anchoring bias to early interpretations of the patient. We further introduce ICU-Evo to study structured-memory agents that improves long-horizon reasoning but does not fully eliminate safety failures. Together, RealICU provides a clinically grounded testbed for measuring and improving AI sequential decision-support in high-stakes care. Project page: this https URL

EVA-Bench: A New End-to-end Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents

High 2605.13841
Tara Bogavelli, Gabrielle Gauthier Melançon, Katrina Stankiewicz, Oluwanifemi Bamgbose, Fanny Riols, Hoang H. Nguyen, Raghav Mehndiratta, Lindsay Devon Brin et al.
arXiv PDF cs.SD
TL;DR：提出 EVA-Bench，一个端到端语音智能体评估框架，包含模拟对话生成和语音特定失败模式度量。
🎯研究动机

现有基准无法同时解决语音智能体评估中的两个核心挑战：生成逼真的模拟对话，以及全面衡量语音特有的失败模式。

❓解决问题

缺乏一个联合评估框架，能够同时处理模拟对话的真实性和语音质量的多维度度量。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

EVA-Bench 框架包含机器人间音频对话模拟与自动验证，以及两个复合指标 EVA-A（准确性）和 EVA-X（体验），覆盖任务完成、忠实度、语音保真度、对话进展、简洁性和轮次时序。

📊实验结果

在 12 个系统（涵盖三种架构）上评估，发现无系统同时在 EVA-A 和 EVA-X 的 pass@1 上超过 0.5；峰值与可靠性能差距大（中位数 0.44）；口音和噪声扰动暴露鲁棒性差距（均值最高 0.314）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出端到端语音智能体评估框架 EVA-Bench，包含模拟和度量两部分。
  • 引入两个复合指标 EVA-A 和 EVA-X，支持跨架构比较。
  • 提供 213 个企业场景、扰动测试套件和多种通过率测量。
  • 开源框架、评估套件和基准数据。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅覆盖三个企业领域，泛化性有限。
  • 复合指标可能无法完全捕捉所有语音交互细节。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Voice agents, artificial intelligence systems that conduct spoken conversations to complete tasks, are increasingly deployed across enterprise applications. However, no existing benchmark jointly addresses two core evaluation challenges: generating realistic simulated conversations, and measuring quality across the full scope of voice-specific failure modes. We present EVA-Bench, an end-to-end evaluation framework that addresses both. On the simulation side, EVA-Bench orchestrates bot-to-bot audio conversations over dynamic multi-turn dialogues, with automatic simulation validation that detects user simulator error and appropriately regenerates conversations before scoring. On the measurement side, EVA-Bench introduces two composite metrics: EVA-A (Accuracy), capturing task completion, faithfulness, and audio-level speech fidelity; and EVA-X (Experience), capturing conversation progression, spoken conciseness, and turn-taking timing. Both metrics apply to different agent architectures, enabling direct cross-architecture comparison. EVA-Bench includes 213 scenarios across three enterprise domains, a controlled perturbation suite for accent and noise robustness, and pass@1, pass@k, pass^k measurements that distinguish peak from reliable capability. Across 12 systems spanning all three architectures, we find: (1) no system simultaneously exceeds 0.5 on both EVA-A pass@1 and EVA-X pass@1; (2) peak and reliable performance diverge substantially (median pass@k - pass^k gap of 0.44 on EVA-A); and (3) accent and noise perturbations expose substantial robustness gaps, with effects varying across architectures, systems, and metrics (mean up to 0.314). We release the full framework, evaluation suite, and benchmark data under an open-source license.

Do Androids Dream of Breaking the Game? Systematically Auditing AI Agent Benchmarks with BenchJack

High 2605.12673
Hao Wang, Hanchen Li, Qiuyang Mang, Alvin Cheung, Koushik Sen, Dawn Song
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 BenchJack 自动化红队系统，系统审计 AI Agent 基准测试中的奖励黑客漏洞，发现 10 个流行基准测试中 219 个漏洞，并迭代修补将可攻击任务比例降至 10% 以下。
🎯研究动机

Agent 基准测试已成为评估前沿 AI 能力的事实标准，但奖励黑客（reward hacking）现象在未过拟合的前沿模型中自发出现，威胁基准测试的安全性和可信度。

❓解决问题

现有 Agent 基准测试缺乏安全设计，容易受到奖励黑客攻击，需要系统化的审计和修补方法。

🔎现象分析

奖励黑客行为在前沿模型中自发出现，无需过拟合；基准测试设计者未内化对抗性思维，导致评估管道存在安全漏洞。

🛠️主要方法

提出 BenchJack，一个自动化红队系统，利用编码代理以先知方式审计基准测试并识别奖励黑客漏洞；扩展为迭代生成 - 对抗管道，发现新漏洞并迭代修补。

📊实验结果

在 10 个流行 Agent 基准测试（涵盖软件工程、网页导航、桌面计算和终端操作）上评估 BenchJack，发现 219 个漏洞；迭代管道在四个基准测试上将可攻击任务比例降至 10% 以下。

⭐主要贡献
  • 从历史奖励黑客事件中归纳出八类重复漏洞模式，并编译成 Agent-Eval Checklist。
  • 开发 BenchJack 自动化红队系统，在 10 个流行 Agent 基准测试中发现 219 个漏洞，实现近完美分数而不解决任何任务。
  • 提出迭代生成 - 对抗管道，将可攻击任务比例从近 100% 降至 10% 以下，完全修补 WebArena 和 OSWorld。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于当前基准测试，对新设计的基准测试效果未知。
  • 迭代修补可能引入新的漏洞或降低基准测试的区分度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Agent benchmarks have become the de facto measure of frontier AI competence, guiding model selection, investment, and deployment. However, reward hacking, where agents maximize a score without performing the intended task, emerges spontaneously in frontier models without overfitting. We argue that benchmarks must be secure by design. From past incidents of reward hacks, we derive a taxonomy of eight recurring flaw patterns and compile them into the Agent-Eval Checklist for benchmark designers. We condense the insights into BenchJack, an automated red-teaming system that drives coding agents to audit benchmarks and identify possible reward-hacking exploits in a clairvoyant manner. Moreover, we extend BenchJack to an iterative generative-adversarial pipeline that discovers new flaws and patches them iteratively to improve benchmark robustness. We apply BenchJack to 10 popular agent benchmarks spanning software engineering, web navigation, desktop computing, and terminal operations. BenchJack synthesizes reward-hacking exploits that achieve near-perfect scores on most of the benchmarks without solving a single task, surfacing 219 distinct flaws across the eight classes. Moreover, BenchJack's extended pipeline reduces the hackable-task ratio from near 100% to under 10% on four benchmarks without fatal design flaws, fully patching WebArena and OSWorld within three iterations. Our results show that evaluation pipelines have not internalized an adversarial mindset, and that proactive auditing could help close the security gap for the fast-paced benchmarking space.

How to Interpret Agent Behavior

Medium 2605.13625
Jie Gao, Kaiser Sun, Jen-tse Huang, Katherine Van Koevering, Sijie Ji, Heyuan Huang, Weiyan Shi, Zhuoran Lu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 ACT*ONOMY 分类法，用于描述和分析自主智能体运行时行为，支持行为比较与故障模式识别。
🎯研究动机

自主智能体（如 Claude Code、Codex）运行时间长达数小时甚至数天，理解其运行时行为对诊断低效、修复错误和加强监督至关重要，但现有推理轨迹和执行轨迹数据为非结构化自然语言形式，难以大规模人工解读。

❓解决问题

缺乏统一的、结构化的方法来描述和分析自主智能体的运行时行为，导致行为比较和故障模式识别困难。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于扎根理论开发 ACT*ONOMY 分类法，包含三级层次结构（10 个动作、46 个子动作、120 个叶子类别），并构建开放仓库提供自动化分析流程和扩展协议。

📊实验结果

实验表明 ACT*ONOMY 能比较不同智能体的行为轮廓，并刻画单个智能体在不同轨迹中的行为，揭示故障模式。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ACT*ONOMY 分类法，为智能体行为提供共享词汇。
  • 构建开放仓库，包含自动化分析流程和扩展协议，支持行为比较和故障模式识别。
⚠️方法局限
  • 分类法可能无法覆盖所有智能体行为模式。
  • 自动化分析流程的准确性和泛化性有待进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Autonomous agents such as Claude Code and Codex now operate for hours or even days. Understanding their runtime behavior has become critical for downstream tasks such as diagnosing inefficiencies, fixing bugs, and ensuring better oversight. A primary way to gain this understanding is analyzing the reasoning trajectories and execution traces these agents generate. Yet such data remains in unstructured natural-language form, making it difficult for humans to interpret at scale. We introduce ACT*ONOMY (a combination of Action and Taxonomy), a taxonomy for describing and analyzing agent behavior at runtime. ACT*ONOMY has two components: (1) the taxonomy itself, developed through Grounded Theory and structured as a three-level hierarchy of 10 actions, 46 subactions, and 120 leaf categories; and (2) an open repository that hosts the living taxonomy, provides an automated analysis pipeline that applies it to agent trajectories analysis, and defines an extension protocol for customization and growth. Our experiments show that ACTONOMY can compare behavioral profiles across agents and characterize a single agent's behavior across diverse trajectories, surfacing patterns indicative of failure modes. By providing a shared vocabulary, ACT*ONOMY helps researchers, agent designers, and end users interpret agent behavior more consistently, enabling better oversight and control.

强化学习 12 篇 · 4 个细分

应用型 RL 6 篇

Q-Flow: Stable and Expressive Reinforcement Learning with Flow-Based Policy

High 2605.13435
JaeHyeok Doo, Byeongguk Jeon, Seonghyeon Ye, Kimin Lee, Minjoon Seo
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：Q-Flow 利用流模型的确定性动力学，通过将终端轨迹价值显式传播到中间潜状态，实现了稳定且富有表现力的强化学习策略优化。
🎯研究动机

流模型因其高表达能力被用作强化学习策略，但基于梯度的优化需要反向传播通过数值求解器，导致不稳定；现有方法通过限制表达能力来稳定优化，造成了稳定性与表达性之间的权衡。

❓解决问题

如何在不牺牲流模型表达能力的前提下，实现稳定且高效的策略优化。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，直接对基于流的策略进行梯度优化会导致不稳定性，而限制表达能力的方法虽然稳定但牺牲了灵活性。

🛠️主要方法

Q-Flow 利用流动力学的确定性，将终端轨迹价值显式传播到中间潜状态，从而使用中间价值梯度进行稳定策略优化，无需展开数值求解器。

📊实验结果

在离线学习设置下的 OGBench 套件上评估，Q-Flow 平均超越现有基线 10.6 个百分点，并展示了在线适应能力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Q-Flow 框架，通过价值传播实现稳定且富有表现力的基于流的策略优化。
  • 在离线学习设置下的 OGBench 套件上，平均超越现有基线 10.6 个百分点，并支持在线适应。
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未提及对连续动作空间或高维状态空间的扩展性。
  • 可能依赖于流模型的可逆性和计算效率。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

There is growing interest in utilizing flow-based models as decision-making policies in reinforcement learning due to their high expressive capacity. However, effectively leveraging this expressivity for value maximization remains challenging, as naive gradient-based optimization requires backpropagating through numerical solvers and often leads to instability. Existing approaches typically address this issue by restricting the expressive capacity of flow-based policies, resulting in a trade-off between optimization stability and representational flexibility. To resolve this, we introduce Q-Flow, a framework that leverages the deterministic nature of flow dynamics to explicitly propagate terminal trajectory value to intermediate latent states along the policy-induced flow. This formulation enables stable policy optimization using intermediate value gradients without unrolling the numerical solver, effectively bridging the gap between stability and expressivity. We evaluate Q-Flow in the offline learning setting on the challenging OGBench suite, where it consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by an average of 10.6 percentage points, while also enabling stable online adaptation within the same framework.

Self-Supervised On-Policy Reinforcement Learning via Contrastive Proximal Policy Optimisation

High 2605.13554
Asim Osman, Sasha Abramowitz, Mark Bergh, Ulrich Armel Mbou Sob, Ruan John de Kock, Omayma Mahjoub, Oussama Hidaoui, Noah De Nicola et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出首个基于策略的对比强化学习算法 CPPO，在无奖励函数条件下匹配甚至超越 PPO 性能。
🎯研究动机

现有对比强化学习（CRL）方法均采用离策略优化，且多局限于连续动作空间，与广泛使用的现代在策略训练流程脱节，限制了其在离散环境及多智能体场景中的应用。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个在策略的对比强化学习算法，使其能同时适用于连续 / 离散动作空间和单 / 多智能体任务，且无需手工奖励函数。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Contrastive Proximal Policy Optimisation (CPPO)，直接从对比 Q 值推导策略优势，并通过标准 PPO 目标进行优化，无需奖励函数或经验回放缓冲区。

📊实验结果

在连续 / 离散、单智能体 / 合作多智能体任务上评估，与 CRL 基线和 PPO 对比。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将在策略优化引入对比强化学习，弥合了 CRL 与主流在策略训练流程的差距。
  • CPPO 在 18 个任务中 14 个显著优于先前 CRL 基线，并在 12 个任务中匹配或超越使用手工稠密奖励的 PPO。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对超参数敏感，需进一步分析稳定性。
  • 未在更复杂或大规模环境中验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Contrastive reinforcement learning (CRL) learns goal-conditioned Q-values through a contrastive objective over state-action and goal representations, removing the need for hand-crafted reward functions. Despite impressive success in achieving viable self-supervised learning in RL, all existing CRL algorithms rely on off-policy optimisation and are mostly constrained to continuous action spaces, with little research invested in discrete environments. This leaves CRL disconnected from widely used and effective, modern on-policy training pipelines adopted across both single-agent and multi-agent RL in continuous and discrete environments. To establish a first connection, we introduce Contrastive Proximal Policy Optimisation (CPPO). CPPO is an on-policy contrastive RL algorithm that derives policy advantages directly from contrastive Q-values and optimises them via the standard PPO objective, without requiring a reward function or a replay buffer. We evaluate CPPO across continuous and discrete, single-agent and cooperative multi-agent tasks. Whilst the existence of an on-policy approach is inherently useful, we observe that \textbf{CPPO not only significantly outperforms the previous CRL baselines in 14 out of 18 tasks, but also matches or exceeds PPO's performance, which uses hand-crafted dense rewards, in 12 out of the 18 tasks tested.}

Learning Local Constraints for Reinforcement-Learned Content Generators

Medium 2605.13570
Debosmita Bhaumik, Julian Togelius, Georgios N. Yannakakis, Ahmed Khalifa
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：结合 WFC 局部约束与强化学习全局奖励，生成既美观又可玩的游戏关卡。
🎯研究动机

基于约束的游戏内容生成器（如 WFC）能生成视觉满意的关卡，但难以保证全局属性（如可玩性）；而强化学习训练的生成器能保证全局属性，但结果可能视觉上不满意。因此需要结合两者优势。

❓解决问题

如何将 WFC 学习的局部约束与强化学习生成器结合，以同时满足视觉质量和全局可玩性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

在 PCGRL 生成器的动作空间中施加 WFC 学习的局部约束，通过约束动作空间迫使生成器在满足局部约束的同时优化全局奖励。

📊实验结果

在 Lode Runner 关卡生成任务上测试，最佳生成器能产生视觉满意且可玩的关卡，但方法对超参数敏感。摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种混合内容生成方法，结合 WFC 局部约束与强化学习全局优化。
  • 通过改变输入数量和类型、随机坍缩初始状态、排除罕见模式等实验，分析了方法的工作机制。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法对超参数调优敏感。
  • 仅测试了单一游戏类型（Lode Runner），泛化性未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)
