Constraint-based game content generators that learn local constraints from existing content, such as Wave Function Collapse (WFC), can generate visually satisfying game levels but face challenges in guaranteeing global properties, such as playability. On the other hand, reinforcement-learning trained generators can guarantee global properties -- because such properties can easily be included in reward functions -- but the results can be visually dissatisfying. In this paper, we explore ways to combine these methods. Specifically, we constrain the action space of a PCGRL generator with constraints learned by WFC, effectively allowing the PCGRL generator to achieve global properties while forced to adhere to local constraints. To better analyze how this hybrid content generation method operates, we vary the number and type of inputs, and we test whether to randomly collapse the starting state and exclude rare patterns. While the method is sensitive to hyperparameter tuning, the best of our trained generators produce visually satisfying and playable puzzle-platform game levels -- such as Lode Runner levels -- with desired global properties.

Active Sensing with Meta-Reinforcement Learning for Emitter Localization from RF Observations

Medium 2605.12569
M. Shamail J. Khan, Nisha L. Raichur, Lucas Heublein, Christian Wielenberg, Alexander Mattick, Tobias Feigl, Christopher Mutschler, Felix Ott
arXiv PDF eess.SP
TL;DR：提出用元强化学习进行主动感知，从 RF 观测中定位 GNSS 干扰源，达到 80.1% 成功率。
🎯研究动机

GNSS 干扰严重威胁定位可靠性，尤其在室内和多径丰富的环境中，传统方法难以应对单快照测量的模糊性和信道变化。

❓解决问题

将 GNSS 干扰定位建模为部分可观测的主动感知问题，通过强化学习让智能体顺序探索环境，从 2x2 贴片天线的 RF 观测中推断发射源位置。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

结合高维 RF 感知、深度强化学习和循环策略学习，分别采用基于值（DQN）和基于策略（PPO）的方法，并在域迁移下研究其行为。

📊实验结果

在 Sionna 射线追踪模块生成的模拟数据集上评估，包含真实传播效应和多样环境配置，实验结果显示定位成功率为 80.1%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 将 GNSS 干扰定位形式化为主动感知问题，并提出强化学习框架。
  • 在 Sionna 射线追踪模拟数据集上验证，达到 80.1% 定位成功率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在模拟环境中验证，未在真实场景测试。
  • 未讨论计算开销和实时性要求。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Global navigation satellite system (GNSS) interference poses a serious threat to reliable positioning, especially in indoor and multipath-rich environments where source localization is highly challenging. In this paper, we formulate GNSS interference localization as an active sensing problem and propose a reinforcement learning (RL) framework in which an agent sequentially explores the environment to infer the position of an emitter source from radio frequency (RF) observations acquired with a 2x2 patch antenna. The localization task is modeled as a partially observable decision process, since single-snapshot measurements are often ambiguous under multipath propagation and changing channel conditions. To address this, the proposed framework combines high-dimensional RF sensing with deep RL and recurrent policy learning. We investigate both value-based and policy-based approaches, namely Deep Q-Networks (DQN) and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), and study their behavior under domain shift. The approach is evaluated on a simulated dataset generated with the Sionna ray-tracing module, which provides realistic propagation effects and diverse environment configurations. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves a localization success rate of 80.1%, demonstrating the potential of RL for adaptive GNSS interference localization. Overall, the results highlight simulation-assisted training as a promising direction for robust interference localization in challenging propagation environments.

Plan Before You Trade: Inference-Time Optimization for RL Trading Agents

Medium 2605.12653
Eun Go, Rohan Deb, Arindam Banerjee
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 FPILOT 框架，在推理时利用价格预测优化交易策略，无需重新训练即可提升 RL 交易代理的收益和风险调整指标。
🎯研究动机

现有 RL 交易代理通常作为静态策略部署，无法在推理时利用价格预测信息，限制了策略的适应性和性能。

❓解决问题

如何在不重新训练的情况下，让预训练的 RL 交易代理在推理时利用价格预测来优化交易决策。

🔎现象分析

未来价格大多不依赖于单个代理的投资组合分配，因此可以使用预测模型生成多步价格轨迹，无需像典型 RL 那样进行迭代动作条件 rollout。

🛠️主要方法

提出 FPILOT 框架，在推理时使用预测的价格轨迹构建基于分配的想象回报目标，优化策略后再执行一步交易。

📊实验结果

在 TradeMaster DJ30 基准上评估五种策略学习算法，FPILOT 在总收益和 Sharpe、Sortino、Calmar 比率上一致提升；使用合成预测显示收益随预测质量提高而改善。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种即插即用的推理时优化框架 FPILOT，兼容任何预训练交易代理。
  • 在 TradeMaster DJ30 基准上，FPILOT 在五种策略学习算法上一致提升了总收益和风险调整指标。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖预测模型的准确性，预测误差可能影响优化效果。
  • 仅适用于价格不依赖单个代理动作的场景，可能不适用于其他领域。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reinforcement learning agents for portfolio management are typically trained and deployed as static policies, with no mechanism for using price forecasts at inference time. We propose $\text{FPILOT}$ (**Fin**ancial **P**lugin **I**nference-time **L**earning for **O**ptimal **T**rading), a plugin inference-time optimization framework inspired by Model Predictive Control (MPC). Our key structural insight is that future prices mostly do not depend on one agent's portfolio allocation, so a suitable predictive model can produce a multi-step price trajectory without iterative action-conditioned rollouts as in typical reinforcement learning. At each decision step, we use the forecaster's predicted price trajectory to construct an allocation-based imagined return objective, and optimize the policy at inference-time before executing one step of the trade. Our framework is compatible with any pre-trained agent and adapts the policy to the forecaster's predictions without any retraining. Evaluated across five policy learning algorithms on the TradeMaster DJ30 benchmark, $\text{FPILOT}$ produces consistent improvements in total return and return-based risk-adjusted metrics (Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar), with stochastic policies benefiting more than deterministic ones. Further, using synthetic forecasts at calibrated quality levels, we show that gains consistently improve with forecaster quality, suggesting that our performance will improve based on advances in financial forecasting.

Adaptive Smooth Tchebycheff Attention for Multi-Objective Policy Optimization

Medium 2605.12771
Alejandro Murillo-Gonzalez, Mahmoud Ali, Lantao Liu
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出自适应平滑 Tchebycheff 框架，通过冲突驱动的动态平滑调节解决多目标强化学习中非凸 Pareto 前沿的优化稳定性问题。
🎯研究动机

多目标强化学习在机器人领域需要平衡复杂、非凸的冲突目标，线性标量化方法无法恢复非凸 Pareto 前沿的解，而静态非线性标量化方法在深度 RL 中梯度方差大、优化不稳定。

❓解决问题

如何在不牺牲优化稳定性的前提下，使多目标策略优化能够访问非凸 Pareto 前沿区域。

🔎现象分析

静态非线性标量化（如 Tchebycheff）理论上可访问非凸区域，但在深度 RL 中因梯度方差和优化不稳定而失效。

🛠️主要方法

提出自适应平滑 Tchebycheff 框架，包含冲突驱动控制器，根据实时梯度干扰动态调节优化曲率：目标对齐时退火到精确非凸标量化，梯度冲突时弹性恢复为稳定平滑近似。

📊实验结果

在机器人隐蔽视觉搜索任务上进行广泛消融实验，确认冲突感知自适应能够鲁棒发现非凸 Pareto 最优策略。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出自适应平滑 Tchebycheff 框架，动态平衡非凸可达性与优化稳定性。
  • 设计冲突驱动控制器，基于实时梯度干扰调节优化平滑度。
  • 在具有挑战性的机器人隐蔽视觉搜索任务上验证，发现线性方法无法访问的非凸 Pareto 最优策略。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖任务特定的超参数调节。
  • 未在更多样化的多目标 RL 基准上验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multi-objective reinforcement learning in robotic domains requires balancing complex, non-convex trade-offs between conflicting objectives. While linear scalarization methods provide stability, they are theoretically incapable of recovering solutions within non-convex regions of the Pareto front. Conversely, static non-linear scalarizations (e.g., Tchebycheff) can theoretically access these regions but often suffer from severe gradient variance and optimization instability in deep RL. In this work, we propose an Adaptive Smooth Tchebycheff framework that resolves this tension by dynamically modulating the curvature of the optimization landscape. We introduce a novel conflict-driven controller that regulates the optimization smoothness based on real-time gradient interference. This allows the agent to anneal toward precise, non-convex scalarization when objectives align, while elastically reverting to stable, smooth approximations when destructive gradient conflicts emerge. We validate our approach on a challenging robotic stealth visual search task -- a proxy for monitoring of protected/fragile ecosystems -- where an agent must balance search, exposure/interference minimization and exploration speed. Extensive ablations confirm that our conflict-aware adaptation enables the robust discovery of Pareto-optimal policies in non-convex regions inaccessible to linear baselines and unstable for static non-linear methods. Website: this https URL

基于偏好/反馈的 RL 4 篇

Revisiting Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards from a Contrastive Perspective

High 2605.12969
Feng Zhang, Xinhong Ma, Ziqiang Dong, Xi Leng, Jianfei Zhao, Xin Sun, Yang Yang, Guanjun Jiang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：从对比学习视角重新审视 RLVR，提出 ConSPO 框架，通过对比序列级策略优化提升 LLM 数学推理能力。
🎯研究动机

RLVR（基于可验证奖励的强化学习）已成为提升 LLM 推理能力的重要范式，但现有代表性算法 GRPO 存在结构局限性，限制了其性能。

❓解决问题

GRPO 存在似然错位评分（优化裁剪比率替代分数而非生成似然）和分数不敏感的信用分配（忽略组内正负样本相对分数差距）两个结构性问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ConSPO 框架，用长度归一化序列对数概率替代 GRPO 的裁剪比率分数，并采用组内 InfoNCE 对比目标，引入课程调度边距。

📊实验结果

在多种骨干模型、参数规模和训练数据集上，ConSPO 在数学推理基准上持续优于多个强 RLVR 基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了 GRPO 的等价判别式重表述及其两个结构局限性
  • 提出了 ConSPO 框架，通过对比序列级策略优化解决上述局限性
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对课程调度边距的超参数敏感
  • 主要验证于数学推理任务，泛化性需进一步探索
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

RLVR has become a widely adopted paradigm for improving LLMs' reasoning capabilities, and GRPO is one of its most representative algorithms. In this paper, we first show that GRPO admits an equivalent discriminative reformulation as a weighted positive-negative score difference. Under this view, GRPO increases sequence-level scores of verified positive rollouts and decreases those of negative rollouts, where the scores are averages of clipped token-level importance sampling ratios. This reformulation reveals two structural limitations of GRPO: likelihood-misaligned scoring, where clipped ratio-based surrogate scores are optimized instead of generation likelihoods, and score-insensitive credit assignment, where rollout-level credit is assigned without accounting for relative score gaps between positive and negative rollouts in the same group. To address these limitations, we propose ConSPO, a framework for Contrastive Sequence-level Policy Optimization in RLVR. ConSPO replaces GRPO's clipped ratio-based scores with length-normalized sequence log-probabilities, aligning the optimized rollout scores with the likelihoods used in autoregressive generation. It then optimizes a group-wise InfoNCE-style objective that contrasts each positive rollout against negative distractors from the same group, enabling credit assignment to depend on their relative scores. This contrastive formulation amplifies updates for poorly separated positives while concentrating suppressive updates on high-scoring negatives. Moreover, ConSPO introduces a curriculum-scheduled margin, guiding optimization from coarse positive-negative ordering in early training toward stronger separation in later stages. Extensive evaluations across diverse backbone models, parameter scales, and training datasets show that ConSPO consistently outperforms several strong RLVR baselines on challenging mathematical reasoning benchmarks.

Driving Intents Amplify Planning-Oriented Reinforcement Learning

High 2605.12625
Hengtong Lu, Victor Shea-Jay Huang, Chengmin Yang, Pengfei Jing, Jifeng Dai, Yan Xie, Benjin Zhu
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出 DIAL 框架，通过意图条件流匹配和偏好 RL 解决连续动作策略的模式坍塌，首次超越人类驾驶演示。
🎯研究动机

连续动作策略在单轨迹演示训练下易发生模式坍塌，导致采样分布无法覆盖语义不同的替代动作，限制了偏好优化性能。

❓解决问题

解决单演示训练导致的模式坍塌问题，使连续动作策略能生成多样且符合偏好的驾驶行为。

🔎现象分析

单演示训练导致模式坍塌，采样分布仅围绕演示动作，偏好评估中 best-of-N 性能受限于分布多样性；偏好 RL 微调可能使分布重新坍塌到当前偏好模式。

🛠️主要方法

两阶段 DIAL 框架：第一阶段用离散意图标签和 CFG 条件流匹配动作头，扩展采样分布；第二阶段通过多意图 GRPO 在偏好 RL 中保持分布多样性。

📊实验结果

在 WOD-E2E 上评估，与 VA 和 VLA SFT 基线对比，best-of-128 下 DIAL 达到 RFS 9.14，超越人类演示 8.13；多意图 GRPO 提升留出 RFS 从 7.681 到 8.211。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 DIAL 框架，结合意图条件流匹配和偏好 RL，有效解决连续动作策略的模式坍塌。
  • 在 WOD-E2E 基准上首次超越人类驾驶演示（RFS 9.14 vs 8.13），并证明偏好 RL 的瓶颈在于采样分布的扩展与保持。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖预定义的离散意图标签，可能无法覆盖所有驾驶场景。
  • 两阶段训练可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Continuous-action policies trained on a single demonstrated trajectory per scene suffer from mode collapse: samples cluster around the demonstrated maneuver and the policy cannot represent semantically distinct alternatives. Under preference-based evaluation, this caps best-of-N performance -- even oracle selection cannot recover what the sampling distribution does not contain. We introduce DIAL, a two-stage Driving-Intent-Amplified reinforcement Learning framework for preference-aligned continuous-action driving policies. In the first stage, DIAL conditions the flow-matching action head on a discrete intent label with classifier-free guidance (CFG), which expands the sampling distribution along distinct maneuver modes and breaks single-demonstration mode collapse. In the second stage, DIAL carries this expanded distribution into preference RL through multi-intent GRPO, which spans all intent classes within every preference group and prevents fine-tuning from re-collapsing around the currently preferred mode. Instantiated for end-to-end driving with eight rule-derived intents and evaluated on WOD-E2E: competitive Vision-to-Action (VA) and Vision-Language-Action (VLA) Supervised Finetuning (SFT) baselines plateau below the human-driven demonstration at best-of-128, with the strongest prior (RAP) capping at Rater Feedback Score (RFS) 8.5 even with best-of-64; intent-CFG sampling lifts this ceiling to RFS 9.14 at best-of-128, surpassing both the prior best (RAP 8.5) and the human-driven demonstration (8.13) for the first time; and multi-intent GRPO improves held-out RFS from 7.681 to 8.211, while every single-intent baseline peaks lower and degrades by training end. These results suggest that the bottleneck of preference RL on continuous-action policies trained from demonstrations is not only how to update the policy, but to expand and preserve the sampling distribution being optimized.

ODRPO: Ordinal Decompositions of Discrete Rewards for Robust Policy Optimization

High 2605.12667
Nirmal Patel, Fei Wang, Inderjit Dhillon
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：ODRPO 通过将离散奖励分解为序数二元指标，结构性地隔离评估噪声，实现鲁棒策略优化。
🎯研究动机

在 RLAIF 中，LLM 自动评分器提供的离散奖励存在随机性，导致标准优势估计器（如 GRPO、MaxRL）性能下降，而多数投票等降噪方法计算成本高。

❓解决问题

如何在不增加计算开销的前提下，减轻离散奖励随机性对策略优化的负面影响。

🔎现象分析

自动评分器的随机性会传播并破坏标准优势估计器，噪声奖励样本会扭曲归一化统计量并降低全局学习信号。

🛠️主要方法

将离散奖励分解为一系列序数二元指标，独立计算并累积每个阈值上的优势，防止异常评估破坏全局更新，并建立隐式方差感知学习课程。

📊实验结果

在 Qwen2.5-7B 和 Qwen3-4B 模型上评估，使用 FACTS-grounding-v2 和 Alpaca-Evals 基准，与 GRPO、MaxRL 等基线对比。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ODRPO 框架，通过序数分解离散奖励来隔离评估噪声，提升策略优化鲁棒性。
  • 在 Qwen2.5-7B 和 Qwen3-4B 模型上验证，相对改进最高达 14.8%（FACTS-grounding-v2）和 7.5%（Alpaca-Evals），且无额外训练开销。
  • 提供理论分析证明优化稳定性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅适用于离散奖励场景，连续奖励需额外适配。
  • 序数分解的阈值选择可能影响性能，需进一步研究自适应方法。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) utilizes Reinforcement Learning from AI Feedback (RLAIF) for non-verifiable domains such as long-form question answering and open-ended instruction following. These domains often rely on LLM based auto-raters to provide granular, multi-tier discrete rewards (e.g., 1-10 rubrics) that are inherently stochastic due to prompt sensitivity and sampling randomness. We empirically verify the stochasticity of auto-raters that can propagate and corrupt standard advantage estimators like GRPO and MaxRL, as a noisy reward samples can skew normalization statistics and degrade the global learning signal. Empirically, sampling more rewards and taking majority voting may reduce the noise and improve performance, but this approach is computationally expensive. To address this bottleneck, we introduce $\textbf{O}$rdinal $\textbf{D}$ecomposition for $\textbf{R}$obust $\textbf{P}$olicy $\textbf{O}$ptimization ($\textbf{ODRPO}$), a framework that structurally isolates evaluation noise by decomposing discrete rewards into a sequence of ordinal binary indicators. By independently computing and accumulating advantages across these progressively challenging success thresholds, ODRPO prevents outlier evaluations from corrupting the global update while establishing an implicit, variance-aware learning curriculum. Empirically, ODRPO achieves robust performance on Qwen2.5-7B and Qwen3-4B models, outperforming baselines with relative improvements of upto 14.8% on FACTS-grounding-v2 and 7.5% on Alpaca-Evals. Critically, these gains are achieved with negligible training-time overhead, as ODRPO requires no additional compute per step compared to standard estimators. Supported by theoretical analysis confirming its optimization stability, ODRPO provides a scalable and robust framework for aligning models within the noisy, discrete evaluation landscape of modern RLAIF.

Macro-Action Based Multi-Agent Instruction Following through Value Cancellation

Medium 2605.12655
Wo Wei Lin, Ethan Rathbun, Enrico Marchesini Xiang Zhi Tan
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 MAVIC 方法，通过修正指令边界处的 Bellman 备份，解决多智能体强化学习中指令中断宏动作导致的值估计不一致问题。
🎯研究动机

现实多智能体强化学习需要适应外部自然语言指令，这些指令可能中断正在执行的行为并与长期目标冲突，但现有方法在指令中断宏动作时会导致值估计不一致。

❓解决问题

多智能体强化学习中，外部指令中断宏动作时，Bellman 更新耦合不同指令上下文的值估计，导致值不一致。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，当指令中断宏动作时，Bellman 更新会耦合不同指令上下文的值估计，导致不一致的值。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Macro-Action Value Correction for Instruction Compliance (MAVIC)，通过修正指令边界处的 Bellman 备份，校正传入指令目标并恢复当前目标下的延续值，从而在统一策略下实现随机指令切换时的一致值估计。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MAVIC 方法，修正指令边界处的 Bellman 备份，解决指令中断宏动作导致的值不一致问题。
  • 提供理论分析和演员 - 评论家实现，在复杂合作多智能体环境中实现高指令遵循度并保持基础任务性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于宏动作场景，对细粒度动作的指令遵循效果未知。
  • 理论分析可能依赖于特定假设，实际环境中的泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) in real-world use cases may need to adapt to external natural language instructions that interrupt ongoing behavior and conflict with long-horizon objectives. However, conditioning rewards on instructions introduces a fundamental failure mode as Bellman updates couple value estimates across instruction contexts, leading to inconsistent values when instructions interrupt macro-actions. We propose Macro-Action Value Correction for Instruction Compliance (MAVIC), which corrects Bellman backups at instruction boundaries by correcting the incoming instruction objective and restoring the continuation value under the current objective. Unlike reward shaping, MAVIC modifies the bootstrapping target itself, enabling consistent value estimation under stochastic instruction switching within a unified policy. We provide theoretical analysis and an actor-critic implementation, and show that MAVIC achieves high instruction compliance while preserving base task performance in increasingly complex cooperative multi-agent environments.

探索与奖励设计 1 篇

Delightful Exploration

Medium 2605.13287
Ian Osband
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 Delight-gated exploration (DE)，一种基于预期改进与惊奇度乘积的探索规则，在多种环境中无需调参即可超越 Thompson Sampling 和 ε-greedy。
🎯研究动机

当动作空间过大，传统探索算法（如 ε-greedy）在预算内无法充分探索，导致盲目覆盖，需要更高效的探索策略。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种实用的探索规则，在有限信息预算下高效分配探索动作，避免盲目性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

Delight-gated exploration (DE)：一种主机 - 覆盖规则，仅当探索动作的预期改进乘以惊奇度（delight）超过门控价格时才执行探索，惊奇度设定有效检查成本，已解决的动作退出门控，新动作在先验阈值以上被关闭。

📊实验结果

在 Bernoulli bandits、linear bandits 和 tabular MDPs 上进行了实验，超参数无需重新调整，DE 在未解决区域中 regret 增长远弱于 Thompson Sampling 和 ε-greedy。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Delight-gated exploration 算法，将探索视为基于 delight 的门控决策。
  • 在 Bernoulli 臂、线性臂和表格 MDP 上，相同超参数无需调参即可迁移，且在未解决区域中 regret 增长远弱于 Thompson Sampling 和 ε-greedy。
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未提及理论保证或收敛性分析。
  • 可能仅适用于离散动作空间或特定类型的奖励结构。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Most exploration algorithms search broadly until uncertainty is resolved. When the action space is too large to resolve within budget, practitioners default to $\varepsilon$-greedy, which bounds disruption but spends its override blindly. We introduce \textit{Delight-gated exploration} (DE), a host--override rule that spends exploratory actions only when their prospective delight (expected improvement times surprisal) exceeds a gate price. This practical heuristic recovers a classical result: Pandora's reservation-value rule for costly search, with surprisal setting the effective inspection cost. Resolved arms exit the gate, fresh arms shut off above a prior-determined threshold, and selected linear-bandit overrides consume finite information budget. Across Bernoulli bandits, linear bandits, and tabular MDPs, the same hyperparameters transfer without retuning, and DE shows much weaker regret growth than Thompson Sampling and $\varepsilon$-greedy in the tested unresolved regimes. Delight improves acting for the same reason it improves learning: it prices scarce resources by the product of upside and surprisal.

离线 RL 1 篇

Bridging Domain Gaps with Target-Aligned Generation for Offline Reinforcement Learning

Medium 2605.13054
Minung Kim, Jeongmo Kim, Gwanwoo Choi, Seungyul Han
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出目标对齐覆盖扩展（TCE）框架，通过双评分生成模型合成目标一致转移，解决跨域离线强化学习中的域间隙问题。
🎯研究动机

跨域离线强化学习中，源域和目标域环境动态不同，目标数据集极度有限时，如何有效利用源数据并减少分布不匹配是关键挑战。

❓解决问题

在目标数据集极其有限的跨域离线强化学习场景中，如何通过源数据扩展目标域状态覆盖范围，同时保持与目标域的一致性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出目标对齐覆盖扩展（TCE）框架，基于理论分析决定源数据的使用方式（直接纳入目标邻近转移或通过目标对齐生成扩展状态覆盖），并采用双评分生成模型合成目标一致的转移。

📊实验结果

在多种跨域环境中进行实验，TCE 优于最先进的跨域离线 RL 基线。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 TCE 框架，结合理论指导的源数据使用策略和双评分生成模型，有效扩展目标域状态覆盖。
  • 在多种跨域环境中，TCE 持续优于现有跨域离线 RL 基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖双评分生成模型的质量和训练稳定性。
  • 理论分析可能仅适用于特定类型的动态差异。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Cross-domain offline reinforcement learning aims to adapt a policy from a source domain to a target domain using only pre-collected datasets, where environment dynamics may differ. A key challenge is to leverage source data while reducing distributional mismatch, particularly when the target dataset is extremely limited. To address this, we propose Target-aligned Coverage Expansion (TCE), a framework that decides how source data should be used, either by directly incorporating target-near transitions or by expanding state coverage through target-aligned generation, guided by theoretical analysis. TCE builds on a dual score-based generative model to synthesize target-consistent transitions over an expanded state region. Extensive experiments across diverse cross-domain environments show that TCE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art cross-domain offline RL baselines.

图与几何拓扑学习 10 篇 · 3 个细分

图神经网络 (GNN) 8 篇

Decoupled and Divergence-Conditioned Prompt for Multi-domain Dynamic Graph Foundation Models

High 2605.13540
Haonan Yuan, Qingyun Sun, Junhua Shi, Xingcheng Fu, Jianxin Li, Philip S. Yu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出首个多领域动态图基础模型 DyGFM，通过解耦语义 - 时间双分支预训练和散度条件提示实现跨域泛化。
🎯研究动机

动态图广泛存在于真实系统，但不同领域的语义和时间模式不一致，导致多领域统一建模困难，现有预训练 - 微调范式常遭受负迁移。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个可泛化的多领域动态图基础模型，避免负迁移并高效适应下游任务。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出多领域动态图的语义和时间模式固有差异，导致负知识迁移，且尚无现有多领域动态图基础模型。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DyGFM，包含语义 - 时间解耦的双分支预训练、散度感知专家选择的跨域路由机制，以及散度条件提示生成器。

📊实验结果

在连续动态图基准上，DyGFM 在节点分类和链接预测任务中一致优于 12 个最先进基线，具有优越的有效性和效率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出多领域动态图基础模型 DyGFM
  • 设计解耦语义 - 时间的双分支预训练策略
  • 开发散度感知的跨域路由机制和散度条件提示生成器
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定动态图基准，泛化性需进一步验证
  • 散度条件提示的计算开销未详细说明
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Dynamic graphs are ubiquitous in real-world systems, and building generalizable dynamic Graph Foundation Models has become a frontier in graph learning. However, dynamic graphs from different domains pose fundamental challenges to unified modeling, as their semantic and temporal patterns are inherently inconsistent, making the multi-domain pre-training difficult. Consequently, the widely used "pretrain-then-finetune" paradigm often suffers from severe negative knowledge transfer. To the best of our knowledge, there exists no multi-domain dynamic GFM. In this work, we propose DyGFM, a Dynamic Graph Foundation Model over multiple domains based on decoupled and divergence-conditioned prompting. To disentangle transferable semantics from the domain-specific dynamics, we introduce a dual-branch pre-training strategy with semantic-temporal decoupling. To alleviate negative transfer during domain adaptation, we further develop a cross-domain routing mechanism with divergence-aware expert selection. To enable efficient downstream fine-tuning, we design a divergence-conditioned prompt generator that injects lightweight, learnable graph prompts tailored to semantic and temporal traits. Extensive experiments on continuous dynamic graph benchmarks demonstrate that DyGFM consistently outperforms 12 state-of-the-art baselines on both node classification and link prediction tasks, achieving superior effectiveness and efficiency.

The WidthWall: A Strict Expressivity Hierarchy for Hypergraph Neural Networks

High 2605.13690
Fengqing Jiang, Yuetai Li, Yichen Feng, Kaiyuan Zheng, Luyao Niu, Bhaskar Ramasubramanian, Basel Alomair, Linda Bushnell et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：超图神经网络的表达能力受限于超树宽度，形成严格的层级结构“宽度墙”。
🎯研究动机

超图神经网络（HGNN）广泛应用于科学、社会和生物系统，但其表达能力上限尚不明确，尤其是对高阶结构的表示能力缺乏理论刻画。

❓解决问题

揭示 HGNN 表达能力的理论边界，即哪些高阶结构模式可以被模型检测和计数。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

通过同态密度（homomorphism densities）形式化 HGNN 的表达能力，结合同态计数完备性和不变逼近理论，证明同态密度生成所有连续超图不变量，并依据超树宽度形成严格层级。

📊实验结果

在真实世界超图的节点分类套件上验证了宽度墙的预测能力，即何时图简化基线会失败以及密度特征何时有帮助。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出“宽度墙”概念，指出超树宽度决定了 HGNN 的表达能力上限，超出该宽度的模式无法被任何固定深度 HGNN 表示。
  • 统一刻画了 15 种 HGNN 架构的表达能力，精确识别了团扩展（clique expansion）丢失的信息，并提出了密度感知模型以扩展表达能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论分析主要针对固定深度 HGNN，未考虑深度增加或特殊训练技巧的影响。
  • 实验仅在节点分类任务上验证，其他任务（如链接预测）的适用性未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Hypergraphs provide a natural framework to model higher-order interactions in scientific, social, and biological systems. Hypergraph neural networks (HGNNs) aim to learn from such data, yet it remains unclear which higher-order structures these models can represent. We show that hypergraph expressivity is governed by which small patterns an architecture can detect and count. We formalize this via homomorphism densities, which measure how often a structural motif appears in a hypergraph. Combining classical homomorphism-count completeness with invariant approximation, we show that homomorphism densities generate all continuous hypergraph invariants and organize them into a strict hierarchy indexed by hypertree width. This yields a Width Wall: a fundamental architectural limit beyond which no hidden dimension, training procedure or fixed-depth HGNN can represent invariants requiring wider patterns. Our framework provides a unified characterization of 15 HGNN architectures, precisely identifies information lost by clique expansion, and motivates density-aware models that extend expressivity beyond bounded-width message passing. We experimentally validate this finding on an APPLICATION NODE CLASSIFICATION SUITE of real-world hypergraphs, where the Width Wall predicts when graph-reduction baselines fail and when density features help.

Rethinking Efficient Graph Coarsening via a Non-Selfishness Principle

Medium 2605.13021
Xu Bai, Bin Lu, Kun Zhang, Shengbo Chen, Xinbing Wang, Chenghu Zhou, Meng Jin
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出基于非自私原则的高效图粗化方法 NOPE，实现线性内存和近线性时间，加速 1-3 个数量级。
🎯研究动机

现有图粗化方法依赖自私的成对相似匹配，导致计算和内存开销大，难以处理大规模图。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种高效、低内存的图粗化方法，避免自私匹配带来的高复杂度。

🔎现象分析

自私匹配范式（每个节点独立寻找最佳伙伴）导致计算和内存瓶颈，而基于局部各向同性假设可简化干扰评估。

🛠️主要方法

提出非自私原则，优先考虑邻域集体干扰；设计 NOPE 方法实现线性内存和近线性时间，并推导加速变体 NOPE*。

📊实验结果

NOPE*相比 NOPE 加速 1.8-10 倍，超越几乎所有基线方法 1-3 个数量级；粗化图上的学习性能与原始图相当，甚至优于 LLM 图推理。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出非自私原则用于图粗化，避免成对相似匹配的高开销。
  • 实现线性内存和近线性时间复杂度的 NOPE 方法，以及加速变体 NOPE*。
⚠️方法局限
  • 局部各向同性假设可能不适用于所有图结构。
  • 未讨论有向图或异构图场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Graph coarsening is a graph dimensionality reduction technique that aims to construct a smaller and more tractable graph while preserving the essential structural and semantic properties of the original graph. However, most existing methods rely on pair-wise similarity matching, where each node independently searches for its best partner based on global information. This selfishness matching paradigm incurs substantial computational and memory overhead. To address this problem, we shift to a non-selfishness principle that prioritizes the collective interference of neighborhood in coarsening, and propose an efficient method named NOPE, which achieves linear memory consumption and near-linear computational complexity in the number of nodes. Furthermore, we derive a faster variant NOPE*, which reduces O(\delta \dot d) interference evaluation to O(d) based on the local isotropy assumption, and consequently alleviates the computational bottleneck for high-degree nodes. Experimental results show that NOPE* achieves 1.8-10\times speedup over NOPE and surpass almost all baselines with 1-3 orders of magnitude acceleration. Meanwhile, learning on coarsened graphs yields comparable performance to original graphs, and can even show superior performance over LLM-based graph reasoning owing to compact graph information. The code can be available at this https URL .

MLGIB: Multi-Label Graph Information Bottleneck for Expressive and Robust Message Passing

Medium 2605.13126
Chaokai Wu, Haofu Shi, Ningxuan Ma, Jianghong Ma, Xiaofeng Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出多标签图信息瓶颈（MLGIB）框架，通过约束信息传输解决多标签图上的过压缩和标签噪声问题。
🎯研究动机

图神经网络在深层消息传递中存在过压缩问题，而在多标签图中，邻居节点共享有限标签且存在大量无关标签噪声，导致预测信号被稀释，现有方法缺乏针对性处理。

❓解决问题

多标签图上的消息传递中，如何同时保持表达能力和鲁棒性，即保留预测性标签信号同时抑制无关标签噪声。

🔎现象分析

多标签图中，邻居节点通常只共享少量标签，而大量无关标签引入噪声，使得深层消息传递中预测信号被稀释，过压缩问题更为突出。

🛠️主要方法

提出多标签图信息瓶颈（MLGIB），将消息传递建模为在无关标签噪声下的约束信息传输，通过构建马尔可夫依赖空间并推导可处理变分界，下界最大化与目标标签的互信息，上界约束冗余源信息，从而得到端到端的标签感知消息传递架构。

📊实验结果

在多个基准数据集上进行实验，结果表明所提方法一致优于现有方法，验证了框架的有效性和通用性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次识别并形式化了多标签图中消息传递的独特失败模式，即标签噪声导致的信号稀释。
  • 提出 MLGIB 框架，通过信息瓶颈原理平衡表达性和鲁棒性，并推导出可处理的变分界。
  • 在多个基准上验证了方法的有效性和泛化性，显著优于现有方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖于标签信息的可用性，在标签稀疏场景下效果可能受限。
  • 变分界的近似可能引入额外误差，需要进一步理论分析。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) suffer from over-squashing in deep message passing, where information from exponentially growing neighborhoods is compressed into fixed-dimensional representations. We show that this issue becomes a distinct failure mode in multi-label graphs: neighboring nodes often share only limited labels while differing across many irrelevant ones, causing predictive signals to be diluted by noisy label information. To address this challenge, we propose the Multi-Label Graph Information Bottleneck (MLGIB), which formulates multi-label message passing as constrained information transmission under irrelevant label noise. MLGIB balances expressiveness and robustness by preserving predictive label signals while suppressing irrelevant noise. Specifically, it constructs a Markovian dependence space and derives tractable variational bounds, where the lower bound maximizes mutual information with target labels and the upper bound constrains redundant source information. These bounds lead to an end-to-end label-aware message-passing architecture. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over existing methods, validating the effectiveness and generality of the proposed framework.

Rethinking Graph Convolution for 2D-to-3D Hand Pose Lifting

Medium 2605.13604
Chanyoung Kim, Donghyun Kim, Dong-Hyun Sim, Seong Jae Hwang, Youngjoong Kwon
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：在 2D 到 3D 手部姿态提升任务中，自适应空间注意力比固定图卷积更有效。
🎯研究动机

图卷积网络（GCN）广泛用于 3D 手部姿态估计，但将手部骨架编码为固定邻接图可能不是最优方式，需要重新评估如何有效利用手部拓扑结构。

❓解决问题

探究在 2D 到 3D 手部姿态提升中，固定邻接图卷积是否是最有效的拓扑利用方式，以及自适应注意力机制能否带来更好性能。

🔎现象分析

标准多头自注意力一致优于 GCN 基线；即使 GCN 增强多跳邻接和匹配参数，自注意力仍显著降低 MPJPE（从 12.36 mm 降至 10.09 mm）；骨架约束的图注意力网络可恢复大部分差距，表明输入依赖的聚合是主要改进来源；全连接注意力带来额外收益；手部拓扑作为软结构先验（图距离位置编码）比硬邻接约束更有效。

🛠️主要方法

通过控制参数匹配的消融实验，比较标准多头自注意力、增强 GCN（多跳邻接）、骨架约束图注意力网络以及图距离位置编码等变体，分析不同拓扑利用方式的效果。

📊实验结果

在 FPHA 基准上进行控制参数匹配的消融实验，比较不同方法的 MPJPE 指标。

⭐主要贡献
  • 通过参数匹配的消融实验证明，在 2D 到 3D 手部姿态提升中，标准多头自注意力一致优于 GCN 基线。
  • 发现手部拓扑作为软结构先验（图距离位置编码）比硬邻接约束更有效，自适应空间注意力是更有效的归纳偏置。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在 FPHA 一个基准上验证，泛化性需更多数据集支持。
  • 未探讨其他手部姿态估计任务（如从单张 RGB 图像直接估计 3D 姿态）中的适用性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) are widely used for 3D hand pose estimation, where the hand skeleton is encoded as a fixed adjacency graph. We revisit whether this is the most effective way to incorporate hand topology in 2D-to-3D lifting. In this paper, we perform controlled, parameter-matched ablations on the FPHA benchmark and show that standard multi-head self-attention consistently outperforms GCN baselines. Even when the GCN is strengthened with multi-hop adjacency and matched parameter count, self-attention reduces MPJPE from 12.36 mm to 10.09 mm. A skeleton-constrained graph attention network recovers most of this gap, indicating that input-dependent aggregation is a major source of improvement, while fully connected attention yields additional gains. We further show that hand topology is most effective when introduced as a soft structural prior through graph-distance positional encoding, rather than as a hard adjacency constraint. These results suggest that, for hand pose lifting, adaptive spatial attention is a more effective inductive bias than fixed graph convolution.

Towards Robust Federated Multimodal Graph Learning under Modality Heterogeneity

Medium 2605.12584
Sirui Zhang, Haonan Wang, Xunkai Li, Zekai Chen, Shumeng Li, Hongchao Qin, Rong-Hua Li, Guoren Wang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 FedMPO，通过拓扑感知跨模态生成、缺失感知专家路由和可靠性感知聚合，解决联邦多模态图学习中的模态异质性问题。
🎯研究动机

现实世界中的图数据常因多方数据共享限制而孤立，且模态经常不完整，亟需鲁棒的联邦多模态图学习方法，但现有方法在联邦场景下处理缺失模态时存在知识共享和泛化不足的问题。

❓解决问题

联邦多模态图学习在模态异质性下，面临客户端局部补全难以利用全局语义和服务器端聚合受客户端更新可靠性不平衡影响两大挑战。

🔎现象分析

现有方法采用客户端补全缺失模态 + 服务器聚合参数的两阶段流程，但客户端补全因拓扑隔离无法有效利用全局语义，服务器聚合因客户端模态可用性和恢复可靠性差异导致协作失衡。

🛠️主要方法

提出 FedMPO，包含拓扑感知跨模态生成（利用图上下文恢复缺失特征）、缺失感知专家路由（本地过滤噪声恢复信号）和可靠性感知聚合（降低不可靠更新的权重）。

📊实验结果

在 3 个任务 6 个数据集上进行实验，FedMPO 优于基线，在高缺失和非 IID 设置下性能提升达 4.10% 和 5.65%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别了联邦多模态图学习在模态异质性下的两大挑战：拓扑隔离的局部补全和可靠性不平衡的全局聚合。
  • 提出 FedMPO 框架，通过拓扑感知生成、缺失感知路由和可靠性感知聚合实现鲁棒学习。
  • 在 3 个任务 6 个数据集上验证了 FedMPO 的有效性，在高缺失和非 IID 设置下性能提升达 4.10% 和 5.65%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖图拓扑结构的质量，在噪声图中效果可能下降。
  • 未讨论跨模态生成的计算开销和扩展性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recently, multimodal graph learning (MGL) has garnered significant attention for integrating diverse modality information and structured context to support various network applications. However, real-world graphs are often isolated due to data-sharing limitations across multiple parties, and their modalities are frequently incomplete. This highlights an urgent need to develop a robust federated approach. However, we find that existing methods remain insufficient. On the one hand, centralized MGL methods that handle missing modalities overlook the knowledge sharing and generalization in federated scenarios. On the other hand, while federated MGL methods have become increasingly mature, they primarily target non-graph data. Based on these technologies, we identify a two-stage pipeline wherein client-side completion reconstructs missing modalities, and server-side aggregation integrates the client-updated parameters of both the modality generator and the backbone models. Although this serves as a general solution, we identify two primary challenges in achieving greater robustness: (1) Topology-Isolated Local Completion: Client-side modality generation struggles to effectively leverage global semantics. (2) Reliability-Imbalanced Global Aggregation: Server-side multi-party collaboration is hindered by client updates with varying modality availability and recovery reliability. To address these challenges, we propose \textsc{FedMPO}, which utilizes topology-aware cross-modal generation to recover missing features using comprehensive graph context, missing-aware expert routing to locally filter out noisy recovered signals, and reliability-aware aggregation to appropriately down-weight unreliable updates. Extensive experiments on 3 tasks across 6 datasets demonstrate that FedMPO outperforms baselines, achieving performance gains of up to 4.10% and 5.65% in high-missing and non-IID settings.

A Unified Perspective for Learning Graph Representations Across Multi-Level Abstractions

Medium 2605.12685
Mohamed Mahmoud Amar, Nairouz Mrabah, Mohamed Bouguessa, Abdoulaye Baniré Diallo
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出统一对比学习框架，融合多层级图表示并通过自适应加权机制提升性能。
🎯研究动机

现有图自监督学习多聚焦单一抽象层级，且统一惩罚强度导致优化灵活性不足，需要更灵活的多层级融合方法。

❓解决问题

如何有效融合节点级、邻近级、簇级和图级信息，并自适应调整各样本的惩罚权重以提升图表示质量。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出统一对比框架，线性组合正负对的相似度分数，并引入无参数的自适应加权机制，根据分数与目标值的偏差动态分配权重。

📊实验结果

在真实数据集上，方法在分类、聚类和链接预测任务中均优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出统一的多层级图对比学习框架，整合节点、邻近、簇和图级信息。
  • 设计无参数的自适应加权机制，提升优化灵活性并消除超参数调优开销。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定相似度度量方式。
  • 自适应加权机制在极端稀疏图上的效果未明确。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Graph Self-Supervised Learning (GSSL) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for generating high-quality representations for graph-structured data. While multi-scale graph contrastive learning has received increasing attention, many existing methods still predominantly focus on a single graph abstraction level. To address this limitation, we propose a unified contrastive framework that can target node-level, proximity-level, cluster-level, and graph-level information and integrate them through a linear combination of similarity scores on positive pairs and dissimilarity scores (i.e., similarity scores on negative pairs). Furthermore, current approaches typically assign uniform penalty strengths to all examples, which reduces optimization flexibility and leads to ambiguous convergence status. To overcome this, we introduce a novel parameter-free fine-grained self-weighting mechanism that adaptively assigns weights to individual similarity and dissimilarity scores. The proposed mechanism emphasizes the scores that deviate significantly from their target values. Our approach not only enhances optimization flexibility but also eliminates the computational overhead of hyperparameter tuning in conventional multi-task GSSL methods. Comprehensive experiments on real-world datasets show that our methods consistently outperform state-of-the-art approaches across downstream tasks, including classification, clustering, and link prediction, in both single-level and multi-level scenarios.

Modeling Heterophily in Multiplex Graphs: An Adaptive Approach for Node Classification

Medium 2605.12699
Kamel Abdous, Nairouz Mrabah, Mohamed Bouguessa
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一种自适应方法，通过可训练的高低通滤波器组合处理多路图中同时存在的同质性和异质性边，提升节点分类性能。
🎯研究动机

现有多路图模型通常假设同质性，难以处理异质性图；而针对单维度异质性图的方法无法充分应对多路图中不同维度同时存在同质和异质交互的复杂性。

❓解决问题

多路图中节点通过多种类型的边连接，这些边可能同时表现出同质性和异质性，现有方法无法有效建模这种复杂交互。

🔎现象分析

多路图的不同维度可以同时包含同质性和异质性交互，需要维度特定的建模。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AdaptiveHGCN，引入维度特定的兼容性矩阵，并通过 Chebyshev 多项式近似可训练的低通和高通滤波器组合，利用近端梯度法优化标签预测，动态适应每个维度的异质性特征。

📊实验结果

在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法能捕获多路图中同质和异质交互的复杂关系，并倾向于比现有方法取得更好的节点分类性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种自适应多路图节点分类方法，能同时处理同质性和异质性维度。
  • 引入维度特定的兼容性矩阵和可训练的高低通滤波器组合，有效捕获图信号中的平滑和突变变化。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对大规模图的计算效率有挑战。
  • 滤波器设计依赖于 Chebyshev 多项式近似，可能对高阶信息捕获有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing multiplex graph models often assume homophily, where connected nodes tend to belong to the same class or share similar attributes. Consequently, these models may struggle with graphs exhibiting heterophily, where connected nodes typically belong to different classes and have dissimilar attributes. While recent methods have been developed to learn reliable node representations from unidimensional graphs with heterophily, they do not fully address the complexities of multiplex graphs. In a multiplex graph, nodes are linked through multiple types of edges (referred to as dimensions), which can simultaneously exhibit homophilic and heterophilic interactions. To address this gap, we propose \methodname, a novel method for node classification in multiplex graphs that adapts to both homophilic and heterophilic dimensions. \methodname introduces dimension-specific compatibility matrices to model varying degrees of homophily and heterophily across dimensions. A key innovation is its use of a product of trainable low-pass and high-pass filters, approximated via Chebyshev polynomials, to capture both smooth and abrupt changes in the graph signal. By composing these filters and optimizing label predictions using a proximal-gradient method, \methodname dynamically adjusts to the heterophilic characteristics of each dimension. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets provide evidence that \methodname captures the complex interplay of homophilic and heterophilic interactions in multiplex graphs, and tends to yield improved node classification performance compared to state-of-the-art methods.

其他 1 篇

Representing Higher-Order Networks: A Survey of Graph-Based Frameworks

Medium 2605.12509
Takaaki Fujita, Florentin Smarandache
arXiv PDF cs.SI
TL;DR：综述高阶网络图表示框架，涵盖多路、层次、时序、多层、递归和张量交互。
🎯研究动机

经典图模型仅能表示成对交互，无法捕捉现实系统中更丰富的结构（如多路、层次、时序等），需要更强大的高阶网络表示方法。

❓解决问题

如何系统性地总结和比较用于建模高阶网络的数学框架，包括其结构原理、关系和应用角色。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

对高阶网络图表示框架进行综述，涵盖基础概念、扩展框架和新引入的形式化方法，强调结构原理、关系及建模角色。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提供了高阶网络数学框架的全面综述，统一视角便于比较不同模型。
  • 更新至第 2.0 版，增加了若干新概念并修正了错误。
⚠️方法局限
  • 作为综述，未提出新的算法或实验验证。
  • 可能未覆盖所有最新高阶网络模型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Many real-world phenomena are naturally modeled by graphs and networks. However, classical graph models are often limited to pairwise interactions and may not adequately capture the richer structures that arise in practice. Higher-order graph formalisms extend this framework by incorporating multiway, hierarchical, temporal, multilayer, recursive, and tensor-based interactions, thereby providing more expressive representations of complex systems. This book presents a comprehensive overview of mathematical notions that can be used to model higher-order networks. It surveys foundational concepts, extensional frameworks, and newly introduced formalisms, with an emphasis on their structural principles, relationships, and modeling roles. The aim is to provide a unified perspective that helps readers compare diverse higher-order network models and identify appropriate tools for theoretical study and practical applications. This book is Edition 2.0. It mainly includes the addition of several concepts, as well as corrections and improvements of typographical errors and explanations.

几何深度学习 1 篇

Topology-Preserving Neural Operator Learning via Hodge Decomposition

Medium 2605.13834
Dongzhe Zheng, Tao Zhong, Christine Allen-Blanchette
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：利用 Hodge 分解将拓扑自由度与几何动力学分离，提出混合欧拉 - 拉格朗日架构 HSD，在几何网格上实现保结构的神经算子学习。
🎯研究动机

物理场方程求解器在几何网格上常面临频谱干扰问题，即不可学习的拓扑自由度与可学习的几何动力学相互耦合，导致传统神经算子难以同时保证精度和物理不变性。

❓解决问题

如何在学习物理场解算子时，将拓扑主导成分与复杂局部动力学正交分解，从而在结构保持子空间内实现高效、保物理的近似。

🔎现象分析

摘要揭示 Hodge 正交性可通过隔离不可学习的拓扑自由度与可学习的几何动力学，从根本上解决频谱干扰问题。

🛠️主要方法

基于 Hodge 理论和算子分裂，提出混合欧拉 - 拉格朗日架构 HSD：用离散微分形式捕获拓扑主导成分，用正交辅助环境空间表示复杂局部动力学，在代数层面引入 Hodge 谱对偶归纳偏置。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及代码已开源。

⭐主要贡献
  • 从函数空间视角揭示 Hodge 正交性可解决频谱干扰，实现结构保持的加性近似。
  • 提出 HSD 架构，在几何网格上实现更优的精度、效率和物理不变性保真度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖网格的拓扑结构，对非流形或动态拓扑的泛化性未知。
  • 离散微分形式的计算复杂度可能随网格维度增加而上升。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In this paper, we study solution operators of physical field equations on geometric meshes from a function-space perspective. We reveal that Hodge orthogonality fundamentally resolves spectral interference by isolating unlearnable topological degrees of freedom from learnable geometric dynamics, enabling an additive approximation confined to structure-preserving subspaces. Building on Hodge theory and operator splitting, we derive a principled operator-level decomposition. The result is a Hybrid Eulerian-Lagrangian architecture with an algebraic-level inductive bias we call Hodge Spectral Duality (HSD). In our framework, we use discrete differential forms to capture topology-dominated components and an orthogonal auxiliary ambient space to represent complex local dynamics. Our method achieves superior accuracy and efficiency on geometric graphs with enhanced fidelity to physical invariants. Our code is available at this https URL

可解释 AI 7 篇 · 4 个细分

机制可解释性 4 篇

Dual-Pathway Circuits of Object Hallucination in Vision-Language Models

High 2605.13156
Jiaxin Liu, Ding Zhong, Yue Wang, Zhidong Yang, Zhaolu Kang, Guangyuan Dong, Qishi Zhan, Pengcheng Fang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出双通路电路分析框架，揭示 VLM 中物体幻觉的视觉接地通路和幻觉通路，并通过抑制幻觉通路将幻觉降低 76%。
🎯研究动机

VLM 在视觉 - 语言任务中表现出色，但常产生物体幻觉（描述图像中不存在的物体），限制了其可靠性和可解释性。现有方法缺乏对幻觉机制的深入理解。

❓解决问题

如何从机制上理解和因果干预 VLM 中的物体幻觉。

🔎现象分析

发现视觉接地通路在正确和幻觉样本中均保持强冗余，但极性翻转：在正确样本中支持真实答案，在错误样本中转向支持幻觉答案。

🛠️主要方法

提出双通路电路分析框架，包括激活修补识别通路、条件通路分析（CPA）表征通路交互，以及靶向抑制幻觉通路组件。

📊实验结果

在 POPE-adversarial 和 AMBER 基准上评估，跨 5 种架构 VLM 验证电路一致性、因果干预有效性和选择性迁移。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出双通路电路分析框架，识别 VLM 中支持正确预测的视觉接地通路和驱动错误输出的幻觉通路。
  • 引入条件通路分析（CPA）表征通路级交互，揭示接地组件的极性翻转现象。
  • 通过靶向抑制幻觉通路组件，将物体幻觉降低 76% 且准确率损失极小，并验证电路在关系幻觉上可迁移。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对物体幻觉，未覆盖其他类型幻觉（如属性幻觉）。
  • 电路迁移性仅在关系幻觉上验证，对其他幻觉类型需进一步探索。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in bridging visual perception and natural language understanding, enabling a wide range of multimodal reasoning tasks. However, they often produce object hallucinations, describing content absent from the input image, which limits their reliability and interpretability. To address this limitation, we propose Dual-Pathway Circuit Analysis, a framework that identifies and characterizes hallucination-related circuits in VLMs for mechanistic understanding and causal probing. We first apply activation patching across five architecturally diverse VLMs to identify a visual grounding pathway that supports correct predictions and a hallucination pathway that drives erroneous outputs. We then introduce Conditional Pathway Analysis (CPA) to characterize pathway-level interactions, revealing that grounding components remain strongly redundant in both correct and hallucinating samples but undergo a consistent polarity flip, shifting from supporting the ground truth on correct samples to aligning with the hallucinated answer on erroneous ones. We further perform targeted suppression of hallucination-pathway components, showing that scaling these components reduces object hallucination by up to 76% with minimal accuracy cost, and validate that the same circuit selectively transfers to relational but not attribute hallucination. Evaluations on POPE-adversarial and AMBER show that the identified circuits are consistent across architectures, support causal intervention, and transfer selectively across hallucination types.

Tracing Persona Vectors Through LLM Pretraining

High 2605.13329
Viktor Moskvoretskii, Dominik Glandorf, Jorge Medina Moreira, Tanja Käser, Robert West
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：LLM 中代表高级行为（如邪恶、谄媚）的“人格向量”在预训练极早期（0.22%）就已形成，并持续精炼。
🎯研究动机

理解 LLM 如何内部表示高级行为（如邪恶、谄媚）对 AI 安全至关重要，但此前未知这些表示在训练中如何形成。

❓解决问题

揭示 LLM 预训练过程中人格向量（persona vectors）的形成时间、演化规律及不同提取策略的影响。

🔎现象分析

人格向量在预训练极早期（0.22%）形成，且对完全后训练的指令模型仍有效；向量在几何和语义上持续精炼；不同提取策略揭示人格的不同侧面。

🛠️主要方法

在 OLMo-3-7B 预训练过程中追踪人格向量，比较多种提取策略，并在 Apertus-8B 上验证迁移性。

📊实验结果

在 OLMo-3-7B 和 Apertus-8B 上进行预训练追踪实验，比较多种人格向量提取策略。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次揭示人格向量在预训练极早期形成，且持续有效。
  • 系统比较不同人格向量提取策略，发现各策略揭示不同人格侧面。
  • 在另一模型上验证了结论的迁移性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅研究两个模型，泛化性需更多验证。
  • 未深入分析人格向量形成的因果机制。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

How large language models internally represent high-level behaviors is a core interpretability question with direct relevance to AI safety: it determines what we can detect, audit, or intervene on. Recent work has shown that traits such as evil or sycophancy correspond to linear directions in the internal activations, the so-called persona vectors. Although these vectors are now routinely utilized to inspect and steer model behavior in safety-relevant settings, how these representations are formed during training remains unknown. To address this gap, we trace persona vectors across the pretraining of OLMo-3-7B, finding that persona vectors form remarkably early -- within 0.22% of OLMo-3 pretraining -- and remain effective for steering the fully post-trained instruct models. Although core representations are formed early on, persona vectors continue to refine geometrically and semantically throughout pretraining. We further compare alternative elicitation strategies and find that all yield effective directions, with each strategy surfacing qualitatively distinct facets of the underlying persona. Replicating our analysis on Apertus-8B reveals that our findings transfer qualitatively beyond OLMo-3. Our results establish persona representations as stable features of early pretraining and open a path to studying how training forms, refines, and shapes them.

WriteSAE: Sparse Autoencoders for Recurrent State

High 2605.12770
Jack Young
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：首个针对状态空间 / 混合循环语言模型矩阵缓存写入的稀疏自编码器，实现原子级编辑与行为操控。
🎯研究动机

现有稀疏自编码器仅作用于残差流，无法触及状态空间和混合循环语言模型中的矩阵缓存写入操作，限制了模型可解释性和编辑能力。

❓解决问题

如何分解和编辑状态空间 / 混合循环语言模型中通过秩 -1 更新写入的矩阵缓存（$k_t v_t^\top$），实现细粒度原子替换。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 WriteSAE，将解码器原子分解为原生写入形状，导出每个 token 的 logit 偏移闭式解，并在匹配的 Frobenius 范数下训练，使得原子每次替换一个缓存槽。

📊实验结果

在 Qwen3.5-0.8B L9 H4 上，原子替换在 92.4% 的触发中优于匹配范数消融；87 原子群体测试保持 89.8%；闭式解预测效果 R²=0.98；Mamba-2-370M 在 2500 次触发中替换成功率为 88.1%；持续三位安装将目标续写中位排名从 33.3% 提升至 100%（贪心解码）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个针对矩阵缓存写入的稀疏自编码器，覆盖残差 SAE 无法触及的区域。
  • 在多个模型（Qwen3.5-0.8B、Mamba-2-370M）上验证原子替换有效性，并实现首次在矩阵循环写入位点的行为安装。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定架构（Gated DeltaNet、Mamba-2、RWKV-7），泛化性未知。
  • 实验规模较小，未在更大模型或更复杂任务上验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce WriteSAE, the first sparse autoencoder that decomposes and edits the matrix cache write of state-space and hybrid recurrent language models, where residual SAEs cannot reach. Existing SAEs read residual streams, but Gated DeltaNet, Mamba-2, and RWKV-7 write to a $d_k \times d_v$ cache through rank-1 updates $k_t v_t^\top$ that no vector atom can replace. WriteSAE factors each decoder atom into the native write shape, exposes a closed form for the per-token logit shift, and trains under matched Frobenius norm so atoms swap one cache slot at a time. Atom substitution beats matched-norm ablation on 92.4% of $n=4{,}851$ firings at Qwen3.5-0.8B L9 H4, the 87-atom population test holds at 89.8%, the closed form predicts measured effects at $R^2=0.98$, and Mamba-2-370M substitutes at 88.1% over 2,500 firings. Sustained three-position installs at $3\times$ lift midrank target-in-continuation from 33.3% to 100% under greedy decoding, the first behavioral install at the matrix-recurrent write site.

Understanding Generalization through Decision Pattern Shift

Medium 2605.13148
Huiqi Deng, Yibo Li, Quanshi Zhang, Peng Zhang, Hongbin Pei, Xia Hu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过决策模式偏移（DPS）量化内部决策机制稳定性，揭示泛化失败源于决策模式系统性漂移。
🎯研究动机

现有研究主要关注数据、表征或输出等外部可观测因素的变化，但对模型内部决策机制从训练到测试的演化过程缺乏深入理解，难以解释泛化失败的根本原因。

❓解决问题

如何从内部决策模式稳定性的角度定义和量化深度神经网络的泛化失败。

🔎现象分析

决策模式形成高度结构化、类一致的空间，具有强类内凝聚力和低类间混淆；DPS 大小与泛化差距线性相关（Pearson r > 0.8）；DPS 谱将多种泛化退化场景组织成连续轨迹，提供统一解释。

🛠️主要方法

提出决策模式偏移（DPS）指标：将每个样本的决策模式表示为基于 GradCAM 的通道贡献向量，并计算其与类平均模式的差异。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集和架构上进行实证分析，验证了决策模式的结构化特性、DPS 与泛化差距的线性关系以及 DPS 谱的统一解释能力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出决策模式偏移（DPS）新视角，将泛化定义为内部决策模式的稳定性，并量化失败为模式偏离。
  • 通过实验揭示 DPS 与泛化差距的强线性相关性，并统一解释多种泛化退化场景。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 GradCAM 进行通道贡献计算，可能受限于梯度解释方法的准确性。
  • 主要针对分类任务，对其他任务（如生成、回归）的适用性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Understanding why deep neural networks (DNNs) fail to generalize to unseen samples remains a long-standing challenge. Existing studies mainly examine changes in externally observable factors such as data, representations, or outputs, yet offer limited insight into how a model's internal decision mechanism evolves from training to test. To address this gap, we introduce Decision Pattern Shift (DPS), a new perspective that defines generalization through the stability of internal decision patterns and quantifies failure as their deviation from those learned during training. Specifically, we represent each sample's decision pattern as a GradCAM-based channel-contribution vector, which captures how feature channels collectively support a prediction, and we propose the DPS metric to measure its discrepancy from the class-average pattern. Empirical analyses across multiple datasets and architectures show that, (i) decision patterns form a highly structured, class-consistent space with strong intra-class cohesion and low inter-class confusion, enabling direct analysis of a model's decision logic; (ii) the DPS magnitude correlates linearly with the generalization gap (nearly all Pearson r > 0.8), revealing generalization as a systematic drift in the model's internal decision mechanism; (iii) the DPS spectrum organizes diverse generalization degradation scenarios (covering ideal generalization, in-distribution degradation, domain shift, out-of-distribution, and shortcut learning) into a continuous trajectory, providing a unified explanation of their failure modes. These findings open up new possibilities for early generalization-risk detection, failure-mode diagnosis, and channel-level defect localization.

其他 1 篇

Debunking Grad-ECLIP: A Comprehensive Study on Its Incorrectness and Fundamental Principles for Model Interpretation

Medium 2605.12952
Yongjin Cui, Xiaohui Fan
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：证明 Grad-ECLIP 方法有缺陷，其解释结果并非原始模型，并强调模型解释应遵循的两条基本原则。
🎯研究动机

模型解释方法对于理解 Transformer 模型至关重要，但现有方法可能存在错误，需要纠正并建立正确原则。

❓解决问题

Grad-ECLIP 方法在模型解释中存在根本性错误，其解释结果与原始模型不一致。

🔎现象分析

Grad-ECLIP 声称的中间特征技术路线并非新颖，而是注意力路线的等价变体；且其解释结果与模型性能不匹配。

🛠️主要方法

通过形式推导和实验验证，证明 Grad-ECLIP 等价于注意力路线，并指出其缺陷；提出两条基本原则：解释应忠于原始模型，且应与模型性能一致。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明 Grad-ECLIP 的中间特征路线是注意力路线的等价变体，并非新路线。
  • 揭示 Grad-ECLIP 方法的缺陷，并强调模型解释应遵循的两条基本原则。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提出新的解释方法，仅指出错误和原则。
  • 原则的具体实现和验证有待进一步研究。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Grad-ECLIP is published at ICML 2024 and represents a new Transformer interpretation technical route (intermediate features-based). First, this paper demonstrates that the intermediate features-based technical route is not a novel one. Based on the existing attention-based route, we have developed Attention-ECLIP, which is completely equivalent to Grad-ECLIP but with simpler computation. Both through formal derivation and experimental validation, we prove that the intermediate feature-based route represented by Grad-ECLIP is actually an equivalent variant of the attention-based route. Next, this paper demonstrates that the Grad-ECLIP method is flawed. The model interpretation results obtained by Grad-ECLIP are not those of the original model, and the interpretation results are misaligned with the model's performance. We analyze the causes of Grad-ECLIP's flaws and propose, or rather, explicitly emphasize two fundamental principles that model interpretation should adhere to in order to avoid similar errors.

归因与因果 1 篇

Correcting Influence: Unboxing LLM Outputs with Orthogonal Latent Spaces

High 2605.12809
Shixing Yu, Promit Ghosal, Kyra Gan
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一种通过正交潜在空间推断 LLM 输出中 token 级训练数据影响的方法，提升医疗等高风险场景的可解释性。
🎯研究动机

在医疗等高风险场景中，需要将 LLM 预测归因到训练数据，且需达到 token 级精度，但现有影响函数方法受限于自回归设置和 token 独立性假设，导致归因不可靠。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖 token 独立性假设的情况下，实现 LLM 预测的 token 级训练数据影响归因。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

在预训练 LLM 的任意层附加稀疏自编码器学习近似独立的潜在特征基，通过雅可比向量积将潜在特征归因传播回输入空间，并利用逆 Hessian 近似实现高效扩展。

📊实验结果

在医疗基准上实验，表明方法能识别稀疏、可解释的 token 集合，这些 token 共同影响预测。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种灵活的潜在中介框架，用于一般预测任务的 token 级影响归因。
  • 引入基于雅可比向量积的方法，解决潜在特征上影响不可分解的问题。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖稀疏自编码器的质量。
  • 逆 Hessian 近似可能引入近似误差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

A critical step for reliable large language models (LLMs) use in healthcare is to attribute predictions to their training data, akin to a medical case study. This requires token-level precision: pinpointing not just which training examples influence a decision, but which tokens within them are responsible. While influence functions offer a principled framework for this, prior work is restricted to autoregressive settings and relies on an implicit assumption of token independence, rendering their identified influences unreliable. We introduce a flexible framework that infers token-level influence through a latent mediation approach for general prediction tasks. Our method attaches sparse autoencoders to any layer of a pretrained LLM to learn a basis of approximately independent latent features. Unlike prior methods where influence decomposes additively across tokens, influence computed over latent features is inherently non-decomposable. To address this, we introduce a novel method using Jacobian-vector products. Token-level influence is obtained by propagating latent attributions back to the input space via token activation patterns. We scale our approach using efficient inverse-Hessian approximations. Experiments on medical benchmarks show our approach identifies sparse, interpretable sets of tokens that jointly influence predictions. Our framework enhances trust and enables model auditing, generalizing to high-stakes domain requiring transparent and accountable decisions.

探针与表征分析 1 篇

Characterizing Universal Object Representations Across Vision Models

Medium 2605.13675
Florian P. Mahner, Johannes Roth, Ka Chun Lam, Michael F. Bonner, Francisco Pereira, Martin N. Hebart
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：通过分解 162 个视觉模型的物体相似性结构，发现通用维度比模型特定维度更可解释、更受概念属性驱动，且与生物视觉更对齐。
🎯研究动机

不同视觉模型被报道会收敛到相似表征，但具体收敛于哪些视觉属性以及哪些因素导致这种收敛尚不清楚。

❓解决问题

揭示视觉模型之间表征收敛的通用维度及其驱动因素。

🔎现象分析

通用维度比模型特定维度更可解释，更受概念图像属性驱动；架构、目标函数、数据、模型大小和性能不能解释通用维度的出现；但通用维度更多的模型能更好预测猕猴 IT 脑区和人类相似性判断。

🛠️主要方法

将 162 个视觉模型的物体相似性结构分解为少量非负维度，然后估计每个维度在不同模型中的重现频率，区分通用与模型特定维度。

📊实验结果

分析了 162 个不同架构、目标、数据集的视觉模型，并评估了通用维度与生物视觉（猕猴 IT、人类相似性判断）的关联。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种量化视觉模型表征通用性的方法，通过分解相似性结构并估计维度重现性。
  • 发现通用维度更可解释、更受概念属性驱动，且与生物视觉对齐更好。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于物体相似性结构，可能忽略其他视觉属性。
  • 通用维度的解释性依赖于人工标注的概念属性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deep neural networks trained with different architectures, objectives, and datasets have been reported to converge on similar visual representations. However, what remains unknown is which visual properties models actually converge on and which factors may underlie this convergence. To address this, we decompose the object similarity structure of 162 diverse vision models into a small set of non-negative dimensions. To determine universal versus model-specific dimensions, we then estimate how often each dimension reappears across models. In contrast to model-specific dimensions, universal dimensions are more interpretable and more strongly driven by conceptual image properties, indicating the relevance of interpretability and semantic content as implicit factors driving universality across models. Differences in architecture, objective function, training data, model size, and model performance do not explain the emergence of universal dimensions. However, models with more universal dimensions also better predict macaque IT activity and human similarity judgments, suggesting that universality reflects representations relevant to biological vision. These findings have important implications for understanding the emergent representations underlying deep neural network models and their alignment with biological vision.

应用: 物理科学 7 篇 · 5 个细分

其他 2 篇

OpenAaaS: An Open Agent-as-a-Service Framework for Distributed Materials-Informatics Research

Medium 2605.13618
Peng Kang, Bixuan Li, Xiaoya Huang, Shuo Shi, Weiqiao Zhou, Zhen Li, Yu Liu, Lei Zheng
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一个开源的分层分布式 Agent-as-a-Service 框架，用于跨机构安全协作的材料信息学研究。
🎯研究动机

现有集中式平台和单体 Agent 系统难以安全整合跨机构材料数据与计算资源，阻碍了材料智能设计。

❓解决问题

缺乏一种能够跨机构边界安全组合 LLM 和 Agent 能力、同时保护数据主权的组织性基础设施。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 OpenAaaS 框架，采用分层架构：Master Agent 负责任务分解与规划，不直接访问子 Agent 数据；子 Agent 作为近数据执行节点，保留数据主权。核心原则是“代码流动，数据静止”。

📊实验结果

通过两个案例验证：AlphaAgent 在深度分析问题上达到 4.66/5.0（对比单次 RAG 基线）；超大规模高熵合金描述符数据库服务展示了安全近数据执行。摘要未提供更多实验细节。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 OpenAaaS，一个开源的分层分布式 Agent-as-a-Service 框架，实现跨机构安全多 Agent 协作。
  • 通过两个案例验证框架有效性：AlphaAgent 文献分析（4.66/5.0）和超大规模高熵合金描述符数据库服务。
⚠️方法局限
  • 案例规模有限，可能未覆盖所有材料设计场景。
  • 框架的通用性和扩展性需更多跨领域验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The Materials Genome Initiative catalyzed the proliferation of centralized platforms--SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS--that aggregate computational and experimental resources for accelerated materials discovery. In parallel, breakthroughs in large language models (LLMs) and autonomous agents have created powerful new reasoning capabilities for scientific research. Yet a critical "last mile" problem remains: while we possess world-class models and vast repositories of materials data, we lack the organizational infrastructure to compose these capabilities securely across institutional boundaries. The development of structural and functional materials for harsh service environments--high-temperature alloys, radiation resistant steels, corrosion-resistant coatings--remains characterized by long-term iteration, mechanistic complexity, and high domain expertise--demands that exceed both monolithic agent systems and traditional centralized platforms. To address this gap we propose OpenAaaS, an open-source hierarchical and distributed Agent-as-a-Service framework that enables organized multi-agent collaboration for intelligent materials design. OpenAaaS is built on a single foundational principle: code flows, data stays still. A Master Agent plans and decomposes complex research tasks without requiring direct access to subordinate agents' managed data and computational resources. Sub-agents, deployed as near-data execution nodes, retain full sovereignty over local datasets, proprietary algorithms, and specialized hardware. This architecture guarantees that raw data never leaves its domain of origin while enabling cross-scale, cross-domain secure integration of previously isolated materials intelligence silos. We validate the framework through two representative case studies: (i) AlphaAgent, an evidence-grounded materials literature analysis executor that achieves 4.66/5.0 on deep analytical questions against single-pass RAG baselines; and (ii) an ultra-large-scale hexa-high-entropy alloy descriptor database service that demonstrates secure near-data execution and domain-specific scientific workflows under strict data-sovereignty constraints. OpenAaaS establishes a principled pathway toward "organized research" via agent collectives, offering a scalable foundation for next-generation materials intelligent design platforms. All source code is available at this https URL .

TokaMind for Power Grid: Cross-Domain Transfer from Fusion Plasma

Medium 2605.11033
JC Wu, Norton Lee, Kai Siang Chen
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：TokaMind 多模态 Transformer 从核聚变等离子体诊断预训练迁移至电力电网，在严重事件分类中 F1 达 0.837，并揭示分类难度由电网拓扑结构决定。
🎯研究动机

预训练模型在源域（如核聚变）表现优异，但其表征能否迁移至物理不同但结构相似的领域（如电力电网）尚不清楚，且现有迁移评估缺乏系统性框架。

❓解决问题

验证 TokaMind 预训练表征在四个跨域任务（轴承退化、涡扇退化、两个电力电网 PMU 数据集）中的迁移有效性，并识别促进迁移的特征。

🔎现象分析

分类难度由 provider 级电网拓扑结构决定，而非模型容量；单窗口早期预警中 TokaMind 优于 CNN，但多窗口时优势消失；CSD 指标作为置信门控可提升 F1。

🛠️主要方法

使用预训练的 TokaMind 多模态 Transformer，在四个域进行微调或直接评估，分析迁移效果；提出 CSD 指标作为置信门控机制。

📊实验结果

在四个域（轴承退化、NASA CMAPSS、两个电力电网 PMU 数据集）上进行系统实验；在 GESL/PNNL 500 事件基准上，TokaMind 测试 F1=0.837±0.040（3 种子），单窗口早期预警 F1=0.889 vs CNN 0.878，CSD 门控 F1 从 0.696 提升至 0.750。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次在核聚变领域外验证 TokaMind 的跨域迁移能力，建立迁移性框架。
  • 识别四种促进迁移的特征，并揭示分类难度由拓扑结构决定。
  • 提出基于 CSD 置信门控的评估协议，在电力电网基准上提升 F1 至 0.750。
⚠️方法局限
  • 迁移效果依赖于目标域与源域的结构对齐程度，部分对齐时性能有限。
  • CSD 门控仅覆盖 63% 样本，未覆盖部分性能未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

TokaMind is a multi-modal transformer (MMT) foundation model pre-trained on tokamak plasma diagnostics data from MAST, where it was shown to outperform CNN-based approaches on fusion benchmarks. We investigate whether its learned representations generalize to physically distinct but structurally analogous domains. Through systematic experimentation across four domains-industrial bearing degradation, NASA CMAPSS turbofan degradation, and two independent power grid PMU datasets-we identify four transfer-favoring characteristics that help explain where TokaMind's pretrained representations are most effective. Power grid synchrophasor data matches this target-domain profile most directly, while industrial degradation datasets demonstrate that TokaMind can still yield useful performance under partial alignment, especially when task design and feature construction expose physically meaningful degradation structure. On the GESL/PNNL 500-event benchmark with provider-aware evaluation, TokaMind achieves test $\text{F1} = 0.837 \pm 0.040$ (3~seeds) for severe event classification. Our central finding, however, is not the aggregate score: classification difficulty is structurally determined by provider-level grid topology, not model capacity. In the single-window early-warning regime, TokaMind outperforms a CNN baseline (F1~0.889 vs.~0.878)--a reversal that disappears as more event windows are provided. Furthermore, Critical Slowing Down (CSD) indicators, used as a confidence gate rather than a classification label, improve F1 from 0.696 to 0.750 at 63% coverage-outperforming the CNN baseline (0.636) at any coverage level. These results establish the first cross-domain validation of TokaMind outside nuclear fusion and propose a transferability framework and revised evaluation protocol for multi-source PMU datasets.

生物/蛋白质/药物 2 篇

CoRe-Gen: Robust Spectrum-to-Structure Generation under Imperfect Fingerprint Conditions

Medium 2605.12980
Tianbo Liu, Chixiang Lu, Jing Hao, Hengyu Zhang, Lifei Wang, Haibo Jiang, Xiaojuan Qi
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 CoRe-Gen，通过合成谱预训练、频率感知指纹噪声和结构感知自回归解码，解决质谱到分子结构生成中预测指纹噪声导致的性能下降问题。
🎯研究动机

从串联质谱推断分子结构在数据库覆盖范围外仍具挑战，现有方法将任务分解为谱到指纹预测和指纹到结构解码，但部署时解码器依赖有噪声的预测指纹而非真实指纹，导致结构误差传播，尤其影响长尾子结构。

❓解决问题

解决谱到结构生成中因预测指纹噪声引起的条件不匹配问题，即模型在干净输入上训练但需在噪声预测下运行。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，预测指纹引入的结构化误差会传播到生成阶段，导致条件不匹配，尤其对长尾子结构影响严重。

🛠️主要方法

CoRe-Gen 通过三个组件解决：1) 合成谱预训练编码器以改善中间条件；2) 解码器训练时使用频率感知指纹噪声以匹配部署噪声；3) 结构感知自回归解码，结合组合 SELFIES 表示、辅助结构监督和轻量化学约束以缓解残余误差。

📊实验结果

在标准基准 NPLIB1 和 MassSpecGym 上进行实验，NPLIB1 上取得新 SOTA，MassSpecGym 上保持竞争力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CoRe-Gen 框架，显式解决谱到结构生成中预测指纹噪声导致的性能下降问题。
  • 在 NPLIB1 基准上达到新 SOTA，Top-1 准确率 19.54%，Top-10 准确率 29.92%，并在 MassSpecGym 上保持竞争力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对合成谱预训练的数据质量敏感。
  • 频率感知噪声策略可能无法完全覆盖所有真实噪声模式。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Molecular structure elucidation from tandem mass spectra (MS/MS) remains challenging, particularly for de novo generation beyond database coverage. A common approach decomposes the task into spectrum-to-fingerprint prediction followed by fingerprint-to-structure decoding, enabling the use of large-scale molecular corpora. However, at deployment, the decoder relies on predicted rather than oracle fingerprints, introducing structured errors that propagate into generation. This results in a fundamental condition mismatch, where models trained on clean inputs must operate under noisy, biased predictions, especially for long-tail substructures. We present CoRe-Gen that explicitly addresses this gap. CoRe-Gen improves the intermediate condition via synthetic-spectrum pretraining of the encoder, matches deployment-time noise through frequency-aware fingerprint corruption during decoder training, and mitigates residual errors using structure-aware autoregressive decoding with compositional SELFIES representations, auxiliary structural supervision, and lightweight chemical constraints. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that CoRe-Gen establishes a new state of the art on NPLIB1, achieving 19.54\% Top-1 and 29.92\% Top-10 exact-match accuracy, while remaining competitive on the more challenging MassSpecGym benchmark. Importantly, CoRe-Gen preserves the efficiency advantages of autoregressive decoding, providing a practical and scalable solution for robust spectrum-to-structure generation under realistic conditions.

Neural Surrogate Forward Modelling For Electrocardiology Without Explicit Intracellular Conductivity Tensor

Medium 2605.13366
Shaheim Ogbomo-Harmitt, Cesare Magnetti, Jakub Grzelak, Oleg Aslanidi
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：用深度学习替代传统物理模型，无需细胞内电导率张量即可从心房电位预测心电图。
🎯研究动机

传统心脏电生理正向模型需要不可直接测量的细胞内电导率张量，引入结构建模误差，限制临床非侵入性评估。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖显式细胞内电导率张量的情况下，实现从心房电位到远场心电图的准确正向建模。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建深度神经网络，学习左心房细胞内电位到远场心电图的直接映射，训练时无需显式电导率输入。

📊实验结果

在 74 个受试者数据上训练，R²为 0.949±0.037。摘要未提供更多实验细节。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种无需细胞内电导率张量的神经替代正向建模方法。
  • 在仅 74 个受试者数据上验证了模型的有效性，R²达 0.949±0.037。
⚠️方法局限
  • 训练数据量小（仅 74 个受试者），泛化性待验证。
  • 仅针对左心房和房颤场景，可能不适用于其他心脏区域或心律。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurate forward modelling is essential for non-invasive cardiac electrophysiology, particularly in atrial fibrillation, where electrical activation is highly disorganised. Conventional physics-based forward models require explicit specification of intracellular conductivity tensors, which are not directly measurable in clinical practice and introduce structural modelling errors. This proof-of-concept study presents a deep learning approach that learns a direct mapping from left atrial intracellular electrical potentials to far-field ECGs without requiring explicit intracellular conductivity inputs at inference time. Despite training only on 74 subjects, the model achieved an R2 of 0.949 \pm 0.037, highlighting potential to reduce structural uncertainty and improve non-invasive AF assessment.

化学 1 篇

Margin-calibrated Classifier Guidance for Property-driven Synthesis Planning

High 2605.13101
Najwa Laabid, Vikas Garg
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出基于边际校准分类器的序列完成排序方法，显著提升属性驱动的逆合成规划性能。
🎯研究动机

合成规划需要高效化学反应序列，现有单步逆合成模型缺乏对特定约束（如化学家偏好）的引导能力，而直接使用交叉熵训练的辅助分类器无法有效覆盖稀疏单断开反应数据集的分布。

❓解决问题

如何在不重新训练自回归生成器的情况下，利用分类器引导单步逆合成模型生成满足特定属性（如反应类型、Tanimoto 相似度）的序列。

🔎现象分析

交叉熵训练的辅助分类器不足以覆盖稀疏单断开反应数据集的 token 级分布，导致无法有效引导解码。

🛠️主要方法

提出序列完成排序（SCR）方法，采用对比论证和基于边际的损失函数校准分类器，使其在解码过程中能有效区分续接序列。

📊实验结果

在 USPTO-190 数据集上，给定化学家指定的引导目标，SCR 在反应类型引导下多步求解率从 16.8%（无引导）提升至 78.4%，在 Tanimoto 引导下达到 95.3%，并解锁了 33 个基线无法解决的靶标。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了交叉熵训练的分类器在引导逆合成生成中的不足，并提出了边际校准的解决方案。
  • 提出了 SCR 方法，通过对比学习和边际损失校准分类器，显著提升多步逆合成求解率。
  • 在 USPTO-190 数据集上，SCR 在反应类型和 Tanimoto 引导下分别达到 78.4% 和 95.3% 的多步求解率，解锁了 33 个基线无法解决的靶标。
  • 有效缩小了无模板方法与基于模板方法之间的多样性差距。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖于预训练的单步逆合成模型，可能受限于其质量。
  • 边际校准需要额外的对比样本构建，可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Synthesis planning seeks an efficient sequence of chemical reactions that produce a target molecule. Typically, a pretrained single-step (autoregressive) retrosynthesis model is repeatedly invoked to generate such a sequence. Classifier guidance can, in principle, help steer the output of single-step model toward reactions that satisfy specific constraints or accommodate chemist's preferences during inference without having to retrain the autoregressive generator. We expose the insufficiency of auxiliary classifiers trained with cross-entropy loss to override the unconditional token-level distributions learned from typical sparse single-disconnection reaction datasets. We overcome this issue with a novel method called Sequence Completion Ranking (SCR), which employs contrastive argumentation and a margin-based loss to calibrate the classifier so that it can meaningfully discriminate between continuations during decoding. We formally establish that margin-calibrated classifiers can expand the set of property-satisfying sequences reachable under guided beam search. Empirically, on USPTO-190, given chemist-specified guidance targets, SCR substantially improves multi-step solve rates from $16.8\%$ (unguided generator) to $78.4\%$ with reaction-type guidance and $95.3\%$ with Tanimoto guidance, unlocking valid routes for 33 targets ($17.4\%$) previously unsolvable with baselines. Our method also effectively closes the long-standing diversity gap between template-free and template-based methods.

气候/地球科学 1 篇

Multi-Quantile Regression for Extreme Precipitation Downscaling

Medium 2605.12762
Hamed Najafi, Gareth Lagerwall, Jayantha Obeysekera, Jason Liu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出多分位数超分辨率网络 Q-SRDRN，通过分位数损失和 CNN 专用设计大幅提升极端降水事件的检测率。
🎯研究动机

现有深度超分辨率降尺度模型在预测极端降水事件时系统性低估，导致洪水风险评估不准确，主要障碍在于损失函数而非数据。

❓解决问题

解决降水降尺度中极端事件（重尾事件）预测不足的问题。

🔎现象分析

在强度加权 MAE 损失下，数据增强（如 cVAE）会平均真实和合成标签，导致预测均值偏移而非条件分布，从而无法捕捉极端事件。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Q-SRDRN，一种多分位数超分辨率网络，使用 pinball 损失训练多个分位数（0.50, 0.95, 0.99, 0.999）；设计 IncrementBound 强制单调性并保持梯度身份，以及独立的分位数输出头。

📊实验结果

在佛罗里达（对流 / 热带气旋主导）、加利福尼亚（大气河流主导）和德克萨斯三个区域进行实验，使用 200 mm/day 阈值评估检测率、KL 散度和 RMSE。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示极端降水降尺度中损失函数是主要瓶颈，而非数据。
  • 提出 Q-SRDRN 架构，通过多分位数回归和 CNN 专用设计实现极端事件的高效检测。
  • 在三个区域（佛罗里达、加利福尼亚、德克萨斯）上验证，极端事件检测率提升 18 倍以上。
⚠️方法局限
  • cVAE 数据增强无法跨区域迁移。
  • 方法依赖大尺度信号强度，在信号弱时需增强辅助。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deep super-resolution networks for precipitation downscaling achieve strong bulk skill yet systematically under-predict the heavy-tail events that drive flood risk. We demonstrate that the primary obstacle is the loss function, not the data: under intensity-weighted MAE, real and synthetic labels at the same input are simply averaged, meaning data augmentation shifts the predicted mean rather than the conditional distribution. We resolve this with Q-SRDRN, a multi-quantile super-resolution network trained with pinball loss at tau in 0.50, 0.95, 0.99, 0.999. Two CNN-specific design choices make this practical: IncrementBound enforces monotonicity while preserving each quantile channel's gradient identity, and separate per-quantile output heads provide independent filter banks for bulk and tail detection. Under this design, data augmentation via cVAE becomes complementary: the median head absorbs synthetic patterns without contaminating upper quantiles. Empirically, on Florida (convective/tropical-cyclone dominated), the un-augmented Q-SRDRN P999 head detects 1,598 of 2,111 events at 200 mm/day versus 88 for the deterministic baseline--an 18x detection-rate gain (4.2% to 75.7%)--with 63% lower KL divergence and 3.9% lower RMSE. Adding cVAE-generated samples lifts the P50 channel from 14 to 1,038 hits at 200 mm/day. On California (atmospheric-river dominated), the architecture reaches near-perfect detection (P999 SEDI >= 0.996 through 300 mm/day). On Texas, the baseline catches only 2 of 10,720 events at 200 mm/day while the P999 head catches 8,776 (81.9%). While the cVAE does not transfer across regions, multi-quantile regression captures extremes wherever the large-scale signal is strong, while augmentation rescues the median where it is not.

物理/分子动力学 1 篇

Di-BiLPS: Denoising induced Bidirectional Latent-PDE-Solver under Sparse Observations

Medium 2605.13790
Zhonghao Li, Chaoyu Liu, Qian Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 Di-BiLPS 框架，在极稀疏观测下高效求解 PDE 正反问题，实现 SOTA 性能与零样本超分辨率。
🎯研究动机

现实应用中 PDE 观测数据极其稀疏，传统数值求解器和现有神经方法在高分辨率下推理效率低、精度严重下降，亟需一种能在极稀疏条件下高效且准确的统一框架。

❓解决问题

在观测数据极其稀疏（低至 3%）的条件下，同时高效求解 PDE 的正问题和逆问题，并保持高分辨率推理能力。

🔎现象分析

现有神经方法在中等稀疏观测下表现尚可，但在极稀疏场景下精度大幅下降，且高分辨率推理效率受限。

🛠️主要方法

结合变分自编码器压缩高维输入至紧凑潜空间，潜扩散模块建模不确定性，对比学习对齐表征；并引入基于方差保持扩散过程的 PDE-informed 去噪算法，全部在潜空间操作。

📊实验结果

在多个 PDE 基准上，极稀疏输入（低至 3%）下 Di-BiLPS 一致达到 SOTA 性能，并大幅降低计算成本。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Di-BiLPS 统一框架，在极稀疏观测下同时处理 PDE 正反问题，达到 SOTA 性能。
  • 引入 PDE-informed 去噪算法和潜空间操作，显著提升推理效率并支持零样本超分辨率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定 PDE 类型，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 潜空间压缩可能丢失部分细节信息。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Partial differential equations (PDEs) are fundamental for modeling complex natural and physical phenomena. In many real-world applications, however, observational data are extremely sparse, which severely limits the applicability of both classical numerical solvers and existing neural approaches. While neural methods have shown promising results under moderately sparse observations, their inference efficiency at high resolutions is limited, and their accuracy degrades substantially in the extremely sparse regime. In this work, we propose the Di-BiLPS, a unified neural framework that effectively handle both forward and inverse PDE problems under extremely sparse observations. Di-BiLPS combines a variational autoencoder to compress high-dimensional inputs into a compact latent space, a latent diffusion module to model uncertainty, and contrastive learning to align representations. Operating entirely in this latent space, the framework achieves efficient inference while retaining flexible input-output mapping. In addition, we introduce a PDE-informed denoising algorithm based on a variance-preserving diffusion process, which further improves inference efficiency. Extensive experiments on multiple PDE benchmarks demonstrate that Di-BiLPS consistently achieves SOTA performance under extremely sparse inputs (as low as 3%), while substantially reducing computational cost. Moreover, Di-BiLPS enables zero-shot super-resolution, as it allows predictions over continuous spatial-temporal domains.

神经符号/混合 AI 4 篇 · 1 个细分

符号推理 + 神经网络 4 篇

Differentiable Learning of Lifted Action Schemas for Classical Planning

Medium 2605.13282
Jonas Reiter, Jakob Elias Gebler, Hector Geffner
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种可微神经网络架构，从完全可观测但动作参数未观测的状态轨迹中学习提升动作模式。
🎯研究动机

经典规划器依赖 STRIPS/PDDL 中的提升动作模式实现紧凑表示和强搜索启发式，但手动设计这些模式成本高；从数据中自动学习提升动作模式是结构泛化的关键，现有方法需要不同类型的观测，而实际场景中动作参数往往不可直接观测。

❓解决问题

从状态完全可观测但动作参数未观测的轨迹中，同时学习提升动作模式并识别动作参数。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

设计一种可微神经网络架构，通过端到端学习从状态变化中推断动作参数和模式，输出可集成到神经符号模型中的可微组件。

📊实验结果

在多个规划域上评估，测试了恢复真实结构的能力、对观测噪声的鲁棒性以及与基于槽的动态模型变体的比较。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种可微神经网络架构，解决从部分观测轨迹中学习提升动作模式的问题
  • 在多个规划域上验证了架构恢复真实结构的能力，并测试了对观测噪声的鲁棒性
⚠️方法局限
  • 假设状态完全可观测，实际中可能不成立
  • 仅处理动作参数未观测的简化设置，未扩展到图像序列等更复杂输入
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Classical planners can effectively solve very large deterministic MDPs represented in STRIPS or PDDL where states are sets of atoms over objects and relations, and lifted action schemas add or delete these atoms. This compact representation yields strong search heuristics and provides an ideal setting for structural generalization, since lifted relations and action schemas give rise to infinitely many domain instances. A central challenge is to learn these relations and action schemas from data, and recent approaches have addressed this problem using different types of observations. In this work, we develop a novel neural network architecture for learning action schemas from traces where states are fully observed but action arguments are unobserved. The problem is a simplification but an important step towards learning planning domains from sequences of images and action labels, and we aim to solve this simplification in a nearly perfect manner. The challenge lies in learning the action schemas while simultaneously identifying the action arguments from observed state changes. Our approach yields a robust differentiable component that can then be integrated into larger neuro-symbolic models. We evaluate the architecture on various planning domains, where the learned lifted action schemas must recover the ground-truth structure. Additionally, we report experiments on robustness to observation noise and on a variation related to slot-based dynamics models.

Neurosymbolic Auditing of Natural-Language Software Requirements

Medium 2605.13817
Bethel Hall, William Eiers
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：提出神经符号方法 VERIMED，结合 LLM 与 SMT 求解器审计自然语言软件需求，通过随机形式化检测歧义，并用 SMT 查询暴露不一致与安全违规。
🎯研究动机

自然语言软件需求常存在歧义、不一致和未明确说明，在安全关键领域这些缺陷会传播到形式化模型和实现中，导致验证错误规范或发布不安全行为。

❓解决问题

如何自动审计自然语言软件需求，检测歧义、不一致、空洞和安全违规。

🔎现象分析

随机形式化中的随机变化是歧义的信号：允许多种合理解释的需求会产生 SMT 不等价的形式化，双向 SMT 等价性检查可将这种分歧转化为可求解的测试。

🛠️主要方法

VERIMED：神经符号流水线，使用 LLM 将需求翻译为形式逻辑，通过随机变化检测歧义，并通过 SMT 求解器查询暴露不一致、空洞和安全违规。

📊实验结果

在开源血液透析安全需求上进行了广泛实验，VERIMED 成功减少了歧义敏感需求，并通过 SMT 查询实现了严格审计。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出利用随机形式化变化作为歧义信号的方法，并通过 SMT 等价性检查进行验证。
  • 展示符号反馈的粒度重要性：具体 SMT 反例将验证准确率从 55.4% 提升至 98.5%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 LLM 翻译质量，可能引入新错误。
  • SMT 求解器对复杂逻辑可能效率低。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Natural-language software requirements are often ambiguous, inconsistent, and underspecified; in safety-critical domains, these defects propagate into formal models that verify the wrong specification and into implementations that ship unsafe behavior. We show that large language models, equipped with an SMT solver, can audit such requirements: translating them into formal logic, detecting ambiguity through stochastic variation in the generated formalization, and exposing inconsistency, vacuousness, and safety violations through solver queries on the resulting specification. We present VERIMED, a neurosymbolic pipeline that operationalizes this idea for medical-device software requirements, and report two findings. First, stochastic variation across independent formalizations is a signal of ambiguity: requirements that admit multiple plausible interpretations produce SMT-inequivalent formalizations, and bidirectional SMT equivalence checking turns this disagreement into a solver-checkable test. Second, the usefulness of symbolic feedback depends on its granularity: in counterexample-guided repair on a hemodialysis question-answering benchmark, concrete SMT counterexamples raise verified accuracy from 55.4% to 98.5%. Over an extensive experimental evaluation on open-source hemodialysis safety requirements, we show that the LLM-based approach in VERIMED successfully reduces ambiguity-sensitive requirements and enables rigorous auditing of software requirements through SMT-based queries.

On the Size Complexity and Decidability of First-Order Progression

Medium 2605.12691
Jens Classen, Daxin Liu
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：首次系统分析一阶进展的规模复杂度，证明三类动作类别的进展规模为多项式增长，并保持可判定性。
🎯研究动机

知识库更新（进展）通常需要二阶逻辑，但实际应用需要一阶可判定且规模可控的特殊情况。

❓解决问题

分析局部效应、正规和循环动作这三类一阶可进展动作类的进展规模复杂度，并验证其可判定性保持。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

在情景演算框架下，对三类动作类进行理论分析，证明进展规模多项式增长，并利用可判定片段（如两变量一阶逻辑、带常数的全称理论）保持可判定性。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统分析一阶进展的规模复杂度，证明三类动作类的进展规模为多项式增长。
