  • 证明当知识库属于可判定片段时，进展保持在同一片段内，确保可判定性和实际适用性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论分析可能依赖特定假设，实际系统实现中可能需额外验证。
  • 仅覆盖三类动作类，更复杂动作类的进展性质未涉及。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Progression, the task of updating a knowledge base to reflect action effects, generally requires second-order logic. Identifying first-order special cases, by restricting either the knowledge base or action effects, has long been a central topic in reasoning about actions. It is known that local-effect, normal, and acyclic actions, three increasingly expressive classes, admit first-order progression. However, a systematic analysis of the size of such progressions, crucial for practical applications, has been missing. In this paper, using the framework of Situation Calculus, we show that under reasonable assumptions, first-order progression for these action classes grows only polynomially. Moreover, we show that when the KB belongs to decidable fragments such as two-variable first-order logic or universal theories with constants, the progression remains within the same fragment, ensuring decidability and practical applicability.

A Horn extension of DL-Lite with NL data complexity

Low 2605.13367
Janos Arpasi, Bartosz Jan Bednarczyk, Magdalena Ortiz
arXiv PDF cs.LO
TL;DR：提出一种新的描述逻辑 ELbotpreceq，通过分层机制控制合取与递归的交互，在保持 NL 数据复杂度的同时扩展了 DL-Lite，支持可达性公理和受限合取。
🎯研究动机

本体中介查询回答（OMQA）领域存在 AC0 与 PTime 的二分法，DL-Lite 是唯一支持一阶重写的选择，但无法表达图查询语言（如 GQL）所需的 NL 复杂度特性，限制了 OMQA 在图结构数据上的应用。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种描述逻辑，既能严格扩展 DL-Lite 以支持合取和递归（如 ELI），又能保持 NL 数据复杂度，从而可重写为图查询语言。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出 DL-Lite 的 AC0 复杂度与图查询语言的 NL 复杂度之间存在鸿沟，现有 Horn DL（如 ELI）的数据复杂度为 PTime，无法直接用于图查询重写。

🛠️主要方法

引入分层机制控制 ELI 中合取与递归的交互，定义 ELbotpreceq 逻辑；通过重写为嵌套双向正则路径查询（nested two-way regular path queries）证明 NL 上界。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ELbotpreceq，一种严格扩展 DL-Lite 核心、支持可达性公理和受限合取的描述逻辑，数据复杂度为 NL。
  • 通过重写为 GQL 片段（嵌套双向正则路径查询）建立 NL 上界，为 OMQA 扩展到图查询语言提供初步证据。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅提供理论重写结果，未进行实证评估。
  • 可能无法处理更复杂的合取或递归模式。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The literature on ontology-mediated query answering (OMQA) has been shaped by two key results: first-order rewritability for DL-Lite, and PTime-hardness of data complexity for essentially every description logic beyond it. This has effectively positioned DL-Lite as the only practical choice for query rewriting, restricting OMQA solutions to first-order queries and ontologies that can be rewritten into them. This AC0 vs. PTime dichotomy is especially limiting if we consider that OMQA targets graph-structured data, and that standard graph query languages (including the recent ISO standards GQL and SQL/PGQ) are typically NL-complete. Towards identifying a rich Horn DL that can be rewritten into graph query languages and that can still express many ELI and DL-Lite ontologies, we introduce a stratification mechanism for ELI that controls the interaction between conjunction and recursion. In this way, we obtain ELbotpreceq, a description logic that strictly extends the core DL-Lite, supports reachability axioms and restricted conjunction, and allows for reasoning in NL. We establish the NL upper bound via a rewriting into nested two-way regular path queries, a fragment of GQL, providing initial evidence that our ontology language is a promising candidate for extending OMQA to graph query languages.

应用: 神经/认知科学 3 篇 · 2 个细分

认知建模 2 篇

Human face perception reflects inverse-generative and naturalistic discriminative objectives

Medium 2605.12619
Wenxuan Guo, Heiko H. Schütt, Kamila Maria Jozwik, Katherine R. Storrs, Nikolaus Kriegeskorte, Tal Golan
arXiv PDF q-bio.NC
TL;DR：人类面孔感知由逆生成和自然图像统计目标塑造。
🎯研究动机

面孔感知的神经计算机制尚不明确，不同理论模型在随机采样面孔上难以区分。

❓解决问题

识别支持人类面孔感知的神经网络训练目标。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

比较六种共享架构但训练目标不同的神经网络模型，使用争议性面孔对和随机面孔对，与 864 名人类参与者的面孔不相似性判断进行对比。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现优先处理高层不变结构的模型（逆渲染、面孔识别、物体分类）最匹配人类判断。
  • 自然图像训练的模型优于合成图像训练的模型。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅测试了单一架构的模型。
  • 未涉及其他面孔处理任务（如身份识别）。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The perceptual representations supporting our ability to recognize faces remain a computational mystery. Deep neural networks offer mechanistic hypotheses for human face perception, but theoretically distinct models often make indistinguishable representational predictions for randomly sampled faces. To expose diagnostic differences among these hypotheses, we compared six neural network models sharing an architecture but trained on distinct tasks, using face pairs optimized to elicit contrasting model predictions ("controversial" pairs) alongside randomly sampled pairs. We tested model predictions against face-dissimilarity judgments from 864 human participants across stimulus sets differing in realism and pose variation. Models prioritizing high-level, invariant structures (trained via inverse rendering, face identification, or object classification) most robustly matched human judgments. Furthermore, models trained on natural images typically outperformed synthetic-trained counterparts. Together, these findings suggest that human face perception is shaped by mechanisms that infer latent causes of facial appearance, discount nuisance variation, and are tuned by natural image statistics.

Information as Maximum-Caliber Deviation: A bridge between Integrated Information Theory and the Free Energy Principle

Medium 2605.12536
Alexander Kearney
arXiv PDF q-bio.NC
TL;DR：提出信息作为最大熵路径偏差，统一整合信息理论与自由能原理。
🎯研究动机

自由能原理（FEP）和整合信息理论（IIT）是理解自组织与意识的重要框架，但缺乏严格的数学映射，限制了精确性和可检验性。

❓解决问题

建立 FEP 与 IIT 之间的严格数学桥梁，并统一到最大熵（MaxCal）框架下。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体实验现象，但提到该方法可能解释神经元培养中Φ的“山形轨迹”。

🛠️主要方法

将信息定义为有限时间窗口内实际动力学相对于约束最大熵路径的偏差ψ，并证明 IIT 的因果库可从 MaxCal 变分原理导出，且与主动推理在朗之万动力学下对偶。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出信息作为最大熵路径偏差的统一定义，连接 IIT 与 FEP。
  • 通过大偏差理论和中心极限定理，证明信息ψ等价于预测编码中的预测误差。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论推导为主，缺乏实证验证。
  • 可能仅适用于特定动力学系统（如马尔可夫链、伊辛模型）。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The Free Energy Principle (FEP) is a leading framework for mathematically modeling self-organization and learning, while Integrated Information Theory (IIT) is a computational ontology of consciousness oriented around irreducible cause and effect. While conceptual unifications have been proposed and appear to be supported by empirical findings, the absence of a rigorous mathematical mapping places upper bounds on their precision and testability. This work proposes that information can be defined as the deviation $\psi$ of realized dynamics from a constrained maximum-caliber (MaxCal) path ensemble over a finite time horizon. Under this definition, each of the cause/effect repertoires central to IIT 3.0 emerge directly from MaxCal variational principles, allowing IIT's phenomenological calculus to be re-derived from constrained entropy-maximization (CMEP). This framework supplies a theoretical bridge to active inference, which is mathematically dual to CMEP under Langevin dynamics, and offers a principled route for extending IIT to new dynamical regimes. When the approach is applied under the Central Limit Theorem (CLT) for Markov chains and via large deviations theory (LDT) to Ising models, information $\psi$ is shown to be equivalent to prediction error under accompanying predictive coding models. This may hold relevance to the ``hill-shaped trajectory'' of $\Phi$ observed in neuronal cultures adapting to sensory inputs. Together, these results provide a physically and mathematically grounded rationale for studying the convergence of FEP, IIT, and thermodynamic frameworks of cognition such as recent work grounding consciousness in violations of the Fluctuation-Dissipation Theorem (FDT).

脑信号/脑解码 1 篇

Bayesian In Vivo Tracking of Synapses using Joint Poisson Deconvolution and Diffeomorphic Registration

Medium 2605.13455
Shashwat Kumar, Dominic M. Padova, Binish Narang, Gabrielle I. Coste, Austin R. Graves, Richard L. Huganir, Adam S. Charles, Michael I. Miller et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出贝叶斯框架联合泊松反卷积与微分同胚配准，实现体内突触追踪。
🎯研究动机

体内双光子显微镜成像信噪比低、组织运动非线性、荧光波动和点扩散函数模糊，导致高密度突触检测与追踪困难。

❓解决问题

在低信噪比、非线性运动和非平稳荧光条件下，同时检测和追踪突触。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于模板的贝叶斯框架，将突触建模为变亮度点源，联合微分同胚映射、高斯点扩散函数和泊松观测模型，同时实现模板构建、去噪反卷积、荧光强度推断、配准和置信区间估计。

📊实验结果

在 2D+t 模拟数据集和 3D+t 小鼠体内荧光突触数据集上进行了验证。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出统一的贝叶斯框架，同时解决突触检测、去噪、反卷积、配准和不确定性量化。
  • 在模拟和真实体内显微镜数据集上验证了方法的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖模板初始化质量。
  • 计算复杂度可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Synapses are densely packed submicron structures that dynamically reorganize during learning and memory formation. Longitudinal \textit{in vivo} imaging of fluorescently tagged synaptic receptors offers a promising opportunity to study large-scale synaptic dynamics and how these processes are disrupted in neurological disease. However, in vivo imaging with 2-photon microscopy uses low laser power and therefore suffers from low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) and high shot noise, nonlinear tissue motion between days, nonstationary fluctuations in synaptic fluorescence, and significant blur induced by the microscope point spread function (PSF). Together, these factors make it challenging to detect and track synapses, especially in regions with high synaptic density. This paper presents a novel template-based framework for modeling synapses as varying luminance point sources that move under a nonlinear tissue deformation. Taking a unified Bayesian approach, we apply this model to microscopy data by deriving a posterior that incorporates a diffeomorphic mapping for domain warping, a Gaussian point spread function for the imaging process, and a Poisson observation model for raw photon counts. The Bayesian solution simultaneously: (1) Constructs a probabilistic template of synapse locations, (2) denoises and deconvolves the image data, (3) infers fluorescence intensities, (4) performs diffeomorphic image registration to correct for tissue motion, and (5) provides confidence regions for these parameter estimates. We demonstrate the framework on both a 2D+t simulated dataset and a 3D+t longitudinal \textit{in vivo} microscopy dataset of fluorescent synapses imaged in a mouse over two weeks.

因果推理 2 篇 · 2 个细分

反事实推理 1 篇

Counterfactual Reasoning for Causal Responsibility Attribution in Probabilistic Multi-Agent Systems

Medium 2605.13077
Chunyan Mu, Muhammad Najib
arXiv PDF cs.MA
TL;DR：在多智能体系统中，利用反事实推理和 Shapley 值量化智能体的因果责任，并支持责任感知的策略推理。
🎯研究动机

多智能体系统中责任分配是设计和分析的基础挑战，现有方法缺乏对概率环境中因果责任的量化与公平分配。

❓解决问题

如何在概率多智能体系统中公平且一致地量化智能体对结果的因果责任，并支持责任感知的策略推理。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将系统建模为并发随机多玩家博弈，引入回溯反事实责任概念，利用 Shapley 值分配责任，并基于纳什均衡计算稳定策略。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出了一种基于反事实推理的因果责任量化方法，满足公平性和一致性等性质。
  • 构建了支持验证和策略推理的责任感知多智能体系统框架，并展示了如何计算权衡责任与期望奖励的稳定策略。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于完全可观测的博弈场景。
  • 计算 Shapley 值在智能体数量多时可能面临组合爆炸问题。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Responsibility allocation -- determining the extent to which agents are accountable for outcomes -- is a fundamental challenge in the design and analysis of multi-agent systems. In this work, we model such systems as concurrent stochastic multi-player games and introduce a notion of retrospective (backward) counterfactual responsibility, which quantifies an agent's accountability for outcomes resulting from a given strategy profile. To allocate responsibility among agents, we utilise the Shapley value and formally show that this method satisfies key desirable properties, including fairness and consistency. Building on this foundation, we propose a formal framework that supports both verification and strategic reasoning in responsibility-aware multi-agent systems. Furthermore, by adopting Nash equilibrium as the solution concept, we demonstrate how to compute stable strategy profiles in which agents trade off responsibility against expected reward.

因果推断/处理效应 1 篇

Towards a holistic understanding of Selection Bias for Causal Effect Identification

Medium 2605.13430
Yiwen Qiu, Filip Kovacevic, Shimeng Huang, Peter Spirtes, Francesco Locatello
arXiv PDF stat.ME
TL;DR：提出选择偏差下平均处理效应可识别性的充要条件，扩展了现有图准则。
🎯研究动机

观察性研究中选择偏差普遍存在（如生物银行数据中的健康志愿者偏差），导致从子群体估计的平均处理效应严重偏离总体真实值，亟需更通用的可识别性理论。

❓解决问题

在存在选择偏差的情况下，如何判断并保证平均处理效应（ATE）的可识别性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

利用概率类的弱假设刻画倾向得分和选择概率，推导 ATE 可识别性的充要条件。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 给出了选择偏差下 ATE 可识别性的充要条件。
  • 扩展了现有图可识别性准则，在更弱条件下提供了更全面的理解。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论结果可能依赖特定概率类假设，实际应用中验证困难。
  • 未讨论高维或复杂数据下的计算可行性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Selection bias is pervasive in observational studies. For example, large scale biobanks data can exhibit ``healthy volunteer bias'' when respondents are healthier and of higher socio-economic status than the population they are meant to represent. Recovering causal effects from such sub-population is an important problem in causal inference, as estimating average treatment effects (ATE) from selected populations can result in a severely biased estimate of the ATE from the whole population. In this paper, we investigate the identifiability of the ATE under selection bias. We provide necessary and sufficient conditions for ATE identifiability, leveraging weak assumptions on probability classes to characterize propensity score and selection probability. Compared to previous works, our results extend existing graphical identifiability criteria and offer a more comprehensive understanding of causal effect identification with strictly weaker conditions in the presence of selection bias.

基础设施/软硬件 2 篇 · 2 个细分

推理加速系统 1 篇

KVServe: Service-Aware KV Cache Compression for Communication-Efficient Disaggregated LLM Serving

High 2605.13734
Zedong Liu, Xinyang Ma, Dejun Luo, Hairui Zhao, Bing Lu, Wenjing Huang, Yida Gu, Xingchen Liu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.DC
TL;DR：KVServe 是首个面向分离式 LLM 服务的服务感知自适应 KV 缓存压缩框架，通过贝叶斯搜索和在线控制器实现高效通信。
🎯研究动机

分离式 LLM 服务将 KV 缓存变为跨网络和存储的显式负载，成为端到端瓶颈；现有 KV 压缩方法采用静态配置，无法适应动态变化的服务上下文（如工作负载、带宽、SLO/ 质量预算），导致次优甚至增加延迟。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个服务感知且自适应的 KV 缓存压缩框架，在分离式 LLM 服务中动态选择最优压缩策略以最小化端到端延迟。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，生产环境中服务上下文（工作负载混合、带宽、SLO/ 质量预算）随时间变化，静态 KV 压缩配置无法适应，导致性能次优或延迟增加。

🛠️主要方法

KVServe 包含三个组件：(1) 将 KV 压缩统一为模块化策略空间，支持新组件和跨方法重组；(2) 贝叶斯分析引擎高效搜索该空间并提炼 3D Pareto 候选集，降低 50 倍离线搜索开销；(3) 服务感知在线控制器结合分析延迟模型和轻量级 bandit，在约束下选择配置并纠正离线到在线的不匹配。

📊实验结果

集成到 vLLM，在多个数据集、模型、GPU 和网络上评估，PD 分离服务中 JCT 加速最高 9.13 倍，KV 分离服务中 TTFT 降低最高 32.8 倍。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个服务感知自适应 KV 通信压缩框架 KVServe，用于分离式 LLM 服务。
  • 设计贝叶斯分析引擎高效搜索压缩策略空间，降低 50 倍离线搜索开销。
  • 实现服务感知在线控制器，结合延迟模型和 bandit 动态选择最优配置。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对分离式架构，不适用于非分离式推理。
  • 在线控制器的 bandit 算法可能在高动态环境下仍有收敛延迟。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LLMs are widely adopted in production, pushing inference systems to their limits. Disaggregated LLM serving (e.g., PD separation and KV state disaggregation) improves scalability and cost efficiency, but it also turns KV into an explicit payload crossing network and storage boundaries, making KV a dominant end-to-end bottleneck. Existing KV compression are typically static runtime configurations, despite production service context varies over time in workload mix, bandwidth, and SLO/quality budgets. As a result, a fixed choice can be suboptimal or even increase latency. We present \emph{KVServe}, the first service-aware and adaptive KV communication compression framework for disaggregated LLM serving: KVServe (1) unifies KV compression into a modular strategy space with new components and cross-method recomposition; (2) introduces Bayesian Profiling Engine that efficiently searches this space and distills a 3D Pareto candidate set, reducing $50\times$ offline search overhead; and (3) deploys a Service-Aware Online Controller that combines an analytical latency model with a lightweight bandit to select profiles under constraints and correct offline-to-online mismatch. Integrated into vLLM and evaluated across datasets, models, GPUs and networks, KVServe achieves up to $9.13\times$ JCT speedup in PD-separated serving and up to $32.8\times$ TTFT reduction in KV-disaggregated serving.

训练系统 1 篇

MinT: Managed Infrastructure for Training and Serving Millions of LLMs

High 2605.13779
Mind Lab : Song Cao, Vic Cao, Andrew Chen, Kaijie Chen, Cleon Cheng, Steven Chiang, Kaixuan Fan, Hera Feng et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：MinT 是一个管理百万级 LoRA 策略目录的基础设施系统，支持在共享基础模型上高效训练和服务。
🎯研究动机

在大规模 LLM 部署中，为每个策略生成完整检查点成本高昂，需要一种高效管理大量 LoRA 适配器的方法。

❓解决问题

如何高效地训练、存储和服务数百万个 LoRA 策略，同时共享少量昂贵的基础模型。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

MinT 通过 Scale Up、Scale Down 和 Scale Out 三个维度扩展：支持前沿架构的 LoRA RL 训练；仅移动 LoRA 适配器（<1% 基础模型大小）实现高效切换；分离持久策略寻址与工作集，支持百万级目录和千级并发适配器。

📊实验结果

在 4B 密集模型和 30B MoE 模型上验证，适配器切换加速 18.3x 和 2.85x，并发训练加速 1.77x 和 1.45x，MoE LoRA 加载加速 8.5-8.7x。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MinT 系统，实现百万级 LoRA 策略的高效管理。
  • 通过适配器仅切换、并发 GRPO 训练和打包 MoE LoRA 张量等技术，显著降低延迟和内存开销。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定硬件和框架优化。
  • 未讨论与全量微调方法的对比。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present MindLab Toolkit (MinT), a managed infrastructure system for Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) post-training and online serving. MinT targets a setting where many trained policies are produced over a small number of expensive base-model deployments. Instead of materializing each policy as a merged full checkpoint, MinT keeps the base model resident and moves exported LoRA adapter revisions through rollout, update, export, evaluation, serving, and rollback, hiding distributed training, serving, scheduling, and data movement behind a service interface. MinT scales this path along three axes. Scale Up extends LoRA RL to frontier-scale dense and MoE architectures, including MLA and DSA attention paths, with training and serving validated beyond 1T total parameters. Scale Down moves only the exported LoRA adapter, which can be under 1% of base-model size in rank-1 settings; adapter-only handoff reduces the measured step by 18.3x on a 4B dense model and 2.85x on a 30B MoE, while concurrent multi-policy GRPO shortens wall time by 1.77x and 1.45x without raising peak memory. Scale Out separates durable policy addressability from CPU/GPU working sets: a tensor-parallel deployment supports 10^6-scale addressable catalogs (measured single-engine sweeps through 100K) and thousand-adapter active waves at cluster scale, with cold loading treated as scheduled service work and packed MoE LoRA tensors improving live engine loading by 8.5-8.7x. MinT thus manages million-scale LoRA policy catalogs while training and serving selected adapter revisions over shared 1T-class base models.

优化 1 篇 · 1 个细分

优化器设计 1 篇

Spectral Flattening Is All Muon Needs: How Orthogonalization Controls Learning Rate and Convergence

Medium 2605.13079
Tien-Phat Nguyen, Truong Nguyen, Minh-Phuc Truong, Tuc Nguyen, James Bailey, Trung Le
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：Muon 优化器通过谱平坦化机制实现更大学习率和更快收敛。
🎯研究动机

Muon 优化器在实践中表现出比 SGD 等标准优化器更快的收敛速度和更大的稳定学习率，但其背后的理论机制尚不明确，理解这一机制有助于设计更高效的优化算法。

❓解决问题

解释 Muon 优化器为何能容忍更大学习率并更快收敛的理论原因。

🔎现象分析

Muon 通过正交化动量缓冲并替换奇异值，使得最大稳定步长与梯度的平均奇异值而非最大奇异值成比例，从而允许更大学习率；同时，在 Kronecker 分解曲率模型下，Muon 作为预处理梯度方法改善了有效收敛因子。

🛠️主要方法

理论分析：证明 Muon 的最大稳定步长与梯度平均奇异值成比例；将 Muon 重新解释为预处理梯度方法，并在 Kronecker 分解曲率模型下分析其收敛因子改进。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明 Muon 的最大稳定步长与梯度平均奇异值成比例，而非最大奇异值，解释了其容忍大学习率的能力。
  • 将 Muon 重新解释为预处理梯度方法，并在 Kronecker 分解曲率模型下证明其改善有效收敛因子。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论分析依赖于 Kronecker 分解曲率模型，可能不适用于所有场景。
  • 未讨论 Muon 在其他优化器（如 Adam）上的对比或更广泛的应用限制。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Muon orthogonalizes the momentum buffer before each update, replacing its singular values with ones via Newton-Schulz iterations. This simple change lets Muon tolerate far larger learning rates and converge faster than other optimizers, but why? We show that the mechanism is spectral flattening, and develop two results around it. First, we prove that Muon's maximal stable step size scales with the average singular value of the gradient rather than the largest, which bottlenecks standard gradient descent. Second, we recast Muon as a preconditioned gradient method and show, under a Kronecker-factored curvature model, that it improves the effective convergence factor, with the improvement controlled by the spectrum of the gradient covariance. Extensive experiments validate both results: Muon remains stable at learning rates that cause SGD to diverge within the first few iterations, and reaches accuracy milestones several epochs earlier even at identical step sizes. Taken together, our results offer a principled, geometric explanation for Muon's empirical success.

学习理论 1 篇 · 1 个细分

表达能力 1 篇

Uncovering Symmetry Transfer in Large Language Models via Layer-Peeled Optimization

Medium 2605.12756
Zhehang Du, Hangfeng He, Weijie Su
arXiv PDF math.OC
TL;DR：通过层剥离优化分析，证明 LLM 预训练中目标分布的对称性会转移到模型权重和嵌入的几何结构中。
🎯研究动机

理解 LLM 预训练中交叉熵损失优化如何诱导模型权重和上下文嵌入的几何结构，揭示其内在对称性转移机制。

❓解决问题

研究 LLM 预训练优化策略是否以及如何将目标分布中的对称性转移到模型参数和嵌入的几何结构中。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出约束层剥离优化程序作为 LLM 的数学代理，通过非凸优化分析证明对称性转移，并利用循环对称和置换对称的凸化与下界技术。

📊实验结果

在开源 LLM 上实证验证了理论预测的对称性，尽管训练时未使用显式正则化。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明当目标 token 具有循环移位对称性时，最优 logit 矩阵为循环矩阵，且输出投影和上下文嵌入的 Gram 矩阵形成循环几何。
  • 对于可交换目标分布，证明最优输出投影矩阵形成单纯形等角紧框架，且 logit 矩阵和上下文嵌入继承输入数据的置换对称性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论分析基于层剥离优化代理，可能与完整 LLM 训练存在差距。
  • 仅考虑了循环对称和置换对称两种对称性，其他对称性未涉及。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) are pretrained by minimizing the cross-entropy loss for next-token prediction. In this paper, we study whether this optimization strategy can induce geometric structure in the learned model weights and context embeddings. We approach this problem by analyzing a constrained layer-peeled optimization program, which serves as a mathematically tractable surrogate for LLMs by treating the output projection matrix and last-layer context embeddings as optimization variables. Our analysis of this nonconvex optimization program demonstrates that symmetries in the target next-token distributions are transferred to the global minimizers of the layer-peeled model in a precise group-theoretic sense. Specifically, we prove that when the target tokens exhibit a cyclic-shift symmetry (such as the seven days of the week or the twelve months of the year), the optimal logit matrix is exactly circulant, and the Gram matrices of both the output projections and the context embeddings form circulant geometries as well. Next, for exchangeable target distributions invariant under the symmetric group and, more generally, under two-transitive group actions, we show that the global optimal output projection matrix forms a simplex equiangular tight frame, while the optimal logit matrix and context embeddings inherit the permutation symmetries present in the input data. A key technical step is to reduce the constrained nonconvex factorized problem to an explicit logit-level convex characterization for cyclic symmetry and to a symmetry-based lower bound for permutation symmetry, together with a sharp characterization of the optimal factorization. Finally, we empirically demonstrate that open-source LLMs naturally exhibit symmetries consistent with our theoretical predictions, despite being trained without any explicit regularization promoting such geometric structure.

时间序列与动力系统 1 篇 · 1 个细分

动力系统建模 1 篇

Parallel-in-Time Training of Recurrent Neural Networks for Dynamical Systems Reconstruction

Medium 2605.12683
Florian Hess, Florian Götz, Daniel Durstewitz
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 GTF-DEER 框架，利用并行时间算法高效训练 RNN，实现长序列动力系统重建。
🎯研究动机

动力系统重建依赖序列模型，但经典 BPTT 算法线性时间复杂度限制了序列长度，而并行时间算法（如并行关联扫描）可实现对数时间复杂度，为长序列学习开辟新途径。

❓解决问题

现有并行时间算法中，线性非自治模型（如 SSM）在训练时线性递归限制了学习非线性动力系统的能力，而通用非线性框架（DEER）缺乏稳定有效的训练方法。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出线性训练时递归模型（如 SSM）在重建非线性动力系统时存在局限性，难以准确学习非线性动力学。

🛠️主要方法

在 DEER 框架中引入广义教师强制（GTF），形成 GTF-DEER 方法，确保非线性动力系统在任意序列长度下的稳定有效学习。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GTF-DEER，一种结合广义教师强制与 DEER 框架的并行时间训练方法，用于非线性动力系统重建。
  • 实验证明长序列（T>10^4）训练能显著提升动力系统重建质量，尤其当数据具有长时间尺度特征时。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对超参数敏感，需要调整教师强制策略。
  • 仅适用于可并行化的非线性模型，通用性可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reconstructing nonlinear dynamical systems (DS) from data (DSR) is a fundamental challenge in science and engineering, but it inherently relies on sequential models. Recent breakthroughs for sequential models have produced algorithms that parallelize computation along sequence length $T$, achieving logarithmic time complexity, $\mathcal{O}(\log T)$. Since sequence lengths have been practically limited due to the linear runtime complexity $\mathcal{O}(T)$ of classical backpropagation through time, this opens new avenues for DSR. This paper studies two prominent classes of parallel-in-time algorithms for this task, both of which leverage parallel associative scans as their core computational primitive. The first class comprises models with linear yet non-autonomous dynamics and a nonlinear readout, such as modern State Space Models (SSMs), while the second consists of general nonlinear models which can be parallelized using the DEER framework. We find that the linear training-time recurrence of the first class of models imposes limitations that often hinder learning of accurate nonlinear dynamics. To address this, we augment DEER with Generalized Teacher Forcing (GTF), a novel variant within the more general nonlinear framework that ensures stable and effective learning of nonlinear dynamics across arbitrary sequence lengths. Using GTF-DEER, we investigate the benefits of training on extremely long sequences ($T>10^4$) for DSR. Our results show that access to such long trajectories significantly improves DSR if the data features long time scales. This work establishes GTF-DEER as a robust tool for data-driven discovery and underscores the largely untapped potential of long-sequence learning in modeling complex DS.

没有匹配当前筛选条件的论文。
